| 41–50 | 1d6+6 fully developed _shriekers_  appear.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       |
| 51–60 | 1d4+8 small pods sprout, which then unfurl to allow a luminescent pink toad to crawl out of each one. A toad transforms into a Large or smaller beast (determined by the Narrator) whenever touched. The beast remains for 1 minuto, then disappears in a puff of luminescent pink smoke.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        |
| 61–70 | A fully developed _shambling mound_  appears. It is not hostile but appears perplexed as it is _stunned_  for 1d4 rodadas. Once the stun effect ends, it is _frightened_  for 1d10+1 rodadas. The source of its fear is one randomly determined criatura it can see.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               |
| 71–80 | A tree with tantalizing fruit appears, but then turns into glass that refracts leve in a dazzlingly beautiful manner. The glass tree evaporates over the next 24 horas.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         |
| 81–90 | A nest appears containing 1d4+3 vibrantly multicolored eggs with equally multicolored yolks. Any criatura that eats an egg (raw or cooked) makes a CD 20 Constituição _teste de resistência_ . em um sucesso, the criatura's lowest ability score permanently increases by 1 (randomly choosing among equally low scores). em uma falha, the criatura recebe 10d6 dano de força from an internal mágico explosion.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         |
| 91–99 | A 5-pé hole with swirling multicolored vapors inside appears. todas as criaturas within 10 pés of the hole that have an Inteligência of 6 or higher hear urgent, loving whispers from within in a language they understand. cada criatura makes a CD 15 Sabedoria _teste de resistência_  or try to leap into the hole. The first criatura to jump into the hole (or more than one, if multiple criaturas jump in simultaneously) disappears for 1 dia before reappearing. A criatura has no memory of the previous 24 horas when it reappears, but finds a new randomly determined magic item of uncommon rarity among its possessions. It also gains the benefits of a _long rest_ . The hole disappears after 1 minuto, or as soon as a criatura jumps completely into it. |
| 100   | A fantastic, gargantuan beanstalk erupts and grows to a height determined by the Narrator. The Narrator also chooses where the top leads. These options (and more) are possible: the castle of a Gigante, a magnificent view, a different plane of existence.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      |

name: Bag of Bramble Beasts
desc:
This ordinary bag, made from green cloth, appears empty. Reaching inside the bag, however, reveals the presence of a small, spiky object. The bag weighs 1/2 pound. You can use an action to pull the spiky object from the bag and throw it up to 20 pés. When the object lands, it transforms into a criatura you determine by rolling a 1d8 and consulting the below table. The criatura is a bramble version (see sidebar) of the beast listed in the table. The criatura vanishes at the next dawn or when it is reduced to 0 pontos de vida. The criatura is friendly to you and your companions, and it acts on your turn. You can use a ação bônus to command how the criatura moves and what action it recebe on its next turn, or give it general orders, such as to attack your inimigos. In the absence of such orders, the criatura acts in a fashion appropriate to its Natureza. Once three spiky objects have been pulled from the bag, the bag can't be used again until the next dawn. Alternatively, one willing animal companion or familiar can be placed in the bag for 1 week. A non-beast animal companion or familiar that is placed in the bag is treated as if it had been placed into a bag of holding and can be removed from the bag at any time. A beast animal companion or familiar disappears once placed in the bag, and the bag's magic is dormant until the week is up. no final de the week, the animal companion or familiar exits the bag as a bramble criatura (see the template in the sidebar) and can be returned to its original form only with a wish. The criatura retains its status as an animal companion or familiar after its transformation and can choose to activate or deactivate its Thorn Body trait as a ação bônus. A transformed familiar can be re-summoned with the find familiar spell. Once the bag has been used to change an animal companion or familiar into a bramble criatura, it becomes an ordinary, não mágico bag. | 1d8 | criatura |
| --- | ------------ |
| 1 | Weasel |
| 2 | Gigante rat |
| 3 | Badger |
| 4 | Boar |
| 5 | Panther |
| 6 | Gigante badger | Only a beast can become a bramble criatura. It retains all its statistics except as noted below.

name: Bag of Cheese
desc:
This item is often bought from apprentice wizards with an adventurer’s first reward from questing. It is a yellow bag with the word “cheese” embroidered on it (in Comum). Any food you put in this bag becomes cheese, but retains its original taste and condition—a moldy and dirty loaf of bread becomes a moldy and dirty piece of cheese. Any non-food items develop a distinctly cheesy aroma.

Alternatively, you can turn the bag inside out, transforming it into 1 Supply worth of any type of mundane cheese.

name: Bag of Devouring
desc:
This bag superficially resembles a _bag of holding_ but is a feeding orifice for a gigantic extradimensional criatura. Turning the bag inside out closes the orifice.

The extradimensional criatura attached to the bag can sense whatever is placed inside the bag. Animal or vegetable matter placed wholly in the bag is devoured and lost forever. When part of a living criatura is placed in the bag, as happens when someone reaches inside it, there is a 50 percent chance that the criatura is pulled inside the bag. A criatura inside the bag can use its action to try to escape with a successful CD 15 teste de Força. Another criatura can use its action to alcance into the bag to pull a criatura out, doing so with a successful CD 20 teste de Força (provided it isn't pulled inside the bag first). Any criatura that starts its turn inside the bag is devoured, its body destroyed.

Inanimate objects can be stored in the bag, which can hold a cubic pé of such material. However, once each dia, the bag swallows any objects inside it and spits them out into another plane of existence. The GM determines the time and plane.

If the bag is pierced or torn, it is destroyed, and anything contained within it is transported to a random location on the Astral Plane.

name: Bag of Devouring
desc:
This item is actually an aperture for the mouth of an immense extradimensional criatura and is often mistaken for a _bag of holding_ . 

The criatura can perceive everything placed inside the bag. Up to a cubic pé of inanimate objects can be stored inside, however once per dia the criatura swallows any inanimate objects inside and spews them into another plane of existence (with the Narrator deciding the plane and time of dia). Animal or vegetable matter placed completely inside is instead ingested and destroyed. 

This item can be very dangerous. When part of a criatura is inside the bag (including a criatura reaching a hand inside) there is a 50% chance the bag pulls it inside. A criatura that ends its turn inside the bag is ingested and destroyed. 

A criatura inside the bag can try to escape by using an action and making a CD 15 teste de Força. criaturas outside the bag may use an action to attempt to alcance in and pull a criatura out with a CD 20 teste de Força. This rescue attempt is subject to the same 50% chance to be pulled inside.

perfurante or tearing the item destroys it, with anything currently inside shifted to a random location on the Astral Plane. Turning the bag inside out closes the mouth.

name: Bag of Holding
desc:
This bag has an interior space considerably larger than its outside dimensions, roughly 2 pés in diameter at the mouth and 4 pés deep. The bag can hold up to 500 pounds, not exceeding a volume of 64 cubic pés. The bag weighs 15 pounds, regardless of its contents. Retrieving an item from the bag requires an action.

If the bag is overloaded, pierced, or torn, it ruptures and is destroyed, and its contents are scattered in the Astral Plane. If the bag is turned inside out, its contents spill forth, unharmed, but the bag must be put right before it can be used again. Breathing criaturas inside the bag can survive up to a number of minutos equal to 10 divided by the number of criaturas (minimum 1 minuto), after which time they begin to suffocate.

Placing a _bag of holding_ inside an extradimensional space created by a _handy haversack_, _portable hole_, or similar item instantly destroys both items and opens a gate to the Astral Plane. The gate originates where the one item was placed inside the other. Any criatura within 10 pés of the gate is sucked through it to a random location on the Astral Plane. The gate then closes. The gate is one-way only and can't be reopened.

name: Bag of Holding
desc:
This bag’s interior space is significantly larger than its apparent size of roughly 2 pés at the mouth and 4 pés deep. The bag can hold up to 500 pounds and has an internal volume of 64 cubic pés. Regardless of its contents, it weighs 15 pounds. Retrieving an item from the bag requires an action. If you have never interacted with a specific bag of holding before, the first time you use it, it requires 1d4 rodadas to take stock of its contents before anything can be retrieved from the bag.

Food or water placed in the bag immediately and permanently lose all nourishing qualities—after being in the bag, water no longer slakes thirst and food does not sate hunger or nourish. In a similar fashion, the body of a dead criatura placed in the bag cannot be restored to life by __revivify , raise dead ,_ or other similar magic. Breathing criaturas inside the bag can survive for up to 2d4 minutos divided by the number of criaturas (minimum 1 minuto), after which time they begin to suffocate.

The bag cannot hold any item that would not fit in a normal bag of its apparent size or any item with the Bulky quality. 

If the bag is punctured, torn, or otherwise structurally damaged, it ruptures and is destroyed, and the contents are scattered throughout the Astral Plane.

Placing a _bag of holding_ inside another extradimensional storage device such as a _portable hole_  or __handy haversack_ results in planar rift that destroys both items and pulls everything within 10 pés into the Astral Plane. The rift then closes and disappears.

name: Bag of Traps
desc: Anyone reaching into this apparently empty bag feels a small coin, which resembles no known currency. Removing the coin and placing or tossing it up to 20 pés creates a random mechanical trap that remains for 10 minutos or until discharged or disarmed, whereupon it disappears. The coin returns to the bag only after the trap disappears. You may draw up to 10 traps from the bag each week. The GM has the statistics for mechanical traps.

name: Bag of Tricks
desc:
This ordinary bag, made from gray, rust, or tan cloth, appears empty. Reaching inside the bag, however, reveals the presence of a small, fuzzy object. The bag weighs 1/2 pound.

You can use an action to pull the fuzzy object from the bag and throw it up to 20 pés. When the object lands, it transforms into a criatura you determine by rolling a d8 and consulting the table that corresponds to the bag's color.

The criatura is friendly to you and your companions, and it acts on your turn. You can use a ação bônus to command how the criatura moves and what action it recebe on its next turn, or to give it general orders, such as to attack your inimigos. In the absence of such orders, the criatura acts in a fashion appropriate to its Natureza.

Once three fuzzy objects have been pulled from the bag, the bag can't be used again until the next dawn.

**Gray Bag of Tricks (table)**

| d8 | criatura     |
|----|--------------|
| 1  | Weasel       |
| 2  | Gigante rat    |
| 3  | Badger       |
| 4  | Boar         |
| 5  | Panther      |
| 6  | Gigante badger |
| 7  | Dire wolf    |
| 8  | Gigante elk    |

**Rust Bag of Tricks (table)**

| d8 | criatura   |
|----|------------|
| 1  | Rat        |
| 2  | Owl        |
| 3  | Mastiff    |
| 4  | Goat       |
| 5  | Gigante goat |
| 6  | Gigante boar |
| 7  | Lion       |
| 8  | Brown bear |

**Tan Bag of Tricks (table)**

| d8 | criatura     |
|----|--------------|
| 1  | Jackal       |
| 2  | Ape          |
| 3  | Baboon       |
| 4  | Axe beak     |
| 5  | Black bear   |
| 6  | Gigante weasel |
| 7  | Gigante hyena  |
| 8  | Tiger        |

name: Bag of Tricks
desc:
This seemingly empty cloth bag comes in several colors and has a small, fuzzy object inside. 

You can use an action to pull a fuzzy object from the bag and throw it up to 20 pés. Upon landing, it becomes a criatura determined by a roll on the Bag of Tricks table (depending on the bag’s color). 

The resulting criatura is friendly to you and any companions you have. It acts on your turn, during which you can use a ação bônus to give it simple commands such as “attack that criatura” or “move over there”. If the criatura dies or if you use the bag again, it disappears without a trace. After the first use each dia, there is a 50% chance that a criatura from the bag is hostile instead of friendly and obedient.

Once you have used the bag three times, you cannot do so again until the next dawn.

__**Table: Bags of Tricks**__
| Blue bag of tricks (uncommon; cost 400 gp) |                     | Gray bag of tricks (uncommon; cost 350 gp) |                | Green bag of tricks (rare; cost 800 gp) |                   | Rust bag of tricks (uncommon; cost 400 gp**)** |              | Tan bag of tricks (uncommon; cost 300 gp) |                |

name: Bagpipes of Battle
desc: Inspire friends and strike fear in the hearts of your inimigos with the drone of valor and the shrill call of martial might! You must be proficiente with wind instruments to use these bagpipes. You can use an action to play them and create a fearsome and inspiring tune. Each aliado within 60 pés of you that can hear the tune gains a d12 Bardic Inspiration die for 10 minutos. cada criatura within 60 pés of you that can hear the tune and that is hostile to you deve ter sucesso em a CD 15 teste de resistência de Sabedoria ou ficar amedrontado of you for 1 minuto. A hostile criatura has desvantagem on this teste de resistência if it is within 5 pés of you or your aliado. A amedrontado criatura must take the Dash action and move away from you by the safest available route on cada um de seus turnos, unless there is nowhere to move. A amedrontado criatura can repeat the teste de resistência no final de cada um de seus turnos, ending the effect on itself em um sucesso. Once used, the bagpipes can't be used in this way again until the next dawn.

name: Baleful Wardrums
desc: You must be proficiente with percussion instruments to use these drums. The drums have 3 charges. You can use an action to play them and expend 1 charge to create a baleful rumble. cada criatura of your choice within 60 pés of you that hears you play deve ter sucesso em a CD 13 teste de resistência de Sabedoria or have desvantagem on its next weapon or ataque mágico roll. A criatura that succeeds on its teste de resistência is immune to the effect of these drums for 24 horas. The drum regains 1d3 expended charges daily at dawn.

name: Band of Iron Thorns
desc: This black iron armband bristles with long, needle-sharp iron thorns. When you attune to the armband, the thorns bite into your flesh. The armband doesn't function unless the thorns pierce your skin and are able to alcance your blood. While wearing the band, after you roll a teste de resistência but before the GM reveals if the roll is a success or failure, you can use your reação to expend one Hit Die. Roll the die, and add the number rolled to your teste de resistência.

name: Band of Restraint
desc: These simple leather straps are nearly unbreakable when used as restraints. If you spend 1 minuto tying a Small or Medium criatura's limbs with these straps, the criatura is imobilizado (escape CD 17) until it escapes or until you speak a command word to release the straps. While imobilizado by these straps, the alvo has desvantagem on Força checks.

name: Bandana of Brachiation
desc: While wearing this bright yellow bandana, you have a escalando Deslocamento of 30 pés, and you gain a +5 bonus to Força (Atletismo) and Destreza (Acrobacia) checks to jump over obstacles, to land on your pés, and to land safely on a breakable or unstable surface, such as a tree branch or rotting wooden rafters.

name: Bandana of Bravado
desc: While wearing this bright red bandana, you have vantagem on Carisma (Intimidação) checks and on teste de resistências against being amedrontado.

name: Banner of the Fortunate
desc: While holding this banner aloft with one hand, you can use an action to inspire criaturas nearby. cada criatura of your choice within 60 pés of you that can see the banner has vantagem on its next jogada de ataque. The banner can't be used this way again until the next dawn.

name: Barbed Devil’s Bracelet
desc:
The hand on which you wear this bracelet transforms into a claw covered with a dozen wicked spines. Your unarmed attacks with the claw deal 1d6 dano perfurante, and you gain an expertise die on Prestidigitação checks made to steal small items. Your hand returns to normal if you remove the bracelet. 

As an action, you can draw upon the claw’s magic to cast __produce flame_ . Whenever you use the claw in this way, one of the bracelet’s spines disappears and your ponto de vida maximum is reduced by 1d8\. This reduction lasts until you finish a _long rest_ . If this effect reduces your ponto de vida maximum to 0, you die and your body permanently transforms into a _barbed devil_ . When the bracelet has no more spines it becomes a mundane item.

name: Barrow Bread
desc: Barrow bread is made from mashing together plantains and starches that are grown in the tropical barrows. While this viscous, starchy paste is not actually a bread, it perfectly preserves and maintains the temperature of any food tucked inside it for up to a week, protecting and preserving 1 Supply. The magic is contained in the plantain leaves that are wrapped around the barrow bread. Once unwrapped, the barrow bread itself can be consumed (as 1 Supply) within 15 minutos before the outside elements spoil it.

name: Battle Standard of Passage
desc: This battle standard hangs from a 4-pé-long pole and bears the colors and heraldry of a long-forgotten nation. You can use an action to plant the pole in the ground, causing the standard to whip and wave as if in a breeze. Choose up to six criaturas within 30 pés of the standard, which can include yourself. não mágico difficult terrain costs the criaturas you chose no extra movement. In addition, cada criatura you chose can pass through não mágico plants without being slowed by them and without taking damage from them if they have thorns, spines, or a similar hazard. The standard stops waving and the effect ends after 10 minutos, or when a criatura uses an action to pull the pole from the ground. The standard can't be used this way again until the next dawn.

name: Bead of Exsanguination
desc: This small, black bead measures 3/4 of an inch in diameter and weights an ounce. Typically, 1d4 + 1 beads of exsanguination are found together. When arremesso, the bead absorbs pontos de vida from criaturas near its impact site, damaging them. A bead can store up to 50 pontos de vida at a time. When found, a bead contains 2d10 stored pontos de vida. You can use an action to throw the bead up to 60 pés. cada criatura within a 20-pé radius of where the bead landed deve fazer a CD 15 teste de resistência de Constituição, taking 3d6 dano necrótico em uma falha no teste, or half as much damage on a successful one. The bead stores pontos de vida equal to the dano necrótico dealt. The bead turns from black to crimson the more pontos de vida are stored in it. If the bead absorbs 50 pontos de vida or more, it explodes and is destroyed. cada criatura within a 20-pé radius of the bead when it explodes deve fazer a CD 15 teste de resistência de Destreza, taking 6d6 dano necrótico em uma falha no teste, or half as much damage on a successful one. If you are holding the bead, you can use a ação bônus to determine if the bead is below or above half its maximum stored pontos de vida. If you hold and study the bead over the course of 1 hora, which can be done during a descanso curto, you know exactly how many pontos de vida are stored in the bead.

name: Bead of Force
desc:
This small black sphere measures 3/4 of an inch in diameter and weighs an ounce. Typically, 1d4 + 4 _beads of force_ are found together.

You can use an action to throw the bead up to 60 pés. The bead explodes on impact and is destroyed. cada criatura within a 10-pé radius of where the bead landed deve ter sucesso em a CD 15 teste de resistência de Destreza ou receber 5d4 dano de força. A sphere of transparent força then encloses the area for 1 minuto. Any criatura that failed the save and is completely within the area is trapped inside this sphere. criaturas that succeeded on the save, or are partially within the area, are pushed away from the center of the sphere until they are no longer inside it. Only breathable air can pass through the sphere's wall. No attack or other effect can.

An enclosed criatura can use its action to push against the sphere's wall, moving the sphere up to half the criatura's andando Deslocamento. The sphere can be picked up, and its magic causes it to weigh only 1 pound, regardless of the weight of criaturas inside.

name: Bead of Force
desc:
This sphere of black glass is ¾ an inch in diameter and can be arremesso up to 60 pés as an action. On impact it creates a 10-pé radius explosion. criaturas in the area make a CD 15 Destreza _teste de resistência_ , taking 5d4 dano de força em uma falha. A sphere of força then encloses the same area for 1 minuto. Any criatura that is completely in the area and fails its save is trapped within the sphere. criaturas that succeed on the save or that are only partially within the area are pushed away from the point of impact until they are outside the sphere instead. 

The wall of the sphere only allows air to pass, stopping all other attacks and effects. A criatura inside the sphere can use its action to push against the sides of the sphere, moving up to half its Deslocamento. The sphere only weighs 1 pound if lifted, regardless of the weight of the criaturas inside.

name: Bead of Tracking
desc: This miniature bead is covered with hundreds of small hooks. When you use an action to place it on a criatura’s clothing or hide, the bead hangs there imperceptibly and creates a bond between you and the criatura. You gain an expertise die on checks made to track the criatura while the bead remains on it. To place the bead during combat without being noticed, you deve ter sucesso em a Destreza (Prestidigitação) check against the criatura’s maneuver CD (or when outside of combat, the criatura’s passive Percepção).

name: Beads of Contemplation
desc:
This strand of eight wooden beads, each cleverly carved with geometric patterns, hangs from a stout length of cording. The beads store ki energy placed into them, holding the ki until you use it. The beads can store up to 8 ki points. no final de a short or descanso longo, you can place ki energy into the beads by touching them and expending a number of ki points equal to half your proficiência bonus.
While wearing or carrying the beads, you can use a ação bônus to remove any number of ki points from the beads, regaining that amount of ki points and freeing up space in the beads.

name: Bear Paws
desc: These hand wraps are made of flexible beeswax that ooze sticky honey. While wearing these gloves, you have vantagem on grapple checks. In addition, criaturas agarrado by you have desvantagem on any checks made to escape your grapple.

name: Bed of Spikes
desc: This wide, wooden plank holds hundreds of two-inch long needle-like spikes. When you finish a descanso longo on the bed, you have resistance to dano perfurante and vantagem on Constituição teste de resistências to maintain your Concentração on spells you cast for 8 horas or until you finish a short or descanso longo. Once used, the bed can't be used again until the next dusk.

name: Belt of Dwarvenkind
desc:
While wearing this belt, you gain the following benefits:

* Your Constituição score increases by 2, to a maximum of 20.
* You have vantagem on Carisma (Persuasão) checks made to interact with dwarves.

In addition, while attuned to the belt, you have a 50 percent chance each dia at dawn of growing a full beard if you're capable of growing one, or a visibly thicker beard if you already have one.

If you aren't a dwarf, you gain the following additional benefits while wearing the belt:

* You have vantagem on teste de resistências against veneno, and you have resistance against dano de veneno.
* You have visão no escuro out to a range of 60 pés.
* You can speak, read, and write Anão.

name: Belt of Dwarvenkind
desc:
While wearing this belt, you gain the following benefits:

* Your Constituição score increases by 2, to a maximum of 20.
* _Advantage_  on Carisma (Persuasão) checks made against dwarves.
* _Advantage_  on teste de resistências against veneno, and resistance to dano de veneno.
* visão no escuro to a range of 60 pés.
* The ability to speak, read, sign, and write Anão.

In addition, while you are attuned to this belt there is a 50% chance at dawn each dia that you grow a full beard (or a noticeably thicker beard if you have one already).

name: Belt of Giant Strength
desc:
While wearing this belt, your Força score changes to a score granted by the belt. If your Força is already equal to or greater than the belt's score, the item has no effect on you.

Six varieties of this belt exist, corresponding with and having rarity according to the six kinds of true giants. The _belt of stone Gigante strength_ and the _belt of frost Gigante strength_ look different, but they have the same effect.

| Type              | Força | Rarity    |
|-------------------|----------|-----------|
| Hill Gigante        | 21       | Rare      |
| Stone/frost Gigante | 23       | Very rare |
| fogo Gigante        | 25       | Very rare |
| Cloud Gigante       | 27       | Legendary |
| Storm Gigante       | 29       | Legendary |

name: Belt of Giant Strength
desc:
Braided rope made of hair from the same kind of Gigante as the belt to be made

Wearing this belt increases your Força score to the score granted by the belt. It has no effect if your Força is equal to or greater than the belt’s score.

Each variety of belt corresponds with a different kind of Gigante.

__**Table: Belts of Gigante Força**__
| **Type**                  | **Força** | **Rarity** | **Cost**   |
| ------------------------- | ------------ | ---------- | ---------- |
| _Hill giant_              | 20           | Rare       | 4,000 gp   |
| _Frost_  or _stone giant_ | 23           | Very rare  | 9,000 gp   |
| _Fire giant_              | 25           | Very rare  | 20,000 gp  |
| _Cloud giant_             | 27           | Legendary  | 55,000 gp  |
| _Storm giant_             | 29           | Legendary  | 150,000 gp |

name: Belt of the Wilds
desc: This thin cord is made from animal sinew. While wearing the cord, you have vantagem on Sabedoria (Sobrevivência) checks to follow tracks left by beasts, giants, and humanoids. While wearing the belt, you can use a ação bônus to speak the belt's command word. If you do, you leave tracks of the animal of your choice instead of your regular tracks. These tracks can be those of a Large or smaller beast with a CR of 1 or lower, such as a pony, rabbit, or lion. If you repeat the command word, you end the effect.

name: Berserker Axe
desc:
You gain a +1 bonus to attack and damage rolls made with this magic weapon. In addition, while you are attuned to this weapon, your ponto de vida maximum increases by 1 for each level you have attained.

**_Curse_**. This axe is cursed, and becoming attuned to it extends the curse to you. As long as you remain cursed, you are unwilling to part with the axe, keeping it within alcance at all times. You also have desvantagem on attack rolls with weapons other than this one, unless no foe is within 60 pés of you that you can see or hear.

Whenever a hostile criatura damages you while the axe is in your possession, you deve ter sucesso em a CD 15 teste de resistência de Sabedoria or go berserk. While berserk, you must use your action each rodada to attack the criatura nearest to you with the axe. If you can make extra attacks as part of the Attack action, you use those extra attacks, moving to attack the next nearest criatura after you fell your current alvo. If you have multiple possible alvos, you attack one at random. You are berserk until you start your turn with no criaturas within 60 pés of you that you can see or hear.

name: Berserker Axe
desc:
You gain +1 bonus to attack and damage rolls made with this magic axe, and while you are attuned to it your ponto de vida maximum is increased by 1 for each level you have attained. 

**Curse.** After you attune to this axe you are unwilling to part with it, keeping it within alcance at all times. In addition, you have _disadvantage_  on attack rolls with weapons other than this one unless the nearest foe you are aware of is 60 pés or more away from you.

In addition, when you are damaged by a hostile criatura you make a CD 15 Sabedoria _teste de resistência_  or go berserk. While berserk, on your turn each rodada you move to the nearest criatura and take the Attack action against it, moving to attack the next nearest criatura after you _incapacitate_  your current alvo. When there is more than one possible alvo, you randomly determine which to attack. You continue to be berserk until there are no criaturas you can see or hear within 60 pés of you no início de your turn.

name: Berserker's Kilt
desc: This kilt is made from bear, elk, or wolf fur. While wearing this kilt, your Unarmored Defense increases by 1, and you gain additional benefits while raging, depending on the type of kilt you are wearing. Bear Fur (Very Rare). This kilt empowers your rage with the vigor of a bear. When you enter a rage, you gain 20 temporary pontos de vida. These temporary pontos de vida last until your rage ends. Elk Fur (Rare). This kilt empowers your rage with the nimble ferocity of an elk. While raging, if you move at least 30 pés straight toward a alvo and then hit it with a ataque corpo a corpo com arma on the same turn, the alvo recebe an extra 1d6 damage of the weapon’s type. Wolf Fur (Uncommon). This kilt empowers your rage with the Deslocamento of a wolf. While raging, your andando Deslocamento increases by 10 pés.

name: Bicycle Bell of Flight
desc:
This beautifully-filigreed bell can turn into a mundane bicycle of Small or Medium size (chosen at the time of creation) when you activate it as an action. Returning the bicycle to bell form also requires an action.

While riding this bicycle, you can ring its bell to gain a voando Deslocamento of 50 pés and the ability to hover. You can use the bike to fly for 2 horas, expending at least 10 minutos worth of time with each use. If you are voando when the time runs out, you fall at a rate of 60 pés and take no damage from landing. The bell regains 1 hora of voando time for every 12 horas it is not in use, regardless of which form it is in.

**_Curse._** While far from malicious, the magic of the bell is exuberant to a fault. While you are using its voando Deslocamento it frequently rings of its own accord, giving you _disadvantage_  on Furtividade checks.

name: Big Dipper
desc: This wooden rod is topped with a ridged ball. The rod has 7 charges for the following properties. It regains 1d6 + 1 expended charges daily at dawn. If you expend the rod's last charge, roll a d20. On a 1, the rod melts into a pool of não mágico honey and is destroyed. Anytime you expend 1 or more charges for this rod's properties, the ridged ball flows with delicious, não mágico honey for 1 minuto.

name: Binding Oath
desc: This lengthy scroll is the testimony of a pious individual's adherence to their faith. The author has emphatically rewritten these claims many times, and its two slim, metal rollers are wrapped in yards of parchment. When you attune to the item, you rewrite certain passages to align with your own religious views. You can use an action to throw the scroll at a Huge or smaller criatura you can see within 30 pés of you. Make a ataque à distância roll. On a hit, the scroll unfurls and wraps around the criatura. The alvo is imobilizado until you take a ação bônus to command the scroll to release the criatura. If you command it to release the criatura or if you miss with the attack, the scroll curls back into a rolled-up scroll. If the imobilizado alvo's alignment is the opposite of yours along the law/chaos or good/evil axis, you can use a ação bônus to cause the writing to blaze with leve, dealing 2d6 dano radiante to the alvo. A criatura, including the imobilizado alvo, can use an action to make a CD 17 teste de Força to tear apart the scroll. em um sucesso, the scroll is destroyed. Such an attempt causes the writing to blaze with leve, dealing 2d6 dano radiante to both the criatura making the attempt and the imobilizado alvo, whether or not the attempt is successful. Alternatively, the imobilizado criatura can use an action to make a CD 17 teste de Destreza to slip free of the scroll. This action also triggers o dano effect, but it doesn't destroy the scroll. Once used, the scroll can't be used again until the next dawn.

name: Birdsong Whistle
desc:
This carving of reddish soapstone resembles a miniature cardinal. When air is blown through the lower back high-pitched sounds are emitted through the bird’s open beak. When the whistle is blown the sounds of songbirds are heard by todas as criaturas in a 100-pé radius. These calls are indistinguishable from actual birds singing. 

Alternatively, you can use an action to break the whistle to summon a large flock of birds that appear no início de your next turn and surround you in a 10-pé radius. The flock moves with you and makes you _heavily obscured_  from criaturas more than 10 pés away for 1 minuto, or until the flock recebe 10 or more damage from area effects.

name: Bituminous Orb
desc: A tarlike substance leaks continually from this orb, which radiates a cloying darkness and emanates an unnatural chill. While attuned to the orb, you have visão no escuro out to a range of 60 pés. In addition, you have immunity to dano necrótico, and you have vantagem on teste de resistências against spells and effects that deal dano radiante. This orb has 6 charges and regains 1d6 daily at dawn. You can expend 1 charge as an action to lob some of the orb's viscous darkness at a criatura you can see within 60 pés of you. The alvo deve ter sucesso em a CD 15 teste de resistência de Destreza ou ficar agarrado (escape CD 15). Until this grapple ends, the criatura is cego and recebe 2d8 dano necrótico no início de cada um de seus turnos, and you can use a ação bônus to move the agarrado criatura up to 20 pés in any direction. You can't move the criatura more than 60 pés away from the orb. Alternatively, you can use an action to expend 2 charges and crush the agarrado criatura. The criatura deve fazer a CD 15 teste de resistência de Constituição, taking 6d8 dano contundente em uma falha no teste, or half as much damage on a successful one. You can end the grapple at any time (no action required). The orb's power can grapple only uma criatura at a time.

name: Black and White Daggers
desc: These matched daggers are identical except for the stones set in their pommels. One pommel is chalcedony (opaque white), the other is obsidian (opaque black). You gain a +1 bonus to attack and damage rolls with both magic weapons. The bonus increases to +3 when you use the white dagger to attack a monstrosity, and it increases to +3 when you use the black dagger to attack an undead. When you hit a monstrosity or undead with both daggers in the same turn, that criatura recebe an extra 1d6 dano perfurante from the second attack.

name: Black Dragon Oil
desc: The viscous green-black oil within this mágico ceramic pot bubbles slightly. The pot's stone stopper is sealed with greasy, dark wax. The pot contains 5 ounces of pure black dragon essence, obtained by slowly boiling the dragon in its own acidic secretions. You can use an action to apply 1 ounce of the oil to a weapon or single piece of munição. The next attack made with that weapon or munição causa an extra 2d8 dano de ácido to the alvo. A criatura that recebe the dano de ácido deve ter sucesso em a CD 15 teste de resistência de Constituição no início de its next turn ou ficar burned for an extra 2d8 dano de ácido.

name: Black Phial
desc: This black stone phial has a tightly fitting stopper and 3 charges. As an action, you can fill the phial with blood taken from a living, or recently deceased (dead no longer than 1 minuto), humanoid and expend 1 charge. When you do so, the black phial transforms the blood into a potion of greater healing. A criatura who drinks this potion deve ter sucesso em a CD 12 teste de resistência de Constituição ou ficar envenenado for 1 hora. The phial regains 1d3 expended charges daily at midnight. If you expend the phial's last charge, roll a d20: 1d20. On a 1, the phial crumbles into dust and is destroyed.

name: Blackbird Pie
desc: This item appears to be a freshly baked pie in a tin. When the crust is fully punctured the pie explodes as 24 magic blackbirds fly out and flit through the air in a 20-pé radius for 2d4 rodadas, at which point the birds and the pie disappear. A criatura that starts its turn in the area or first enters into the area on its turn makes a CD 15 Destreza _teste de resistência_ , taking 1 dano cortante em uma falha. A criatura damaged by the blackbirds has _disadvantage_  on ability checks and _attack rolls_  until the beginning of its next turn. The blackbirds are mágico and cannot be interacted with like normal animals, and attacking them has no effect.

name: Blackguard's Blade
desc: You have vantagem on attack rolls made with this weapon against a alvo if another inimigo of the alvo is within 5 pés of it, and it has no aliados within 5 pés of it.

name: Blacktooth
desc: This black ivory, rune-carved wand has 7 charges. It regains 1d6 + 1 expended charges daily at dawn. While holding it, you can use an action to expend 1 or more of its charges to cast the guiding bolt spell from it, using an attack bonus of +7. For 1 charge, you cast the 1st-level version of the spell. You can increase the espaço de magia level by one for each additional charge you expend.

name: Blade of Petals
desc: You gain a +2 bonus to attack and damage rolls made with this magic weapon. This brightly-colored shortsword is kept in a wooden scabbard with eternally blooming flowers. The blade is made of dull green steel, and its pommel is fashioned from hard rosewood. As a ação bônus, you can conjure a flowery mist which fills a 20-pé area around you with pleasant-smelling perfume. The scent dissipates after 1 minuto. A criatura damaged by the blade deve ter sucesso em a CD 15 teste de resistência de Carisma ou ficar enfeitiçado by you até o final de seu próximo turno. A criatura can't be enfeitiçado this way more than once every 24 horas.

name: Blade of the Dervish
desc: This magic scimitar is empowered by your movements. For every 10 pés you move before making an attack, you gain a +1 bonus to the attack and damage rolls of that attack, and the scimitar causa an extra 1d6 dano cortante if the attack hits (maximum of +3 and 3d6). In addition, if you use the Dash action and move within 5 pés of a criatura, you can attack that criatura as a ação bônus. On a hit, the alvo recebe an extra 2d6 dano cortante.

name: Blade of the Temple Guardian
desc: This simple but elegant shortsword is a magic weapon. When you are wielding it and use the Flurry of Blows class feature, you can make your bonus attacks with the sword rather than unarmed strikes. If you deal damage to a criatura with this weapon and reduce it to 0 pontos de vida, you absorb some of its energy, regaining 1 expended ki point.

name: Blasphemous Writ
desc: The Infernal runes inscribed upon this vellum scroll radiate a faint, crimson glow. When you use this spell scroll of command, the save CD is 15 instead of 13, and you can also affect alvos that are undead or that don't understand your language.

name: Blessed Pauper's Purse
desc: This worn cloth purse appears empty, even when opened, yet seems to always have enough copper pieces in it to make any purchase of urgent necessity when you dig inside. The purse produces enough copper pieces to provide for a poor lifestyle. In addition, if anyone asks you for charity, you can always open the purse to find 1 or 2 cp available to give away. These coins appear only if you truly intend to gift them to one who asks.

name: Blinding Lantern
desc: This ornate brass lantern comes fitted with heavily inscribed plates shielding the cut crystal lens. With a flick of a lever, as an action, the plates rise and unleash a dazzling array of lights at a single alvo within 30 pés. You must use two hands to direct the lights precisely into the eyes of a foe. The alvo deve ter sucesso em a CD 11 teste de resistência de Sabedoria ou ficar cego até o final de seu próximo turno. A criatura cego by the lantern is immune to its effects for 1 minuto afterward. This property can't be used in a brightly lit area. By opening the shutter on the opposite side, the device functions as a normal bullseye lantern, yet illuminates magically, requiring no fuel and giving off no heat.

name: Blood Mark
desc: Used as a form of currency between undead lords and the humanoids of their lands, this coin resembles a gold ring with a single hole in the center. It holds 1 charge, visible as a red glow in the center of the coin. While holding the coin, you can use an action to expend 1 charge and regain 1d3 pontos de vida. At the same time, the humanoid who pledged their blood to the coin recebe dano necrótico and reduces their ponto de vida maximum by an equal amount. This reduction lasts until the criatura finishes a descanso longo. It dies if this reduces its ponto de vida maximum to 0. You can expend the charges in up to 5 blood marks as part of the same action. To replenish an expended charge in a blood mark, a humanoid must pledge a pint of their blood in a 10-minuto ritual that involves letting a drop of their blood fall through the center of the coin. The drop disappears in the process and the center fills with a red glow. There is no limit to how much blood a humanoid may pledge, but each coin can hold only 1 charge. To pledge more, the humanoid must perform the ritual on another blood mark. Any person foolish enough to pledge more than a single blood coin might find the coins all redeemed at once, since such redemptions often happen at great blood feasts held by vampires and other undead.

name: Blood Pearl
desc: This crimson pearl feels slick to the touch and contains a mote of blood imbued with malign purpose. As an action, you can break the pearl, destroying it, and conjure a Blood Elemental (see criatura Codex) for 1 hora. The elemental is friendly to you and your companions for the duration. Roll initiative for the elemental, which has its own turns. It obeys any verbal commands that you issue to it (no action required by you). If you don't issue any commands to the elemental, it defends itself from hostile criaturas but otherwise recebe no actions.

name: Blood-Soaked Hide
desc: A criatura that starts its turn in your space deve ter sucesso em a CD 15 teste de resistência de Constituição or lose 3d6 pontos de vida due to blood loss, and you regain a number of pontos de vida equal to half the number of pontos de vida the criatura lost. Constructs and undead who aren't vampires are immune to this effect. Once used, you can't use this property of the armor again until the next dawn.

name: Bloodbow
desc: This longbow is carved of a leve, sturdy wood such as hickory or yew, and it is almost always stained a deep maroon hue, lacquered and aged under layers of sundried blood. The bow is sometimes decorated with reptilian teeth, centaur tails, or other battle trophies. The bow is designed to harm the particular type of criatura whose blood most recently soaked the weapon. When you make a ataque à distância roll with this magic weapon against a criatura of that type, you have a +1 bonus to the attack and damage rolls. If the attack hits, the alvo deve ter sucesso em a CD 15 teste de resistência de Sabedoria or become enraged until the end of your next turn. While enraged, the alvo suffers a random short-term madness.

name: Blooddrinker Spear
desc: Prized by gnolls, the upper haft of this spear is decorated with tiny animal skulls, feathers, and other adornments. You gain a +1 bonus to attack and damage rolls with this magic weapon. When you hit a criatura with this spear, you mark that criatura for 1 hora. Until the mark ends, you deal an extra 1d6 damage to the alvo whenever you hit it with the spear, and you have vantagem on any Sabedoria (Percepção) or Sabedoria (Sobrevivência) check you make to find the alvo. If the alvo drops to 0 pontos de vida, the mark ends. This property can't be used on a different criatura until you spend a descanso curto cleaning the previous alvo's blood from the spear.

name: Bloodfuel Weapon
desc: You gain a +1 bonus to attack and damage rolls made with this magic weapon. The first time you attack with the weapon on each of your turns, you can spend one or more Hit Dice, up to your maximum Hit Dice. For each Hit Die spent in this way, you roll the die and add your Constituição modifier to it. You lose pontos de vida equal to the total, and the alvo recebe extra dano necrótico equal to the total. You can't use this feature of the weapon if you don't have blood. Hit Dice spent using this weapon's feature can't be used to regain pontos de vida during a descanso curto. You regain spent Hit Dice as normal.

name: Bloodiron Band
desc:
The Bloodiron Band gleams a metallic crimson and is set with dozens of spikes on the inside so that it pierces the skin as it closes on the forearm during attunement.

Wearing this band increases your Força to 20\. It has no effect if your Força is equal to or greater than 20.

**_Curse._** Because of the horrific materials required in its construction, each band comes with a terrible cost. While attuned to the bloodiron band, your maximum pontos de vida are reduced by a number equal to twice your level. Additionally, no início de your turn, if another criatura within 15 pés of you is _bloodied_ , you deve fazer a CD 15 Sabedoria _teste de resistência_  (gaining _advantage_  if the criatura is an aliado). em uma falha, you must attempt to move to a space within alcance and take the attack action against that criatura.

name: Bloodlink Potion
desc: When you and another willing criatura each drink at least half this potion, your life energies are linked for 1 hora. When you or the criatura who drank the potion with you take damage while your life energies are linked, the total damage is divided equally between you. If o dano is an odd number, roll randomly to assign the extra point of damage. The effect is halted while you and the other criatura are separated by more than 60 pés. The effect ends if either of you drop to 0 pontos de vida. This potion's red liquid is viscous and has a metallic taste.

name: Bloodpearl Bracelet
desc:
This silver or gold bracelet features three red pearls. You can use an action to remove a pearl and throw it up to 20 pés. When the pearl lands, it transforms into an ooze you determine by rolling a d6 and consulting the table that corresponds to the bracelet's color. The ooze vanishes at the next dawn or when it is reduced to 0 pontos de vida. When you throw a pearl, your ponto de vida maximum is reduced by the amount listed in the Blood Price column. This reduction can't be removed with the greater restoration spell or similar magic and lasts until the ooze vanishes or is reduced to 0 pontos de vida. The ooze is friendly to you and your companions and acts on your turn. You can use a ação bônus to command how the criatura moves and what action it recebe on its turn, or to give it general orders, such as to attack your inimigos. In the absence of such orders, the ooze acts in a fashion appropriate to its Natureza. Once all three pearls have been used, the bracelet can't be used again until the next dawn when the pearls regrow. | d6 | Ooze | CR | Blood Price |
| --- | --------------------------- | --- | ---------------- |
| 1 | Dipsa | 1/4 | 5 HP |
| 2 | Treacle | 1/4 | 5 HP |
| 3 | Gray Ooze | 1/2 | 5 HP |
| 4 | Alchemy Apprentice Ooze | 1 | 7 ( 2d6) |
| 5 | Suppurating Ooze | 1 | 7 ( 2d6) |
| 6 | Gelatinous Cube | 2 | 10 ( 3d6) | | d6 | Ooze | CR | Blood Price |
| --- | ----------------------- | --- | ---------------- |
| 1 | Philosopher's Ghost | 4 | 17 ( 5d6) |
| 2 | Ink Guardian Ooze | 4 | 17 ( 5d6) |
| 3 | Black Pudding | 4 | 17 ( 5d6) |
| 4 | Corrupting Ooze | 5 | 21 ( 6d6) |
| 5 | Blood Ooze | 6 | 24 ( 7d6) |
| 6 | Ruby ooze | 6 | 24 ( 7d6) |

name: Bloodprice Armor
desc: When a ataque corpo a corpo would hit you while you are wearing this armor, you can use your reação to increase your Classe de Armadura by up to 10 against that attack. If you do so, you lose pontos de vida equal to 5 times the bonus you want to add to your AC. For example, if you want to increase your AC by 2 against that attack, you lose 10 pontos de vida.

name: Bloodspeed Elixir
desc: When you drink this potion, your Deslocamento triples for 1 minuto, but if you take the Dash action, you take 2d6 dano de veneno as your body is pushed beyond its normal limits. The murky, crimson liquid smells of ozone and has a thick, sludge-like consistency.

name: Bloodthirsty Weapon
desc: This magic weapon bears long, branching channels inscribed into its blade or head, and it gives off a coppery scent. When you damage a criatura that has blood with this weapon, it loses an additional 2d6 pontos de vida from blood loss.

name: Bloodwhisper Cauldron
desc: This ancient, oxidized cauldron sits on three stubby legs and has images of sacrifice and ritual cast into its iron sides. When filled with concoctions that contain blood, the bubbling cauldron seems to whisper secrets of ancient power to those bold enough to listen. While filled with blood, the cauldron has the following properties. Once filled, the cauldron can't be refilled again until the next dawn.

name: Bludgeon of Nightmares
desc: You gain a +2 bonus to attack and damage rolls made with this weapon. The weapon appears to be a mace of disruption, and an identify spell reveals it to be such. The first time you use this weapon to kill a criatura that has an Inteligência score of 5 or higher, you begin having nightmares and disturbing visions that disrupt your rest. Each time you complete a descanso longo, you deve fazer a teste de resistência de Sabedoria. The CD equals 10 + the total number of criaturas with Inteligência 5 or higher that you've reduced to 0 pontos de vida with this weapon. em uma falha, you gain no benefits from that descanso longo, and you gain one level of exaustão.

name: Blue Rose
desc:
The petals of this cerulean flower can be prepared into a compote and consumed. A single flower can make 3 doses. When you consume a dose, your Inteligência, Sabedoria, and Carisma scores are reduced by 1 each. This reduction lasts until you finish a descanso longo. You can consume up to three doses as part of casting a spell, and you can choose to affect your spell with one of the following options for each dose you consumed: - If the spell is of the abjuration school, increase the save CD by 2.
- If the spell has more powerful effects when cast at a higher level, treat the spell's effects as if you had cast the spell at one slot level higher than the espaço de magia you used.
- The spell is affected by one of the following metamagic options, even if you aren't a sorcerer: heightened, quickened, or subtle. A spell can't be affected by the same option more than once, though you can affect one spell with up to three different options. If you consume one or more doses without casting a spell, you can choose to instead affect a spell you cast before you finish a descanso longo. In addition, consuming blue rose gives you some protection against spells. When a spellcaster you can see casts a spell, you can use your reação to cause one of the following:
- You have vantagem on the teste de resistência against the spell if it is a spell of the abjuration school.
- If the spell is counterspell or dispel magic, the CD increases by 2 to interrupt your spellcasting or to end a magic effect on you. You can use this reação a number of times equal to the number of doses you consumed. no final de each descanso longo, you deve fazer a CD 13 teste de resistência de Constituição. em uma falha no teste, your Hit Dice maximum is reduced by 25 percent. This reduction affects only the number of Hit Dice you can use to regain pontos de vida during a descanso curto; it doesn't reduce your ponto de vida maximum. This reduction lasts until you recover from the addiction. If you have no remaining Hit Dice to lose, you suffer one level of exaustão, and your Hit Dice are returned to 75 percent of your maximum Hit Dice. The process then repeats until you die from exaustão or you recover from the addiction. em um sucesso no teste, your exaustão level decreases by one level. If a successful teste de resistência reduces your level of exaustão below 1, you recover from the addiction. A greater restoration spell or similar magic ends the addiction and its effects. Consuming at least one dose of blue rose again halts the effects of the addiction for 2 dias, at which point you can consume another dose of blue rose to halt it again or the effects of the addiction continue as normal.

name: Blue Willow Cloak
desc: This leve cloak of fey silk is waterproof. While wearing this cloak in the rain, you can use your action to pull up the hood and become invisível for up to 1 hora. The effect ends early if you attack or cast a spell, if you use an action to pull down the hood, or if the rain stops. The cloak can't be used this way again until the next dawn.

name: Bone Whip
desc: This whip is constructed of humanoid vertebrae with their edges magically sharpened and pointed. The bones are joined together into a coiled line by strands of steel wire. The handle is half a femur wrapped in soft leather of tanned humanoid skin. You gain a +1 bonus to attack and damage rolls with this weapon. You can use an action to cause fiendish energy to coat the whip. For 1 minuto, you gain 5 temporary pontos de vida the first time you hit a criatura on each turn. In addition, when you deal damage to a criatura with this weapon, the criatura deve ter sucesso em a CD 17 teste de resistência de Constituição or its ponto de vida maximum is reduced by an amount equal to o dano dealt. This reduction lasts until the criatura finishes a descanso longo. Once used, this property of the whip can't be used again until the next dawn.

name: Bonebreaker Mace
desc: You gain a +1 bonus on attack and damage rolls made with this magic weapon. The bonus increases to +3 when you use it to attack an undead criatura. Often given to the grim enforcers of great necropolises, these weapons can reduce the andando dead to splinters with a single strike. When you hit an undead criatura with this magic weapon, treat that criatura as if it is vulnerable to dano contundente. If it is already vulnerable to dano contundente, your attack causa an additional 1d6 dano radiante.

name: Book of Ebon Tides
desc:
This strange, twilight-hued tome was written on pages of pure shadow weave, bound in traditional birch board covers wrapped with shadow Goblin hide, and imbued with the memories of forests on the Plane of Shadow. Its covers often reflect leve as if it were resting in a forest grove, and some owners swear that a Goblin face appears on them now and again. The sturdy lock on one side opens only for wizards, elves, and Shadow Fey (see Tome of Beasts). The book has 15 charges, and it regains 2d6 + 3 expended charges daily in the twilight before dawn. If you expend the last charge, roll a 1d20. On a 1, the book retains its Ebon Tides and Shadow Lore properties but loses its Spells property. When the magic ritual completes, make an Inteligência (Arcanismo) check and consult the Terrain Changes table for the appropriate DCs. You can change the terrain in any one way listed at your result or lower. For example, if your result was 17, you could turn a small forest up to 30 pés across into a grassland, create a grove of trees up to 240 pés across, create a 6-pé-wide flowing stream, overgrow 1,500 pés of an existing road, or other similar option. Only natural terrain you can see can be affected; built structures, such as homes or castles, remain untouched, though roads and trails can be overgrown or hidden. em uma falha, the terrain is unchanged. On a 1, an Overshadow (see Tome of Beasts 2) also appears and attacks you. On a 20, you can choose two options. Deities, Fey Lords and Ladies (see Tome of Beasts), archdevils, demon lords, and other powerful rulers in the Plane of Shadow can prevent these terrain modifications from happening in their presence or anywhere within their respective domains. Spells marked with an asterisk (*) can be found in Deep Magic for 5th Edition. At the GM's discretion, spells from Deep Magic for 5th Edition can be replaced with other spells of similar levels and similarly related to darkness, illusion, or shadows, such as invisibility or major image. | CD | Effect |
| --- | --------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| 8 | Obscuring a path and removing all signs of passage (30 pés per point over 7) |
| 10 | Creating a grove of trees (30 pés across per point over 9) |
| 11 | Creating or drying up a lake or pond (up to 10 pés across per point over 10) |
| 12 | Creating a flowing stream (1 pé wide per point over 11) |
| 13 | Overgrowing an existing road with brush or trees (300 pés per point over 12) |
| 14 | Shifting a river to a new course (300 pés per point over 13) |
| 15 | Moving a forest (300 pés per point over 14) |
| 16 | Creating a small hill, riverbank, or cliff (10 pés tall per point over 15) |
| 17 | Turning a small forest into grassland or clearing, or vice versa (30 pés across per point over 16) |
| 18 | Creating a new river (10 pés wide per point over 17) |
| 19 | Turning a large forest into grassland, or vice versa (300 pés across per point over 19) |
| 20 | Creating a new mountain (1,000 pés high per point over 19) |
| 21 | Drying up an existing river (reducing width by 10 pés per point over 20) |
| 22 | Shrinking an existing hill or mountain (reducing 1,000 pés per point over 21) | Written by an Élfico princess at the Court of Silver Words, this volume encodes her understanding and mastery of shadow. Whimsical illusions suffuse every page, animating its illuminated capital letters and ornamental figures. The book is a famous work among the sable elves of that plane, and it opens to the touch of any elfmarked or sable elf character.

name: Book of Eibon
desc: This fragmentary black book is reputed to descend from the realms of Hyperborea. It contains puzzling guidelines for frightful necromantic rituals and maddening interdimensional travel. The book holds the following spells: semblance of dread*, ectoplasm*, animate dead, speak with dead, emanation of Yoth*, green decay*, yellow sign*, eldritch communion*, create undead, gate, harm, astral projection, and Void rift*. Spells marked with an asterisk (*) can be found in Deep Magic for 5th Edition. At the GM's discretion, the book can contain other spells similarly related to necromancy, madness, or interdimensional travel. If you are attuned to this book, you can use it as a spellbook and as an arcane focus. In addition, while holding the book, you can use a ação bônus to cast a necromancy spell that is written in this tome without expending a espaço de magia or using any verbal or somatic components. Once used, this property of the book can't be used again until the next dawn.

name: Book of Storing
desc:
After you attune to this 1-pé square 6-inch thick book it hides its true Natureza to anybody else, appearing to be a mundane diary. When you open it however, the book reveals a Tiny storage compartment.

The storage space is the same size as the book, and because this item doesn’t function as a pocket dimension it can be safely used to store such items (such as a __portable hole_ ).

name: Book Shroud
desc: When not bound to a book, this red leather book cover is embossed with images of eyes on every inch of its surface. When you wrap this cover around a tome, it shifts the book's appearance to a plain red cover with a title of your choosing and blank pages on which you can write. When viewing the wrapped book, other criaturas see the plain red version with any contents you've written. A criatura succeeding on a CD 15 Sabedoria (Percepção) check sees the real book and can remove the shroud.

name: Bookkeeper Inkpot
desc: This glass vessel looks like an ordinary inkpot. A quill fashioned from an ostrich feather accompanies the inkpot. You can use an action to speak the inkpot's command word, alvoing a Bookkeeper (see criatura Codex) that you can see within 10 pés of you. An unwilling bookkeeper deve ter sucesso em a CD 13 teste de resistência de Carisma ou ficar transferred to the inkpot, making you the bookkeeper's new “creator.” While the bookkeeper is contained within the inkpot, it suffers no harm due to being away from its bound book, but it can't use any of its actions or traits that apply to it being in a bound book. Dipping the quill in the inkpot and writing in a book binds the bookkeeper to the new book. If the inkpot is found as treasure, there is a 50 percent chance it contains a bookkeeper. An identify spell reveals if a bookkeeper is inside the inkpot before using the inkpot's ink.

name: Bookmark of Eldritch Insight
desc: This cloth bookmark is inscribed with blurred runes that are hard to decipher. If you use this bookmark while researching ancient evils (such as arch-devils or demon lords) or otherworldly mysteries (such as the Void or the Great Old Ones) during a descanso longo, the bookmark crumbles to dust and grants you its knowledge. You double your proficiência bonus on Arcanismo, História, and Religião checks to recall lore about the subject of your research for the next 24 horas. If you don't have proficiência in these skills, you instead gain proficiência in them for the next 24 horas, but you are proficiente only when recalling information about the subject of your research.

name: Boots of Elvenkind
desc: While you wear these boots, your steps make no sound, regardless of the surface you are moving across. You also have vantagem on Destreza (Furtividade) checks that rely on moving silently.

name: Boots of Elvenkind
desc: These boots cause your steps to make no sound, no matter the material stepped upon. While wearing these boots, you gain _advantage_  on Destreza (Furtividade) checks to move silently.

name: Boots of Levitation
desc: While you wear these boots, you can use an action to cast the _levitate_ spell on yourself at will.

name: Boots of Levitation
desc: While wearing these boots, up to 3 times between _long rests_  you can use an action to cast __levitate_  on yourself.

name: Boots of Pouncing
desc: These soft leather boots have a collar made of Albino Death Weasel fur (see criatura Codex). While you wear these boots, your andando Deslocamento becomes 40 pés, unless your andando Deslocamento is higher. Your Deslocamento is still reduced if you are encumbered or wearing pesada armor. If you move at least 20 pés straight toward a criatura and hit it with a ataque corpo a corpo com arma on the same turn, that alvo deve ter sucesso em a CD 13 teste de resistência de Força ou ficar knocked prostrado. If the alvo is prostrado, you can make one ataque corpo a corpo com arma against it as a ação bônus.

name: Boots of Quaking
desc: While wearing these steel-toed boots, the earth itself shakes when you walk, causing harmless, but unsettling, tremors. If you move at least 15 pés in a single turn, todas as criaturas within 10 pés of you at any point during your movement deve fazer a CD 16 teste de resistência de Força ou receber 1d6 dano de força and fall prostrado. In addition, while wearing these boots, you can cast earthquake, requiring no Concentração, by speaking a command word and jumping on a point on the ground. The spell is centered on that point. Once you cast earthquake in this way, you can't do so again until the next dawn.

name: Boots of Solid Footing
desc: A thick, rubbery sole covers the bottoms and sides of these stout leather boots. They are useful for maneuvering in cluttered alleyways, slick sewers, and the occasional patch of ice or gravel. While you wear these boots, you can use a ação bônus to speak the command word. If you do, não mágico difficult terrain doesn't cost you extra movement when you walk across it wearing these boots. If you speak the command word again as a ação bônus, you end the effect. When the boots' property has been used for a total of 1 minuto, the magic ceases to function until the next dawn.

name: Boots of Speed
desc:
While you wear these boots, you can use a ação bônus and click the boots' heels together. If you do, the boots double your andando Deslocamento, and any criatura that makes an ataque de oportunidade against you has desvantagem on the jogada de ataque. If you click your heels together again, you end the effect.

When the boots' property has been used for a total of 10 minutos, the magic ceases to function until you finish a descanso longo.

name: Boots of Speed
desc:
While wearing these boots, you can use a ação bônus to click the heels together. You double your base Deslocamento, and opportunity attacks made against you have _disadvantage_ . You can end the effect as a ação bônus.

Once the boots have been used in this way for a total of 10 minutos (each use expends a minimum of 1 minuto), they cease to function until you finish a _long rest_ .

name: Boots of Striding and Springing
desc: While you wear these boots, your andando Deslocamento becomes 30 pés, unless your andando Deslocamento is higher, and your Deslocamento isn't reduced if you are encumbered or wearing pesada armor. In addition, you can jump three times the normal distance, though you can't jump farther than your remaining movement would allow.

name: Boots of Striding and Springing
desc: While wearing these boots, your Deslocamento increases to 30 pés, unless it is higher, regardless of encumbrance or armor. In addition, your jump distances increase 15 pés vertically and 30 pés horizontally (as the _jump_  spell).

name: Boots of the Grandmother
desc: While wearing these boots, you have proficiência in the Furtividade skill if you don't already have it, and you double your proficiência bonus on Destreza (Furtividade) checks. As an action, you can drip three drops of fresh blood onto the boots to ease your passage through the world. For 1d6 horas, you and your aliados within 30 pés of you ignore difficult terrain. Once used, this property can't be used again until the next dawn.

name: Boots of the Swift Striker
desc: While you wear these boots, your andando Deslocamento increases by 10 pés. In addition, when you take the Dash action while wearing these boots, you can make a single weapon attack no final de your movement. You can't continue moving after making this attack.

name: Boots of the Winterlands
desc:
These furred boots are snug and feel quite warm. While you wear them, you gain the following benefits:

* You have resistance to dano de frio.
* You ignore difficult terrain created by ice or snow.
* You can tolerate temperatures as low as -50 degrees Fahrenheit without any additional protection. If you wear pesada clothes, you can tolerate temperatures as low as -100 degrees Fahrenheit.

name: Boots of the Winterlands
desc:
While wearing these boots, you gain the following benefits:

* Resistance to dano de frio.
* You ignore _difficult terrain_  caused by ice or snow.
* You can survive temperatures as low as –50° Fahrenheit (–46° Celsius) without effect, or as low as –100° Fahrenheit (–74° Celsius) with pesada clothes.

name: Borrower’s Bookmark
desc:
A neat strap of embossed leather, the borrower’s bookmark can be placed in a book, allowing it to be stored in an extradimensional space. As an action you can send the book into a pocket dimension. While it is in the pocket dimension, you can use an action to summon it to your hand or an unoccupied space within 5 pés of you. If you unattune from the bookmark while its book is within the pocket dimension, the bookmark reappears on your person, but the book is lost. The bookmark’s magic can’t be used to store anything other than a book.

**_Curse._** The borrower’s bookmark is cursed. Books dismissed to the pocket dimension are sent to a powerful entity’s lair. The entity learns all the knowledge contained therein, as well as your identity and location.

name: Bottle of Fizz
desc: When found this thick glass bottle has 25 (5d10) small red rocks inside. You can use an action to throw a red rock to the ground to create a spectacular fireworks show that lasts for 1 rodada. The fireworks cast bright leve for 50 pés and dim leve for a further 30 pés, and they can be heard up to 200 pés away.

name: Bottled Boat
desc: This clear glass bottle contains a tiny replica of a wooden rowboat down to the smallest detail, including two stout oars, a miniature coil of hemp rope, a fishing net, and a small cask. You can use an action to break the bottle, destroying the bottle and releasing its contents. The rowboat and all of the items emerge as full-sized, normal, and permanent items of their type, which includes 50 pés of hempen rope, a cask containing 20 gallons of fresh water, two oars, and a 12-pé-long rowboat.

name: Bountiful Cauldron
desc: If this small, copper cauldron is filled with water and a half pound of meat, vegetables, or other foodstuffs then placed over a fogo, it produces a simple, but hearty stew that provides uma criatura with enough nourishment to sustain it for one dia. As long as the food is kept within the cauldron with the lid on, the food remains fresh and edible for up to 24 horas, though it grows frio unless reheated.

name: Bouquet of Wisdom
desc:
This stunningly crafted bouquet contains 2d10 magically fresh flowers—most commonly roses. As an action, you may pluck one from the bouquet while concentrating on your intent. The flower may function as a _scroll_  of _identify , detect veneno and disease ,_ or __detect magic_ . The effect lasts for one minuto, after which the flower withers and dies.

If the bouquet is made up of seven roses or more, you can burn it to cast a _divination_  spell, revealing the answer to the question asked in the sweetly-scented smoke. Doing so destroys the bouquet.

name: Bow of Accuracy
desc: The normal range of this bow is doubled, but its long range remains the same.

name: Bow of the Viper
desc:
Both limbs of this bow are scaled and end in a snake’s open mouth.

You gain a +1 to attack and damage rolls while wielding this weapon. As a ação bônus, you can expend 1 charge to veneno one arrow suitable for the bow for 1 minuto or until it is used to damage a criatura When a criatura is damaged by the blade’s veneno, it makes a CD 15 Constituição _teste de resistência_  or recebe 1d10 dano de veneno and becomes _poisoned_  for 1 minuto.

Alternatively, you can use an action to expend 2 charges to cast the following: _protection from veneno , shillelagh_ (transforming the bow into a snake-headed   _1 quarterstaff_ ), _thorn whip_ (causing one of the bow’s snake heads to lash out).

The bow of the viper has 4 charges and regains 1d4 expended charges each dawn. If you expend the last charge, roll a d20\. On a or 5 or less, it can no longer regain charges and becomes a   _1 longbow_ .

name: Bowl of Commanding Water Elementals
desc:
While this bowl is filled with water, you can use an action to speak the bowl's command word and summon a water elemental, as if you had cast the _conjure elemental_ spell. The bowl can't be used this way again until the next dawn.

The bowl is about 1 pé in diameter and half as deep. It weighs 3 pounds and holds about 3 gallons.

name: Bowl of Commanding Water Elementals
desc: This pesada glass bowl weighs 3 pounds and can hold 3 gallons of water. While it is filled, you can use an action to summon a _water elemental_  as if you had cast the _conjure elemental_  spell. Once used, you must wait until the next dawn to use it again.

name: Box of Bees
desc:
Many apprentices play pranks on one another, some of which can be quite painful—the _box of bees_ is a particularly popular example and now sold by those with their own mischievous designs. Each of these wooden boxes is rectangular and approximately 2 inches long. It is usually unadorned, though some boxes seem to have something moving or vibrating inside.

When you speak the command word and use an action to expend 1 charge, the lid slides open and a bee erupts out of the box to harass a criatura of your choice within 20 pés. A criatura harassed by the bee deve ter sucesso em a CD 5 Constituição _teste de resistência_  no início de cada um de seus turnos for 1 minuto. em uma falha, the criatura makes its next jogada de ataque or teste de habilidade with _disadvantage_ . 

When you speak another command word and expend all 3 charges, a dozen or more bees swarm out of the box and attack. A criatura attacked by the bees deve ter sucesso em a CD 10 Constituição _teste de resistência_  no início de cada um de seus turnos for 1 minuto. em uma falha, the criatura recebe 1 point of damage and has _disadvantage_  on attack rolls and ability checks for 1 rodada. 

The box has 3 charges and regains 1d3 charges each dawn. If you expend the last charge, roll a d20\. On a result of 5 or less, the box loses its magic and becomes a mundane item.

name: Box of Party Tricks
desc:
This small neat box contains 1d12 glowing vials. You can use an action to remove a vial and smash it to the ground, creating a randomly determined effect from the Box of Party Tricks table.

## Table: Box of Party Tricks

| **d8** | **Effect**                                                                                                                                                                                         |
| ------ | -------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| 1      | A small bonfire appears in the nearest unoccupied 5-pé cube and remains for 1 minuto. All other sources of flame within 50 pés double in brightness.                                            |
| 2      | For the next minuto you gain +1 bonus to ability checks, _attack rolls_ , damage rolls, and _teste de resistências_  using Força.                                                                       |
| 3      | You summon a small, fiercely loyal armored _weasel_  into your service (with 7 pontos de vida and Classe de Armadura 14 thanks to its miniature mithral outfit) that obeys only your commands.                |
| 4      | A metal ball appears floating in your space and remains there until you say the command word, making it slam into the nearest hostile criatura to deal 3d6 dano contundente before disappearing. |
| 5      | For the next 1d6 horas your voice becomes higher by an octave.                                                                                                                                     |
| 6      | Until the next dawn you leave a trail of wildflowers wherever you walk.                                                                                                                            |
| 7      | A pair of __boots of elvenkind_ appear in the nearest unoccupied square. After this effect has appeared once, any further results of 7 are rerolled.                                               |
