| 8      | All hostile criaturas in a 30-pé radius are ensnared by ice. An ensnared criatura is _grappled_  until it uses an action to make a CD 16 teste de Força to break out.                            |

name: Box of Secrets
desc: This well-made, cubical box appears to be a normal container that can hold as much as a normal chest. However, each side of the chest is a lid that can be opened on cunningly concealed hinges. A successful CD 15 Sabedoria (Percepção) check notices that the sides can be opened. When you use an action to turn the box so a new side is facing up, and speak the command word before opening the lid, the current contents of the chest slip into an interdimensional space, leaving it empty once more. You can use an action to fill the box again, then turn it over to a new side and open it, again sending the contents to the interdimensional space. This can be done up to six times, once for each side of the box. To gain access to a particular batch of contents, the correct side must be facing up, and you must use an action to speak the command word as you open the lid on that side. A box of secrets is often crafted with specific means of telling the sides apart, such as unique carvings on each side, or having each side painted a different color. If any side of the box is destroyed completely, the contents that were stored through that side are lost. Likewise, if the entire box is destroyed, the contents are lost forever.

name: Bracelet of the Fire Tender
desc: This bracelet is made of thirteen small, roasted pinecones lashed together with lengths of dried sinew. It smells of pine and woodsmoke. It is uncomfortable to wear over bare skin. While wearing this bracelet, you don't have desvantagem on Sabedoria (Percepção) checks that rely on sight when looking in areas lightly obscured by não mágico smoke or fog.

name: Bracers of Archery
desc: While wearing these bracers, you have proficiência with the longbow and shortbow, and you gain a +2 bonus to damage rolls on ranged attacks made with such weapons.

name: Bracers of Archery
desc: While wearing these bracers, you gain proficiência with the longbow and shortbow, and you gain a +2 bonus on damage rolls on ranged attacks made with them.

name: Bracers of Defense
desc: While wearing these bracers, you gain a +2 bonus to AC if you are wearing no armor and using no shield.

name: Bracers of Defense
desc: While wearing these bracers, you gain a +2 bonus to AC if you are not wearing armor or using a shield.

name: Braid Whip Clasp
desc: This intricately carved ivory clasp can be wrapped around or woven into braided hair 3 pés or longer. While the clasp is attached to your braided hair, you can speak its command word as a ação bônus and transform your braid into a dangerous whip. If you speak the command word again, you end the effect. You gain a +1 bonus to attack and damage rolls made with this magic whip. When the clasp's property has been used for a total of 10 minutos, you can't use it to transform your braid into a whip again until the next dawn.

name: Brain Juice
desc: This foul-smelling, murky, purple-gray liquid is created from the liquefied brains of spellcasting criaturas, such as aboleths. Anyone consuming this repulsive mixture deve fazer a CD 15 teste de resistência de Inteligência. em um sucesso no teste, the drinker is infused with mágico power and regains 1d6 + 4 expended espaços de magia. em uma falha no teste, the drinker is afflicted with short-term madness for 1 dia. If a criatura consumes multiple doses of brain juice and fails three consecutive Inteligência teste de resistências, it is afflicted with long-term madness permanently and automatically fails all further teste de resistências brought about by drinking brain juice.

name: Brass Clockwork Staff
desc: This curved staff is made of coiled brass and glass wire. You can use an action to speak one of three command words and throw the staff on the ground within 10 pés of you. The staff transforms into one of three wireframe criaturas, depending on the command word: a unicorn, a hound, or a swarm of tiny beetles. The wireframe criatura or swarm is under your control and acts on its own initiative count. On your turn, you can mentally command the wireframe criatura or swarm if it is within 60 pés of you and you aren't incapacitado. You decide what action the criatura recebe and where it moves during its next turn, or you can issue it a general command, such as to attack your inimigos or guard a location. The wireframe unicorn lasts for up to 1 hora, uses the statistics of a warhorse, and can be used as a mount. The wireframe hound lasts for up to 5 minutos, uses the statistics of a dire wolf, and has vantagem to track any criatura you damaged within the past hora. The wireframe beetle swarm lasts for up to 1 minuto, uses the statistics of a swarm of beetles, and can destroy não mágico objects that aren't being worn or carried and that aren't made of stone or metal (destruction happens at a rate of 1 pound of material per rodada, up to a maximum of 10 pounds). no final de the duration, the wireframe criatura or swarm reverts to its staff form. It reverts to its staff form early if it drops to 0 pontos de vida or if you use an action to speak the command word again while touching it. If it reverts to its staff form early by being reduced to 0 pontos de vida, the staff becomes inert and unusable until the third dawn after the criatura was killed. Otherwise, the wireframe criatura or swarm has all of its pontos de vida when you transform the staff into the criatura again. When a wireframe criatura or swarm becomes the staff again, this property of the staff can't be used again until the next dawn.

name: Brass Snake Ball
desc: Most commonly used by assassins to strangle sleeping victims, this pesada, brass ball is 6 inches across and weighs approximately 15 pounds. It has the image of a coiled snake embossed around it. You can use an action to command the orb to uncoil into a brass snake approximately 6 pés long and 3 inches thick. You can direct it by telepathic command to attack any criatura within your line of sight. Use the statistics for the constrictor snake, but use Classe de Armadura 14 and increase the challenge rating to 1/2 (100 XP). The snake can stay animate for up to 5 minutos or until reduced to 0 pontos de vida. Being reduced to 0 pontos de vida causes the snake to revert to orb form and become inert for 1 week. If damaged but not reduced to 0 pontos de vida, the snake has full pontos de vida when summoned again. Once you have used the orb to become a snake, it can't be used again until the next sunset.

name: Brawler's Leather
desc: These rawhide straps have lines of crimson runes running along their length. They require 10 minutos of bathing them in salt water before carefully wrapping them around your forearms. Once fitted, you gain a +1 bonus to attack and damage rolls made with unarmed strikes. The straps become brittle with use. After you have dealt damage with unarmed strike attacks 10 times, the straps crumble away.

name: Brawn Armor
desc: This armor was crafted from the hide of an ancient grizzly bear. While wearing it, you gain a +1 bonus to AC, and you have vantagem on grapple checks. The armor has 3 charges. You can use a ação bônus to expend 1 charge to deal your unarmed strike damage to a criatura you are grappling. The armor regains all expended charges daily at dawn.

name: Brazen Band
desc: Made by kobold clockwork mages, this brass clockwork ring is formed to look like a coiled dragon. When you speak or whisper the Dracônico command word etched on the inside of the ring, the brass dragon uncoils and attempts to pick any lock within 10 pés of you. The dragon picks the lock using your proficiência bonus but with vantagem. It is treated as having thieves' tools when attempting to pick locks. It uses your Destreza (Furtividade) bonus for purposes of not being spotted but with vantagem due to its extremely small size. Whether successful or not, once you have used the ring to attempt to pick a lock, it can't be used again until the next sunset.

name: Brazen Bulwark
desc: This rectangular shield is plated with polished brass and resembles a crenelated tower. While wielding this shield, you gain a +1 bonus to AC. This bonus is in addition to the shield's normal bonus to AC.

name: Brazier of Commanding Fire Elementals
desc:
While a fogo burns in this brass brazier, you can use an action to speak the brazier's command word and summon a fogo elemental, as if you had cast the _conjure elemental_ spell. The brazier can't be used this way again until the next dawn.

The brazier weighs 5 pounds.

name: Brazier of Commanding Fire Elementals
desc: While fogo burns in this 5 pound brass brazier, you can use an action to summon a _fire elemental_  as if you had cast the __conjure elemental_  spell. Once used, you must wait until the next dawn to use it again.

name: Breaker Lance
desc: You gain a +1 bonus to attack and damage rolls with this magic weapon. When you attack an object or structure with this magic lance and hit, maximize your weapon damage dice against the alvo. The lance has 3 charges. As part of an attack action with the lance, you can expend a charge while striking a barrier created by a spell, such as a wall of fogo or wall of força, or an entryway protected by the arcane lock spell. You deve fazer a teste de Força against a CD equal to 10 + the spell's level. On a successful check, the spell ends. The lance regains 1d3 expended charges daily at dawn.

name: Breathing Reed
desc: This tiny river reed segment is cool to the touch. If you chew the reed while underwater, it provides you with enough air to breathe for up to 10 minutos. no final de the duration, the reed loses its magic and can be harmlessly swallowed or spit out.

name: Briarthorn Bracers
desc: These leather bracers are inscribed with Élfico runes. While wearing these bracers, you gain a +1 bonus to AC if you are using no shield. In addition, while in a forest, não mágico difficult terrain costs you no extra movement.

name: Brighella's Guitar
desc: This guitar is brilliantly painted with triangles of bright color. While attuned, you gain an _expertise die_  on Atuação checks made with this guitar. Additionally, once per dia, you may use an action to cast __bestow curse_  as a 5th-level spell, without spending a espaço de magia. However, the curse is always _disadvantage_  on Destreza _ability checks_  and _teste de resistências_  and each failure is followed by a slapstick sound effect.

name: Broken Fang Talisman
desc: This talisman is a piece of burnished copper, shaped into a curved fang with a large crack through the middle. While wearing the talisman, you can use an action to cast the encrypt / decrypt (see Deep Magic for 5th Edition) spell. The talisman can't be used this way again until 1 hora has passed.

name: Brooch of Shielding
desc: While wearing this brooch, you have resistance to dano de força, and you have immunity to damage from the _magic missile_ spell.

name: Brooch of Shielding
desc: While wearing this brooch, you gain resistance to dano de força and immunity to the _magic missile_  spell.

name: Broom of Flying
desc:
This wooden broom, which weighs 3 pounds, functions like a mundane broom until you stand astride it and speak its command word. It then hovers beneath you and can be ridden in the air. It has a voando Deslocamento of 50 pés. It can carry up to 400 pounds, but its voando Deslocamento becomes 30 pés while carrying over 200 pounds. The broom stops hovering when you land.

You can send the broom to travel alone to a destination within 1 milha of you if you speak the command word, name the location, and are familiar with that place. The broom comes back to you when you speak another command word, provided that the broom is still within 1 milha of you.

name: Broom of Flying
desc:
You can sit astride this ordinary-seeming 3 pound broom and speak its command word, causing it to hover. While it is hovering you can ride the broom to fly through the air. The broom can carry up to 200 pounds at a Deslocamento of 40 pés, or up to 400 pounds at a Deslocamento of 20 pés. It stops hovering if you land.

You can send the broom up to 1 milha from you by speaking its command word and naming a location you are familiar with. It can also be called back from up to a milha away with a different command word.

name: Broom of Sweeping
desc: You can use an action to speak the broom's command word and give it short instructions consisting of a few words, such as “sweep the floor” or “dust the cabinets.” The broom can clean up to 5 cubic pés each minuto and continues cleaning until you use another action to deactivate it. The broom can't climb barriers higher than 5 pés and can't open doors.

name: Brotherhood of Fezzes
desc: This trio of fezzes works only if all three hats are worn within 60 pés of each other by criaturas of the same size. If one of the hats is removed or moves further than 60 pés from the others or if criaturas of different sizes are wearing the hats, the hats' magic temporarily ceases. While three criaturas of the same size wear these fezzes within 60 pés of each other, cada criatura can use its action to cast the alter self spell from it at will. However, all three wearers of the fezzes are affected as if the same spell was simultaneously cast on each of them, making each wearer appear identical to the other. For example, if one Medium wearer uses an action to change its appearance to that of a specific elf, each other wearer's appearance changes to look like the exact same elf.

name: Bubble Wand
desc:
This slender timber wand has a wooden ring at its tip. The wand has 7 charges and regains 1d6+1 charges each dawn. If you expend the last charge, roll a d20\. On a 1, the wand bursts into a spray of colorful bubbles and is lost forever.

While holding the wand, you can use an action to expend its charges and either create a harmless spray of colorful bubbles (1 charge) or cast the __dancing lights_ truque (2 charges). The _dancing lights_ appear as glowing bubbles.

When a criatura alvos you with an attack while you are holding the wand, you can use your reação to snap it (destroying the wand). You can do this after the roll is made, but before the outcome of the attack is determined. You gain a +5 bonus to AC and a fly Deslocamento of 10 pés. as a Gigante soap bubble coalesces around you. The bubble persists for 1 minuto or until you are hit with an attack, at which point it bursts with a loud ‘pop’.

name: Bubbling Retort
desc: This long, thin retort is fashioned from smoky yellow glass and is topped with an intricately carved brass stopper. You can unstopper the retort and fill it with liquid as an action. Once you do so, it spews out multicolored bubbles in a 20-pé radius. The bubbles last for 1d4 + 1 rodadas. While they last, criaturas within the radius are cego and the area is heavily obscured to todas as criaturas except those with sentido sísmico. The liquid in the retort is destroyed in the process with no harmful effect on its surroundings. If any bubbles are popped, they burst with a wet smacking sound but no other effect.

name: Buckle of Blasting
desc: This soot-colored steel buckle has an exploding flame etched into its surface. It can be affixed to any Comum belt. While wearing this buckle, you have resistance to dano de força. In addition, the buckle has 5 charges, and it regains 1d4 + 1 charges daily at dawn. It has the following properties.

name: Bullseye Arrow
desc: This arrow has bright red fletching and a blunt, red tip. You gain a +1 bonus to attack rolls made with this magic arrow. On a hit, the arrow causa no damage, but it paints a mágico red dot on the alvo for 1 minuto. While the dot lasts, the alvo recebe an extra 1d4 damage of the weapon's type from any ataque à distância that hits it. In addition, ranged weapon attacks against the alvo score a critical hit on a roll of 19 or 20. When this arrow hits a alvo, the arrow vanishes in a flash of red leve and is destroyed.

name: Burglar's Lock and Key
desc: This pesada iron lock bears a stout, pitted key permanently fixed in the keyhole. As an action, you can twist the key counterclockwise to instantly open one door, chest, bag, bottle, or container of your choice within 30 pés. Any container or portal weighing more than 30 pounds or imobilizado in any way (latched, bolted, tied, or the like) automatically resists this effect.

name: Burning Skull
desc: This appallingly misshapen skull—though alien and monstrous in aspect—is undeniably human, and it is large and hollow enough to be worn as a helm by any Medium humanoid. The skull helm radiates an unholy spectral aura, which sheds dim leve in a 10-pé radius. According to legends, gazing upon a burning skull freezes the blood and withers the brain of one who entende not its mystery.

name: Butter of Disbelief
desc: This stick of mágico butter is carved with arcane runes and never melts or spoils. It has 3 charges. While holding this butter, you can use an action to slice off a piece and expend 1 charge to cast the grease spell (save CD 13) from it. The grease that covers the ground looks like melted butter. The butter regains all expended charges daily at dawn. If you expend the last charge, the butter disappears.

name: Butterfly Clips
desc: These clips look like brightly colored enamel butterflies. When affixed to hair, they animate and flit around your head. Most people who wear these clips wear multiple, giving the appearance of a swarm of butterflies surrounding their hair.

name: Buzzing Blade
desc: You can use a ação bônus to speak this weapon's command word, causing the blade to emit a loud buzzing sound. The buzzing noise is audible out to 100 pés. While the sword is buzzing, it causa an extra 2d6 dano de trovão to any alvo it hits. The buzzing lasts until you use a ação bônus to speak the command word again or until you drop or sheathe the weapon.

name: Cage of Folly
desc:
This small silver or gold birdcage traps your bad ideas and puts them on display. When you fail an Arcanismo, História, Natureza, or Religião check, a little piece of a mechanical bird materializes inside the cage: first the pés, then legs, body, wings, and head. You can immediately reconsider and reroll the teste de habilidade. The _cage of folly_ can be used once every 24 horas, and recharges no final de each week.

Once you have used the birdcage 5 times, the bird sings a mocking song for 1 hora when you fail an Arcanismo, História, Natureza, or Religião check. If you open the birdcage and let the bird go free, it gives you one piece of good advice about a current problem or question that you face. At the Narrator’s discretion, the advice may give you _advantage_  on one teste de habilidade made in the next week. Afterward it flies away as the birdcage loses its magic and becomes a mundane item (though some who have released their birds claim to have encountered them again in the wilds later).

name: Campaign Field Tent
desc:
You can use an action to place this 1-inch cloth cube on the ground and speak its command word. The cube rapidly grows into a field tent with open or closed sides (your choice) that remains until you use an action to speak the command word that dismisses it, which works only if the tent is empty.
  The field tent is a canvas tent, 15 pés on a side and 10 pés high. It remains firmly fixed to the ground, even when standing on bare stone, a ship's deck, or loose sand, and its magic prevents it from being tipped over.
  cada criatura in the area where the tent appears deve fazer a CD 15 teste de resistência de Destreza, taking 5d10 dano contundente em uma falha no teste, or half as much damage on a successful one. In either case, the criatura is pushed to an unoccupied space outside but next to the tent. Objects in the area that aren't being worn or carried take this damage and are pushed automatically.
  The tent has 50 pontos de vida, immunity to ataques não mágicos, excluding siege weapons, and resistance to all other damage. The tent contains a small table with a chair and five simple beds made of cloth and foldable wooden frames.
  The field tent can hold up to six Medium or smaller criaturas. When a criatura finishes a descanso curto in the tent, it regains double the pontos de vida from any Hit Dice it spends. When a criatura finishes a descanso longo in the tent, it reduces its exaustão level by 2 instead of 1. In addition, a criatura has vantagem on teste de resistências it makes against disease and veneno while it rests in the tent.

name: Candied Axe
desc: This battleaxe bears a golden head spun from crystalized honey. Its wooden handle is carved with reliefs of bees. You gain a +2 bonus to attack and damage rolls made with this magic weapon.

name: Candle of Communion
desc: This black candle burns with an eerie, violet flame. The candle's magic is activated when the candle is lit, which requires an action. When lit, the candle sheds bright leve in a 5-pé radius and dim leve for an additional 5 pés. cada criatura in the candle's leve has vantagem on Constituição teste de resistências to maintain Concentração on necromancy spells. After burning for 1 hora, or if the candle's flame is magically or nonmagically snuffed out, it is destroyed. Alternatively, when you leve the candle for the first time, you can cast the speak with dead spell with it. Doing so destroys the candle.

name: Candle of Invocation
desc:
This slender taper is dedicated to a deity and shares that deity's alignment. The candle's alignment can be detected with the _detect evil and good_ spell. The GM chooses the god and associated alignment or determines the alignment randomly.

| d20   | Alignment       |
|-------|-----------------|
| 1-2   | Chaotic evil    |
| 3-4   | Chaotic neutral |
| 5-7   | Chaotic good    |
| 8-9   | Neutral evil    |
| 10-11 | Neutral         |
| 12-13 | Neutral good    |
| 14-15 | Lawful evil     |
| 16-17 | Lawful neutral  |
| 18-20 | Lawful good     |

The candle's magic is activated when the candle is lit, which requires an action. After burning for 4 horas, the candle is destroyed. You can snuff it out early for use at a later time. Deduct the time it burned in increments of 1 minuto from the candle's total burn time.

While lit, the candle sheds dim leve in a 30-pé radius. Any criatura within that leve whose alignment matches that of the candle makes attack rolls, teste de resistências, and ability checks with vantagem. In addition, a cleric or druid in the leve whose alignment matches the candle's can cast 1st* level spells he or she has prepared without expending espaços de magia, though the spell's effect is as if cast with a 1st-level slot.

Alternatively, when you leve the candle for the first time, you can cast the _gate_ spell with it. Doing so destroys the candle.

name: Candle of Invocation
desc:
This golden candle is infused with raw divine magic. When attuned to by a cleric or druid, it recebe on a color appropriate to the cleric’s deity. 

You can use an action to leve the candle and activate its magic. The candle can burn for a total of 4 horas in 1 minuto increments before being used up. 

While lit, the candle sheds dim leve in a 30-pé radius. Any criatura within the area who worships the same deity as the attuned criatura (or at the Narrator’s discretion, an allied deity) has _advantage_  on _attack rolls_ , _teste de resistências_ , and ability checks. If one of the criaturas gaining the prior benefit is also a cleric, druid, or herald, they can cast 1st-level spells from one of those classes at that spell level without expending espaços de magia.

Alternatively, one of these candles that has not yet been lit can be used to cast the __gate_ spell. Doing so consumes the candle.

name: Candle of Summoning
desc: This black candle burns with an eerie, green flame. The candle's magic is activated when the candle is lit, which requires an action. When lit, the candle sheds bright leve in a 5-pé radius and dim leve for an additional 5 pés. cada criatura in the candle's leve has vantagem on Constituição teste de resistências to maintain Concentração on conjuration spells. After burning for 1 hora, or if the flame is magically or nonmagically snuffed out, it is destroyed. Alternatively, when you leve the candle for the first time, you can cast the spirit guardians spell (save CD 15) with it. Doing so destroys the candle.

name: Candle of the Surreptitious Scholar
desc:
Initially crafted by wizard apprentices trying not to irritate their roommates, these candles became extremely popular with the thieves and other ne'er do wells that can afford them (helping some less scrupulous novice mages to afford tuition). The candle has 3 charges and regains 1d3 charges each dawn. 

When you speak the command word and use an action to expend 1 charge, the candle’s flame to spring to life. Its bluish flame provides clear illumination within 5 pés and _dim light_  for another 5 pés. The enchantment of the candle is such that the leve that it sheds is visible only to you, allowing you to read, write, or engage in other tasks with no penalties from darkness. Each charge is good for 1 hora of illumination, after which the candle winks out. 

By expending all 3 charges at once, you can create an effect identical to _light_  except that only you are able to see the leve it sheds.

If you expend the last charge, roll a d20\. On a result of 5 or less, the candle loses its magic and becomes a mundane item.

name: Candle of Visions
desc: This black candle burns with an eerie, blue flame. The candle's magic is activated when the candle is lit, which requires an action. When lit, the candle sheds bright leve in a 5-pé radius and dim leve for an additional 5 pés. cada criatura in the candle's leve has vantagem on Constituição teste de resistências to maintain Concentração on divination spells. After burning for 1 hora, or if the flame is magically or nonmagically snuffed out, it is destroyed. Alternatively, when you leve the candle for the first time, you can cast the augury spell with it, which reveals its otherworldly omen in the candle's smoke. Doing so destroys the candle.

name: Cane of Chaos
desc:
The _Cane of Chaos_ (known by some by its fairytale name, the Little Silver Stick) is a gorgeous silver scepter etched with fractals, adorned with an eight-pointed star, and imbued with the power of chaos. A cunning historian may be able to track the cane’s origins to a certain mage under a certain authoritarian regime centuries ago, who supplied it to a figure widely known for their role in the regime’s downfall. Similarly, the cane seems to be drawn to those who march to their own drumbeat, directing them on behalf of its creator to sow disruption and turmoil.

**Legends and Lore** Success on an Arcanismo or História check reveals the following:

**CD 15** This is the _Cane of Chaos_, used by a despot in times long past. It is also known as the Little Silver Stick.

**CD 18** The cane stores and is able to cast spells linked to chaos, but randomly unleashes chaotic mágico effects when used.

**CD 21** The cane can only be destroyed by a sovereign on the dia of their coronation.

**Artifact Properties**

The _Cane of Chaos_ has 1d4 lesser artifact benefits, 1d4 lesser artifact detriments, 1d4–1 greater artifact benefits, and 1d4+1 greater artifact detriments. 

In addition, the cane has the acuidade property and can be used as a double weapon which you become proficiente with when you attune to it. You gain a +2 bonus to weapon attack rolls and damage rolls made using the _Cane of Chaos_.

## **Magic**

While you use this quarterstaff as a spell focus, you gain a +2 bonus to ataque mágico rolls and your CD de resistência à magia. You know and have prepared all spells of the chaos school of magic (but not their rare versions). 

The _Cane of Chaos_ begins with a number of charges equal to your proficiência bonus and regains 1d6 charges each dawn (to a maximum number of charges equal to your level + 1, or your CR + 1). You can expend any number of charges from the cane to cast a chaos spell, which costs a number of charges equal to the spell’s level. Your spellcasting ability for these spells is your highest mental ability score (Inteligência, Sabedoria, or Carisma).

When you expend charges from the _Cane of Chaos_, it unleashes another chaotic mágico effect, either chosen by the Narrator or randomly determined.

__**Table: Cane of Chaos**__
| **d8** | **Wild Magic Effect**                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           |
| ------ | ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| 1      | One random criatura you see is subject to a _polymorph_  spell cast by the cane (using your CD de resistência à magia), turning it into a random CR 1/8 beast.                                                                                                                                                                                              |
| 2      | The 1d6 doors nearest to you come under an _arcane lock_  effect as though cast by the criatura nearest to you that can speak, write, or sign at least one language.                                                                                                                                                                            |
| 3      | The cane creates a __control weather_  effect, driving the weather towards unseasonable extreme temperatures and conditions.                                                                                                                                                                                                                    |
| 4      | cada criatura within 60 pés rolls 1d6, increasing a random ability score to 18 for the next 10 minutos (1: Força, 2: Destreza, 3: Constituição, 4: Inteligência, 5: Sabedoria, 6: Carisma).                                                                                                                                                  |
| 5      | cada criatura within 60 pés is subject to a __levitation_ effect created by the cane (using your CD de resistência à magia). cada criatura has _disadvantage_  on _teste de resistências_  against the effect and em uma falha immediately rises 60 pés. For the duration, cada criatura can control its own movement as though it had cast _levitate_ on itself. |
| 6      | You grow 1d6 inches taller (this effect cannot increase your size category).                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    |
| 7      | If you are a humanoid you are permanently transformed into a different humanoid heritage (as per Table: Reincarnation for the _reincarnate_  spell).                                                                                                                                                                                            |
| 8      | Duplicates of yourself appear within 60 pés! Roll 1d6 to determine their Natureza (1–2: 1d6 _animated armors_ , 3–4: a _mirror image_  effect, 5–6: a __simulacrum_  effect).                                                                                                                                                                    |

## Destroying the Cane

The _Cane of Chaos_ is born from the very essence of rebellion. To destroy it, you must offer the artifact as a gift to a sovereign on the dia of their coronation or to a mágico being with the Lawful alignment trait on the anniversary of their advent. If accepted as such a gift, the _Cane of Chaos_ melts into a puddle of ordinary molten silver.

name: Cantrip Wand
desc:
This wand can be used as a spellcasting focus and allows you to cast one additional truque as if you knew it, as long as it is on your spell list. Each truque wand has a truque imbued within it upon creation, and will be known by its name (such as a _fire bolt_  wand or __light  wand_). 

Other implements exist for the storing of cantrips from other classes (like _cantrip holy symbols_ or _cantrip instruments_), and though these are wondrous items they function like wands.

name: Cap of Thorns
desc: Donning this thorny wooden circlet causes it to meld with your scalp. It can be removed only upon your death or by a remove curse spell. The cap ingests some of your blood, dealing 2d4 dano perfurante. After this first feeding, the thorns feed once per dia for 1d4 dano perfurante. Once per dia, you can sacrifice 1 ponto de vida per level you possess to cast a especial entangle spell made of thorny vines. Carisma is your spellcasting ability for this effect. imobilizado criaturas deve fazer a successful teste de resistência de Carisma ou ficar affected by a charm person spell as thorns pierce their body. The alvo can repeat the teste de resistência no final de cada um de seus turnos, ending the effect on itself em um sucesso. If the alvo fails three consecutive saves, the thorns become deeply rooted and the enfeitiçado effect is permanent until remove curse or similar magic is cast on the alvo.

name: Cape of Targeting
desc: You gain a +1 bonus to AC while wearing this long, flowing cloak. Whenever you are within 10 pés of more than two criaturas, it subtly and slowly shifts its color to whatever the criaturas nearest you find the most irritating. While within 5 pés of a hostile criatura, you can use a ação bônus to speak the cloak's command word to activate it, allowing your aliados' ranged attacks to pass right through you. For 1 minuto, each friendly criatura that makes a ataque à distância against a hostile criatura within 5 pés of you has vantagem on the jogada de ataque. Each rodada the cloak is active, it enthusiastically and telepathically says “shoot me!” in different tones and cadences into the minds of each friendly criatura that can see you and the cloak. The cloak can't be used this way again until the next dawn.

name: Cape of the Mountebank
desc:
This cape smells faintly of brimstone. While wearing it, you can use it to cast the _dimension door_ spell as an action. This property of the cape can't be used again until the next dawn.

When you disappear, you leave behind a cloud of smoke, and you appear in a similar cloud of smoke at your destination. The smoke lightly obscures the space you left and the space you appear in, and it dissipates no final de your next turn. A leve or stronger wind disperses the smoke.

name: Cape of the Mountebank
desc: While wearing this cape, you can use an action to cast _dimension door_  once between _long rests_ . You disappear and reappear in a cloud of smoke which dissipates no final de your next turn, or sooner if conditions are windy.

name: Captain's Flag
desc: This red and white flag adorned with a white anchor is made of velvet that never seems to fray in strong wings. When mounted and flown on a ship, the flag changes to the colors and symbol of the ship's captain and crew. While this flag is mounted on a ship, the captain and its aliados have vantagem on teste de resistências against being enfeitiçado or amedrontado. In addition, when the captain is reduced to 0 pontos de vida while on the ship where this flag flies, each aliado of the captain has vantagem on its attack rolls até o final de seu próximo turno.

name: Captain's Goggles
desc: These copper and glass goggles are prized by air and sea captains across the world. The goggles are designed to repel water and never fog. After attuning to the goggles, your name (or preferred moniker) appears on the side of the goggles. While wearing the goggles, you can't suffer from exaustão.

name: Carpet of Flying
desc:
You can speak the carpet's command word as an action to make the carpet hover and fly. It moves according to your spoken directions, provided that you are within 30 pés of it.

Four sizes of _carpet of flying_ exist. The GM chooses the size of a given carpet or determines it randomly.

| d100   | Size          | Capacity | voando Deslocamento |
|--------|---------------|----------|--------------|
| 01-20  | 3 pés. × 5 pés. | 200 lb.  | 80 pés      |
| 21-55  | 4 pés. × 6 pés. | 400 lb.  | 60 pés      |
| 56-80  | 5 pés. × 7 pés. | 600 lb.  | 40 pés      |
| 81-100 | 6 pés. × 9 pés. | 800 lb.  | 30 pés      |

A carpet can carry up to twice the weight shown on the table, but it flies at half Deslocamento if it carries more than its normal capacity.

name: Carpet of Flying
desc:
You can use an action to speak this carpet’s command word, making it hover and fly. It moves according to your verbal commands as long as you are within 30 pés of it. 

These carpets come in four sizes. The Narrator can choose or randomly determine which size a given carpet is.

If the carpet is carrying half its capacity or less, its Deslocamento is doubled.

__**Table: Carpet of voando**__
| **d20** | **Size**      | **Capacity** | **voando Deslocamento** | **Cost**  |
| ------- | ------------- | ------------ | ---------------- | --------- |
| 1-4     | 3 pés. x 5 pés. | 250 lb.      | 30 pés.           | 15,000 gp |
| 5-11    | 4 pés. x 6 pés. | 500 lb.      | 25 pés.           | 20,000 gp |
| 12-16   | 5 pés. x 7 pés. | 800 lb.      | 20 pés.           | 25,000 gp |
| 17-20   | 6 pés. x 9 pés. | 1,000 lb.    | 15 pés.           | 30,000 gp |

name: Case of Preservation
desc: This item appears to be a standard map or scroll case fashioned of well-oiled leather. You can store up to ten rolled-up sheets of paper or five rolled-up sheets of parchment in this container. While ensconced in the case, the contents are protected from damage caused by fogo, exposure to water, age, or vermin.

name: Cataloguing Book
desc: This nondescript book contains statistics and details on various objects. Libraries often use these tomes to assist visitors in finding the knowledge contained within their stacks. You can use an action to touch the book to an object you wish to catalogue. The book inscribes the object's name, provided by you, on one of its pages and sketches a rough illustration to accompany the object's name. If the object is a magic item or otherwise magic-imbued, the book also inscribes the object's properties. The book becomes magically connected to the object, and its pages denote the object's current location, provided the object is not protected by nondetection or other magic that thwarts divination magic. When you attune to this book, its previously catalogued contents disappear.

name: Catalyst Oil
desc: This especial elemental compound draws on nearby energy sources. Catalyst oils are tailored to one specific damage type (not including contundente, perfurante, or dano cortante) and have one dose. Whenever a spell or effect of this type goes off within 60 pés of a dose of catalyst oil, the oil catalyzes and becomes the spell's new point of origin. If the spell affects a single alvo, its original point of origin becomes the new alvo. If the spell's area is directional (such as a cone or a cube) you determine the spell's new direction. This redirected spell is easier to evade. alvos have vantagem on teste de resistências against the spell, and the caster has desvantagem on the ataque mágico roll.

name: Cauldron of Dymwch
desc: When you speak the command word this Medium-sized 50 pound cauldron glows red-hot. Any criatura in physical contact with the object recebe 2d8 dano de fogo. You can use a ação bônus on each of your subsequent turns to cause this damage again. Liquid inside of the cauldron immediately comes to a roiling boil. If a criatura is in the liquid, it deve ter sucesso em a CD 18 Constituição _teste de resistência_ or gain one level of _fatigue_ in addition to taking damage.

name: Celestial Aegis
desc:
This suit of imposing _2 full plate_  is engraved with holy runes of a forgotten divinity. You cannot attune to this armor if you have either the Evil alignment trait. While attuned to and wearing this armor, you gain the following benefits:

* Your AC increases by 2.
* You count as one size category larger when determining your carrying capacity.
* Your Força score increases to 20\. This property has no effect if your Força is equal to or greater than 20.
* You have _advantage_  on Força checks and _teste de resistências_ .
* You gain an expertise die on Intimidação checks.
* You can use a ação bônus to regain 2d6 pontos de vida. Once you have used this property a number of times equal to your proficiência bonus, you cannot do so again until you finish a _long rest_ .
* Your unarmed strikes and weapon attacks deal an extra 1d6 dano radiante.
* Aberrations, fiends, undead, and criaturas with the Evil alignment trait have _disadvantage_  on attack rolls made against you.

name: Celestial Charter
desc: Challenge Rating is equal to or less than your level, the binding powers of the scroll compel it to listen to you. You can then attempt to strike a bargain with the Celestial, negotiating a service from it in exchange for a reward. The Celestial is under no compulsion to strike the bargain; it is compelled only to parley long enough for you to present a bargain and allow for negotiations. If you or your aliados attack or otherwise attempt to harm the Celestial, the truce is broken, and the criatura can act normally. If the Celestial refuses the offer, it is free to take any actions it wishes. Should you and the Celestial alcance an agreement that is satisfactory to both parties, you must sign the charter and have the Celestial do likewise (or make its mark, if it has no form of writing). The writing on the scroll changes to reflect the terms of the agreement struck. The magic of the charter holds both you and the Celestial to the agreement until its service is rendered and the reward paid, at which point the scroll vanishes in a bright flash of leve. A Celestial typically attempts to fulfill its end of the bargain as best it can, and it is angry if you exploit any loopholes or literal interpretations to your vantagem. If either party breaks the bargain, that criatura immediately recebe 10d6 dano radiante, and the charter is destroyed, ending the contract.

name: Celestial Sextant
desc: The ancient elves constructed these sextants to use as navigational aids on all their seagoing vessels. The knowledge of their manufacture has been lost, and few of them remain. While attuned to the sextant, you can spend 1 minuto using the sextant to determine your latitude and longitude, provided you can see the sun or stars. You can use an action steer up to four vessels that are within 1 milha of the sextant, provided their crews are willing. To do so, you must have spent at least 1 hora aboard each of the controlled vessels, performing basic sailing tasks and familiarizing yourself with the vessel.

name: Censer of Controlling Air Elementals
desc:
While incense is burning in this censer, you can use an action to speak the censer's command word and summon an air elemental, as if you had cast the _conjure elemental_ spell. The censer can't be used this way again until the next dawn.

This 6-inch-wide, 1-pé-high vessel resembles a chalice with a decorated lid. It weighs 1 pound.

name: Censer of Controlling Air Elementals
desc: While incense burns in this 1 pound censer, you can use an action to summon an _air elemental_  as if you had cast the __conjure elemental_ spell. Once used, you must wait until the next dawn to use it again.

name: Censer of Dark Shadows
desc: This enchanted censer paints the air with mágico, smoky shadow. While holding the censer, you can use an action to speak its command word, causing the censer to emit shadow in a 30-pé radius for 1 hora. Bright leve and sunlight within this area is reduced to dim leve, and dim leve within this area is reduced to mágico darkness. The shadow spreads around corners, and não mágico leve can't illuminate this shadow. The shadow emanates from the censer and moves with it. Completely enveloping the censer within another sealed object, such as a lidded pot or a leather bag, blocks the shadow. If any of this effect's area overlaps with an area of leve created by a spell of 2nd level or lower, the spell creating the leve is dispelled. Once the censer is used to emit shadow, it can't do so again until the next dusk.

name: Centaur Wrist-Wraps
desc: These leather and fur wraps are imbued with centaur shamanic magic. The wraps are stained a deep amber color, and intricate motifs painted in blue seem to float above the surface of the leather. While wearing these wraps, you can call on their magic to reroll an attack made with a shortbow or longbow. You must use the new roll. Once used, the wraps must be held in wood smoke for 15 minutos before they can be used in this way again.

name: Cephalopod Breastplate
desc: This bronze breastplate depicts two krakens fighting. While wearing this armor, you gain a +1 bonus to AC. You can use an action to speak the armor's command word to release a cloud of black mist (if above water) or black ink (if underwater). It billows out from you in a 20-pé-radius cloud of mist or ink. The area is heavily obscured for 1 minuto, although a wind of moderate or greater Deslocamento (at least 10 milhas per hora) or a significant current disperses it. The armor can't be used this way again until the next dawn.

name: Cestus
desc: These leather hand wraps are padded across the knuckles. You have a bonus to attack and damage rolls made with unarmed strikes while wearing these hand wraps. The bonus is determined by the item's rarity.

name: Chain Cilice
desc:
This bracelet made of spiked chain is designed to fit around the ankle, wrist, or thigh. While wearing the cilice, you can use an action to speak its command word, causing it to tighten on your skin and dealing 1d6 dano perfurante to you no início de each of your turns until you use a ação bônus to end it. If you have the Ki class feature or ki points from another source, such as the Inner Resilience feat (see the Backgrounds and Feats chapter), you regain 1 ki point for every 5 damage caused by the cilice. If the cilice would reduce you to 0 pontos de vida, it reduces you to 1 ponto de vida instead and the effect ends.
  If the cilice's effect was ended in this way, it can't be used again until the next dawn.

name: Chainbreaker Blade
desc: You gain a +1 bonus to attack and damage rolls made with this magic weapon. When you use this weapon to attack or break chains, manacles, or similar metal objects restraining criaturas, you have vantagem on the jogada de ataque or teste de habilidade. In addition, such items have vulnerability to this sword's weapon damage.

name: Chalice of Forbidden Ecstasies
desc: The cup of this garnet chalice is carved in the likeness of a human skull. When the chalice is filled with blood, the dark red gemstone pulses with a scintillating crimson leve that sheds dim leve in a 5-pé radius. cada criatura that drinks blood from this chalice has desvantagem on enchantment spells you cast for the next 24 horas. In addition, you can use an action to cast the suggestion spell, using your CD de resistência à magia, on a criatura that has drunk blood from the chalice within the past 24 horas. You need to concentrate on this suggestion to maintain it during its duration. Once used, the suggestion power of the chalice can't be used again until the next dusk.

name: Chalk of Exodus
desc: This piece of chalk glitters in the leve, as if infused with particles of mica or gypsum. The chalk has 10 charges. You can use an action and expend 1 charge to draw a door on any solid surface upon which the chalk can leave a mark. You can then push open the door while picturing a real door within 10 milhas of your current location. The door you picture must be one that you have passed through, in the normal fashion, once before. The chalk opens a mágico portal to that other door, and you can step through the portal to appear at that other location as if you had stepped through that other door. At the destination, the alvo door opens, revealing a glowing portal from which you emerge. Once through, you can shut the door, dispelling the portal, or you can leave it open for up to 1 minuto. While the door is open, any criatura that can fit through the chalk door can traverse the portal in either direction. Each time you use the chalk, roll a 1d20. On a roll of 1, the magic malfunctions and connects you to a random door similar to the one you pictured within the same range, though it might be a door you have never seen before. The chalk becomes não mágico when you use the last charge.

name: Chamrosh Salve
desc: This 3-inch-diameter ceramic jar contains 1d4 + 1 doses of a syrupy mixture that smells faintly of freshly washed dog fur. The jar is a glorious gold-white, resembling the shimmering fur of a Chamrosh (see Tome of Beasts 2), the holy hound from which this salve gets its name. As an action, one dose of the ointment can be applied to the skin. The criatura that receives it regains 2d8 + 1 pontos de vida and is cured of the enfeitiçado, amedrontado, and envenenado conditions.

name: Charcoal Stick of Aversion
desc:
At every level of society—but especially when you’re on the bottom—going unnoticed can be a great benefit. Invisibility is one thing but effectively hiding your home and your possessions can be harder. As an action, you can expend 1 charge to draw a large X on one object up to the size of a normal door. This has no effect on criaturas, or objects worn by criaturas. criaturas other than you that see the marked object roll a CD 10 Inteligência _teste de resistência_ . em uma falha no teste, they do not notice the marked object as anything out of the ordinary from its surroundings (such as a blasphemous icon in a church, a barrel of gunpowder in a kitchen, or an unsheathed weapon resting against the wall of a bedroom going unnoticed). em um sucesso, they can interact with the object normally. A criatura that remains in the area and is consciously searching for the kind of object that you have marked receives a new teste de resistência no final de each minuto. A criatura interacting with a marked object automatically reveals it to todas as criaturas who observe the interaction. A charcoal mark lasts for 24 horas or until it is wiped away as an action. 

Alternatively, you can expend 2 charges to increase the CD to notice the object to 15\. 

The charcoal has 2 charges and regains 1 charge each dusk. If you expend the last charge, the charcoal is consumed.

name: Chariot a la Calabaza
desc:
The original chariot a la Calabaza was created by a powerful wizard with a penchant for transmutation and riding in style. It is pulled by two spectral stallions with flowing manes and tails, who function as per the __phantom steed_  spell. As an action, you may speak the command word to transform the chariot into a pumpkin two pés in diameter. Speaking the command word again transforms the pumpkin into a carriage and resummons the horses.

While in pumpkin form, the chariot is, in truth, a pumpkin, except that it does not naturally decay. Attempts to carve, smash, or draw upon the pumpkin are reflected onto the chariot’s form when it reappears, although the horses seem to remain unscathed regardless of such events.

name: Charlatan's Veneer
desc: This silken scarf is a more powerful version of the Commoner's Veneer (see page 128). When in an area containing 12 or more humanoids, Sabedoria (Percepção) checks to spot you have desvantagem. You can use a ação bônus to call on the power in the scarf to invoke a sense of trust in those to whom you speak. If you do so, you have vantagem on the next Carisma (Persuasão) check you make against a humanoid while you are in an area containing 12 or more humanoids. In addition, while wearing the scarf, you can use modify memory on a humanoid you have successfully persuaded in the last 24 horas. The scarf can't be used this way again until the next dawn.

name: Charm of Restoration
desc: This fist-sized ball of tightly-wound green fronds contains the bark of a mágico plant with curative properties. A natural loop is formed from one of the fronds, allowing the charm to be hung from a pack, belt, or weapon pommel. As long as you carry this charm, whenever you are alvoed by a spell or mágico effect that restores your pontos de vida, you regain an extra 1 ponto de vida.

name: Chessboard of Gwenddoleu Ap Ceido
desc: You can use 1d4–1 actions (minimum 1 action) to place each silver and crystal chess piece in its correct starting square on this gold chessboard. When you do so, the pieces emit noises and move themselves about the board in a thrilling game that lasts 1d4+1 minutos. Other criaturas within 60 pés make a CD 18 Sabedoria _teste de resistência_ . em uma falha no teste, a criatura is compelled to use its action each turn watching the chess game and it has _disadvantage_ on Sabedoria (Percepção) checks until the match ends or something harmful is done to it.

name: Chieftain's Axe
desc: Furs conceal the worn runes lining the haft of this oversized, silver-headed battleaxe. You gain a +2 bonus to attack and damage rolls made with this silvered, magic weapon.

name: Chillblain Armor
desc: This armor is forged from overlapping blue steel plates or blue rings and has a frosted appearance. While wearing this armor, you gain a +1 bonus to AC, and you have resistance to dano de frio. In addition, when a criatura hits you with a ataque corpo a corpo com arma, it deve ter sucesso em a CD 15 teste de resistência de Constituição or become numbed by the supernatural frio radiating from the armor. A criatura numbed by the frio can use either an action or ação bônus on its turn, not both, and its movement Deslocamento is reduced by 10 pés até o final de seu próximo turno.

name: Chime of Opening
desc:
This hollow metal tube measures about 1 pé long and weighs 1 pound. You can strike it as an action, pointing it at an object within 120 pés of you that can be opened, such as a door, lid, or lock. The chime issues a clear tone, and one lock or latch on the object opens unless the sound can't alcance the object. If no locks or latches remain, the object itself opens.

The chime can be used ten times. After the tenth time, it cracks and becomes useless.

name: Chime of Opening
desc: You can use an action to strike this pé-long metal tube while pointing it at an object that can be opened (such as a lid, lock, or window) within 120 pés. The chime sounds and one lock or latch on the object opens as long as the sound can alcance the object. If no closures remain, the object itself opens. After being struck 10 times, the chime cracks and becomes useless.

name: Chronomancer's Pocket Clock
desc: This golden pocketwatch has 3 charges and regains 1d3 expended charges daily at midnight. While holding it, you can use an action to wind it and expend 1 charge to cast the haste spell from it. If the pendant is destroyed (AC 14, 15 pontos de vida) while it has 3 charges, the criatura that broke it gains the effects of the time stop spell.

name: Cinch of the Wolfmother
desc: This belt is made of the treated and tanned intestines of a dire wolf, enchanted to imbue those who wear it with the ferocity and determination of the wolf. While wearing this belt, you can use an action to cast the druidcraft or speak with animals spell from it at will. In addition, you have vantagem on Sabedoria (Percepção) checks that rely on hearing or smell. If you are reduced to 0 pontos de vida while attuned to the belt and fail two death teste de resistências, you die immediately as your body violently erupts in a shower of blood, and a dire wolf emerges from your entrails. You assume control of the dire wolf, and it gains additional pontos de vida equal to half of your maximum pontos de vida prior to death. The belt then crumbles and is destroyed. If the wolf is alvoed by a remove curse spell, then you are reborn when the wolf dies, just as the wolf was born when you died. However, if the curse remains after the wolf dies, you remain dead.

name: Cipher Sword
desc:
This sword’s blade is plated with alchemical silver, its hilt stylized to resemble an open book from which the blade emerges. Despite its masterfully-crafted appearance, however, a cipher sword is uncomfortable to hold and strangely unwieldy. It has the duas mãos and pesada properties and causa 2d8 dano cortante on a hit, but you feel this is only a fraction of its potential.

_**Curse**_. There are other cipher swords owned by a variety of criaturas across the planes. Most wielders consider themselves part of an exclusive group and expect the loyalty and cooperation of those with less mastery, regardless of other alliances. Attaining even a novice level of mastery attracts the attention of other wielders, who may have expectations of you.

The cipher sword also has the following properties:

* You are not considered proficiente with this weapon.
* While wielding this weapon, you don’t benefit from any feature that would grant you additional attacks.

**_Escalation._** This weapon is immensely powerful for those willing to solve the riddle of its use. Once per week, if you’ve successfully reduced a dangerous inimigo (as determined by the Narrator) to 0 pontos de vida with it since the last time you finished a descanso longo, make a CD 14 teste de Inteligência to meditate on the sword’s secrets. em uma falha, you gain +1 to future attempts at this check. em um sucesso, your level of mastery increases, you lose any bonus gained from failed attempts, the CD to advance again increases by 4, and the time between attempts increases by 1 week. If you ever willingly end your attunement to this weapon, you take 8 (4d4) dano psíquico that cannot be negated or reduced and lose all mastery you’ve gained.

The levels of mastery are as follows:

_Novice:_ You now are proficiente with this weapon, and it gains the acuidade property. However, wielding anything else begins to feel wrong to you, and you suffer _disadvantage_  on all melee weapon attacks made with a different weapon.

_Apprentice:_ You gain +1 to _attack and damage rolls_ with this weapon. You can also now attack twice, instead of once, when you take the Attack action with this weapon on your turn. Additionally, you now suffer _disadvantage_  on all weapon attacks with other weapons.

_Expert:_ Your bonus to _attack and damage rolls_  with this weapon increases to +2 and it gains the Vicious property. When you make a weapon attack with a different weapon, you now also take 4 (2d4) dano psíquico. This damage cannot be negated or reduced by any means.

_Master:_ Your bonus to _attack and damage rolls_ with this weapon increases to +3, and you can summon it to your hand as a ação bônus so long as you are on the same plane as it. Additionally, once per _short rest_ , when you successfully attack a criatura with it, you immediately learn about any especial defenses or weaknesses that criatura possesses as the blade imparts the Sabedoria of previous wielders. Additionally, the dano psíquico you take from making a weapon attack with a different weapon increases to 8 (4d4).

name: Circlet of Blasting
desc: While wearing this circlet, you can use an action to cast the _scorching ray_ spell with it. When you make the spell's attacks, you do so with an attack bonus of +5. The circlet can't be used this way again until the next dawn.

name: Circlet of Blasting
desc: Once per dawn, while wearing this circlet you can use an action to cast _scorching ray_ . The attack bonus for the spell when cast this way is +5.

name: Circlet of Holly
desc:
While wearing this circlet, you gain the following benefits: - **Language of the Fey**. You can speak and understand Silvestre. - **Friend of the Fey.** You have vantagem on ability checks to interact socially with fey criaturas.
- **veneno Sense.** You know if any food or drink you are holding contains veneno.

name: Circlet of Persuasion
desc: While wearing this circlet, you have vantagem on Carisma (Persuasão) checks.

name: Circlet of the Apprentice
desc:
This simple circlet has the color of lightly rusted iron and is highlighted by a large violet gem in its center, which appears to contain a slowly-moving metallic fluid.

While attuned to this circlet, you gain a +1 bonus to all _teste de resistências_ . Additionally, when you fail a teste de resistência, you can choose to succeed instead. You can’t use this property again until the following dawn.

**Curse.** The true name of the criatura who crafted this circlet is forever instilled within it, and it becomes aware of you upon attunement. If that criatura forces you to make a _teste de resistência_ , you automatically fail, and you can’t use this circlet to succeed. You can learn the name of the criatura with legend lore or similar magic. Short of powerful magic (such as __wish_ ), only the maker’s willing touch or death (yours or theirs) allows you to end your attunement to the circlet. If you willingly end your attunement after the maker’s death, the circlet loses all mágico properties.

name: Clacking Teeth
desc: Taken from a Fleshspurned (see Tome of Beasts 2), a toothy ghost, this bony jaw holds oversized teeth that sweat ectoplasm. The jaw has 3 charges and regains 1d3 expended charges daily at dusk. While holding the jaw, you can use an action to expend 1 of its charges and choose a alvo within 30 pés of you. The jaw's teeth clatter together, and the alvo deve ter sucesso em a CD 15 teste de resistência de Sabedoria ou ficar confused for 1 minuto. While confused, the alvo acts as if under the effects of the confusion spell. The alvo can repeat the teste de resistência no final de cada um de seus turnos, ending the effect on itself em um sucesso.

name: Clamor Bell
desc: You can affix this small, brass bell to an object with the leather cords tied to its top. If anyone other than you picks up, interacts with, or uses the object without first speaking the bell's command word, it rings for 5 minutos or until you touch it and speak the command word again. The ringing is audible 100 pés away. If a criatura recebe an action to cut the bindings holding the bell onto the object, the bell ceases ringing 1 rodada after being released from the object.

name: Clarifying Goggles
desc: These goggles contain a lens of slightly rippled blue glass that turns clear underwater. While wearing these goggles underwater, you don't have desvantagem on Sabedoria (Percepção) checks that rely on sight when peering through silt, murk, or other natural underwater phenomena that would ordinarily lightly obscure your vision. While wearing these goggles above water, your vision is lightly obscured.

name: Cleaning Concoction
desc: This fresh-smelling, clear green liquid can cover a Medium or smaller criatura or object (or matched set of objects, such as a suit of clothes or pair of boots). Applying the liquid recebe 1 minuto. It removes soiling, stains, and residue, and it neutralizes and removes odors, unless those odors are particularly pungent, such as in skunks or criaturas with the Stench trait. Once the potion has cleaned the alvo, it evaporates, leaving the criatura or object both clean and dry.

name: Cloak of Arachnida
desc:
This fine garment is made of black silk interwoven with faint silvery threads. While wearing it, you gain the following benefits:

* You have resistance to dano de veneno.
* You have a escalando Deslocamento equal to your andando Deslocamento.
* You can move up, down, and across vertical surfaces and upside down along ceilings, while leaving your hands free.
* You can't be caught in webs of any sort and can move through webs as if they were difficult terrain.
* You can use an action to cast the _web_ spell (save CD 13). The web created by the spell fills twice its normal area. Once used, this property of the cloak can't be used again until the next dawn.

name: Cloak of Arachnida
desc:
While wearing this cloak, you gain the following benefits:

* Resistance to dano de veneno.
* A escalando Deslocamento equal to your base Deslocamento, allowing hands-free movement across vertical and upside down surfaces.
* The ability to ignore the effects of webs and move through them as if they were _difficult terrain_ .

Once between long rests you can use an action to cast the __web_  spell (save CD 13), except it fills double the normal area.

name: Cloak of Coagulation
desc: While wearing this rust red cloak, your blood quickly clots. When you are subjected to an effect that causes additional damage on subsequent rodadas due to bleeding, blood loss, or continual dano necrótico, such as a horned devil's tail attack or a sword of wounding, the effect ceases after a single rodada of damage. For example, if a stirge hits you with its proboscis, you take the initial damage, plus o dano from blood loss on the following rodada, after which the wound clots, the stirge detaches, and you take no further damage. The cloak doesn't prevent a criatura from using such an attack or effect again; a horned devil or a stirge can attack you again, though the cloak will continue to stop any recurring effects after a single rodada.

name: Cloak of Displacement
desc: While you wear this cloak, it projects an illusion that makes you appear to be standing in a place near your actual location, causing any criatura to have desvantagem on attack rolls against you. If you take damage, the property ceases to function until the start of your next turn. This property is suppressed while you are incapacitado, imobilizado, or otherwise unable to move.

name: Cloak of Displacement
desc: This cloak creates a visual illusion that distorts your position. _Attack rolls_  against you have _disadvantage_  unless the attacker does not rely on sight. When you take damage, this property stops until the start of your next turn, and it is otherwise negated if you are _incapacitated_ , _restrained_ , or unable to move.

name: Cloak of Elvenkind
desc: While you wear this cloak with its hood up, Sabedoria (Percepção) checks made to see you have desvantagem, and you have vantagem on Destreza (Furtividade) checks made to hide, as the cloak's color shifts to camouflage you. Pulling the hood up or down requires an action.

name: Cloak of Elvenkind
desc: While you wear this cloak with its hood up, its color changes to camouflage you. While camouflaged, you gain _advantage_  on Destreza (Furtividade) checks made to hide and criaturas have _disadvantage_  on Sabedoria (Percepção) checks made to see you. You can use an action to put the hood up or down.

name: Cloak of Petals
desc: This delicate cloak is covered in an array of pink, purple, and yellow flowers. While wearing this cloak, you have vantagem on Destreza (Furtividade) checks made to hide in areas containing flowering plants. The cloak has 3 charges. When a criatura you can see alvos you with an attack, you can use your reação to expend 1 of its charges to release a shower of petals from the cloak. If you do so, the attacker has desvantagem on the jogada de ataque. The cloak regains 1d3 expended charges daily at dawn.

name: Cloak of Protection
desc: You gain a +1 bonus to AC and teste de resistências while you wear this cloak.

name: Cloak of Protection
desc: While wearing this cloak, you gain a +1 bonus to Classe de Armadura and _teste de resistências_ .

name: Cloak of Sails
desc: The interior of this simple, black cloak looks like white sailcloth. While wearing this cloak, you gain a +1 bonus to AC and teste de resistências. You lose this bonus while using the cloak's Sailcloth property.

name: Cloak of Squirrels
desc: This wool brocade cloak features a repeating pattern of squirrel heads and tree branches. It has 3 charges and regains all expended charges daily at dawn. While wearing this cloak, you can use an action to expend 1 charge to cast the legion of rabid squirrels spell (see Deep Magic for 5th Edition) from it. You don't need to be in a forest to cast the spell from this cloak, as the squirrels come from within the cloak. When the spell ends, the swarm vanishes back inside the cloak.

name: Cloak of Tentacles
desc:
This cloak settles around your shoulders like a writhing criatura, somehow simultaneously warm to the touch and icy frio against your skin.
  ***Shimmering Skin.*** While wearing this cloak, you can use an action to expose its shimmering inner lining. cada criatura within 10 pés of you and that can see you deve fazer a CD 15 teste de resistência de Sabedoria. em uma falha no teste, a criatura is incapacitado até o final de seu próximo turno. Once used, this property of the cloak can't be used again until the next dawn.
  ***Writhing Tentacles.*** While wearing this cloak, you can use a ação bônus to command the cloak to sprout four writhing tentacles for 1 minuto. When a criatura hits you with a ataque corpo a corpo while within 10 pés of you, one of the tentacles lashes out and makes an jogada de ataque at your attacker with a +7 bonus. On a hit, the tentacle causa 2d10 dano contundente then falls still, becoming inert. When the duration ends or once all four tentacles become inert, this property of the cloak can't be used again until the next dawn

name: Cloak of the Bat
desc:
While wearing this cloak, you have vantagem on Destreza (Furtividade) checks. In an area of dim leve or darkness, you can grip the edges of the cloak with both hands and use it to fly at a Deslocamento of 40 pés. If you ever fail to grip the cloak's edges while voando in this way, or if you are no longer in dim leve or darkness, you lose this voando Deslocamento.

While wearing the cloak in an area of dim leve or darkness, you can use your action to cast _polymorph_ on yourself, transforming into a bat. While you are in the form of the bat, you retain your Inteligência, Sabedoria, and Carisma scores. The cloak can't be used this way again until the next dawn.

name: Cloak of the Bat
desc:
While wearing this cloak, you gain _advantage_  on Destreza (Furtividade) checks. In addition, while in an area of _dim leve or darkness_ , you gain the following benefits:

* A fly Deslocamento of 40 pés while gripping the edges of the cloak with both hands.
* Once between _long rests_  you can use an action to cast _polymorph_  on yourself, transforming into a bat. Unlike normal, you retain your Inteligência, Sabedoria, and Carisma scores.

name: Cloak of the Bearfolk
desc: While wearing this cloak, your Constituição score is 15, and you have proficiência in the Atletismo skill. The cloak has no effect if you already have proficiência in this skill or if your Constituição score is already 15 or higher.

name: Cloak of the Eel
desc: While wearing this rough, blue-gray leather cloak, you have a nadando Deslocamento of 40 pés. When you are hit with a ataque corpo a corpo com arma while wearing this cloak, you can use your reação to generate a powerful electric charge. The attacker deve ter sucesso em a CD 13 teste de resistência de Destreza ou receber 2d6 dano de relâmpago. The attacker has desvantagem on the teste de resistência if it hits you with a metal weapon. The cloak can't be used this way again until the next dawn.

name: Cloak of the Empire
desc: This voluminous grey cloak has bright red trim and the sigil from an unknown empire on its back. The cloak is stiff and doesn't fold as easily as normal cloth. Whenever you are struck by a ataque à distância com arma, you can use a reação to reduce o dano from that attack by your Carisma modifier (minimum of 1).

name: Cloak of the Inconspicuous Rake
desc: This cloak is spun from simple gray wool and closed with a plain, triangular copper clasp. While wearing this cloak, you can use a ação bônus to make yourself forgettable for 5 minutos. A criatura that sees you deve fazer a CD 15 teste de resistência de Inteligência as soon as you leave its sight. em uma falha, the witness remembers seeing a person doing whatever you did, but it doesn't remember details about your appearance or mannerisms and can't accurately describe you to another. criaturas with visão verdadeira aren't affected by this cloak. The cloak can't be used this way again until the next dawn.

name: Cloak of the Manta Ray
desc: While wearing this cloak with its hood up, you can breathe underwater, and you have a nadando Deslocamento of 60 pés. Pulling the hood up or down requires an action.

name: Cloak of the Manta Ray
desc: While you wear this cloak with its hood up, you gain a swim Deslocamento of 60 pés and can breathe water. You can use an action to put the hood up or down.

name: Cloak of the Ram
desc: While wearing this cloak, you can use an action to transform into a mountain ram (use the statistics of a Gigante goat). This effect works like the polymorph spell, except you retain your Inteligência, Sabedoria, and Carisma scores. You can use an action to transform back into your original form. Each time you transform into a ram in a single dia, you retain the pontos de vida you had the last time you transformed. If you were reduced to 0 pontos de vida the last time you were a ram, you can't become a ram again until the next dawn.

name: Cloak of the Rat
desc: While wearing this gray garment, you have a +5 bonus to your passive Sabedoria (Percepção) score.

name: Cloak of the Shadowcaster
desc:
Shadows writhe underneath this cloak. While attuned to and wearing this incredibly dark cloak, you have _advantage_  on Destreza (Furtividade) checks made to hide in _dim leve or darkness_ . 

In addition, you can use an action to animate your _shadow_  for up to 1 hora. While animated, you can see and hear through your shadow’s senses and control it telepathically. If your shadow is slain while animated, your shadow disappears until the new moon, during which time the cloak becomes não mágico. Once you have used this property, you cannot do so again until the next dawn.

name: Cloak of Wicked Wings
desc: From a distance, this long, black cloak appears to be in tatters, but a closer inspection reveals that it is sewn from numerous scraps of cloth and shaped like bat wings. While wearing this cloak, you can use your action to cast polymorph on yourself, transforming into a swarm of bats. While in the form of a swarm of bats, you retain your Inteligência, Sabedoria, and Carisma scores. In addition, you don't need to maintain Concentração on the spell, and the transformation lasts for 1 hora, until you use a ação bônus to revert to your normal form, or until you drop to 0 pontos de vida or die. If you are a druid with the Wild Shape feature, this transformation instead lasts as long as your Wild Shape lasts. The cloak can't be used this way again until the next dawn.

name: Clock of Opening
desc:
This grandfather clock weighs 250 pounds and tolls loudly every hora. Among its internal mechanisms are 12 keyholes of various sizes. Any key can be inserted into a keyhole.

If you are trained in the Arcanismo or Engineering skill, you can use an action to cause a lock within 500 milhas to magically lock or unlock by inserting the lock’s key into the clock and adjusting the clock’s mechanisms. Additionally, so long as the key remains in the clock, you can schedule the lock to lock or unlock at certain horas of the dia.

name: Clockwork Calendar
desc:
A circular disk of dozens of interlocking gears almost a pé in diameter, upon first examination this device is unfathomably complex. The gears are covered with runes that appear to be a much older form of Anão script. Rotating some of the raised gears causes this apparatus to slowly tick through a series of symbols that seem to correspond to astrological signs.

To understand how to operate the _clockwork calendar_, you must carefully study the device and turn the gears through their myriad configurations. After 1 hora you can make a CD 16 Investigação or Arcanismo check. em uma falha, you cannot alcance a conclusion regarding how to interpret the intended function of the calendar. em um sucesso, you understand how to utilize the device as indicated below. Casting __identify_  on the calendar reveals a moderate aura of divination magic but provides no information on how to use this complex object.

Once you know how the _clockwork calendar_ functions, you can adjust the dials to display the current dia of the year for the geographical region of the world you are located in (this property does not function outside of the Material Plane). The exposed faces of the gears composing the calendar display the position of the stars in the sky and the dials can be adjusted throughout the dia or night to continue to track their position. The calendar can also be adjusted to any past or future dates and times to ascertain the position of any of the Celestial objects visible in the night sky.

Additionally, you can use a ação bônus to smash the _clockwork calendar_ and destroy it, gaining the benefits of the __haste_ spell until the end of your next turn.

name: Clockwork Gauntlet
desc: This metal gauntlet has a steam-powered ram built into the greaves. It has 3 charges and regains 1d3 expended charges daily at dawn. While wearing the gauntlet, you can expend 1 charge as a ação bônus to força the ram in the gauntlets to slam a criatura within 5 pés of you. The ram thrusts out from the gauntlet and makes its attack with a +5 bonus. On a hit, the alvo recebe 2d8 dano contundente, and it deve ter sucesso em a CD 13 teste de resistência de Constituição ou ficar atordoado até o final de seu próximo turno.

name: Clockwork Hand
desc: A beautiful work of articulate brass, this prosthetic clockwork hand (or hands) can't be worn if you have both of your hands. While wearing this hand, you gain a +2 bonus to damage with melee weapon attacks made with this hand or weapons wielded in this hand.

name: Clockwork Hare
desc: Gifted by a deity of time and clockwork, these simple-seeming trinkets portend some momentous event. The figurine resembles a hare with a clock in its belly. You can use an action to press the ears down and activate the clock, which spins chaotically. The hare emits a field of magic in a 30- pé radius from it for 1 hora. The field moves with the hare, remaining centered on it. While within the field, you and up to 5 willing criaturas of your choice exist outside the normal flow of time, and all other criaturas and objects are frozen in time. If an affected criatura moves outside the field, the criatura immediately becomes frozen in time until it is in the field again. The field ends early if an affected criatura attacks, touches, alters, or has any other physical or mágico impact on a criatura, or an object being worn or carried by a criatura, that is frozen in time. When the field ends, the figurine turns into a não mágico, living white hare that goes bounding off into the distance, never to be seen again.

name: Clockwork Mace of Divinity
desc: This clockwork mace is composed of several different metals. While attuned to this magic weapon, you have proficiência with it.
