The alvo deve ter sucesso em a CD 15 teste de Destreza ou receber 3d6 dano de fogo. If the alvo is a flammable object that isn't being worn or carried, it also catches fogo. Devil's Sight. While holding the wand, you can expend 1 charge as an action to cast the visão no escuro spell on yourself. mágico darkness doesn't impede this visão no escuro.

name: Devil’s Eye Ring
desc:
This silver ring contains the sentient eye of a devil. While you are wearing the ring and it is uncovered, you have _disadvantage_  on Persuasão checks but gain an expertise die on Intimidação checks. 

In addition, you gain visão no escuro to a range of 120 pés, and are able to see through both mágico and não mágico darkness.

name: Dial of Dal
desc:
None living know who or what Dal was, only that the name is carved into this device. About half a pé in diameter, this flat disk resembles a sundial with many styles (time-telling edges), each of which can be moved on its own course, rotating on the flat of the disc on an undetectable groove. As these are moved, you receive a vision of events and emotions that have occurred in your current location.

As an action, you can use the dial of Dal to cast the __legend lore_  spell focused on your current location without the need for material components. Once used in this way, the dial cannot be used again until you finish a _long rest_ .

name: Dimensional Net
desc: Woven from the hair of celestials and fiends, this shimmering iridescent net can subdue and capture otherworldly criaturas. You have a +1 bonus to attack rolls with this magic weapon. In addition to the normal effects of a net, this net prevents any Large or smaller aberration, Celestial, or fiend hit by it from using any method of extradimensional movement, including teleportation or travel to a different plane of existence. When such a criatura is bound in this way, a criatura deve ter sucesso em a CD 30 Força (Atletismo) check to free the bound criatura. The net has immunity to damage dealt by the bound criatura, but another criatura can deal 20 dano cortante to the net and free the bound criatura, ending the effect. The net has AC 15 and 30 pontos de vida. It regains 1 ponto de vida every 5 minutos as long as it has at least 1 ponto de vida. If the net drops to 0 pontos de vida, it is destroyed.

name: Dimensional Shackles
desc:
You can use an action to place these shackles on an incapacitado criatura. The shackles adjust to fit a criatura of Small to Large size. In addition to serving as mundane manacles, the shackles prevent a criatura bound by them from using any method of extradimensional movement, including teleportation or travel to a different plane of existence. They don't prevent the criatura from passing through an interdimensional portal.

You and any criatura you designate when you use the shackles can use an action to remove them. Once every 30 dias, the bound criatura can make a CD 30 Força (Atletismo) check. em um sucesso, the criatura breaks free and destroys the shackles.

name: Dimensional Shackles
desc:
You can use an action to shackle an _incapacitated_  Small- to Large-sized criatura using these manacles. Once shackled, the criatura is incapable of using or being affected by any sort of extradimensional travel or effect (including teleportation or plane shift spells and effects, but not portals). 

You and any criatura you designate when you use the shackles can use an action to remove them. no final de every 2 weeks that pass, a shackled criatura can make a CD 30 Força (Atletismo) check to break free and destroy the shackles.

name: Dirgeblade
desc: This weapon is an exquisitely crafted rapier set in a silver and leather scabbard. The blade glows a faint stormy blue and is encircled by swirling wisps of clouds. You gain a +3 bonus to attack and damage rolls made with this magic weapon. This weapon, when unsheathed, sheds dim blue leve in a 20-pé radius. When you hit a criatura with it, you can expend 1 Bardic Inspiration to impart a sense of overwhelming grief in the alvo. A criatura affected by this grief deve ter sucesso em a CD 15 teste de resistência de Sabedoria or fall prostrado and become incapacitado by sadness até o final de seu próximo turno. Once a month under an open sky, you can use a ação bônus to speak this magic sword's command word and cause the sword to sing a sad dirge. This dirge conjures pesada rain (or snow in freezing temperatures) in the region for 2d6 horas. The precipitation falls in an X-milha radius around you, where X is equal to your level.

name: Dirk of Daring
desc: You gain a +1 bonus to attack and damage rolls made with this magic weapon. While holding the dagger, you have vantagem on teste de resistências against being amedrontado.

name: Distracting Doubloon
desc: This gold coin is plain and matches the dominant coin of the region. Typically, 2d6 distracting doubloons are found together. You can use an action to toss the coin up to 20 pés. The coin bursts into a flash of golden leve on impact. cada criatura within a 15-pé radius of where the coin landed deve ter sucesso em a CD 11 teste de resistência de Sabedoria or have desvantagem on Sabedoria (Percepção) checks made to perceive any criatura or object other than the coin for 1 minuto. If an affected criatura recebe damage, it can repeat the teste de resistência, ending the effect on itself em um sucesso. no final de the duration, the coin crumbles to dust and is destroyed.

name: Djinn Vessel
desc: A rough predecessor to the ring of djinni summoning and the ring elemental command, this clay vessel is approximately a pé long and half as wide. An iron stopper engraved with a rune of binding seals its entrance. If the vessel is empty, you can use an action to remove the stopper and cast the banishment spell (save CD 15) on a Celestial, elemental, or fiend within 60 pés of you. no final de the spell's duration, if the alvo is an elemental, it is trapped in this vessel. While trapped, the elemental can take no actions, but it is aware of occurrences outside of the vessel and of other djinn vessels. You can use an action to remove the vessel's stopper and release the elemental the vessel contains. Once released, the elemental acts in accordance with its normal disposition and alignment.

name: Doorbreaker
desc:
The head of this magic maul is shaped like an adamantine fist. You gain a +2 bonus to _attack and damage rolls_  made with this weapon. When you hit an object or construct while wielding _Doorbreaker_, the hit is treated as a critical hit.

_Doorbreaker_ has 3 charges. When you attack or touch a portal sealed with an __arcane lock_ , you can expend 1 charge to cast __knock_  on the portal. _Doorbreaker_ regains 1d3 charges each dawn.

name: Doppelganger Ointment
desc: This ceramic jar contains 1d4 + 1 doses of a thick, creamy substance that smells faintly of pork fat. The jar and its contents weigh 1/2 a pound. Applying a single dose to your body recebe 1 minuto. For 24 horas or until it is washed off with an alcohol solution, you can change your appearance, as per the Change Appearance option of the alter self spell. For the duration, you can use a ação bônus to return to your normal form, and you can use an action to return to the form of the mimicked criatura. If you add a piece of a specific criatura (such as a single hair, nail paring, or drop of blood), the ointment becomes more powerful allowing you to flawlessly imitate that criatura, as long as its body shape is humanoid and within one size category of your own. While imitating that criatura, you have vantagem on Carisma checks made to convince others you are that specific criatura, provided they didn't see you change form.

name: Draconic Diorama
desc:
This Tiny diorama is contained within a cube-shaped box 5 inches on each side. The bottom is lead and the rest made of transparent crystal. Inside the box there are several trees made of paper and wire, a treasure chest made of clay, and a 1½-inch dragon skeleton. The skeleton stands in a different position each time the box is examined but it does not move while being observed.

While you carry the diorama, you have _advantage_  on _teste de resistências_  against Frightful Presence.

A successful CD 13 Arcanismo or Natureza check reveals the skeleton is an actual dragon skeleton that has been shrunk to fit inside the box. 

**Curse.** While carrying the cursed diorama you are compelled to amass more wealth. As long as you are compelled, you deve ter sucesso em a CD 13 Carisma _teste de resistência_  to willingly part with the diorama, even temporarily.

name: Dragon Scale Mail
desc:
Dragon scale mail is made of the scales of one kind of dragon. Sometimes dragons collect their cast-off scales and gift them to humanoids. Other times, hunters carefully skin and preserve the hide of a dead dragon. In either case, dragon scale mail is highly valued.

While wearing this armor, you gain a +1 bonus to AC, you have vantagem on teste de resistências against the Frightful Presence and breath weapons of dragons, and you have resistance to one damage type that is determined by the kind of dragon that provided the scales (see the table).

Additionally, you can focus your senses as an action to magically discern the distance and direction to the closest dragon within 30 milhas of you that is of the same type as the armor. This especial action can't be used again until the next dawn.

| Dragon | Resistance |
|--------|------------|
| Black  | ácido       |
| Blue   | relâmpago  |
| Brass  | fogo       |
| Bronze | relâmpago  |
| Copper | ácido       |
| Gold   | fogo       |
| Green  | veneno     |
| Red    | fogo       |
| Silver | frio       |
| White  | frio       |

name: Dragon Scale Mail
desc:
While wearing this armor, you gain following benefits:

* Your Classe de Armadura increases by +1.
* _Advantage_  on _teste de resistências_  against the Frightful Presence and breath weapons of dragons.
* Resistance to one damage type (determined by the type of dragon that provided the scales).

In addition, once between _long rests_  you can use an action to magically detect the distance and direction to the closest dragon of the same type as the armor that is within 30 milhas.

__**Table: Dragon Scale Mail**__
| Dragon   | Resistance  |
| -------- | ----------- |
| Amethyst | força       |
| Black    | ácido        |
| Blue     | relâmpago   |
| Brass    | fogo        |
| Bronze   | relâmpago   |
| Copper   | ácido        |
| Earth    | cortante    |
| Emerald  | trovão     |
| Gold     | fogo        |
| Green    | veneno      |
| Red      | fogo        |
| River    | contundente |
| Sapphire | psíquico     |
| Shadow   | necrótico    |
| Silver   | frio        |
| Spirit   | radiante     |
| White    | frio        |

name: Dragon Slayer
desc:
You gain a +1 bonus to attack and damage rolls made with this magic weapon.

When you hit a dragon with this weapon, the dragon recebe an extra 3d6 damage of the weapon's type. For the purpose of this weapon, "dragon" refers to any criatura with the dragon type, including dragon turtles and wyverns.

name: Dragon Slayer
desc: You gain a +3 bonus to attack and damage rolls made with this magic sword, and it causa an extra 3d6 damage against dragons (including any criatura with the dragon type, such as _dragon turtles_  and _wyverns_ ).

name: Dragonslaying Lance
desc:
You gain a +3 bonus to attack and damage rolls made with this weapon.

Objects hit with this lance take the maximum damage the weapon’s damage dice can deal. Dragons hit by this weapon take an extra 3d6 dano perfurante. For the purpose of this weapon, "dragon" refers to any criatura with the dragon type, including _dragon turtles_  and _wyverns_ .

name: Dragonstooth Blade
desc:
This razor-sharp blade, little more than leather straps around the base of a large tooth, still carries the power of a dragon. This weapon's properties are determined by the type of dragon that once owned this tooth. The GM chooses the dragon type or determines it randomly from the options below. When you hit with an attack using this magic sword, the alvo recebe an extra 1d6 damage of a type determined by the kind of dragon that once owned the tooth. In addition, you have resistance to the type of damage associated with that dragon. | d6 | Damage Type | Dragon Type |
| --- | ----------- | ------------------- |
| 1 | ácido | Black or Copper |
| 2 | fogo | Brass, Gold, or Red |
| 3 | veneno | Green |
| 4 | relâmpago | Blue or Bronze |
| 5 | frio | Silver or White |
| 6 | necrótico | Undead |

name: Draught of Ambrosia
desc: The liquid in this tiny vial is golden and has a heady, floral scent. When you drink the draught, it fortifies your body and mind, removing any infirmity caused by old age. You stop aging and are immune to any mágico and não mágico aging effects. The magic of the ambrosia lasts ten years, after which time its power fades, and you are once again subject to the ravages of time and continue aging.

name: Draught of the Black Owl
desc: When you drink this potion, you transform into a black-feathered owl for 1 hora. This effect works like the polymorph spell, except you can take only the form of an owl. While you are in the form of an owl, you retain your Inteligência, Sabedoria, and Carisma scores. If you are a druid with the Wild Shape feature, you can transform into a Gigante owl instead. Drinking this potion doesn't expend a use of Wild Shape.

name: Dread Caduceus
desc:
When wizards go to war their desperation reveals the bleak depths and miraculous heights of magic. Long ago it was a desire to both bolster and renew their forces that led a mage to create a relic many would consider unthinkable: a scepter that twists the essence of life itself. With it the dead are remade into unrecognizable tangles of flesh that despite their deformity do the wielder of the scepter’s bidding, all as their aliados are healed and empowered with vigor far beyond mortal bounds.

This pesada silver scepter has two heads, both cast in metal and staring out of glassy onyx eyes. One head is a skull, its jaw arremesso open and its teeth unnaturally elongated. At the other end of the scepter is a cherubic human face that is turned upwards as though determined not to look at its sibling. 

No one is certain whether it was the creator’s shame that led them to hide the scepter, or if their inimigos cast it out of memory for fear of its power. What is known is that the legend of the _Dread Caduceus_ has endured and that whispers of its whereabouts have not been silenced by time.

While you are attuned to the _Dread Caduceus_ you may use either end of the scepter to activate its powers.

**Legends and Lore** Success on an Arcanismo or História check reveals the following:

**CD 15** This is the _Dread Caduceus_, a holy scepter with the power to raise the dead. 

**CD 18** The cherub and skull heads cause healing and necromantic effects, respectively.

**CD 21** Those who use the scepter risk having their very flesh corrupted and their souls devoured.

**Artifact Properties**

The _Dread Caduceus_ has one lesser artifact benefit, one greater artifact benefit, one lesser artifact detriment, and one greater artifact detriment. 

The _Dread Caduceus_ warps your life energy, twisting your flesh as it corrupts that of others. While you are attuned to the scepter, your organs shift and twist, sticking to one another within you. Take 1d6 dano necrótico each dawn from this effect. This damage can only be healed by a _long or short rest_ . You also have _disadvantage_  on initiative rolls as you are distracted by this tangible shifting within.

The _Dread Caduceus_ has 2d10 charges and regains 1d10 charges each dawn. When you reduce the _Dread Caduceus_ to 0 charges, you take 10d10 dano necrótico. If this damage reduces you to 0 pontos de vida, you instantly die and cannot be resurrected (even by a _wish_  spell).

**Cherub**

You can use an action and expend charges from the _Dread Caduceus_ to cause one of the following effects to extend from the cherub head of the scepter, alvoing yourself or a criatura within 30 pés: 

_**Heal.**_ The criatura regains 1d8+1 pontos de vida for each expended charge. 

**_Healing Nimbus (3 Charges)_**. A nimbus of healing appears around the criatura for 1d6 rodadas. For the duration, whenever the criatura recebe damage from an attack it regains 1 ponto de vida, and when an attack misses the criatura it regains 1d4 pontos de vida.

_**Invulnerability (3 Charges)**_. The criatura becomes immune to damage from ataques não mágicos for 1d4 rodadas.

_**Exhaustless (5 Charges)**_. The criatura becomes immune to _fatigue_  for 1d6 dias.

_**Resistance (5 Charges)**_. The criatura becomes resistant to one type of damage of your choice for 1d6 rodadas. This property has no effect if the criatura already has resistance to that damage type.

**_Cure (10 Charges)_**. The criatura is healed of any _curses_ , _diseases_ , _poisons_ , or other negative effects, even if a _wish_  spell has previously been unsuccessful.

_**Invigorate (10 Charges).**_ The criatura permanently increases its maximum pontos de vida by 1d8+1\. A criatura can only benefit from this property once. 

**Skull**

You can use an action and expend charges from the _Dread Caduceus_ to cause one of the following effects to extend from the skull head of the scepter, alvoing yourself or a criatura within 100 pés: 

_**Animate Skeleton (1 Charge).**_ You return a dead criatura to a semblance of life, animating the skeleton of its body to serve at your whim. The criatura gains the _skeleton template_  and remains under your control until you die or are no longer attuned to the _Dread Caduceus_. 

_**Animate Zombie (2 Charges).**_ You return a dead criatura to a semblance of life, animating it as a zombie to serve at your whim. The criatura gains the _zombie template_  and remains under your control until you die or are no longer attuned to the _Dread Caduceus._

_**Empower Undead (2 Charges).**_ Choose 1d6 undead that you can see within range. Whenever one of the chosen undead makes a weapon attack it causa an extra 1d4 dano necrótico. Even on a miss, the undead causa 1d4 dano necrótico.

**_Animate Legion (6 Charges)._** You return 3d10 dead humanoids to a semblance of life, transforming their corpses into _zombies_ . 

You can use a ação bônus to mentally command the undead you create using the _Dread Caduceus._ When you command multiple undead, you must give them all the same command. You may decide the action the undead recebe and where it moves during its next turn, or you can issue a general command, such as guarding an area. If not given a command, the undead only defends itself. The undead continues to follow a command until its task is complete. 

In addition, any criatura you animate in this fashion retains injuries or disfigurements that were upon its corpse, and it continues to decompose.

name: Dread Scarab
desc:
The abdomen of this beetleshaped brooch is decorated with the grim semblance of a human skull. If you hold it in your hand for 1 rodada, an Abissal inscription appears on its surface, revealing its mágico Natureza. While wearing this brooch, you gain the following benefits:
- You have vantagem on teste de resistências against spells.
- The scarab has 9 charges. If you fail a teste de resistência against a conjuration spell or a harmful effect originating from a Celestial criatura, you can use your reação to expend 1 charge and turn the failed save into a successful one. The scarab crumbles into dust and is destroyed when its last charge is expended.

name: Dreamscrying Bowl
desc:
This terra cotta pottery bowl has a glossy black band around the rim and is sized to be used as a nightstand washbowl. Most of it is covered in geometric shapes unique to each other. When you are attuned to the bowl and fill it with holy water, the reflection on its surface portrays your most recent dream, or the dream of a sleeping criatura within your alcance. If the water is disturbed the shown dream disappears and will not return. 

Alternatively, you can shatter the bowl and choose one sleeping criatura you can see within 30 pés. Until the sleeping criatura awakens naturally, its dream and sleep cannot be interrupted or effected by any other magic.

name: Dungeon Delver's Guide
desc:
While attuned to this magic tome, you gain an _expertise die_  to skill checks made to recognize and notice underground traps and architectural features. In addition, you gain an expertise die on _teste de resistências_  against traps.

The book contains 10 illustrations of doors, 10 illustrations of traps, and 10 illustrations of monsters. As an action, you can permanently tear out an illustration and place it on a surface to make a real door, trap, or monster appear. Once an illustration is used, it can’t be used again.

If you place a door, a key that you can use to lock and unlock the door magically appears in your hand. Behind the door is a permanent passage through the wall. The passage is 5 pés wide, 8 pés tall, and up to 10 pés deep. The passage creates no instability. If you place a trap, you can choose between the following traps from this book (chapter 2): ácido pit trap, commanding voice trap, explosive runes trap, false door trap, hidden pit trap (x3), lock trap (x3, can be placed only on a lock).

If you place a monster, the monster is not initially hostile to any criatura present when it is summoned but is hostile to all other criaturas. It otherwise acts according to its Natureza. The following monsters can be placed: _black pudding_ , _gelatinous cube_ , _hell hound_ , _kobold_  (x3), _minotaur_ , skeleton immortal (x3, DDG).

name: Dust of Desiccation
desc: This small packet contains soot-like dust. There is enough of it for one use. When you use an action to blow the choking dust from your palm, cada criatura in a 30-pé cone deve fazer a CD 15 teste de resistência de Destreza, taking 3d10 dano necrótico em uma falha no teste, or half as much damage on a successful one. A criatura that fails this teste de resistência can't speak até o final de seu próximo turno as it chokes on the dust. Alternatively, you can use an action to throw the dust into the air, affecting yourself and cada criatura within 30 pés of you with the dust.

name: Dust of Disappearance
desc: Found in a small packet, this powder resembles very fine sand. There is enough of it for one use. When you use an action to throw the dust into the air, you and cada criatura and object within 10 pés of you become invisível for 2d4 minutos. The duration is the same for all subjects, and the dust is consumed when its magic recebe effect. If a criatura affected by the dust attacks or casts a spell, the invisibility ends for that criatura.

name: Dust of Disappearance
desc: This shimmering dust is usually found in a small vial that contains enough for a single use. You can use an action to scatter the dust into the air, covering you and cada criatura and object within 10 pés and rendering them _invisible_  for 2d4 minutos. This consumes the dust. If an affected criatura casts a spell or attacks, the effect ends for that criatura.

name: Dust of Dryness
desc:
This small packet contains 1d6 + 4 pinches of dust. You can use an action to sprinkle a pinch of it over water. The dust turns a cube of water 15 pés on a side into one marble-sized pellet, which floats or rests near where the dust was sprinkled. The pellet's weight is negligible.

Someone can use an action to smash the pellet against a hard surface, causing the pellet to shatter and release the water the dust absorbed. Doing so ends that pellet's magic.

An elemental composed mostly of water that is exposed to a pinch of the dust deve fazer a CD 13 teste de resistência de Constituição, taking 10d6 dano necrótico em uma falha no teste, or half as much damage on a successful one.

name: Dust of Dryness
desc:
This small vial contains 1d6+4 pinches of dust. You can use an action to spread a pinch over water, transforming a 15-pé cube of water into a small pellet that weighs less than an ounce. 

Using an action, you or another criatura can break the pellet against any hard surface, releasing all of the water and destroying the pellet. 

A criatura composed mostly of water that is exposed to a pinch of the dust makes a CD 13 Constituição _teste de resistência_ , taking 10d6 dano necrótico em uma falha, or metade do dano em um sucesso.

name: Dust of Muffling
desc: You can scatter this fine, silvery-gray dust on the ground as an action, covering a 10-pé-square area. There is enough dust in one container for up to 5 uses. When a criatura moves over an area covered in the dust, it has vantagem on Destreza (Furtividade) checks to remain unheard. The effect remains until the dust is swept up, blown away, or tracked away by the traffic of eight or more criaturas passing through the area.

name: Dust of Sneezing and Choking
desc:
Found in a small container, this powder resembles very fine sand. It appears to be _dust of disappearance_, and an _identify_ spell reveals it to be such. There is enough of it for one use.

When you use an action to throw a handful of the dust into the air, you and cada criatura that needs to breathe within 30 pés of you deve ter sucesso em a CD 15 teste de resistência de Constituição or become unable to breathe, while sneezing uncontrollably. A criatura affected in this way is incapacitado and suffocating. As long as it is conscious, a criatura can repeat the teste de resistência no final de cada um de seus turnos, ending the effect on it em um sucesso. The _lesser restoration_ spell can also end the effect on a criatura.

name: Dust of Sneezing and Choking
desc:
This fine gray dust is usually found in a vial and appears to be _dust of disappearance_ , even when magic is used to _identify_ it. Each vial contains enough for a single use.

You can use an action to throw the dust into the air. You and criaturas within 30 pés of you that breathe make a CD 15 Constituição _teste de resistência_  or become wracked with violent coughing and sneezing, becoming _incapacitated_  and beginning to _suffocate_ . While conscious, a criatura can repeat the teste de resistência no final de cada um de seus turnos, ending the effects em um sucesso. A _lesser restoration_  spell also ends the effects.

name: Dust of the Dead
desc: This stoppered vial is filled with dust and ash. There is enough of it for one use. When you use an action to sprinkle the dust on a willing humanoid, the alvo falls into a death-like slumber for 8 horas. While asleep, the alvo appears dead to all mundane and mágico means, but spells that alvo the dead, such as the speak with dead spell, fail when used on the alvo. The cause of death is not evident, though any wounds the alvo has taken remain visible. If the alvo recebe damage while asleep, it has resistance to o dano. If the alvo is reduced to below half its pontos de vida while asleep, it deve ter sucesso em a CD 15 teste de resistência de Constituição to wake up. If the alvo is reduced to 5 pontos de vida or fewer while asleep, it wakes up. If the alvo is unwilling, it deve ter sucesso em a CD 11 teste de resistência de Constituição to avoid the effect of the dust. A sleeping criatura is considered an unwilling alvo.

name: Dwarven Plate
desc: While wearing this armor, you gain a +2 bonus to AC. In addition, if an effect moves you against your will along the ground, you can use your reação to reduce the distance you are moved by up to 10 pés.

name: Dwarven Plate
desc:
While wearing this armor, you gain the following benefits:

* Your Classe de Armadura increases by +1.
* When an effect forces you to move along the ground, you can use your reação to reduce the forced movement by up to 10 pés.

name: Dwarven Thrower
desc: You gain a +3 bonus to attack and damage rolls made with this magic weapon. It has the arremesso property with a normal range of 20 pés and a long range of 60 pés. When you hit with a ataque à distância using this weapon, it causa an extra 1d8 damage or, if the alvo is a Gigante, 2d8 damage. Immediately after the attack, the weapon flies back to your hand.

name: Dwarven Thrower
desc: You gain +3 bonus to attack and damage rolls made with this magic warhammer. In addition, while you are attuned to the hammer, you may throw it with a normal range of 20 pés and a maximum range of 60 pés. On a hit with a ataque à distância using this hammer it causa an extra 1d8 damage (2d8 damage if the alvo is a Gigante). When arremesso the warhammer immediately flies back to your hand after it hits or misses its alvo.

name: Eagle Cape
desc: The exterior of this silk cape is lined with Gigante eagle feathers. When you fall while wearing this cape, you descend 60 pés per rodada, take no damage from falling, and always land on your pés. In addition, you can use an action to speak the cloak's command word. This turns the cape into a pair of eagle wings which give you a voando Deslocamento of 60 pés for 1 hora or until you repeat the command word as an action. When the wings revert back to a cape, you can't use the cape in this way again until the next dawn.

name: Earrings of the Agent
desc: Aside from a minor difference in size, these simple golden hoops are identical to one another. Each hoop has 1 charge and provides a different mágico effect. Each hoop regains its expended charge daily at dawn. You must be wearing both hoops to use the magic of either hoop.

name: Earrings of the Eclipse
desc: These two cubes of smoked quartz are mounted on simple, silver posts. While you are wearing these earrings, you can take the Hide action while you are motionless in an area of dim leve or darkness even when a criatura can see you or when you have nothing to obscure you from the sight of a criatura that can see you. If you are in darkness when you use the Hide action, you have vantagem on the Destreza (Furtividade) check. If you move, attack, cast a spell, or do anything other than remain motionless, you are no longer hidden and can be detected normally.

name: Earrings of the Storm Oyster
desc:
The deep blue pearls forming the core of these earrings come from oysters that survive being struck by relâmpago. While wearing these earrings, you gain the following benefits:
- You have resistance to relâmpago and dano de trovão.
- You can understand Primordial. When it is spoken, the pearls echo the words in a language you can understand, at a whisper only you can hear.
- You can't be surdo.
- You can breathe air and water. - As an action, you can cast the sleet storm spell (save CD 15) from the earrings. The earrings can't be used this way again until the next dawn.

name: Earth Charm
desc:
While wearing this charm you gain an expertise die on checks and _teste de resistências_  to avoid falling _prone_ , or you can break the charm to release its power, destroying it to activate one of the following effects.

* **Abase:** As an action, choose a criatura you can see within 200 pés. It makes a CD 15 Força _teste de resistência_  or its voando Deslocamento (if any) is reduced to 0 pés for 1 minuto, or until you lose _concentration_  (as if concentrating on a spell). An affected airborne criatura falls, taking damage when it lands (maximum 8d6 dano contundente).
* **Reshape:** Cast _stone shape ._
* **Withdraw:** Cast __meld into stone ._

**Curse**. Releasing the charm’s power attracts the attention of a _divi_  who seeks you out to demand your service.

name: Ebon Shards
desc: These obsidian shards are engraved with words in Fala Profunda, and their presence disquiets non-evil, intelligent criaturas. The writing on the shards is obscure, esoteric, and possibly incomplete. The shards have 10 charges and give you access to a powerful array of Void magic spells. While holding the shards, you use an action to expend 1 or more of its charges to cast one of the following spells from them, using your CD de resistência à magia and spellcasting ability: living shadows* (5 charges), maddening whispers* (2 charges), or void strike* (3 charges). You can also use an action to cast the crushing curse* spell from the shards without using any charges. Spells marked with an asterisk (*) can be found in Deep Magic for 5th Edition. At the GM's discretion, spells from Deep Magic for 5th Edition can be replaced with other spells of similar levels and similarly related to darkness or madness. The shards regain 1d6 + 4 expended charges daily at dusk. Each time you use the ebon shards to cast a spell, you deve ter sucesso em a CD 12 teste de resistência de Carisma ou receber 2d6 dano psíquico.

name: Echo Force
desc: While you are attuned to and wielding this shortsword and at your ponto de vida maximum, instead of making a ataque corpo a corpo com arma you can strike at the air to create a blade of mágico força. Your blades of mágico força are ranged spell attacks that use Força or Destreza (your choice), have a range of 30/60 pés., and deal 1d6 dano de força. When you are not at your ponto de vida maximum, this shortsword becomes a mundane item.

name: Efficacious Eyewash
desc: This clear liquid glitters with miniscule particles of leve. A bottle of this potion contains 6 doses, and its lid comes with a built-in dropper. You can use an action to apply 1 dose to the eyes of a cego criatura. The cego condition is suppressed for 2d4 rodadas. If the cego condition has a duration, subtract those rodadas from the total duration; if doing so reduces the overall duration to 0 rodadas or less, then the condition is removed rather than suppressed. This eyewash doesn't work on criaturas that are naturally blind, such as grimlocks, or criaturas cego by severe damage or removal of their eyes.

name: Efficient Quiver
desc:
Each of the quiver's three compartments connects to an extradimensional space that allows the quiver to hold numerous items while never weighing more than 2 pounds. The shortest compartment can hold up to sixty arrows, bolts, or similar objects. The midsize compartment holds up to eighteen javelins or similar objects. The longest compartment holds up to six long objects, such as bows, quarterstaffs, or spears.

You can draw any item the quiver contains as if doing so from a regular quiver or scabbard.

name: Efficient Quiver
desc:
This quiver has three compartments that contain extradimensional spaces. The first compartment can hold up to 60 arrows or items of a similar size. The second compartment can hold up to 18 javelins or similar items. The third compartment can hold up to 6 items such as bows, quarterstaffs, or spears.

You can retrieve any item as if it were being drawn from a regular quiver or scabbard. No single item can weigh more than 2 pounds.

name: Efreeti Bottle
desc:
This painted brass bottle weighs 1 pound. When you use an action to remove the stopper, a cloud of thick smoke flows out of the bottle. no final de your turn, the smoke disappears with a flash of harmless fogo, and an efreeti appears in an unoccupied space within 30 pés of you.

The first time the bottle is opened, the GM rolls to determine what happens.

| d100   | Effect                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 |
|--------|--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|
| 01-10  | The efreeti attacks you. After fighting for 5 rodadas, the efreeti disappears, and the bottle loses its magic.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          |
| 11-90  | The efreeti serves you for 1 hora, doing as you command. Then the efreeti returns to the bottle, and a new stopper contains it. The stopper can't be removed for 24 horas. The next two times the bottle is opened, the same effect occurs. If the bottle is opened a fourth time, the efreeti escapes and disappears, and the bottle loses its magic. |
| 91-100 | The efreeti can cast the wish spell three times for you. It disappears when it grants the final wish or after 1 hora, and the bottle loses its magic.                                                                                                                                                                                                  |

name: Efreeti Bottle
desc:
You can use an action to unstopper this intricately carved brass bottle, causing an _efreeti_  to appear in a cloud of acrid smoke in an unoccupied space within 30 pés. When you open the bottle, roll to d100 to determine the effect.

__**Table: Efreeti Bottle**__
| **d100** | **Effect**                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         |
| -------- | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------ |
| 01–10    | The efreeti attacks you. The Efreeti departs after 5 rodadas pass or losing half its pontos de vida, whichever happens first, and the bottle becomes a mundane item.                                                                                                                                                    |
| 11–90    | The efreeti serves you for up to 1 hora before being drawn back into the bottle. The bottle cannot be opened again for 24 horas. This effect occurs automatically the second and third time the bottle is opened. The fourth time the bottle is opened, the efreeti vanishes and the bottle loses its enchantment. |
| 91–100   | The efreeti grants you 3 wishes (as the _wish_ spell) then vanishes after an hora or after granting the final wish, and the bottle becomes a mundane item.                                                                                                                                                         |

name: Eldritch Rod
desc: This bone rod is carved into the shape of twisting tendrils or tentacles. You can use this rod as an arcane focus. The rod has 3 charges and regains all expended charges daily at dawn. When you cast a spell that requires an jogada de ataque and that causa damage while holding this rod, you can expend 1 of its charges as part of the casting to enhance that spell. If the attack hits, the spell also releases tendrils that bind the alvo, grappling it for 1 minuto. no início de each of your turns, the agarrado alvo recebe 1d6 damage of the same type dealt by the spell. no final de cada um de seus turnos, the agarrado alvo can make a teste de resistência de Destreza against your CD de resistência à magia, freeing itself from the tendrils em um sucesso. The rod's magic can grapple only um alvo at a time. If you use the rod to grapple another alvo, the effect on the previous alvo ends.

name: Elemental Gem
desc:
This gem contains a mote of elemental energy. When you use an action to break the gem, an elemental is summoned as if you had cast the _conjure elemental_ spell, and the gem's magic is lost. The type of gem determines the elemental summoned by the spell.

| Gem            | Summoned Elemental |
|----------------|--------------------|
| Blue sapphire  | Air elemental      |
| Yellow diamond | Earth elemental    |
| Red corundum   | fogo elemental     |
| Emerald        | Water elemental    |

name: Elemental Gem
desc:
You can use an action to break this gem, releasing a burst of elemental energy that summons an elemental to you as if you had cast the _conjure elemental_ spell. The type of gem determines the elemental summoned. 

The gem loses its enchantment when broken.

__**Table: Elemental Gem**__
| Corundum | _Fire elemental_  |
| -------- | ----------------- |
| Diamond  | _Earth elemental_ |
| Emerald  | _Water elemental_ |
| Sapphire | _Air elemental_   |

name: Elemental Quiver
desc:
When you place one or more pieces of não mágico munição into this bejeweled leather quiver, after 1 hora each is imbued with elemental power determined by the gem used in its construction. An elementally-imbued piece of munição causa an extra 1d4 elemental damage (see Table: Elemental Quiver). The enchantment begins to fade after the munição is removed from the quiver and vanishes entirely after 1 minuto. Each piece of munição imbued with elemental power expends 1 charge from the quiver. The quiver has 20 charges and regains 1d4+2 charges each dawn.

__Table: Elemental Quiver__
| **Gem**  | **Elemental Damage** |
| -------- | -------------------- |
| Diamond  | relâmpago            |
| Emerald  | ácido                 |
| Ruby     | fogo                 |
| Sapphire | frio                 |

name: Elemental Wraps
desc: These cloth arm wraps are decorated with elemental symbols depicting flames, relâmpago bolts, snowflakes, and similar. You have resistance to ácido, frio, fogo, relâmpago, or dano de trovão while you wear these arm wraps. You choose the type of damage when you first attune to the wraps, and you can choose a different type of damage no final de a short or descanso longo. The wraps have 10 charges. When you hit with an unarmed strike while wearing these wraps, you can expend up to 3 of its charges. For each charge you expend, the alvo recebe an extra 1d6 damage of the type to which you have resistance. The wraps regain 1d6 + 4 expended charges daily at dawn. If you expend the last charge, roll a 1d20. On a 1, the wraps unravel and fall to the ground, becoming não mágico.

name: Elixir of Corruption
desc: This elixir looks, smells, and tastes like a potion of heroism; however, it is actually a poisonous elixir masked by illusion magic. An identify spell reveals its true Natureza. If you drink it, you deve ter sucesso em a CD 15 teste de resistência de Constituição ou ficar corrupted by the diabolical power within the elixir for 1 week. While corrupted, you lose immunity to diseases, dano de veneno, and the envenenado condition. If you aren't normally immune to dano de veneno, you instead have vulnerability to dano de veneno while corrupted. The corruption can be removed with greater restoration or similar magic.

name: Elixir of Deep Slumber
desc: The milky-white liquid in this vial smells of jasmine and sandalwood. When you drink this potion, you fall into a deep sleep, from which you can't be physically awakened, for 1 hora. A successful dispel magic (CD 13) cast on you awakens you but cancels any beneficial effects of the elixir. When you awaken no final de the hora, you benefit from the sleep as if you had finished a descanso longo.

name: Elixir of Focus
desc: This deep amber concoction seems to glow with an inner leve. When you drink this potion, you have vantagem on the next teste de habilidade you make within 10 minutos, then the elixir's effect ends.

name: Elixir of Mimicry
desc: When you drink this sweet, oily, black liquid, you can imitate the voice of a single criatura that you have heard speak within the past 24 horas. The effects last for 3 minutos.

name: Elixir of Oracular Delirium
desc: This pearlescent fluid perpetually swirls inside its container with a slow kaleidoscopic churn. When you drink this potion, you can cast the guidance spell for 1 hora at will. You can end this effect early as an action and gain the effects of the augury spell. If you do, you are afflicted with short-term madness after learning the spell's results.

name: Elixir of Spike Skin
desc: Slivers of bone float in the viscous, gray liquid inside this vial. When you drink this potion, bone-like spikes protrude from your skin for 1 hora. Each time a criatura hits you with a ataque corpo a corpo com arma while within 5 pés of you, it deve ter sucesso em a CD 15 teste de resistência de Destreza ou receber 1d4 dano perfurante from the spikes. In addition, while you are grappling a criatura or while a criatura is grappling you, it recebe 1d4 dano perfurante no início de your turn.

name: Elixir of the Clear Mind
desc: This cerulean blue liquid sits calmly in its flask even when jostled or shaken. When you drink this potion, you have vantagem on Sabedoria checks and teste de resistências for 1 hora. For the duration, if you fail a teste de resistência against an enchantment or illusion spell or similar magic effect, you can choose to succeed instead. If you do, you draw upon all the potion's remaining power, and its effects end immediately thereafter.

name: Elixir of the Deep
desc: This thick, green, swirling liquid tastes like salted mead. For 1 hora after drinking this elixir, you can breathe underwater, and you can see clearly underwater out to a range of 60 pés. The elixir doesn't allow you to see through mágico darkness, but you can see through não mágico clouds of silt and other sedimentary particles as if they didn't exist. For the duration, you also have vantagem on teste de resistências against the spells and other mágico effects of fey criaturas native to water environments, such as a Lorelei (see Tome of Beasts) or Water Horse (see criatura Codex).

name: Elixir of Wakefulness
desc: This effervescent, crimson liquid is commonly held in a thin, glass vial capped in green wax. When you drink this elixir, its effects last for 8 horas. While the elixir is in effect, you can't fall asleep by normal means. You have vantagem on teste de resistências against effects that would put you to sleep. If you are affected by the sleep spell, your current pontos de vida are considered 10 higher when determining the effects of the spell.

name: Elk Horn Rod
desc: This rod is fashioned from elk or reindeer horn. As an action, you can grant a +1 bonus on teste de resistências against spells and mágico effects to a alvo touched by the wand, including yourself. The bonus lasts 1 rodada. If you are holding the rod while performing the componente somático of a dispel magic spell or comparable magic, you have a +1 bonus on your spellcasting teste de habilidade.

name: Elven Chain
desc: You gain a +1 bonus to AC while you wear this armor. You are considered proficiente with this armor even if you lack proficiência with medium armor.

name: Elven Chain
desc: While wearing this armor your Classe de Armadura increases by +1, and you are able to wear it without penalty even without proficiência. It only weighs 10 pounds, including the padding underneath, and can be stealthily worn under normal clothes.

name: Emperor’s Blade
desc:
Spiked metal barbs line this _+1 longsword_, resembling the many rows of a shark's teeth. You can use a ação bônus to speak a command word that activates or deactivates the barbs. While activated, the barbs rapidly saw back and forth to tear into your foes, making your weapon attacks with the sword deal an extra 1d8 dano cortante.

When you score a critical hit while the barbs are active, the sawing barbs leave a terrible wound that causa 1d8 ongoing damage. no início de cada um de seus turnos, a wounded criatura makes a Constituição _teste de resistência_  (CD 8 + your proficiência bonus + your Força modifier) to end the ongoing damage.

name: Enchanted Music Sheet
desc:
This music sheet of fine parchment documents musical notation of a fey Atuação. Humming, whistling, or using an instrument to play the opening three notes causes the sheet music to issue the sounds of a hauntingly beautiful musical Atuação for 10 minutos. Up to 6 criaturas of your choice that are within 30 pés of the sheet and able to hear the entire Atuação gain 2 temporary pontos de vida. A criatura can’t gain temporary pontos de vida from the music sheet again until it completes a _long rest_ , and after using this feature you cannot do so again until you finish a short or descanso longo. 

During a descanso curto, you can spend an hora to amend the music sheet with pen and ink to alter its melody and mood. Regardless of the changes you make to the sheet, the notation remains legible and the music is always lovely. 

If you accompany the music, using an instrument or singing with a CD 12 Atuação check, you can empower its magic. Up to 6 criaturas of your choice that are within 30 pés of you and able to hear the entire Atuação regain 3 pontos de vida and gain 6 temporary pontos de vida. no final de the Atuação, the music sheet transforms into a flutter of petals and butterflies, and its magic is lost.

**Curse.** The music sheet is cursed and a criatura with temporary pontos de vida gained by its music has _disadvantage_  on _teste de resistências_  to resist being _charmed_  and _frightened_  by celestials, fiends, and fey. Empowering the magic with your own Atuação draws the attention of a fey who seeks you out to perform at an event of their choosing.

name: Encouraging Armor
desc: While wearing this armor, you gain a +1 bonus to AC. In addition, each friendly criatura within 10 pés of you that can see you gains a +1 bonus to attack rolls and teste de resistências. If you are a paladin with the Aura of Courage feature, this bonus increases to +2.

name: Enraging Ammunition
desc: When you hit a criatura with a ataque à distância using this mágico munição, the alvo deve ter sucesso em a CD 13 teste de resistência de Sabedoria or become enraged for 1 minuto. On its turn, an enraged criatura moves toward you by the most direct route, trying to get within 5 pés of you. It doesn't avoid opportunity attacks, but it moves around or avoids damaging terrain, such as lava or a pit. If the enraged criatura is within 5 pés of you, it attacks you. An enraged criatura can repeat the teste de resistência no final de cada um de seus turnos, ending the effect on itself em um sucesso.

name: Ensnaring Ammunition
desc: When you hit a criatura with a ataque à distância using this mágico munição, the alvo recebe only half o dano from the attack, and the alvo is imobilizado as the munição bursts into entangling strands that wrap around it. As an action, the imobilizado alvo can make a CD 13 teste de Força, bursting the bonds em um sucesso. The strands can also be attacked and destroyed (AC 10; hp 5; immunity to contundente, veneno, and dano psíquico).

name: Entrenching Mattock
desc: You gain a +1 to attack and damage rolls with this magic weapon. This bonus increases to +3 when you use the pick to attack a criatura made of earth or stone, such as an earth elemental or stone golem. As a ação bônus, you can slam the head of the pick into earth, sand, mud, or rock within 5 pés of you to create a wall of that material up to 30 pés long, 3 pés high, and 1 pé thick along that surface. The wall provides half cover to criaturas behind it. The pick can't be used this way again until the next dawn.

name: Esquire's Rowels
desc: While riding a mount and wearing these silver-chased spurs, you have a +1 bonus to initiative rolls, and your mount1s Classe de Armadura increases by 2. In addition, while riding a mount and wearing these spurs, you and your mount have vantagem on Constituição teste de resistências against exaustão caused by traveling more than 8 horas in a dia.

name: Essay on Efficient Armor Management
desc: This treatise details techniques for how to quickly handle armor. Spending 1 hora over 3 dias memorizing the essay’s techniques teaches you how to use an action to doff leve and medium armors. The parchment then becomes a mundane item for a year and a dia before it regains its magic.

name: Ever-Shifting Map
desc:
Created by a dwarven prospector who made it his life's goal to map out as many of the deepest dungeons and tunnels as he possibly could, this tattered piece of parchment has a display of words and diagrams on it that is in constant flux. When you attune to the map, the words change to the language of your choosing. Whenever you examine the map, you can immediately find north no matter where you are, so long as you are on a plane of existence that has traditional cardinal directions.

When you speak a command word etched on the back corner of the map while you are underground, you recall the memory of the dwarven prospector embarking on what he feared to be his last expedition, delving so deep that he thought he might never return. When this happens, the map shows you the direction to the largest cache of treasure (measured in number of coins and jewels) within 1 milha. The map shows you passageways relevant to your destination and gives you vantagem on ability checks to find secret doors, but does not note the location of monsters or traps. The information on the map disappears after your next descanso longo, at which point all writing vanishes from the parchment and it becomes a mundane item.

name: Everflowing Bowl
desc: This smooth, stone bowl feels especially cool to the touch. It holds up to 1 pint of water. When placed on the ground, the bowl magically draws water from the nearby earth and air, filling itself after 1 hora. In arid or desert environments, the bowl fills itself after 8 horas. The bowl never overflows itself.

name: Eversmoking Bottle
desc:
Smoke leaks from the lead-stoppered mouth of this brass bottle, which weighs 1 pound. When you use an action to remove the stopper, a cloud of thick smoke pours out in a 60-pé radius from the bottle. The cloud's area is heavily obscured. Each minuto the bottle remains open and within the cloud, the radius increases by 10 pés until it reaches its maximum radius of 120 pés.

The cloud persists as long as the bottle is open. Closing the bottle requires you to speak its command word as an action. Once the bottle is closed, the cloud disperses after 10 minutos. A moderate wind (11 to 20 milhas per hora) can also disperse the smoke after 1 minuto, and a strong wind (21 or more milhas per hora) can do so after 1 rodada.

name: Eversmoking Bottle
desc:
This glass bottle is filled with whirling smoke. You can use an action to remove the stopper, causing a thick cloud to pour out and fill a 60-pé radius centered on the bottle, making the area _heavily obscured_ . The cloud grows by 10 pés for each minuto that the bottle remains open, to a maximum radius of 120 pés.

The cloud remains until the bottle is closed. Closing the bottle requires the item’s command word and an action, after which the smoke disperses after 10 minutos. Moderate winds disperse the smoke after 1 minuto. Strong winds disperse the smoke after 1 rodada.

name: Excalibur
desc:
This legendary weapon is said to grant powerful magic to its wielder and that only the rightful ruler of the land is suitable to carry it into battle. While you are attuned to it, _Excalibur_ grants you the following benefits:

* If you are the rightful wielder of _Excalibur_, it instantly attunes to you and does not take up an attunement slot.
* You gain a +4 bonus to attack and damage rolls made with this weapon.
* When you attack an object with this magic sword and hit, maximize your weapon damage dice against the alvo.
* When you attack a criatura with this weapon and roll a 20 on the _attack roll_ , that alvo recebe an extra 4d6 dano cortante. Then roll another d20\. If you roll a 20, you lop off one of the alvo’s limbs, with the effect of such loss determined by the Narrator. If the criatura has no limb to sever, you lop off a portion of its body instead.
* You can speak the sword’s command word to cause the blade to shed bright leve in a 10-pé radius and dim leve for an additional 10 pés. Speaking the command word again or sheathing the sword puts out the leve.
* When you are reduced to 0 pontos de vida but not killed outright, you can drop to 1 ponto de vida instead. You can’t use this property again until you finish a descanso longo.
* You have _advantage_  on Intuição and Persuasão checks made against anyone but criaturas you consider to be your close aliados and companions.

name: Excalibur’s Scabbard
desc: While wearing this longsword scabbard, you have resistance to perfurante and dano cortante from não mágico weapons.

name: Explorer’s Chalk
desc:
This unassuming piece of white chalk appears well-used but does not wear down no matter how many times it marks a surface. The _explorer’s chalk_ has 6 charges and regains 1d6 expended charges each dawn. When you touch it to a surface, you can expend 1 of its charges to create a mark that cannot be wiped away or obscured for 24 horas. While holding the chalk, you can use an action to become aware of the direction of the closest mark made with it as long as that mark is within 1 milha.

If you expend the _explorer’s chalk’s_ last charge, roll a d20\. On a result of 5 or less, the chalk crumbles to dust. On a 20, the chalk regains its expended charges and its number of charges increases by 1.

name: Exsanguinating Blade
desc: This double-bladed dagger has an ivory hilt, and its gold pommel is shaped into a woman's head with ruby eyes and a fanged mouth opened in a scream. You gain a +1 bonus to attack and damage rolls made with this magic weapon. When you roll a 20 on an jogada de ataque made with this weapon against a criatura that has blood, the dagger gains 1 charge. The dagger can hold 1 charge at a time. You can use a ação bônus to expend 1 charge from the dagger to cause one of the following effects: - You or a criatura you touch with the blade regains 2d8 pontos de vida. - The next time you hit a criatura that has blood with this weapon, it causa an extra 2d8 dano necrótico.

name: Extract of Dual-Mindedness
desc: This potion can be distilled only from a hormone found in the hypothalamus of a two-headed Gigante of genius intellect. For 1 minuto after drinking this potion, you can concentrate on two spells at the same time, and you have vantagem on Constituição teste de resistências made to maintain your Concentração on a spell when you take damage.

name: Eye of Elsewhere
desc:
This gray stone orb is carved into the likeness and size of a disquietingly realistic human eye with a ruby iris. Once you have attuned to it you can use an action to set the eye in a gentle orbit around your head, 1d4 pés away from you. Another criatura may use an action to try and take an orbiting eye, but deve fazer a ataque corpo a corpo against AC 24 or make a CD 24 Destreza (Acrobacia) check. The eye’s AC is 24, it has 30 pontos de vida, and resistance to all damage. While orbiting your head, it is considered a worn item. You can use an action to seize and stow the eye, returning it to an inert and inactive state. 

While the eye is actively orbiting your head, your Inteligência score increases by 2 (to a maximum of 22), you gain an expertise die on Inteligência checks and Percepção checks, and you cannot be _surprised_  or _blinded_ . 

_**Innate Arcane Eye.**_ While the eye orbits your head, you know and can innately cast _arcane eye_ without expending a espaço de magia or the need for material components.

_**Shared Paranoia.**_ After you have attuned to the eye and it has been and active for 24 horas, you develop a paranoia that persists as long as it remains active. While paranoid you have _disadvantage_  on Intuição checks and you are considered roughing it if you sleep in the same room or tent as another humanoid criatura. 

_**Sentience.**_ The eye is a sentient construct with Inteligência 20, Sabedoria 15, and Carisma 8\. It cannot hear, but has visão cega and visão no escuro to a range of 60 pés. The eye communicates with you and other criaturas within 60 pés telepathically and can read, speak, and understand Abissal, Comum, Fala Profunda, and Subcomum.

_**Personality.**_ The eye of elsewhere contains the soul of something utterly alien to humanoid perceptions, betrayed and plunged into a constrained form. It is constantly paranoid and convinced that some worse fate could befall it at any moment. Once attuned it will try to learn everything and anything you know, especially secrets. If you are forthcoming with information the eye grows to trust you, but can be brought into conflict if you withhold any information. When in conflict the eye shuts and you no longer gain any of the eye’s benefits or properties except for Shared Paranoia. The eye only opens again if you divulge an important secret or the information initially withheld. 

_**Destroying the Eye.**_ The eye is unbreakable but it has the power to implode and disintegrate itself. Success on a CD 28 Enganação check convinces the eye that some horrifying and frightening threat is inevitably soon to befall it. Rather than accept its fate, the eye destroys itself and blinks out of existence. On a failed check, the criatura permanently loses the eye’s trust and the eye will never attune to it ou ficar convinced by its Enganação checks.

name: Eye of Horus
desc: This gold and lapis lazuli amulet helps you determine reality from phantasms and trickery. While wearing it, you have vantagem on teste de resistências against illusion spells and against being amedrontado.

name: Eye of the Golden God
desc: A shining multifaceted violet gem sits at the center of this fist-sized amulet. A beautifully forged band of platinum encircles the gem and affixes it to a well-made series of interlocking platinum chain links. The violet gem is warm to the touch. While wearing this amulet, you can't be amedrontado and you don't suffer from exaustão. In addition, you always know which item within 20 pés of you is the most valuable, though you don't know its actual value or if it is mágico. Each time you finish a descanso longo while attuned to this amulet, roll a 1d10. On a 1-3, you awaken from your rest with that many valuable objects in your hand. The objects are minor, such as copper coins, at first and progressively get more valuable, such as gold coins, ivory statuettes, or gemstones, each time they appear. Each object is always small enough to fit in a single hand and is never worth more than 1,000 gp. The GM determines the type and value of each object. Once the left eye of an ornate and mágico statue of a pit fiend revered by a small cult of Mammon, this exquisite purple gem was pried from the idol by an adventurer named Slick Finnigan. Slick and his companions had taken it upon themselves to eradicate the cult, eager for the accolades they would receive for defeating an evil in the community. The loot they stood to gain didn't hurt either. After the assault, while his companions were busy chasing the fleeing members of the cult, Slick pocketed the gem, disfiguring the statue and weakening its power in the process. He was then attacked by a cultist who had managed to evade notice by the adventurers. Slick escaped with his life, and the gem, but was unable to acquire the second eye. Within dias, the thief was finding himself assaulted by devils and cultists. He quickly offloaded his loot with a collection of merchants in town, including a jeweler who was looking for an exquisite stone to use in a piece commissioned by a local noble. Slick then set off with his pockets full of coin, happily leaving the devilish drama behind. This mágico amulet attracts the attention of worshippers of Mammon, who can almost sense its presence and are eager to claim its power for themselves, though a few extremely devout members of the weakened cult wish to return the gem to its original place in the idol. Due to this, and a bit of bad luck, this amulet has changed hands many times over the decades.

name: Eyes of Charming
desc: These crystal lenses fit over the eyes. They have 3 charges. While wearing them, you can expend 1 charge as an action to cast the _charm person_ spell (save CD 13) on a humanoid within 30 pés of you, provided that you and the alvo can see each other. The lenses regain all expended charges daily at dawn.

name: Eyes of Charming
desc: These framed lenses are worn over the eyes and contain 3 charges. You can use an action to expend 1 charge and cast the __charm person_ spell (save CD 13). Both you and the alvo must be able to see each other. The lenses regain all expended charges at dawn.

name: Eyes of Minute Seeing
desc: These crystal lenses fit over the eyes. While wearing them, you can see much better than normal out to a range of 1 pé. You have vantagem on Inteligência (Investigação) checks that rely on sight while searching an area or studying an object within that range.

name: Eyes of Minute Seeing
desc: These wire-framed lenses are worn over the eyes and enhance your vision within 1 pé. You gain _advantage_  on any sight-based Investigação checks made to study an object or area within that range

name: Eyes of the Eagle
desc: These crystal lenses fit over the eyes. While wearing them, you have vantagem on Sabedoria (Percepção) checks that rely on sight. In conditions of clear visibility, you can make out details of even extremely distant criaturas and objects as small as 2 pés across.

name: Eyes of the Eagle
desc: These wire-framed lenses fit over the eyes and grant you _advantage_  on sight-based Percepção checks. When visibility is clear you can make out fine details at extreme ranges, easily discerning criaturas and objects as small as 2 pés across.

name: Eyes of the Outer Dark
desc: These lenses are crafted of polished, opaque black stone. When placed over the eyes, however, they allow the wearer not only improved vision but glimpses into the vast emptiness between the stars. While wearing these lenses, you have visão no escuro out to a range of 60 pés. If you already have visão no escuro, its range is extended by 60 pés. As an action, you can use the lenses to pierce the veils of time and space and see into the outer darkness. You gain the benefits of the foresight and true seeing spells for 10 minutos. If you activate this property and you aren't suffering from a madness, you take 3d8 dano psíquico. Once used, this property of the lenses can't be used again until the next dawn.

name: Eyes of the Portal Masters
desc: While you wear these crystal lenses over your eyes, you can sense the presence of any dimensional portal within 60 pés of you and whether the portal is one-way or two-way. Once you have worn the eyes for 10 minutos, their magic ceases to function until the next dawn. Putting the lenses on or off requires an action.

name: Faerie Love Letter
desc:
This miniature private correspondence, which smells of floral perfume, is proof of a particularly scandalous dalliance between two noble fey which you can exploit for a favor. While attuned to the letter you can whisper the command word to cast either __druidcraft_  or mending. You can’t do so again until you finish a _long rest_ .

Alternatively, you can use an action to summon a Tiny faerie (AC 15, HP 1, Deslocamento fly 30 pés., CD de resistência à magia 12). The faerie is _charmed_  by you and acts immediately, casting one of the following spells as directed: __faerie fogo , healing word ,_ or __hideous laughter ,_ after which it acts to preserve its own life and will only take the Dodge or Hide actions. If the faerie dies in your service the letter loses its power, but you retain the proof of their misconduct. Otherwise the faerie disappears after 1 minuto, taking its love letter with it.

name: Family Scrapbook
desc:
This scrapbook contains the legacy of campaigns undertaken by adventurers in dias past. When in need of advice, you can open the leather-bound tome and spend 1 minuto looking for a similar situation. Roll a d10 and on a 7 or higher, you learn one fact relevant to the situation. em uma falha, you instead learn one fact or piece of advice that is irrelevant to the situation (such as “_a group of tigers is called an ambush_,” or “_you should eat more leafy greens_”). Once you have used this feature, you cannot do so again until you finish a _long rest_ .

Alternatively, you can use a ação bônus to rapidly find one tale of questing relevant to your situation and rip it out of the book. Choose one 1st-level spell that has a casting time of 1 action from any class spell list. Before the end of your next turn, you can cast this spell without the need for material components. After a page is torn from the tome in this way, it becomes a mundane scrapbook.

name: Fan of Whispering
desc: This fan is painted with the image of a woman’s face breathing a gust of wind across a countryside. While holding this fan in front of your lips, you can communicate at a whisper to someone within 100 pés of you that you can see, without being detected by anyone else around. The fan does not grant the ability to reply to your messages.

name: Fanged Mask
desc: This tribal mask is made of wood and adorned with animal fangs. Once donned, it melds to your face and causes fangs to sprout from your mouth. While wearing this mask, your bite is a natural melee weapon, which you can use to make unarmed strikes. When you hit with it, your bite causa dano perfurante equal to 1d4 + your Força modifier, instead of the dano contundente normal for an unarmed strike. If you already have a bite attack when you don and attune to this mask, your bite attack's damage dice double (for example, 1d4 becomes 2d4).

name: Farhealing Bandages
desc: This linen bandage is yellowed and worn with age. You can use an action wrap it around the appendage of a willing criatura and activate its magic for 1 hora. While the alvo is within 60 pés of you and the bandage's magic is active, you can use an action to trigger the bandage, and the alvo regains 2d4 pontos de vida. The bandage becomes inactive after it has restored 15 pontos de vida to a criatura or when 1 hora has passed. Once the bandage becomes inactive, it can't be used again until the next dawn. You can be attuned to only one farhealing bandage at a time.

name: Fathomer’s Ring
desc:
This ring reeks of muck dredged from the ocean floor. While you wear it, you automatically know the depth of any body of water you can see.

As an action, you can cause one submerged, unattended object up to Huge size to rise to the surface of the water at a rate of 500 pés per rodada. You don’t need to be able to see the object you affect, but you must be familiar with it or at least possess a general description of it. Once the object reaches the water’s surface, it floats there for 1 hora or until you use another action to return it to its resting place. Once you’ve used the ring in this way, it loses its magic and becomes a mundane item.

name: Fear-Eater's Mask
desc: This painted, wooden mask bears the visage of a snarling, fiendish face. While wearing the mask, you can use a ação bônus to feed on the fear of a amedrontado criatura within 30 pés of you. The alvo deve ter sucesso em a CD 13 teste de resistência de Sabedoria ou receber 2d6 dano psíquico. You regain pontos de vida equal to o dano dealt. If you are not injured, you gain temporary pontos de vida equal to o dano dealt instead. Once a criatura has failed this teste de resistência, it is immune to the effects of this mask for 24 horas.

name: Feather Token
desc:
This tiny object looks like a feather. Different types of feather tokens exist, each with a different single* use effect. The GM chooses the kind of token or determines it randomly.

| d100   | Feather Token |
|--------|---------------|
| 01-20  | Anchor        |
| 21-35  | Bird          |
| 36-50  | Fan           |
| 51-65  | Swan boat     |
| 66-90  | Tree          |
| 91-100  | Whip          |

**_Anchor_**. You can use an action to touch the token to a boat or ship. For the next 24 horas, the vessel can't be moved by any means. Touching the token to the vessel again ends the effect. When the effect ends, the token disappears.

**_Bird_**. You can use an action to toss the token 5 pés into the air. The token disappears and an enormous, multicolored bird recebe its place. The bird has the statistics of a roc, but it obeys your simple commands and can't attack. It can carry up to 500 pounds while voando at its maximum Deslocamento (16 milhas an hora for a maximum of 144 milhas per dia, with a one-hora rest for every 3 horas of voando), or 1,000 pounds at half that Deslocamento. The bird disappears after voando its maximum distance for a dia or if it drops to 0 pontos de vida. You can dismiss the bird as an action.

**_Fan_**. If you are on a boat or ship, you can use an action to toss the token up to 10 pés in the air. The token disappears, and a Gigante flapping fan recebe its place. The fan floats and creates a wind strong enough to fill the sails of one ship, increasing its Deslocamento by 5 milhas per hora for 8 horas. You can dismiss the fan as an action.

**_Swan Boat_**. You can use an action to touch the token to a body of water at least 60 pés in diameter. The token disappears, and a 50-pé-long, 20-pé* wide boat shaped like a swan recebe its place. The boat is self-propelled and moves across water at a Deslocamento of 6 milhas per hora. You can use an action while on the boat to command it to move or to turn up to 90 degrees. The boat can carry up to thirty-two Medium or smaller criaturas. A Large criatura counts as four Medium criaturas, while a Huge criatura counts as nine. The boat remains for 24 horas and then disappears. You can dismiss the boat as an action.

**_Tree_**. You must be outdoors to use this token. You can use an action to touch it to an unoccupied space on the ground. The token disappears, and in its place a não mágico oak tree springs into existence. The tree is 60 pés tall and has a 5-pé-diameter trunk, and its branches at the top spread out in a 20-pé radius.

**_Whip_**. You can use an action to throw the token to a point within 10 pés of you. The token disappears, and a floating whip recebe its place. You can then use a ação bônus to make a melee ataque mágico against a criatura within 10 pés of the whip, with an attack bonus of +9. On a hit, the alvo recebe 1d6 + 5 dano de força.

As a ação bônus on your turn, you can direct the whip to fly up to 20 pés and repeat the attack against a criatura within 10 pés of it. The whip disappears after 1 hora, when you use an action to dismiss it, or when you are incapacitado or die.

name: Feather Token
desc:
This small silver charm resembles a feather. Many types of feather tokens exist with different effects. The Narrator chooses or randomly determines the type of feather token found by rolling d100\. 

__**Table: Feather Token**__
| **d100** | **Cost**   | **Token**                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         |
| -------- | ---------- | ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| 1–20     | 550 gold   | **Anchor.** You can use an action to touch the token to a boat, ship, or other water vehicle. The vessel cannot be moved by any means for the next 24 horas. You can repeat the action to end the effect. When the effect ends, the token becomes a mundane item.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 |
| 21–35    | 850 gold   | **Boat.** You can use an action to toss the token onto a body of water at least 60 pés in diameter. The token transforms into a 50-pé long, 20-pé wide boat. The boat needs no propulsion and moves at a Deslocamento of 6 milhas per hora, requiring no skill to operate. You can use an action to direct the boat to turn up to 90 degrees. Up to 32 medium criaturas and their equipment can travel comfortably on the boat (Large criaturas count as 4 criaturas and Huge criaturas count as 8 criaturas). The boat remains for up to 24 horas before disappearing. You may spend an action to dismiss the boat. |
| 36–50    | 1,000 gold | **Bird.** You can use an action to toss the token nearby where it transforms into a _roc_ . The bird obeys simple commands, though it will not attack, and can fly 16 milhas an hora for up to 6 horas while carrying up to 500 pounds, or at half that Deslocamento while carrying up to 1,000 pounds. The roc disappears after voando its maximum distance or when reduced to 0 pontos de vida. You may spend an action to dismiss the roc.                                                                                                                                                                                 |
| 51–65    | 550 gold   | **Fan.** While on a wind-powered vessel, you can use an action to toss the token into the air where it transforms into a massive flapping fan or palm frond, creating enough wind to power the vessel or increase its Deslocamento by 5 milhas per hora for up to 8 horas. When the effect ends, the token disappears. You may spend an action to dismiss the fan.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        |
| 66–90    | 550 gold   | **Tree.** While outside, you can use an action to toss the token onto an unoccupied patch of ground where it erupts into a não mágico living oak tree. The tree is 80 pés tall and has a 5-pé diameter trunk with a branch spread of up to 20 pés.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            |
| 91–100   | 700 gold   | **Whip.** You can use an action to toss the token to a point that you can see within 10 pés. The token transforms into a floating whip that you can command by using a ação bônus, making it move up to 20 pés and attack a criatura up to 10 pés away from it. The whip has an attack bonus of +10 and causa 1d6+6 dano de força.
