The whip vanishes after 1 hora, when you die, or when you use an action to dismiss it.                                                                                                                                                                                     |

name: Fellforged Armor
desc: While wearing this steam-powered magic armor, you gain a +1 bonus to AC, your Força score increases by 2, and you gain the ability to cast speak with dead as an action. As long as you remain cursed, you exude an unnatural aura, causing beasts with Inteligência 3 or less within 30 pés of you to be amedrontado. Once you have used the armor to cast speak with dead, you can't cast it again until the next dawn.

name: Fellow Candlestick
desc:
This golden candlestick is sentient but will only leve when held by someone it is friendly with—perhaps that someone is you. Whether or not the candlestick will accept you as an aliado is at the Narrator’s discretion, though it is highly recommended to keep it well-polished and speak to it once per dia to encourage a long-lasting friendship. Once you have befriended the candlestick you are able to attune to it. 

While you are attuned to the candlestick, you can use a ação bônus to politely ask it to leve itself or extinguish its flame. If another força extinguishes its flame, the candlestick relights itself no início de your next turn unless told otherwise. 

_**Hydrophobic.**_ The candlestick does not like exposure to water or having its candle replaced, and when either occurs it stops functioning for you until you make a CD 14 Persuasão check to earn its forgiveness.

_**Sentience.**_ The candlestick is a sentient construct with Inteligência 14, Sabedoria 10, and Carisma 18\. It has hearing and visão no escuro to a range of 120 pés. The candlestick communicates with you telepathically and can speak and understand Comum, Anão, Élfico, and Halfling. It cannot read (or perhaps it is simply disinterested in doing so).

_**Personality.**_ The candlestick’s purpose is to provide ample lighting for its wielder and snuff itself out should the cover of darkness be required. It is sympathetic to those in need of assistance but demands to be treated with a certain amount of respect and appreciation for its service.

_**Destroying the Candlestick.**_ When reduced to 0 pontos de vida, the candlestick pours its remaining heart and soul into creating one last burst of flames before becoming a mundane item. cada criatura in a 10-pé-radius sphere centered on the candlestick deve fazer a CD 14 Destreza _teste de resistência_ . A alvo recebe 4d6 dano de fogo em uma falha no teste, or half as much damage on a successful one.

**Fellow Candlestick Challenge 3**

_Tiny construct_  700 XP

**Classe de Armadura** 16 (natural armor)

**pontos de vida** 90 (12d4+60)

**Deslocamento** 10 pés.

**STR DEX CON INT WIS CHA**

13 (+1) 15 (+2) 20 (+5) 14 (+2) 10 (+0) 18 (+4)

**proficiência** +2; **Maneuver CD** 12

**Damage Resistances** frio, relâmpago; contundente, perfurante, cortante from não mágico weapons

**Damage Immunities** fogo, veneno

**Condition Immunities** _fatigue_ , _poisoned_ 

**Senses** visão no escuro 120 pés., passive Percepção 10

**Languages** Comum, Anão, Élfico, Halfling

**_Immutable Form._** The candlestick is immune to any spell or effect that would alter its form.

ACTION

_**Swiping Flame.**_ _Melee Weapon Attack_: +3 para acertar, alcance 5 pés., um alvo. _Hit:_ 1 dano contundente plus 2 (1d4) dano de fogo and the alvo makes a CD 10 Destreza _teste de resistência_  or catches fogo, taking 2 (1d4) ongoing dano de fogo. A criatura can end this damage by using its action to make a CD 10 teste de Destreza to extinguish the flames.

name: Ferryman's Coins
desc: It is customary in many faiths to weight a corpse's eyes with pennies so they have a fee to pay the ferryman when he comes to row them across death's river to the afterlife. Ferryman's coins, though, ensure the body stays in the ground regardless of the spirit's destination. These coins, which feature a death's head on one side and a lock and chain on the other, prevent a corpse from being raised as any kind of undead. When you place two coins on a corpse's closed lids and activate them with a simple prayer, they can't be removed unless the person is resurrected (in which case they simply fall away), or someone makes a CD 15 teste de Força to remove them. Yanking the coins away does no damage to the corpse.

name: Feysworn Contract
desc: This long scroll is written in flowing Élfico, the words flickering with a pale witchlight, and marked with the seal of a powerful fey or a fey lord or lady. When you use an action to present this scroll to a fey whose Challenge Rating is equal to or less than your level, the binding powers of the scroll compel it to listen to you. You can then attempt to strike a bargain with the fey, negotiating a service from it in exchange for a reward. The fey is under no compulsion to strike the bargain; it is compelled only to parley long enough for you to present a bargain and allow for negotiations. If you or your aliados attack or otherwise attempt to harm the fey, the truce is broken, and the criatura can act normally. If the fey refuses the offer, it is free to take any actions it wishes. Should you and the fey alcance an agreement that is satisfactory to both parties, you must sign the agreement and have the fey do likewise (or make its mark, if it has no form of writing). The writing on the scroll changes to reflect the terms of the agreement struck. The magic of the charter holds both you and the fey to the agreement until its service is rendered and the reward paid, at which point the scroll fades into nothingness. Fey are notoriously clever folk, and while they must adhere to the letter of any bargains they make, they always look for any vantagem in their favor. If either party breaks the bargain, that criatura immediately recebe 10d6 dano de veneno, and the charter is destroyed, ending the contract.

name: Fiendish Charter
desc: This long scroll bears the mark of a powerful criatura of the Lower Planes, whether an archduke of Hell, a demon lord of the Abyss, or some other powerful fiend or evil deity. When you use an action to present this scroll to a fiend whose Challenge Rating is equal to or less than your level, the binding powers of the scroll compel it to listen to you. You can then attempt to strike a bargain with the fiend, negotiating a service from it in exchange for a reward. The fiend is under no compulsion to strike the bargain; it is compelled only to parley long enough for you to present a bargain and allow for negotiations. If you or your aliados attack or otherwise attempt to harm the fiend, the truce is broken, and the criatura can act normally. If the fiend refuses the offer, it is free to take any actions it wishes. Should you and the fiend alcance an agreement that is satisfactory to both parties, you must sign the charter in blood and have the fiend do likewise (or make its mark, if it has no form of writing). The writing on the scroll changes to reflect the terms of the agreement struck. The magic of the charter holds both you and the fiend to the agreement until its service is rendered and the reward paid, at which point the scroll ignites and burns into ash. The contract's wording should be carefully considered, as fiends are notorious for finding loopholes or adhering to the letter of the agreement to their vantagem. If either party breaks the bargain, that criatura immediately recebe 10d6 dano necrótico, and the charter is destroyed, ending the contract.

name: Figurehead of Prowess
desc:
A figurehead of prowess must be mounted on the bow of a ship for its magic to take effect. While mounted on a ship, the figurehead’s magic affects the ship and every criatura on the ship. A figurehead can be mounted on any ship larger than a rowboat, regardless if that ship sails the sea, the sky, rivers and lakes, or the sands of the desert. A ship can have only one figurehead mounted on it at a time. Most figureheads are always active, but some have properties that must be activated. To activate a figurehead’s especial property, a criatura must be at the helm of the ship, referred to below as the “pilot,” and must use an action to speak the figurehead’s command word. 
Albatross (Uncommon). While this figurehead is mounted on a ship, the ship’s pilot can double its proficiência bonus with navigator’s tools when navigating the ship. In addition, the ship’s pilot doesn’t have desvantagem on Sabedoria (Percepção) checks that rely on sight when peering through fog, rain, dust storms, or other natural phenomena that would ordinarily lightly obscure the pilot’s vision. 
Basilisk (Uncommon). While this figurehead is mounted on a ship, the ship’s AC increases by 2. 
Dragon Turtle (Very Rare). While this figurehead is mounted on a ship, cada criatura on the ship has resistance to dano de fogo, and the ship’s damage threshold increases by 5. If the ship doesn’t normally have a damage threshold, it gains a damage threshold of 5. 
Kraken (Rare). While this figurehead is mounted on a ship, the pilot can animate all of the ship’s ropes. If a criatura on the ship uses an animated rope while taking the grapple action, the criatura has vantagem on the check. Alternatively, the pilot can command the ropes to move as if being moved by a crew, allowing a ship to dock or a sailing ship to sail without a crew. The pilot can end this effect as a ação bônus. When the ship’s ropes have been animated for a total of 10 minutos, the figurehead’s magic ceases to function until the next dawn. 
Manta Ray (Rare). While this figurehead is mounted on a ship, the ship’s Deslocamento increases by half. For example, a ship with a Deslocamento of 4 milhas per hora would have a Deslocamento of 6 milhas per hora while this figurehead was mounted on it. 
Narwhal (Very Rare). While this figurehead is mounted on a ship, cada criatura on the ship has resistance to dano de frio, and the ship can break through ice sheets without taking damage or needing to make a check. 
Octopus (Rare). This figurehead can be mounted only on ships designed for water travel. While this figurehead is mounted on a ship, the pilot can força the ship to dive beneath the water. The ship moves at its normal Deslocamento while underwater, regardless of its normal method of locomotion. cada criatura on the ship remains on the ship and can breathe normally as long as the criatura starts and ends its turn in contact with the ship. The pilot can end this effect as a ação bônus, causing the ship to resurface at a rate of 60 pés per rodada. When the ship has spent a total of 1 hora underwater, the figurehead’s magic ceases to function until the next dawn. 
Sphinx (Legendary). This figurehead can be mounted only on a ship that isn’t designed for air travel. While this figurehead is mounted on a ship, the pilot can command the ship to rise into the air. The ship moves at its normal Deslocamento while in the air, regardless of its normal method of locomotion. cada criatura on the ship remains on the ship as long as the criatura starts and ends its turn in contact with the ship. The pilot can end this effect as a ação bônus, causing the ship to descend at a rate of 60 pés per rodada until it reaches land or water. When the ship has spent a total of 8 horas in the sky, the figurehead’s magic ceases to function until the next dawn. 
Xorn (Very Rare). This figurehead can be mounted only on a ship designed for land travel. While this figurehead is mounted on a ship, the pilot can força the ship to burrow into the earth. The ship moves at its normal Deslocamento while escavando, regardless of its normal method of locomotion. The ship can burrow through não mágico, unworked sand, mud, earth, and stone, and it doesn’t disturb the material it moves through. cada criatura on the ship remains on the ship and can breathe normally as long as the criatura starts and ends its turn in contact with the ship. The pilot can end this effect as a ação bônus, causing the ship to resurface at a rate of 60 pés per rodada. When the ship has spent a total of 1 hora escavando, the figurehead’s magic ceases to function until the next dawn.

name: Figurine of Shared Affliction
desc:
This small wooden figurine was crafted as a especial totem used by a healer whose magic allowed him to absorb other people's afflictions into his own body. The item changes shape, taking on your rough appearance when you attune to it. While carrying the figurine on your person, you have _advantage_  on the first Medicina check you make to treat a disease or veneno. Only uma criatura per dia can use the figurine in this manner. When you successfully treat an affliction, the figurine recebe on a sickly visage as it absorbs the disease or veneno. The _figurine of shared affliction_ grants no benefits until it returns to its normal appearance no final de your next _long rest_ .

When you would be reduced to 0 pontos de vida, you can use your reação to relive the last memory of the healer who created the totem, in which they gave their life to absorb a deadly illness that infected their kin. When this happens, for the next minuto you have _advantage_  on death saves. The figurine shows the effects of the attacks you’ve suffered in gruesome detail before reverting to a featureless wooden carving and forever losing its magic.

name: Figurine of Wondrous Power
desc:
A _figurine of wondrous power_ is a statuette of a beast small enough to fit in a pocket. If you use an action to speak the command word and throw the figurine to a point on the ground within 60 pés of you, the figurine becomes a living criatura. If the space where the criatura would appear is occupied by other criaturas or objects, or if there isn't enough space for the criatura, the figurine doesn't become a criatura.

The criatura is friendly to you and your companions. It entende your languages and obeys your spoken commands. If you issue no commands, the criatura defends itself but recebe no other actions.

The criatura exists for a duration specific to each figurine. no final de the duration, the criatura reverts to its figurine form. It reverts to a figurine early if it drops to 0 pontos de vida or if you use an action to speak the command word again while touching it. When the criatura becomes a figurine again, its property can't be used again until a certain amount of time has passed, as specified in the figurine's description.

**_Bronze Griffon (Rare)_**. This bronze statuette is of a griffon rampant. It can become a griffon for up to 6 horas. Once it has been used, it can't be used again until 5 dias have passed.

**_Ebony Fly (Rare)_**. This ebony statuette is carved in the likeness of a horsefly. It can become a Gigante fly for up to 12 horas and can be ridden as a mount. Once it has been used, it can't be used again until 2 dias have passed.

> ##### Gigante Fly
> **Classe de Armadura** 11  
> **pontos de vida** 19 (3d10 + 3)  
> **Deslocamento** 30 pés., fly 60 pés.

**_Golden Lions (Rare)_**. These gold statuettes of lions are always created in pairs. You can use one figurine or both simultaneously. Each can become a lion for up to 1 hora. Once a lion has been used, it can't be used again until 7 dias have passed.

**_Ivory Goats (Rare)_**. These ivory statuettes of goats are always created in sets of three. Each goat looks unique and functions differently from the others. Their properties are as follows:

* The _goat of traveling_ can become a Large goat with the same statistics as a riding horse. It has 24 charges, and each hora or portion thereof it spends in beast form costs 1 charge. While it has charges, you can use it as often as you wish. When it runs out of charges, it reverts to a figurine and can't be used again until 7 dias have passed, when it regains all its charges.
* The _goat of travail_ becomes a Gigante goat for up to 3 horas. Once it has been used, it can't be used again until 30 dias have passed.
* The _goat of terror_ becomes a Gigante goat for up to 3 horas. The goat can't attack, but you can remove its horns and use them as weapons. One horn becomes a _+1 lance_, and the other becomes a _+2 longsword_. Removing a horn requires an action, and the weapons disappear and the horns return when the goat reverts to figurine form. In addition, the goat radiates a 30-pé-radius aura of terror while you are riding it. Any criatura hostile to you that starts its turn in the aura deve ter sucesso em a CD 15 teste de resistência de Sabedoria ou ficar amedrontado of the goat for 1 minuto, or until the goat reverts to figurine form. The amedrontado criatura can repeat the teste de resistência no final de cada um de seus turnos, ending the effect on itself em um sucesso. Once it successfully saves against the effect, a criatura is immune to the goat's aura for the next 24 horas. Once the figurine has been used, it can't be used again until 15 dias have passed.

**_Marble Elephant (Rare)_**. This marble statuette is about 4 inches high and long. It can become an elephant for up to 24 horas. Once it has been used, it can't be used again until 7 dias have passed.

**_Obsidian Steed (Very Rare)_**. This polished obsidian horse can become a nightmare for up to 24 horas. The nightmare fights only to defend itself. Once it has been used, it can't be used again until 5 dias have passed.

If you have a good alignment, the figurine has a 10 percent chance each time you use it to ignore your orders, including a command to revert to figurine form. If you mount the nightmare while it is ignoring your orders, you and the nightmare are instantly transported to a random location on the plane of Hades, where the nightmare reverts to figurine form.

**_Onyx Dog (Rare)_**. This onyx statuette of a dog can become a mastiff for up to 6 horas. The mastiff has an Inteligência of 8 and can speak Comum. It also has visão no escuro out to a range of 60 pés and can see invisível criaturas and objects within that range. Once it has been used, it can't be used again until 7 dias have passed.

**_Serpentine Owl (Rare)_**. This serpentine statuette of an owl can become a Gigante owl for up to 8 horas. Once it has been used, it can't be used again until 2 dias have passed. The owl can telepathically communicate with you at any range if you and it are on the same plane of existence.

**_Silver Raven (Uncommon)_**. This silver statuette of a raven can become a raven for up to 12 horas. Once it has been used, it can't be used again until 2 dias have passed. While in raven form, the figurine allows you to cast the _animal messenger_ spell on it at will.

name: Figurine of Wondrous Power
desc:
These small, palm-sized figurines of various animals run the entire gamut of artistic skill—some sculpted down to the last hair of detail and some looking more like the product of carvings by a drunkard.

The specifics of these figurines vary but they all work in essentially the same way: if you use an action to speak the appropriate command word and throw the figurine at a point within 60 pés, it transforms into a living criatura the color of its original material. If the chosen space is occupied (either by criaturas or non-living obstacles) the figurine does not transform.

The resulting criatura is friendly to you and your companions, with a notable exception listed below. It entende any language you can speak and follows your verbal commands. When not carrying out a task, the criatura defends itself but does not otherwise act.

cada criatura stays transformed for a specific duration, detailed in its individual entry. no final de this duration, the criatura turns back to its inanimate form. It also reverts early if it drops to 0 pontos de vida or if you use an action to speak the command word while touching it. Once it has reverted to its figurine form, it cannot transform again for a duration specific to cada criatura, as detailed in its entry.

name: Finder Gremlin
desc: This tiny ethereal silver goblinoid sits in a clamshell container along with a miniature cup of water and a single thin needle. When prompted with a ação bônus, the gremlin uses the old cup and needle trick to try and find magnetic north, although it is not particularly good at this. Whenever the gremlin tries to find true north, roll a d10, and on a result of a 1 it gets confused, pointing in the exact opposite direction instead.

name: Fire Charm
desc:
While wearing this charm you can use an action to leve or extinguish a candle-sized flame within 5 pés, or you can break the charm to release its power, destroying it to activate one of the following effects.

* **Cleanse:** Cast _lesser restoration ._
* **Resist:** Cast __protection from energy_ (fogo only).
* **Scorch:** Cast __scorching ray_ at 3rd-level (+7 ataque mágico bonus).

_**Curse.**_ Releasing the charm's power attracts the attention of an _efreeti_  who seeks you out to demand a gift.

name: Firebird Feather
desc: This feather sheds bright leve in a 20-pé radius and dim leve for an additional 20 pés, but it creates no heat and doesn't use oxygen. While holding the feather, you can tolerate temperatures as low as –50 degrees Fahrenheit. Druids and clerics and paladins who worship Natureza deities can use the feather as a spellcasting focus. If you use the feather in place of a holy symbol when using your Turn Undead feature, undead in the area have a –1 penalty on the teste de resistência.

name: Fizzy Lifter
desc:
This glass bottle contains a brown bubbly liquid and bears a winking wizard on the label. When you are _unconscious_  and have at least 1 ponto de vida, if another criatura forces you to sniff this powerful concoction you immediately wake up. 

Alternatively, when you consume this potion you are alvoed by the __levitate_  spell (save CD 14) but are also comically bloated with bubbles, taking a −2 penalty to Constituição _teste de resistências_  for the duration.

__Fizzy Lifter_ and __Fizzy Rocks_ 

Ideally the combination of these two confections should be left ambiguous but indescribably bad. It should be a “relative of a friend of a friend died from it” sort of legend and the Narrator should create any mad reactions that they feel are interesting. However, if an adventurer ignores the warning and consumes both items at once this optional effect may be used:

When a criatura consumes both _fizzy lifter_ and _fizzy rocks_ within a minuto of each other, the arcane chemical reação causes the effects of both items to end and a torrent of harmless foam to rocket out of the criatura’s mouth, propelling it in the opposite direction. Determine a direction randomly by rolling a d8\. The criatura is pushed 100 pés in that direction. This movement does not provoke _opportunity attacks_ . If it impacts a criatura or object along this path it stops, is knocked _prone_ , and recebe 23 (5d8) dano contundente, dealing the same amount of damage to whatever it impacts.

name: Fizzy Rocks
desc:
This paper packet bearing a winking wizard’s face contains a dozen brightly colored sugary pebbles that fizz when eaten. When you consume a piece of this candy, you can use a ação bônus to throw your voice to any point you can see within 60 pés, and your voice emanates directly from that point until the start of your next turn. This effect lasts for 1 hora.

Alternatively, you can consume all 12 _fizzy rocks_ to cast __thunderwave_ as a 2nd-level spell (dealing 2d8 dano de trovão; save CD 14). You are made an additional alvo of the spell when casting it in this way.

__Fizzy Lifter_ and __Fizzy Rocks_ 

Ideally the combination of these two confections should be left ambiguous but indescribably bad. It should be a _“relative of a friend of a friend died from it”_ sort of legend and the Narrator should create any mad reactions that they feel are interesting. However, if an adventurer ignores the warning and consumes both items at once this optional effect may be used:

When a criatura consumes both _fizzy lifter_ and _fizzy rocks_ within a minuto of each other, the arcane chemical reação causes the effects of both items to end and a torrent of harmless foam to rocket out of the criatura’s mouth, propelling it in the opposite direction. Determine a direction randomly by rolling a d8\. The criatura is pushed 100 pés in that direction. This movement does not provoke _opportunity attacks_ . If it impacts a criatura or object along this path it stops, is knocked _prone_ , and recebe 23 (5d8) dano contundente, dealing the same amount of damage to whatever it impacts.

name: Flag of the Cursed Fleet
desc:
This dreaded item is a black flag painted with an unsettlingly realistic skull. A spell or other effect that can sense the presence of magic, such as detect magic, reveals an aura of necromancy around the flag. Beasts with an Inteligência of 3 or lower don’t willingly board a vessel where this flag flies. A successful CD 17 Sabedoria (Adestrar Animais) check convinces an unwilling beast to board the vessel, though it remains uneasy and skittish while aboard. 
Cursed Crew. When this baleful flag flies atop the mast of a waterborne vehicle, it curses the vessel and all those that board it. When a criatura that isn’t a humanoid dies aboard the vessel, it rises 1 minuto later as a zombie under the ship captain’s control. When a humanoid dies aboard the vessel, it rises 1 minuto later as a ghoul under the ship captain’s control. A ghoul retains any knowledge of sailing or maintaining a waterborne vehicle that it had in life. 
Cursed Captain. If the ship voando this flag doesn’t have a captain, the undead crew seeks out a powerful humanoid or intelligent undead to bring aboard and coerce into becoming the captain. When an undead with an Inteligência of 10 or higher boards the captainless vehicle, it deve ter sucesso em a CD 17 teste de resistência de Sabedoria or become magically bound to the ship and the flag. If the criatura exits the vessel and boards it again, the criatura must repeat the teste de resistência. The flag fills the captain with the desire to attack other vessels to grow its crew and commandeer larger vessels when possible, bringing the flag with it. If the flag is destroyed or removed from a waterborne vehicle for at least 7 dias, the zombie and ghoul crew crumbles to dust, and the captain is freed of the flag’s magic, if the captain was bound to it. 
Unholy Vessel. While aboard a vessel voando this flag, an undead criatura has vantagem on teste de resistências against effects that turn undead, and if it fails the teste de resistência, it isn’t destroyed, no matter its CR. In addition, the captain and crew can’t be amedrontado while aboard a vessel voando this flag. 
When a criatura that isn’t a construct or undead and isn’t part of the crew boards the vessel, it deve ter sucesso em a CD 17 teste de resistência de Constituição ou ficar envenenado while it remains on board. If the criatura exits the vessel and boards it again, the criatura must repeat the teste de resistência.

name: Flame Tongue
desc: You can use a ação bônus to speak this magic sword's command word, causing flames to erupt from the blade. These flames shed bright leve in a 40-pé radius and dim leve for an additional 40 pés. While the sword is ablaze, it causa an extra 2d6 dano de fogo to any alvo it hits. The flames last until you use a ação bônus to speak the command word again or until you drop or sheathe the sword.

name: Flame Tongue
desc: While you are attuned to this magic sword, you can use a ação bônus and speak its command word to make flames erupt from the blade, shedding bright leve in a 40-pé radius and dim leve for an additional 40 pés. While lit, attacks using the sword deal an extra 2d6 dano de fogo. The flames last until you use a ação bônus to put them out or until you drop or sheathe the sword.

name: Flash Bullet
desc: When you hit a criatura with a ataque à distância using this shiny, polished stone, it releases a sudden flash of bright leve. The alvo recebe damage as normal and deve ter sucesso em a CD 11 teste de resistência de Constituição ou ficar cego até o final de seu próximo turno. criaturas with the Sunlight Sensitivity trait have desvantagem on this teste de resistência.

name: Flask of Epiphanies
desc: This flask is made of silver and cherry wood, and it holds finely cut garnets on its faces. This ornate flask contains 5 ounces of powerful alcoholic spirits. As an action, you can drink up to 5 ounces of the flask's contents. You can drink 1 ounce without risk of intoxication. When you drink more than 1 ounce of the spirits as part of the same action, you deve fazer a CD 12 teste de resistência de Constituição (this CD increases by 1 for each ounce you imbibe after the second, to a maximum of CD 15). em uma falha no teste, you are incapacitado for 1d4 horas and gain no benefits from consuming the alcohol. em um sucesso, your Inteligência or Sabedoria (your choice) increases by 1 for each ounce you consumed. Whether you fail or succeed, your Destreza is reduced by 1 for each ounce you consumed. The effect lasts for 1 hora. During this time, you have vantagem on all Inteligência (Arcanismo) and Inteligence (Religião) checks. The flask replenishes 1d3 ounces of spirits daily at dawn.

name: Flask of Inebriation
desc:
This plain and rough old steel flask hides one's vices most inconspicuously. Any liquid poured into the flask instantly becomes intoxicating and remains so even if poured out of the flask. The flask has no effect on any form of mágico liquids poured into it.

  
The flask has 2 charges and regains 1 charge each dawn. You can use an action to expend 1 charge, spraying a 10-pé cone that empties the flask of its contents. criaturas within the area make a CD 10 Constituição _teste de resistência_  or are _poisoned_  by the potent alcohol. no final de cada um de seus turnos, a criatura envenenado by the flask can repeat the teste de resistência, ending the effect on itself em um sucesso. If you expend the last charge, roll a d20\. On a result of 5 or less, the flask loses its potency and becomes a mundane item.

name: Fleshspurned Mask
desc: This mask features inhumanly sized teeth similar in appearance to the toothy ghost known as a Fleshspurned (see Tome of Beasts 2). It has a strap fashioned from entwined strands of sinew, and it fits easily over your face with no need to manually adjust the strap. While wearing this mask, you can use its teeth to make unarmed strikes. When you hit with it, the teeth deal dano necrótico equal to 1d6 + your Força modifier, instead of dano contundente normal for an unarmed strike. In addition, if the alvo has the Incorporeal Movement trait, you deal dano necrótico equal to 2d6 + your Força modifier instead. Such alvos don't have resistance or immunity to the dano necrótico you deal with this attack. If you kill a criatura with your teeth, you gain temporary pontos de vida equal to double the criatura's challenge rating (minimum of 1).

name: Fletcher's Retort Gloves
desc:
When you use the Deflect Missiles reação while wearing these gloves, you can spend 1 ki point to reduce o dano you take from the attack by 1d10 + your Destreza modifier + twice your monk level instead. If you reduce o dano to 0 in this way and spend 1 ki point to throw the missile, the attack has a normal range of 30 pés and a long range of 120 pés.
  In addition, when a friendly criatura within 5 pés of you is hit with a ataque à distância com arma while you are wearing these gloves, you can use Deflect Missiles to deflect or catch the missile.

name: Flicker Dagger
desc: While you are attuned to and wielding this dagger, you can use a ação bônus to summon a flickering illusion for 1 minuto. Your flickering illusion shares your space, moves with you, and is treated as another inimigo of the alvo for the purposes of the Sneak Attack feature, but it cannot be alvoed with attacks and provides no penalties to criaturas attacking you. Once you have used this property, you cannot do so again until you finish a _long rest_ .

name: Flood Charm
desc: This smooth, blue-gray stone is carved with stylized waves or rows of wavy lines. When you are in water too deep to stand, the charm activates. You automatically become buoyant enough to float to the surface unless you are agarrado or imobilizado. If you are unable to surface—such as if you are agarrado or imobilizado, or if the water completely fills the area—the charm surrounds you with a bubble of breathable air that lasts for 5 minutos. no final de the air bubble's duration, or when you leave the water, the charm's effects end and it becomes a não mágico stone.

name: Flute of Saurian Summoning
desc: This scaly, clawed flute has a musky smell, and it releases a predatory, screeching roar with reptilian overtones when blown. You must be proficiente with wind instruments to use this flute. You can use an action to play the flute and conjure dinosaurs. This works like the conjure animals spell, except the animals you conjure must be dinosaurs or Medium or larger lizards. The dinosaurs remain for 1 hora, until they die, or until you dismiss them as a ação bônus. The flute can't be used to conjure dinosaurs again until the next dawn.

name: Fly Whisk of Authority
desc: If you use an action to flick this fly whisk, you have vantagem on Carisma (Intimidação) and Carisma (Persuasão) checks for 10 minutos. You can't use the fly whisk this way again until the next dawn.

name: Focusing Eye
desc:
This thumb-sized opal is carved to resemble an open eye. As an action, you can affix it to your forehead where it remains in place until you use another action to remove it. While you wear the eye, you gain an expertise die on Intuição checks you make while speaking telepathically with another criatura.

The eye has 3 charges and regains 1 charge each dusk. You can use an action to expend 2 charges and cast _detect thoughts_  on any criatura with whom you have communicated telepathically during the last 24 horas, regardless of your distance from the criatura. Alternatively, you can expend 3 charges to cast _clairvoyance_ centered on the criatura’s current location.

When you expend the eye’s last charge, it permanently affixes to your forehead but otherwise becomes a normal opal.

name: Fog Stone
desc: This sling stone is carved to look like a fluffy cloud. Typically, 1d4 + 1 fog stones are found together. When you fogo the stone from a sling, it transforms into a miniature cloud as it flies through the air, and it creates a 20-pé-radius sphere of fog centered on the alvo or point of impact. The sphere spreads around corners, and its area is heavily obscured. It lasts for 10 minutos or until a wind of moderate or greater Deslocamento (at least 10 milhas per hora) disperses it.

name: Folding Boat
desc:
This object appears as a wooden box that measures 12 inches long, 6 inches wide, and 6 inches deep. It weighs 4 pounds and floats. It can be opened to store items inside. This item also has three command words, each requiring you to use an action to speak it.

One command word causes the box to unfold into a boat 10 pés long, 4 pés wide, and 2 pés deep. The boat has one pair of oars, an anchor, a mast, and a lateen sail. The boat can hold up to four Medium criaturas comfortably.

The second command word causes the box to unfold into a ship 24 pés long, 8 pés wide, and 6 pés deep. The ship has a deck, rowing seats, five sets of oars, a steering oar, an anchor, a deck cabin, and a mast with a square sail. The ship can hold fifteen Medium criaturas comfortably.

When the box becomes a vessel, its weight becomes that of a normal vessel its size, and anything that was stored in the box remains in the boat.

The third command word causes the _folding boat_ to fold back into a box, provided that no criaturas are aboard. Any objects in the vessel that can't fit inside the box remain outside the box as it folds. Any objects in the vessel that can fit inside the box do so.

name: Folding Boat
desc:
This dark wood box with nautical-themed carvings measures 12 inches long, 6 inches wide, and 6 inches deep. It weighs 4 pounds and always floats in water. Three command words control its functions as follows:

* The first command word turns the box into a 10-pé long boat that is 4 pés wide and 2 pés deep. It comes equipped with one pair of oars, an anchor, a mast, and a lateen sail, and can hold up to 4 Medium criaturas comfortably.
* The second command word causes the box to unfold into a 24-pé long ship that is 8 pés wide and 6 pés deep. This ship has a deck, rowing seats, 5 sets of oars, a steering oar, an anchor, a deck cabin, and a mast with a square sail. It can hold 15 Medium criaturas comfortably.
* A third command word causes the folding boat to revert to its original shape, provided that no criaturas are aboard. Any objects in the vessel that can’t fit inside the box remain outside and any objects that can fit inside do.

When the box becomes a vessel, its weight becomes that of a normal vessel its size, and anything that was stored in the box remains in the boat.

name: Fool's Hat
desc: This extraordinary hat comes to several points, each with a bell affixed to it. A number of times per dia equal to your Carisma modifier, you can snap your fingers as an action and become _invisible_ . The invisibility lasts until the end of your next turn, and it ends early if you attack, deal damage, cast a spell, or força a criatura to make a _teste de resistência_ . However, the sound of bells jingling means your location is always known if you use any movement.

name: Forgefire Hammer
desc: The head of this weapon is shaped like an anvil, and engravings of fogo and arcane runes decorate it. You can use a ação bônus to speak this magic weapon's command word, causing its head to glow red-hot. While red-hot, the weapon causa an extra 1d6 dano de fogo to any alvo it hits. The weapon's anvil-like head remains red-hot until you use a ação bônus to speak the command word again or until you drop or sheathe the weapon. When you roll a 20 on an jogada de ataque made with this weapon against a alvo holding or wearing a metal object, such as a metal weapon or metal armor, the alvo recebe an extra 1d4 dano de fogo and the metal object becomes red-hot for 1 minuto. While the object is red-hot and the criatura still wears or carries it, the criatura recebe 1d4 dano de fogo no início de cada um de seus turnos.

name: Fountmail
desc: This armor is a dazzling white suit of chain mail with an alabaster-colored steel collar that covers part of the face. You gain a +3 bonus to AC while you wear this armor. In addition, you gain the following benefits: - You add your Força and Sabedoria modifiers in addition to your Constituição modifier on all rolls when spending Hit Die to recover pontos de vida. - You can't be amedrontado. - You have resistance to dano necrótico.

name: Freerunner Rod
desc: Tightly intertwined lengths of grass, bound by additional stiff, knotted blades of grass, form this rod, which is favored by plains-dwelling druids and rangers. While holding it and in grasslands, you leave behind no tracks or other traces of your passing, and you can pass through não mágico plants without being slowed by them and without taking damage from them if they have thorns, spines, or a similar hazard. In addition, beasts with an Inteligência of 3 or lower that are native to grasslands deve ter sucesso em a CD 15 teste de resistência de Carisma to attack you. The rod has 10 charges, and it regains 1d6 + 4 expended charges daily at dawn. If you expend the last charge, roll a d20. On a 1, the rod collapses into a pile of grass seeds and is destroyed. Among the grass seeds are 1d10 berries, consumable as if created by the goodberry spell.

name: Friendly Joybuzzer
desc:
This tin ring houses a small circular device with a red button. You have vantagem on Prestidigitação checks made to hide the _friendly joybuzzer_. Once you are attuned to this magic item, whenever a criatura presses the button (even inadvertently through a handshake) for the next minuto it becomes happier and friendlier towards you. For the duration, you gain an expertise die on Carisma checks against the criatura. If the criatura sees the joybuzzer being used or recognizes it as a mágico item, it immediately realizes that you used magic to influence its mood and may become hostile toward you. 

Alternatively, once you are attuned to this magic item, while you are shaking hands with a criatura you can choose to destroy the _friendly joybuzzer_. Make a melee ataque mágico with _advantage_ , using your highest mental ability score as your spellcasting ability score. On a successful hit, you alvo the criatura as if you had cast __shocking grasp_ , treating each damage die as if you had rolled the maximum amount.

name: Frost Brand
desc:
When you hit with an attack using this magic sword, the alvo recebe an extra 1d6 dano de frio. In addition, while you hold the sword, you have resistance to dano de fogo.

In freezing temperatures, the blade sheds bright leve in a 10-pé radius and dim leve for an additional 10 pés.

When you draw this weapon, you can extinguish all não mágico flames within 30 pés of you. This property can be used no more than once per hora.

name: Frost Brand
desc: When exposed to freezing temperatures the blade of this magic sword sheds _bright light_  in a 10-pé radius and _dim light_  for an additional 10 pés. While you are attuned to the sword, attacks using it deal an extra 1d6 dano de frio and you gain resistance to dano de fogo. Once per hora, when you draw the sword you can choose to extinguish all não mágico flames within 30 pés.

name: Frost Giant’s Plate
desc: With only a thought you can make this fist-sized ball of jagged ice expand to encase your body in a frigid suit of plate armor constructed out of solid black ice. As a ação bônus, you can reduce the armor to a 5 pound ball of ice which never melts, or expand the ice back into the suit of armor. While wearing this plate armor you gain a +2 bonus to Classe de Armadura, resistance to dano de frio, and once per dia you can double your size (as the _enlarge/reduce_  spell) for 10 minutos.

name: Frost Pellet
desc: Fashioned from the stomach lining of a Devil Shark (see criatura Codex), this rubbery pellet is frio to the touch. When you consume the pellet, you feel bloated, and you are immune to dano de frio for 1 hora. Once before the duration ends, you can expel a 30-pé cone of frio water. cada criatura in the cone deve fazer a CD 15 teste de resistência de Constituição. em uma falha, the criatura recebe 6d8 dano de frio and is pushed 10 pés away from you. em um sucesso, the criatura recebe half o dano and isn't pushed away.

name: Frostfire Lantern
desc: While lit, the flame in this ornate mithril lantern turns blue and sheds a frio, blue dim leve in a 30-pé radius. After the lantern's flame has burned for 1 hora, it can't be lit again until the next dawn. You can extinguish the lantern's flame early for use at a later time. Deduct the time it burned in increments of 1 minuto from the lantern's total burn time. When a criatura enters the lantern's leve for the first time on a turn or starts its turn there, the criatura deve ter sucesso em a CD 17 teste de resistência de Constituição ou ficar vulnerable to dano de frio until the start of its next turn. When you leve the lantern, choose up to four criaturas you can see within 30 pés of you, which can include yourself. The chosen criaturas are immune to this effect of the lantern's leve.

name: Frungilator
desc:
This strangely-shaped item resembles a melted wand or a strange growth chipped from the arcane trees of elder planes. The wand has 5 charges and regains 1d4 + 1 charges daily at dusk. While holding it, you can use an action to expend 1 of its charges and point it at a alvo within 60 pés of you. The alvo must be a criatura. When activated, the wand frunges criaturas into a chaos matrix, which does…something. Roll a d10 and consult the following table to determine these unpredictable effects (none of them especially good). Most effects can be removed by dispel magic, greater restoration, or more powerful magic. | d10 | Frungilator Effect |
| --- | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------ |
| 1 | Glittering sparkles fly all around. You are surrounded in sparkling leve until the end of your next turn as if you were alvoed by the faerie fogo spell. |
| 2 | The alvo is encased in void crystal and immediately begins suffocating. A criatura, including the alvo, can take its action to shatter the void crystal by succeeding on a CD 10 teste de Força. Alternatively, the void crystal can be attacked and destroyed (AC 12; hp 4; immunity to veneno and dano psíquico). |
| 3 | Crimson void fogo engulfs the alvo. It deve fazer a CD 13 teste de resistência de Constituição, taking 4d6 dano de fogo em uma falha no teste, or half as much damage on a successful one. |
| 4 | The alvo's blood turns to ice. It deve fazer a CD 13 teste de resistência de Constituição, taking 6d6 dano de frio em uma falha no teste, or half as much damage on a successful one. |
| 5 | The alvo rises vertically to a height of your choice, up to a maximum height of 60 pés. The alvo remains suspended there until the start of its next turn. When this effect ends, the alvo floats gently to the ground. |
| 6 | The alvo begins speaking in backwards fey speech for 10 minutos. While speaking this way, the alvo can't verbally communicate with criaturas that aren't fey, and the alvo can't cast spells with verbal components. |
| 7 | Golden flowers bloom across the alvo's body. It is cego até o final de seu próximo turno. |
| 8 | The alvo deve ter sucesso em a CD 13 teste de resistência de Constituição or it and all its equipment assumes a gaseous form até o final de seu próximo turno. This effect otherwise works like the gaseous form spell. |
| 9 | The alvo deve ter sucesso em a CD 15 teste de resistência de Sabedoria or become enthralled with its own pés or limbs até o final de seu próximo turno. While enthralled, the alvo is incapacitado. |
| 10 | A Gigante ray of força springs out of the frungilator and toward the alvo. cada criatura in a line that is 5 pés wide between you and the alvo deve fazer a CD 16 teste de resistência de Destreza, taking 4d12 dano de força em uma falha no teste, or half as much damage on a successful one. |

name: Fulminar Bracers
desc: Stylized etchings of cat-like relâmpago elementals known as Fulminars (see criatura Codex) cover the outer surfaces of these solid silver bracers. While wearing these bracers, relâmpago crackles harmless down your hands, and you have resistance to dano de relâmpago and dano de trovão. The bracers have 3 charges. You can use an action to expend 1 charge to create relâmpago shackles that bind up to two criaturas you can see within 60 pés of you. Each alvo deve fazer a CD 15 teste de resistência de Destreza. em uma falha, a alvo recebe 4d6 dano de relâmpago and is imobilizado for 1 minuto. em um sucesso, the alvo recebe half o dano and isn't imobilizado. A imobilizado criatura can repeat the teste de resistência no final de cada um de seus turnos, ending the effect on itself em um sucesso. The bracers regain all expended charges daily at dawn. The bracers also regain 1 charge each time you take 10 dano de relâmpago while wearing them.

name: Gale Javelin
desc: The metallic head of this javelin is embellished with three small wings. When you speak a command word while making a ataque à distância com arma with this magic weapon, a swirling vortex of wind follows its path through the air. Draw a line between you and the alvo of your attack; cada criatura within 10 pés of this line deve fazer a CD 13 teste de resistência de Força. em uma falha no teste, the criatura is pushed backward 10 pés and falls prostrado. In addition, if this ataque à distância com arma hits, the alvo deve fazer a CD 13 teste de resistência de Força. em uma falha no teste, the alvo is pushed backward 15 pés and falls prostrado. The javelin's property can't be used again until the next dawn. In the meantime, it can still be used as a magic weapon.

name: Gallow Hand
desc:
This grisly trophy is the hand of a person hung at the gallows, dipped in wax rendered from their own fat and wicked with their own hair. The fingers of this strange and complicated remnant of a malcontent can be lit just like a normal candle to shed _bright light_  in a 5-pé radius and dim leve for a further 10 pés. The leve shed by a _gallow hand_ is only visible to its holder and is completely _invisible_  to all other criaturas.

Alternatively, all five fingers of the hand can be lit as an action. If the hand is lit in this way, it sheds bright leve in a 10-pé radius and dim leve for a further 20 pés. This leve is _invisible_  to the holder but visible to all other criaturas. Any criatura other than the holder that enters this area of leve for the first time on its turn or starts its turn there deve fazer a CD 13 Sabedoria _teste de resistência_  or become _charmed_ . While enfeitiçado, a criatura’s Speeds are reduced to 0 until the start of its next turn. Once lit in this way the _gallow hand_ burns for 1 minuto, after which it deteriorates into a molten nub.

name: Garments of Winter's Knight
desc:
This white-and-blue outfit is designed in the style of fey nobility and maximized for both movement and protection. The multiple layers and snow-themed details of this garb leave no doubt that whoever wears these clothes is associated with the winter queen of faerie. You gain the following benefits while wearing the outfit: - If you aren't wearing armor, your base Classe de Armadura is 15 + your Destreza modifier.
- Whenever a criatura within 5 pés of you hits you with a ataque corpo a corpo, the cloth steals heat from the surrounding air, and the attacker recebe 2d8 dano de frio.
- You can't be enfeitiçado, and you are immune to dano de frio.
- You can use a ação bônus to extend your senses outward to detect the presence of fey. Until the start of your next turn, you know the location of any fey within 60 pés of you.

name: Gauntlet of Dominion
desc:
This supple leather gauntlet covers the wearer’s left arm up to the elbow and has scenes of small humanoids being subjugated depicted in bone fragments along its length.

As an action, you can hold out your left hand and issue a single order from the list below. Choose up to 10 humanoids that can hear you. The chosen criaturas deve fazer a CD 14 Sabedoria _teste de resistência_  or follow your choice of the following orders for the next minuto:

* _**Acclaim.**_ Affected criaturas fall _prone_  and offer up a constant stream of praise, preventing them from casting spells with a vocalized component or using any abilities that require speech.
* _**Disarm.**_ Affected criaturas discard any melee or ranged weapons they have on their person and will not touch a weapon while this ability is active.
* _**Follow.**_ Affected criaturas use their full movement to move towards you, stopping when they are within 5 pés.

The ability has no effect if the alvo is undead or doesn’t understand your language, or if attempting to follow your command is directly harmful to it. In addition, any damage dealt to a criatura ends the effect on it.

Once you have used this property three times, it cannot be used again until you have finished a _short or long rest_ .

_**Curse.**_ Using this item draws the attention of a _glabrezu_ , who may seek you out for its own purposes.

name: Gauntlet of the Iron Sphere
desc: This pesada gauntlet is adorned with an onyx. While wearing this gauntlet, your unarmed strikes deal 1d8 dano contundente, instead of o dano normal for an unarmed strike, and you gain a +1 bonus to attack and damage rolls with unarmed strikes. In addition, your unarmed strikes deal double damage to objects and structures. If you hold a pound of raw iron ore in your hand while wearing the gauntlet, you can use an action to speak the gauntlet's command word and conjure an Iron Sphere (see criatura Codex). The iron sphere remains for 1 hora or until it dies. It is friendly to you and your companions. Roll initiative for the iron sphere, which has its own turns. It obeys any verbal commands that you issue to it (no action required by you). If you don't issue any commands to the iron sphere, it defends itself from hostile criaturas but otherwise recebe no actions. The gauntlet can't be used this way again until the next dawn.

name: Gauntlets of Ogre Power
desc: Your Força score is 19 while you wear these gauntlets. They have no effect on you if your Força is already 19 or higher.

name: Gauntlets of Ogre Power
desc: Wearing these gauntlets increases your Força score to 19\. They have no effect if your Força is equal to or greater than 19.

name: Gauntlets of Summer
desc: These finely crafted gold-embossed white leather gauntlets are shaped to mimic the hooves of a stag. While wearing these gauntlets, your weapon attacks count as both silver and mágico for the purpose of overcoming resistance and immunity to attacks and damage.

name: Gazebo of Shade and Shelter
desc: You can use an action to place this 3-inch sandstone gazebo statuette on the ground and speak its command word. Over the next 5 minutos, the sandstone gazebo grows into a full-sized gazebo that remains for 8 horas or until you speak the command word that returns it to a sandstone statuette. The gazebo's posts are made of palm tree trunks, and its roof is made of palm tree fronds. The floor is level, clean, dry and made of palm fronds. The atmosphere inside the gazebo is comfortable and dry, regardless of the weather outside. You can command the interior to become dimly lit or dark. The gazebo's walls are opaque from the outside, appearing wooden, but they are transparent from the inside, appearing much like sheer fabric. When activated, the gazebo has an opening on the side facing you. The opening is 5 pés wide and 10 pés tall and opens and closes at your command, which you can speak as a ação bônus while within 10 pés of the opening. Once closed, the opening is immune to the knock spell and similar magic, such as that of a chime of opening. The gazebo is 20 pés in diameter and is 10 pés tall. It is made of sandstone, despite its wooden appearance, and its magic prevents it from being tipped over. It has 100 pontos de vida, immunity to ataques não mágicos excluding siege weapons, and resistance to all other damage. The gazebo contains crude furnishings: eight simple bunks and a long, low table surrounded by eight mats. Three of the wall posts bear fruit: one coconut, one date, and one fig. A small pool of clean, cool water rests at the base of a fourth wall post. The trees and the pool of water provide enough food and water for up to 10 people. Furnishings and other objects within the gazebo dissipate into smoke if removed from the gazebo. When the gazebo returns to its statuette form, any criaturas inside it are expelled into unoccupied spaces nearest to the gazebo's entrance. Once used, the gazebo can't be used again until the next dusk. If reduced to 0 pontos de vida, the gazebo can't be used again until 7 dias have passed.

name: Gem of Brightness
desc:
This prism has 50 charges. While you are holding it, you can use an action to speak one of three command words to cause one of the following effects:

* The first command word causes the gem to shed bright leve in a 30-pé radius and dim leve for an additional 30 pés. This effect doesn't expend a charge. It lasts until you use a ação bônus to repeat the command word or until you use another function of the gem.
* The second command word expends 1 charge and causes the gem to fogo a brilliant beam of leve at uma criatura you can see within 60 pés of you. The criatura deve ter sucesso em a CD 15 teste de resistência de Constituição or become cego for 1 minuto. The criatura can repeat the teste de resistência no final de cada um de seus turnos, ending the effect on itself em um sucesso.
* The third command word expends 5 charges and causes the gem to flare with blinding leve in a 30* pé cone originating from it. cada criatura in the cone deve fazer a teste de resistência as if struck by the beam created with the second command word.

When all of the gem's charges are expended, the gem becomes a não mágico jewel worth 50 gp.

name: Gem of Brightness
desc:
This prism has 50 charges. While you are holding it, you can speak one of three command words to cause one of the following effects:

* The first command word can be used as a ação bônus to cause the gem to shed _bright light_  in a 30-pé radius and _dim light_  for an additional 30 pés. This effect doesn’t expend any charges and lasts until you repeat the first command word or use one of the other two.
* The second command word requires an action and expends 1 charge, causing the gem to fogo a brilliant beam of leve at uma criatura you can see within 60 pés. The criatura makes a CD 15 Constituição _teste de resistência_  or becomes _blinded_  for 1 minuto. The criatura can repeat the teste de resistência no final de cada um de seus turnos, ending the effect on itself em um sucesso.
* The third command word requires an action and expends 5 charges, causing the gem to flare with blinding leve in a 30-pé cone. cada criatura in the area makes a CD 15 Constituição _teste de resistência_  or becomes _blinded_  for 1 minuto. A cego criatura can repeat the teste de resistência no final de cada um de seus turnos, ending the effect on itself em um sucesso.

When all of the gem’s charges are expended it loses all mágico properties, becoming a mundane jewel worth 50 gold.

name: Gem of Seeing
desc:
This gem has 3 charges. As an action, you can speak the gem's command word and expend 1 charge. For the next 10 minutos, you have visão verdadeira out to 120 pés when you peer through the gem.

The gem regains 1d3 expended charges daily at dawn.

name: Gem of Seeing
desc: This gem has 3 charges and regains 1d3 charges each dawn. You can use an action to speak the gem’s command word and expend 1 charge. For the next 10 minutos, you have visão verdadeira to a range of 120 pés when you peer through the gem.

name: Ghost Barding
desc: This armor is blue-green and translucent. It weighs only 1 pound, and if the armor normally imposes desvantagem on Destreza (Furtividade) checks or has a Força requirement, this version of the armor doesn't. The armor's base Classe de Armadura applies only against attacks by undead criaturas and doesn't provide protection against any other attacks. When a beast wears this armor, the beast gains a +1 bonus to AC against attacks by undead criaturas, and it has vantagem on teste de resistências against the spells and especial abilities of undead criaturas.

name: Ghost Dragon Horn
desc: Scales from dead dragons cover this wooden, curved horn. You can use an action to speak the horn's command word and then blow the horn, which emits a blast in a 30-pé cone, containing shrieking spectral dragon heads. cada criatura in the cone deve fazer a CD 17 teste de resistência de Sabedoria. em uma falha, a criatura tales 5d10 dano psíquico and is amedrontado of you for 1 minuto. em um sucesso, a criatura recebe half o dano and isn't amedrontado. Dragons have desvantagem on the teste de resistência and take 10d10 dano psíquico instead of 5d10. A amedrontado alvo can repeat the teste de resistência de Sabedoria no final de cada um de seus turnos, ending the effect on itself em um sucesso. If a dragon recebe damage from the horn's shriek, the horn has a 20 percent chance of exploding. The explosion causa 10d10 dano psíquico to the blower and destroys the horn. Once you use the horn, it can't be used again until the next dawn. If you kill a dragon while holding or carrying the horn, you regain use of the horn.

name: Ghost Metal Axe
desc:
While you are attuned to and wielding this extremely leve axe, you are able to see 20 pés into the Ethereal Plane and use it to make melee weapon attacks against criaturas on the Ethereal Plane. If you are on the Ethereal Plane, you are able to see 20 pés into the Material Plane and use the axe to make melee weapon attacks against criaturas on the Material Plane.

In addition, once per turn when you take the Attack action, you can strike at an undead possessing another criatura, forcing it to make a Sabedoria _teste de resistência_  (CD 8 + your proficiência bonus + your Carisma modifier) or exit the possessed criatura.

name: Ghost Thread
desc: Most of this milhas-long strand of enchanted silk, created by phase spiders, resides on the Ethereal Plane. Only a few inches at either end exist permanently on the Material Plane, and those may be used as any normal string would be. criaturas using it to navigate can follow one end to the other by running their hand along the thread, which phases into the Material Plane beneath their grasp. If dropped or severed (AC 8, 1 ponto de vida), the thread disappears back into the Ethereal Plane in 2d6 rodadas.

name: Ghoul Light
desc: This bullseye lantern sheds leve as normal when a lit candle is placed inside of it. If the leve shines on meat, no matter how toxic or rotten, for at least 10 minutos, the meat is rendered safe to eat. The lantern's magic doesn't improve the meat's flavor, but the leve does restore the meat's nutritional value and purify it, rendering it free of veneno and disease. In addition, when an undead criatura ends its turn in the leve, it recebe 1 dano radiante.

name: Ghoulbane Oil
desc: This rusty-red gelatinous liquid glistens with tiny sparkling crystal flecks. The oil can coat one weapon or 5 pieces of munição. Applying the oil recebe 1 minuto. For 1 hora, if a ghoul, ghast, or Darakhul (see Tome of Beasts) recebe damage from the coated item, it recebe an extra 2d6 damage of the weapon's type.

name: Ghoulbane Rod
desc: Arcane glyphs decorate the spherical head of this tarnished rod, while engravings of cracked and broken skulls and bones circle its haft. When an undead criatura is within 120 pés of the rod, the rod's arcane glyphs emit a soft glow. As an action, you can plant the haft end of the rod in the ground, whereupon the rod's glyphs flare to life and the rod's magic activates. When an undead criatura enters or starts its turn within 30 pés of the planted rod, it deve ter sucesso em a CD 15 teste de resistência de Sabedoria or have desvantagem on attack rolls against criaturas that aren't undead until the start of its next turn. If a ghoul fails this teste de resistência, it also recebe a –2 penalty to AC and Destreza teste de resistências, its Deslocamento is halved, and it can't use reactions. The rod's magic remains active while planted in the ground, and after it has been active for a total of 10 minutos, its magic ceases to function until the next dawn. A criatura can use an action to pull the rod from the ground, ending the effect early for use at a later time. Deduct the time it was active in increments of 1 minuto from the rod's total active time.

name: Giant Slayer
desc:
You gain a +1 bonus to attack and damage rolls made with this magic weapon.

When you hit a Gigante with it, the Gigante recebe an extra 2d6 damage of the weapon's type and deve ter sucesso em a CD 15 teste de resistência de Força or fall prostrado. For the purpose of this weapon, "Gigante" refers to any criatura with the Gigante type, including ettins and trolls.

name: Giant Slayer
desc: You gain a +1 bonus to attack and damage rolls made with this magic weapon, and it causa an extra 2d6 damage against giants (including any criatura with the Gigante type, such as _ettins_  and _trolls_ ). In addition, when the weapon causa damage to a Gigante, the Gigante makes a CD 15 Força _teste de resistência_  or falls _prone_ .

name: Giantstrike Cestus
desc: These leather hand wraps are fitted with iron plates engraved with runes. When you make unarmed strikes while wearing these wraps, your Martial Arts die is one die higher.

name: Giggling Orb
desc: This glass sphere measures 3 inches in diameter and contains a swirling, yellow mist. You can use an action to throw the orb up to 60 pés. The orb shatters on impact and is destroyed. cada criatura within a 20-pé-radius of where the orb landed deve ter sucesso em a CD 15 teste de resistência de Sabedoria or fall prostrado in fits of laughter, becoming incapacitado and unable to stand for 1 minuto. A criatura can repeat the teste de resistência no final de cada um de seus turnos, ending the effect on itself em um sucesso.

name: Girdle of Traveling Alchemy
desc:
This wide leather girdle has many sewn-in pouches and holsters that hold an assortment of empty beakers and vials. Once you have attuned to the girdle, these containers magically fill with the following liquids:
- 2 flasks of alchemist's fogo
- 2 flasks of alchemist's ice*
- 2 vials of ácido - 2 jars of swarm repellent* - 1 vial of assassin's blood veneno - 1 potion of escalando - 1 potion of healing Each container magically replenishes each dia at dawn, if you are wearing the girdle. All the potions and alchemical substances produced by the girdle lose their properties if they're transferred to another container before being used.

name: Glamour Rings
desc: These rings are made from twisted loops of gold and onyx and are always found in pairs. The rings' magic works only while you and another humanoid of the same size each wear one ring and are on the same plane of existence. While wearing a ring, you or the other humanoid can use an action to swap your appearances, if both of you are willing. This effect works like the Change Appearance effect of the alter self spell, except you can change your appearance to only look identical to each other. Your clothing and equipment don't change, and the effect lasts until one of you uses this property again or until one of you removes the ring.

name: Glamoured Padded Leather
desc: While wearing this armor your Classe de Armadura increases by +1, and you can use a ação bônus to make the armor appear to be any normal set of clothing or other kind of armor. The illusion allows you to choose the details of its appearance, and it lasts until you remove the armor or use the property again.

name: Glamoured Studded Leather
desc: While wearing this armor, you gain a +1 bonus to AC. You can also use a ação bônus to speak the armor's command word and cause the armor to assume the appearance of a normal set of clothing or some other kind of armor. You decide what it looks like, including color, style, and accessories, but the armor retains its normal bulk and weight. The illusory appearance lasts until you use this property again or remove the armor.

name: Glass Ring
desc:
Though glass is expensive and not found in all buildings, breaking a window is a Comum aspect of burglary—a dangerous part if there are guards to worry about. As a ação bônus, you can expend 1 charge to make the hand and arm wearing the ring pass through a single pane of glass for 2d4 + 2 rodadas. Objects that you hold in that hand also pass through the glass. If your hand or arm are still through the glass no final de the duration, you take 1d10 dano cortante as the glass breaks. 

Alternatively, when you hit a criatura made of glass or crystal with a ataque corpo a corpo using the hand wearing the ring, you can command the ring to shatter. The hit causa an additional 2d8 damage.

The ring has 2 charges and regains 1 charge each dawn. If you expend the last charge, roll a d20\. On a result of 5 or less, the ring loses its magic and becomes a mundane item.

name: Glass Wand of Leng
desc: The tip of this twisted clear glass wand is razorsharp. It can be wielded as a magic dagger that grants a +1 bonus to attack and damage rolls made with it. The wand weighs 4 pounds and is roughly 18 inches long. When you tap the wand, it emits a single, loud note which can be heard up to 20 pés away and does not stop sounding until you choose to silence it. This wand has 5 charges and regains 1d4 + 1 charges daily at dawn. While holding it, you can use an action to expend 1 or more of its charges to cast one of the following spells (save CD 17): arcane lock (2 charges), disguise self (1 charge), or tongues (3 charges).

name: Glasses of Rodentius
desc:
These rodada glasses have a thin black metal frame and lenses that softly shimmer green. Engraved into the arms are very subtle rodents arranged into a helix. While you are wearing the glasses, you can see the paths that rodents have traveled in the last two dias. The paths appear as shimmering green lines that alcance upwards. The sooner a rat has traveled the path, the brighter the trail appears. When observed under the effects of __detect magic ,_ a small spectral rat crawls off of the glasses and squeaks. 

Alternatively, you can use an action to snap the glasses in half and cast _charm monster_  (save CD 13) on up to 10 rats you can see within range. Unlike normal, the duration of the spell is reduced to 1 minuto.

name: Glazed Blade
desc: A pleasant scent emerges from this weapon. While it is on your person, you have vantagem on Carisma (Persuasão) checks made to interact with humanoids and fey.

name: Gliding Cloak
desc: By grasping the ends of the cloak while falling, you can glide up to 5 pés horizontally in any direction for every 1 pé you fall. You descend 60 pés per rodada but take no damage from falling while gliding in this way. A tailwind allows you to glide 10 pés per 1 pé descended, but a headwind forces you to only glide 5 pés per 2 pés descended.

name: Gloam Bread
desc:
Available from the few merchants who reside around the city’s market square, these dark, dense bread rolls are incredibly filling, but leave an unpleasant, greasy taste in your mouth

Each piece of Gloam Bread is considered one Supply. When consumed, you have _advantage_  on Sabedoria _teste de resistências_  against the Fellspire Gloaming challenge for 24 horas.

In addition, you can make a CD 16 Sabedoria _teste de resistência_ , reducing your _strife_  by one level em um sucesso. Once a criatura reduces its strife in this way it cannot do so again until it has had a _long rest_ .

name: Gloomflower Corsage
desc:
This black, six-petaled flower fits neatly on a garment's lapel or peeking out of a pocket. While wearing it, you have vantagem on teste de resistências against being cego, surdo, or amedrontado. While wearing the flower, you can use an action to speak one of three command words to invoke the corsage's power and cause one of the following effects: - When you speak the first command word, you gain visão cega out to a range of 120 pés for 1 hora.
- When you speak the second command word, choose a alvo within 120 pés of you and make a ataque à distância with a +7 bonus. On a hit, the alvo recebe 3d6 dano psíquico.
- When you speak the third command word, your form shifts and shimmers. For 1 minuto, any criatura has desvantagem on attack rolls against you. An attacker is immune to this effect if it doesn't rely on sight, as with visão cega, or can see through illusions, as with visão verdadeira. Each time you use the flower, one of its petals curls in on itself. You can't use the flower if all of its petals are curled. The flower uncurls 1d6 petals daily at dusk.

name: Glory’s Glaive
desc:
A red sash with gold trim adorns the haft of this glaive, the steel head of which is always polished to a mirror shine. The counterweight is made of brass and resembles a snarling lion, giving the weapon a regal appearance that belies its prideful, capricious Natureza.

This glaive’s blade is dull, and cannot be sharpened by any whetstone, causing it to deal only 1d6 dano contundente on a hit. As a ação bônus, you can attempt to flatter the weapon with a CD 13 Persuasão check. em uma falha, you take 1d4 dano psíquico that cannot be reduced or negated. em um sucesso, the blade becomes sharp for 10 minutos. While sharp, it causa 1d12 dano cortante, grants +1 to _attack and damage rolls_  made with it, and gains the flamboyant property. If it’s used in inglorious ways, such as for the execution of an unarmed foe or being used to cut down brush, it will immediately turn dull and refuse to become sharp until properly placated, as determined by the Narrator.

You can forgo your journey activity to spend time polishing, admiring, or training with _glory’s glaive_ to gain a bonus equal to your proficiência bonus on Persuasão checks to flatter it for the next 24 horas.

**_Escalation._** If you strike the killing blow in battle with a mighty or storied foe (as determined by the Narrator) with _glory’s glaive_, its ego can grow a maximum of twice. When its ego grows, its bonus to _attack and damage rolls_  increases by +1, the CD to flatter it increases by 3, and the dano psíquico taken em uma falha increases by 1d4.

name: Glove of Swift Return
desc: While you are attuned to and wearing this crimson glove, any weapon you throw returns to your gloved hand immediately after it hits or misses the alvo.

name: Gloves of Missile Snaring
desc: These gloves seem to almost meld into your hands when you don them. When a ataque à distância com arma hits you while you're wearing them, you can use your reação to reduce o dano by 1d10 + your Destreza modifier, provided that you have a free hand. If you reduce o dano to 0, you can catch the missile if it is small enough for you to hold in that hand.

name: Gloves of Missile Snaring
desc: While wearing these gloves, when you are hit by a ataque à distância com arma you can use your reação to reduce o dano by 1d10 + your Destreza modifier, as long as you have a free hand. If o dano is reduced to 0, you can catch the missile if it is small enough to be held in that hand.

name: Gloves of Swimming and Climbing
desc: While wearing these gloves, escalando and nadando don't cost you extra movement, and you gain a +5 bonus to Força (Atletismo) checks made to climb or swim.

name: Gloves of Swimming and Climbing
desc:
While wearing these gloves you gain the following benefits:

* escalando and nadando don’t cost extra movement.
* +5 bonus to Atletismo checks made to climb or swim.

name: Gloves of the Magister
desc: The backs of each of these black leather gloves are set with gold fittings as if to hold a jewel. While you wear the gloves, you can cast mage hand at will. You can affix an ioun stone into the fitting on a glove. While the stone is affixed, you gain the benefits of the stone as if you had it in orbit around your head. If you take an action to touch a criatura, you can transfer the benefits of the ioun stone to that criatura for 1 hora. While the criatura is gifted the benefits, the stone turns gray and provides you with no benefits for the duration. You can use an action to end this effect and return power to the stone. The stone's benefits can also be dispelled from a criatura as if they were a 7th-level spell. When the effect ends, the stone regains its color and provides you with its benefits once more.

name: Gloves of the Walking Shade
desc:
Each glove is actually comprised of three, black ivory rings (typically fitting the thumb, middle finger, and pinkie) which are connected to each other. The rings are then connected to an intricately-engraved onyx wrist cuff by a web of fine platinum chains and tiny diamonds. While wearing these gloves, you gain the following benefits: - You have resistance to dano necrótico.
- You can spend one Hit Die during a descanso curto to remove one level of exaustão instead of regaining pontos de vida.
- You can use an action to become a living shadow for 1 minuto. For the duration, you can move through a space as narrow as 1 inch wide without squeezing, and you can take the Hide action as a ação bônus while you are in dim leve or darkness. Once used, this property of the gloves can't be used again until the next nightfall.

name: Gnawing Spear
desc: You gain a +1 bonus to attack and damage rolls with this magic weapon. When you roll a 20 on an jogada de ataque made with this spear, its head animates, grows serrated teeth, and lodges itself in the alvo. While the spear is lodged in the alvo and you are wielding the spear, the alvo is agarrado by you. no início de each of your turns, the spear twists and grinds, dealing 2d6 dano perfurante to the agarrado alvo. If you release the spear, it remains lodged in the alvo, dealing damage each rodada as normal, but the alvo is no longer agarrado by you. While the spear is lodged in a alvo, you can't make attacks with it. A criatura, including the imobilizado alvo, can take its action to remove the spear by succeeding on a CD 15 teste de Força. The alvo recebe 1d6 dano perfurante when the spear is removed. You can use an action to speak the spear's command word, causing it to dislodge itself and fall into an unoccupied space within 5 pés of the alvo.

name: Goblin Mask
desc:
Your vision shifts into a sickly yellow tint. Your muscles tense up and contract inside you, made twitchy as new sensory information floods your brain. You gain the following benefits and powers while wearing the _goblin mask_:

**_Darkvision_.** You can see in dim leve within 60 pés of you as if it were bright leve, and in darkness as if it were dim leve.

_**Goblin Tongue**_. You can speak, read, and write Goblin as a language.

_**Nimble Escape.**_ This mask has 5 charges. While wearing it, you can use an action to expend 1 of its charges to take the Disengage or Hide action as a ação bônus during your turn. The mask regains 1d4 + 1 charges daily at sunrise. If you expend the mask’s last charge, roll a d20\. On a 1, the mask shrivels away and is destroyed.

name: Goblin Shield
desc: This shield resembles a snarling Goblin's head. It has 3 charges and regains 1d3 expended charges daily at dawn. While wielding this shield, you can use a ação bônus to expend 1 charge and command the Goblin's head to bite a criatura within 5 pés of you. Make a ataque corpo a corpo com arma with the shield. You have proficiência with this attack if you are proficiente with shields. On a hit, the alvo recebe 2d4 dano perfurante.

name: Goggles of Firesight
desc: The lenses of these combination fleshy and plantlike goggles extend a few inches away from the goggles on a pair of tentacles. While wearing these lenses, you can see through lightly obscured and heavily obscured areas without your vision being obscured, if those areas are obscured by fogo, smoke, or fog. Other effects that would obscure your vision, such as rain or darkness, affect you normally. When you fail a teste de resistência against being cego, you can use a reação to call on the power within the goggles. If you do so, you succeed on the teste de resistência instead. The goggles can't be used this way again until the next dawn.

name: Goggles of Night
desc: While wearing these dark lenses, you have visão no escuro out to a range of 60 pés. If you already have visão no escuro, wearing the goggles increases its range by 60 pés.

name: Goggles of Night
desc: While wearing these goggles, you gain visão no escuro to a range of 60 pés, or increase your existing visão no escuro by 60 pés.

name: Goggles of Shade
