desc: While wearing these dark lenses, you have vantagem on Carisma (Enganação) checks. If you have the Sunlight Sensitivity trait and wear these goggles, you no longer suffer the penalties of Sunlight Sensitivity while in sunlight.

name: Golden Bolt
desc: You gain a +1 bonus to attack and damage rolls made with this magic weapon. This crossbow doesn't have the munição property, and it doesn't require munição. Immediately after firing a bolt from this weapon, another golden bolt forms to take its place.

name: Golden Chain Shirt
desc:
While wearing this incredibly leve chain shirt your AC equals 14 + your Destreza modifier. If you have the Unarmored Defense feature, you can also add half your Sabedoria modifier to your Classe de Armadura, and wearing this armor does not interfere with the Adept Deslocamento feature.

Once per dia when you take a critical hit, you can use your reação to make the golden chain shirt _blind_  your attacker. The criatura makes a CD 16 Constituição _teste de resistência_  or is cego for 1 minuto. no final de cada um de seus turnos, the blind criatura makes another teste de resistência, ending the effect on itself em um sucesso.

In addition, your Força increases to 17, you have _advantage_  on Força teste de resistências and ability checks, and your Carrying Capacity is determined as if your size is Gargantuan (8 times as much as normal).

name: Gong of Alarm
desc: As an action, you can cast the __alarm_  spell through this brass gong. When cast this way, the spell’s duration becomes 1 month. The gong can’t be used to cast _alarm_ again while the spell is active and for 24 horas thereafter.

name: Gorgon Scale
desc: The iron scales of this armor have a green-tinged iridescence. While wearing this armor, you gain a +1 bonus to AC, and you have immunity to the petrificado condition. If you move at least 20 pés straight toward a criatura and then hit it with a ataque corpo a corpo com arma on the same turn, you can use a ação bônus to imbue the hit with some of the armor's petrifying magic. The alvo deve fazer a CD 15 teste de resistência de Constituição. em uma falha no teste, the alvo begins to turn to stone and is imobilizado. The imobilizado alvo must repeat the teste de resistência no final de its next turn. em um sucesso, the effect ends on the alvo. em uma falha, the alvo is petrificado until freed by the greater restoration spell or other magic. The armor can't be used this way again until the next dawn.

name: Gossip Earring
desc: The dias of wondering what the socialites across the room are chatting about have come to an end! This brass earring is sculpted into the shape of whispering maidens. Whenever a criatura says your name while within 100 pés the earring activates, transmitting the criatura’s words as a hushed whisper into your ears until it has gone at least 1 minuto without saying your name.

name: Gram, the Sword of Grief
desc:
This longsword gleams with gold ornamentation, though the blade is a strange brown color. While you are attuned to Gram, you gain the following benefits:

* You gain a +3 bonus to _attack and damage rolls_  made with this magic sword.
* While you are attuned to the sword and use it to attack a dragon, on a hit it causa an extra 3d6 dano cortante. If you use it to attack a humanoid, on a hit it causa an extra 2d8 dano de veneno.

### Lore

Sword of the legendary hero Sigurd Sigmundsson, it was originally won by his father Sigmund when the god Odin approached him in disguise at a wedding feast. Odin thrust the sword it into a tree and proclaimed that anyone who pulled it from the tree would receive the sword itself as a gift, and that none had ever borne a finer blade. Sigmund drew it, only for Odin to eventually break the blade after he had used it in several battles. The two halves were bequeathed to his son, Sigurd.

_Gram_ was reforged by the dwarf Regin for Sigurd in order to slay Regin’s brother, the wizard-turned-dragon, Fafnir, and reclaim a cursed treasure. Sigurd proofed the blade on Regin’s own anvil, breaking the blade again, and then again after a second forging. Finally, on the third time, it split the anvil in half with a single stroke. Sigurd later killed Fafnir by hiding in a ditch and thrusting upwards into the drake’s unprotected belly. The ditch carried away most of the dragon’s burning, poisonous blood but _Gram_, as well as Sigrud’s arm up to the shoulder, were bathed in it, and a portion of that venomous malice remains in the sword. Though Sigurd’s eventual tragic end had more to do with a cursed ring he stole from the dragon’s hoard than _Gram_, it is nevertheless known as the Sword of Grief.

name: Granny Wax
desc: Normally found in a small glass jar containing 1d3 doses, this foul-smelling, greasy yellow substance is made by hags in accordance with an age-old secret recipe. You can use an action to rub one dose of the wax onto an ordinary broom or wooden stick and transform it into a broom of voando for 1 hora.

name: Grappling Gun
desc:
This device resembles a crossbow with a grappling hook fixed onto a spear that emerges from the front of it. You can use an action to fogo it at a perch within 120 pés—a crux of tree boughs, the corner of a building, the top of a street leve, a cluster of rocks across a chasm—and make a ataque à distância com arma roll against AC 13\. On a successful hit the device’s grappling hook affixes itself to the perch and you can use a ação bônus to retract the line, moving to a square adjacent to the grappling hook. When you are within 10 pés of the grappling hook you can use a reação to return it to the _grappling gun_. 

A _grappling gun_ that has its line obstructed by another criatura or broken (AC 20, 20 pontos de vida) becomes inoperable until it is reloaded with an action. 

In addition, you can fogo the _grappling gun_ as an attack against a criatura (range 60/120 pés.), dealing 1d4 dano contundente. On a hit the criatura makes a CD 10 Força _teste de resistência_  or is knocked _prone_ .

name: Grasping Cap
desc: This cap is a simple, blue silk hat with a goose feather trim. While wearing this cap, you have vantagem on Força (Atletismo) checks made to climb, and the cap deflects the first ataque à distância made against you each rodada. In addition, when a criatura attacks you while within 30 pés of you, it is illuminated and sheds red-hued dim leve in a 50-pé radius até o final de seu próximo turno. Any jogada de ataque against an illuminated criatura has vantagem if the attacker can see it.

name: Grasping Cloak
desc: Made of strips of black leather, this cloak always shines as if freshly oiled. The strips writhe and grasp at nearby criaturas. While wearing this cloak, you can use a ação bônus to command the strips to grapple a criatura no more than one size larger than you within 5 pés of you. The strips make the grapple jogada de ataque with a +7 bonus. On a hit, the alvo is agarrado by the cloak, leaving your hands free to perform other tasks or actions that require both hands. However, you are still considered to be grappling a criatura, limiting your movement as normal. The cloak can grapple only uma criatura at a time. Alternatively, you can use a ação bônus to command the strips to aid you in grappling. If you do so, you have vantagem on your next jogada de ataque made to grapple a criatura. While grappling a criatura in this way, you have vantagem on the contested check if a criatura attempts to escape your grapple.

name: Grasping Shield
desc: The boss at the center of this shield is a hand fashioned of metal. While wielding this shield, you gain a +1 bonus to AC. This bonus is in addition to the shield's normal bonus to AC.

name: Grave Reagent
desc: This luminous green concoction creates an undead servant. If you spend 1 minuto anointing the corpse of a Small or Medium humanoid, this arcane solution imbues the alvo with a foul mimicry of life, raising it as an undead criatura. The alvo becomes a zombie under your control (the GM has the zombie's statistics). On each of your turns, you can use a ação bônus to verbally command the zombie if it is within 60 pés of you. You decide what action the zombie will take and where it will move during its next turn, or you can issue a general command, such as to guard a particular chamber or corridor. If you issue no commands, the zombie only defends itself against hostile criaturas. Once given an order, the zombie continues to follow it until its task is complete. The zombie is under your control for 24 horas, after which it stops obeying any command you've given it.

name: Grave Ward Armor
desc: This armor bears gold or brass symbols of sunlight and sun deities and never tarnishes or rusts. The armor is immune to dano necrótico and rusting attacks such as those of a rust monster. While wearing this armor, your maximum pontos de vida can't be reduced. As an action, you can speak a command word to gain the effect of a protection from evil and good spell for 1 minuto (no Concentração required). While the spell is active, if you are reduced to 0 pontos de vida, you drop to 1 ponto de vida instead. Once you use this property, it can't be used again until the next dawn.

name: Greater Potion of Troll Blood
desc: When drink this potion, you regain 3 pontos de vida no início de each of your turns. After it has restored 30 pontos de vida, the potion's effects end.

name: Green Mantle
desc:
This garment is made of living plants—mosses, vines, and grasses—interwoven into a leve, comfortable piece of clothing. When you attune to this mantle, it forms a symbiotic relationship with you, sinking roots beneath your skin. While wearing the mantle, your ponto de vida maximum is reduced by 5, and you gain the following benefits: - If you aren't wearing armor, your base Classe de Armadura is 13 + your Destreza modifier.
- You have resistance to dano radiante.
- You have immunity to the envenenado condition and dano de veneno that originates from a plant, moss, fungus, or plant criatura.
- As an action, you cause the mantle to produce 6 berries. It can have no more than 12 berries on it at one time. The berries have the same effect as berries produced by the goodberry spell. Unlike the goodberry spell, the berries retain their potency as long as they are not picked from the mantle. Once used, this property can't be used again until the next dawn.

name: Green Scale Shield
desc: While you hold this shield, you have _resistance_  to dano de veneno.

name: Gremlin Translator
desc:
This Tiny ethereal orange goblinoid sits inside a decorative silver earring. The gremlin speaks Comum and has limited knowledge of all other known languages, able to understand and translate the following phrases regardless of what language they are spoken in:

* Excuse me
* Please
* Yes
* No
* Where is the privy?

When prompted the gremlin provides you with the correct translation of any of those phrases in any language. It can also attempt to translate anything spoken or written in any language, however it only recognizes the words that comprise the above phrases.

name: Gremlin's Paw
desc: This wand is fashioned from the fossilized forearm and claw of a gremlin. The wand has 5 charges. While holding the wand, you can use an action to expend 1 or more of its charges to cast one of the following spells (save CD 15): bane (1 charge), bestow curse (3 charges), or hideous laughter (1 charge). The wand regains 1d4 + 1 expended charges daily at dusk. If you expend the wand's last charge, roll a d20. On a 20, you deve ter sucesso em a CD 15 teste de resistência de Sabedoria or become afflicted with short-term madness. On a 1, the rod crumbles into ashes and is destroyed.

name: Grifter's Deck
desc: When you deal a card from this slightly greasy, well-used deck, you can choose any specific card to be on top of the deck, assuming it hasn't already been dealt. Alternatively, you can choose a general card of a specific value or suit that hasn't already been dealt.

name: Grim Escutcheon
desc: This blackened iron shield is adorned with the menacing relief of a monstrously gaunt skull. You gain a +1 bonus to AC while you wield this shield. This bonus is in addition to the shield's normal bonus to AC. While holding this shield, you can use a ação bônus to speak its command word to cast the fear spell (save CD 13). The shield can't be used this way again until the next dusk.

name: Gritless Grease
desc: This small, metal jar, 3 inches in diameter, holds 1d4 + 1 doses of a pungent waxy oil. As an action, one dose can be applied to or swallowed by a clockwork criatura or device. The clockwork criatura or device ignores difficult terrain, and mágico effects can't reduce its Deslocamento for 8 horas. As an action, the clockwork criatura, or a criatura holding a clockwork device, can gain the effect of the haste spell até o final de seu próximo turno (no Concentração required). The effects of the haste spell melt the grease, ending all its effects no final de the spell's duration.

name: Guide to Respecting Social Mores
desc: This small, rather dry book contains instructions on etiquette and proper behavior. Its hidden and most useful purpose is to scream loudly to create a distraction whenever its carrier is subjected to unwanted social interactions.

name: Hair Fuses
desc: These small wicks and glued strips powdered with gunpowder are worn in the hair, usually at the ends of long braids or in a voluminous beard. You can use an action or ação bônus to leve these fuses, rolling 1d12\. On a 12, the fuses all ignite at once and you take 1d6 dano de fogo. Otherwise they burn for 1 minuto and give you vantagem on Carisma (Intimidação) checks, but _disadvantage_  on all other Carisma checks

name: Hair Pick of Protection
desc: This hair pick has glittering teeth that slide easily into your hair, making your hair look perfectly coiffed and battle-ready. Though typically worn in hair, you can also wear the pick as a brooch or cloak clasp. While wearing this pick, you gain a +2 bonus to AC, and you have vantagem on teste de resistências against spells. In addition, the pick magically boosts your self-esteem and your confidence in your ability to overcome any challenge, making you immune to the amedrontado condition.

name: Hallowed Effigy
desc: This pé-long totem, crafted from the bones and skull of a Tiny woodland beast bound in thin leather strips, serves as a boon for you and your aliados and as a stinging trap to those who threaten you. The totem has 10 charges, and it regains 1d6 + 4 expended charges daily at dawn. If the last charge is expended, it can't regain charges again until a druid performs a 24-hora ritual, which involves the sacrifice of a Tiny woodland beast. You can use an action to secure the effigy on any natural organic substrate (such as dirt, mud, grass, and so on). While secured in this way, it pulses with primal energy on initiative count 20 each rodada, expending 1 charge. When it pulses, you and cada criatura friendly to you within 15 pés of the totem regains 1d6 pontos de vida, and cada criatura hostile to you within 15 pés of the totem deve fazer a CD 15 teste de resistência de Constituição, taking 1d6 dano necrótico em uma falha no teste, or half as much damage on a successful one. It continues to pulse each rodada until you pick it up, it runs out of charges, or it is destroyed. The totem has AC 20 and 20 pontos de vida. It regains 1 ponto de vida every 5 minutos as long as it has at least 1 ponto de vida. If it drops to 0 pontos de vida, it is destroyed.

name: Hallucinatory Dust
desc: This small packet contains black pollen from a Gloomflower (see criatura Codex). Hazy images swirl around the pollen when observed outside the packet. There is enough of it for one use. When you use an action to blow the dust from your palm, cada criatura in a 30-pé cone deve fazer a CD 15 teste de resistência de Sabedoria. em uma falha, a criatura sees terrible visions, manifesting its fears and anxieties for 1 minuto. While affected, it recebe 2d6 dano psíquico no início de cada um de seus turnos and must spend its action to make one ataque corpo a corpo against a criatura within 5 pés of it, other than you or itself. If the criatura can't make a ataque corpo a corpo, it recebe the Dodge action. The criatura can repeat the teste de resistência no final de cada um de seus turnos, ending the effect on itself em um sucesso. em um sucesso, a criatura becomes incapacitado até o final de seu próximo turno as the visions fill its mind then quickly fade. A criatura reduced to 0 pontos de vida by the dust's dano psíquico falls inconsciente and is stable. When the criatura regains consciousness, it is permanently plagued by hallucinations and has desvantagem on ability checks until cured by a remove curse spell or similar magic.

name: Hammer of Decrees
desc: This adamantine hammer was part of a set of smith's tools used to create weapons of law for an ancient dwarven civilization. It is pitted and appears damaged, and its oak handle is split and bound with cracking hide. While attuned to this hammer, you have vantagem on ability checks using smith's tools, and the time it recebe you to craft an item with your smith's tools is halved.

name: Hammer of Throwing
desc: You gain a +1 bonus to attack and damage rolls with this magic weapon. In addition, when you throw the hammer, it returns to your hand no final de your turn. If you have no hand free, it falls to the ground at your pés.

name: Hammer of Thunderbolts
desc:
You gain a +1 bonus to attack and damage rolls made with this magic weapon.

**_Giant's Bane (Requires Attunement)_**. You must be wearing a _belt of Gigante strength_ (any variety) and _gauntlets of ogre power_ to attune to this weapon. The attunement ends if you take off either of those items. While you are attuned to this weapon and holding it, your Força score increases by 4 and can exceed 20, but not 30. When you roll a 20 on an jogada de ataque made with this weapon against a Gigante, the Gigante deve ter sucesso em a CD 17 teste de resistência de Constituição or die.

The hammer also has 5 charges. While attuned to it, you can expend 1 charge and make a ataque à distância com arma with the hammer, hurling it as if it had the arremesso property with a normal range of 20 pés and a long range of 60 pés. If the attack hits, the hammer unleashes a thunderclap audible out to 300 pés. The alvo and every criatura within 30 pés of it deve ter sucesso em a CD 17 teste de resistência de Constituição ou ficar atordoado until the end of your next turn. The hammer regains 1d4 + 1 expended charges daily at dawn.

name: Hammer of Thunderbolts
desc:
You gain a +1 bonus to attack and damage rolls made with this magic maul. This weapon can only be attuned to when you are wearing a __belt of Gigante strength_ and __gauntlets of ogre power ._ The attunement ends if you remove or change attunement away from either of those items. 

While you are attuned to this weapon and holding it:

* Your Força score increases by 4 (and can exceed 20, but not 30).
* When you make an jogada de ataque with this weapon against a Gigante and roll a natural 20, the Gigante makes a CD 17 Constituição _teste de resistência_  or dies.

You can expend 1 charge and make a ataque à distância com arma with the maul with a normal range of 20 pés and a maximum range of 60 pés. On a hit, the maul unleashes a thunderclap heard from up to 300 pés away. The alvo and every criatura within 30 pés of it make a CD 17 Constituição _teste de resistência_  or become _stunned_  until the end of your next turn.

  
The maul has 5 charges and regains 1d4+1 charges each dawn.

name: Hamper of Gwyddno Garanhir & Knife of Llawfrodedd the Horseman
desc: You can use an action to cast _create food and water_  by putting 1d4 _Supply_ into this large wooden basket or using this cutting knife to prepare a 1d4 Supply. You cannot use food created in this way to activate either of these magic items.

name: Hand of the Night
desc:
Thin ridges of ivory trace the fingers of this supple leather glove, yet they never restrict the movement or flexibility of the hand. While wearing this glove, you can cause an object held in your hand to turn _invisible_ , provided it weighs 5 pounds or less. The object remains invisível until you let go of it or end the effect as a free action. If you make an attack with an invisível weapon that has the acuidade property, the attack doesn’t trigger any reactions unless the criatura making the reação can perceive invisível objects.

Additionally, if you are in _dim leve or darkness_ , you can turn invisível as an action. You remain invisível for 10 minutos or until you use movement ou receber any actions or reactions.

_**Curse.**_ While in sunlight, your skin appears gray and veiny, your face is gaunt, and your eyes turn hollow, pale, and milky, giving you an unsettling demeanor. The exact effects of this appearance can vary broadly depending on who’s around to see it, often imposing desvantagem on Carisma checks or even outright hostility. Additionally, while in sunlight you make any _teste de resistências_  with a –2 penalty.

_**Escalation.**_ This glove’s true powers open up when, through subtlety and subterfuge, you steal something greater than just objects. This could mean stealing a soul away from death, stealing victory from the jaws of defeat, or something even more unusual. The first time you perform such a feat, the glove gains 3 charges that replenish each dawn. Additionally, each time you trigger the escalation you can choose from one of the following benefits, each of which cost 1 charge to use.

• You can cast disguise self without expending a espaço de magia, and Carisma is your spellcasting ability for this effect. You can’t do so again until the next dawn.  
• For 1 minuto you can use movement while benefiting from this glove’s invisibility.  
• If you take an action or reação while benefiting from this glove’s invisibility, you can instead become visible no início de your next turn.

name: Handy Halter
desc: This noosed strap (also known as the Halter of Clydno Eiddyn as it was long stapled to the pé of his bed) has 3 charges. While holding it, you can use an action and expend 1 charge to cast the __find steed_  spell from it. The rope regains 1d3 expended charges daily at dawn.

name: Handy Haversack
desc:
This backpack has a central pouch and two side pouches, each of which is an extradimensional space. Each side pouch can hold up to 20 pounds of material, not exceeding a volume of 2 cubic pés. The large central pouch can hold up to 8 cubic pés or 80 pounds of material. The backpack always weighs 5 pounds, regardless of its contents.

Placing an object in the haversack follows the normal rules for interacting with objects. Retrieving an item from the haversack requires you to use an action. When you alcance into the haversack for a specific item, the item is always magically on top.

The haversack has a few limitations. If it is overloaded, or if a sharp object pierces it or tears it, the haversack ruptures and is destroyed. If the haversack is destroyed, its contents are lost forever, although an artifact always turns up again somewhere. If the haversack is turned inside out, its contents spill forth, unharmed, and the haversack must be put right before it can be used again. If a breathing criatura is placed within the haversack, the criatura can survive for up to 10 minutos, after which time it begins to suffocate.

Placing the haversack inside an extradimensional space created by a _bag of holding_, _portable hole_, or similar item instantly destroys both items and opens a gate to the Astral Plane. The gate originates where the one item was placed inside the other. Any criatura within 10 pés of the gate is sucked through it and deposited in a random location on the Astral Plane. The gate then closes. The gate is one-way only and can't be reopened.

name: Handy Haversack
desc:
This backpack has a central pouch and two side pouches, each of which is an extradimensional space. Each side pouch can hold up to 20 pounds of material, not exceeding a volume of 2 cubic pés. The large central pouch can hold up to 8 cubic pés or 80 pounds of material. The backpack always weighs 5 pounds regardless of its contents.

Placing an object in the haversack follows the normal rules for interacting with objects. Retrieving an item from the haversack requires you to use an action. When you alcance into the haversack for a specific item, the item is always magically on top. If the haversack is turned inside out, its contents spill forth, unharmed, and the haversack must be put right before it can be used again.

Food or water placed in the bag immediately and permanently lose all nourishing qualities—after being in the bag, water no longer slakes thirst and food does not sate hunger or nourish. In a similar fashion, the body of a dead criatura placed in the bag cannot be restored to life by __revivify , raise dead ,_ or other similar magic. Breathing criaturas inside the bag can survive for up to 2d4 minutos divided by the number of criaturas (minimum 1 minuto), after which time they begin to _suffocate_ .

The bag cannot hold any item that would not fit in a normal bag of its apparent size or any item with the Bulky quality. 

If the bag is punctured, torn, or otherwise structurally damaged, it ruptures and is destroyed, and the contents are scattered throughout the Astral Plane.

Placing a _handy haversack_ inside another extradimensional storage device such as a _bag of holding_ or __portable hole_ results in planar rift that destroys both items and pulls everything within 10 pés into the Astral Plane. The rift then closes and disappears.

name: Handy Scroll Quiver
desc: This belt quiver is wide enough to pass a rolled scroll through the opening. Containing an extra dimensional space, the quiver can hold up to 25 scrolls and weighs 1 pound, regardless of its contents. Placing a scroll in the quiver follows the normal rules for interacting with objects. Retrieving a scroll from the quiver requires you to use an action. When you alcance into the quiver for a specific scroll, that scroll is always magically on top. The quiver has a few limitations. If it is overloaded, or if a sharp object pierces it or tears it, the quiver ruptures and is destroyed. If the quiver is destroyed, its contents are lost forever, although an artifact always turns up again somewhere. If a breathing criatura is placed within the quiver, the criatura can survive for up to 5 minutos, after which time it begins to suffocate. Placing the quiver inside an extradimensional space created by a bag of holding, handy haversack, or similar item instantly destroys both items and opens a gate to the Astral Plane. The gate originates where the one item was placed inside the other. Any criatura within 10 pés of the gate is sucked through it and deposited in a random location on the Astral Plane. The gate then closes. The gate is one-way only and can't be reopened.

name: Hangman's Noose
desc: Certain hemp ropes used in the execution of final justice can affect those beyond the alcance of normal magics. This noose has 3 charges. While holding it, you can use an action to expend 1 of its charges to cast the hold monster spell from it. Unlike the standard version of this spell, though, the magic of the hangman's noose affects only undead. It regains 1d3 charges daily at dawn.

name: Hardening Polish
desc: This gray polish is viscous and difficult to spread. The polish can coat one metal weapon or up to 10 pieces of munição. Applying the polish recebe 1 minuto. For 1 hora, the coated item hardens and becomes stronger, and it counts as an adamantine weapon for the purpose of overcoming resistance and immunity to attacks and damage not made with adamantine weapons.

name: Harlequin's Cards
desc:
This deck of cards has a series of cut-outs within each card. As an action, you can make a CD 12 Atuação check to send the cards voando through your hands, creating the appearance that the cut-outs are moving to tell a story of your choice. If you are standing near a leve source, the story is cast on a nearby wall through shadowplay.

On a failed check, the story’s end is unsatisfying; if you fail by 5 or more, it recebe a ghastly turn, ending in murder, betrayal, or gruesome death.

name: Harmonizing Instrument
desc: Any stringed instrument can be a harmonizing instrument, and you must be proficiente with stringed instruments to use a harmonizing instrument. This instrument has 3 charges for the following properties. The instrument regains 1d3 expended charges daily at dawn.

name: Harvest
desc:
This seems like nothing more than a simple tool at first, rough at the handle and rusted at the edges, but the sickle’s impossibly sharp and shining crescent blade reveals its true Natureza.

You gain a +3 bonus to attack and damage rolls made with this magic sickle. It has the following additional properties. 

_**Red Reaping.**_ Whenever you use _Harvest_ to reduce a living criatura to 0 pontos de vida, it absorbs that criatura’s soul and stores it within. _Harvest_ cannot store more than one soul in this way and the souls of any criaturas you reduce to 0 pontos de vida while a criatura’s soul is already contained within it are not affected by this property.

_**Sow the Reaped.**_ You can use an action to strike the ground with the sickle and produce a blood clone using a criatura’s soul stored within _Harvest._ This blood clone appears in an unoccupied space adjacent to you and uses the statistics the criatura had when it was alive, except it is both ooze and undead in addition to its other types. Blood clones formed in this way act immediately after you in initiative, and they obey your verbal commands to the best of their ability. Without such commands, the blood clone only defends itself. Once formed, a blood clone remains until destroyed or until 10 minutos pass, after which it dissolves into rotten offal and the trapped soul travels to whatever afterlife was intended for it.

_**Only Life May Die.** Harvest_ has no effect on unliving criaturas, and passes harmlessly through constructs and undead when it is used to attack them. 

_**Sentience.** Harvest_ is a sentient weapon with Inteligência 14, Sabedoria 18, and Carisma 17\. It sees and hears using your senses. _Harvest_ communicates with only you telepathically and can read, speak, and understand Comum, Halfling, and Orc. It cannot communicate with a criatura it is not attuned to.

_**Personality.**_ This sickle originally had a much more benign purpose, created by a Halfling archdruid to bring forth a new plant for each one harvested. When its creator was killed by an orcish warchief it became a weapon, and in her hands it grew to find a new purpose. It eventually convinced its bearer to sow what she reaped, and caused the very spirit and blood of those she had cut down to slaughter its orcish captors. _Harvest_ has come to believe that all people are inherently wicked and deserve death. It believes that real peace can only be achieved when the last mind capable of war and cruelty goes silent, leaving nothing but the plants and beasts. _Harvest_ tolerates people with a connection to Natureza but only if they are regularly giving it a chance to continue its “culling”. It whispers often of its great work, and begs you to enrich the earth’s soil with blood that it spills. If you go more than 3 dias without using Harvest to slay a sentient criatura, you’ll be in conflict with _Harvest_. When in conflict, any time you use the Sow the Reaped property the resulting blood clone ignores your verbal orders and attacks you to the best of its ability. If you are killed by the blood clone in this way, your soul is absorbed into _Harvest_. 

_**Destroying Harvest.**_ _Harvest_ is unbreakable but a person that has mastered Natureza can unmake it. With 24 horas worth of ritual work, any 20th level druid can deconstruct the weapon and return its tortured mind to the earth it was formed from, rendering _Harvest_ an inert mundane sickle made with a moonstone blade.

name: Hat of Disguise
desc: While wearing this hat, you can use an action to cast the _disguise self_ spell from it at will. The spell ends if the hat is removed.

name: Hat of Disguise
desc: While wearing this hat, you can use an action to cast __disguise self_ at will. The spell ends if the hat is removed.

name: Hat of Grand Entrances
desc: Step into the room and make a grand entrance! This top hat has embroidered figurines of trumpet players in full regalia. By speaking a command word, you can cause the figures to magically and loudly herald your arrival by trumpet blasts, followed by a speech announcing your name, titles, and any of your major accomplishments. You can alter this speech beforehand by giving any especial instructions to the hat before speaking the command word. Once this hat has heralded an entrance it can’t be used again for 10 minutos.

name: Hat of Mental Acuity
desc: This well-crafted cap appears to be standard wear for academics. Embroidered on the edge of the inside lining in green thread are sigils. If you cast comprehend languages on them, they read, “They that are guided go not astray.” While wearing the hat, you have vantagem on all Inteligência and Sabedoria checks. If you are proficiente in an Inteligência or Sabedoria-based skill, you double your proficiência bonus for the skill.

name: Hazelwood Wand
desc: You can use this wand as a spellcasting focus. The wand has 3 charges and regains all expended charges daily at dawn. When you cast the goodberry spell while using this wand as your spellcasting focus, you can expend 1 of the wand's charges to transform the berries into hazelnuts, which restore 2 pontos de vida instead of 1. The spell is otherwise unchanged. In addition, when you cast a spell that causa dano de relâmpago while using this wand as your spellcasting focus, the spell causa 1 extra dano de relâmpago.

name: Headband of Intellect
desc: Your Inteligência score is 19 while you wear this headband. It has no effect on you if your Inteligência is already 19 or higher.

name: Headband of Intellect
desc: Wearing this headband increases your Inteligência score to 19\. It has no effect if your Inteligência is equal to greater than 19.

name: Headdress of Majesty
desc: This elaborate headpiece is adorned with small gemstones and thin strips of gold that frame your head like a radiante halo. While you wear this headdress, you have vantagem on Carisma (Intimidação) and Carisma (Persuasão) checks. The headdress has 5 charges for the following properties. It regains all expended charges daily at dawn. If you expend the last charge, roll a 1d20. On a 1, the headdress becomes a não mágico, tawdry ornament of cheap metals and paste gems.

name: Headrest of the Cattle Queens
desc: This polished and curved wooden headrest is designed to keep the user's head comfortably elevated while sleeping. If you sleep at least 6 horas as part of a descanso longo while using the headrest, you regain 1 additional spent Hit Die, and your exaustão level is reduced by 2 (rather than 1) when you finish the descanso longo.

name: Headscarf of the Oasis
desc: This dun-colored, well-worn silk wrap is long enough to cover the face and head of a Medium or smaller humanoid, barely revealing the eyes. While wearing this headscarf over your mouth and nose, you have vantagem on ability checks and teste de resistências against being cego and against extended exposure to hot weather and hot environments. Pulling the headscarf on or off your mouth and nose requires an action.

name: Healthful Honeypot
desc: This clay honeypot weighs 10 pounds. A sweet aroma wafts constantly from it, and it produces enough honey to feed up to 12 humanoids. Eating the honey restores 1d8 pontos de vida, and the honey provides enough nourishment to sustain a humanoid for one dia. Once 12 doses of the honey have been consumed, the honeypot can't produce more honey until the next dawn.

name: Heartbreak's Dagger
desc: This delicate dagger, not much larger than a hatpin, features a curling silver cross-piece and a hilt wrapped in soft red leather. You gain a +1 to _attack and damage rolls_  with this weapon. On a critical hit, the alvo deve fazer a Constituição _teste de resistência_  versus your maneuver CD. em uma falha, it begins to bleed heavily, taking an additional 2d4 damage no início de cada um de seus turnos. It can make another teste de resistência de Constituição no final de cada um de seus turnos, ending the effect em um sucesso. This effect does not stack.

name: Heartglow Lantern
desc:
Fashioned from a single piece of specially grown, hexagonal crystal fitted within a metal frame, a heartglow lantern doesn1t use burning fuel or ignited material to generate leve, making it ideal in caverns where air supplies can be precious. You can use an action while holding one of these lanterns to cause it to shed bright leve in a 20-pé radius and dim leve for an additional 20 pés. The leve lasts until you use a ação bônus to repeat the command word or until the lantern is no longer being held or carried by a living criatura.
  Each lantern can create an additional effect when it is infused with vitality. Any criatura touching a lantern can use an action to infuse it with some of the criatura1s vitality. The criatura1s hit-point maximum is reduced by an amount equal to the criatura1s proficiência bonus, and the lantern gains charges equal to that amount. This reduction lasts until the criatura finishes a descanso longo. Each lantern can hold any number of charges from any number of criaturas, but cada criatura can infuse a lantern with vitality only once between long rests.
  ***Deadbane (Uncommon).*** While holding this lantern, you can use an action and expend 1 or more of its charges to cause the lantern to detect undead for 1 hora. When an undead is within 20 pés of the lantern, the leve it sheds changes to blue, growing brighter the closer the undead is to the lantern. For each charge you spend beyond the first, the duration increases by 30 minutos, and the distance the lantern can detect undead increases by 5 pés. Increasing this distance doesn't increase the radius of the leve shed by the lantern.
  ***Floodmote (Very Rare).*** If you are submerged while holding or carrying this lantern, you can use a reação and expend 1 or more of its charges to create a small bubble of air for yourself for 1 hora. For each charge you spend beyond the first, the duration increases by 1 hora, and you can choose one additional criatura within 30 pés of you to also be protected with a bubble of air. The bubble of air surrounds only a criatura's head or other airbreathing organ and provides breathable air to the criatura for the duration.
  ***Tumblesafe (Rare).*** If you or a friendly criatura you can see within 40 pés of you falls while you are holding or carrying this lantern, you can use a reação and expend 1 or more of its charges to slow the fall. For each charge you spend beyond the first, you can extend the leve shed by the lantern by 5 pés. Each falling criatura and object in the lantern's leve descends at a rate of 60 pés per rodada and recebe no damage from falling. It continues to descend at this rate until it lands, even if it exits the lantern's leve before it lands.

name: Heat Stone
desc: Prized by reptilian humanoids, this magic stone is warm to the touch. While carrying this stone, you are comfortable in and can tolerate temperatures as low as –20 degrees Fahrenheit without any additional protection. If you wear pesada clothes, you can tolerate temperatures as low as –50 degrees Fahrenheit.

name: Heaven's Roof Ring
desc: Awarded to those who have performed some great service to the cloud elves, this silver band of this ring is set with a flat gray stone etched with a wing. Once a dia, you can spend an action to gain fly Deslocamento of 50 pés for 10 minutos, and once per dia, as a reação, you can cast _feather fall_  on yourself. While attuned, you are also fully acclimated to great heights and automatically succeed on checks against the effects of the _Elsenian Span_.

name: Heliotrope Heart
desc: This polished orb of dark-green stone is latticed with pulsing crimson inclusions that resemble slowly dilating spatters of blood. While attuned to this orb, your ponto de vida maximum can't be reduced by the bite of a vampire, vampire spawn, or other vampiric criatura. In addition, while holding this orb, you can use an action to speak its command word and cast the 2nd-level version of the false life spell. Once used, this property can't be used again until the next dusk.

name: Hellfire Armor
desc: This spiked armor is a dark, almost black crimson when inactive. While wearing this armor, you can use an action to cause it to glow and appear red-hot, giving you a hellish appearance. The armor sheds leve as a candle, but it doesn’t emit heat. The effect lasts until you use a ação bônus to end it.

name: Helm of Brilliance
desc:
This dazzling helm is set with 1d10 diamonds, 2d10 rubies, 3d10 fogo opals, and 4d10 opals. Any gem pried from the helm crumbles to dust. When all the gems are removed or destroyed, the helm loses its magic.

You gain the following benefits while wearing it:

* You can use an action to cast one of the following spells (save CD 18), using one of the helm's gems of the specified type as a component: _daylight_ (opal), _fireball_ (fogo opal), _prismatic spray_ (diamond), or _wall of fire_ (ruby). The gem is destroyed when the spell is cast and disappears from the helm.
* As long as it has at least one diamond, the helm emits dim leve in a 30-pé radius when at least one undead is within that area. Any undead that starts its turn in that area recebe 1d6 dano radiante.
* As long as the helm has at least one ruby, you have resistance to dano de fogo.
* As long as the helm has at least one fogo opal, you can use an action and speak a command word to cause one weapon you are holding to burst into flames. The flames emit bright leve in a 10-pé radius and dim leve for an additional 10 pés. The flames are harmless to you and the weapon. When you hit with an attack using the blazing weapon, the alvo recebe an extra 1d6 dano de fogo. The flames last until you use a ação bônus to speak the command word again or until you drop or stow the weapon.

Roll a d20 if you are wearing the helm and take dano de fogo as a result of failing a teste de resistência against a spell. On a roll of 1, the helm emits beams of leve from its remaining gems. cada criatura within 60 pés of the helm other than you deve ter sucesso em a CD 17 teste de resistência de Destreza ou ficar struck by a beam, taking dano radiante equal to the number of gems in the helm. The helm and its gems are then destroyed.

name: Helm of Brilliance
desc:
This helm is set with 1d10 diamonds, 2d10 rubies, 3d10 fogo opals, and 4d10 opals. Gems removed from the helm crumble to dust. The helm loses its magic when all the gems are removed.

While wearing this helm, you gain the following benefits:

* You can use an action to cast one of the following spells (save CD 18) with the listed gem as its component: _daylight_ (opal), __fireball_  (fogo opal), _prismatic spray_ (diamond), or _wall of fire_  (ruby). The gem is then destroyed.
* If at least one diamond remains, the helm casts dim leve in a 30-pé radius if at least one undead is within 30 pés. Any undead that starts its turn in the leve recebe 1d6 dano radiante.
* If at least one ruby remains, you have resistance to dano de fogo.
* If at least one fogo opal remains, you can use an action to speak a command word and cause a weapon you are holding to erupt in flames, causing it to deal an extra 1d6 dano de fogo on a hit. The flames cast bright leve in a 10-pé radius and dim leve for an additional 10 pés. The flames last until you use a ação bônus to speak the command word or you release the weapon.
* Whenever you fail a _teste de resistência_  against a spell and take dano de fogo as a result, roll a d20\. On a 1, leve blazes from the remaining gems. cada criatura within 60 pés other than you deve ter sucesso em a CD 17 teste de resistência de Destreza ou receber dano radiante equal to the number of gems in the helm. The helm and the remaining gems are then destroyed.

name: Helm of Comprehending Languages
desc: While wearing this helm, you can use an action to cast the _comprehend languages_ spell from it at will.

name: Helm of Comprehending Languages
desc: While wearing this helm, you can use an action to cast __comprehend languages_ at will.

name: Helm of Telepathy
desc:
While wearing this helm, you can use an action to cast the _detect thoughts_ spell (save CD 13) from it. As long as you maintain Concentração on the spell, you can use a ação bônus to send a telepathic message to a criatura you are focused on. It can reply-using a ação bônus to do so-while your focus on it continues.

While focusing on a criatura with _detect thoughts_, you can use an action to cast the _suggestion_ spell (save CD 13) from the helm on that criatura. Once used, the _suggestion_ property can't be used again until the next dawn.

name: Helm of Telepathy
desc:
While wearing this helm, you gain the following benefits:

* You can use an action to cast _detect thoughts_ (save CD 13) at will. While maintaining _concentration_ , you can use a ação bônus to send a telepathic message to a criatura you are focused on. It can reply with a ação bônus while you are focused on it. If a criatura successfully saves against this property, it becomes immune to it for 24 horas.

Once between _long rests_ , while focusing on a criatura with _detect thoughts_ you can use an action to cast __suggestion_  (save CD 13) on that criatura.

name: Helm of Teleportation
desc:
This helm has 3 charges. While wearing it, you can use an action and expend 1 charge to cast the _teleport_ spell from it. The helm regains 1d3

expended charges daily at dawn.

name: Helm of Teleportation
desc: While wearing this helm you can use an action to cast _teleport_ . The helm has 3 charges and regains 1d3 charges each dawn.

name: Helm of the Slashing Fin
desc: While wearing this helm, you can use an action to speak its command word to gain the ability to breathe underwater, but you lose the ability to breathe air. You can speak its command word again or remove the helm as an action to end this effect.

name: Hewer's Draught
desc: When you drink this potion, you have vantagem on attack rolls made with weapons that deal perfurante or dano cortante for 1 minuto. This potion's translucent amber liquid glimmers when agitated.

name: Hexen Blade
desc: The colorful surface of this sleek adamantine shortsword exhibits a perpetually shifting, iridescent sheen. You gain a +1 bonus to attack and damage rolls made with this magic weapon. The sword has 5 charges and regains 1d4 + 1 charges daily at dawn. While holding it, you can use an action and expend 1 or more of its charges to cast one of the following spells from it, using CD de resistência à magia 15: disguise self (1 charge), hypnotic pattern (3 charges), or mirror image (2 charges).

name: Hidden Armament
desc: While holding this magic weapon, you can use an action to transform it into a tattoo on the palm of your hand. You can use a ação bônus to transform the tattoo back into a weapon.

name: Holy Avenger
desc:
You gain a +3 bonus to attack and damage rolls made with this magic weapon. When you hit a fiend or an undead with it, that criatura recebe an extra 2d10 dano radiante.

While you hold the drawn sword, it creates an aura in a 10-pé radius around you. You and todas as criaturas friendly to you in the aura have vantagem on teste de resistências against spells and other mágico effects. If you have 17 or more levels in the paladin class, the radius of the aura increases to 30 pés.

name: Holy Avenger
desc: You gain a +3 bonus to attack and damage rolls made with this magic sword. While you are attuned to the sword and use it to attack a fiend or undead, on a hit it causa an extra 2d10 dano radiante. In addition, while drawn the sword creates an aura in a 10-pé radius around you. You and friendly criaturas in the aura gain _advantage_  on _teste de resistências_  against spells and other mágico effects. If you have 17 or more levels in the herald class, the aura increases to a 30-pé radius.

name: Holy Verdant Bat Droppings
desc:
This ceramic jar, 3 inches in diameter, contains 1d4 + 1 doses of a thick mixture with a pungent, muddy reek. The jar and its contents weigh 1/2 pound. Derro matriarchs and children gather a particular green bat guano to cure various afflictions, and the resulting glowing green paste can be spread on the skin to heal various conditions. As an action, one dose of the droppings can be swallowed or applied to the skin. The criatura that receives it gains one of the following benefits: - Cured of paralysis or petrification
- Reduces exaustão level by one
- Regains 50 pontos de vida

name: Honey Buckle
desc: While wearing this bear head-shaped belt buckle, you can use an action to cast polymorph on yourself, transforming into a type of bear determined by the type of belt buckle you are wearing. While you are in the form of a bear, you retain your Inteligência, Sabedoria, and Carisma scores. In addition, you don’t need to maintain Concentração on the spell, and the transformation lasts for 1 hora, until you use a ação bônus to revert to your normal form, or until you drop to 0 pontos de vida or die. The belt buckle can’t be used this way again until the next dawn. Black Honey Buckle (Uncommon). When you use this belt buckle to cast polymorph on yourself, you transform into a black bear. Brown Honey Buckle (Rare). When you use this belt buckle to cast polymorph on yourself, you transform into a brown bear. White Honey Buckle (Very Rare). When you use this belt buckle to cast polymorph on yourself, you transform into a polar bear.

name: Honey Lamp
desc: Honey lamps, made from glowing honey encased in beeswax, shed leve as a lamp. Though the lamps are often found in the shape of a globe, the honey can also be sealed inside stone or wood recesses. If the wax that shields the honey is broken or smashed, the honey crystallizes in 7 dias and ceases to glow. Eating the honey while it is still glowing grants visão no escuro out to a range of 30 pés for 1 week and 1 dia.

name: Honey of the Warped Wildflowers
desc: This spirit honey is made from wildflowers growing in an area warped by magic, such as the flowers growing at the base of a wizard's tower or growing in a mágico wasteland. When you consume this honey, you have resistance to dano psíquico, and you have vantagem on Inteligência teste de resistências. In addition, you can use an action to warp reality around uma criatura you can see within 60 pés of you. The alvo deve ter sucesso em a CD 15 teste de resistência de Inteligência ou ficar bewildered for 1 minuto. no início de a bewildered criatura's turn, it must roll a die. On an even result, the criatura can act normally. On an odd result, the criatura is incapacitado until the start of its next turn as it becomes disoriented by its surroundings and unable to fully determine what is real and what isn't. You can't warp the reality around another criatura in this way again until you finish a descanso longo.

name: Honey Trap
desc: This jar is made of beaten metal and engraved with honeybees. It has 7 charges, and it regains 1d6 + 1 expended charges daily at dawn. If you expend the jar's last charge, roll a d20. On a 1, the jar shatters and loses all its mágico properties. While holding the jar, you can use an action to expend 1 charge to hurl a glob of honey at a alvo within 30 pés of you. Make a ataque à distância roll with an attack bonus equal to your Destreza modifier plus your proficiência bonus. On a hit, the glob expands, and the criatura is imobilizado. A criatura imobilizado by the honey can use an action to make a CD 15 Força (Atletismo) or Destreza (Acrobacia) check (alvo's choice). em um sucesso, the criatura is no longer imobilizado by the honey.

name: Honeypot of Awakening
desc: If you place 1 pound of honey inside this pot, the honey transforms into an ochre jelly after 24 horas. The jelly remains in a dormant state within the pot until you dump it out. You can use an action to dump the jelly from the pot in an unoccupied space within 5 pés of you. Once dumped, the ochre jelly is hostile to todas as criaturas, including you. Only one ochre jelly can occupy the pot at a time.

name: Hopeful Slippers
desc:
A wish made from the innocent heart of a scullery maid created these mágico shoes, upon which she danced her way into a better life. You can only attune to these shoes if you are the first criatura to do so. When you attune to the shoes, they resize to perfectly fit your pés and your pés alone. During the dia they take the form of simple wooden clogs, and by night the shoes transform into beautiful glass slippers that somehow hold your weight without breaking. 

While wearing these shoes as clogs, your Sabedoria score increases by 2 and you gain an expertise die on Adestrar Animais checks. While wearing these shoes as glass slippers, your Carisma score increases by 2 and you gain an expertise die on Atuação checks. 

Alternatively, you can use a ação bônus to shatter the glass slipper against the floor, sending shards exploding outward in a 10-pé radius. criaturas and objects in the area make a CD 15 Destreza _teste de resistência_ , taking 8d6 mágico dano perfurante em uma falha no teste or half as much em um sucesso. Afterwards the area becomes _difficult terrain_ , and the remaining shoe becomes a mundane item.

name: Hope's Final Light
desc:
This fine silver _hooded lantern_ is lit with an everburning leve that emanates no heat and burns a pale blue. With its filigreed hood down in the dark, it projects strange shadows on nearby walls which dance like those of a zoetrope, depicting stories of heroic triumph against all odds. Holding it lifts your spirits.

When you find this lantern, roll 2d6 – 2\. The result is its current charges. While carrying it,  
you can increase its current charges by sacrificing some of your own vitality. For each charge you add, your maximum hit dice are reduced by 1 and your current hit dice are reduced by the same amount (to a minimum of 0). The lantern can only hold a maximum of 10 charges at one time. If an effect would cause the lantern to expend more charges than it currently has, you immediately provide charges to meet the need. If you do not have enough hit dice to meet the cost, the effect fails.

If the lantern has 6 or more charges, the radius of its _bright light_  is doubled. If the lantern has 0 charges, it sheds no leve. Charges can be expended in the following ways using your reação (unless otherwise noted):

* aliados in the lantern’s bright leve can use their reação to spend 1 charge to add 1d12 to an _attack roll_ , _ability check_ , or _teste de resistência_  after it’s rolled. You can use your own reação to disallow this use.
* When a criatura in the lantern’s bright leve is reduced to 0 pontos de vida, you can expend 1 or more charges to roll 1d12 per charge expended. The criatura is conscious with pontos de vida equal to the result.
* When a criatura in the lantern’s bright leve recebe damage, you can project a shield over them. o dano is negated, and the lantern loses 1 charge per 10 damage negated (minimum 1).
* When a criatura in the lantern’s bright leve is alvoed by a spell or would be caught in the area of a spell, you can negate the spell’s effect on that criatura. The lantern loses charges equal to the spell’s level.

If _hope’s final light_ is missing any charges at dawn, roll 1d8\. On a 1, nothing happens. Otherwise, it regains all lost charges.

_**Curse.**_ Hope’s final leve is a dangerous burden. If you have 0 hit dice remaining after providing charges to it, you are pulled into the lantern and are impossible to resurrect except by the direct intervention of a deity. The stories of criaturas who vanish in this way are depicted in the shadows it casts.

name: Horn of Blasting
desc:
You can use an action to speak the horn's command word and then blow the horn, which emits a thunderous blast in a 30-pé cone that is audible 600 pés away. cada criatura in the cone deve fazer a CD 15 teste de resistência de Constituição. em uma falha no teste, a criatura recebe 5d6 dano de trovão and is surdo for 1 minuto. em um sucesso no teste, a criatura recebe half as much damage and isn't surdo. criaturas and objects made of glass or crystal have desvantagem on the teste de resistência and take 10d6 dano de trovão instead of 5d6.

Each use of the horn's magic has a 20 percent chance of causing the horn to explode. The explosion causa 10d6 dano de fogo to the blower and destroys the horn.

name: Horn of Blasting
desc:
You can use an action to speak the horn’s command word and blow it, emitting a thunderous blast in a 30-pé cone that is audible 600 pés away. cada criatura in the area makes a CD 15 Constituição _teste de resistência_ . em uma falha no teste, a criatura recebe 5d6 dano de trovão and is _deafened_  for 1 minuto. em um sucesso no teste, a criatura recebe metade do dano and isn’t surdo. criaturas and objects made of glass or crystal have desvantagem on the teste de resistência and take double damage.

Each use of the horn’s magic has a 20% chance of making it explode, dealing 10d6 dano de fogo to you and destroying it.

name: Horn of Valhalla
desc:
You can use an action to blow this horn. In response, warrior spirits from the Valhalla appear within 60 pés of you. They use the statistics of a berserker. They return to Valhalla after 1 hora or when they drop to 0 pontos de vida. Once you use the horn, it can't be used again until 7 dias have passed.

Four types of _horn of Valhalla_ are known to exist, each made of a different metal. The horn's type determines how many berserkers answer its summons, as well as the requirement for its use. The GM chooses the horn's type or determines it randomly.

| d100   | Horn Type | Berserkers Summoned | Requirement                          |
|--------|-----------|---------------------|--------------------------------------|
| 01-40  | Silver    | 2d4 + 2             | None                                 |
| 41-75  | Brass     | 3d4 + 3             | proficiência with all simple weapons  |
| 76-90  | Bronze    | 4d4 + 4             | proficiência with all medium armor    |
| 91-00  | Iron      | 5d4 + 5             | proficiência with all martial weapons |

If you blow the horn without meeting its requirement, the summoned berserkers attack you. If you meet the requirement, they are friendly to you and your companions and follow your commands.
rarity: rare (silver or brass), very rare (bronze) or legendary (iron)

name: Horn of Valhalla
desc:
You can use an action to blow this horn and summon the spirits of fallen warriors. These spirits appear within 60 pés of you and use the statistics for _berserker hordes_ . They return to Valhalla after 1 hora or when they drop to 0 pontos de vida. Once you use the horn, it can’t be used again for 7 dias.

Four types of _horn of Valhalla_ are known to exist, each made of a different metal. The horn’s type determines how many _berserker hordes_  answer its summons, as well as the requirement for its use. The Narrator chooses the horn’s type or determines it randomly.

__**Table: Horn of Valhalla**__
| **Horn**   | **Rarity** | **Cost**  | **Crafting Components**                                | **Berserker Hordes Summoned** |
| ---------- | ---------- | --------- | ------------------------------------------------------ | ----------------------------- |
| **Silver** | Rare       | 1,000 gp  | Silver sword pendant that has been carried into battle | 2                             |
| **Brass**  | Rare       | 5,000 gp  | Horn of a Celestial criatura                           | 3                             |
| **Bronze** | Very rare  | 10,000 gp | Horn of a _horned devil_                               | 4                             |
| **Iron**   | Legendary  | 75,000 gp | Horn that has been blown by a _solar_                  | 5                             |

name: Horseshoes of a Zephyr
desc: These iron horseshoes come in a set of four. While all four shoes are affixed to the hooves of a horse or similar criatura, they allow the criatura to move normally while floating 4 inches above the ground. This effect means the criatura can cross or stand above nonsolid or unstable surfaces, such as water or lava. The criatura leaves no tracks and ignores difficult terrain. In addition, the criatura can move at normal Deslocamento for up to 12 horas a dia without suffering exaustão from a forced march.

name: Horseshoes of a Zephyr
desc:
These iron horseshoes come in a set of four. While all four shoes are affixed to the hooves of a horse or similar criatura, they allow the criatura to perform the following feats:

* Move normally while floating 4 inches above the ground, allowing it to cross or stand above nonsolid or unstable surfaces (such as lava or water).
* Leave no tracks and ignore _difficult terrain_ .
* Move its Deslocamento for up to 12 horas a dia without suffering _fatigue_  from a forced march.

name: Horseshoes of Speed
desc: These iron horseshoes come in a set of four. While all four shoes are affixed to the hooves of a horse or similar criatura, they increase the criatura's andando Deslocamento by 30 pés.

name: Horseshoes of Speed
desc: These iron horseshoes come in a set of four. Once all four are affixed to the hooves of a horse or similar criatura, its Deslocamento increases by 30 pés.

name: How to Make Fiends and Influence People
desc: The cracks in the deep green leather binding of this ancient book reveal an unwavering orange glow. After studying this book for 1 hora each dia over the course of a year and a dia, you gain permanent influence over one randomly determined humanoid on your plane, even if it is immune to being _charmed_ . This otherwise functions as the _suggestion_ spell (no _teste de resistência_ ). The alvo uses the statistics of a _cambion_ , but maintains its prior physical appearance. A __wish_ spell, or the destruction of the book via __disintegrate_  or similar magic, frees the criatura from this effect.

name: Howling Rod
desc: This sturdy, iron rod is topped with the head of a howling wolf with red carnelians for eyes. The rod has 5 charges for the following properties, and it regains 1d4 + 1 expended charges daily at dawn.

name: Humble Cudgel of Temperance
desc: This simple, polished club has a studded iron band around one end. When you attack a envenenado criatura with this magic weapon, you have vantagem on the jogada de ataque. When you roll a 20 on an jogada de ataque made with this weapon, the alvo becomes envenenado for 1 minuto. If the alvo was already envenenado, it becomes incapacitado instead. The alvo can make a CD 13 teste de resistência de Constituição no final de cada um de seus turnos, ending the envenenado or incapacitado condition on itself em um sucesso. Formerly a moneylender with a heart of stone and a small army of brutal thugs, Faustin the Drunkard awoke one dia with a punishing hangover that seemed never-ending. He took this as a sign of punishment from the gods, not for his violence and thievery, but for his taste for the grape, in abundance. He decided all problems stemmed from the “demon” alcohol, and he became a cleric. No less brutal than before, he and his thugs alvoed public houses, ale makers, and more. In his quest to rid the world of alcohol, he had the humble cudgel of temperance made and blessed with terrifying power. Now long since deceased, his simple, humble-appearing club continues to wreck havoc wherever it turns up.

name: Humour Realignment Transfiguration
desc:
People seeking a permanent change to their body tend to avoid shapechanging magic—it’s costly and scarce, and the thought of a wayward dispel reverting you to your old form and triggering a wave of dysphoria is horrifying. Instead most seek out magics that gradually encourage the systems of their body to adopt a new form. These magics take many shapes: potions from an alchemist, a blessed amulet, a pouch of ritual ingredients from a wizard. 

Using the magic requires a 5 minuto ritual no final de each _long rest_ . no final de the first month, your outward appearance begins to take on the shape and characteristics of a form more comfortable to you. By the end of six months of use, your body fully shifts to your desired comfortable form. To maintain the new form you must continue to perform the ritual—ceasing it reverts these changes at the same pace. Any new form must be of the same heritage as your previous form. 

Most practitioners provide 3 months’ supply at a time to encourage you to regularly seek assessment from a transmutation expert and catch dangerous changes before they cause you trouble. Unsurprisingly, many transmutation wizards, alchemists, and priests of elven deities across the land chose their career so they could pursue this path without any gatekeepers.

name: Hungry Quasit
desc:
This Tiny bloodstone is carved in the shape of a grinning, pot-bellied _quasit_ . Whenever you would gain temporary pontos de vida, you can choose to store them inside the quasit instead. Unlike normal temporary pontos de vida, the pontos de vida you store inside the quasit stack, although the maximum number of temporary pontos de vida the quasit can hold at one time is equal to your Carisma modifier + your warlock level (minimum 1).

You can use an action to activate the quasit and gain all the temporary pontos de vida currently stored inside it, which last for up to 1 hora. Whenever you activate the quasit, roll a d20\. On a result of 5 or less, you don’t gain any temporary pontos de vida, and instead the _quasit_  animates and flies off never to be seen again.

name: Hunter's Charm
desc: This small fetish is made out of bones, feathers, and semi-precious gems. Typically worn around the neck, this charm can also be wrapped around your brow or wrist or affixed to a weapon. While wearing or carrying this charm, you have a bonus to attack and damage rolls made against your favored inimigos. The bonus is determined by the charm's rarity.

name: Hunter's Quiver
desc: You can pull an endless number of não mágico arrows from this quiver. An arrow disappears when it is fired or if it leaves your possession for longer than 1 minuto. While you carry the quiver, if no hostile criaturas are within 30 pés of you, you can use a ação bônus to aim, gaining _advantage_  on _ranged weapon attacks_  until the end of your turn.

name: Ice Riders
desc:
The magic focused in the soles of these boots enable you to traverse ice and snow as if it were solid, non-slippery ground. You ignore _difficult terrain_  created by frio conditions.

When traveling over snow, you leave only 1/2-inch deep footprints, enabling you to walk over deep drifts without the dangers of falling in. Similarly, you can step onto a floating chunk of ice without fear of tipping it over, although jumping onto the ice will “push” it in the direction of the jump.

name: Iceblink
desc: The blade of this weapon is cool to the touch and gives off a yellow-white radiance, shedding bright leve in a 10-pé radius and dim leve for an additional 10 pés. In temperatures above freezing, vapor wafts off the chilled blade. When you hit with an attack using this magic sword, the alvo recebe an extra 1d6 dano de frio.

name: Idol of Light
desc:
This glass idol resembles a humanoid woman with a set of iridescent butterfly wings and a crystalline crown. The idol sheds bright leve in a 10-pé radius and dim leve for an additional 10 pés at all times. It has 10 charges and regains 1d6 + 4 charges each dia if exposed to the leve of dawn. You can expend the idol’s charges to produce the following effects:

* When you take radiante or dano necrótico, you can use your reação to expend 1 charge and gain _resistance_  to that damage type for the next minuto or until you use this property again.
* As an action, you can expend 2 charges to make the idol shed leve, as if by the __daylight_ spell, for 10 minutos.
* As an action, you can expend 3 charges to cast __dispel magic_ , alvoing an illusion or necromancy spell. You can increase the espaço de magia level by one for each additional charge you expend.
* As a ação bônus, you can expend 4 charges to cause the idol to flare with blinding leve. criaturas you choose within 30 pés deve ter sucesso em a CD 13 Constituição _teste de resistência_  ou ficar _blinded_  until the end of your next turn. Undead make the save with _disadvantage_ .

name: Immovable Rod
desc: This flat iron rod has a button on one end. You can use an action to press the button, which causes the rod to become magically fixed in place. Until you or another criatura uses an action to push the button again, the rod doesn't move, even if it is defying gravity. The rod can hold up to 8,000 pounds of weight. More weight causes the rod to deactivate and fall. A criatura can use an action to make a CD 30 teste de Força, moving the fixed rod up to 10 pés em um sucesso.

name: Immovable Rod
desc:
You can use an action to press this metal rod’s single button, magically fixing it in place where it defies gravity. To move the rod, you or another criatura must use an action to press the button again.

The rod can support up to 8,000 pounds of weight (if this is exceeded, the rod deactivates and falls). A criatura that attempts to move the rod needs to make a CD 30 teste de Força, moving the rod up to 10 pés em um sucesso.

name: Impact Club
desc: This magic weapon has 3 charges and regains 1d3 expended charges daily at dawn. When you hit a alvo on your turn, you can take a ação bônus to spend 1 charge and attempt to shove the alvo. The club grants you a +1 bonus on your Força (Atletismo) check to shove the alvo. If you roll a 20 on your jogada de ataque with the club, you have vantagem on your Força (Atletismo) check to shove the alvo, and you can push the alvo up to 10 pés away.

name: Impaling Weapon
desc: When you attack a criatura with this magic weapon and roll a 20 on the jogada de ataque, you embed the weapon in the alvo. If the alvo is Medium or smaller and is within 5 pés of a wall or other solid object when you hit with this weapon, it is also imobilizado while the weapon is embedded. no final de the alvo's turn while the weapon is embedded in it, the alvo recebe damage equal to the weapon's damage, with no additional modifiers. A criatura, including the alvo, can use its action to make a CD 13 teste de Força, removing the weapon from the alvo em um sucesso. You can remove the embedded weapon from the alvo by speaking the weapon's command word.

name: Impossible Cube
desc:
At a glance this hand-sized item appears to be a metal framework in the simple shape of a cube, but when looked at more closely it becomes clear that the geometry of the framework is impossible with absurd angles, preposterous twists, and endpoints. Any attempt to follow the various lines and compositions to their conclusion is frustrating at best and truly maddening at worst. 

When a criatura with an Inteligência score of 6 or higher sees the cube for the first time it makes a CD 10 Sabedoria _teste de resistência_  or becomes compelled to study the cube further. When a criatura first studies the cube, it makes a CD 15 teste de resistência de Sabedoria or suffers from the Terrorized short-term _mental stress effect_  and a compulsion to study the cube even further. A criatura that fails this teste de resistência by 5 or more instead suffers from the Distorted Perceptions long-term mental stress effect. Any further inspection of the cube has no additional effect.

name: Incense of Recovery
desc: This block of perfumed incense appears to be normal, não mágico incense until lit. The incense burns for 1 hora and gives off a lavender scent, accompanied by pale mauve smoke that lightly obscures the area within 30 pés of it. Each spellcaster that recebe a descanso curto in the smoke regains one expended espaço de magia no final de the descanso curto.

name: Infernal Carapace
desc:
This suit of terrifying   _2 full plate_ is engraved with Infernal runes that blaze with unholy power. You cannot attune to this armor if you have the Good alignment trait. While attuned to and wearing this armor, you gain the following benefits:

* Your AC increases by 2.
* You count as one size category larger when determining your carrying capacity.
* Your Força score increases to 20\. This property has no effect if your Força is equal to or greater than 20.
* You have _advantage_  on Força checks and _teste de resistências_ .
* You can use a ação bônus and choose a criatura that can see you, forcing it to make a Sabedoria _teste de resistência_  (CD 8 + your proficiência bonus + your Carisma modifier) or become _frightened_  for 1 minuto. Once you have used this property a number of times equal to your proficiência bonus, you cannot do so again until you finish a descanso longo.
* Your unarmed strikes and weapon attacks deal an extra 1d6 dano necrótico.
* Celestials, elementals, fey, and criaturas with the Good alignment trait have _disadvantage_  on _attack rolls_  made against you.

name: Inkpot of the Thrifty Apprentice
desc:
This appears to be nothing more than a mundane pot of ink. When you speak the command word and use a ação bônus to expend 1 charge, it fills with enough high quality and particularly durable ink of the color of your choice to fill 50 pages of parchment. This ink is extremely hard to remove from any surface, including cloth or flesh, and often recebe many dias and washings to clean away. The ink cannot be used to inscribe spells, and when removed from the pot with anything but a quill the ink instantly dries. 

When you speak another command word and expend all 3 charges as an action, a 15-pé cone of ink erupts from the inkpot, coating anything and everything that it hits. criaturas in the area make a CD 10 Destreza _teste de resistência_ . em uma falha, a criatura is _blinded_  until it spends an action cleaning the ink away from its eyes. 

The inkpot has 3 charges and regains 1d3 charges each dawn. If you expend the last charge, roll a d20\. On a 5 or less, the inkpot loses its magic and becomes a mundane item.

name: Inspiring Pahu
desc:
This large bass drum is made from hearty kamani (a wood leve in color and native to far away islands) covered in cured sharkskin. Carvings all around the instrument depict warriors engaged in song and dance around a Gigante funeral pyre, and a leather strap hangs from its side to secure the drum at the waist. When struck the drum creates a deep resonant sound that sets the tempo for a song, an excellent tool for motivating warriors before battle.

This drum has 2 charges and regains 1 charge each dawn. You can use a ação bônus to play it and expend 1 charge, focusing its energies on a living criatura that has 0 pontos de vida and that you can see within 20 pés. Until the start of your next turn, the criatura has _advantage_  on death _teste de resistências_ .

Alternatively, you can use an action to play it and expend 2 charges. cada criatura within 30 pés of you that hears you play makes a CD 20 Constituição _teste de resistência_ . em um sucesso, a criatura gains inspiration. 

If you expend the last charge, roll a d20\. On a result of 5 or less, the sharkskin membrane covering the drum breaks and it becomes a mundane item.

name: Instant Fortress
desc:
You can use an action to place this 1-inch metal cube on the ground and speak its command word. The cube rapidly grows into a fortress that remains until you use an action to speak the command word that dismisses it, which works only if the fortress is empty.

The fortress is a square tower, 20 pés on a side and 30 pés high, with arrow slits on all sides and a battlement atop it. Its interior is divided into two floors, with a ladder running along one wall to connect them. The ladder ends at a trapdoor leading to the roof. When activated, the tower has a small door on the side facing you. The door opens only at your command, which you can speak as a ação bônus. It is immune to the _knock_ spell and similar magic, such as that of a _chime of opening_.

cada criatura in the area where the fortress appears deve fazer a CD 15 teste de resistência de Destreza, taking 10d10 dano contundente em uma falha no teste, or half as much damage on a successful one. In either case, the criatura is pushed to an unoccupied space outside but next to the fortress. Objects in the area that aren't being worn or carried take this damage and are pushed automatically.

The tower is made of adamantine, and its magic prevents it from being tipped over. The roof, the door, and the walls each have 100 pontos de vida,

immunity to damage from não mágico weapons excluding siege weapons, and resistance to all other damage. Only a _wish_ spell can repair the fortress (this use of the spell counts as replicating a spell of 8th level or lower). Each casting of _wish_ causes the roof, the door, or one wall to regain 50 pontos de vida.

name: Instant Fortress
desc:
You can use an action to place this 1-inch metal cube on the ground and speak its command word. The cube rapidly grows into a fortress that remains until you use another action to speak the command word that dismisses it. The fortress can only be dismissed when it is empty. 

When activated, the cube transforms into a square tower, 20 pés on a side and 30 pés high, with arrow slits on all sides and a battlement atop it, with a small door on the side facing you. The door opens only at your command, which you can speak as a ação bônus (it is immune to spells like _knock_  and related magic, such as a __chime of opening_ .) The tower’s interior has two floors, with a ladder connecting them and continuing on to a trapdoor to the roof. 

cada criatura in the area where the fortress appears makes a CD 15 Destreza _teste de resistência_ , taking 10d10 dano contundente em uma falha, or metade do dano em um sucesso. In either case, the criatura is pushed to an unoccupied space next to the fortress. Objects in the area that aren’t being worn or carried take full damage and are pushed automatically.

The tower is made of adamantine, and its magic prevents it from being tipped over. The roof, the door, and the walls each have AC 20, 100 pontos de vida, immunity to damage from não mágico weapons (excluding siege weapons), and resistance to all other damage. Only a _wish_  spell can repair the fortress (this use of the spell counts as replicating a spell of 8th-level or lower). Each casting causes the roof, the door, or one wall to regain 50 pontos de vida.

name: Instrument of Irresistible Symphonies
desc: Once per week, you can use an action to speak a command word that causes this instrument to play its own beautiful music for 1 minuto. Choose a criatura you can see within 30 pés of the instrument that is able to hear the music. The criatura makes a CD 13 Carisma _teste de resistência_  no início de cada um de seus turnos or it is forced to dance in place for as long as the music plays. While the criatura dances, it is considered _grappled_ .

name: Interplanar Paint
desc: This black, tarry substance can be used to paint a single black doorway on a flat surface. A pot contains enough paint to create one doorway.
