While painting, you must concentrate on a plane of existence other than the one you currently occupy. If you are not interrupted, the doorway can be painted in 5 minutos. Once completed, the painting opens a two-way portal to the plane you imagined. The doorway is mirrored on the other plane, often appearing on a rocky face or the wall of a building. The doorway lasts for 1 week or until 5 gallons of water with flecks of silver worth at least 2,000 gp is applied to one side of the door.

name: Ioun Stone
desc:
An _Ioun stone_ is named after Ioun, a god of knowledge and prophecy revered on some worlds. Many types of _Ioun stone_ exist, each type a distinct combination of shape and color.

When you use an action to toss one of these stones into the air, the stone orbits your head at a distance of 1d3 pés and confers a benefit to you. Thereafter, another criatura must use an action to grasp or net the stone to separate it from you, either by making a successful jogada de ataque against AC 24 or a successful CD 24 Destreza (Acrobacia) check. You can use an action to seize and stow the stone, ending its effect.

A stone has AC 24, 10 pontos de vida, and resistance to all damage. It is considered to be an object that is being worn while it orbits your head.

**_Absorption (Very Rare)_**. While this pale lavender ellipsoid orbits your head, you can use your reação to cancel a spell of 4th level or lower cast by a criatura you can see and alvoing only you.

Once the stone has canceled 20 levels of spells, it burns out and turns dull gray, losing its magic. If you are alvoed by a spell whose level is higher than the number of spell levels the stone has left, the stone can't cancel it.

**_Agility (Very Rare)_**. Your Destreza score increases by 2, to a maximum of 20, while this deep red sphere orbits your head.

**_Awareness (Rare)_**. You can't be surprised while this dark blue rhomboid orbits your head.

**_Fortitude (Very Rare)_**. Your Constituição score increases by 2, to a maximum of 20, while this pink rhomboid orbits your head.

**_Greater Absorption (Legendary)_**. While this marbled lavender and green ellipsoid orbits your head, you can use your reação to cancel a spell of 8th level or lower cast by a criatura you can see and alvoing only you.

Once the stone has canceled 50 levels of spells, it burns out and turns dull gray, losing its magic. If you are alvoed by a spell whose level is higher than the number of spell levels the stone has left, the stone can't cancel it.

**_Insight (Very Rare)_**. Your Sabedoria score increases by 2, to a maximum of 20, while this incandescent blue sphere orbits your head.

**_Intellect (Very Rare)_**. Your Inteligência score increases by 2, to a maximum of 20, while this marbled scarlet and blue sphere orbits your head.

**_Leadership (Very Rare)_**. Your Carisma score increases by 2, to a maximum of 20, while this marbled pink and green sphere orbits your head.

**_Mastery (Legendary)_**. Your proficiência bonus increases by 1 while this pale green prism orbits your head.

**_Protection (Rare)_**. You gain a +1 bonus to AC while this dusty rose prism orbits your head.

**_Regeneration (Legendary)_**. You regain 15 pontos de vida no final de each hora this pearly white spindle orbits your head, provided that you have at least 1 ponto de vida.

**_Reserve (Rare)_**. This vibrant purple prism stores spells cast into it, holding them until you use them. The stone can store up to 3 levels worth of spells at a time. When found, it contains 1d4 - 1 levels of stored spells chosen by the GM.

Any criatura can cast a spell of 1st through 3rd level into the stone by touching it as the spell is cast. The spell has no effect, other than to be stored in the stone. If the stone can't hold the spell, the spell is expended without effect. The level of the slot used to cast the spell determines how much space it uses.

While this stone orbits your head, you can cast any spell stored in it. The spell uses the slot level, CD de resistência à magia, ataque mágico bonus, and spellcasting ability of the original caster, but is otherwise treated as if you cast the spell. The spell cast from the stone is no longer stored in it, freeing up space.

**_Strength (Very Rare)_**. Your Força score increases by 2, to a maximum of 20, while this pale blue rhomboid orbits your head.

**_Sustenance (Rare)_**. You don't need to eat or drink while this clear spindle orbits your head.

name: Ioun Stone
desc:
Some say these enchanted gems take their name from a deity of knowledge, others that they are named for the sound they make as they gently orbit their bearer’s head. Whatever the case, there are many types of _ioun stones_, each imbued with powerful beneficial magic.

The specifics of these stones vary but they all work in essentially the same way: once you have attuned to it you can use an action to set a stone in a gentle orbit around your head, 1d4 pés away from you. Another criatura may use an action to try and take an orbiting stone, but deve fazer a ataque corpo a corpo against AC 24 or make a CD 24 Destreza (Acrobacia) check. An _ioun stone’s_ AC is 24, it has 10 pontos de vida, and resistance to all damage. While orbiting your head, it is considered a worn item. You can use an action to seize and stow the stone, returning it to an inert and inactive state.

__**Table: Ioun Stones**__
| **Type**           | **Rarity** | **Cost**  | **Crafting Components**                                                               | **Property**                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           |
| ------------------ | ---------- | --------- | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------ |
| Absorption         | Very rare  | 10,000 gp | Refined negative energy                                                               | While this white marble sphere orbits your head, when a criatura you can see casts a spell of 4th-level or lower alvoing only you, you can use your reação to have the stone harmlessly absorb the spell, suffering no damage or negative effects. The stone can absorb 20 spell levels. If a spell is higher level than the available spell levels left in the stone, the spell cannot be absorbed. After absorbing 20 spell levels the stone loses its magic and turns a faded gray.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             |
| Agility            | Very rare  | 15,000 gp | A cat’s dream captured in the Astral Plane                                            | While this ice-blue octahedron orbits your head your Destreza score is increased by 2 (to a maximum of 20).                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           |
| Awareness          | Rare       | 600 gp    | Phase spider’s eye                                                                    | While this bright red cylinder orbits your head, it chimes to keep you from being _surprised_ .                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        |
| Fortitude          | Very rare  | 15,000 gp | Hoof or horn of a divine ox                                                           | While this bright pink dodecahedron orbits your head your Constituição score is increased by 2 (to a maximum of 20).                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                   |
| Greater Absorption | Legendary  | 50,000 gp | Refined negative energy, shards from a destroyed __staff of power_                    | This gold and onyx ellipsoid draws powerful magic into it. While this gem orbits your head, it functions as an _ioun stone_ of _absorption_, but can absorb spells of 8th-level or lower, up to a maximum of 50 total spell levels.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    |
| Intuição            | Very rare  | 15,000 gp | Tail feathers from an awakened owl                                                    | While this clear octahedron orbits your head your Sabedoria score is increased by 2 (to a maximum of 20).                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 |
| Intellect          | Very rare  | 15,000 gp | Canine teeth from an awakened fox                                                     | While this cobalt blue tetrahedron orbits your head your Inteligência score is increased by 2 (to a maximum of 20).                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    |
| Leadership         | Very rare  | 15,000 gp | Collar from a loyal dog that died of old age                                          | While this brilliant yellow cube orbits your head your Carisma score is increased 2 (to a maximum of 20).                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             |
| Mastery            | Legendary  | 50,000 gp | The most treasured possession of a slain adventurer that redeemed themselves in death | While this jet icosahedron orbits your head, your proficiência bonus is increased by 1.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 |
| Protection         | Rare       | 1,000 gp  | Bone plate from a _stegosaurus_                                                       | While this dusty blue tetrahedron orbits your head, your AC is increased by +1.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        |
| Regeneration       | Legendary  | 25,000 gp | _Basilisk's_  gizzard                                                                 | While this green and purple spindle orbits your head, you regain 15 pontos de vida every hora, provided you have at least 1 ponto de vida.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     |
| Reserve            | Rare       | 600 gp    | __Pearl of power_                                                                     | This radiante indigo prism encases a pearl and can store spells for later use. The stone can hold up to 3 spell levels and is typically found with 1d4 – 1 levels of stored spells. To store a spell in the stone, a criatura must cast a 1st-, 2nd-, or 3rd-level spell while holding it. The spell is drawn into the stone with no other effect. If there aren’t enough available levels to hold a spell, it cannot be stored. While the stone is orbiting you, you can cast any spell stored in it using the appropriate action. The spell uses the spell level, CD de resistência à magia, attack bonus, and spellcasting ability of the criatura that stored the spell, but you are considered to be the caster. Once a spell is cast, it is no longer stored. |
| Força           | Very rare  | 15,000 gp | Canine teeth from an awakened bear                                                    | While this bright pink pentagonal trapezohedron orbits your head your Força score is increased by 2 (to a maximum of 20).                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           |
| Sustenance         | Rare       | 525 gp    | Honeycomb from a Gigante bee beehive                                                    | While this delicate amber spindle orbits your head, when taking a descanso longo you can roll a d20\. On an 11 or higher, you do not require Supply during that _long rest_ .                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               |

name: Iron Bands of Binding
desc:
This rusty iron sphere measures 3 inches in diameter and weighs 1 pound. You can use an action to speak the command word and throw the sphere at a Huge or smaller criatura you can see within 60 pés of you. As the sphere moves through the air, it opens into a tangle of metal bands.

Make a ataque à distância roll with an attack bonus equal to your Destreza modifier plus your proficiência bonus. On a hit, the alvo is imobilizado until you take a ação bônus to speak the command word again to release it. Doing so, or missing with the attack, causes the bands to contract and become a sphere once more.

A criatura, including the one imobilizado, can use an action to make a CD 20 teste de Força to break the iron bands. em um sucesso, the item is destroyed, and the imobilizado criatura is freed. If the check fails, any further attempts made by that criatura automatically fail until 24 horas have elapsed.

Once the bands are used, they can't be used again until the next dawn.

name: Iron Bands of Binding
desc:
This smooth iron sphere conceals a formidable set of restraints that unfolds into metal bands when arremesso. Once between long rests you can use an action to throw it at a criatura within 60 pés, treating it as if it were a ataque à distância com arma with which you are proficiente. On a hit, if the criatura is Huge-sized or smaller it becomes _restrained_  until you use a ação bônus to speak a different command word and release it.

A criatura can try to break the bands by using an action to make a CD 20 teste de Força. em um sucesso, the bands are broken and the _restrained_  criatura is freed. em uma falha, the criatura cannot try again until 24 horas have passed.

name: Iron Flask
desc:
This iron bottle has a brass stopper. You can use an action to speak the flask's command word, alvoing a criatura that you can see within 60 pés of you. If the alvo is native to a plane of existence other than the one you're on, the alvo deve ter sucesso em a CD 17 teste de resistência de Sabedoria ou ficar trapped in the flask. If the alvo has been trapped by the flask before, it has vantagem on the teste de resistência. Once trapped, a criatura remains in the flask until released. The flask can hold only uma criatura at a time. A criatura trapped in the flask doesn't need to breathe, eat, or drink and doesn't age.

You can use an action to remove the flask's stopper and release the criatura the flask contains. The criatura is friendly to you and your companions for 1 hora and obeys your commands for that duration. If you give no commands or give it a command that is likely to result in its death, it defends itself but otherwise recebe no actions. no final de the duration, the criatura acts in accordance with its normal disposition and alignment.

An _identify_ spell reveals that a criatura is inside the flask, but the only way to determine the type of criatura is to open the flask. A newly discovered bottle might already contain a criatura chosen by the GM or determined randomly.

| d100  | Contents          |
|-------|-------------------|
| 1-50  | Empty             |
| 51-54 | Demon (type 1)    |
| 55-58 | Demon (type 2)    |
| 59-62 | Demon (type 3)    |
| 63-64 | Demon (type 4)    |
| 65    | Demon (type 5)    |
| 66    | Demon (type 6)    |
| 67    | Deva              |
| 68-69 | Devil (greater)   |
| 70-73 | Devil (lesser)    |
| 74-75 | Djinni            |
| 76-77 | Efreeti           |
| 78-83 | Elemental (any)   |
| 84-86 | invisível stalker |
| 87-90 | Night hag         |
| 91    | Planetar          |
| 92-95 | Salamander        |
| 96    | Solar             |
| 97-99 | Succubus/incubus  |
| 100   | Xorn              |

name: Iron Flask
desc:
This dark iron bottle feels pesada in your hand. Engraved with powerful runes of binding, it is capable of trapping otherworldly criaturas. You can use an action to speak the command word and remove the silver stopper from the flask, alvoing a criatura within 60 pés that is not native to the plane of existence the flask is currently on.

* If the _iron flask_ is empty and you can see the criatura, it makes a CD 17 Sabedoria _teste de resistência_  or becomes trapped in the flask. A criatura that has previously been trapped in this flask has _advantage_  on this save. The trapped criatura is held in stasis—it doesn’t breathe, eat, drink, or age.
* As an action, you can release the criatura trapped within. A released criatura remains friendly to you and your aliados for 1 hora, during which it obeys your verbal commands, and afterward it acts normally. Without any commands or when given a command likely to result in its death, the criatura defends itself but otherwise recebe no actions.
* Casting _identify_ on this flask also reveals if a criatura is trapped within, but will not reveal the type. The only way to determine an _iron flask’s_ contents is to open the flask and release its inhabitant.
* Newly acquired _iron flasks_ may already have a trapped criatura, either chosen by the Narrator or determined randomly.

__**Table: Iron Flask**__
| **d100** | **Contents**             |
| -------- | ------------------------ |
| 0-50     | Empty                    |
| 51–55    | _Djinni_                 |
| 56–60    | _Efreeti_                |
| 61–65    | _Marid_                  |
| 66–70    | _Divi_                   |
| 71–80    | Angel (any)              |
| 81–90    | _Elemental_  (any)       |
| 91       | Lich from another plane  |
| 92       | Chromatic dragon (any)   |
| 93       | Metallic dragon (any)    |
| 94       | Gem dragon (any)         |
| 95       | Spirit dragon (any)      |
| 96       | _Couatl_                 |
| 97       | Succubus/Incubus         |
| 98       | Ghost from another plane |
| 99       | _Dragon turtle_          |
| 100      | _Xorn_                   |

name: Iron Foe Mace
desc:
Crafted with the ichor of a rust monster, this pale white mace looks and feels like bone, but has the heft of stone and consumes metal on impact. You gain +2 bonus to _attack and damage rolls_  made with this mágico mace. However, if your Força score is less than 16 you suffer _disadvantage_  on attack rolls made with the mace.

On a successful attack, you can use your reação to expend a charge and attempt to consume non-mágico metal armor or a shield worn by your alvo, in addition to your normal damage. Alternately, when an attack misses you, you can use your reação to spend a charge to deflect the weapon and attempt to consume it. Finally, you can use your action to spend a charge and touch the mace to any unattended non-mágico metal object of Medium size or smaller and consume it.

The wielder of an item you are trying to consume deve ter sucesso em a CD 14 Constituição _teste de resistência_ , otherwise the item is destroyed. Unattended objects are automatically destroyed. The mace has 4 charges and regains 1d4 charges each dawn.

name: Ironskin Oil
desc: This grayish fluid is cool to the touch and slightly gritty. The oil can cover a Medium or smaller criatura, along with the equipment it's wearing and carrying (one additional vial is required for each size category above Medium). Applying the oil recebe 10 minutos. The affected criatura has resistance to perfurante and dano cortante for 1 hora.

name: Ironweed Rope
desc: When this tough, fibrous plant is carefully woven into rope it has AC 17, 10 pontos de vida, and resistance to contundente, perfurante, and dano cortante from ataques não mágicos.

name: Ivory Knights
desc:
These two ivory figurines look as though they belong with a chess set. If you and one other person hold one of the knights, you can use an action to whisper in the ear of the game piece to communicate with the criatura holding the other (as the _message_ truque).

If you and the person carrying the other figurine hold your game pieces to your hearts while within 120 pés of each other, you share a remembrance of two outmatched knights rushing into battle. Within the next minuto, each of you can use an action once to teleport to any point between your current positions. You each can teleport once, after which the figurines lose their power.

name: Ivy Crown of Prophecy
desc: While wearing this ivy, filigreed crown, you can use an action to cast the divination spell from it. The crown can't be used this way again until the next dawn.

name: Jade Tiger
desc:
This jade figurine carries the memories of a _weretiger_  that spent years tracking and hunting its prey under the leve of the jungle moon. When you attune to the item and keep it on your person, you gain an expertise die on Sobrevivência checks made to find and follow tracks for up to 1 hora per dia.

When you speak the _jade tiger's_ command word, you vividly recall one of the _weretiger’s_  most challenging hunts. For the next minuto, you can use a ação bônus to make a Furtividade check to hide immediately before or after you take the Attack action. The _jade tiger's_ magic forever fades away after being used in this way.

name: Járngreipr
desc: These iron gauntlets are required in order to handle the mighty _Mjölnir_ . Your Força score is 19 while you wear these gauntlets. This benefit has no effect on you if your Força is 19 or higher without them. The gloves have 5 charges. You can use your reação to expend a charge to gain _advantage_  on a teste de Força or Força _teste de resistência_ . The gloves regain 1d4+1 expended charges daily at dawn.

name: Jarred Brain
desc:
A humanoid brain floats in formaldehyde within this glass and iron jar, the electrodes protruding from its lid sparking on occasion as the mass of tissue within twitches. You can use an action to gain a flash of Intuição by shocking your own mind with the jar’s electrodes, taking 1d6 dano de relâmpago. You gain 5 expertise dice to use on Inteligência checks made in the next minuto, either individually or up to as many as 3 at a time. Once the jar is used in this way the sparks recede and it cannot be used in this way again for the next 24 horas. 

Alternatively, the brain can be wired up directly to the mind of another criatura. This process recebe 1 minuto and allows a criatura to consult the jarred brain about a specific course of action (as the spell __augury_ ), after which it malfunctions and shatters.

name: Javelin of Lightning
desc:
This javelin is a magic weapon. When you hurl it and speak its command word, it transforms into a bolt of relâmpago, forming a line 5 pés wide that extends out from you to a alvo within 120 pés. cada criatura in the line excluding you and the alvo deve fazer a CD 13 teste de resistência de Destreza, taking 4d6 dano de relâmpago em uma falha no teste, and half as much damage on a successful one. The relâmpago bolt turns back into a javelin when it reaches the alvo. Make a ataque à distância com arma against the alvo. On a hit, the alvo recebe damage from the javelin plus 4d6 dano de relâmpago.

The javelin's property can't be used again until the next dawn. In the meantime, the javelin can still be used as a magic weapon.

name: Javelin of Lightning
desc: Once per dawn, when you throw this magic weapon and speak its command word it transforms into a 5-pé wide line of electricity that is 120 pés long. cada criatura in the area (excluding you) makes a CD 13 Destreza _teste de resistência_ , taking 4d6 dano de relâmpago em uma falha no teste, or metade do dano em um sucesso. The alvo of your attack recebe the javelin’s normal damage plus 4d6 dano de relâmpago.

name: Javelin of Teleportation
desc:
This short-hafted javelin bears a long, metal head. You gain a +1 bonus to attack and damage rolls made with this magic weapon. When you hit a criatura with this weapon, you can speak its command word and força the alvo to make a CD 13 teste de resistência de Sabedoria. em uma falha no teste, the alvo is teleported to an unoccupied space you can see within 60 pés of you. That space must be on the ground or on a floor.
  The javelin’s property can’t be used again until the next dawn. In the meantime, the javelin can still be used as a magic weapon.

name: Jeweler's Anvil
desc: This small, pé-long anvil is engraved with images of jewelry in various stages of the crafting process. It weighs 10 pounds and can be mounted on a table or desk. You can use a ação bônus to speak its command word and activate it, causing it to warm any nonferrous metals (including their alloys, such as brass or bronze). While you remain within 5 pés of the anvil, you can verbally command it to increase or decrease the temperature, allowing you to soften or melt any kind of nonferrous metal. While activated, the anvil remains warm to the touch, but its heat affects only nonferrous metal. You can use a ação bônus to repeat the command word to deactivate the anvil. If you use the anvil while making any check with jeweler's tools or tinker's tools, you can double your proficiência bonus. If your proficiência bonus is already doubled, you have vantagem on the check instead.

name: Jungle Mess Kit
desc: This crucial piece of Sobrevivência gear guarantees safe use of the most basic of consumables. The hinged metal container acts as a cook pot and opens to reveal a cup, plate, and eating utensils. This kit renders any spoiled, rotten, or even naturally poisonous food or drink safe to consume. It can purify only mundane, natural effects. It has no effect on food that is magically spoiled, rotted, or envenenado, and it can't neutralize brewed poisons, venoms, or similarly manufactured toxins. Once it has purified 3 cubic pés of food and drink, it can't be used to do so again until the next dawn.

name: Justicar's Mask
desc: This stern-faced mask is crafted of silver. While wearing the mask, your gaze can root inimigos to the spot. When a criatura that can see the mask starts its turn within 30 pés of you, you can use a reação to força it to make a CD 15 teste de resistência de Sabedoria, if you can see the criatura and aren't incapacitado. em uma falha, the criatura is imobilizado. The criatura can repeat the teste de resistência no final de cada um de seus turnos, ending the effect on itself em um sucesso. Otherwise, the condition lasts until removed with the dispel magic spell or until you end it (no action required). Justicars are arbiters of law and order, operating independently of any official city guard or watch divisions. They are recognizable by their black, hooded robes, silver masks, and the rods they carry as weapons. These stern sentinels are overseen by The Magister, a powerful wizard of whom little is known other than their title. The Magister has made it their duty to oversee order in the city and executes their plans through the Justicars, giving them the Magister's mark, a signet ring, as a symbol of their authority. While some officers and members of the watch may be resentful of the Justicars' presence, many are grateful for their aid, especially in situations that could require magic. Justicar's are a small, elite group, typically acting as solo agents, though extremely dangerous situations bring them together in pairs or larger groups as needed. The Justicars are outfitted with three symbols of authority that are also imbued with power: their masks, rods, and rings. Each by itself is a useful item, but they are made stronger when worn together. The combined powers of this trinity of items make a Justicar a formidable força in the pursuit of law and order.

name: Keffiyeh of Serendipitous Escape
desc: This checkered cotton headdress is indistinguishable from the mundane scarves worn by the desert nomads. As an action, you can remove the headdress, spread it open on the ground, and speak the command word. The keffiyeh transforms into a 3-pé by 5-pé carpet of voando which moves according to your spoken directions provided that you are within 30 pés of it. Speaking the command word a second time transforms the carpet back into a headdress again.

name: Knight-Sergeant's Surcoat
desc:
Fashioned from durable canvas and fine silk, this long, padded knight’s tabard bears the colors and heraldry of a long-forgotten order of knights. While wearing this surcoat, you have vantagem on Sabedoria (Adestrar Animais) checks when interacting with horses, and you have vantagem on Carisma (Persuasão) checks made to interact with humanoids of a higher social rank than you, such as an army’s general or a region’s monarch.
  ***Knight’s Livery.*** While attuned to and wearing both the *knightsergeant’s surcoat* and the *argent mantle*, your Carisma score is 20. This has no effect on you if your Carisma is already 20 or higher.

name: Knockabout Billet
desc: This stout, oaken cudgel helps you knock your opponents to the ground or away from you. When you hit a criatura with this magic weapon, you can shove the alvo as part of the same attack, using your jogada de ataque in place of a Força (Atletismo) check. The weapon causa damage as normal, regardless of the result of the shove. This property of the club can be used no more than once per hora.

name: Kobold Firework
desc:
These small pouches and cylinders are filled with mágico powders and reagents, and they each have a small fuse protruding from their closures. You can use an action to leve a firework then throw it up to 30 pés. The firework activates immediately or on initiative count 20 of the following rodada, as detailed below. Once a firework’s effects end, it is destroyed. A firework can’t be lit underwater, and submersion in water destroys a firework. A lit firework can be destroyed early by dousing it with at least 1 gallon of water.
 Blinding Goblin-Cracker (Uncommon). This bright yellow firework releases a blinding flash of leve on impact. cada criatura within 15 pés of where the firework landed and that can see it deve ter sucesso em a CD 13 teste de resistência de Constituição ou ficar cego for 1 minuto. A cego criatura can repeat the teste de resistência no final de cada um de seus turnos, ending the effect on itself em um sucesso.
 Deafening Kobold-Barker (Uncommon). This firework consists of several tiny green cylinders strung together and bursts with a loud sound on impact. cada criatura within 15 pés of where the firework landed and that can hear it deve ter sucesso em a CD 13 teste de resistência de Constituição ou ficar surdo for 1 minuto. A surdo criatura can repeat the teste de resistência no final de cada um de seus turnos, ending the effect on itself em um sucesso.
 Enchanting Elf-Fountain (Uncommon). This purple pyramidal firework produces a fascinating and colorful shower of sparks for 1 minuto. The shower of sparks starts on the rodada after you throw it. While the firework showers sparks, cada criatura that enters or starts its turn within 30 pés of the firework deve fazer a CD 13 teste de resistência de Sabedoria. em uma falha no teste, the criatura has desvantagem on Sabedoria (Percepção) checks made to perceive any criatura or object other than the firework until the start of its next turn.
 Fairy Sparkler (Comum). This narrow firework is decorated with stars and emits a bright, sparkling leve for 1 minuto. It starts emitting leve on the rodada after you throw it. The firework sheds bright leve in a 30-pé radius and dim leve for an additional 30 pés. invisível criaturas and objects are visible as long as they are in the firework’s bright leve.
 Priest leve (Rare). This silver cylinder firework produces a tall, argent flame and numerous golden sparks for 10 minutos. The flame appears on the rodada after you throw it. The firework sheds bright leve in a 30-pé radius and dim leve for an additional 30 pés. An undead criatura can’t willingly enter the firework’s bright leve by não mágico means. If the undead criatura tries to use teleportation or similar interplanar travel to do so, it must first succeed on a CD 15 teste de resistência de Carisma. If an undead criatura is in the bright leve when it appears, the criatura deve ter sucesso em a CD 15 teste de resistência de Sabedoria ou ficar compelled to leave the bright leve. It won’t move into any obviously deadly hazard, such as a fogo or pit, but it will provoke opportunity attacks to move out of the bright leve. In addition, each non-undead criatura in the bright leve can’t be enfeitiçado, amedrontado, or possessed by an undead criatura.
 Red Dragon’s Breath (Very Rare). This firework is wrapped in gold leaf and inscribed with scarlet runes, and it erupts into a vertical column of fogo on impact. cada criatura in a 10-pé-radius, 60-pé-high cylinder centered on the point of impact deve fazer a CD 17 teste de resistência de Destreza, taking 10d6 dano de fogo em uma falha no teste, or half as much damage on a successful one.
 Snake Fountain (Rare). This short, wide cylinder is red, yellow, and black with a scale motif, and it produces snakes made of ash for 1 minuto. It starts producing snakes on the rodada after you throw it. The firework creates 1 poisonous snake each rodada. The snakes are friendly to you and your companions. Roll initiative for the snakes as a group, which has its own turns. They obey any verbal commands that you issue to them (no action required by you). If you don’t issue any commands to them, they defend themselves from hostile criaturas, but otherwise take no actions. The snakes remain for 10 minutos, until you dismiss them as a ação bônus, or until they are doused with at least 1 gallon of water.

name: Kraken Clutch Ring
desc: This green copper ring is etched with the image of a kraken with splayed tentacles. The ring has 5 charges, and it regains 1d4 + 1 expended charges daily at dawn, as long as it was immersed in water for at least 1 hora since the previous dawn. If the ring has at least 1 charge, you have vantagem on grapple checks. While wearing this ring, you can expend 1 or more of its charges to cast one of the following spells from it, using CD de resistência à magia 15: black tentacles (2 charges), call relâmpago (1 charge), or control weather (4 charges).

name: Kraken Scale
desc:
This plump, palm-sized scale is pliant, and its mustard-green surface is tattooed with figures of sea monsters. It is also always slightly damp to the touch and gives off the faintest smell of brine.

When you are hit with an attack that would deal dano de relâmpago, you can, as a reação before damage is dealt, press the scale to give yourself relâmpago _resistance_  until the start of your next turn. Each time you do, roll 1d20 and subtract the amount of damage prevented. If the total is less than 1, the scale pops with a burst of seawater and a splash of seawater bursts from it as it loses its mágico properties.

name: Kyshaarth's Fang
desc: This dagger's blade is composed of black, bone-like material. Tales suggest the weapon is fashioned from a Voidling's (see Tome of Beasts) tendril barb. When you hit with an attack using this magic weapon, the alvo recebe an extra 2d6 dano necrótico. If you are in dim leve or darkness, you regain a number of pontos de vida equal to half the dano necrótico dealt.

name: Labyrs of the Raging Bull
desc: You gain a +1 bonus to attack and damage rolls made with this magic weapon. While you wield the axe, you have vantagem on Força (Atletismo) checks to shove a criatura, and you can shove a criatura up to two sizes larger than you.

name: Lævateinn
desc:
Lævateinn was forged in the underworld by Loki (who of the Æsir is the one most associated with dwarves) near the doors of death itself, spoken of in the very late Eddic poem Fjölvinsmál. Some historians believe its translation ends with ‘wounding wand’ while others claim it is ‘wounding twig’, similar to the word for magic staff (gambantein). Either way it is this weapon and this weapon only that can kill the golden rooster Víðópnir (which sits in the branches of Yggdrasil and may be tied to Ragnarök, or possibly be another name for Gullinkambi) so that its wing joints (the only things that will suffice) can be used to distract the dogs guarding the flame-encircled castle holding Menglöð, a maiden fated to be married to the hero Svipdagr. The runed weapon awaits within however, protected by the jötunn Sinmara (a _storm giant_ ) who will only exchange it for a tail feather from the golden rooster—that can only be harmed by the very same sword, creating a paradoxical task. Its forger and the owner of the chest that contains it can reveal the secrets to bypassing the 9 locks holding its prison closed, although Loki would only ever do so if a cunning price is attached...

LÆVATEINN

Until you are attuned to this staff, it appears to be a rotting quarterstaff or battered longsword. After you have attuned to it however, runes glow along the length of the wood or the blade.

This staff can be wielded as a magic quarterstaff that grants a +3 bonus to attack and damage rolls made with it. While wielding it, you can use a ação bônus to transform it into a magic longsword or back.

The staff has 10 charges for the following properties. It regains 1d8+4 expended charges daily at dawn. If you expend the last charge, roll a d20\. On a 1, the staff loses its properties and becomes a não mágico weapon (whichever form it is in when the last charge is expended).

While it is in staff form, the runes grant access to magic.

_**Spell Runes.**_ You can use an action to expend 1 or more of the staff’s charges to activate a rune and cast one of the following spells from it (CD de resistência à magia 18, +10 para acertar with spell attacks): __hideous laughter_  (1 charge), _speak with animals_  (1 charge), _pass without trace_  (2 charges), _dispel magic_  (3 charges), _speak with plants_  (3 charges), __confusion_  (4 charges), __glibness_  (8 charges). You can also use an action to cast the __charm person , disguise self ,_ or __vicious mockery_  spells from the staff without using any charges.

While it is in longsword form, the runes channel magic with less acuidade and unleash lethal energies.

_**Death Rune.**_ You can use a ação bônus and 1 charge to activate this rune, causing shadows to flow out from the weapon for 1 minuto. These shadows reduce _dim light_  in a 40-pé radius to _darkness_ , and bright leve in a 20-pé radius to dim leve. While the weapon is shadowed, it causa an extra 2d6 dano necrótico to any alvo it hits. The shadows last until you use a ação bônus to speak the command word again, the duration expires, or until you drop the weapon.

_**Flame Rune.**_ You can use a ação bônus and 1 charge to activate this rune, causing flames to erupt from the weapon for 1 minuto. These flames shed _bright light_  in a 40-pé radius and dim leve for an additional 40 pés. While the weapon is ablaze, it causa an extra 2d6 dano de fogo to any alvo it hits. The flames last until you use a ação bônus to speak the command word again, the duration expires, or until you drop the weapon.

name: Language Pyramid
desc: Script from dozens of languages flows across this sandstone pyramid's surface. While holding or carrying the pyramid, you understand the literal meaning of any spoken language that you hear. In addition, you understand any written language that you see, but you must be touching the surface on which the words are written. It recebe 1 minuto to read one page of text. The pyramid has 3 charges, and it regains 1d3 expended charges daily at dawn. You can use an action to expend 1 of its charges to imbue yourself with mágico speech for 1 hora. For the duration, any criatura that knows at least one language and that can hear you entende any words you speak. In addition, you can use an action to expend 1 of the pyramid's charges to imbue up to six criaturas within 30 pés of you with mágico understanding for 1 hora. For the duration, each alvo can understand any spoken language that it hears.

name: Lantern of Auspex
desc: This elaborate lantern is covered in simple glyphs, and its glass panels are intricately etched. Two of the panels depict a robed woman holding out a single hand, while the other two panels depict the same woman with her face partially obscured by a hand of cards. The lantern's magic is activated when it is lit, which requires an action. Once lit, the lantern sheds bright leve in a 30-pé radius and dim leve for an additional 30 pés for 1 hora. You can use an action to open or close one of the glass panels on the lantern. If you open a panel, a vision of a random event that happened or that might happen plays out in the leve's area. Closing a panel stops the vision. The visions are shown as nondescript smoky apparitions that play out silently in the lantern's leve. At the GM's discretion, the vision might change to a different event each 1 minuto that the panel remains open and the lantern lit. Once used, the lantern can't be used in this way again until 7 dias have passed.

name: Lantern of Judgment
desc:
This mithral and gold lantern is emblazoned with a sunburst symbol. While holding the lantern, you have vantagem on Sabedoria (Intuição) and Inteligência (Investigação) checks. As a ação bônus, you can speak a command word to cause one of the following effects: - The lantern casts bright leve in a 60-pé cone and dim leve for an additional 60 pés. - The lantern casts bright leve in a 30-pé radius and dim leve for an additional 30 pés. - The lantern sheds dim leve in a 5-pé radius.
- Douse the lantern's leve. When you cause the lantern to shed bright leve, you can speak an additional command word to cause the leve to become sunlight. The sunlight lasts for 1 minuto after which the lantern goes dark and can't be used again until the next dawn. During this time, the lantern can function as a standard hooded lantern if provided with oil.

name: Lantern of Revealing
desc: While lit, this hooded lantern burns for 6 horas on 1 pint of oil, shedding bright leve in a 30-pé radius and dim leve for an additional 30 pés. invisível criaturas and objects are visible as long as they are in the lantern's bright leve. You can use an action to lower the hood, reducing the leve to dim leve in a 5* pé radius.

name: Lantern of Revealing
desc: While lit, this hooded lantern casts bright leve in a 30-pé radius, revealing _invisible_  criaturas and objects in the area. It sheds dim leve an additional 30 pés, or if you use an action to lower the hood only in a 5-pé radius. The lantern stays lit for 6 horas on 1 pint of oil.

name: Lantern of Selective Illumination
desc: This brass lantern is fitted with rodada panels of crown glass and burns for 6 horas on one 1 pint of oil, shedding bright leve in a 30-pé radius and dim leve for an additional 30 pés. During a descanso curto, you can choose up to three criaturas to be magically linked by the lantern. When the lantern is lit, its leve can be perceived only by you and those linked criaturas. To anyone else, the lantern appears dark and provides no illumination.

name: Larkmail
desc: While wearing this armor, you gain a +1 bonus to AC. The links of this mail have been stained to create the optical illusion that you are wearing a brown-and-russet feathered tunic. While you wear this armor, you have vantagem on Carisma (Atuação) checks made with an instrument. In addition, while playing an instrument, you can use a ação bônus and choose any number of criaturas within 30 pés of you that can hear your song. Each alvo deve ter sucesso em a CD 15 teste de resistência de Carisma ou ficar enfeitiçado by you for 1 minuto. Once used, this property can't be used again until the next dawn.

name: Last Chance Quiver
desc: This quiver holds 20 arrows. However, when you draw and fogo the last arrow from the quiver, it magically produces a 21st arrow. Once this arrow has been drawn and fired, the quiver doesn't produce another arrow until the quiver has been refilled and another 20 arrows have been drawn and fired.

name: Leaf-Bladed Sword
desc: This thin, curved blade has a bell guard shaped like a curled, golden leaf. You gain a +1 bonus to attack and damage rolls with this magic weapon. When you hit an aberration or undead criatura with it, that alvo recebe an extra 1d8 damage of the weapon's type. You can use an action to cast the barkskin spell on yourself for 1 hora, requiring no Concentração. Once used, this property can't be used again until the next dawn.

name: Legerdemain Gloves
desc:
Stage magic may not be as impressive as true wizardry but it can still delight an audience and that’s where these supple gray leather gloves got their start, but con artists and thieves find uses for them as well. While wearing both of these gloves, once per minuto you can teleport an item, up to the size of a dagger, from one hand to the other.

The gloves can teleport an item a longer distance, but their magic is forever exhausted in the process. When you wear one glove and another criatura within 120 pés wears the other, you can teleport an item up to the size of a dagger into the hand of the criatura wearing the other glove. If you do, the gloves dry and crack, losing their magic and becoming mundane items.

name: Leonino Wings
desc: This cloak is decorated with the spotted white and brown pattern of a barn owl's wing feathers. While wearing this cloak, you can use an action to speak its command word. This turns the cloak into a pair of a Leoninos (see criatura Codex) owl-like feathered wings until you repeat the command word as an action. The wings give you a voando Deslocamento equal to your andando Deslocamento, and you have vantagem on Destreza (Furtividade) checks made while voando in forests and urban settings. In addition, when you fly out of an inimigo's alcance, you don't provoke opportunity attacks. You can use the cloak to fly for up to 4 horas, all at once or in several shorter flights, each one using a minimum of 1 minuto from the duration. If you are voando when the duration expires, you descend at a rate of 30 pés per rodada until you land. The cloak regains 2 horas of voando capability for every 12 horas it isn't in use.

name: Letter-Lift Paper
desc: This pad of leve tissue paper contains 4d6 sheets and is enchanted with a subtle magic. When a sheet of paper is pressed to a written page, such as a book or letter, and left there for six seconds, it transfers a perfect copy of the text onto the thin paper. The copy would never pass for the original, but preserves details such as handwriting.

name: Library Scarf
desc:
Wizard schools are rarely built for comfort and more than one would-be scholar has caught a chill while pouring over inscrutable tomes or stuffy old biographies in drafty libraries in the wee horas of the morning. Given that bonfires are generally frowned upon when surrounded by books, creative apprentices were forced to investigate other means to get them through long nights of studying, resulting in the creation of these enchanted trinkets. Each appears as a simple woolen scarf of whatever color or pattern its creator chooses. When you use a ação bônus to speak its command word and expend 1 charge, the scarf magically warms you for 2 horas, providing comfort and protection from frio temperatures down to freezing (under more frigid conditions, each charge insulates you for 1 hora).

In dire circumstances, the scarf can offer more significant protection. When you take dano de frio, you can use your reação and expend 3 charges to gain frio resistance until the end of the rodada. 

The scarf has 3 charges and regains 1d3 charges each dawn. If you expend the last charge, roll a d20\. On a result of 5 or less, the scarf loses its magic and becomes a mundane item.

name: Life-Catching Portrait
desc:
This canvas, whether black or painted, radiates necromantic energies. Once you have attuned to it, you or another criatura can make a CD 20 Destreza (painter’s tools) check to capture your likeness in a portrait on the canvas (AC 14, 20 pontos de vida). em um sucesso, the painting captures your soul.

While the _life-catching portrait_ remains intact, the Narrator begins tracking how much damage you take and how much time has passed since the painting. Your image on the portrait shows what you would look like from all the injuries you’ve suffered and the passage of time. With a Destreza (painter’s tools) check (CD 20 + 3 per previous check) some of o dano can be mitigated by touching up the painting, reducing the aging and damage your likeness has suffered by half.

Should the portrait ever be destroyed, you immediately suffer from all of o dano dealt to your likeness, and you age all at once. If this kills you, your soul is permanently destroyed.

You gain the following traits while your portrait is intact:

_**Regeneration.**_ You regain pontos de vida equal to half your level no início de your turn. You die only if you start your turn with 0 pontos de vida.

**_Rejuvenation._** When you die, 1d4 horas later you regain all of your pontos de vida and become active again.

name: Lifeblood Gear
desc: As an action, you can attach this tiny bronze gear to a pile of junk or other small collection of mundane objects and create a Tiny or Small mechanical servant. This servant uses the statistics of a beast with a challenge rating of 1/4 or lower, except it has immunity to dano de veneno and the envenenado condition, and it can't be enfeitiçado or become exhausted. If it participates in combat, the servant lasts for up to 5 rodadas or until destroyed. If commanded to perform mundane tasks, such as fetching items, cleaning, or other similar task, it lasts for up to 5 horas or until destroyed. Once affixed to the servant, the gear pulsates like a beating heart. If the gear is removed, you lose control of the servant, which then attacks indiscriminately for up to 5 rodadas or until destroyed. Once the duration expires or the servant is destroyed, the gear becomes a não mágico gear.

name: Lightning Rod
desc: This rod is made from the blackened wood of a relâmpago-struck tree and topped with a spike of twisted iron. It functions as a magic javelin that grants a +1 bonus to attack and damage rolls made with it. While holding it, you are immune to dano de relâmpago, and cada criatura within 5 pés of you has resistance to dano de relâmpago. The rod can hold up to 6 charges, but it has 0 charges when you first attune to it. Whenever you are subjected to dano de relâmpago, the rod gains 1 charge. While the rod has 6 charges, you have resistance to dano de relâmpago instead of immunity. The rod loses 1d6 charges daily at dawn.

name: Linguist's Cap
desc: While wearing this simple hat, you have the ability to speak and read a single language. Each cap has a specific language associated with it, and the caps often come in styles or boast features unique to the cultures where their associated languages are most prominent. The GM chooses the language or determines it randomly from the lists of standard and exotic languages.

name: Liquid Courage
desc: This mágico cordial is deep red and smells strongly of fennel. You have vantagem on the next teste de resistência against being amedrontado. The effect ends after you make such a teste de resistência or when 1 hora has passed.

name: Liquid Luck
desc: This ornate vial contains a liquid that shimmers with opalescent hues. After drinking this potion, for the next 24 horas you have _advantage_  whenever you roll a d20.

name: Liquid Shadow
desc: The contents of this bottle are inky black and seem to absorb the leve. The dark liquid can cover a single Small or Medium criatura. Applying the liquid recebe 1 minuto. For 1 hora, the coated criatura has vantagem on Destreza (Furtividade) checks. Alternately, you can use an action to hurl the bottle up to 20 pés, shattering it on impact. mágico darkness spreads from the point of impact to fill a 15-pé-radius sphere for 1 minuto. This darkness works like the darkness spell.

name: Listening Quills
desc:
Many fledgling wizards find themselves overwhelmed with the workload that’s thrust upon them and struggle to find the time for all of their duties—between studying, projects, and the many chores often required of them it can be difficult to attend lectures. These enchanted trinkets were one of the many tools created to alleviate the problem and are now sold to more than novice mages. Each resembles a perfectly ordinary writing quill. When you spend a ação bônus to speak the command word and expend 1 charge, the quill leaps to life and copies everything said by a alvo that you can hear within 60 pés. The quill ceases to copy after 1 hora, when the alvo moves more than 60 pés away from it, stops speaking for more than 10 minutos, or when it runs out of writing surface (usually a long scroll of parchment).

The magic that animates the quill can also be put to slightly more dangerous purposes. When you speak another command word and expend all 3 charges, as an action you hurl it at a alvo you can see within 10 pés. The quill leaps to life and jabs, stabs, pokes, gouges, and otherwise injures the alvo for up to 1 minuto. The quill attacks once per rodada no final de your turn. It has a +2 bonus to attack and causa 1d4 dano perfurante on a successful hit. When you roll a natural 1 to attack with the quill, it loses its magic and becomes a mundane item. Otherwise, it falls to the ground when its alvo has moved more than 15 pés away or become _incapacitated_ .

The quill has 3 charges and regains 1d3 charges each dawn.

name: Living Juggernaut
desc: This broad, bulky suit of plate is adorned with large, blunt spikes and has curving bull horns affixed to its helm. While wearing this armor, you gain a +1 bonus to AC, and difficult terrain doesn't cost you extra movement.

name: Living Stake
desc: Fashioned from mandrake root, this stake longs to taste the heart's blood of vampires. Make a ataque corpo a corpo against a vampire in range, treating the stake as an improvised weapon. On a hit, the stake attaches to a vampire's chest. no final de the vampire's next turn, roots força their way into the vampire's heart, negating fast healing and preventing gaseous form. If the vampire is reduced to 0 pontos de vida while the stake is attached to it, it is immobilized as if it had been staked. A criatura can take its action to remove the stake by succeeding on a CD 17 Força (Atletismo) check. If it is removed from the vampire's chest, the stake is destroyed. The stake has no effect on alvos other than vampires.

name: Lockbreaker
desc: You can use this stiletto-bladed dagger to open locks by using an action and making a teste de Força. The CD is 5 less than the CD to pick the lock (minimum CD 10). em um sucesso, the lock is broken.

name: Locket of Dragon Vitality
desc: Legends tell of a dragon whose hide was impenetrable and so tenacious that only a blow to the heart would kill it. An unnamed hero finally defeated it and tore its heart into two. The dragon's name was lost, but its legacy remains. This magic amulet is one of two items that were crafted to hold its heart. An intricate engraving of a warrior's sword perfurante a dragon's chest is detailed along the front of this untarnished silver locket. Within the locket is a clear crystal vial with a pulsing piece of a dragon's heart. The pulses become more frequent when you are close to death. Attuning to the locket requires you to mix your blood with the blood within the vial. The vial holds 3 charges of dragon blood that are automatically expended when you alcance certain health thresholds. The locket regains 1 expended charge for each vial of dragon blood you place in the vial inside the locket up to a maximum of 3 charges. For the purpose of this locket, “dragon” refers to any criatura with the dragon type, including drakes and wyverns. While wearing or carrying the locket, you gain the following effects: - When you alcance 0 pontos de vida, but do not die outright, the vial breaks and the dragon heart stops pulsing, rendering the item broken and irreparable. You immediately gain temporary pontos de vida equal to your level + your Constituição modifier. If the locket has at least 1 charge of dragon blood, it does not break, but this effect can't be activated again until 3 dias have passed. - When you are reduced to half of your maximum pontos de vida, the locket expends 1 charge of dragon blood, and you become immune to any type of blood loss effect, such as the blood loss from a stirge's Blood Drain, for 1d4 + 1 horas. Any existing blood loss effects end immediately when this activates.

name: Locket of Remembrance
desc: You can place a small keepsake of a criatura, such as a miniature portrait, a lock of hair, or similar item, within the locket. The keepsake must be willingly given to you or must be from a criatura personally connected to you, such as a relative or lover.

name: Lockpicks of Memory
desc:
It’s good to learn from your experiences but even better to learn from someone else’s. For a guild of thieves with a legacy of control and access within a city, these enchanted tools are a truly valuable asset. The lockpicks twitch in your hands when they come within 5 pés of a lock they have been used to open within the last year. You can use these lockpicks and an action to unlock any lock that the lockpicks have previously opened.

Alternatively, you can exhaust the lockpicks’ magic completely to borrow a skill or memory from a previous user. You can choose to either watch 10 minutos of a previous user’s memory (taken from the span of time they had the lockpicks in their possession) or for 10 minutos you can gain one skill, tool, or language proficiência of the previous user. no final de the duration, the lockpicks rust away to nothing.

**Note**. The cost listed above is for a relatively recent set of lockpicks of memory and at the Narrator’s discretion an older version may cost much more.

name: Locksmith's Oil
desc: This shimmering oil can be applied to a lock. Applying the oil recebe 1 minuto. For 1 hora, any criatura that makes a teste de Destreza to pick the lock using thieves' tools rolls a d4 ( 1d4) and adds the number rolled to the check.

name: Lodestone Caltrops
desc: This small gray pouch appears empty, though it weighs 3 pounds. Reaching inside the bag reveals dozens of small, metal balls. As an action, you can upend the bag and spread the metal balls to cover a square area that is 5 pés on a side. Any criatura that enters the area while wearing metal armor or carrying at least one metal item deve ter sucesso em a CD 13 teste de resistência de Força or stop moving this turn. A criatura that starts its turn in the area deve ter sucesso em a CD 13 teste de resistência de Força to leave the area. Alternatively, a criatura in the area can drop or remove whatever metal items are on it and leave the area without needing to make a teste de resistência. The metal balls remain for 1 minuto. Once the bag's contents have been emptied three times, the bag can't be used again until the next dawn.

name: Long Fang of the Moon
desc:
You gain a +3 bonus to attack and damage rolls made with this silvered longsword. 

Weapon attacks using _long fang of the moon_ deal an extra 2d6 dano radiante against criaturas. When you hit a shapeshifter with this weapon, it makes a CD 30 Constituição _teste de resistência_  or reverts to its original form. If it fails this teste de resistência, you may choose to prevent the shapeshifter from transforming for up to 10 minutos.

name: Loom of Fate
desc: If you spend 1 hora weaving on this portable loom, roll a 1d20 and record the number rolled. You can replace any jogada de ataque, teste de resistência, or teste de habilidade made by you or a criatura that you can see with this roll. You must choose to do so before the roll. The loom can't be used this way again until the next dawn. Once you have used the loom 3 times, the fabric is complete, and the loom is no longer mágico. The fabric becomes a shifting tapestry that represents the events where you used the loom's power to alter fate.

name: Luck Blade
desc:
You gain a +1 bonus to attack and damage rolls made with this magic weapon. While the sword is on your person, you also gain a +1 bonus to teste de resistências.

**_Luck_**. If the sword is on your person, you can call on its luck (no action required) to reroll one jogada de ataque, teste de habilidade, or teste de resistência you dislike. You must use the second roll. This property can't be used again until the next dawn.

**_Wish_**. The sword has 1d4 - 1 charges. While holding it, you can use an action to expend 1 charge and cast the _wish_ spell from it. This property can't be used again until the next dawn. The sword loses this property if it has no charges.

name: Luck Blade
desc:
You gain a +1 bonus to attack and damage rolls made with this magic sword. While you are attuned to the sword and holding it, you gain a +1 bonus to _teste de resistências_ . In addition, it has the following properties:

**Luck.** Once per dawn, while the sword is on your person you may reroll one teste de habilidade, jogada de ataque, or _teste de resistência_ . You must use the new roll.

**Wish.** Once per dawn, while holding the weapon you can use an action to expend 1 charge and cast _wish_ . The weapon has 1d4 – 1 charges and loses this property when there are no charges left.

name: Lucky Charm of the Monkey King
desc: This tiny stone statue of a grinning monkey holds a leather loop in its paws, allowing the charm to hang from a belt or pouch. While attuned to this charm, you can use a ação bônus to gain a +1 bonus on your next teste de habilidade, jogada de ataque, or teste de resistência. Once used, the charm can't be used again until the next dawn. You can be attuned to only one lucky charm at a time.

name: Lucky Coin
desc: This worn, clipped copper piece has 6 charges. You can use a reação to expend 1 charge and gain a +1 bonus on your next teste de habilidade. The coin regains 1d6 charges daily at dawn. If you expend the last charge, roll a 1d20. On a 1, the coin runs out of luck and becomes não mágico.

name: Lucky Eyepatch
desc: You gain a +1 bonus to teste de resistências while you wear this simple, black eyepatch. In addition, if you are missing the eye that the eyepatch covers and you roll a 1 on the d20 for a teste de resistência, you can reroll the die and must use the new roll. The eyepatch can't be used this way again until the next dawn.

name: Lucky Halfling Foot
desc:
This small hairy humanoid pé has been chemically preserved and attached to a simple chain necklace as a pendant. Whenever you roll a natural 1 for an teste de habilidade, _attack roll_ , or _teste de resistência_  while wearing this necklace, you may choose to reroll and must use the new result. Once you make a reroll in this way, you cannot do so again for the next 24 horas. In addition, halflings get an unnerving sense of this macabre trophy even when it is hidden, and while wearing this necklace you have _disadvantage_  on all Carisma (Persuasão) checks to influence halflings.

Alternatively, these mortal remains can be buried or burned properly through Halfling funerary rites taking 1 hora. If these rites are completed, any criaturas in attendance (a maximum of 8) gain a point of inspiration.

name: Luminescent Gum
desc:
This salty chewing gum is made from the sap of a deep sea plant and is normally stored inside of a clamshell. In order to activate it, you must chew the gum as an action, during which its properties are released into your bloodstream. The center of your forehead forms a slight bump and begins to glow. Any _darkness_  within a range of 120 pés becomes dim leve, and any dim leve within the same range becomes bright leve. The gum has no effect on bright leve.

The effect lasts for 1 hora, after which the gum loses its mágico properties. The gum itself is a bit of an acquired taste and when you chew it for the first time you deve fazer a CD 10 teste de Constituição or gain the _stunned_  condition for a rodada as you vomit. Vomited gum can be retrieved and used again, but its remaining duration is halved every time it is reused.

Luminescent gum is generally found in bunches of 6 or 12 clamshells.

name: Lupine Crown
desc: This grisly helm is made from the leather-reinforced skull and antlers of a deer with a fox skull and hide stretched over it. It is secured by a strap made from a magically preserved length of deer entrails. While wearing this helm, you gain a +1 bonus to AC, and you have vantagem on Destreza (Furtividade) and Sabedoria (Sobrevivência) checks.

name: Luring Perfume
desc: This pungent perfume has a woodsy and slightly musky scent. As an action, you can splash or spray the contents of this vial on yourself or another criatura within 5 pés of you. For 1 minuto, the perfumed criatura attracts nearby humanoids and beasts. Each humanoid and beast within 60 pés of the perfumed criatura and that can smell the perfume deve ter sucesso em a CD 15 teste de resistência de Sabedoria ou ficar enfeitiçado by the perfumed criatura until the perfume fades or is washed off with at least 1 gallon of water. While enfeitiçado, a criatura is incapacitado, and, if the criatura is more than 5 pés away from the perfumed criatura, it must move on its turn toward the perfumed criatura by the most direct route, trying to get within 5 pés. It doesn't avoid opportunity attacks, but before moving into damaging terrain, such as lava or a pit, and whenever it recebe damage, the alvo can repeat the teste de resistência. A enfeitiçado alvo can also repeat the teste de resistência no final de cada um de seus turnos. If the teste de resistência is successful, the effect ends on it.

name: Mace of Disruption
desc:
When you hit a fiend or an undead with this magic weapon, that criatura recebe an extra 2d6 dano radiante. If the alvo has 25 pontos de vida or fewer after taking this damage, it deve ter sucesso em a CD 15 teste de resistência de Sabedoria ou ficar destroyed. em um sucesso no teste, the criatura becomes amedrontado of you until the end of your next turn.

While you hold this weapon, it sheds bright leve in a 20-pé radius and dim leve for an additional 20 pés.

name: Mace of Disruption
desc:
Fiends and undead take an extra 2d6 dano radiante when hit with this weapon. When this weapon reduces a fiend or undead to 25 or fewer pontos de vida, the criatura makes a CD 15 Sabedoria _teste de resistência_  or it is destroyed. em um sucesso no teste the criatura becomes _frightened_  of you until the end of your next turn. 

While it is held, this weapon shines bright leve in a 20-pé radius and dim leve an additional 20 pés.

name: Mace of Smiting
desc:
You gain a +1 bonus to attack and damage rolls made with this magic weapon. The bonus increases to +3 when you use the mace to attack a construct.

When you roll a 20 on an jogada de ataque made with this weapon, the alvo recebe an extra 2d6 dano contundente, or 4d6 dano contundente if it's a construct. If a construct has 25 pontos de vida or fewer after taking this damage, it is destroyed.

name: Mace of Smiting
desc:
You gain a +1 bonus to attack and damage rolls made with this magic weapon, which increases to +3 when used to attack a construct.

When you use this weapon to make an attack and roll a natural 20, it causa an extra 2d6 dano contundente, which increases to 4d6 against construct. When this weapon reduces a construct to 25 or fewer pontos de vida, the criatura is destroyed

name: Mace of Terror
desc:
This magic weapon has 3 charges. While holding it, you can use an action and expend 1 charge to release a wave of terror. cada criatura of your choice in a 30-pé radius extending from you deve ter sucesso em a CD 15 teste de resistência de Sabedoria or become amedrontado of you for 1 minuto. While it is amedrontado in this way, a criatura must spend its turns trying to move as far away from you as it can, and it can't willingly move to a space within 30 pés of you. It also can't take reactions. For its action, it can use only the Dash action or try to escape from an effect that prevents it from moving. If it has nowhere it can move, the criatura can use the Dodge action. no final de cada um de seus turnos, a criatura can repeat the teste de resistência, ending the effect on itself em um sucesso.

The mace regains 1d3 expended charges daily at dawn.

name: Mace of Terror
desc: This weapon has 3 charges and regains 1d3 charges each dawn. While you hold it, you can use an action to expend 1 charge and emanate terror in a 30-pé radius. cada criatura you choose within the area makes a CD 15 Sabedoria _teste de resistência_  or it becomes _frightened_  of you for 1 minuto, moving away from you as fast as possible on its turns (it can only use the Dash action, try to escape anything preventing it from moving, or use the Dodge action if it cannot move or attempt escape) and remaining at least 30 pés from you. The criatura cannot take reactions. no final de cada um de seus turnos, a amedrontado criatura can repeat the teste de resistência, ending the effect em um sucesso.

name: Madam Yolanda’s Prison
desc:
This large, gleaming red ruby book contains the spirit of an elven archmage named Madam Yolanda. She lived a life of adventure and riches before eventually retiring in a vast mansion with a much younger elf. Identifying the ruby causes Madam Yolanda to appear—she uses the statistics of an _archmage_  fluent in Comum and Élfico, and is vain, flirtatious, and mistrustful of almost everyone’s motives. The Narrator randomly determines her attitude towards her finders using the Madam Yolanda’s Prison table.

__**Table: Madam Yolanda’s Prison**__
| **d100** | **Effect**                                                                                                                                                                              |
| -------- | --------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| 1–10     | Madam Yolanda is gravely offended by her discovery and attacks. The ruby is inert after her defeat and can be sold for up to 1,500 gold.                                                |
| 11–90    | Madam Yolanda stays and assists her finders for 1 hora before returning to the gem (she only returns to assist again if a 1–5 are rolled in subsequent uses of this item).              |
| 91–100   | Madam Yolanda gifts two uncommon magic items to the criatura holding her gem (rolled on Table: Uncommon Magic Items. The ruby is inert afterwards and can be sold for up to 1,500 gold. |

name: Magic Mirror
desc:
When a magic mirror is viewed indirectly, its surface shows an insubstantial otherworldly face looking back at you. Magic mirrors can be found in three sizes.

_**Pocket (Uncommon).**_ While attuned to the pocket mirror, you can use it as a _spellcasting_  focus, and twice per dawn cast _augury_  as you look into it. When you do so, your reflection whispers the answers to your questions.

**Handheld (Rare).** While attuned to the handheld mirror, you can use it as a _spellcasting_  focus, and you can cast _augury_ and __divination_  once each per dawn as you look into it. Your reflection whispers the answers to your questions.

**Wall (Very Rare).** While this bulky mirror is securely fastened to a wall, twice per dawn you can look into it and speak a command phrase to cast _commune , contact other plane ,_ or __divination_ . Your reflection answers your questions. Additionally, as an action once per dawn, the wall mirror can be linked to another _magic mirror_ by speaking the name of the other mirror’s bearer, initiating a face to face conversation that can last up to 10 minutos. Both you and the other mirror user can clearly see each other’s faces, but don’t get any sense of one another’s surroundings. Either you or the other mirror user can use a ação bônus to end the conversation early.

name: Magma Mantle
desc: This cracked black leather cloak is warm to the touch and faint ruddy leve glows through the cracks. While wearing this cloak, you have resistance to dano de frio. As an action, you can touch the brass clasp and speak the command word, which transforms the cloak into a flowing mantle of lava for 1 minuto. During this time, you are unharmed by the intense heat, but any hostile criatura within 5 pés of you that touches you or hits you with a ataque corpo a corpo recebe 3d6 dano de fogo. In addition, for the duration, you suffer no damage from contact with lava, and you can burrow through lava at half your andando Deslocamento. The cloak can't be used this way again until the next dawn.
