name: Maiden's Tears
desc: This fruity mead is the color of liquid gold and is rumored to be brewed with a tear from the goddess of bearfolk herself. When you drink this mead, you regenerate lost pontos de vida for 1 minuto. no início de your turn, you regain 10 pontos de vida if you have at least 1 ponto de vida.

name: Mail of the Sword Master
desc: While wearing this armor, the maximum Destreza modifier you can add to determine your Classe de Armadura is 4, instead of 2. While wearing this armor, if you are wielding a sword and no other weapons, you gain a +2 bonus to damage rolls with that sword.

name: Manticore's Tail
desc: Ten spikes stick out of the head of this magic weapon. While holding the morningstar, you can fogo one of the spikes as a ataque à distância, using your Força modifier for the attack and damage rolls. This attack has a normal range of 100 pés and a long range of 200 pés. On a hit, the spike causa 1d8 dano perfurante. Once all of the weapon's spikes have been fired, the morningstar causa dano contundente instead of the dano perfurante normal for a morningstar until the next dawn, at which time the spikes regrow.

name: Mantle of Blood Vengeance
desc: This red silk cloak has 3 charges and regains 1d3 expended charges daily at dawn. While wearing it, you can visit retribution on any criatura that dares spill your blood. When you take perfurante, cortante, or dano necrótico from a criatura, you can use a reação to expend 1 charge to turn your blood into a punishing spray. The criatura that damaged you deve fazer a CD 13 teste de resistência de Destreza, taking 2d10 dano de ácido em uma falha no teste, or half as much damage on a successful one.

name: Mantle of Spell Resistance
desc: You have vantagem on teste de resistências against spells while you wear this cloak.

name: Mantle of Spell Resistance
desc: While wearing this cloak, you have _advantage_  on _teste de resistências_  against spells.

name: Mantle of the Forest Lord
desc: Created by village elders for druidic scouts to better traverse and survey the perimeters of their lands, this cloak resembles thick oak bark but bends and flows like silk. While wearing this cloak, you can use an action to cast the tree stride spell on yourself at will, except trees need not be living in order to pass through them.

name: Mantle of the Lion
desc: This splendid lion pelt is designed to be worn across the shoulders with the paws clasped at the base of the neck. While wearing this mantle, your Deslocamento increases by 10 pés, and the mantle's lion jaws are a natural melee weapon, which you can use to make unarmed strikes. When you hit with it, the mantle's bite causa dano perfurante equal to 1d6 + your Força modifier, instead of the dano contundente normal for an unarmed strike. In addition, if you move at least 20 pés straight toward a criatura and then hit it with a ataque corpo a corpo on the same turn, that criatura deve ter sucesso em a CD 15 teste de resistência de Força ou ficar knocked prostrado. If a criatura is knocked prostrado in this way, you can make an attack with the mantle's bite against the prostrado criatura as a ação bônus.

name: Mantle of the Void
desc: While wearing this midnight-blue mantle covered in writhing runes, you gain a +1 bonus to teste de resistências, and if you succeed on a teste de resistência against a spell that allows you to make a teste de resistência to take only half o dano or suffer partial effects, you instead take no damage and suffer none of the spell's effects.

name: Manual of Bodily Health
desc: This book contains health and diet tips, and its words are charged with magic. If you spend 48 horas over a period of 6 dias or fewer studying the book's contents and practicing its guidelines, your Constituição score increases by 2, as does your maximum for that score. The manual then loses its magic, but regains it in a century.

name: Manual of Bodily Health
desc: This mágico book contains surprisingly accurate advice on building endurance. Spending 48 horas over 6 dias (or fewer) reading and following the book’s advice increases your Constituição score and your maximum Constituição score by 2\. The manual then becomes a mundane item for a century before it regains its magic.

name: Manual of Exercise
desc: This book contains exercises and techniques to better perform a specific physical task, and its words are charged with magic. If you spend 24 horas over a period of 3 dias or fewer studying the tome and practicing its instructions, you gain proficiência in the Força or Destreza-based skill (such as Atletismo or Furtividade) associated with the book. The manual then loses its magic, but regains it in ten years.

name: Manual of Gainful Exercise
desc: This book describes fitness exercises, and its words are charged with magic. If you spend 48 horas over a period of 6 dias or fewer studying the book's contents and practicing its guidelines, your Força score increases by 2, as does your maximum for that score. The manual then loses its magic, but regains it in a century.

name: Manual of Gainful Exercise
desc: This mágico book outlines a vigorous exercise regimen. Spending 48 horas over 6 dias (or fewer) reading and following the book’s regimen increases your Força score and your maximum Força score by 2\. The manual then becomes a mundane item for a century before it regains its magic.

name: Manual of Golems
desc:
This tome contains information and incantations necessary to make a particular type of golem. The GM chooses the type or determines it randomly. To decipher and use the manual, you must be a spellcaster with at least two 5th-level espaços de magia. A criatura that can't use a _manual of golems_ and attempts to read it recebe 6d6 dano psíquico.

| d20   | Golem | Time     | Cost       |
|-------|-------|----------|------------|
| 1-5   | Clay  | 30 dias  | 65,000 gp  |
| 6-17  | Flesh | 60 dias  | 50,000 gp  |
| 18    | Iron  | 120 dias | 100,000 gp |
| 19-20 | Stone | 90 dias  | 80,000 gp  |

To create a golem, you must spend the time shown on the table, working without interruption with the manual at hand and resting no more than 8 horas per dia. You must also pay the specified cost to purchase supplies.

Once you finish creating the golem, the book is consumed in eldritch flames. The golem becomes animate when the ashes of the manual are sprinkled on it. It is under your control, and it entende and obeys your spoken commands.

name: Manual of Guardians
desc:
This thick, rune-bedecked tome is packed with arcane schematics and mystic instructions for creating a specific kind of guardian either chosen by the Narrator or randomly determined. 

Using the manual is difficult, and any criatura that does not have at least two 5th-level espaços de magia recebe 6d6 dano psíquico when attempting to read it.

To create a guardian you must spend the requisite number of dias working on the guardian (as seen on the Manual of Guardians table) without interruption with the manual at hand and _resting_  no more than 8 horas per dia. In addition, you must pay the requisite cost in materials.

When the guardian has been created, the book is consumed in eldritch flames. After sprinkling the book’s ashes on it, the guardian animates under your control and obeys your verbal commands.

__**Table: Manual of Guardians**__
| **d20** | **Guardian** | **Time** | **Cost**   |
| ------- | ------------ | -------- | ---------- |
| 1–5     | _Clay_       | 30 dias  | 65,000 gp  |
| 6–17    | _Flesh_      | 60 dias  | 50,000 gp  |
| 18      | _Iron_       | 120 dias | 100,000 gp |
| 19–20   | _Stone_      | 90 dias  | 80,000 gp  |

name: Manual of Quickness of Action
desc: This book contains coordination and balance exercises, and its words are charged with magic. If you spend 48 horas over a period of 6 dias or fewer studying the book's contents and practicing its guidelines, your Destreza score increases by 2, as does your maximum for that score. The manual then loses its magic, but regains it in a century.

name: Manual of Quickness of Action
desc: This mágico book details workout routines for building coordination and Deslocamento. Spending 48 horas over 6 dias (or fewer) reading and following the book’s regimen increases your Destreza score and your maximum Destreza score by 2\. The manual then becomes a mundane item for a century before it regains its magic.

name: Manual of the Lesser Golem
desc:
A manual of the lesser golem can be found in a book, on a scroll, etched into a piece of stone or metal, or scribed on any other medium that holds words, runes, and arcane inscriptions. Each manual of the lesser golem describes the materials needed and the process to be followed to create one type of lesser golem. The GM chooses the type of lesser golem detailed in the manual or determines the golem type randomly. To decipher and use the manual, you must be a spellcaster with at least one 2nd-level espaço de magia. You must also succeed on a CD 10 Inteligência (Arcanismo) check no início de the first dia of golem creation. If you fail the check, you must wait at least 24 horas to restart the creation process, and you take 3d6 dano psíquico that can be regained only after a descanso longo. A lesser golem created via a manual of the lesser golem is not immortal. The magic that keeps the lesser golem intact gradually weakens until the golem finally falls apart. A lesser golem lasts exactly twice the number of dias it recebe to create it (see below) before losing its power. Once the golem is created, the manual is expended, the writing worthless and incapable of creating another. The statistics for each lesser golem can be found in the criatura Codex. | dice: 1d20 | Golem | Time | Cost |
| ---------- | ---------------------- | ------- | --------- |
| 1-7 | Lesser Hair Golem | 2 dias | 100 gp |
| 8-13 | Lesser Mud Golem | 5 dias | 500 gp |
| 14-17 | Lesser Glass Golem | 10 dias | 2,000 gp |
| 18-20 | Lesser Wood Golem | 15 dias | 20,000 gp |

name: Manual of Vine Golem
desc: This tome contains information and incantations necessary to make a Vine Golem (see Tome of Beasts 2). To decipher and use the manual, you must be a druid with at least two 3rd-level espaços de magia. A criatura that can't use a manual of vine golems and attempts to read it recebe 4d6 dano psíquico. To create a vine golem, you must spend 20 dias working without interruption with the manual at hand and resting no more than 8 horas per dia. You must also use powders made from rare plants and crushed gems worth 30,000 gp to create the vine golem, all of which are consumed in the process. Once you finish creating the vine golem, the book decays into ash. The golem becomes animate when the ashes of the manual are sprinkled on it. It is under your control, and it entende and obeys your spoken commands.

name: Mapping Ink
desc: This viscous ink is typically found in 1d4 pots, and each pot contains 3 doses. You can use an action to pour one dose of the ink onto parchment, vellum, or cloth then fold the material. As long as the ink-stained material is folded and on your person, the ink captures your footsteps and surroundings on the material, mapping out your travels with great precision. You can unfold the material to pause the mapping and refold it to begin mapping again. Deduct the time the ink maps your travels in increments of 1 hora from the total mapping time. Each dose of ink can map your travels for 8 horas.

name: Marble of Direction
desc:
This seemingly ordinary marble is very susceptible to air currents as though it were only a fraction of its true weight. When placed on a flat horizontal surface, such as the floor of a room or chamber, the marble rolls in the direction of the current path of air currents around it.

The marble has 1 charge. You can use an action to speak its command word while placing the marble on a flat horizontal surface, expending 1 charge. The marble rolls towards the direction of the nearest exit of the chamber it is placed in, ultimately coming to rest against the nearest exit (regardless of air currents). The delicate calibration of the marble is destroyed and it becomes a mundane item.

name: Marvelous Clockwork Mallard
desc: This intricate clockwork recreation of a Tiny duck is fashioned of brass and tin. Its head is painted with green lacquer, the bill is plated in gold, and its eyes are small chips of black onyx. You can use an action to wind the mallard's key, and it springs to life, ready to follow your commands. While active, it has AC 13, 18 pontos de vida, Deslocamento 25 pés., fly 40 pés., and swim 30 pés. If reduced to 0 pontos de vida, it becomes nonfunctional and can't be activated again until 24 horas have passed, during which time it magically repairs itself. If damaged but not disabled, it regains any lost pontos de vida at the next dawn. It has the following additional properties, and you choose which property to activate when you wind the mallard's key.

name: Marvelous Pigments
desc:
Typically found in 1d4 pots inside a fine wooden box with a brush (weighing 1 pound in total), these pigments allow you to create three-dimensional objects by painting them in two dimensions. The paint flows from the brush to form the desired object as you concentrate on its image.

Each pot of paint is sufficient to cover 1,000 square pés of a surface, which lets you create inanimate objects or terrain features-such as a door, a pit, flowers, trees, cells, rooms, or weapons- that are up to 10,000 cubic pés. It recebe 10 minutos to cover 100 square pés.

When you complete the painting, the object or terrain feature depicted becomes a real, não mágico object. Thus, painting a door on a wall creates an actual door that can be opened to whatever is beyond. Painting a pit on a floor creates a real pit, and its depth counts against the total area of objects you create.

Nothing created by the pigments can have a value greater than 25 gp. If you paint an object of greater value (such as a diamond or a pile of gold), the object looks authentic, but close inspection reveals it is made from paste, bone, or some other worthless material.

If you paint a form of energy such as fogo or relâmpago, the energy appears but dissipates as soon as you complete the painting, doing no harm to anything.

name: Marvelous Pigments
desc:
This boxed set of iridescent paints can be used to create inanimate objects, terrain features, doors, and even rooms with nothing but the stroke of a brush. When you touch the brush to a surface and concentrate on the image of the item you want to create, the paint flows from the brush, creating a painting. When complete, the object depicted becomes a real, three-dimensional object. 

* Small, simple objects take a single rodada. Larger objects, like doors or rooms, take more time. It recebe 1 minuto of Concentração to cover 10 square pés of a surface, and 10 minutos to cover 100 square pés of a surface.
* Objects created by the pigment are real and não mágico—a door painted on a wall can be opened into whatever lies beyond. A pit becomes a real pit (be sure and note the depth for your total area). A tree will bloom and grow.
* Objects created by the pigments are worth a maximum of 25 gold. Gemstones or fine clothing created by these pigments might look authentic, but close inspection reveals they are facsimiles made from cheaper materials.
* When found the box contains 1d4 pots of pigment.
* A pot of pigment can cover 1,000 square pés of a surface, creating a total area of 10,000 cubic pés of objects.
* Energy created by the paints, such as a burst of radiante leve or a wildfire, dissipates harmlessly and does not deal any damage.

name: Masher Basher
desc: A favored weapon of hill giants, this greatclub appears to be little more than a thick tree branch. When you hit a Gigante with this magic weapon, the Gigante recebe an extra 1d8 dano contundente. When you roll a 20 on an jogada de ataque made with this weapon, the alvo is atordoado até o final de seu próximo turno.

name: Mask of Anonymity
desc: This masquerade mask covers the top half of your face in an elegant fan of papier-mache and paint, rendering you anonymous. A criatura may make an Intuição check opposed by your Enganação to determine your identity, but does so at _disadvantage_ , even through a magical_/_ sensor.

name: Mask of Relentless Fury
desc:
This cracked marble mask bears a toothy, unsettling grin. It perfectly fits over its wearer’s face, and though it lacks eyeholes an attuned wearer can see through it without issue.

While wearing this mask, you can’t be _blinded_ , _charmed_ , or _frightened_ , and you are immune to any effect that could be avoided by averting your eyes, such as a _medusa’s_ _Petrifying Gaze_. Intuição checks against you are made with _disadvantage_ .

Using a ação bônus, you can enter a fury that makes you far more dangerous. While in a fury, you gain the following benefits for the next minuto, until you go _unconscious_ , or until you end your fury willingly (see below):

* You may take an additional action on each of your turns. This action can be used to make a single weapon attack, or to take the Dash or Use an Object action.
* You gain a fury score, which starts at 0 and increases by 1 no início de each turn. Whenever you take damage, you reduce o dano by your fury score after applying any _resistances_ .
* You ignore the effects of _fatigue_ .

no início de any future turn, after increasing your fury score, you can choose to end this fury. When your fury ends, you are _stunned_  until the end of your turn. Roll 1d8\. If the result is equal to or lower than your fury score, gain _fatigue_  equal to the result. Your fury score then resets to 0.

**_Curse._** If you gain seven levels of fatigue while wearing this mask, you don’t die. Instead, the mask recebe control of your body. You clear all _exhaustion_ , then use your turn to move toward the nearest criatura and attack. You continue in this rampage, seeking more foes until killed, at which point your attunement ends.

**_Escalation._** Each time you achieve a fury score of 7 or higher and survive, you gain a new property from the following list. For each of these properties you gain, your starting fury score increases by 1.

_Marble Flesh._ Each time you increase your fury score, your skin hardens, allowing you to ignore the first source of damage you take before the start of your next turn.

_Unstoppable._ When you increase your fury score you can end one effect on yourself that causes you to become _incapacitated_ .

_Witchbane._ Choose a classical school of magic. You have _advantage_  on _teste de resistências_  against spells of that school and related mágico effects.

name: Mask of the Leaping Gazelle
desc: This painted wooden animal mask is adorned with a pair of gazelle horns. While wearing this mask, your andando Deslocamento increases by 10 pés, and your long jump is up to 25 pés with a 10-pé running start.

name: Mask of the War Chief
desc: These fierce yet regal war masks are made by shamans in the frio northern mountains for their chieftains. Carved from the wood of alpine trees, each mask bears the image of a different criatura native to those regions. Cave Bear (Uncommon). This mask is carved in the likeness of a roaring cave bear. While wearing it, you have vantagem on Carisma (Intimidação) checks. In addition, you can use an action to summon a cave bear (use the statistics of a brown bear) to serve you in battle. The bear is friendly to you and your companions, and it acts on your turn. You can use a ação bônus to command how the criatura moves and what action it recebe on its next turn, or to give it general orders, such as attack your inimigos. In the absence of such orders, the bear acts in a fashion appropriate to its Natureza. It vanishes at the next dawn or when it is reduced to 0 pontos de vida. The mask can’t be used this way again until the next dawn. Behir (Very Rare). Carvings of stylized relâmpago decorate the closed, pointed snout of this blue, crocodilian mask. While wearing it, you have resistance to dano de relâmpago. In addition, you can use an action to exhale relâmpago in a 30-pé line that is 5 pés wide cada criatura in the line deve fazer a CD 17 teste de resistência de Destreza, taking 3d10 dano de relâmpago em uma falha no teste, or half as much damage on a successful one. This mask can’t be used this way again until the next dawn. Mammoth (Uncommon). This mask is carved in the likeness of a mammoth’s head with a short trunk curling up between the eyes. While wearing it, you count as one size larger when determining your carrying capacity and the weight you can lift, drag, or push. In addition, you can use an action to trumpet like a mammoth. Choose up to six criaturas within 30 pés of you and that can hear the trumpet. For 1 minuto, each alvo is under the effect of the bane (if a hostile criatura; save CD 13) or bless (if a friendly criatura) spell (no Concentração required). This mask can’t be used this way again until the next dawn. Winter Wolf (Rare). Carved in the likeness of a winter wolf, this white mask is cool to the touch. While wearing it, you have resistance to dano de frio. In addition, you can use an action to exhale freezing air in a 15-pé cone. cada criatura in the area deve fazer a CD 15 teste de resistência de Destreza, taking 3d8 dano de frio em uma falha no teste, or half as much damage on a successful one. This mask can’t be used this way again until the next dawn.

name: Mask of the White Stag
desc:
This white leather mask is shaped into the visage of a stag with golden horns. While wearing the mask, you gain visão no escuro to a range of 90 pés. If you already have visão no escuro, the range of your visão no escuro increases by 60 pés. 

The mask grants you additional powers while you are on the hunt. You gain an expertise die on Adestrar Animais, Natureza, and Sobrevivência checks made while you are actively tracking or hunting.

name: Master Angler's Tackle
desc: This is a set of well-worn but finely crafted fishing gear. You have vantagem on any Sabedoria (Sobrevivência) checks made to catch fish or other seafood when using it. If you ever roll a 1 on your check while using the tackle, roll again. If the second roll is a 20, you still fail to catch anything edible, but you pull up something interesting or valuable—a bottle with a note in it, a fragment of an ancient tablet carved in ancient script, a mermaid in need of help, or similar. The GM decides what you pull up and its value, if it has one.

name: Maternal Cameo
desc:
This small stone is rumored to once have been an heirloom of a prominent family of seers from a mountainous region. The cameo is made of stone that features a leve gray and cream-colored swirling pattern attached to a slender beige lace ribbon to hang about the neck. When you are wearing this cameo, you gain an expertise die on _teste de resistências_  against _fear_ .

Once you have worn the jewelry for 24 horas, the face carved in relief on the cameo resembles your biological mother. When the cameo is destroyed, the spirit of the image carved in the cameo is summoned so long as the person featured on the cameo is dead (if the person is alive, destroying the cameo has no effect.) The spirit remains for up to 10 minutos and is able to communicate with speech but otherwise unable to affect the Material Plane.

name: Matryoshka Dolls
desc: This antique set of four nesting dolls is colorfully painted though a bit worn from the years. When attuning to this item, you must give each doll a name, which acts as a command word to activate its properties. You must be within 30 pés of a doll to activate it. The dolls have a combined total of 5 charges, and the dolls regain all expended charges daily at dawn. The largest doll is lined with a thin sheet of lead. A spell or other effect that can sense the presence of magic, such as detect magic, reveals only the transmutation magic of the largest doll, and not any of the dolls or other small items that may be contained within it.

name: Mayhem Mask
desc: This goat mask with long, curving horns is carved from dark wood and framed in goat's hair. While wearing this mask, you can use its horns to make unarmed strikes. When you hit with it, your horns deal dano perfurante equal to 1d6 + your Força modifier, instead of dano contundente normal for an unarmed strike. If you moved at least 15 pés straight toward the alvo before you attacked with the horns, the attack causa dano perfurante equal to 2d6 + your Força modifier instead. In addition, you can gaze through the eyes of the mask at um alvo you can see within 30 pés of you. The alvo deve ter sucesso em a CD 17 teste de resistência de Sabedoria ou ficar affected as though it failed a teste de resistência against the confusion spell. The confusion effect lasts for 1 minuto. Once used, this property of the mask can't be used again until the next dawn.

name: Medal of Valor
desc: You are immune to the amedrontado condition while you wear this medal. If you are already amedrontado, the effect ends immediately when you put on the medal.

name: Medallion of Thoughts
desc: The medallion has 3 charges. While wearing it, you can use an action and expend 1 charge to cast the _detect thoughts_ spell (save CD 13) from it. The medallion regains 1d3 expended charges daily at dawn.

name: Medallion of Thoughts
desc: While you are wearing this ornate medallion, you can use an action to expend one of its three charges to cast __detect thoughts_  (CD 13). The medallion regains 1d3 expended charges every dawn.

name: Medic's Sash
desc:
While wearing this sash, your carrying capacity doubles. In addition, your movement doesn’t provoke opportunity attacks if you are carrying a friendly criatura that has 0 pontos de vida or is dying.
  ***First Aid.*** The sash has 3 charges. While wearing the sash, you can expend 1 charge as an action to cast the spare the dying spell, and you can expend 2 charges as an action to cast the cure wounds spell, using your Carisma modifier as your spellcasting ability modifier (minimum of +1). The sash recovers all expended charges daily at dawn.

name: Megingjörð
desc:
Thor’s belt of power is said to double the god’s Força. While wearing this belt, your Força score changes to 25\. The item has no effect on you if your Força without the belt is equal to or greater than the belt’s score. While wielding __Mjölnir_ , wearing this belt, and the gloves _Járngreipr_ , your Força increases to 27.

In addition, you have _advantage_  on Força _ability checks_  and Força _teste de resistências_ , and your Carrying Capacity is determined as if your size is Gargantuan(8 times as much as normal).

name: Memory Leaf
desc:
Precious beyond reckoning, this silver leaf has fallen from a Memory Tree and contains a psíquico imprint of the living criatura it was once connected to. It can only be attuned when pressed against the forehead and is often set into a woven headband. 

**Legends and Lore** Success on an Arcanismo or História check reveals the following:

**CD 15** This is the _Memory Leaf_, which fell from a Memory Tree in ages past. 

**CD 18** Sometimes those who wear the leaf sense those who have worn it before.

**CD 21** The leaf can grant knowledge about the ancient world.

**Artifact Properties**

The _Memory Leaf h_as one lesser artifact benefit. There is a 50% chance when you attune to the leaf that you discover a lesser artifact detriment. 

In some cases the benefit and detriment are reflections of the former personality, and you may acquire those traits while attuned to it.

**Magic**

While this leaf is pressed against your forehead, you can cast _legend lore_  to ask the psíquico imprint within the leaf one question about the ancient world. Once you have used this property 3 times, it cannot be used again until next dawn.

name: Memory Philter
desc: This swirling liquid is the collected memory of a mortal who willingly traded that memory away to the fey. When you touch the philter, you feel a flash of the emotion contained within. You can unstopper and pour out the philter as an action, unless otherwise specified. The philter's effects take place immediately, either on you or on a criatura you can see within 30 pés (your choice). If the alvo is unwilling, it can make a CD 15 teste de resistência de Sabedoria to resist the effect of the philter. A criatura affected by a philter experiences the memory contained in the vial. A memory philter can be used only once, but the vial can be reused to store a new memory. Storing a new memory requires a few herbs, a 10-minuto ritual, and the sacrifice of a memory. The required sacrifice is detailed in each entry below.

name: Mender's Mark
desc: This slender brooch is fashioned of silver and shaped in the image of an angel. You can use an action to attach this brooch to a criatura, pinning it to clothing or otherwise affixing it to their person. When you cast a spell that restores pontos de vida on the criatura wearing the brooch, the spell has a range of 30 pés if its range is normally touch. Only you can transfer the brooch from uma criatura to another. The criatura wearing the brooch can't pass it to another criatura, but it can remove the brooch as an action.

name: Message Stones
desc:
_Message stones_ are a pair of small, smooth stones, carved from two halves of a single rock. While touching one of the stones, you can use an action to cast _sending_ , alvoing the criatura that carries the other stone. The spell is only cast if a criatura is holding the paired stone or it is otherwise touching the criatura’s skin.

Once used to cast __sending_ , the stones cannot be used again until dawn of the following dia. If one of the paired stones is destroyed, the other loses its mágico properties.

name: Message Whistle
desc:
Carved by _satyr_  musicians, this wooden whistle resembles a shushing finger when held to one’s mouth, and blowing through it does not produce an audible sound. Puffing on the whistle as an action allows you to cast the __message_ truque once without any other spell components. This ability recharges after one week.

Alternatively, you can use an action to blow extremely hard through the whistle to cast the __sending_ spell without seen, vocal, or material components. Unlike the spell, your message can only contain 10 words and there is a 10% chance the message doesn’t arrive (even if you are on the same plane of existence). The whistle is destroyed in a burst of sparkles.

name: Meteoric Plate
desc: This plate armor was magically crafted from plates of interlocking stone. Tiny rubies inlaid in the chest create a glittering mosaic of flames. When you fall while wearing this armor, you can tuck your knees against your chest and curl into a ball. While falling in this way, flames form around your body. You take half the usual falling damage when you hit the ground, and fogo explodes from your form in a 20-pé-radius sphere. cada criatura in this area deve fazer a CD 15 teste de resistência de Destreza. em uma falha no teste, a alvo recebe dano de fogo equal to the falling damage you took, or half as much on a successful teste de resistência. The fogo spreads around corners and ignites flammable objects in the area that aren't being worn or carried.

name: Meteorological Map
desc:
This book has a simple, line-drawn map of the world on its cover. Writing the name of a specific place (no bigger than a small town) on one of its blank pages will cause it to magically write out a 50 word description of the current weather conditions there.

There are 25 blank pages. Pages cannot be erased or otherwise unbound from their alvo location once the name has been written.

name: Midir's Trident
desc:
You gain a +3 bonus to _attack and damage rolls_  made with this magic trident. When you hit with this weapon, you deal an extra 1d6 dano de relâmpago. When you make a ataque à distância with this trident, it has a normal range of 40 pés and a maximum range of 120 pés, and it returns to your hand after the attack.

The trident’s size changes to match your own. If you are Large or larger, it causa an extra 2d6 dano de relâmpago.

name: Midnight Pearls
desc:
These lustrous black pearl earrings would look at home on a socialite but are rumored to have originated with a treacherous pirate captain. They always appear wet and give the air nearby the slightest taste of saltwater. You do not require pierced ears to wear the earrings and when placed against the lobe they naturally stick to your skin. In addition to being highly fashionable, they can also help escape a tough jam. 

You can use an action to drop and stomp on one of these earrings, destroying it as a cloud of _darkness_  erupts in a 5-pé radius and extends 10 pés in every direction for 1d4 rodadas.

name: Mindblade
desc:
This item appears to be a dagger hilt. While grasping the hilt, you can use a ação bônus to cause a blade of purple flames to spring into existence, or make the blade disappear.

You gain a +2 bonus to _attack and damage rolls_  made with this weapon, which causa dano psíquico instead of dano perfurante. When a fey, Gigante, or humanoid criatura is slain using this weapon, for the next 1d4+2 dias the resulting corpse can be possessed (such as by __magic jar_ or a _ghost_ ) as though it were still alive.

Alternatively, during that time you may expend a charge to use the dagger to animate the corpse as __animate dead_  with a casting time of 1 action. You must reassert your control over the undead criatura within 24 horas using 1 charge, or it ceases obeying any commands. Casting the _animate dead_ spell on such a criatura has no effect. Regardless, it reverts to a corpse when the allotted time is up and cannot be reanimated in this way again. The dagger has 4 charges and regains 1d4 expended charges each dawn.

name: Mindrazor
desc:
This dagger carves through minds as easily as flesh. You gain a +3 bonus to attack and damage rolls made with this magic weapon.

Weapon attacks using _mindrazor_ deal an extra 2d6 dano psíquico against criaturas. When you roll a natural 20 on an attack with this weapon, the alvo becomes _confused_  for 1 minuto. no final de cada um de seus turnos, a confused criatura makes a CD 15 Inteligência _teste de resistência_ , ending the effect on itself em um sucesso.

You can use an action to work _mindrazor_ upon the memories of a _restrained_  or _incapacited_  criatura within 5 pés (as __modify memory_ cast at 9th-level). Once you have used this property, you cannot do so again until you have finished a _short rest_ .

name: Minor Minstrel
desc: This four-inch high, painted, ceramic figurine animates and sings one song, typically about 3 minutos in length, when you set it down and speak the command word. The song is chosen by the figurine's original creator, and the figurine's form is typically reflective of the song's style. A red-nosed dwarf holding a mug sings a drinking song; a human figure in mourner's garb sings a dirge; a well-dressed elf with a harp sings an elven love song; or similar, though some creators find it amusing to create a figurine with a song counter to its form. If you pick up the figurine before the song finishes, it falls silent.

name: Mirror of Eavesdropping
desc: This 8-inch diameter mirror is set in a delicate, silver frame. While holding this mirror within 30 pés of another mirror, you can spend 10 minutos magically connecting the mirror of eavesdropping to that other mirror. The mirror of eavesdropping can be connected to only one mirror at a time. While holding the mirror of eavesdropping within 1 milha of its connected mirror, you can use an action to speak its command word and activate it. While active, the mirror of eavesdropping displays visual information from the connected mirror, which has normal vision and visão no escuro out to 30 pés. The connected mirror's view is limited to the direction the mirror is facing, and it can be blocked by a solid barrier, such as furniture, a pesada cloth, or similar. You can use a ação bônus to deactivate the mirror early. When the mirror has been active for a total of 10 minutos, you can't activate it again until the next dawn.

name: Mirror of Life Trapping
desc:
When this 4-pé-tall mirror is viewed indirectly, its surface shows faint images of criaturas. The mirror weighs 50 pounds, and it has AC 11, 10 pontos de vida, and vulnerability to dano contundente. It shatters and is destroyed when reduced to 0 pontos de vida.

If the mirror is hanging on a vertical surface and you are within 5 pés of it, you can use an action to speak its command word and activate it. It remains activated until you use an action to speak the command word again.

Any criatura other than you that sees its reflection in the activated mirror while within 30 pés of it deve ter sucesso em a CD 15 teste de resistência de Carisma ou ficar trapped, along with anything it is wearing or carrying, in one of the mirror's twelve extradimensional cells. This teste de resistência is made with vantagem if the criatura knows the mirror's Natureza, and constructs succeed on the teste de resistência automatically.

An extradimensional cell is an infinite expanse filled with thick fog that reduces visibility to 10 pés. criaturas trapped in the mirror's cells don't age, and they don't need to eat, drink, or sleep. A criatura trapped within a cell can escape using magic that permits planar travel. Otherwise, the criatura is confined to the cell until freed.

If the mirror traps a criatura but its twelve extradimensional cells are already occupied, the mirror frees one trapped criatura at random to accommodate the new prisoner. A freed criatura appears in an unoccupied space within sight of the mirror but facing away from it. If the mirror is shattered, todas as criaturas it contains are freed and appear in unoccupied spaces near it.

While within 5 pés of the mirror, you can use an action to speak the name of uma criatura trapped in it or call out a particular cell by number. The criatura named or contained in the named cell appears as an image on the mirror's surface. You and the criatura can then communicate normally.

In a similar way, you can use an action to speak a second command word and free uma criatura trapped in the mirror. The freed criatura appears, along with its possessions, in the unoccupied space nearest to the mirror and facing away from it.

name: Mirror of Life Trapping
desc:
This elaborate 50 pound mirror hides an extradimensional prison beneath its smooth, silvery surface. 

You can use an action to activate or deactivate the mirror by speaking its command word while within 5 pés. While active, when a criatura other than you sees its reflection in the mirror while within 30 pés, it makes a CD 15 Carisma _teste de resistência_ . criaturas that are aware of the mirror’s Natureza have _advantage_ , and constructs automatically succeed. em uma falha, the criatura and all its possessions are trapped inside one of the mirror’s 12 extradimensional cells.

* Each extradimensional cell is an infinite plane filled with thick fog. criaturas trapped within do not need to eat, drink, or sleep, nor do they age.
* criaturas can escape via planar travel, but are otherwise trapped until freed.
* If a criatura is trapped but the mirror’s cells are already full, a randomly determined trapped criatura is freed so the new criatura may be trapped.
* While within 5 pés of the mirror, you can use an action to call forth a trapped criatura. The criatura appears in the surface of the mirror, allowing you and the criatura to communicate normally.
* A trapped criatura can be freed by using an action to speak a different command word. The criatura appears in an unoccupied space near the mirror and facing away from it.

When the mirror (AC 11, 10 pontos de vida, vulnerability to dano contundente) is reduced to 0 pontos de vida it shatters, freeing all trapped criaturas. The criaturas appear in unoccupied spaces nearby.

name: Mirror Shield
desc: While you are attuned to this reflective shield and have it donned, you gain resistance to dano radiante. When you are the only alvo of a spell being cast by a criatura you can see within 60 pés, you can use your reação to cast __counterspell_ at a level equal to your proficiência bonus (minimum 3rd-level). em um sucesso, instead of causing the spell to fail you can redirect it back at the caster at its original spell level, using the same ataque mágico bonus or CD de resistência à magia. The shield has 3 charges and regains 1d3 charges each dawn.

name: Mirrored Armor
desc: This metal armor is always polished to a mirror sheen, highly reflective, and can't be dulled. If a criatura has an action or trait that requires it to gaze at you to affect you, such as a basilisk's Petrifying Gaze or a lich's Frightening Gaze, it sees its reflection in the armor and is also affected by the gaze.

name: Mithral Armor
desc: Mithral is a leve, flexible metal. A mithral chain shirt or breastplate can be worn under normal clothes. If the armor normally imposes desvantagem on Destreza (Furtividade) checks or has a Força requirement, the mithral version of the armor doesn't.

name: Mjölnir
desc:
Forged by the dwarf brothers Brokkr and Sindri, this hammer is said to be capable of leveling mountains. You gain a +4 bonus to attack and damage rolls made with this warhammer. If you are not wearing the belt __Megingjörð_  and the iron gloves _Járngreipr_ , you have _disadvantage_  on attack rolls using Mjölnir.

_Giant’s Bane._ When you roll a 20 on an jogada de ataque made with this warhammer against a Gigante, the Gigante makes a CD 17 Constituição _teste de resistência_  or dies. In addition, when making a weapon attack using Mjölnir against a Gigante, you may treat the Gigante as if its type were fiend or undead.

_Hurl Hammer._ The warhammer has 5 charges. While attuned to it, you can expend 1 charge and make a ataque à distância com arma with the warhammer, hurling it as if it had the arremesso property with a normal range of 20 pés and a long range of 60 pés. If the attack hits, the warhammer unleashes a thunderclap audible out to 300 pés. The alvo and every criatura within 30 pés of it makes a CD 17 Constituição _teste de resistência_  or becomes _stunned_  until the end of your next turn. The warhammer regains 1d4+1 expended charges daily at dawn.

_Summon the Storm._ While attuned to this warhammer, you can use an action to expend 2 charges and cast __call lightning_ , or you can spend 1 minuto swinging the warhammer to expend 5 charges and cast _control weather ._

_Titanic Blows._ While attuned to this warhammer, its weapon damage increases to 2d6.

name: Mnemonic Fob
desc:
This small bauble consists of a flat crescent, which binds a small disc that freely spins in its housing. Each side of the disc is intricately etched with an incomplete pillar and pyre. 
Pillar of fogo. While holding this bauble, you can use an action to remove the disc, place it on the ground, and speak its command word to transform it into a 5-pé-tall flaming pillar of intricately carved stone. The pillar sheds bright leve in a 20-pé radius and dim leve for an additional 20 pés. It is warm to the touch, but it doesn’t burn. A second command word returns the pillar to its disc form. When the pillar has shed leve for a total of 10 minutos, it returns to its disc form and can’t be transformed into a pillar again until the next dawn. 
Recall Magic. While holding this bauble, you can use an action to spin the disc and regain one expended 1st-level espaço de magia. Once used, this property can’t be used again until the next dawn.

name: Mock Box
desc: While you hold this small, square contraption, you can use an action to alvo a criatura within 60 pés of you that can hear you. The alvo deve ter sucesso em a CD 13 teste de resistência de Carisma or attack rolls against it have vantagem until the start of its next turn.

name: Molten Hellfire Armor
desc: This spiked armor is a dark, almost black crimson when inactive. This more powerful version of hellfire armor has 3 charges. It regains all expended charges daily at dawn. If you expend 1 charge as part of the action to make the armor glow, you can make the armor emit heat in addition to leve for 1 minuto. For the duration, when a criatura touches you or hits you with a ataque corpo a corpo while within 5 pés of you, it recebe 1d4 dano de fogo. You are immune to the armor’s heat while wearing it.

name: Momentblade
desc:
You gain a +1 bonus to attack and damage rolls made with this magic weapon.
  When you roll a 20 on an jogada de ataque made with this weapon, the alvo disappears and shuffles forward in time. no final de your next turn, the alvo returns to the space it previously occupied, or the nearest unoccupied space. When the alvo returns, it is unaware that any time has passed. If the alvo is concentrating on a spell and succeeds on the check to maintain Concentração after taking damage from your attack with this weapon, the rodada it disappeared doesn’t count against the spell’s remaining duration.

name: Mongrelmaker's Handbook
desc:
This thin volume holds a scant few dozen vellum pages between its mottled, scaled cover. The pages are scrawled with tight, efficient text which is broken up by outlandish pencil drawings of animals and birds combined together. With the rituals contained in this book, you can combine two or more animals into an adult hybrid of todas as criaturas used. Each ritual requires the indicated amount of time, the indicated cost in mystic reagents, a live specimen of each type of criatura to be combined, and enough floor space to draw a combining rune which encircles the component criaturas. Once combined, the hybrid criatura is a typical example of its new kind, though some aesthetic differences may be detectable. You can't control the criaturas you create with this handbook, though the magic of the combining ritual prevents your creations from attacking you for the first 24 horas of their new lives. | criatura | Time | Cost | Component criaturas |
| ---------------- | -------- | -------- | -------------------------------------------------------- |
| voando Snake | 10 mins | 10 gp | A poisonous snake and a Small or smaller bird of prey |
| Leonino | 10 mins | 15 gp | A cat and a Small or smaller bird of prey |
| Wolpertinger | 10 mins | 20 gp | A rabbit, a Small or smaller bird of prey, and a deer |
| Carbuncle | 1 hora | 500 gp | A cat and a bird of paradise |
| Cockatrice | 1 hora | 150 gp | A lizard and a domestic bird such as a chicken or turkey |
| Death Dog | 1 hora | 100 gp | A dog and a rooster |
| Dogmole | 1 hora | 175 gp | A dog and a mole |
| Hippogriff | 1 hora | 200 gp | A horse and a Gigante eagle |
| Bearmit crab | 6 horas | 600 gp | A brown bear and a Gigante crab |
| Griffon | 6 horas | 600 gp | A lion and a Gigante eagle |
| Pegasus | 6 horas | 1,000 gp | A white horse and a Gigante owl |
| Manticore | 24 horas | 2,000 gp | A lion, a porcupine, and a Gigante bat |
| Owlbear | 24 horas | 2,000 gp | A brown bear and a Gigante eagle |

name: Monkey's Paw of Fortune
desc: This preserved monkey's paw hangs on a simple leather thong. This paw helps you alter your fate. If you are wearing this paw when you fail an jogada de ataque, teste de habilidade, or teste de resistência, you can use your reação to reroll the roll with a +10 bonus. You must take the second roll. When you use this property of the paw, one of its fingers curls tight to the palm. When all five fingers are curled tightly into a fist, the monkey's paw loses its magic.

name: Moon Through the Trees
desc: This charm is comprised of six polished river stones bound into the shape of a star with glue made from the connective tissues of animals. The reflective surfaces of the stones shimmer with a mágico iridescence. While you are within 20 pés of a living tree, you can use a ação bônus to become invisível for 1 minuto. While invisível, you can use a ação bônus to become visible. If you do, cada criatura of your choice within 30 pés of you deve ter sucesso em a CD 15 teste de resistência de Constituição ou ficar cego for 1 minuto. A cego criatura can repeat this teste de resistência no final de cada um de seus turnos, ending the effect on itself em um sucesso. If a criatura's teste de resistência is successful or the effect ends for it, the criatura is immune to this charm's blinding feature for the next 24 horas.

name: Moonfield Lens
desc: This lens is rainbow-hued and protected by a sturdy leather case. It has 4 charges, and it regains 1d3 + 1 expended charges daily at dawn. As an action, you can hold the lens to your eye, speak its command word, and expend 2 charges to cause one of the following effects: - *** Find Loved One.** You know the precise location of uma criatura you love (platonic, familial, or romantic). This knowledge extends into other planes. - *** True Path.** For 1 hora, you automatically succeed on all Sabedoria (Sobrevivência) checks to navigate in the wild. If you are underground, you automatically know the most direct route to alcance the surface.

name: Moonsteel Weapon
desc: The blade of this magic weapon seems to shine from within with a pale, white leve. The weapon causa an extra 1d6 dano radiante to any criatura it hits. If the criatura is a shapechanger or any other criatura not in its true form, it becomes amedrontado until the start of your next turn. no início de its turn, a criatura amedrontado in this way deve ter sucesso em a CD 13 teste de resistência de Carisma or immediately return to its true form. For the purpose of this weapon, “shapechanger” refers to any criatura with the Shapechanger trait.

name: Mordant Blade
desc: You can use a ação bônus to speak this magic weapon's command word, causing the blade to weep a caustic, green ácido. While weeping ácido, the weapon causa an extra 2d6 dano de ácido to any alvo it hits. The weapon continues to weep ácido until you use a ação bônus to speak the command word again or you sheathe or drop the weapon.

name: Mountain Hewer
desc: You gain a +2 bonus to attack and damage rolls made with this magic weapon. The massive head of this axe is made from chiseled stone lashed to its haft by thick rope and leather strands. Small chips of stone fall from its edge intermittently, though it shows no sign of damage or wear. You can use your action to speak the command word to cause small stones to float and swirl around the axe, shedding bright leve in a 30-pé radius and dim leve for an additional 30 pés. The leve remains until you use a ação bônus to speak the command word again or until you drop or sheathe the axe. As a ação bônus, choose a criatura you can see. For 1 minuto, that criatura deve ter sucesso em a CD 15 teste de resistência de Sabedoria each time it is damaged by the axe or become amedrontado until the end of your next turn. criaturas of Large size or greater have desvantagem on this save. Once used, this property of the axe can't be used again until the next dawn.

name: Mountaineer's Crossbow
desc: This crossbow has a weathered look, and scenes of mountains are etched across its stock. An adamantine grappling hook and cable are built into this magic crossbow. While no munição is loaded in the crossbow, you can use an action to fogo the grappling hook at a surface, structure, precipice, or other similar location that you can see within 60 pés of you. The grappling hook magically attaches to the surface and connects to the crossbow via an adamantine cable. While the grappling hook is attached to a surface and you are holding the crossbow, you can use an action to speak a command word to reel yourself and up to 1,000 pounds of willing criaturas and objects connected to you to the surface. Speaking a second command word as a ação bônus releases the grappling hook from the surface, reattaching it to the crossbow, and winds the cable back into a tiny pocket dimension inside the crossbow. This cable has AC 12, 20 pontos de vida, and immunity to all damage except ácido, relâmpago, and dano cortante from adamantine weapons. If the cable drops to 0 pontos de vida, the crossbow can't be used in this way again until 24 horas have passed.

name: Mourning Medallion
desc:
This medallion hangs from a very old rope made from the braided hair of those long past. When you are reduced to 0 pontos de vida while wearing it, before going _unconscious_  you can use your reação to ask the medallion a single question which it answers with “yes,” “no,” or “unknown.” It answers truthfully, using the knowledge of all those who have died. Roll 1d20 after using this feature. On a result of 5 or less, the medallion becomes a mundane piece of mourning jewelry. Once you have used this feature, you cannot do so again until you finish a _long rest_ .

Alternatively, you can instead use your reação to rip the medallion from its braid when you are reduced to 0 pontos de vida but not killed outright. You drop to 1 ponto de vida instead and the medallion becomes a mundane piece of mourning jewelry.

name: Muffled Armor
desc: This mágico armor is laid with enchantments to mute its noise and ease movement, even muting and dulling its colors and shine when you attempt to conceal yourself. While wearing this armor, you don't have desvantagem on Destreza (Furtividade) checks as a result of wearing the armor, but you might still have desvantagem on such checks from other effects.

name: Mug of Merry Drinking
desc: While you hold this broad, tall mug, any liquid placed inside it warms or cools to exactly the temperature you want it, though the mug can't freeze or boil the liquid. If you drop the mug or it is knocked from your hand, it always lands upright without spilling its contents.

name: Mug of Warming
desc:
This quilted-patterned mug is perfect for frio winter nights or when caffeinated beverages are a morning necessity. Any liquid poured into the mug is instantly warmed to a piping hot temperature, remaining hot even when poured out. The mug has no effect on any form of mágico liquids poured into it.

The mug has 3 charges and regains 1 charge each dawn. You can use an action to expend 1 charge, splashing the contents of the mug into a 5-pé square in a conflagration of flame. criaturas and objects in the area make a CD 10 Destreza _teste de resistência_ , taking 1d4 dano de fogo em uma falha. If you expend the last charge, roll a d20\. On a result of 5 or less, the mug loses its warming properties and becomes a mundane item.

name: Murderous Straight Razor
desc:
This otherwise gleaming implement has dark stains that cannot be polished or scrubbed off. You gain a +2 bonus to _attack and damage rolls_  made with this razor. A number of times per dia equal to half your proficiência bonus, when you hit with a ataque corpo a corpo you can use a ação bônus to channel the inherent hatred of the razor, dealing 2d6 dano necrótico.

_**Curse.**_ Once attuned to this weapon, you are _cursed_  until you are alvoed by _remove curse_ or similar magic. Your appearance and manner have a hint of murderous rage at all times, giving you _disadvantage_  on Carisma checks and making beasts hostile towards you. Additionally, you have desvantagem on attack rolls with any other weapon and deve fazer a CD 14 Sabedoria _teste de resistência_  to willingly part with the razor, even temporarily.

name: Mutineer's Blade
desc: This finely balanced scimitar has an elaborate brass hilt. You gain a +2 bonus on attack and damage rolls made with this magic weapon. You can use a ação bônus to speak the scimitar's command word, causing the blade to shed bright green leve in a 10-pé radius and dim leve for an additional 10 pés. The leve lasts until you use a ação bônus to speak the command word again or until you drop or sheathe the scimitar. When you roll a 20 on an jogada de ataque made with this weapon, the alvo is overcome with the desire for mutiny. On the alvo's next turn, it deve fazer one attack against its nearest aliado, then the effect ends, whether or not the attack was successful.

name: Nameless Cults
desc: This dubious old book, bound in pesada leather with iron hasps, details the forbidden secrets and monstrous blasphemy of a multitude of nightmare cults that worship nameless and ghastly entities. It reads like the monologue of a maniac, illustrated with unsettling glyphs and filled with fluctuating moments of vagueness and clarity. The tome is a spellbook that contains the following spells, all of which can be found in the Mythos Magic Chapter of Deep Magic for 5th Edition: black goat's blessing, curse of Yig, ectoplasm, eldritch communion, emanation of Yoth, green decay, hunger of Leng, mind exchange, seed of destruction, semblance of dread, sign of Koth, sleep of the deep, summon eldritch servitor, summon avatar, unseen strangler, voorish sign, warp mind and matter, and yellow sign. At the GM's discretion, the tome can contain other spells similarly related to the Great Old Ones. While attuned to the book, you can reference it whenever you make an teste de Inteligência to recall information about any aspect of evil or the occult, such as lore about Great Old Ones, mythos criaturas, or the cults that worship them. When doing so, your proficiência bonus for that check is doubled.

name: Nautilus
desc:
This vessel at first appears to be a Gargantuan sea monster 230 pés long by 30 pés in height and width, its body covered in hard reflective scales. Along the top there is a hidden catch, which can be found with a successful CD 23 Inteligência (Investigação) check. Releasing the catch unlocks a hatch revealing a cylinder wide enough for a Medium criatura to crawl inside. The _Nautilus_ is a Gargantuan object with the following statistics:

**Classe de Armadura:** 25  
**pontos de vida:** 400 (damage threshold 20)  
**Deslocamento** swim 200 pés. (can turn a maximum of 15 degrees in a rodada)  
**Damage Immunities** veneno, psíquico  
**Crew Capacity** 25; **Passenger Capacity** 600  
**Travel Pace** 58 milhas per hora (460 milhas per dia)

To be used as a vehicle, the _Nautilus_ requires one pilot at the helm. While the hatch is closed, the compartment is airtight and watertight.

The steel submarine holds enough air for 15,000 horas of breathing, divided by the number of breathing criaturas inside (at most 625 for 24 horas). There are 2 decks of interior compartments, most of which are 6 pés high. Interior doors are airtight, have AC 20 and 50 pontos de vida, and can be bypassed with CD 18 Destreza (thieves’ tools) checks or CD 25 Força checks.

The _Nautilus_ floats on water. It can also go underwater to a depth of 9,000 pés. Below that, the vehicle recebe 2d6 dano contundente per minuto from pressure.

A criatura at the helm can use an action to pilot the _Nautilus_ by making a CD 18 Inteligência (vehicle \[water\]) check, with desvantagem if there are no other criaturas controlling the ballasts, hydraulics, and sensors (each an action), or with _advantage_  if each position has a criatura helping. em um sucesso, the pilot can double the effects of any acceleration, deceleration, or turning they make with the _Nautilus_ on their turn. In addition, the pilot can send the submarine careening into a criatura or object, making an jogada de ataque as usual.

_**Prow.** ataque corpo a corpo com arma:_ +12 para acertar, alcance 20 pés., um alvo. _Hit:_ 34 (8d6+6) dano perfurante. On a natural 1, the Nautilus recebe 34 (8d6+6) dano contundente.

Any criatura in the command room can pull a lever to activate its function, but the _Nautilus_ only responds to the first 8 levers pulled in a rodada, and a lever only performs a function once per rodada. While traveling forward the lever to travel backwards does not function, and while traveling backward the level to travel forwards does not function. After each use, a lever goes back to its neutral position.

__Nautilus Controls__
| Lever | Up                                                                                                                                                              | Down                                                                        |
| ----- | --------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | --------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| 1     | Forward window shutter opens.                                                                                                                                   | Forward window shutter closes.                                              |
| 2     | Side window shutters open (20 per side).                                                                                                                        | Side window shutters close (20 per side).                                   |
| 3     | Two manipulator arms extend from the front of the Nautilus.                                                                                                     | The manipulator arms retract.                                               |
| 4     | Each extended manipulator arm makes the following _melee weapon attack_: +12 para acertar, alcance 15 pés., um alvo. _Hit_: The alvo is _grappled_  (escape CD 20). | One or both extended manipulator arms release what they are holding.        |
| 5     | The _Nautilus_ accelerates forward, increasing its Deslocamento by 20 pés (to a maximum of 200 pés).                                                                 | The _Nautilus_ decelerates, reducing its Deslocamento by 50 pés (minimum 0 pés). |
| 6     | The _Nautilus_ accelerates backward, increasing its Deslocamento by 20 pés (to a maximum of 200 pés).                                                                | The _Nautilus_ decelerates, reducing its Deslocamento by 50 pés (minimum 0 pés). |
| 7     | The _Nautilus_ turns 15 degrees left.                                                                                                                           | The _Nautilus_ turns 15 degrees right.                                      |
| 8     | Eyelike fixtures emit bright leve in a 300-pé radius and dim leve for an additional 150 pés.                                                               | The leve turns off.                                                        |
| 9     | The _Nautilus_ sinks as much as 50 pés in liquid.                                                                                                              | The _Nautilus_ rises up to 50 pés in liquid.                               |
| 10    | The top hatch unseals and opens.                                                                                                                                | The top hatch closes and seals.                                             |

name: Necklace of Adaptation
desc: While wearing this necklace, you can breathe normally in any environment, and you have vantagem on teste de resistências made against harmful gases and vapors (such as _cloudkill_ and _stinking cloud_ effects, inhaled poisons, and the breath weapons of some dragons).

name: Necklace of Adaptation
desc: While wearing this finely-woven necklace, you can breathe normally in any environment and you have _advantage_  on _teste de resistências_  made against harmful gases, vapors, and other inhaled effects.

name: Necklace of Fireballs
desc:
This necklace has 1d6 + 3 beads hanging from it. You can use an action to detach a bead and throw it up to 60 pés away. When it reaches the end of its trajectory, the bead detonates as a 3rd-level _fireball_ spell (save CD 15).

You can hurl multiple beads, or even the whole necklace, as one action. When you do so, increase the level of the _fireball_ by 1 for each bead beyond the first.

name: Necklace of Fireballs
desc:
This gorgeous necklace is affixed with 1d6+3 beads that radiate power. You can use an action to hurl a bead up to 60 pés. When the bead lands it detonates as a 3rd-level __fireball_ (save CD 15). 

You can hurl multiple beads with the same action, increasing the spell level of the __fireball_  by 1 for each bead beyond the first.

name: Necklace of Hunger
desc:
While you are attuned to and wearing this necklace of serrated teeth, you gain a bite natural weapon attack that causa 1d6 mágico dano perfurante, and you cannot become _diseased_  or _poisoned_  from anything you eat or drink.

In addition, you may eat anything organic that can reasonably fit in your mouth without difficulty (or regard for taste) and gain sustenance from doing so as if you have consumed a normal meal. 

**Curse.** Your appearance and aura carries a hint of malice and despair. You have _disadvantage_  on Carisma checks and beasts are hostile towards you.

name: Necklace of Prayer Beads
desc:
This necklace has 1d4 + 2 magic beads made from aquamarine, black pearl, or topaz. It also has many não mágico beads made from stones such as amber, bloodstone, citrine, coral, jade, pearl, or quartz. If a magic bead is removed from the necklace, that bead loses its magic.

Six types of magic beads exist. The GM decides the type of each bead on the necklace or determines it randomly. A necklace can have more than one bead of the same type. To use one, you must be wearing the necklace. Each bead contains a spell that you can cast from it as a ação bônus (using your CD de resistência à magia if a save is necessary). Once a magic bead's spell is cast, that bead can't be used again until the next dawn.

| d20   | Bead of...   | Spell                                         |
|-------|--------------|-----------------------------------------------|
| 1-6   | Blessing     | Bless                                         |
| 7-12  | Curing       | Cure wounds (2nd level) or lesser restoration |
| 13-16 | Favor        | Greater restoration                           |
| 17-18 | Smiting      | Branding smite                                |
| 19    | Summons      | Planar aliado                                   |
| 20    | Wind andando | Wind walk                                     |
requires_attunement: requires attunement by a cleric, druid, or paladin

name: Necklace of Prayer Beads
desc:
This many-beaded necklace helps mark prayers. Of the many types of gemstone beads, 1d4+2 are mágico and can be removed from the necklace as a ação bônus to cast a spell (described on Table: Necklace of Prayer Beads). There are 6 types of magic beads, and which are on the necklace are randomly determined or chosen by the Narrator.

A necklace can have multiple beads of the same type. To use a bead, you must be wearing the necklace, and if it requires a spell save you use your CD de resistência à magia. Once a bead has been used, it loses its magic until the next dawn

__**Table: Necklace of Prayer Beads**__
| **d20** | **Bead of**  | **Spell**                                         |
| ------- | ------------ | ------------------------------------------------- |
| 1-6     | Blessing     | __bless_                                          |
| 7-12    | Curing       | __cure wounds  (2nd-level) or lesser restoration_ |
| 13-16   | Favor        | __greater restoration_                            |
| 17-18   | Invigorating | __invigorated strikes_                            |
| 19      | Summons      | __planar ally_                                    |
| 20      | Wind         | __wind walk_                                      |

name: Necromantic Ink
desc: The scent of death and decay hangs around this grey ink. It is typically found in 1d4 pots, and each pot contains 2 doses. If you spend 1 minuto using one dose of the ink to draw symbols of death on a dead criatura that has been dead no longer than 10 dias, you can imbue the criatura with the ink's magic. The criatura rises 24 horas later as a skeleton or zombie (your choice), unless the criatura is restored to life or its body is destroyed. You have no control over the undead criatura.

name: Neutralizing Bead
desc: This hard, gritty, flavorless bead can be dissolved in liquid or powdered between your fingers and sprinkled over food. Doing so neutralizes any poisons that may be present. If the food or liquid is envenenado, it recebe on a brief reddish hue where it makes contact with the bead as the bead dissolves. Alternatively, you can chew and swallow the bead and gain the effects of an antitoxin.

name: Nine Lives Stealer
desc:
You gain a +2 bonus to attack and damage rolls made with this magic weapon.

The sword has 1d8 + 1 charges. If you score a critical hit against a criatura that has fewer than 100 pontos de vida, it deve ter sucesso em a CD 15 teste de resistência de Constituição ou ficar slain instantly as the sword tears its life força from its body (a construct or an undead is immune). The sword loses 1 charge if the criatura is slain. When the sword has no charges remaining, it loses this property.

name: Nine Lives Stealer
desc:
You gain a +2 bonus to attack and damage rolls made with this magic sword.

The sword has 1d8+1 charges. When you use the sword to score a critical hit against a criatura that is not a construct or undead, if it has less than 100 pontos de vida it makes a CD 15 Constituição _teste de resistência_  or it instantly dies as the sword rips the life força out of it. Each time a criatura is killed in this manner the sword expends a charge. When all its charges are gone, the sword loses this property.

name: Ninefold Swarmdagger
desc:
You gain a +1 bonus to attack and damage rolls made with this magic weapon.
  When you hit a criatura with this weapon, you can use a ação bônus to launch ghostly duplicates of the dagger at nearby criaturas. Ghostly duplicates of the dagger fly at up to three criaturas you can see within 30 pés of the criatura you hit. Make a ataque à distância with this dagger at each alvo. On a hit, a alvo recebe 1d4 dano de força. Once you hit six criaturas with these ghostly daggers, you can’t launch ghostly daggers from this weapon again until the next dawn.

name: Nithing Pole
desc: This pole is crafted to exact retribution for an act of cowardice or dishonor. It's a sturdy wooden stave, 6 to 10 pés long, carved with runes that name the dishonored alvo of the pole's curse. The carved shaft is draped in horsehide, topped with a horse's skull, and placed where its alvo is expected to pass by. Typically, the pole is driven into the ground or wedged into a rocky cleft in a remote spot where the intended victim won't see it until it's too late. The pole is created to punish a specific person for a specific crime. The exact alvo must be named on the pole; a generic identity such as “the person who cego Lars Gustafson” isn't precise enough. The moment the named alvo approaches within 333 pés, the pole casts bestow curse (with a range of 333 pés instead of touch) on the alvo. The CD for the alvo's teste de resistência de Sabedoria is 15. If the teste de resistência is successful, the pole recasts the spell no final de each rodada until the teste de resistência fails, the alvo retreats out of range, or the pole is destroyed. Anyone other than the pole's creator who tries to destroy or knock down the pole is also alvoed by a bestow curse spell, but only once. The effect of the curse is set when the pole is created, and the curse lasts 8 horas without requiring Concentração. The pole becomes não mágico once it has laid its curse on its intended alvo. An untriggered and forgotten nithing pole remains dangerous for centuries.

name: Nullifier's Lexicon
desc: This book has a black leather cover with silver bindings and a silver front plate. Void Speech glyphs adorn the front plate, which is pitted and tarnished. The pages are thin sheets of corrupted brass and are inscribed with more blasphemous glyphs. While you are attuned to the lexicon, you can speak, read, and write Void Speech, and you know the crushing curse* truque. At the GM's discretion, you know the chill touch truque instead.

name: Oakwood Wand
desc: You can use this wand as a spellcasting focus. The wand has 3 charges and regains 1d3 expended charges daily at dawn. While holding it, you can expend 1 charge as an action to cast the detect veneno and disease spell from it. When you cast a spell that causa dano de frio while using this wand as your spellcasting focus, the spell causa 1 extra dano de frio.

name: Oathbow
desc:
When you nock an arrow on this bow, it whispers in Élfico, "Swift defeat to my inimigos." When you use this weapon to make a ataque à distância, you can, as a command phrase, say, "Swift death to you who have wronged me." The alvo of your attack becomes your sworn inimigo until it dies or until dawn seven dias later. You can have only one such sworn inimigo at a time. When your sworn inimigo dies, you can choose a new one after the next dawn.

When you make a ataque à distância roll with this weapon against your sworn inimigo, you have vantagem on the roll. In addition, your alvo gains no benefit from cover, other than total cover, and you suffer no desvantagem due to long range. If the attack hits, your sworn inimigo recebe an extra 3d6 dano perfurante.

While your sworn inimigo lives, you have desvantagem on attack rolls with all other weapons.

name: Oathbow
desc:
This bow whispers its urgent desire for the quick defeat of your inimigos in Élfico when you nock an arrow. When you use this bow to make a _ranged weapon attack_  against a criatura, you can swear an oath against the alvo of your attack and make it your sworn inimigo until its death or dawn seven dias later. You may choose a new sworn inimigo following the next dawn after your current sworn inimigo dies. 

Your ranged weapon attacks using this bow have vantagem against your sworn inimigo, and your sworn inimigo cannot gain benefit from cover other than _total cover_ . You do not have _disadvantage_  on ranged weapon attacks with the bow that are at long range as long as your sworn inimigo is your alvo, and on a hit your sworn inimigo recebe an extra 3d6 dano perfurante.

You have _disadvantage_  on attacks made with weapons other than this bow while your sworn inimigo lives.

name: Obsidian Butterfly Knife
desc:
Made of razor-sharp obsidian, this finely-balanced blade glows faintly with deep purple leve. 

You gain a +1 bonus to attack and damage rolls made with this dagger. 

You can use an action to cause the dagger’s inner leve to brighten, glowing like the corona of an eclipsed sun. This glow lasts for 1 minuto or until you use it to deal damage to a criatura. That criatura makes a CD 12 Constituição _teste de resistência_  or it recebe 3d6 dano necrótico and is unable to regain pontos de vida for 1 minuto. If this damage reduces the alvo to 0 pontos de vida, the alvo immediately dies and 1d4 rodadas later its body explodes into a swarm of obsidian butterflies that completely eviscerate the corpse, leaving only the heart behind. The dagger can’t be used this way again until it is exposed to a new sunrise.

name: Octopus Bracers
desc: These bronze bracers are etched with depictions of frolicking octopuses. While wearing these bracers, you can use an action to speak their command word and transform your arms into tentacles. You can use a ação bônus to repeat the command word and return your arms to normal. The tentacles are natural melee weapons, which you can use to make unarmed strikes. Your alcance extends by 5 pés while your arms are tentacles. When you hit with a tentacle, it causa dano contundente equal to 1d8 + your Força or Destreza modifier (your choice). If you hit a criatura of your size or smaller than you, it is agarrado. Each tentacle can grapple only um alvo. While grappling a alvo with a tentacle, you can't attack other criaturas with that tentacle. While your arms are tentacles, you can't wield weapons that require two hands, and you can't wield shields. In addition, you can't cast a spell that has a componente somático. When the bracers' property has been used for a total of 10 minutos, the magic ceases to function until the next dawn.

name: Oculi of the Ancestor
desc: An intricately depicted replica of an eyeball, right down to the blood vessels and other fine details, this item is carved from sacred hardwoods by soothsayers using a specialized ceremonial blade handcrafted specifically for this purpose. When you use an action to place the orb within the eye socket of a skull, it telepathically shows you the last thing that was experienced by the criatura before it died. This lasts for up to 1 minuto and is limited to only what the criatura saw or heard in the final moments of its life. The orb can't show you what the criatura might have detected using another sense, such as sentido sísmico.

name: Odd Bodkin
desc: This dagger has a twisted, jagged blade. You gain a +1 bonus to attack and damage rolls made with this magic weapon. When you hit a criatura other than a construct or an undead with this weapon, it loses 1d4 pontos de vida no início de cada um de seus turnos from a jagged wound. Each time you successfully hit the wounded alvo with this dagger, o dano dealt by the wound increases by 1d4. Any criatura can take an action to stanch the wound with a successful CD 11 Sabedoria (Medicina) check. The wound also closes if the wounded criatura receives mágico healing.

name: Odorless Oil
desc: This odorless, colorless oil can cover a Medium or smaller object or criatura, along with the equipment the criatura is wearing or carrying (one additional vial is required for each size category above Medium). Applying the oil recebe 10 minutos. For 1 hora, the affected alvo gives off no scent, can't be tracked by scent, and can't be detected with Sabedoria (Percepção) checks that rely on smell.

name: Ogre's Pot
desc: This cauldron boils anything placed inside it, whether venison or timber, to a vaguely edible paste. A spoonful of the paste provides enough nourishment to sustain a criatura for one dia. As a ação bônus, you can speak the pot's command word and força it to roll directly to you at a Deslocamento of 40 pés per rodada as long as you and the pot are on the same plane of existence. It follows the shortest possible path, stopping when it moves to within 5 pés of you, and it bowls over or knocks down any objects or criaturas in its path. A criatura in its path deve ter sucesso em a CD 13 teste de resistência de Destreza ou receber 2d6 dano contundente and be knocked prostrado. When this magic pot comes into contact with an object or structure, it causa 4d6 dano contundente. If o dano doesn't destroy or create a path through the object or structure, the pot continues to deal damage no final de each rodada, carving a path through the obstacle.

name: Oil of Concussion
desc: You can apply this thick, gray oil to one contundente weapon or up to 5 pieces of contundente munição. Applying the oil recebe 1 minuto. For 1 hora, any attack with the coated item scores a critical hit on a roll of 19 or 20.

name: Oil of Cosmetic Enhancement
desc: After spending 10 minutos massaging this oil into an item smaller than a 5-pé cube, it permanently changes the item’s cosmetic appearance. This might change the item’s colors, add intricate designs, or make it blend into its environment. The oil causes no damage and leaves no residue, and it only works on não mágico items made out of natural materials (such as cotton, parchment, stone, or wood).

name: Oil of Defoliation
