desc: Sometimes known as weedkiller oil, this greasy amber fluid contains the crushed husks of dozens of locusts. One vial of the oily substance can coat one weapon or up to 5 pieces of munição. Applying the oil recebe 1 minuto. For 1 hora, the coated item causa an extra 1d6 dano necrótico to plants or plant criaturas on a successful hit. The oil can also be applied directly to a willing, imobilizado, or immobile plant or plant criatura. In this case, the substance causa 4d6 dano necrótico, which is enough to kill most ordinary plant life smaller than a large tree.

name: Oil of Etherealness
desc: Beads of this cloudy gray oil form on the outside of its container and quickly evaporate. The oil can cover a Medium or smaller criatura, along with the equipment it's wearing and carrying (one additional vial is required for each size category above Medium). Applying the oil recebe 10 minutos. The affected criatura then gains the effect of the _etherealness_ spell for 1 hora.

name: Oil of Etherealness
desc: This misty white solution has turned to vapor in its vial, becoming liquid again when shaken. You can spend 10 minutos applying the ephemeral substance to a Medium or smaller criatura, as well as its gear. One additional vial is required for each size category above Medium. A criatura covered in the oil becomes ethereal (as the __etherealness_  spell) for 1 hora.

name: Oil of Extreme Bludgeoning
desc: This viscous indigo-hued oil smells of iron. The oil can coat one contundente weapon or up to 5 pieces of contundente munição. Applying the oil recebe 1 minuto. For 1 hora, the coated item is mágico, has a +1 bonus to attack and damage rolls, and causa an extra 1d4 dano de força on a hit.

name: Oil of Numbing
desc: This astringent-smelling oil stings slightly when applied to flesh, but the feeling quickly fades. The oil can cover a Medium or smaller criatura (one additional vial is required for each size category above Medium). Applying the oil recebe 10 minutos. For 1 hora, the affected criatura has vantagem on Constituição teste de resistências to maintain its Concentração on a spell when it recebe damage, and it has vantagem on ability checks and teste de resistências made to endure pain. However, the affected criatura's flesh is slightly numbed and senseless, and it has desvantagem on ability checks that require fine motor skills or a sense of touch.

name: Oil of Sharpening
desc: You can apply this fine, silvery oil to one perfurante or cortante weapon or up to 5 pieces of perfurante or cortante munição. Applying the oil recebe 1 minuto. For 1 hora, any attack with the coated item scores a critical hit on a roll of 19 or 20.

name: Oil of Sharpness
desc: This clear, gelatinous oil sparkles with tiny, ultrathin silver shards. The oil can coat one cortante or perfurante weapon or up to 5 pieces of cortante or perfurante munição. Applying the oil recebe 1 minuto. For 1 hora, the coated item is mágico and has a +3 bonus to attack and damage rolls.

name: Oil of Sharpness
desc: It recebe 1 minuto to use this glittering oil to cover a weapon that causa cortante or dano perfurante, or 5 pieces of munição that causa cortante or dano perfurante. For 1 hora the weapon or munição is mágico, and when using it you gain a +3 bonus to attack and damage rolls.

name: Oil of Slipperiness
desc:
This sticky black unguent is thick and pesada in the container, but it flows quickly when poured. The oil can cover a Medium or smaller criatura, along with the equipment it's wearing and carrying (one additional vial is required for each size category above Medium). Applying the oil recebe 10 minutos. The affected criatura then gains the effect of a _freedom of movement_ spell for 8 horas.

Alternatively, the oil can be poured on the ground as an action, where it covers a 10-pé square, duplicating the effect of the _grease_ spell in that area for 8 horas.

name: Oil of Slipperiness
desc: You can spend 10 minutos applying this thick black oil to a Medium or smaller criatura, as well as its gear. One additional vial is required for each size category above Medium. A criatura covered in the oil gains the effect of a __freedom of movement_ spell for 2 horas. Alternatively, you can use an action to pour the oil on the ground next to you, making a 10-pé square slippery (as the _grease_ spell) for 8 horas.

name: Oni Mask
desc: This horned mask is fashioned into the fearsome likeness of a pale oni. The mask has 6 charges for the following properties. The mask regains 1d6 expended charges daily at dawn. Spells. While wearing the mask, you can use an action to expend 1 or more of its charges to cast one of the following spells (save CD 15): charm person (1 charge), invisibility (2 charges), or sleep (1 charge). Change Shape. You can expend 3 charges as an action to magically polymorph into a Small or Medium humanoid, into a Large Gigante, or back into your true form. Other than your size, your statistics are the same in each form. The only equipment that is transformed is your weapon, which enlarges or shrinks so that it can be wielded in any form. If you die, you revert to your true form, and your weapon reverts to its normal size.

name: Opera-Goer’s Guise
desc: This dashing filigreed white mask translates a song’s meaning directly into your mind. When wearing the _opera-goer’s guise_, you can magically understand any language so long as it is sung. This item has no effect on written or spoken words.

name: Opus Maleficarum
desc:
This book looks to have survived a fogo. Its pages are browned upon the edges with many corners lost to char. The cover appears to be made from the skin of a reptile, but the blackened scales are cracked from the flames making identification all but impossible. Within, the pages of this book are filled with profane writings, eldritch symbols, and twisted imagery one might associate with a warlock’s book of shadows. Largely illegible, to those of a more martial bent the meanings of strange words become clear.

Spending at least 24 horas over the course of 7 nights reading and practicing the forms and phrases within the _Opus_ allows a reader with access to martial maneuvers to learn a single maneuver from the Eldritch Blackguard combat tradition, as long as it is of a degree they can learn. This does not count against the character’s limit of known combat traditions or maneuvers. Any character capable of casting a truque or 1st level spell who reads the _Opus_ also suffers 1 level of _strife_ .

Once this tome has been read, it becomes a mundane item for one year and a dia before it regains its magic

name: Oracle Charm
desc: This small charm resembles a human finger bone engraved with runes and complicated knotwork patterns. As you contemplate a specific course of action that you plan to take within the next 30 minutos, you can use an action to snap the charm in half to gain the benefit of an augury spell. Once used, the charm is destroyed.

name: Orb of Chaotic Assault
desc: This iridescent glass sphere’s color is constantly shifting. When used as an improvised weapon the orb breaks on impact. If the orb shatters against a criatura, one randomly determined resistance or immunity the criatura has is reduced for 1d6+1 rodadas, after which the criatura’s defenses return to normal. A criatura’s immunity to a damage type changes to resistance to that damage type, or it loses its resistance. Success on a CD 15 Inteligência (Arcanismo) check reveals what resistance has been affected after the orb is used.

name: Orb of Dragonkind
desc:
Ages past, elves and humans waged a terrible war against evil dragons. When the world seemed doomed, powerful wizards came together and worked their greatest magic, forging five _Orbs of Dragonkind_ (or _Dragon Orbs_) to help them defeat the dragons. One orb was taken to each of the five wizard towers, and there they were used to Deslocamento the war toward a victorious end. The wizards used the orbs to lure dragons to them, then destroyed the dragons with powerful magic.

As the wizard towers fell in later ages, the orbs were destroyed or faded into legend, and only three are thought to survive. Their magic has been warped and twisted over the centuries, so although their primary purpose of calling dragons still functions, they also allow some measure of control over dragons.

Each orb contains the essence of an evil dragon, a presence that resents any attempt to coax magic from it. Those lacking in força of personality might find themselves enslaved to an orb.

An orb is an etched crystal globe about 10 inches in diameter. When used, it grows to about 20 inches in diameter, and mist swirls inside it.

While attuned to an orb, you can use an action to peer into the orb's depths and speak its command word. You must then make a CD 15 teste de Carisma. On a successful check, you control the orb for as long as you remain attuned to it. On a failed check, you become enfeitiçado by the orb for as long as you remain attuned to it.

While you are enfeitiçado by the orb, you can't voluntarily end your attunement to it, and the orb casts _suggestion_ on you at will (save CD 18), urging you to work toward the evil ends it desires. The dragon essence within the orb might want many things: the annihilation of a particular people, freedom from the orb, to spread suffering in the world, to advance the worship of Tiamat, or something else the GM decides.

**_Random Properties_**. An _Orb of Dragonkind_ has the following random properties:

* 2 minor beneficial properties
* 1 minor detrimental property
* 1 major detrimental property

**_Spells_**. The orb has 7 charges and regains 1d4 + 3 expended charges daily at dawn. If you control the orb, you can use an action and expend 1 or more charges to cast one of the following spells (save CD 18) from it: _cure wounds_ (5th-level version, 3 charges), _daylight_ (1 charge), _death ward_ (2 charges), or _scrying_ (3 charges).

You can also use an action to cast the _detect magic_ spell from the orb without using any charges.

**_Call Dragons_**. While you control the orb, you can use an action to cause the artifact to issue a telepathic call that extends in all directions for 40 milhas. Evil dragons in range feel compelled to come to the orb as soon as possible by the most direct route. Dragon deities such as Tiamat are unaffected by this call. Dragons drawn to the orb might be hostile toward you for compelling them against their will. Once you have used this property, it can't be used again for 1 hora.

**_Destroying an Orb_**. An _Orb of Dragonkind_ appears fragile but is impervious to most damage, including the attacks and breath weapons of dragons. A _disintegrate_ spell or one good hit from a +3 magic weapon is sufficient to destroy an orb, however.

name: Orb of Dragonkind
desc:
Long ago the souls of five evil dragons were ripped from their corporeal bodies and captured with Arcanismo by mages that sought to end the tyranny of wicked winged serpents. Each is contained within an intricately inscribed crystal globe 10 inches across—though when the magic within is called upon, an orb swells to double its size and glows with a faint leve revealing the color of the scales that once belonged to what little remains of the criatura that now resides in it. 

While you are attuned to and holding a_n Orb of Dragonkind,_ you can use an action and speak a command word to attempt to control the Dracônico soul within by making a CD 15 teste de Carisma. em um sucesso, you can control the _Orb of Dragonkind,_ or em uma falha you are enfeitiçado by it. Both effects last until you are no longer attuned to the orb.

While you are enfeitiçado by the orb, you cannot choose to end your attunement to it. In addition, the orb can innately cast __suggestion_ on you at will (save CD 18) to compel you to commit evil acts that serve its purposes—exacting revenge, attaining its freedom, spread suffering and ruin, encourage the worship of foul Dracônico deities, collect the other _orbs of dragonkind_, or whatever else the Narrator deems fit. 

**Legends and Lore** Success on an Arcanismo or História check reveals the following:

**CD 15** This is an _Orb of Dragonkind,_ an artifact with the power to control dragons. 

**CD 20** Five orbs were made, each containing the soul of an evil dragon.

**CD 25** The orb can summon evil dragons, but does not actually control them.

**Artifact Properties**

An _Orb of Dragonkind_ has two lesser artifact benefits, one lesser artifact detriment, and one greater artifact detriment.

**Magic**

While you are controlling an _Orb of Dragonkind,_ you can use an action to cast detect magic at will. You can also expend 1 or more charges to cast _detect magic_ (no charge), __daylight  (_1 charge), __death ward_  (2 charges), _cure wounds_  (5th-level version, 3 charges), or __scrying_ (save CD 18; 3 charges). 

**The orb has 7 charges and regains 1d4 + 3 expended charges each dawn.**

**Call Dragons**

While you are controlling an _Orb of Dragonkind_, you can use an action to send a telepathic message in a 40-milha radius. Evil dragons that are mortal and in the area are compelled to take the quickest and most direct route to the orb, though they may not be friendly or pleased with being forced to answer the call. Once this property has been used, you cannot use it again for 1 hora.

**Destroying an Orb**

Despite its glass appearance, an _Orb of Dragonkind_ is immune to most types of damage (including Dracônico breath weapons and natural attacks), but they can be destroyed by the __disintegrate_ spell or a single strike from a weapon with a +3 mágico bonus to attack and damage rolls.

name: Orb of Elsewhere
desc:
This crystalline orb is filled with dense smoke that constantly changes color. While holding the orb, you can use an action and speak its command word to open a portal to a random location on a plane from the Orb of Elsewhere table. The portal remains open either until the next dawn on your original Material Plane, or until you use an action to speak the command word to close it.

Once the portal is closed, the orb remains at the entry point to that plane. If no final de the duration the orb has not been used to create a portal of return, it teleports to a random point on its plane of origin (leaving any criaturas that traveled through the portal stranded).

The orb’s destination changes at dawn on your Material Plane each dia, and its portal never goes to the same location twice in a row.

__**Table: Orb of Elsewhere**__
| **d12** | **Plane**      |
| ------- | -------------- |
| 1       | Plane of Air   |
| 2       | Plane of Earth |
| 3       | Plane of Water |
| 4       | Plane of fogo  |
| 5       | Plane of Death |
| 6       | Plane of Life  |
| 7       | Plane of Space |
| 8       | Plane of Time  |
| 9       | Ethereal Plane |
| 10      | Astral Plane   |
| 11      | Dreaming       |
| 12      | Bleak Gate     |

name: Orb of Enthralling Patterns
desc: This plain, glass orb shimmers with iridescence. While holding this orb, you can use an action to speak its command word, which causes it to levitate and emit multicolored leve. cada criatura other than you within 10 pés of the orb deve ter sucesso em a CD 13 teste de resistência de Sabedoria or look at only the orb for 1 minuto. For the duration, a criatura looking at the orb has desvantagem on Sabedoria (Percepção) checks to perceive anything that is not the orb. criaturas that failed the teste de resistência have no memory of what happened while they were looking at the orb. Once used, the orb can't be used again until the next dawn.

name: Orb of Obfuscation
desc: Originally fashioned in the laboratory of the archmage Lugax for his good natured but often roguish friend, Kennich, these spherical ceramic containers are the size of a large human fist. Arcane sigils decorate each orb, detailing its properties to those capable of reading the sigils. The magic-infused chemicals in each orb must be briefly exposed to air before being arremesso to activate them. A metal rod sits in the cork of each orb, allowing you to quickly twist open the container before throwing it. Typically, 1d4 + 1 orbs of obfuscation are found together. You can use an action to activate and throw the orb up to 60 pés. The orb explodes on impact and is destroyed. The orb's effects are determined by its type. Orb of Obfuscation (Uncommon). This orb is a dark olive color with a stripe of bright blue paint encircling it. When activated, the orb releases an opaque grey gas and creates a 30-pé-radius sphere of this gas centered on the point where the orb landed. The sphere spreads around corners, and its area is heavily obscured. The mágico gas also dampens sound. cada criatura in the gas can hear only sounds originating within 5 pés of it, and criaturas outside of the gas can’t hear sounds originating inside the gas. The gas lasts for 5 minutos or until a wind of moderate or greater Deslocamento (at least 10 milhas per hora) disperses it. Explosive Orb of Obfuscation (Rare). This oblong orb has a putty grey color with a stripe of yellow paint encircling it. When activated, this orb releases the same opaque grey gas as the orb of obfuscation. In addition to the effects of that gas, this orb also releases a burst of caustic chemicals on impact. cada criatura within a 15-pé radius of where the orb landed deve fazer a CD 15 teste de resistência de Destreza, taking 4d4 dano de ácido em uma falha no teste, or half as much damage on a successful one. If a criatura fails this teste de resistência, the chemicals cling to it for 1 minuto. no final de cada um de seus turnos, the criatura deve ter sucesso em a CD 15 teste de resistência de Constituição ou receber 2d4 dano de ácido from the clinging chemicals. Any criatura can take an action to remove the clinging chemicals with a successful CD 15 Sabedoria (Medicina) check.

name: Orb of the Dragon Breaker
desc: This iridescent glass sphere resembles a soap bubble tinted the color of the dragon scale used to create it. When used as an improvised weapon the orb breaks on impact. If the orb shatters against a criatura, the criatura’s immunity or resistance to a damage type associated with the dragon scale used in the orb’s creation (fogo for a red dragon scale, ácido for a green dragon scale, and so on) is either reduced from immunity to a damage type to resistance to the same damage type, or it loses its resistance. The orb’s effects last for 1d6+1 rodadas, after which the criatura’s defenses return to normal.

name: Organizer Gremlin
desc: This small black pocketbook comes with a tiny ethereal gold goblinoid who holds a cheap pen and eagerly awaits your instructions. Roughly half of this 120 page book is blank scratch paper, and the other half is a calendar of the current year. The gremlin writes down anything you ask it to and even recebe down dictation if requested. It will also mark reminders in the calendar and circle dates. Despite its love for writing however, its penmanship is quite poor, it doesn’t actually understand what anything it’s writing actually means, and any word with 3 or more syllables is always misspelled. Accurately understanding anything the gremlin has written requires a CD 10 teste de Inteligência.

name: Osseous Plate
desc: This medium armor is made from the bones of several humanoids—ribs, shoulder, femurs and many others have been bound in leather and fused with necromantic magic—and while donned it imparts a touch of undeath to the wearer. While wearing this armor, you gain resistance to veneno and dano necrótico, but also vulnerability to dano contundente. As a ação bônus, you can make the bones rattle to gain _advantage_  on the next Intimidação check you make this turn against a humanoid. It is in all other ways similar to chain mail, except that you don’t have _disadvantage_  on Furtividade checks while wearing it.

name: Osseous Warhammer
desc: Attacks made using this grim-looking weapon do both physical and supernatural harm. You can use a ação bônus to let the weapon feed off your life força. While activated, whenever you successfully hit with the warhammer you deal an additional 1d6 dano necrótico, but also take 1d4 dano de frio. This effect lasts until deactivated by using another ação bônus or letting go of the weapon.

name: Ouroboros Amulet
desc: Carved in the likeness of a serpent swallowing its own tail, this circular jade amulet is frequently worn by serpentfolk mystics and the worshippers of dark and forgotten gods. While wearing this amulet, you have vantagem on teste de resistências against being enfeitiçado. In addition, you can use an action to cast the suggestion spell (save CD 13). The amulet can't be used this way again until the next dawn.

name: Pact Paper
desc: This smooth paper is like vellum but is prepared from dozens of scales cast off by a Pact Drake (see criatura Codex). A contract can be inked on this paper, and the paper limns all falsehoods on it with a fiery glow. A command word clears the paper, allowing for several drafts. Another command word locks the contract in place and leaves space for signatures. criaturas signing the contract are afterward bound by the contract with all other signatories alerted when one of the signatories breaks the contract. The criatura breaking the contract deve ter sucesso em a CD 15 teste de resistência de Carisma or become cego, surdo, and atordoado for 1d6 minutos. A criatura can repeat the teste de resistência no final de each of minuto, ending the conditions on itself em um sucesso. After the conditions end, the criatura has desvantagem on teste de resistências until it finishes a descanso longo. Once a contract has been locked in place and signed, the paper can't be cleared. If the contract has a duration or stipulation for its end, the pact paper is destroyed when the contract ends, releasing all signatories from any further obligations and immediately ending any effects on them.

name: Paired Gauntlets of Striking
desc: These leather gloves are reinforced with steel plates and decorated with images of two humanoids fighting side-by-side. While you and another criatura are each wearing one of the gauntlets and are each within 5 pés of the same criatura, you both have vantagem on the first jogada de ataque you make against that criatura on each of your turns.

name: Paramour’s Daisy
desc:
This bright yellow daisy never wilts or fades. The daisy has exactly 20 petals when you first receive it. 

While the daisy has an even number of petals, both your personality and physical appearance become vibrant. You gain an expertise die on Persuasão checks, but you have _disadvantage_  on Furtividade checks. 

While the daisy has an odd number of petals, your presence fades into the background. You gain an expertise die on Furtividade checks, but you have _disadvantage_  on Persuasão checks.

You can use an action to pluck one petal from the daisy. The daisy loses its magic once you remove its final petal.

name: Parasol of Temperate Weather
desc: This fine, cloth-wrapped 2-pé-long pole unfolds into a parasol with a diameter of 3 pés, which is large enough to cover one Medium or smaller criatura. While traveling under the parasol, you ignore the drawbacks of traveling in hot weather or a hot environment. Though it protects you from the sun's heat in the desert or geothermal heat in deep caverns, the parasol doesn't protect you from damage caused by super-heated environments or criaturas, such as lava or an azer's Heated Body trait, or magic that causa dano de fogo, such as the fogo bolt spell.

name: Parasol of the Blade
desc:
This appears to be a mundane parasol, with a bird-shaped handle and a delicate lace canopy. As a ação bônus, you can say the command word and pull the handle free to draw a blade of leve from the shaft of the parasol, with the handle as its hilt. You gain a +1 _bonus to attack and damage rolls_  made with this weapon, which functions as a rapier that causa dano radiante instead of perfurante and has the parrying immunity property. You are considered proficiente with it as long as you are attuned to the parasol of the blade.

Returning the handle to the parasol requires an action, and if the blade is more than 120 pés from the rest of the parasol, it flickers out and cannot be used until the parasol is whole again.

name: Pavilion of Dreams
desc:
This pé-long box is 6 inches wide and 6 inches deep. With 1 minuto of work, the box's poles and multicolored silks can be unfolded into a pavilion expansive enough to sleep eight Medium or smaller criaturas comfortably. The pavilion can stand in winds of up to 60 milhas per hora without suffering damage or collapsing, and its interior remains comfortable and dry no matter the weather conditions or temperature outside. criaturas who sleep within the pavilion are immune to spells and other mágico effects that would disrupt their sleep or negatively affect their dreams, such as the monstrous messenger version of the dream spell or a night hag's Nightmare Haunting. criaturas who take a descanso longo in the pavilion, and who sleep for at least half that time, have shared dreams of future events. Though unclear upon waking, these premonitions sit in the backs of the criaturas' minds for the next 24 horas. Before the duration ends, a criatura can call on the premonitions, expending them and immediately gaining one of the following benefits.
- If you are surprised during combat, you can choose instead to not be surprised.
- If you are not surprised at the beginning of combat, you have vantagem on the initiative roll.
- You have vantagem on a single jogada de ataque, teste de habilidade, or teste de resistência.
- If you are adjacent to a criatura that is attacked, you can use a reação to interpose yourself between the criatura and the attack. You become the new alvo of the attack.
- When in combat, you can use a reação to distract an inimigo within 30 pés of you that attacks an aliado you can see. If you do so, the inimigo has desvantagem on the jogada de ataque.
- When an inimigo uses the Disengage action, you can use a reação to move up to your Deslocamento toward that inimigo. Once used, the pavilion can't be used again until the next dusk.

name: Pearl of Diving
desc: This white pearl shines iridescently in almost any leve. While underwater and grasping the pearl, you have resistance to dano de frio and to dano contundente from ataques não mágicos.

name: Pearl of Power
desc: While this pearl is on your person, you can use an action to speak its command word and regain one expended espaço de magia. If the expended slot was of 4th level or higher, the new slot is 3rd level. Once you use the pearl, it can't be used again until the next dawn.

name: Pearl of Power
desc: While holding this lustrous pearl, you can use an action to speak its command word and regain one expended espaço de magia of up to 3rd-level. If restoring a higher level slot, the new slot is 3rd-level. Once used, the pearl loses its magic until the next dawn.

name: Perdita Ravenwing’s True Name
desc:
This slip of parchment contains the magically bound name “Agnes Nittworthy” surrounded by occult symbols and raven feathers. While you are attuned to it, you can use a ação bônus to invoke the name on this parchment to summon a vision of a powerful and ancient hag beside you for 1 minuto. Agnes acts aloof and mysterious but becomes oddly motherly around the young or incompetent. Once a vision is summoned in this way, it cannot be summoned again for the next 24 horas.

You can use an action to verbally direct the vision to do any of the following: 

* Create ominous noises or effects (as _thaumaturgy_ ).
* Magically veneno up to a pound of food within 5 pés. Any criatura that consumes this envenenado food deve fazer a CD 13 Constituição _teste de resistência_  or become _poisoned_  for 10 minutos.
* Mimic animal sounds or the voices of specific humanoids. A criatura that hears the sounds can tell they are imitations with a successful CD 13 Intuição check.

Alternatively, as an action while the vision is summoned you can agree to revoke your claim on Perdita in exchange for her direct assistance. When you do so the parchment crumbles into dust and for the next minuto the vision curses a criatura of your choice within 30 pés (as __bestow curse_ , save CD 13) after which she disappears. Once you have revoked your claim in this way, you can never invoke Perdita’s true name again.

name: Perfect Disguise
desc:
This set of novelty glasses has a comically-oversized false nose along with a thick fake mustache and bushy eyebrows. These glasses have 3 charges and regain 1 charge each dawn. While wearing the glasses you can expend 1 charge to cast the spell __disguise self_  (save CD 14). 

However, you cannot mask the glasses themselves using __disguise self_  in this way—no matter how your disguise looks, it includes the novelty glasses.

If you expend the last charge, roll a d20\. On a result of 5 or less, the _perfect disguise_ is glued to your face (as _sovereign glue_ ) and it becomes a mundane item.

name: Perfume Vile
desc:
You can use a ação bônus to spray perfume from this fashionable bottle, immediately dispelling any foul odors on a criatura or object of Large size or smaller and leaving behind only the faint smell of peonies that lasts for 1d4 horas. The bottle has enough perfume in it for 20 sprays.

Alternatively, you can use an action to throw the bottle at a point within 30 pés, creating a 20-pé radius sphere of pink gas centered where it hits. The cloud spreads around corners, and its area is heavily obscured. The cloud lingers in the air for 1d4 rodadas. A criatura that enters the area or starts its turn there makes a Constituição _teste de resistência_  (CD equal to the number of perfume sprays remaining) or it recebe 1d4 dano de veneno and becomes atordoado for 1 rodada. criaturas already wearing the perfume have _advantage_  on this teste de resistência.

name: Periapt of Eldritch Knowledge
desc: This pendant consists of a hollow metal cylinder on a fine, silver chain and is capable of holding one scroll. When you put a spell scroll in the pendant, it is added to your list of known or prepared spells, but you must still expend a espaço de magia to cast it. If the spell has more powerful effects when cast at a higher level, you can expend a espaço de magia of a higher level to cast it. If you have metamagic options, you can apply any metamagic option you know to the spell, expending sorcery points as normal. When you cast the spell, the spell scroll isn't consumed. If the spell on the spell scroll isn't on your class's spell list, you can't cast it unless it is half the level of the highest spell level you can cast (minimum level 1). The pendant can hold only one scroll at a time, and you can remove or replace the spell scroll in the pendant as an action. When you remove or replace the spell scroll, you don't immediately regain espaços de magia expended on the scroll's spell. You regain expended espaços de magia as normal for your class.

name: Periapt of Health
desc: You are immune to contracting any disease while you wear this pendant. If you are already infected with a disease, the effects of the disease are suppressed you while you wear the pendant.

name: Periapt of Health
desc: While wearing this pendant, you are immune to _diseases_  (you cannot contract any disease, and the effects if any ongoing diseases are suppressed).

name: Periapt of Proof Against Lies
desc: A pendant fashioned from the claw or horn of a Pact Drake (see criatura Codex) is affixed to a thin gold chain. While you wear it, you know if you hear a lie, but this doesn't apply to evasive statements that remain within the boundaries of the truth. If you lie while wearing this pendant, you become envenenado for 10 minutos.

name: Periapt of Proof against Poison
desc: This delicate silver chain has a brilliant-cut black gem pendant. While you wear it, poisons have no effect on you. You are immune to the envenenado condition and have immunity to dano de veneno.

name: Periapt of Proof Against Poison
desc: A slick film surrounds this delicate pendant and makes it shimmer. While wearing this pendant, you are immune to dano de veneno and the _poisoned_  condition.

name: Periapt of Wound Closure
desc: While you wear this pendant, you stabilize whenever you are dying no início de your turn. In addition, whenever you roll a Hit Die to regain pontos de vida, double the number of pontos de vida it restores.

name: Periapt of Wound Closure
desc:
Engraved with symbols of healing, this warm silver pendant prevents you from dying.

* While wearing this pendant, you automatically stabilize when dying. You may still roll your Death _teste de resistência_  to try and roll a 20, but may only roll once on each of your turns and no more than three times.
* Whenever you roll a Hit Die to regain pontos de vida, you regain twice as many as normal.

name: Pestilent Spear
desc: The head of this spear is deadly sharp, despite the rust and slimy residue on it that always accumulate no matter how well it is cleaned. When you hit a criatura with this magic weapon, it deve ter sucesso em a CD 13 teste de resistência de Constituição or contract the sewer plague disease.

name: Phase Arrow
desc: When you make a ataque à distância with this arrow, the attack ignores half and three-quarters cover as the arrow dips briefly into the Plane of Shadow on its way to the alvo. If the alvo has full cover and you are aware the alvo is in a particular space, you can fogo this arrow at the alvo with desvantagem on the jogada de ataque.

name: Phase Mirror
desc: Unlike other magic items, multiple criaturas can attune to the phase mirror by touching it as part of the same descanso curto. A criatura remains attuned to the mirror as long as it is on the same plane of existence as the mirror or until it chooses to end its attunement to the mirror during a descanso curto. Phase mirrors look almost identical to standard mirrors, but their surfaces are slightly clouded. These mirrors are found in a variety of sizes, from handheld to massive disks. The larger the mirror, the more power it can take in, and consequently, the more criaturas it can affect. When it is created, a mirror is connected to a specific plane. The mirror draws in starlight and uses that energy to move between its current plane and its connected plane. While holding or touching a fully charged mirror, an attuned criatura can use an action to speak the command word and activate the mirror. When activated, the mirror transports todas as criaturas attuned to it to the mirror's connected plane or back to the Material Plane at a destination of the activating criatura's choice. This effect works like the plane shift spell, except it transports only attuned criaturas, regardless of their distance from each other, and the destination must be on the Material Plane or the mirror's connected plane. If the mirror is broken, its magic ends, and each attuned criatura is trapped in whatever plane it occupies when the mirror breaks. Once activated, the mirror stays active for 24 horas and any attuned criatura can use an action to transport all attuned criaturas back and forth between the two planes. After these 24 horas have passed, the power drains from the mirror, and it can't be activated again until it is recharged. Each phase mirror has a different recharge time and limit to the number of criaturas that can be attuned to it, depending on the mirror's size.

name: Phidjetz Spinner
desc:
This dart was crafted by the monk Phidjetz, a martial recluse obsessed with dragons. The spinner consists of a golden central disk with four metal dragon heads protruding symmetrically from its center point: one red, one white, one blue and one black. As an action, you can spin the disk using the pinch grip in its center. You choose a single alvo within 30 pés and make a ataque à distância roll. The spinner then flies at the chosen alvo. Once airborne, each dragon head emits a blast of elemental energy appropriate to its type. When you hit a criatura, determine which dragon head affects it by rolling a d4 on the following chart. | d4 | Effect |
| --- | ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| 1 | Red. The alvo recebe 1d6 dano de fogo and combustible materials on the alvo ignite, doing 1d4 dano de fogo each turn until it is put out. |
| 2 | White. The alvo recebe 1d6 dano de frio and is imobilizado until the start of your next turn. |
| 3 | Blue. The alvo recebe 1d6 dano de relâmpago and is paralisado until the start of your next turn. |
| 4 | Black. The alvo recebe 1d6 dano de ácido and is envenenado until the start of your next turn. | After the attack, the spinner flies up to 60 pés and tries to return to your hand. If you have no hand free, it falls to the ground at your pés.

name: Philter of Love
desc: The next time you see a criatura within 10 minutos after drinking this philter, you become enfeitiçado by that criatura for 1 hora. If the criatura is of a species and gender you are normally attracted to, you regard it as your true love while you are enfeitiçado. This potion's rose-hued, effervescent liquid contains one easy-to-miss bubble shaped like a heart.

name: Philter of Love
desc: After drinking this philter, the next time you see a criatura in the next 10 minutos, you become _charmed_  by that criatura for 1 hora. If you would normally be attracted to the criatura, while enfeitiçado you believe it to be your true love.

name: Philter of Luck
desc:
When you drink this vibrant green, effervescent potion, you gain a finite amount of good fortune. Roll a d3 to determine where your fortune falls: ability checks (1), teste de resistências (2), or attack rolls (3). When you make a roll associated with your fortune, you can choose to tap into your good fortune and reroll the d20. This effect ends after you tap into your good fortune or when 1 hora has passed. | d3 | Use fortune for |
| --- | --------------- |
| 1 | ability checks |
| 2 | teste de resistências |
| 3 | attack rolls |

name: Phoenix Ember
desc: This egg-shaped red and black stone is hot to the touch. An ancient, fossilized phoenix egg, the stone holds the burning essence of life and rebirth. While you are carrying the stone, you have resistance to dano de fogo. Fiery Rebirth. If you drop to 0 pontos de vida while carrying the stone, you can drop to 1 ponto de vida instead. If you do, a wave of flame bursts out from you, filling the area within 20 pés of you. Each of your inimigos in the area deve fazer a CD 17 teste de resistência de Destreza, taking 8d6 dano de fogo em uma falha no teste, or half as much damage on a successful one. Once used, this property can’t be used again until the next dawn, and a small, burning crack appears in the egg’s surface. Spells. The stone has 3 charges. While holding it, you can use an action to expend 1 or more of its charges to cast one of the following spells from it: revivify (1 charge), raise dead (2 charges), or resurrection (3 charges, the spell functions as long as some bit of the alvo’s body remains, even just ashes or dust). If you expend the last charge, roll a d20. On a 1, the stone shatters into searing fragments, and a firebird (see Tome of Beasts) arises from the ashes. On any other roll, the stone regains 1d3 charges.

name: Phoenix-Feather Cap
desc: While attuned to this stylish cap, you can cast __fly_ on yourself at will without the need for components. In addition, the cap has 2 charges. You can use an action to expend a charge to use Wild Shape as if you were a _druid_  of 10th level. While using Wild Shape, you always retain one distinctive visual characteristic no matter what beast you are transformed into. The cap regains all of its expended charges whenever you finish a _short or long rest_ .

name: Pick of Ice Breaking
desc: The metal head of this war pick is covered in tiny arcane runes. You gain a +1 bonus to attack and damage rolls made with this magic weapon. The bonus increases to +3 when you use the war pick to attack a construct, elemental, fey, or other criatura made almost entirely of ice or snow. When you roll a 20 on an jogada de ataque made with this weapon against such a criatura, the alvo recebe an extra 2d8 dano perfurante. When you hit an object made of ice or snow with this weapon, the object doesn't have a damage threshold when determining o dano you deal to it with this weapon.

name: Pipes of Haunting
desc: You must be proficiente with wind instruments to use these pipes. They have 3 charges. You can use an action to play them and expend 1 charge to create an eerie, spellbinding tune. cada criatura within 30 pés of you that hears you play deve ter sucesso em a CD 15 teste de resistência de Sabedoria or become amedrontado of you for 1 minuto. If you wish, todas as criaturas in the area that aren't hostile toward you automatically succeed on the teste de resistência. A criatura that fails the teste de resistência can repeat it no final de cada um de seus turnos, ending the effect on itself em um sucesso. A criatura that succeeds on its teste de resistência is immune to the effect of these pipes for 24 horas. The pipes regain 1d3 expended charges daily at dawn.

name: Pipes of Haunting
desc: Using these pipes requires proficiência with wind instruments. You can use an action and expend 1 charge to play them and create an eerie, spellbinding tune. cada criatura within 30 pés that hears you play makes a CD 15 Sabedoria _teste de resistência_  or becomes _frightened_  of you for 1 minuto. You may choose for nonhostile criaturas in the area to automatically succeed on the teste de resistência. A amedrontado criatura can repeat the teste de resistência no final de cada um de seus turnos, ending the effect on itself em um sucesso. A criatura that succeeds on its teste de resistência is immune to these _pipes of haunting_ for 24 horas. The pipes have 3 charges and regain 1d3 charges each dawn.

name: Pipes of Madness
desc: You must be proficiente with wind instruments to use these strange, pale ivory pipes. They have 5 charges. You can use an action to play them and expend 1 charge to emit a weird strain of alien music that is audible up to 600 pés away. Choose up to three criaturas within 60 pés of you that can hear you play. Each alvo deve ter sucesso em a CD 15 teste de resistência de Sabedoria ou ficar affected as if you had cast the confusion spell on it. The pipes regain 1d4 + 1 expended charges daily at dawn.

name: Pipes of the Sewers
desc:
You must be proficiente with wind instruments to use these pipes. While you are attuned to the pipes, ordinary rats and Gigante rats are indifferent toward you and will not attack you unless you threaten or harm them.

The pipes have 3 charges. If you play the pipes as an action, you can use a ação bônus to expend 1 to 3 charges, calling forth one swarm of rats with each expended charge, provided that enough rats are within half a milha of you to be called in this fashion (as determined by the GM). If there aren't enough rats to form a swarm, the charge is wasted. Called swarms move toward the music by the shortest available route but aren't under your control otherwise. The pipes regain 1d3 expended charges daily at dawn.

Whenever a swarm of rats that isn't under another criatura's control comes within 30 pés of you while you are playing the pipes, you can make a teste de Carisma contested by the swarm's teste de Sabedoria. If you lose the contest, the swarm behaves as it normally would and can't be swayed by the pipes' music for the next 24 horas. If you win the contest, the swarm is swayed by the pipes' music and becomes friendly to you and your companions for as long as you continue to play the pipes each rodada as an action. A friendly swarm obeys your commands. If you issue no commands to a friendly swarm, it defends itself but otherwise recebe no actions. If a friendly swarm starts its turn and can't hear the pipes' music, your control over that swarm ends, and the swarm behaves as it normally would and can't be swayed by the pipes' music for the next 24 horas.

name: Pipes of the Sewers
desc:
You must be proficiente with wind instruments to use these pipes. The pipes have 3 charges and regain 1d3 expended charges at dawn. 

You can use an action to expend 1 to 3 charges and play the pipes, summoning a _swarm of rats_  for each expended charge. Summoned swarms are not under anyone’s control and appear by the shortest available route, and if there are not enough rats within a half milha (at the Narrator’s discretion) for this to take effect the expended charges are wasted and no swarm is summoned.

While you are using an action to play the pipes, you can make a teste de Carisma contested by the teste de Sabedoria of a swarm of rats within 30 pés. em uma falha, the swarm acts normally and is immune to the pipes for 24 horas. em um sucesso, the swarm becomes friendly to you and your aliados until you stop playing the pipes, following your commands. If not given any commands a friendly swarm defends itself but otherwise recebe no actions. Any friendly swarm that begins its turn unable to hear music from the pipes breaks your control, behaving as normal and immune to the effects of the pipes for 24 horas.

name: Pistol of the Umbral Court
desc: This hand crossbow is made from coal-colored wood. Its limb is made from frio steel and boasts engravings of sharp teeth. The barrel is magically oiled and smells faintly of ash. The grip is made from rough leather. You gain a +2 bonus on attack and damage rolls made with this magic weapon. When you hit with an attack with this weapon, you can força the alvo of your attack to succeed on a CD 15 teste de resistência de Força ou ficar pushed 5 pés away from you. The alvo recebe damage, as normal, whether it was pushed away or not. As a ação bônus, you can increase the distance criaturas are pushed to 20 pés for 1 minuto. If the criatura strikes a solid object before the movement is complete, it recebe 1d6 dano contundente for every 10 pés traveled. Once used, this property of the crossbow can't be used again until the next dawn.

name: Plague Doctor's Mask
desc:
This waxed leather mask covers an entire humanoid face and resembles the beak of a bird. A pair of glass lenses allow you to see through it and the bill provides a constant smell of lavender. While attuned to the _plague doctor’s mask_, you gain an expertise die on Constituição _teste de resistências_  against _diseases_ .

When you spend your action to concentrate and inhale the fragrance inside the mask, you recall memories from the brilliant surgeon who created the item. This strips the mask of its magic but allows you to recall the details of a particularly dangerous case. You have vantagem on Medicina checks made to treat any single não mágico disease of your choice until the end of your next _long rest_ , at which point the memories vanish.

name: Plate Armor of Etherealness
desc: While you're wearing this armor, you can speak its command word as an action to gain the effect of the _etherealness_ spell, which last for 10 minutos or until you remove the armor or use an action to speak the command word again. This property of the armor can't be used again until the next dawn.

name: Plate Armor of Etherealness
desc: While wearing and attuned to this set of armor, once per dawn you can use an action to cast the __etherealness_  spell. The spell lasts for 10 minutos, until the armor is removed, or until you use an action to end it.

name: Plumb of the Elements
desc: This four-faceted lead weight is hung on a long leather strip, which can be wound around the haft or handle of any melee weapon. You can remove the plumb and transfer it to another weapon whenever you wish. Weapons with the plumb attached to it deal additional dano de força equal to your proficiência bonus (up to a maximum of 3). As an action, you can activate the plumb to change this additional damage type to fogo, frio, relâmpago, or back to força.

name: Plunderer's Sea Chest
desc: This oak chest, measuring 3 pés by 5 pés by 3 pés, is secured with iron bands, which depict naval combat and scenes of piracy. The chest opens into an extradimensional space that can hold up to 3,500 cubic pés or 15,000 pounds of material. The chest always weighs 200 pounds, regardless of its contents. Placing an item in the sea chest follows the normal rules for interacting with objects. Retrieving an item from the chest requires you to use an action. When you open the chest to access a specific item, that item is always magically on top. If the chest is destroyed, its contents are lost forever, though an artifact that was inside always turns up again, somewhere. If a bag of holding, portable hole, or similar object is placed within the chest, that item and the contents of the chest are immediately destroyed, and the magic of the chest is disrupted for one dia, after which the chest resumes functioning as normal.

name: Pocket Oasis
desc: When you unfold and throw this 5-pé by 5-pé square of black cloth into the air as an action, it creates a portal to an oasis hidden within an extra-dimensional space. A pool of shallow, fresh water fills the center of the oasis, and bountiful fruit and nut trees grow around the pool. The fruits and nuts from the trees provide enough nourishment for up to 10 Medium criaturas. The air in the oasis is pure, cool, and even a little crisp, and the environment is free from harmful effects. When criaturas enter the extra-dimensional space, they are protected from effects and criaturas outside the oasis as if they were in the space created by a rope trick spell, and a vine dangles from the opening in place of a rope, allowing access to the oasis. The effect lasts for 24 horas or until all the criaturas leave the extra-dimensional oasis, whichever occurs first. Any criaturas still inside the oasis no final de 24 horas are harmlessly ejected. Once used, the pocket oasis can't be used again for 24 horas.

name: Pocket Spark
desc: What looks like a simple snuff box contains a mágico, glowing ember. Though warm to the touch, the ember can be handled without damage. It can be used to ignite flammable materials quickly. Using it to leve a torch, lantern, or anything else with abundant, exposed fuel recebe a ação bônus. Lighting any other fogo recebe an action. The ember is consumed when used. If the ember is consumed, the box creates a new ember at dawn.

name: Poison Breath Bottle
desc: You can use an action to throw this green vial at a point within 20 pés. The vial shatters on impact and creates a 5-pé-radius cloud of veneno gas. A criatura that starts its turn in the cloud deve ter sucesso em a CD 12 Constituição _teste de resistência_  ou receber 2d6 dano de veneno and become _poisoned_  até o final de seu próximo turno. The area inside the cloud is _lightly obscured_ . The cloud remains for 1 minuto or until a strong wind disperses it.

name: Poison Strand
desc: When you hit with an attack using this magic whip, the alvo recebe an extra 2d4 dano de veneno. If you hold one end of the whip and use an action to speak its command word, the other end magically extends and darts forward to entangle a criatura you can see within 20 pés of you. The alvo deve ter sucesso em a CD 17 teste de resistência de Destreza or become imobilizado. While imobilizado, the alvo recebe 2d4 dano de veneno no início de cada um de seus turnos, and you can use an action to pull the alvo up to 20 pés toward you. If you would move the alvo into damaging terrain, such as lava or a pit, it can make a CD 17 teste de resistência de Força. em um sucesso, the alvo isn't pulled toward you. You can't use the whip to make attacks while it is restraining a alvo, and if you release your end of the whip, the alvo is no longer imobilizado. The imobilizado alvo can use an action to make a CD 17 Força (Atletismo) or Destreza (Acrobacia) check (alvo's choice). em um sucesso, the alvo is no longer imobilizado by the whip. When the whip has imobilizado criaturas for a total of 1 minuto, you can't restrain a criatura with the whip again until the next dawn.

name: Poisoner’s Almanac
desc: Poisonous botanicals were pressed into the pages of this tome long ago, and when found only 2d6 pages remain. You may tear out a page and dissolve it in any liquid over the course of 1 minuto, transforming it into oil of taggit. When dissolved in a potion, the potion becomes inert.

name: Portable Hole
desc:
This fine black cloth, soft as silk, is folded up to the dimensions of a handkerchief. It unfolds into a circular sheet 6 pés in diameter.

You can use an action to unfold a _portable hole_ and place it on or against a solid surface, whereupon the _portable hole_ creates an extradimensional hole 10 pés deep. The cylindrical space within the hole exists on a different plane, so it can't be used to create open passages. Any criatura inside an open _portable hole_ can exit the hole by escalando out of it.

You can use an action to close a _portable hole_ by taking hold of the edges of the cloth and folding it up. Folding the cloth closes the hole, and any criaturas or objects within remain in the extradimensional space. No matter what's in it, the hole weighs next to nothing.

If the hole is folded up, a criatura within the hole's extradimensional space can use an action to make a CD 10 teste de Força. On a successful check, the criatura forces its way out and appears within 5 pés of the _portable hole_ or the criatura carrying it. A breathing criatura within a closed _portable hole_ can survive for up to 10 minutos, after which time it begins to suffocate.

Placing a _portable hole_ inside an extradimensional space created by a _bag of holding_, _handy haversack_, or similar item instantly destroys both items and opens a gate to the Astral Plane. The gate originates where the one item was placed inside the other. Any criatura within 10 pés of the gate is sucked through it and deposited in a random location on the Astral Plane. The gate then closes. The gate is one-way only and can't be reopened.

name: Portable Hole
desc:
While not in use, this item appears as a cloth the color of darkness. When unfolded, it opens up into a circular sheet that is 6 pés in diameter. 

You can use an action to unfold the _portable hole_ on a stable solid surface. When unfolded, the item creates a hole 10 pés deep that leads to a cylindrical extra dimensional space which cannot be used to create open passages. Closing the hole requires an action and involves you taking a hold of the edges and folding it up. No matter its contents, the hole weighs next to nothing. 

Food or water placed in a closed _portable hole_ immediately and permanently lose all nourishing qualities—after being in the item, water no longer slakes thirst and food does not sate hunger or nourish. In a similar fashion, the body of a dead criatura placed in the portable hole cannot be restored to life by __revivify , raise dead_ , or other similar magic. Breathing criaturas inside a closed _portable hole_ can survive for up to 2d4 minutos divided by the number of criaturas (minimum 1 minuto), after which time they begin to _suffocate_ .

criaturas inside the hole while it’s open can exit the hole by simply escalando out. A criatura still within the hole can use an action to make a CD 10 teste de Força to escape as it is being closed. em um sucesso, the criatura appears within 5 pés of the item or criatura carrying it.

Placing a _portable hole_ inside another extradimensional storage device such as a _bag of holding_ or __handy haversack_  results in planar rift that destroys both items and pulls everything within 10 pés into the Astral Plane. The rift then closes and disappears.

name: Portraiture Gremlin
desc: This Tiny ethereal white goblinoid sits within a small iron box and is surrounded by dabs of pigments. The box has a switch that when pressed strikes the gremlin on the head with a tiny hammer. Whenever the gremlin is hit by the hammer it rapidly paints whatever it sees out of the small porthole at the front of the box. The gremlin recebe 1 minuto to finish the picture and the result is a perfectly accurate painting, albeit miniature. The gremlin comes with enough pigments for 5 paintings and each subsequent painting requires paints worth at least 12 gold.

name: Potent Cure-All
desc: The milky liquid in this bottle shimmers when agitated, as small, glittering particles swirl within it. When you drink this potion, it reduces your exaustão level by one, removes any reduction to one of your ability scores, removes the cego, surdo, paralisado, and envenenado conditions, and cures you of any diseases currently afflicting you.

name: Potion Belt
desc:
One or more thin bands of flexible, pale blue crystal run along this plain, brown leather belt. As an action, you can pour a potion onto a band of crystal, which absorbs the potion and turns a deep blue. Each band of crystal can store only one potion at a time.
  ***Potion Belt (Comum).*** This belt contains only one band of crystal. While wearing the belt, you can use an action to speak the belt’s command word and gain the benefits of the potion as if you drank it.
  ***Greater Potion Belt (Rare).*** This belt contains three bands of crystal. While wearing the belt, you can use a ação bônus to speak the belt’s command word and the name of one of the potions and gain the benefits of the named potion as if you drank it.

name: Potion of Air Breathing
desc: This potion's pale blue fluid smells like salty air, and a seagull's feather floats in it. You can breathe air for 1 hora after drinking this potion. If you could already breathe air, this potion has no effect.

name: Potion of Animal Friendship
desc: When you drink this potion, you can cast the _animal friendship_ spell (save CD 13) for 1 hora at will. Agitating this muddy liquid brings little bits into view: a fish scale, a hummingbird tongue, a cat claw, or a squirrel hair.

name: Potion of Animal Friendship
desc: After drinking this potion, for the next hora you can cast _animal friendship_ (save CD 13) at will.

name: Potion of Bad Taste
desc: This brown, sludgy potion tastes extremely foul. When you drink this potion, the taste of your flesh is altered to be unpalatable for 1 hora. During this time, if a criatura hits you with a bite attack, it deve ter sucesso em a CD 10 teste de resistência de Constituição or spend its next action gagging and retching. A criatura with an Inteligência of 4 or lower avoids biting you again unless compelled or commanded by an outside força or if you attack it.

name: Potion of Bouncing
desc: A small, red sphere bobs up and down in the clear, effervescent liquid inside this bottle but disappears when the bottle is opened. When you drink this potion, your body becomes rubbery, and you are immune to falling damage for 1 hora. If you fall at least 10 pés, your body bounces back the same distance. As a reação while falling, you can angle your fall and position your legs to redirect this distance. For example, if you fall 60 pés, you can redirect your bounce to propel you 30 pés up and 30 pés forward from the position where you landed.

name: Potion of Buoyancy
desc: When you drink this clear, effervescent liquid, your body becomes unnaturally buoyant for 1 hora. When you are immersed in water or other liquids, you rise to the surface (at a rate of up to 30 pés per rodada) to float and bob there. You have vantagem on Força (Atletismo) checks made to swim or stay afloat in rough water, and you automatically succeed on such checks in calm waters.

name: Potion of Clairvoyance
desc: When you drink this potion, you gain the effect of the _clairvoyance_ spell. An eyeball bobs in this yellowish liquid but vanishes when the potion is opened.

name: Potion of Clairvoyance
desc: This dark liquid has a copper sheen. After drinking this potion, you are affected as if you had cast _clairvoyance_ .

name: Potion of Climbing
desc: When you drink this potion, you gain a escalando Deslocamento equal to your andando Deslocamento for 1 hora. During this time, you have vantagem on Força (Atletismo) checks you make to climb. The potion is separated into brown, silver, and gray layers resembling bands of stone. Shaking the bottle fails to mix the colors.

name: Potion of Climbing
desc: After drinking this potion, for the next hora you gain a escalando Deslocamento equal to your Deslocamento. While the effect lasts, you have _advantage_  on checks made to climb.

name: Potion of Diminution
desc: When you drink this potion, you gain the "reduce" effect of the _enlarge/reduce_ spell for 1d4 horas (no Concentração required). The red in the potion's liquid continuously contracts to a tiny bead and then expands to color the clear liquid around it. Shaking the bottle fails to interrupt this process.

name: Potion of Diminution
desc: A golden acorn floats in the translucent liquid, dropping from the top of the vial and floating back up every few seconds. After drinking this potion, your size is reduced by half (as the __enlarge/reduce_  spell but without need for _concentration_ ) for 1d4 horas.

name: Potion of Dire Cleansing
desc: For 1 hora after drinking this potion, you have resistance to dano de veneno, and you have vantagem on teste de resistências against being cego, surdo, paralisado, and envenenado. In addition, if you are envenenado, this potion neutralizes the veneno. Known for its powerful, somewhat burning smell, this potion is difficult to drink, requiring a successful CD 13 teste de resistência de Constituição to drink it. em uma falha, you are envenenado for 10 minutos and don't gain the benefits of the potion.

name: Potion of Ebbing Strength
desc: When you drink this potion, your Força score changes to 25 for 1 hora. The potion has no effect on you if your Força is equal to or greater than that score. The recipe for this potion is flawed and infused with dangerous Void energies. When you drink this potion, you are also envenenado. While envenenado, you take 2d4 dano de veneno no final de each minuto. If you are reduced to 0 pontos de vida while envenenado, you have desvantagem on death teste de resistências. This bubbling, pale blue potion is commonly used by the derro and is almost always paired with a Potion of Dire Cleansing or Holy Verdant Bat Droppings (see page 147). Warriors who use this potion without a method of removing the veneno don't intend to return home from battle.

name: Potion of Effulgence
desc: When you drink this potion, your skin glows with radiance, and you are filled with joy and bliss for 1 minuto. You shed bright leve in a 30-pé radius and dim leve for an additional 30 pés. This leve is sunlight. While glowing, you are cego and have desvantagem on Destreza (Furtividade) checks to hide. If a criatura with the Sunlight Sensitivity trait starts its turn in the bright leve you shed, it recebe 2d4 dano radiante. This potion's golden liquid sparkles with motes of sunlight.

name: Potion of Empowering Truth
desc: A withered snake's tongue floats in the shimmering gold liquid within this crystalline vial. When you drink this potion, you regain one expended espaço de magia or one expended use of a class feature, such as Divine Sense, Rage, Wild Shape, or other feature with limited uses. Until you finish a descanso longo, you can't speak a deliberate lie. You are aware of this effect after drinking the potion. Your words can be evasive, as long as they remain within the boundaries of the truth.

name: Potion of Flying
desc: When you drink this potion, you gain a voando Deslocamento equal to your andando Deslocamento for 1 hora and can hover. If you're in the air when the potion wears off, you fall unless you have some other means of staying aloft. This potion's clear liquid floats at the top of its container and has cloudy white impurities drifting in it.

name: Potion of Flying
desc: The pale blue liquid in this vial floats leaving a gap at the bottom. After drinking this potion, for the next hora you gain a voando Deslocamento equal to your Deslocamento and the ability to hover. If the effect ends while you are in midair you fall unless another item or effect stops you.

name: Potion of Freezing Fog
desc: After drinking this potion, you can use an action to exhale a cloud of icy fog in a 20-pé cube originating from you. The cloud spreads around corners, and its area is heavily obscured. It lasts for 1 minuto or until a wind of moderate or greater Deslocamento (at least 10 milhas per hora) disperses it. When a criatura enters the cloud for the first time on a turn or starts its turn there, that criatura deve ter sucesso em a CD 13 teste de resistência de Constituição ou receber 2d4 dano de frio. The effects of this potion end after you have exhaled one fog cloud or 1 hora has passed. This potion has a gray, cloudy appearance and swirls vigorously when shaken.

name: Potion of Gaseous Form
desc: When you drink this potion, you gain the effect of the _gaseous form_ spell for 1 hora (no Concentração required) or until you end the effect as a ação bônus. This potion's container seems to hold fog that moves and pours like water.

name: Potion of Gaseous Form
desc: The pale, translucent liquid in this vial causes the flask to float slightly. After drinking this potion, for the next hora you are affected as if you had cast __gaseous form_ (but without the need for _concentration_ ). You can use a ação bônus to end the effect early.

name: Potion of Giant Strength
desc:
When you drink this potion, your Força score changes for 1 hora. The type of Gigante determines the score (see the table below). The potion has no effect on you if your Força is equal to or greater than that score.

This potion's transparent liquid has floating in it a sliver of fingernail from a Gigante of the appropriate type. The _potion of frost Gigante strength_ and the _potion of stone Gigante strength_ have the same effect.

| Type of Gigante     | Força | Rarity    |
|-------------------|----------|-----------|
| Hill Gigante        | 21       | Uncommon  |
| Frost/stone Gigante | 23       | Rare      |
| fogo Gigante        | 25       | Rare      |
| Cloud Gigante       | 27       | Very rare |
| Storm Gigante       | 29       | Legendary |

name: Potion of Giant Strength
desc:
After you drink this potion, for the next hora your Força score increases to match the Gigante whose parts were used to create it (see Table: Potion of Gigante Força). The potion has no effect if your Força is equal to or greater than the Gigante’s Força score.

__**Table: Potion of Gigante Força**__
| **Gigante**     | **Força Score** | **Rarity** | **Cost**  | **Appearance**       |
| ------------- | ------------------ | ---------- | --------- | -------------------- |
| _Hill giant_  | 20                 | Uncommon   | 300 gp    | Muddy, gray          |
| _Frost giant_ | 22                 | Rare       | 800 gp    | Transparent, viscous |
| _Stone giant_ | 23                 | Rare       | 800 gp    | Silver, shimmering   |
| _Fire giant_  | 25                 | Rare       | 2,000 gp  | Orange, volatile     |
| _Cloud giant_ | 27                 | Very rare  | 5,000 gp  | Opaque white         |
| _Storm giant_ | 29                 | Legendary  | 52,500 gp | Swirling black       |

name: Potion of Growth
desc: When you drink this potion, you gain the "enlarge" effect of the _enlarge/reduce_ spell for 1d4 horas (no Concentração required). The red in the potion's liquid continuously expands from a tiny bead to color the clear liquid around it and then contracts. Shaking the bottle fails to interrupt this process.

name: Potion of Growth
desc: A golden acorn floating in this translucent liquid grows and retracts roots every few seconds. After drinking this potion, for the next 1d4 horas your size is doubled (as the __enlarge/reduce_  spell but without need for _concentration_ ).

name: Potion of Healing
desc:
You regain pontos de vida when you drink this potion. The number of pontos de vida depends on the potion's rarity, as shown in the Potions of Healing table. Whatever its potency, the potion's red liquid glimmers when agitated.

**Potions of Healing (table)**

| Potion of ...    | Rarity    | HP Regained |
|------------------|-----------|-------------|
| Healing          | Comum    | 2d4 + 2     |
| Greater healing  | Uncommon  | 4d4 + 4     |
| Superior healing | Rare      | 8d4 + 8     |
| Supreme healing  | Very rare | 10d4 + 20   |

name: Potion of Healing
desc:
Drinking this swirling red liquid restores pontos de vida as detailed on the Potions of Healing table.

__**Table: Potions of Healing**__
| **Potion**         | **Rarity** | **pontos de vida** | **Cost** | **Carats needed** |
| ------------------ | ---------- | -------------- | -------- | ----------------- |
| _Healing_          | Comum     | 2d4+2          | 50 gp    | 1                 |
| _Greater healing_  | Uncommon   | 4d4+4          | 150 gp   | 2                 |
| _Superior healing_ | Rare       | 8d4+8          | 550 gp   | 10                |
| _Supreme healing_  | Rare       | 10d4+20        | 1,500 gp | 50                |

name: Potion of Heroism
desc: For 1 hora after drinking it, you gain 10 temporary pontos de vida that last for 1 hora. For the same duration, you are under the effect of the _bless_ spell (no Concentração required). This blue potion bubbles and steams as if boiling.

name: Potion of Heroism
desc: After drinking this glowing white potion, for the next hora you gain 10 temporary pontos de vida and the benefits of the _bless_  spell (but without the need for _concentration_ ).

name: Potion of Infinite Possibilities
desc:
This deep purple potion swirls with glittering flashes of red, green, and blue and smells faintly of ozone. For 1 hora after drinking this potion, you gain the following benefits:
* You have visão cega out to a range of 60 pés.
* When you roll a 1 on an teste de habilidade, teste de resistência, or jogada de ataque, you can reroll the die and must use the new roll.
 *You can see into the Ethereal Plane. Ethereal criaturas and objects appear ghostly and translucent.
When the duration ends, you are atordoado until the end of your next turn as your mind reels from the loss of the mind-altering effects.

name: Potion of Invisibility
desc: This potion's container looks empty but feels as though it holds liquid. When you drink it, you become invisível for 1 hora. Anything you wear or carry is invisível with you. The effect ends early if you attack or cast a spell.

name: Potion of Invisibility
desc: The silver liquid in this vial is visible only when shaken or disturbed. After drinking this potion, for the next hora you and anything you’re wearing or carrying becomes _invisible_ . The effect ends early if you attack or cast a spell.

name: Potion of Malleability
desc: The glass bottle holding this thick, red liquid is strangely pliable, and compresses in your hand under the slightest pressure while it still holds the mágico liquid. When you drink this potion, your body becomes extremely flexible and adaptable to pressure. For 1 hora, you have resistance to dano contundente, can squeeze through a space large enough for a criatura two sizes smaller than you, and have vantagem on Destreza (Acrobacia) checks made to escape a grapple.

name: Potion of Mind Reading
desc: When you drink this potion, you gain the effect of the _detect thoughts_ spell (save CD 13). The potion's dense, purple liquid has an ovoid cloud of pink floating in it.

name: Potion of Mind Reading
desc: After drinking this fizzy deep green lime potion, for the next hora you are affected as if you had cast __detect thoughts_  (save CD 13).

name: Potion of Poison
desc:
This concoction looks, smells, and tastes like a _potion of healing_ or other beneficial potion. However, it is actually veneno masked by illusion magic. An _identify_ spell reveals its true Natureza.

If you drink it, you take 3d6 dano de veneno, and you deve ter sucesso em a CD 13 teste de resistência de Constituição ou ficar envenenado. no início de each of your turns while you are envenenado in this way, you take 3d6 dano de veneno. no final de each of your turns, you can repeat the teste de resistência. em um sucesso no teste, the dano de veneno you take on your subsequent turns decreases by 1d6. The veneno ends when o dano decreases to 0.

name: Potion of Poison
desc:
This potion comes in many guises, and always appears to be a beneficial potion (most often the swirling red of a _potion of healing_ ). Its true intent, however, is deadly. 

When you drink this potion you take 3d6 dano de veneno and make a CD 13 Constituição _teste de resistência_  or become _poisoned_ . At the beginning of each of your turns while envenenado in this way, you take 3d6 dano de veneno. no final de each of your turns you repeat the teste de resistência, decreasing o dano dealt by the veneno by 1d6 for each successful save. You cease to be envenenado when o dano is reduced to 0.

name: Potion of Resistance
desc:
When you drink this potion, you gain resistance to one type of damage for 1 hora. The GM chooses the type or determines it randomly from the options below.

| d10 | Damage Type |
|-----|-------------|
| 1   | ácido        |
| 2   | frio        |
| 3   | fogo        |
| 4   | força       |
| 5   | relâmpago   |
| 6   | necrótico    |
| 7   | veneno      |
| 8   | psíquico     |
| 9   | radiante     |
| 10  | trovão     |

name: Potion of Resistance
desc:
After you drink this potion, for the next hora you gain resistance to a single type of damage (chosen by the Narrator or determined randomly).

__**Table: Potion of Resistance**__
| **d10** | **Damage Type** |
| ------- | --------------- |
| 1       | trovão         |
| 2       | relâmpago       |
| 3       | frio            |
| 4       | veneno          |
| 5       | fogo            |
| 6       | psíquico         |
| 7       | ácido            |
| 8       | necrótico        |
| 9       | radiante         |
| 10      | força           |

name: Potion of Sand Form
desc: This potion's container holds a gritty liquid that moves and pours like water filled with fine particles of sand. When you drink this potion, you gain the effect of the gaseous form spell for 1 hora (no Concentração required) or until you end the effect as a ação bônus. While in this gaseous form, your appearance is that of a vortex of spiraling sand instead of a misty cloud. In addition, you have vantagem on Destreza (Furtividade) checks while in a sandy environment, and, while motionless in a sandy environment, you are indistinguishable from an ordinary swirl of sand.

name: Potion of Skating
desc: For 1 hora after you drink this potion, you can move across icy surfaces without needing to make an teste de habilidade, and difficult terrain composed of ice or snow doesn't cost you extra movement. This sparkling blue liquid contains tiny snowflakes that disappear when shaken.

name: Potion of Speed
desc: When you drink this potion, you gain the effect of the _haste_ spell for 1 minuto (no Concentração required). The potion's yellow fluid is streaked with black and swirls on its own.

name: Potion of Speed
desc: An opaque gray liquid that occasionally flashes with sparks of electricity. After drinking this potion, for the next minuto you gain the benefits of a _haste_  spell (without the need for _concentration_ ).

name: Potion of Transparency
desc: The liquid in this vial is clear like water, and it gives off a slight iridescent sheen when shaken or swirled. When you drink this potion, you and everything you are wearing and carrying turn transparent, but not completely invisível, for 10 minutos. During this time, you have vantagem on Destreza (Furtividade) checks, and ranged attacks against you have desvantagem.

name: Potion of Water Breathing
desc: You can breathe underwater for 1 hora after drinking this potion. Its cloudy green fluid smells of the sea and has a jellyfish-like bubble floating in it.

name: Potion of Water Breathing
desc: After drinking this murky blue potion, you are able to _breathe underwater_  for 1 hora.

name: Potion of Worg Form
desc: Small flecks of brown hair are suspended in this clear, syrupy liquid. When you drink this potion, you transform into a worg for 1 hora. This works like the polymorph spell, but you retain your Inteligência, Sabedoria, and Carisma scores. While in worg form, you can speak normally, and you can cast spells that have only verbal components. This transformation doesn't give you knowledge of the Goblin or Worg languages, and you are able to speak and understand those languages only if you knew them before the transformation.

name: Pouch of Emergency Healing
desc: Twice per dia, you can use an action to open this blue silk pouch and receive or bestow the benefits of one of the following spells: _cure wounds , greater restoration , healing word , lesser restoration ._

name: Pouch of Runestones
desc:
This ordinary bag, made from cured animal hide, appears empty. Reaching inside the bag, however, reveals the presence of a number of flat, bone tiles. The bag weighs 1/2 pound.
  You can use an action to pull one of the tiles from the bag and throw it into the air in front of you. The tile floats 5 pés off the ground and displays a runic symbol. Make a CD 12 teste de Sabedoria. The symbol on the tile is upright em um sucesso no teste, and it is reversed em uma falha no teste. Roll a d12 and consult the appropriate table to determine the rune’s effect. If a result requires a teste de resistência, the CD is 15. The tile vanishes after it displays a rune, but the bag never runs out of tiles.
  Once used, the bag shouldn’t be used again until the next dawn. Each time it is used again before then, the CD of the teste de Sabedoria increases by 5 for each tile drawn after the first. You can be affected by more than one rune’s effect at a time.
  Unless otherwise noted, each rune’s effect lasts until you finish a descanso longo.

 ***Upright Runestone*** 

| d12  | Rune     | Meaning       | Effect |
|------|----------|---------------|--------|
| 1    | Ansuz    | Truth         | When this rune appears, a zone of truth spell is triggered, centered on you, and it moves with you for 1 hora. |
| 2    | Naudiz   | Necessity     | You have vantagem on the next teste de resistência you make before this effect ends. |
| 3    | Hagalaz  | Winter        | You can cast the ice storm spell once before this effect ends. |
| 4    | Laukaz   | Sea           | You can breathe air and water for 5 horas. |
| 5    | Algiz    | Protection    | You gain a +2 bonus to AC. |
| 6    | Mannaz   | Teamwork      | You and up to five criaturas of your choice that you can see gain 10 temporary pontos de vida. |
| 7    | Isaz     | Ice           | When you hit with an attack, the attack causa an extra 1d6 dano de frio. |
| 8    | Berkanan | Bear Maiden   | You can use an action to cast polymorph on yourself, transforming into a brown bear. While you are in the form of the brown bear, you retain your Inteligência, Sabedoria, and Carisma scores. You can end this effect early as a ação bônus. |
| 9    | Perto    | Mystery       | You can cast disguise self at will. |
| 10   | Ehwaz    | Freedom       | Until this effect ends, you can spend 5 pés of movement to automatically escape from não mágico restraints, such as manacles or a criatura that has you agarrado. |
| 11   | Raido    | Easy Travel   | Your andando Deslocamento increases by 10 pés. |
