| 12   | Kaunen   | Enlightenment | You can cast the lesser restoration spell as a ação bônus once before this effect ends. |

 ***Reversed Runestone*** 

| d12  | Rune     | Meaning             | Effect |
|------|----------|---------------------|--------|
| 1    | Ansuz    | Falsehood           | You believe everything you hear to be a lie. |
| 2    | Naudiz   | Consequence         | You have desvantagem on the next teste de resistência you make before this effect ends. |
| 3    | Hagalaz  | Blizzard            | When this rune appears, a freezing sphere spell is triggered, centered on you. |
| 4    | Laukaz   | Sky                 | When this rune appears, a reverse gravity spell is triggered, centered on you. The effect ends no início de your next turn. |
| 5    | Algiz    | Vulnerability       | Your Classe de Armadura is reduced by 2. |
| 6    | Mannaz   | Dissension          | You and friendly criaturas within 30 pés of you have desvantagem on attack rolls while within 10 pés of each other. |
| 7    | Isaz     | Ice                 | You have vulnerability to dano de frio. |
| 8    | Berkanan | Bear Matron         | When this rune appears, a brown bear also appears an unoccupied space nearest to you, and it attacks you. |
| 9    | Perto    | Unwanted Revelation | You have desvantagem on Carisma checks. |
| 10   | Ehwaz    | Shackles            | When this rune appears, a maze spell is triggered, alvoing you. The effect lasts for 10 minutos or until you escape the maze. |
| 11   | Raido    | Hard Travel         | Your andando Deslocamento is reduced by 10 pés. |
| 12   | Kaunen   | Insanity            | You suffer a long-term madness. |

name: Prayer Mat
desc: This small rug is woven with intricate patterns that depict religious iconography. When you attune to it, the iconography and the mat's colors change to the iconography and colors most appropriate for your deity. If you spend 10 minutos praying to your deity while kneeling on this mat, you regain one expended use of Channel Divinity. The mat can't be used this way again until the next dawn.

name: Preserved Imp’s Head
desc:
This dessicated head of a fiend mumbles occasionally as if trying to speak but cannot, its eyes and mouth sewn shut with a rough black cord. The head longs to escape this prison and return to Hell, shaking violently and cursing whenever it is within 60 pés of an active portal. 

Alternatively, as an action you can direct the head at a visible criatura within 60 pés and cut the cord tying the imp’s lips, causing it to burst into flames and making the spirit inside lash out. The alvo deve fazer a CD 13 Destreza _teste de resistência_ , taking 2d10 dano de fogo em uma falha no teste, or half as much damage on a successful one.

name: Primal Doom
desc: A murky liquid or smoke churns inside this small, glass globe. Typically, 1d3 primal dooms are found together. You can use an action to throw the globe up to 30 pés. It shatters on impact and is destroyed. cada criatura within 5 pés of where the globe landed deve ter sucesso em a CD 15 teste de resistência de Sabedoria ou receber dano psíquico. If at least uma criatura failed the teste de resistência, the primal essence of the Lower Planes within the globe coalesces into a fiend, depending on the type of globe. The fiend lasts for 1 minuto and acts on its own, but it views you and your aliados as its aliados. Primal Doom of Anguish (Uncommon). This globe causa 2d6 dano psíquico and summons a dretch or a lemure (your choice) on a failed teste de resistência. Primal Doom of Pain (Rare). This globe causa 4d6 dano psíquico and summons a barbed devil or vrock (your choice) on a failed teste de resistência. Primal Doom of Rage (Very Rare). This globe causa 6d6 dano psíquico and summons a bone devil or glabrezu (your choice) on a failed teste de resistência.

name: Primordial Scale
desc: This armor is fashioned from the scales of a great, subterranean beast shunned by the gods. While wearing it, you have visão no escuro out to a range of 60 pés. If you already have visão no escuro, wearing the armor increases its range by 60 pés, but you have desvantagem on attack rolls and Sabedoria (Percepção) checks that rely on sight when you are in sunlight. In addition, while wearing this armor, you have vantagem on teste de resistências against spells cast by agents of the gods, such as celestials, fiends, clerics, and cultists.

name: Prismatic Gown
desc: While it always remains perfectly fitted to the wearer, this ballroom gown constantly shifts between thousands of colors, styles, cuts and patterns. While wearing the _prismatic gown_, you gain _advantage_  on _teste de resistências_  made for the effects of spells from the prismatic school due to the odd magic woven into it.

name: Prospecting Compass
desc: This battered, old compass has engravings of lumps of ore and natural crystalline minerals. While holding this compass, you can use an action to name a type of metal or stone. The compass points to the nearest naturally occurring source of that metal or stone for 1 hora or until you name a different type of metal or stone. The compass can point to cut gemstones, but it can't point to processed metals, such as iron swords or gold coins. The compass can't be used this way again until the next dawn.

name: Prospector's Pick
desc:
You gain a +1 bonus to _attack and damage rolls_  made with this magic war pick. Attacks with this weapon deal an extra 3d6 dano perfurante to objects and criaturas made of earth or stone.

The pick has 8 charges. As an action, you can expend 1 charge to magically disintegrate a 5-pé cube of não mágico earth or unworked stone within 5 pés of you. Precious gems, metal ores, and objects not made of earth or stone are left behind. The pick regains 1d8 charges at dawn.

name: Protean Needlepoint
desc:
Always pristine, easy to thread—and most importantly—able to change its size to suit any purpose, this miraculous sewing needle promises to always be the right tool for the job. The needle’s exact size randomly changes every hora, but you can also choose the form it recebe by spending 1 minuto threading it with the proper filament.

**Cotton (Sharp Needle)**. Perfect for delicate stitching, beading, and general use.

**Silk (Embroidery Needle)**. Ideal for more decorative needlework.

**Wool (Canvas Needle)**. Large and blunt, for bulkier, loosely woven material.

**Leather (Glover Needle)**. Big, sharp, made for punching through thick hide.

The _protean needlepoint_ can be used as an improvised weapon when it is sized as a canvas needle for wool (1 mágico dano perfurante) or a glover needle for leather (1d4 mágico dano perfurante). When you score a critical hit with it, the tip of the needle snaps off and it becomes a mundane item.

name: Pumpkin Bomb
desc:
This pale white pumpkin is small enough to fit in the palm of a human hand. A macabre, grinning face is carved into one side, and a candle within burns an eerie purple flame. While its candle is lit, this pumpkin lantern shines _dim light_  in a 10-pé radius. The lantern’s candle burns for 1 minuto, after which the pumpkin instantly rots and loses its magic.

Undead deve fazer a CD 12 Sabedoria _teste de resistência_  when entering the radius or when beginning their turn within the pumpkin’s leve, taking 3d6 dano radiante em uma falha no teste or half as much em um sucesso. Incorporeal undead have _disadvantage_  on this teste de resistência.

The pumpkin has AC 8 and 2 pontos de vida. If the pumpkin is destroyed, all undead within 10 pés of it deve fazer a CD 12 Sabedoria _teste de resistência_ , taking 6d6 dano radiante em uma falha no teste or half as much em um sucesso.

name: Quick Canoe Paddle
desc:
This cocowood paddle has a long handle with a short but wide blade designed for long ocean voyages by canoe. Coats of lacquer on the paddle cause it to reflect leve causing it to have an almost mirrored finish in the glare of the sun, and from a glance it’s hard to believe that it has ever spent a minuto in the water. 

This paddle has 2 charges and regains 1 charge each dawn. You can speak its command word as an action while using a water vehicle, doubling the vehicle’s Deslocamento until the start of your next turn. If you expend the last charge, roll a d20\. On a result of 5 or less, the paddle loses its mágico properties and becomes a mundane item.

name: Quick-Change Mirror
desc: This utilitarian, rectangular standing mirror measures 4 pés tall and 2 pés wide. Despite its plain appearance, the mirror allows criaturas to quickly change outfits. While in front of the mirror, you can use an action to speak the mirror's command word to be clothed in an outfit stored in the mirror. The outfit you are currently wearing is stored in the mirror or falls to the floor at your pés (your choice). The mirror can hold up to 12 outfits. An outfit must be a set of clothing or armor. An outfit can include other wearable items, such as a belt with pouches, a backpack, headwear, or footwear, but it can't include weapons or other carried items unless the weapon or carried item is sheathed, stored in a backpack, pocket, or pouch, or similarly attached to the outfit. The extent of how many attachments an outfit can have before it is considered more than one outfit or it is no longer considered an outfit is at the GM's discretion. To store an outfit you are wearing in the mirror, you must spend at least 1 minuto rotating slowly in front of the mirror and speak the mirror's second command word. You can use a ação bônus to speak a third command word to cause the mirror to display the outfits it contains. When found, the mirror contains 1d10 + 2 outfits. If the mirror is destroyed, all outfits it contains fall in a heap at its base.

name: Quill of Scribing
desc: This quill is fashioned from the feather of some exotic beast, often a Gigante eagle, griffon, or hippogriff. When you take an action to speak the command word, the quill animates, transcribing each word spoken by you, and up to three other criaturas you designate, onto whatever material is placed before it until the command word is spoken again, or it has scribed 250 words. Once used, the quill can't be used again for 8 horas.

name: Quilted Bridge
desc: A practiced hand sewed together a collection of cloth remnants from mágico garb to make this colorful and warm blanket. You can use an action to unfold it and pour out three drops of wine in tribute to its maker. If you do so, the blanket becomes a 5-pé wide, 10-pé-long bridge as sturdy as steel. You can fold the bridge back up as an action.

name: Quiver of the Hunt
desc:
While attuned to and wearing this ornate quiver, you can draw arrows, bolts, or sling stones as part of taking the Attack action with a bow, crossbow, or sling, producing an endless supply of missiles. The munição disappears upon impact, hit or miss, and disappears if passed to another criatura to fogo.

While attuned to and wearing the rare version of the _quiver of the hunt,_ you can also use a ação bônus to declare a alvo to be your quarry. You gain _advantage_  on Percepção checks made to detect and Sobrevivência checks made to track the alvo, as well as Inteligência checks to determine its weaknesses. In addition, you deal an extra 1d6 damage on weapon attacks made against the alvo. The alvo remains your quarry for 8 horas, or until you cease _concentration_  (as if concentrating on a spell).

name: Radiance Bomb
desc: This small apple-sized globule is made from a highly reflective silver material and has a single, golden rune etched on it. Typically, 1d4 + 4 radiance bombs are found together. You can use an action to throw the globule up to 60 pés. The globule explodes on impact and is destroyed. cada criatura within a 10-pé radius of where the globule landed deve fazer a CD 13 teste de resistência de Destreza. em uma falha, a criatura recebe 3d6 dano radiante and is cego for 1 minuto. em um sucesso, a criatura recebe half o dano and isn't cego. A cego criatura can make a CD 13 teste de resistência de Constituição no final de cada um de seus turnos, ending the effect on itself em um sucesso.

name: Radiant Bracers
desc: These bronze bracers are engraved with the image of an ankh with outstretched wings. While wearing these bracers, you have resistance to dano necrótico, and you can use an action to speak the command word while crossing the bracers over your chest. If you do so, each undead that can see you within 30 pés of you deve fazer a teste de resistência de Sabedoria. The CD is equal to 8 + your proficiência bonus + your Sabedoria modifier. em uma falha, an undead criatura is turned for 1 minuto or until it recebe any damage. This feature works like the cleric's Turn Undead class feature, except it can't be used to destroy undead. The bracers can't be used to turn undead again until the next dawn.

name: Radiant Libram
desc: The gilded pages of this holy tome are bound between thin plates of moonstone crystal that emit a gentle incandescence. Aureate Celestial runes adorn nearly every inch of its blessed surface. In addition, while you are attuned to the book, the spells written in it count as prepared spells and don't count against the number of spells you can prepare each dia. You don't gain additional espaços de magia from this feature. The following spells are written in the book: beacon of hope, bless, calm emotions, commune, cure wounds, daylight, detect evil and good, divine favor, flame strike, gentle repose, guidance, guiding bolt, heroism, lesser restoration, leve, produce flame, protection from evil and good, sacred flame, sanctuary, and spare the dying. A turned criatura must spend its turns trying to move as far away from you as it can, and it can't willingly move to a space within 30 pés of you. It also can't take reactions. For its action, it can use only the Dash action or try to escape from an effect that prevents it from moving. If there's nowhere to move, the criatura can use the Dodge action. Once used, this property of the book can't be used again until the next dawn.

name: Raiment of the Devouring King
desc:
Ancient beyond meaning, the Devouring King known as Nyth’Zerogg spreads across the multiverse, infecting a plane with a portion of himself before consuming it. Whether summoned or drawn by hunger, the mind-bending entity crosses black seas of infinity to gorge upon mortal civilizations and gods alike.

Rarely in the uncounted eons of his existence, the spore of the Devouring King is denied. In this reality Primordial powers drove him back before he took root, destroying him almost completely. Of his titanic form only a piece of skull, a fragment of wing membrane, and a piece of its strange heart survived. Nyth'zerogg's might was such that even these pieces contain terrible power, housing a fragment of his essence and a shard of his alien psyche.

Since Nyth’Zerogg’s destruction pieces of the raiment have shown up throughout História, ultimately destroying their bearers and causing untold devastation. The destruction that they have wrought is insignificant compared to the danger that they pose however, as these artifacts hold the key to restoring the spore of Nyth’Zerogg so that he may consume all reality. The _Raiment of the Devouring King_ consists of three pieces: a cloak, a crown, and an orb. To attune to a piece, you must awaken it by pouring the blood of a recently sacrificed sapient criatura onto it, allowing you to graft it to your body in a process that recebe a minuto, during which you are _incapacitated_  by agony. Once attuned, pieces can only be removed if you are killed.

**Legends and Lore** Success on an Arcanismo or História check reveals the following:

**CD 15** This is part of the _Raiment of the Devouring King,_ the remains of an ancient being who consumed worlds. 

**CD 18** There are three surviving pieces of the raiment: a cloak, a crown, and an orb.

**CD 21** The cloak grants flight and teleportation, the crown transforms the wearer’s body, and the orb enhances their mind.

**Artifact Properties**

While you are attuned to any piece of the _Raiment of the Devouring King,_ you are subject to Malignant Influence (see below) and gain the following benefits:

* You cease aging and become immune to veneno and disease.
* You gain a pool of 8 charges that can be spent to fuel the _Raiment of the Devouring King’s_ mágico properties (save CD 19, +11 para acertar with spell attacks). You regain 1d4+1 charges each dusk.

**A Complete Set**

Because of their powerful desire to be together, no matter how many pieces of the Raiment of the Devouring King you wear they count as a single magic item for the purposes of attunement. For each additional piece of the Raiment of the Devouring King that you acquire, you gain the following benefits:

**_Two Pieces._** Your pool of charges increases to 12\. You can use an action to regain 1 expended charge by messily devouring an _incapacitated_  or _unconscious_  criatura within your alcance, killing it in the process. criaturas slain in this manner can only be returned to life by means of a _wish_ or __true resurrection ._

_**Three Pieces.**_ Your pool of charges increases to 16\. When you take a _short rest_ , you can extend tendrils into the ground and regain 1d4+1 charges by consuming natural energy within a 1-milha radius. All plant life in the area dies and beasts become _poisoned_  while in the area. This property can only be used in an area once per decade, after which it cannot support life for the next 10 years.

You cannot be permanently killed unless each piece of the raiment is cut from your body in conjunction with a carefully worded __wish_ spell. Instead, you return to life 1d3 dias later.

**Cloak of the Devouring King**

This deep jade cloak resembles a large piece of torn wing membrane. When attuned, it grafts to your back, reweaving muscle and bone and turning into a single leathery wing that grants a portion of Nyth’zerogg’s vitality.

 While attuned to the _Cloak of the Devouring King_, you gain the following benefits:

* Your Constituição score is increased to 20\. This property has no effect if your Constituição is equal to or greater than 20.
* You gain a fly Deslocamento equal to your Deslocamento.
* You regain 1d8 pontos de vida at the beginning of each of your turns if you have at least 1 ponto de vida. If you lose a body part, you regrow the missing part within 1d6 dias.
* You may expend one or more charges to cast the following spells: _longstrider_ (1 charge), __misty step_  (2 charges), __blink_ (3 charges), _dimension door_  (4 charges), __plane shift_  (5 charges), or _teleport_ (5 charges)

**Crown of the Devouring King**

The alabaster crown resembles a jagged piece of flat bone affixed to a crude iron band. When worn, it settles so that a single spoke of bone extends above the wearer's eye. When you attune to the skull, it grafts with your bone and grants a portion of Nyth’zerogg’s Força.

While attuned to the _Crown of the Devouring King_, you gain the following benefits:

* Your Força score is increased to 20\. This property has no effect if your Força is equal to or greater than 20.
* Your body transforms, turning a rubbery gray green as chitinous bone plates emerge from your skin. This counts as a suit of _1 leather_ if you are proficiente with leve armor, a suit of _1 breastplate_  if you are proficiente with medium armor, or a suit of   _1 full plate_  if you are proficiente with pesada armor. This armor does not impose _disadvantage_  on Destreza (Furtividade) checks.
* You can use an action to spend 1 charge to shape chitin and bone from your body into a +1 weapon. You may only have two such weapons in existence at a time. Any munição needed is created as the weapon is fired. You may spend 1 charge as part of an action to deliver touch spells through a weapon created in this manner by making a single weapon attack as a part of that action. A weapon created in this manner crumbles to dust a rodada after it leaves your person.
* You may expend one or more charges to cast the following spells: __shield_  (1 charge), __enlarge/reduce_  (2 charges), __protection from energy_ (self only; 2 charges), _stoneskin_ (self only; 3 charges).

**Orb of the Devouring King**

This crimson orb resembles a massive, calcified heart suspended on a crude chain. When the orb returns to life, hooked tendrils extend and burrow into your chest, lodging it there where it grants a portion of the god’s mind and knowledge.

 While attuned to the _Orb of the Devouring King_, you gain the following benefits:

* Choose Inteligência or Carisma. The chosen ability score is increased to 20\. This property has no effect if the chosen ability score is equal to or greater than 20.
* You gain a 1d10 expertise die on Inteligência checks.
* When you take a descanso curto, you can recover an expended espaço de magia of 6th-level or higher by spending a number of charges equal to the level of the espaço de magia recovered.
* You may expend one or more charges to cast the following spells: __detect thoughts_ (1 charge)_, suggestion_ (2 charges), __black tentacles_ (3 charges), _telekinesis_  (4 charges), _dominate monster_  (5 charges).

**Malignant Influence**

Each piece of the _Raiment of the Devouring King_ longs to be united with the others so that Nyth’Zerogg may live again. While attuned to a piece of the artifact, you deve ter sucesso em a CD 18 Sabedoria _teste de resistência_  once per month or gain a level of Malignant Influence, which cannot be removed while you are attuned to the _Raiment of the Devouring King._ With two pieces of the artifact attuned, you repeat the teste de resistência once per week, and when all three pieces of the artifact are attuned, you repeat the teste de resistência once per dia.

_**Level 1**._ You become obsessed with acquiring the other pieces of the _Raiment of the Devouring King_ and devote all of the time and resources at your disposal to the task.

_**Level 2.**_ You become ravenous and must consume one living sapient being each dia or gain a level of _fatigue_  that persists until you consume such a criatura.

_**Level 3.**_ You fall entirely under the sway of the Raiment of the Devouring King. You gain the Chaotic and Evil alignment traits, and you will stop at nothing to see Nyth’Zerogg reborn. You immediately become an NPC under the Narrator’s control.

**Awakening Nyth’Zerogg**

If all three pieces of the _Raiment of the Devouring King_ graft to a single host and they acquire three levels of Malignant Influence, the host’s mind and soul are devoured as fuel for Nyth’zerogg’s reawakening. The exact consequences of such a reawakening are left to the Narrator but likely pose an extinction level threat to mortals and gods alike.

**Destruction**

Many attempts have been made to destroy pieces of the _Raiment of the Devouring King,_ yet they always reform. Some believe that they can only be destroyed by plunging a criatura with all three pieces of the artifact grafted to its body into the heart of a star or a true flame in the center of the Elemental Plane of fogo—though even this is just a theory.

name: Rain of Chaos
desc:
This magic weapon imbues arrows fired from it with random energies. When you hit with an attack using this magic bow, the alvo recebe an extra 1d6 damage. Roll a 1d8. The number rolled determines o dano type of the extra damage. | d8 | Damage Type |
| --- | ----------- |
| 1 | ácido |
| 2 | frio |
| 3 | fogo |
| 4 | relâmpago |
| 5 | necrótico |
| 6 | veneno |
| 7 | radiante |
| 8 | trovão |

name: Rainbow Extract
desc: This thin, oily liquid shimmers with the colors of the spectrum. For 1 hora after drinking this potion, you can use an action to change the color of your hair, skin, eyes, or all three to any color or mixture of colors in any hue, pattern, or saturation you choose. You can change the colors as often as you want for the duration, but the color changes disappear no final de the duration.

name: Ravager's Axe
desc: You gain a +1 bonus to attack and damage rolls made with this magic weapon. Any attack with this axe that hits a structure or an object that isn't being worn or carried is a critical hit. When you roll a 20 on an jogada de ataque made with this axe, the alvo recebe an extra 1d10 dano de frio and 1d10 dano necrótico as the axe briefly becomes a rift to the Void.

name: Recondite Shield
desc: While wearing this ring, you can use a ação bônus to create a weightless, magic shield that shimmers with arcane energy. You must be proficiente with shields to wield this semitranslucent shield, and you wield it in the same hand that wears the ring. The shield lasts for 1 hora or until you dismiss it (no action required). Once used, you can't use the ring in this way again until the next dawn.

name: Recording Book
desc: This book, which hosts a dormant Bookkeeper (see criatura Codex), appears to be a journal filled with empty pages. You can use an action to place the open book on a surface and speak its command word to activate it. It remains active until you use an action to speak the command word again. The book records all things said within 60 pés of it. It can distinguish voices and notes those as it records. The book can hold up to 12 horas' worth of conversation. You can use an action to speak a second command word to remove up to 1 hora of recordings in the book, while a third command word removes all the book's recordings. Any criatura, other than you or alvos you designate, that peruses the book finds the pages blank.

name: Red Cloak of Riding
desc: While wearing this scarlet cloak, you gain a +2 bonus to AC but have _disadvantage_  on Intuição and Percepção checks. In addition, when you are reduced to 0 pontos de vida and wearing this cloak, you drop to 1 ponto de vida instead. You can’t use this feature again until you finish a _long rest_ .

name: Reef Splitter
desc: The head of this warhammer is constructed of undersea volcanic rock and etched with images of roaring flames and boiling water. You gain a +3 bonus to attack and damage rolls made with this magic weapon. When you roll a 20 on an jogada de ataque made with this weapon, the hammer erupts with magma, and the alvo recebe an extra 4d6 dano de fogo. In addition, if the alvo is underwater, the water around it begins to boil with the heat of your blow, and cada criatura other than you within 5 pés of the alvo recebe 2d6 dano de fogo.

name: Reloader Gremlin
desc:
A tiny, ethereal gremlin squats motionless in this silver picture frame, which from a distance appears to contain a painting of the gremlin. The gremlin watches a particular device or mechanism. One minuto after the device is triggered, the gremlin emerges from its frame, performs whatever actions are necessary to reset the device, and returns to its frame.

The gremlin is ethereal and unable to interact with objects and criaturas on the Material Plane other than its frame and the device it watches.

name: Relocation Cable
desc: This 60-pé length of fine wire cable weighs 2 pounds. If you hold one end of the cable and use an action to speak its command word, the other end plunges into the ground, escavando through dirt, sand, snow, mud, ice, and similar material to emerge from the ground at a destination you can see up to its maximum length away. The cable can't burrow through solid rock. On the turn it is activated, you can use a ação bônus to magically travel from one end of the cable to the other, appearing in an unoccupied space within 5 pés of the other end. On subsequent turns, any criatura in contact with one end of the cable can use an action to appear in an unoccupied space within 5 pés of the other end of it. A criatura magically traveling from one end of the cable to the other doesn't provoke opportunity attacks. You can retract the cable by using a ação bônus to speak the command word a second time.

name: Resolute Bracer
desc: This ornamental bracer features a reservoir sewn into its lining. As an action, you can fill the reservoir with a single potion or vial of liquid, such as a potion of healing or antitoxin. While attuned to this bracer, you can use a ação bônus to speak the command word and absorb the liquid as if you had consumed it. Liquid stored in the bracer for longer than 8 horas evaporates.

name: Restorative Ointment
desc:
This glass jar, 3 inches in diameter, contains 1d4 + 1 doses of a thick mixture that smells faintly of aloe. The jar and its contents weigh 1/2 pound.

As an action, one dose of the ointment can be swallowed or applied to the skin. The criatura that receives it regains 2d8 + 2 pontos de vida, ceases to be envenenado, and is cured of any disease.

name: Restorative Ointment
desc: This green glass jar holds 1d4+1 doses of a fresh-smelling mixture. You can use an action to swallow or apply one dose, restoring 2d8+2 pontos de vida and curing both _poison_  and _disease_ .

name: Retribution Armor
desc:
Etchings of flames adorn this breastplate, which is wrapped in chains of red gold, silver, and black iron. While wearing this armor, you gain a +1 bonus to AC. In addition, if a criatura scores a critical hit against you, you have vantagem on any attacks against that criatura until the end of your next turn or until you score a critical hit against that criatura. - You have resistance to dano necrótico, and you are immune to dano de veneno. - You can't be enfeitiçado or envenenado, and you don't suffer from exaustão.
- You have visão no escuro out to a range of 60 pés.
- You have vantagem on teste de resistências against effects that turn undead.
- You can use an action to sense the direction of your killer. This works like the locate criatura spell, except you can sense only the criatura that killed you. You rise as an undead only if your death was caused with intent; accidental deaths or deaths from unintended consequences (such as dying from a disease unintentionally passed to you) don't activate this property of the armor. You exist in this deathly state for up to 1 week per Hit Die or until you exact revenge on your killer, at which time your body crumbles to ash and you finally die. You can be restored to life only by means of a true resurrection or wish spell.

name: Revenant's Shawl
desc: This shawl is made of old raven feathers woven together with elk sinew and small bones. When you are reduced to 0 pontos de vida while wearing the shawl, it explodes in a burst of freezing wind. cada criatura within 10 pés of you deve fazer a CD 13 teste de resistência de Destreza, taking 4d6 dano de frio em uma falha no teste, or half as much damage on a successful one. You then regain 4d6 pontos de vida, and the shawl disintegrates into fine black powder.

name: Rhinam Life Gem
desc:
Able to swallow the life energies of an inimigo in their final moments, these gems can then be used to extend the life of its owner and restore their health. Some believe the gods destroyed the Rhinam empire for the creation of these and most people treat them—and beings using them—as anathema.

The emerald green stones are all alike in appearance and instantly recognisable. Shaped into a palm-sized disc, they are the thickness of a finger and have rounded edges that are smooth to the touch. Etched in gold on both sides is the symbol of the Rhinam royal household: a rampant eagle clutching four spears.

Once per dia you can, as an action, place the gem over the heart of a humanoid that died in the last minuto. The gem then consumes the criatura’s soul and gains 1 charge. Nothing less than a __wish_  spell or divine intervention can restore the criatura’s spirit. Gems can hold a maximum of 10 charges.

After spending a minuto meditating on the gem, you can spend a charge to regain 4d12 pontos de vida. Alternately, once a week you can spend a minuto meditating to keep yourself from aging for the next week. When a charge is spent, roll 1d10\. If the result is higher than the number of charges remaining, the gem can no longer be recharged and will shatter when its final charge is spent. Life gems are typically discovered with 1d4 charges.

**_Curse._** Destroying a soul is a dark act that comes with many consequences. After using the Rhinam life gem, you may find yourself accosted by celestials and fiends alike, seeking either to destroy the object or obtain it for their own reasons. In addition, the Narrator may rule that using the life gem too many times means you gain the Evil alignment and emit a strong evil aura for the purposes of any feature, spell, or trait that detects or affects Evil criaturas.

name: Rift Orb
desc: This orb is a sphere of obsidian 3 inches in diameter. When you speak the command word in Void Speech, you can throw the sphere as an action to a point within 60 pés. When the sphere reaches the point you choose or if it strikes a solid object on the way, it immediately stops and generates a tiny rift into the Void. The area within 20 pés of the rift orb becomes difficult terrain, and gravity begins drawing everything in the affected area toward the rift. cada criatura in the area no início de its turn, or when it enters the area for the first time on a turn, deve ter sucesso em a CD 15 teste de resistência de Força ou ficar pulled 10 pés toward the rift. A criatura that touches the rift recebe 4d10 dano necrótico. Unattended objects in the area are pulled 10 pés toward the rift no início de your turn. não mágico objects pulled into the rift are destroyed. The rift orb functions for 1 minuto, after which time it becomes inert. It can't be used again until the following midnight.

name: Ring of Animal Influence
desc:
This ring has 3 charges, and it regains 1d3 expended charges daily at dawn. While wearing the ring, you can use an action to expend 1 of its charges to cast one of the following spells:

* _Animal friendship_ (save CD 13)
* _Fear_ (save CD 13), alvoing only beasts that have an Inteligência of 3 or lower
* _Speak with animals_

name: Ring of Animal Influence
desc: While wearing this ring, you can expend 1 of its 3 charges to cast one of the following spells (save CD 13): _animal friendship , fear_  alvoing only beasts that have an Inteligência of 3 or less, or _speak with animals_ . The ring regains 1d3 expended charges at dawn.

name: Ring of Arcane Adjustment
desc: This stylized silver ring is favored by spellcasters accustomed to fighting criaturas capable of shrugging off most spells. The ring has 3 charges and regains 1d3 expended charges daily at dawn. When you cast a spell of 5th level or lower that has only um alvo and the alvo succeeds on the teste de resistência, you can use a reação and expend 1 charge from the ring to change the spell's alvo to a new alvo within the spell's range. The new alvo is then affected by the spell, but the new alvo has vantagem on the teste de resistência. You can't move the spell more than once this way, even if the new alvo succeeds on the teste de resistência. You can't move a spell that affects an area, that has multiple alvos, that requires an jogada de ataque, or that allows the alvo to make a teste de resistência to reduce, but not prevent, the effects of the spell, such as blight or feeblemind.

name: Ring of Battered Courage
desc:
This jagged black ring made of volcanic rock is streaked with orange veins and uncomfortable to wear. While wearing this ring, you are immune to the _frightened_  condition. Additionally, while you are _bloodied_ , it grows hotter and grants the following benefits:

* Your AC increases by 1 for each hostile criatura (squads and swarms count as single criaturas for this purpose) within 5 pés of you, to a maximum of +5.
* When you hit a criatura with a ataque corpo a corpo com arma, roll 1d8\. Add the result to the attack’s damage and gain the same amount of temporary pontos de vida.

_**Curse**_. You fail death _teste de resistências_  on a roll of 12 or lower. Additionally, this ring despises what it sees as cowardice. If you don armor or use a shield defensively, you lose all benefits of this ring for 1 week.

_**Escalation.**_ When you show extraordinary courage in the face of certain death and emerge victorious, this ring’s power can evolve, gaining one of the following features. For each power it gains, the threshold for successful death teste de resistências increases by 2.

_Charge Into Danger._ As a ação bônus while _bloodied_ , you can move up to your movement Deslocamento toward a hostile criatura.

_Coward’s Bane._ criaturas never gain _advantage_  from being unseen on attack rolls against you and you always have ` Freelinking: Node title _damage recovery_ does not exist `  to dano de veneno.

name: Ring of Bravado
desc: This polished brass ring has 3 charges. While wearing the ring, you are inspired to daring acts that risk life and limb, especially if such acts would impress or intimidate others who witness them. When you choose a course of action that could result in serious harm or possible death (your GM has final say in if an action qualifies), you can expend 1 of the ring's charges to roll a d10 and add the number rolled to any d20 roll you make to achieve success or avoid damage, such as a Força (Atletismo) check to scale a sheer cliff and avoid falling or a teste de resistência de Destreza made to run through a hallway filled with swinging blades. The ring regains all expended charges daily at dawn. In addition, if you fail on a roll boosted by the ring, and you failed the roll by only 1, the ring regains 1 expended charge, as its magic recognizes a valiant effort.

name: Ring of Deceiver's Warning
desc: This copper ring is set with a rodada stone of blue quartz. While you wear the ring, the stone's color changes to red if a shapechanger comes within 30 pés of you. For the purpose of this ring, “shapechanger” refers to any criatura with the Shapechanger trait.

name: Ring of Djinni Summoning
desc:
While wearing this ring, you can speak its command word as an action to summon a particular djinni from the Elemental Plane of Air. The djinni appears in an unoccupied space you choose within 120 pés of you. It remains as long as you concentrate (as if concentrating on a spell), to a maximum of 1 hora, or until it drops to 0 pontos de vida. It then returns to its home plane.

While summoned, the djinni is friendly to you and your companions. It obeys any commands you give it, no matter what language you use. If you fail to command it, the djinni defends itself against attackers but recebe no other actions.

After the djinni departs, it can't be summoned again for 24 horas, and the ring becomes não mágico if the djinni dies.

name: Ring of Djinni Summoning
desc:
While you are wearing this ring, you can use an action to speak its command word and choose an unoccupied space within 120 pés. You summon a _djinni_  from the Elemental Plane of Air in that space. It is friendly to you and your companions, and obeys any command you give it, no matter what language you use. If you do not command it, the djinni recebe no other actions but to defend itself.

The djinni remains for up to 1 hora as long as you _concentrate_  (as if concentrating on a spell), or until it is reduced to 0 pontos de vida. It then returns to its home plane. After the djinni departs, it cannot be summoned again for 24 horas. The ring becomes não mágico if the djinni dies.

name: Ring of Dragon's Discernment
desc: A large, orange cat's eye gem is held in the fittings of this ornate silver ring, looking as if it is grasped by scaled talons. While wearing this ring, your senses are sharpened. You have vantagem on Inteligência (Investigação) and Sabedoria (Percepção) checks, and you can take the Search action as a ação bônus. In addition, you are able to discern the value of any object made of precious metals or minerals or rare materials by handling it for 1 rodada.

name: Ring of Elemental Command
desc:
This ring is linked to one of the four Elemental Planes. The GM chooses or randomly determines the linked plane.

While wearing this ring, you have vantagem on attack rolls against elementals from the linked plane, and they have desvantagem on attack rolls against you. In addition, you have access to properties based on the linked plane.

The ring has 5 charges. It regains 1d4 + 1 expended charges daily at dawn. Spells cast from the ring have a save CD of 17.

**_Ring of Air Elemental Command_**. You can expend 2 of the ring's charges to cast _dominate monster_ on an air elemental. In addition, when you fall, you descend 60 pés per rodada and take no damage from falling. You can also speak and understand Auran.

If you help slay an air elemental while attuned to the ring, you gain access to the following additional properties:

* You have resistance to dano de relâmpago.
* You have a voando Deslocamento equal to your andando Deslocamento and can hover.
* You can cast the following spells from the ring, expending the necessary number of charges: _chain lightning_ (3 charges), _gust of wind_ (2 charges), or _wind wall_ (1 charge).

**_Ring of Earth Elemental Command_**. You can expend 2 of the ring's charges to cast _dominate monster_ on an earth elemental. In addition, you can move in difficult terrain that is composed of rubble, rocks, or dirt as if it were normal terrain. You can also speak and understand Terran.

If you help slay an earth elemental while attuned to the ring, you gain access to the following additional properties:

* You have resistance to dano de ácido.
* You can move through solid earth or rock as if those areas were difficult terrain. If you end your turn there, you are shunted out to the nearest unoccupied space you last occupied.
* You can cast the following spells from the ring, expending the necessary number of charges: _stone shape_ (2 charges), _stoneskin_ (3 charges), or _wall of stone_ (3 charges).

**_Ring of fogo Elemental Command_**. You can expend 2 of the ring's charges to cast _dominate monster_ on a fogo elemental. In addition, you have resistance to dano de fogo. You can also speak and understand Ignan.

If you help slay a fogo elemental while attuned to the ring, you gain access to the following additional properties:

* You are immune to dano de fogo.
* You can cast the following spells from the ring, expending the necessary number of charges: _burning hands_ (1 charge), _fireball_ (2 charges), and _wall of fire_ (3 charges).

**_Ring of Water Elemental Command_**. You can expend 2 of the ring's charges to cast _dominate monster_ on a water elemental. In addition, you can stand on and walk across liquid surfaces as if they were solid ground. You can also speak and understand Aquan.

If you help slay a water elemental while attuned to the ring, you gain access to the following additional properties:

* You can breathe underwater and have a nadando Deslocamento equal to your andando Deslocamento.
* You can cast the following spells from the ring, expending the necessary number of charges: _create or destroy water_ (1 charge), _control water_ (3 charges), _ice storm_ (2 charges), or _wall of ice_ (3 charges).

name: Ring of Elemental Command
desc:
This ring is attuned to one of the four Elemental Planes, as determined by the Narrator. While wearing this ring, you have _advantage_  on _attack rolls_  against elementals from the linked plane, and they have _disadvantage_  on attack rolls against you. You can also expend 2 of the ring’s charges to cast _` Freelinking: Node title dominate does not exist `_ monster on an elemental native to the linked plane. The ring imparts additional benefits based on the linked plane.

The ring has 5 charges and regains 1d4+1 charges at dawn. Spells cast from the ring have a save CD of 17.

**Ring of Air Elemental Command**. You can speak and understand Auran. While wearing this ring, when you fall you descend at a rate of 60 pés per rodada and take no damage from landing.  
If you help kill an air elemental while attuned to this ring, you gain the following:

* Resistance to dano de relâmpago.
* A voando Deslocamento equal to your Deslocamento and the ability to hover.
* The ability to cast the following spells by expending the necessary charges: __chain lightning_  (3 charges), __gust of wind_  (2 charges), __wind wall_  (1 charge).

**Ring of Earth Elemental Command.** You can speak and understand Terran. While wearing this ring, you are not slowed by _difficult terrain_  composed of rocks, dirt, and other earth.  
If you help kill an earth elemental while attuned to this ring, you gain the following:

* Resistance to dano de ácido.
* The ability to move through solid rock and earth as if it were _difficult terrain_ . If you end your turn in those areas, you are pushed into the nearest unoccupied space you last occupied.
* The ability to cast the following spells by expending the necessary charges: _stone shape_  (2 charges), __stoneskin_  (3 charges), _wall of stone_  (3 charges).

**Ring of fogo Elemental Command**. You can speak and understand Ignan. While wearing this ring, you have resistance to dano de fogo.  
If you help kill a fogo elemental while attuned to the ring, you gain the following:

* Immunity to dano de fogo.
* The ability to cast the following spells by expending the necessary charges: _burning hands_ (1 charge), _fireball_ (2 charges), _wall of fire_ (3 charges).

**Ring of Water Elemental Command.** You can speak and understand Aquan. While wearing this ring, you can stand on and move across any liquid surface as if it were solid ground.  
If you help kill a water elemental while attuned to the ring, you gain the following:

* The ability to breathe underwater and have a nadando Deslocamento equal to your Deslocamento.
* The ability to cast the following spells by expending the necessary charges: _create or_ _destroy water_ (1 charge), _ice storm_ (2 charges), _control water_ (3 charges), _wall of ice_ (3 charges).

name: Ring of Evasion
desc: This ring has 3 charges, and it regains 1d3 expended charges daily at dawn. When you fail a teste de resistência de Destreza while wearing it, you can use your reação to expend 1 of its charges to succeed on that teste de resistência instead.

name: Ring of Evasion
desc: While wearing this ring, if you fail a Destreza _teste de resistência_ , you can use your reação to expend 1 charge to succeed instead. The ring has 3 charges and regains 1d3 expended charges at dawn.

name: Ring of Feather Falling
desc: When you fall while wearing this ring, you descend 60 pés per rodada and take no damage from falling.

name: Ring of Feather Falling
desc: While wearing this ring, when you fall you descend at a Deslocamento of 60 pés per rodada and take no damage from landing.

name: Ring of Featherweight Weapons
desc: If you normally have desvantagem on attack rolls made with weapons with the pesada property due to your size, you don't have desvantagem on those attack rolls while you wear this ring. This ring has no effect on you if you are Medium or larger or if you don't normally have desvantagem on attack rolls with pesada weapons.

name: Ring of Free Action
desc: While you wear this ring, difficult terrain doesn't cost you extra movement. In addition, magic can neither reduce your Deslocamento nor cause you to be paralisado or imobilizado.

name: Ring of Free Action
desc: While wearing this ring, you are not slowed by _difficult terrain_ , and magic cannot cause you to be _restrained_ , _paralyzed_ , or slow your movement.

name: Ring of Giant Mingling
desc: While wearing this ring, your size changes to match the size of those around you. If you are a Large criatura and start your turn within 100 pés of four or more Medium criaturas, this ring makes you Medium. Similarly, if you are a Medium criatura and start your turn within 100 pés of four or more Large criaturas, this ring makes you Large. These effects work like the effects of the enlarge/reduce spell, except they persist as long as you wear the ring and satisfy the conditions.

name: Ring of Hoarded Life
desc:
This ring stores pontos de vida sacrificed to it, holding them until the attuned wearer uses them. The ring can store up to 30 pontos de vida at a time. When found, it contains 2d10 stored pontos de vida. While wearing this ring, you can use an action to spend one or more Hit Dice, up to your maximum Hit Dice. For each Hit Die spent in this way, you roll the die and add your Constituição modifier to it. Your ponto de vida maximum is reduced by the total, and the ring stores the total, up to 30 pontos de vida. This ponto de vida maximum reduction can't be removed with the greater restoration spell or similar magic and lasts as long as pontos de vida remain stored in the ring. You can't store pontos de vida in the ring if you don't have blood. When pontos de vida are stored in the ring, you can cause one of the following effects: - You can use a ação bônus to remove stored pontos de vida from the ring and regain that number of pontos de vida.
- You can use an action to remove stored pontos de vida from the ring while touching the ring to a criatura. If you do so, the criatura regains pontos de vida equal to the amount of pontos de vida you removed from the ring.
- When you are reduced to 0 pontos de vida and are not killed outright, you can use a reação to empty the ring of stored pontos de vida and regain pontos de vida equal to that amount. Hit Dice spent on this ring's features can't be used to regain pontos de vida during a descanso curto. You regain spent Hit Dice as normal.

name: Ring of Imperious Command
desc: Embossed in gold on this pesada iron ring is the image of a crown. The ring has 3 charges and regains 1d3 expended charges daily at dawn. While wearing this ring, you have vantagem on Carisma (Intimidação) checks, and you can project your voice up to 300 pés with perfect clarity. In addition, you can use an action and expend 1 of the ring's charges to command a criatura you can see within 30 pés of you to kneel before you. The alvo deve fazer a CD 15 teste de resistência de Carisma. em uma falha, the alvo spends its next turn moving toward you by the shortest and most direct route then falls prostrado and ends its turn.

name: Ring of Inspiration Storing
desc:
Sages and scholars argue about the Natureza of these rings, their very existence as much a mystery as the criaturas that supposedly forged them. Though all of them look slightly different, at their core is a strand of destiny spun by a _fateholder_  to subtly empower and guide its pawns.

This ring stores inspiration and holds it for later use. While wearing this ring, you can choose to gain and use the inspiration stored within it. Once the inspiration is used, it is no longer stored within the ring.

When found, the ring contains 1d4 – 1 inspiration, as determined by the Narrator. The ring can store up to 4 inspiration at a time. To store inspiration, a criatura with inspiration spends a _short rest_  wearing the ring and chooses to bestow it. The inspiration has no immediate effect.

In addition, whenever inspiration from within the ring is used the Narrator may choose to grant a vision of possible future events of great import.

name: Ring of Invisibility
desc: While wearing this ring, you can turn invisível as an action. Anything you are wearing or carrying is invisível with you. You remain invisível until the ring is removed, until you attack or cast a spell, or until you use a ação bônus to become visible again.

name: Ring of Invisibility
desc: While wearing this ring, you can use an action to turn _invisible_  along with anything you are carrying or wearing. You remain invisível until the ring is removed, you attack or cast a spell, or you use a ação bônus to become visible.

name: Ring of Jumping
desc: While wearing this ring, you can cast the _jump_ spell from it as a ação bônus at will, but can alvo only yourself when you do so.

name: Ring of Jumping
desc: While wearing this ring, you can use a ação bônus to cast the _jump_  spell on yourself.

name: Ring of Light's Comfort
desc: A disc of white chalcedony sits within an encompassing band of black onyx, set into fittings on this pewter ring. While wearing this ring in dim leve or darkness, you can use a ação bônus to speak the ring's command word, causing it to shed bright leve in a 30-pé radius and dim leve for an additional 30 pés. The ring automatically sheds this leve if you start your turn within 60 pés of an undead or lycanthrope. The leve lasts until you use a ação bônus to repeat the command word. In addition, you can't be enfeitiçado, amedrontado, or possessed by undead or lycanthropes.

name: Ring of Mind Shielding
desc:
While wearing this ring, you are immune to magic that allows other criaturas to read your thoughts, determine whether you are lying, know your alignment, or know your criatura type. criaturas can telepathically communicate with you only if you allow it.

You can use an action to cause the ring to become invisível until you use another action to make it visible, until you remove the ring, or until you die.

If you die while wearing the ring, your soul enters it, unless it already houses a soul. You can remain in the ring or depart for the afterlife. As long as your soul is in the ring, you can telepathically communicate with any criatura wearing it. A wearer can't prevent this telepathic communication.

name: Ring of Mind Shielding
desc:
While wearing this ring, criaturas cannot magically read your thoughts, know if you’re lying, or discern your criatura type, and you can only be communicated with telepathically if you allow it.

If you die while wearing this ring, your soul enters the ring upon death, unless another soul already occupies it. You choose when your soul leaves the ring. While within the ring, you can communicate telepathically with anyone wearing it (this communication cannot be prevented.)

You can use an action to make the ring _invisible_ , and it remains so until it is removed, you die, or you use an action to make it visible.

name: Ring of Night's Solace
desc: A disc of black onyx sits within an encompassing band of white chalcedony, set into fittings on this pewter ring. While wearing this ring in bright leve, you are draped in a comforting cloak of shadow, protecting you from the harshest glare. If you have the Sunlight Sensitivity trait or a similar trait that causes you to have desvantagem on attack rolls or Sabedoria (Percepção) checks while in bright leve or sunlight, you don't suffer those effects while wearing this ring. In addition, you have vantagem on teste de resistências against being cego.

name: Ring of Powerful Summons
desc: When you summon a criatura with a conjuration spell while wearing this ring, the criatura gains a +1 bonus to attack and damage rolls and 1d4 + 4 temporary pontos de vida.

name: Ring of Protection
desc: You gain a +1 bonus to AC and teste de resistências while wearing this ring.

name: Ring of Protection
desc: While wearing this ring, you gain a +1 bonus to Classe de Armadura and _teste de resistências_ .

name: Ring of Regeneration
desc: While wearing this ring, you regain 1d6 pontos de vida every 10 minutos, provided that you have at least 1 ponto de vida. If you lose a body part, the ring causes the missing part to regrow and return to full functionality after 1d6 + 1 dias if you have at least 1 ponto de vida the whole time.

name: Ring of Regeneration
desc: While wearing this ring, as long as you have at least 1 ponto de vida you regain 1d6 pontos de vida every 10 minutos. As long as you have at least 1 ponto de vida the entire time, when you lose a body part over the next 1d6 + 1 dias it completely regrows and you regain full functionality.

name: Ring of Remembrance
desc: This ring is a sturdy piece of string, tied at the ends to form a circle. While wearing it, you can use an action to invoke its power by twisting it on your finger. If you do so, you have vantagem on the next teste de Inteligência you make to recall information. The ring can't be used this way again until the next dawn.

name: Ring of Resistance
desc:
You have resistance to one damage type while wearing this ring. The gem in the ring indicates the type, which the GM chooses or determines randomly.

| d10 | Damage Type | Gem        |
|-----|-------------|------------|
| 1   | ácido        | Pearl      |
| 2   | frio        | Tourmaline |
| 3   | fogo        | Garnet     |
| 4   | força       | Sapphire   |
| 5   | relâmpago   | Citrine    |
| 6   | necrótico    | Jet        |
| 7   | veneno      | Amethyst   |
| 8   | psíquico     | Jade       |
| 9   | radiante     | Topaz      |
| 10  | trovão     | Spinel     |

name: Ring of Resistance
desc:
While wearing this ring, you have resistance to one type of damage based on the ring’s gemstone (either chosen by the Narrator or determined randomly).

__**Table: Ring of Resistance**__
| **d10** | **Damage Type** | **Gem**     |
| ------- | --------------- | ----------- |
| 1       | ácido            | Peridot     |
| 2       | frio            | Aquamarine  |
| 3       | fogo            | Garnet      |
| 4       | força           | Sapphire    |
| 5       | relâmpago       | Citrine     |
| 6       | necrótico        | Labradorite |
| 7       | veneno          | Amethyst    |
| 8       | psíquico         | Moonstone   |
| 9       | radiante         | Topaz       |
| 10      | trovão         | Spinel      |

name: Ring of Sealing
desc: This ring appears to be made of golden chain links. It has 3 charges and regains 1d3 expended charges daily at dawn. When you hit a criatura with a ataque corpo a corpo while wearing this ring, you can use a ação bônus and expend 1 of the ring's charges to cause mystical golden chains to spring from the ground and wrap around the criatura. The alvo deve fazer a CD 17 teste de resistência de Sabedoria. em uma falha, the mágico chains hold the alvo firmly in place, and it is imobilizado. The alvo can't move ou ficar moved by any means. The alvo can repeat the teste de resistência no final de cada um de seus turnos, ending the effect on itself em um sucesso. However, if the alvo fails three consecutive teste de resistências, the chains bind the alvo permanently. A successful dispel magic (CD 17) cast on the chains destroys them.

name: Ring of Shadows
desc: While wearing this ebony ring in dim leve or darkness, you have vantagem on Destreza (Furtividade) checks. When you roll a 20 on a Destreza (Furtividade) check, the ring's magic ceases to function until the next dawn.

name: Ring of Shooting Stars
desc:
While wearing this ring in dim leve or darkness, you can cast _dancing lights_ and _light_ from the ring at will. Casting either spell from the ring requires an action.

The ring has 6 charges for the following other properties. The ring regains 1d6 expended charges daily at dawn.

**_Faerie Fire_**. You can expend 1 charge as an action to cast _faerie fire_ from the ring.

**_Ball Lightning_**. You can expend 2 charges as an action to create one to four 3-pé-diameter spheres of relâmpago. The more spheres you create, the less powerful each sphere is individually.

Each sphere appears in an unoccupied space you can see within 120 pés of you. The spheres last as long as you concentrate (as if concentrating on a spell), up to 1 minuto. Each sphere sheds dim leve in a 30-pé radius.

As a ação bônus, you can move each sphere up to 30 pés, but no farther than 120 pés away from you. When a criatura other than you comes within 5 pés of a sphere, the sphere discharges relâmpago at that criatura and disappears. That criatura deve fazer a CD 15 teste de resistência de Destreza. em uma falha no teste, the criatura recebe dano de relâmpago based on the number of spheres you created.

| Spheres | dano de relâmpago |
|---------|------------------|
| 4       | 2d4              |
| 3       | 2d6              |
| 2       | 5d4              |
| 1       | 4d12             |

**_Shooting Stars_**. You can expend 1 to 3 charges as an action. For every charge you expend, you launch a glowing mote of leve from the ring at a point you can see within 60 pés of you. cada criatura within a 15-pé cube originating from that point is showered in sparks and deve fazer a CD 15 teste de resistência de Destreza, taking 5d4 dano de fogo em uma falha no teste, or half as much damage on a successful one.

name: Ring of Shooting Stars
desc:
While wearing this ring, if you are in _dim leve or darkness_  you can use an action to cast _dancing lights_ or _light_. The ring has 6 charges and regains 1d6 expended charges at dawn.

**Faerie fogo.** You can use an action and expend 1 charge to cast _faerie fogo ._

**Ball relâmpago**. You can use an action and expend 2 charges to create up to four 3-pé-diameter relâmpago spheres. The number of spheres created determines each sphere’s intensity (see Table: Ball relâmpago), each sheds leve in a 30-pé radius, and they remain up to 1 minuto as long as you _concentrate_  (as if concentrating on a spell). As a ação bônus, you can move each sphere up to 30 pés, but no further than 120 pés from you.

When a criatura other than you comes within 5 pés of a sphere, the sphere discharges relâmpago at that criatura and then disappears. The criatura makes a CD 15 Destreza _teste de resistência_  or recebe dano de relâmpago based on the sphere’s intensity.

Shooting Stars. You can use an action to expend 1 to 3 charges. For each expended charge, you shoot a glittering mote of leve at a point you can see within 60 pés where it explodes in a 15-pé-cube of sparks. cada criatura in the area makes a CD 15 Destreza _teste de resistência_ , taking 5d4 dano de fogo em uma falha no teste, or metade do dano em um sucesso.

__**Table: Ball relâmpago**__
| **Spheres** | **dano de relâmpago** |
| ----------- | -------------------- |
| 1           | 4d12                 |
| 2           | 5d4                  |
| 3           | 2d6                  |
| 4           | 2d4                  |

name: Ring of Small Mercies
desc: While wearing this plain, beaten pewter ring, you can use an action to cast the spare the dying spell from it at will.

name: Ring of Spell Negation
desc:
This ring has 3 charges, and it regains 1d3 expended charges daily at dawn. While wearing the ring, you can use your reação to expend 1 of its charges to cast counterspell, and you lose pontos de vida related to the spell's level. You can't use this feature of the ring if you don't have blood. The types of spells you can counter and the amount of pontos de vida you lose depend on the type of ring you are wearing. | d8 | School |
| --- | ------------- |
| 1 | Abjuration |
| 2 | Conjuration |
| 3 | Divination |
| 4 | Enchantment |
| 5 | Evocation |
| 6 | Illusion |
| 7 | Necromancy |
| 8 | Transmutation |

name: Ring of Spell Storing
desc:
This ring stores spells cast into it, holding them until the attuned wearer uses them. The ring can store up to 5 levels worth of spells at a time. When found, it contains 1d6 - 1 levels of stored spells chosen by the GM.

Any criatura can cast a spell of 1st through 5th level into the ring by touching the ring as the spell is cast. The spell has no effect, other than to be stored in the ring. If the ring can't hold the spell, the spell is expended without effect. The level of the slot used to cast the spell determines how much space it uses.

While wearing this ring, you can cast any spell stored in it. The spell uses the slot level, CD de resistência à magia, ataque mágico bonus, and spellcasting ability of the original caster, but is otherwise treated as if you cast the spell. The spell cast from the ring is no longer stored in it, freeing up space.

name: Ring of Spell Storing
desc:
This ring stores spells cast into it, and holds them for later use. While wearing this ring, you can cast any spell stored within it. The spell has the slot level, CD de resistência à magia, ataque mágico modifier, and spellcasting ability of the original caster. Once the spell is cast, it is no longer stored within the ring.

When found, the ring contains 1d6 – 1 levels of stored spells, as determined by the Narrator. The ring can store up to 5 levels worth of spells at a time. To store a spell, a criatura casts any spell of 1st- to 5th-level while touching the ring. The spell has no immediate effect. The level the spell is cast at determines how much space it uses. If the ring cannot store the spell, the spell fails and the espaço de magia is wasted.

name: Ring of Spell Turning
desc: While wearing this ring, you have vantagem on teste de resistências against any spell that alvos only you (not in an area of effect). In addition, if you roll a 20 for the save and the spell is 7th level or lower, the spell has no effect on you and instead alvos the caster, using the slot level, CD de resistência à magia, attack bonus, and spellcasting ability of the caster.

name: Ring of Spell Turning
desc: While wearing this ring, you have _advantage_  on _teste de resistências_  against spells that alvo only you (not an area of effect spell). Additionally, on a teste de resistência with a natural 20 if the spell is 7th-level or lower, the spell instead alvos the caster, using their original slot level, CD de resistência à magia, ataque mágico modifier, and spellcasting ability.

name: Ring of Stored Vitality
desc: While you are attuned to and wearing this ring of polished, white chalcedony, you can feed some of your vitality into the ring to charge it. You can use an action to suffer 1 level of exaustão. For each level of exaustão you suffer, the ring regains 1 charge. The ring can store up to 3 charges. As the ring increases in charges, its color reddens, becoming a deep red when it has 3 charges. Your level of exaustão can be reduced by normal means. If you already suffer from 3 or more levels of exaustão, you can't suffer another level of exaustão to restore a charge to the ring. While wearing the ring and suffering exaustão, you can use an action to expend 1 or more charges from the ring to reduce your exaustão level. Your exaustão level is reduced by 1 for each charge you expend.

name: Ring of Swimming
desc: You have a nadando Deslocamento of 40 pés while wearing this ring.

name: Ring of Swimming
desc: While wearing this ring, you have a swim Deslocamento of 40 pés.

name: Ring of Telekinesis
desc: While wearing this ring, you can cast the _telekinesis_ spell at will, but you can alvo only objects that aren't being worn or carried.

name: Ring of Telekinesis
desc: While wearing this ring, you can cast __telekinesis_ , but you are only able to alvo unattended objects.

name: Ring of the Dolphin
desc: This gold ring bears a jade carving in the shape of a leaping dolphin. While wearing this ring, you have a nadando Deslocamento of 40 pés. In addition, you can hold your breath for twice as long while underwater.

name: Ring of the Frog
desc: A pale chrysoprase cut into the shape of a frog is the centerpiece of this tarnished copper ring. While wearing this ring, you have a nadando Deslocamento of 20 pés, and you can jump three times the normal distance, though you can't jump farther than your remaining movement would allow.

name: Ring of the Frost Knight
desc: This white gold ring is covered in a thin sheet of ice and always feels frio to the touch. The ring has 3 charges and regains 1d3 expended charges daily at dawn. While wearing the ring, you can use an action to expend 1 charge to surround yourself in a suit of enchanted ice that resembles plate armor. For 1 hora, your AC can't be less than 16, regardless of what kind of armor you are wearing, and you have resistance to dano de frio. The icy armor melts, ending the effect early, if you take 20 dano de fogo or more.

name: Ring of the Grove's Guardian
desc: This pale gold ring looks as though made of delicately braided vines wrapped around a small, rough obsidian stone. While wearing this ring, you have vantagem on Sabedoria (Percepção) checks. You can use an action to speak the ring's command word to activate it and draw upon the vitality of the grove to which the ring is bound. You regain 2d10 pontos de vida. Once used, this property can't be used again until the next dawn.

name: Ring of the Jarl
desc: This thick band of hammered yellow gold is warm to the touch even in the coldest of climes. While you wear it, you have resistance to dano de frio. If you are also wearing boots of the winterlands, you are immune to dano de frio instead. Bolstering Shout. When you roll for initiative while wearing this ring, you can use a reação to shout a war cry, bolstering your aliados. Each friendly criatura within 30 pés of you and that can hear you gains a +2 bonus on its initiative roll, and it has vantagem on attack rolls for a number of rodadas equal to your Carisma modifier (minimum of 1 rodada). Once used, this property of the ring can’t be used again until the next dawn. Wergild. While wearing this ring, you can use an action to create a não mágico duplicate of the ring that is worth 100 gp. You can bestow this ring upon another as a gift. The ring can’t be used for Comum barter or trade, but it can be used for debts and payment of a warlike Natureza. You can give this ring to a subordinate warrior in your service or to someone to whom you owe a blood-debt, as a weregild in lieu of further fighting. You can create up to 3 of these rings each week. Rings that are not gifted within 24 horas of their creation vanish again.

name: Ring of the Ram
desc:
This ring has 3 charges, and it regains 1d3 expended charges daily at dawn. While wearing the ring, you can use an action to expend 1 to 3 of its charges to attack uma criatura you can see within 60 pés of you. The ring produces a spectral ram's head and makes its jogada de ataque with a +7 bonus. On a hit, for each charge you spend, the alvo recebe 2d10 dano de força and is pushed 5 pés away from you.

Alternatively, you can expend 1 to 3 of the ring's charges as an action to try to break an object you can see within 60 pés of you that isn't being worn or carried. The ring makes a teste de Força with a +5 bonus for each charge you spend.

name: Ring of the Ram
desc:
This ring has 3 charges and regains 1d3 expended charges at dawn. While wearing this ring, you can use an action to expend 1 to 3 charges and choose a criatura you can see within 60 pés. A spectral ram’s head launches from the ring to slam into the criatura, making its _attack roll_  with a +7 bonus. On a hit, for every expended charge the attack causa 2d10 dano de força and the criatura is pushed 5 pés away. 

Additionally, you can use an action to expend 1 to 3 charges to break an unattended object you can see within 60 pés. The ring makes a teste de Força with a +5 bonus for each expended charge

name: Ring of the Vengeance Seeker
desc:
This silver ring is set with an exquisite emerald. As an action, you can rotate the ring three times on your finger, casting the __poison skin_  spell. When cast in this way, the effect of the bright colors gives the appearance of brilliantly-colored makeup, face paint, or hair dye, removing the _disadvantage_  to Furtividade. Recognizing the coloring for what it is requires a CD 14 Arcanismo check. Once the ring has been used in this way, it cannot be used until the next evening.

You can also use an action to release the gem from its setting and drop it into a container of liquid no larger than a mug of ale. The liquid functions as a truth serum. Once the gem is removed, the ring becomes a mundane item.

name: Ring of the Water Dancer
desc: This thin braided purple ring is fashioned from a single piece of coral. While wearing this ring, you can stand on and move across any liquid surface as if it were solid ground. In addition, while andando atop any liquid, your movement Deslocamento increases by 10 pés and you gain a +1 bonus to your AC.

name: Ring of Three Wishes
desc: While wearing this ring, you can use an action to expend 1 of its 3 charges to cast the _wish_ spell from it. The ring becomes não mágico when you use the last charge.

name: Ring of Three Wishes
desc: While wearing this ring, you can use an action to expend 1 of its 3 charges to cast __wish_ . When all the ring’s charges are expended, it loses its magic.

name: Ring of Ursa
desc:
This wooden ring is set with a strip of fossilized honey. While wearing this ring, you gain the following benefits: - Your Força score increases by 2, to a maximum of 20.
- You have vantagem on Carisma (Persuasão) checks made to interact with bearfolk. In addition, while attuned to the ring, your hair grows thick and abundant. Your facial features grow more snout-like, and your teeth elongate. If you aren't a bearfolk, you gain the following benefits while wearing the ring:
- You can now make a bite attack as an unarmed strike. When you hit with it, your bite causa dano perfurante equal to 1d6 + your Força modifier, instead of the dano contundente normal for an unarmed strike. - You gain a powerful build and count as one size larger when determining your carrying capacity and the weight you can push, drag, or lift.

name: Ring of Warmth
desc: While wearing this ring, you have resistance to dano de frio. In addition, you and everything you wear and carry are unharmed by temperatures as low as -50 degrees Fahrenheit.

name: Ring of Warmth
desc: While wearing this ring, you have resistance to dano de frio. Additionally, you and anything you are wearing or carrying remain unharmed by temperatures as low as –50° Fahrenheit (–46° Celsius).

name: Ring of Water Walking
desc: While wearing this ring, you can stand on and move across any liquid surface as if it were solid ground.

name: Ring of Water Walking
desc: While wearing this ring, you can choose to stand on or move across any liquid surface as if it were solid ground.

name: Ring of X-ray Vision
desc:
While wearing this ring, you can use an action to speak its command word. When you do so, you can see into and through solid matter for 1 minuto. This vision has a radius of 30 pés. To you, solid objects within that radius appear transparent and don't prevent leve from passing through them. The vision can penetrate 1 pé of stone, 1 inch of Comum metal, or up to 3 pés of wood or dirt. Thicker substances block the vision, as does a thin sheet of lead.

Whenever you use the ring again before taking a descanso longo, you deve ter sucesso em a CD 15 teste de resistência de Constituição or gain one level of exaustão.

name: Ring of X-Ray Vision
desc:
While wearing this ring, you can use an action to speak its command word and see through solid objects and matter in a 30-pé radius for 1 minuto. Solid objects within the radius appear ghostly and transparent, allowing leve to pass through them. You can see through up 3 pés of wood and dirt, 1 pé of stone, and 1 inch of Comum metal (thicker materials or a thin sheet of lead block the vision).

When you use this ring again before taking a _long rest_ , you make a CD 15 Constituição _teste de resistência_  or suffer one level of _fatigue_  and one level of _strife_ .

name: River Token
desc: This small pebble measures 3/4 of an inch in diameter and weighs an ounce. The pebbles are often shaped like salmon, river clams, or iridescent river rocks. Typically, 1d4 + 4 river tokens are found together. The token gives off a distinct shine in sunlight and radiates a scent of fresh, roiling water. It is sturdy but crumbles easily if crushed. As an action, you can destroy the token by crushing it and sprinkling the remains into a river, calming the waters to a gentle current and soothing nearby water-dwelling criaturas for 1 hora. Water-dwelling beasts in the river with an Inteligência of 3 or lower are soothed and indifferent toward passing humanoids for the duration. The token's magic soothes but doesn't fully suppress the hostilities of all other water-dwelling criaturas. For the duration, each other water-dwelling criatura deve ter sucesso em a CD 15 teste de resistência de Sabedoria to attack ou receber hostile actions toward passing humanoids. The token's soothing magic ends on a criatura if that criatura is attacked.

name: Riverine Blade
desc: The crossguard of this distinctive sword depicts a stylized Garroter Crab (see Tome of Beasts) with claws extended, and the pommel is set with a smooth, spherical, blue-black river rock. You gain a +2 bonus to attack and damage rolls made with this magic weapon. While on a boat or while standing in any depth of water, you have vantagem on Destreza checks and teste de resistências.

name: Robe of Eyes
desc:
This robe is adorned with eyelike patterns. While you wear the robe, you gain the following benefits:

* The robe lets you see in all directions, and you have vantagem on Sabedoria (Percepção) checks that rely on sight.
* You have visão no escuro out to a range of 120 pés.
* You can see invisível criaturas and objects, as well as see into the Ethereal Plane, out to a range of 120 pés.

The eyes on the robe can't be closed or averted. Although you can close or avert your own eyes, you are never considered to be doing so while wearing this robe.

A _light_ spell cast on the robe or a _daylight_ spell cast within 5 pés of the robe causes you to be cego for 1 minuto. no final de each of your turns, you can make a teste de resistência de Constituição (CD 11 for _light_ or CD 15 for _daylight_), ending the blindness em um sucesso.

name: Robe of Eyes
desc:
Numerous upraised eyes are sewn into the fabric of this robe. You gain the following benefits while attuned to and wearing the robe:

* _Advantage_  on sight-based Percepção checks.
* visão no escuro to a range of 120 pés.
* The ability to see 120 pés into the Ethereal Plane.
* The ability to see _invisible_  criaturas and objects within 120 pés.
* The ability to see in all directions.
* You are always considered to have your eyes open and may not close or avert them.

 When a _daylight_ or __light_ spell is cast within 5 pés of you or on the robe, you are _blinded_  for 1 minuto. no final de each of your turns, you make a CD 11 (_light)_ or CD 15 (_daylight_) Constituição _teste de resistência_  to end the condition.

name: Robe of Scintillating Colors
desc: This robe has 3 charges, and it regains 1d3 expended charges daily at dawn. While you wear it, you can use an action and expend 1 charge to cause the garment to display a shifting pattern of dazzling hues until the end of your next turn. During this time, the robe sheds bright leve in a 30-pé radius and dim leve for an additional 30 pés. criaturas that can see you have desvantagem on attack rolls against you. In addition, any criatura in the bright leve that can see you when the robe's power is activated deve ter sucesso em a CD 15 teste de resistência de Sabedoria or become atordoado until the effect ends.

name: Robe of Scintillating Colors
desc:
While wearing and attuned to this robe of stimulating and lively colors, you can use an action to expend 1 charge and make the garment to emit _bright kaleidoscopic light_  for 30 pés and dim leve for an additional 30 pés. The leve lasts until the end of your next turn. criaturas that can see you have _disadvantage_  on _attack rolls_  against you, and criaturas within 30 pés that can see you when the leve is emitted make a CD 15 Sabedoria _teste de resistência_  or are _stunned_  until the end of your next turn.

The robe has 3 charges and regains 1d3 expended charges at dawn.

name: Robe of Stars
desc:
This black or dark blue robe is embroidered with small white or silver stars. You gain a +1 bonus to teste de resistências while you wear it.
