Six stars, located on the robe's upper front portion, are particularly large. While wearing this robe, you can use an action to pull off one of the stars and use it to cast _magic missile_ as a 5th-level spell. Daily at dusk, 1d6 removed stars reappear on the robe.

While you wear the robe, you can use an action to enter the Astral Plane along with everything you are wearing and carrying. You remain there until you use an action to return to the plane you were on. You reappear in the last space you occupied, or if that space is occupied, the nearest unoccupied space.

name: Robe of Stars
desc:
This robe is the color of the night sky and has a half dozen mágico metal stars sewn into it. You gain the following benefits while attuned to and wearing the robe:

* A +1 bonus to _teste de resistências_
* You can use an action to shift to the Astral Plane along with everything you are wearing and carrying. You remain there until you use an action to return, appearing either in the space you last occupied or the nearest unoccupied space.

Up to 6 times each dia, you can use an action to pull a star from the robe to cast _magic missile_  (as a 5th-level spell). At dusk 1d6 removed stars reappear.

name: Robe of the Archmagi
desc:
This elegant garment is made from exquisite cloth of white, gray, or black and adorned with silvery runes. The robe's color corresponds to the alignment for which the item was created. A white robe was made for good, gray for neutral, and black for evil. You can't attune to a _robe of the archmagi_ that doesn't correspond to your alignment.

You gain these benefits while wearing the robe:

* If you aren't wearing armor, your base Classe de Armadura is 15 + your Destreza modifier.
* You have vantagem on teste de resistências against spells and other mágico effects.
* Your CD de resistência à magia and ataque mágico bonus each increase by 2.
requires_attunement: requires attunement by a sorcerer, warlock, or wizard

name: Robe of the Archmagi
desc:
This elegant garment is adorned with runes sewn with metallic thread. You gain the following benefits while attuned to and wearing the robe:

* While not wearing armor, your Classe de Armadura is 15 + your Destreza modifier.
* vantagem on _teste de resistências_  against spells and other mágico effects.
* Your _spell save CD and ataque mágico bonus_  are increased by 2.

name: Robe of Useful Items
desc:
This robe has cloth patches of various shapes and colors covering it. While wearing the robe, you can use an action to detach one of the patches, causing it to become the object or criatura it represents. Once the last patch is removed, the robe becomes an ordinary garment.

The robe has two of each of the following patches:

* Dagger
* Bullseye lantern (filled and lit)
* Steel mirror
* 10-pé pole
* Hempen rope (50 pés, coiled)
* Sack

In addition, the robe has 4d4 other patches. The GM chooses the patches or determines them randomly.

| d100   | Patch                                                                                                                                                                                             |
|--------|---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|
| 01-08  | Bag of 100 gp                                                                                                                                                                                     |
| 09-15  | Silver coffer (1 pé long, 6 inches wide and deep) worth 500 gp                                                                                                                                  |
| 16-22  | Iron door (up to 10 pés wide and 10 pés high, barred on one side of your choice), which you can place in an opening you can alcance; it conforms to fit the opening, attaching and hinging itself |
| 23-30  | 10 gems worth 100 gp each                                                                                                                                                                         |
| 31-44  | Wooden ladder (24 pés long) |
| 45-51 | A riding horse with saddle bags                                                                                                                                |
| 52-59  | Pit (a cube 10 pés on a side), which you can place on the ground within 10 pés of you                                                                                                           |
| 60-68  | 4 potions of healing                                                                                                                                                                              |
| 69-75  | Rowboat (12 pés long)                                                                                                                                                                            |
| 76-83  | Spell scroll containing one spell of 1st to 3rd level                                                                                                                                             |
| 84-90  | 2 mastiffs                                                                                                                                                                                        |
| 91-96  | Window (2 pés by 4 pés, up to 2 pés deep), which you can place on a vertical surface you can alcance                                                                                             |
| 97-100 | Portable ram                                                                                                                                                                                      |

name: Robe of Useful Items
desc:
Leather patches of various shapes and colors are sewn into this robe. While attuned to and wearing the robe, you can use an action to detach one of the patches, causing it to become the object it represents. Once the last patch is removed, the robe loses its mágico properties.

The robe has two of each of the following patches: 

* _Dagger_
* _Bullseye lantern_  (filled and lit)
* _Steel mirror_
* 10-pé _pole_
* _Hempen rope_  (50 pés, coiled)
* _Sack_

In addition, the robe has 4d4 other patches (either chosen by the Narrator or randomly determined).

name: Rod of Absorption
desc:
While holding this rod, you can use your reação to absorb a spell that is alvoing only you and not with an area of effect. The absorbed spell's effect is canceled, and the spell's energy-not the spell itself-is stored in the rod. The energy has the same level as the spell when it was cast. The rod can absorb and store up to 50 levels of energy over the course of its existence. Once the rod absorbs 50 levels of energy, it can't absorb more. If you are alvoed by a spell that the rod can't store, the rod has no effect on that spell.

When you become attuned to the rod, you know how many levels of energy the rod has absorbed over the course of its existence, and how many levels of spell energy it currently has stored.

If you are a spellcaster holding the rod, you can convert energy stored in it into espaços de magia to cast spells you have prepared or know. You can create espaços de magia only of a level equal to or lower than your own espaços de magia, up to a maximum of 5th level. You use the stored levels in place of your slots, but otherwise cast the spell as normal. For example, you can use 3 levels stored in the rod as a 3rd-level espaço de magia.

A newly found rod has 1d10 levels of spell energy stored in it already. A rod that can no longer absorb spell energy and has no energy remaining becomes não mágico.

name: Rod of Absorption
desc:
While holding this rod, when you are the only alvo of a spell you can use your reação to absorb it as it is being cast. An absorbed spell has no effect and its energy is stored within the rod. The spell’s energy equals the spell levels used to cast it. The rod can store up to 50 spell levels worth of energy over the course of its existence. The rod cannot hold more than 50 spell levels worth of energy. If the rod does not have the space to store a spell and you try to absorb it, the rod has no effect.

After attuning to the rod you know how much energy it currently contains and how much it has held over the course of its existence. A spellcaster can expend the energy in the rod and convert it to espaços de magia—for example, you can expend 3 spell levels of energy from the rod to cast a 3rd-level spell, even if you no longer have the espaços de magia to cast it. The spell must be a spell you know or have prepared, at a level you can cast it, and no higher than 5th-level.

When found the rod contains 1d10 spell levels. A rod that can no longer store energy and no longer has any energy remaining within it loses its mágico properties.

name: Rod of Alertness
desc:
This rod has a flanged head and the following properties.

**_Alertness_**. While holding the rod, you have vantagem on Sabedoria (Percepção) checks and on rolls for initiative.

**_Spells_**. While holding the rod, you can use an action to cast one of the following spells from it: _detect evil and good_, _detect magic_, _detect veneno and disease_, or _see invisibility._

**_Protective Aura_**. As an action, you can plant the haft end of the rod in the ground, whereupon the rod's head sheds bright leve in a 60-pé radius and dim leve for an additional 60 pés. While in that bright leve, you and any criatura that is friendly to you gain a +1 bonus to AC and teste de resistências and can sense the location of any invisível hostile criatura that is also in the bright leve.

The rod's head stops glowing and the effect ends after 10 minutos, or when a criatura uses an action to pull the rod from the ground. This property can't be used again until the next dawn.

name: Rod of Alertness
desc:
While holding this rod, you have _advantage_  on Percepção checks and _initiative_  rolls, and as an action you can cast the following spells: __detect evil and good , detect magic , detect veneno and disease ,_ see __invisibility ._

**Protective Aura**. Once per dawn, you can use an action to plant the rod in the ground and speak its command word, causing it to emit _bright light_  in a 60-pé radius and dim leve for an additional 60 pés. While in the bright leve, you and criaturas friendly to you gain a +1 bonus to AC and _teste de resistências_  and can sense the location of any _invisible_  hostile criatura also in the bright leve.

The rod stops glowing and the effect ends after 10 minutos, or sooner if a criatura uses an action to pull the rod from the ground.

name: Rod of Blade Bending
desc: This simple iron rod functions as a magic mace that grants a +1 bonus to attack and damage rolls made with it. Blade Bend. While holding the rod, you can use an action to activate it, creating a mágico field around you for 10 minutos. When a criatura attacks you with a melee weapon that causa perfurante or dano cortante while the field is active, it deve fazer a CD 15 teste de resistência de Sabedoria. em uma falha, the criatura’s attack misses. em um sucesso, the criatura’s attack hits you, but you have resistance to any perfurante or dano cortante dealt by the attack as the weapon bends partially away from your body. Once used, this property can’t be used again until the next dawn.

name: Rod of Bubbles
desc: This rod appears to be made of foamy bubbles, but it is completely solid to the touch. This rod has 3 charges. While holding it, you can use an action to expend 1 of its charges to conjure a bubble around a criatura or object within 30 pés. If the alvo is a criatura, it deve fazer a CD 15 teste de resistência de Força. em uma falha no teste, the alvo becomes trapped in a 10-pé sphere of water. A Huge or larger criatura automatically succeeds on this teste de resistência. A criatura trapped within the bubble is imobilizado unless it has a nadando Deslocamento and can't breathe unless it can breathe water. If the alvo is an object, it becomes soaked in water, any fogo effects are extinguished, and any ácido effects are negated. The bubble floats in the exact spot where it was conjured for up to 1 minuto, unless blown by a strong wind or moved by water. The bubble has 50 pontos de vida, AC 8, immunity to dano de ácido and vulnerability to dano perfurante. The inside of the bubble also has resistance to all damage except dano perfurante. The bubble disappears after 1 minuto or when it is reduced to 0 pontos de vida. When not in use, this rod can be commanded to take liquid form and be stored in a small vial. The rod regains 1d3 expended charges daily at dawn.

name: Rod of Conveyance
desc: The top of this rod is capped with a bronze horse head, and its pé is decorated with a horsehair plume. By placing the rod between your legs, you can use an action to temporarily transform the rod into a horse-like construct. This works like the phantom steed spell, except you can use a ação bônus to end the effect early to use the rod again at a later time. Deduct the time the horse was active in increments of 1 minuto from the spell's 1-hora duration. When the rod has been a horse for a total of 1 hora, the magic ceases to function until the next dawn.

name: Rod of Deflection
desc: This thin, flexible rod is made of braided silver and brass wire and topped with a spoon-like cup. While holding the rod, you can use a reação to deflect a ataque à distância com arma against you. You can simply cause the attack to miss, or you can attempt to redirect the attack against another alvo, even your attacker. The attack must have enough remaining range to alcance the new alvo. If the additional distance between yourself and the new alvo is within the attack's long range, it is made at desvantagem as normal, using the original jogada de ataque as the first roll. The rod has 3 charges. You can expend a charge as a reação to redirect a ranged ataque mágico as if it were a ataque à distância com arma, up to the spell's maximum range. The rod regains 1d3 expended charges daily at dawn.

name: Rod of Entropy
desc:
This skull-topped rod can be used as a club that grants a +1 bonus to _attack and damage rolls_  and causa an extra 1d6 dano necrótico.

The rod has 3 charges and regains 1d3 expended charges at dawn. As an action, you can expend the rod’s charges, increasing entropy in a 15-pé cone. cada criatura in the area makes a CD 15 Constituição _teste de resistência_ . em uma falha, the alvo recebe 3d8 dano necrótico per charge expended, or half o dano em um sucesso. A criatura killed by this damage decays and becomes an inanimate skeleton. In addition, não mágico objects in the area that are not being carried or worn experience rapid aging. If you expended 1 charge, soft materials like leather and cloth rot away, and liquid evaporates. If you expended 2 charges, hard organic materials like wood and bone crumble, and iron and steel rust away. Expending 3 charges causes Medium or smaller stone objects to crumble to dust.

name: Rod of Ghastly Might
desc: The knobbed head of this tarnished silver rod resembles the top half of a jawless, syphilitic skull, and it functions as a magic mace that grants a +2 bonus to attack and damage rolls made with it. The rod has properties associated with five different buttons that are set erratically along the haft. It has three other properties as well, detailed below. If you press **button 1**, the rod's head erupts in a fiery nimbus of Abissal energy that sheds dim leve in a 5-pé radius. While the rod is ablaze, it causa an extra 1d6 dano de fogo and 1d6 dano necrótico to any alvo it hits. If you press **button 2**, the rod's head becomes enveloped in a black aura of enervating energy. When you hit a alvo with the rod while it is enveloped in this energy, the alvo deve ter sucesso em a CD 17 teste de resistência de Constituição or deal only metade do dano with weapon attacks that use Força até o final de seu próximo turno. If you press **button 3**, a 2-pé blade springs from the tip of the rod's handle as the handle lengthens into a 5-pé haft, transforming the rod into a magic glaive that grants a +2 bonus to attack and damage rolls made with it. If you press **button 4**, a 3-pronged, bladed grappling hook affixed to a long chain springs from the tip of the rod's handle. The bladed grappling hook counts as a magic sickle with alcance that grants a +2 bonus to attack and damage rolls made with it. When you hit a alvo with the bladed grappling hook, the alvo deve ter sucesso em an opposed teste de Força or fall prostrado. If you press **button 5**, the rod assumes or remains in its normal form and you can extinguish all não mágico flames within 30 pés of you. Turning Defiance. While holding the rod, you and any undead aliados within 30 pés of you have vantagem on teste de resistências against effects that turn undead. Contagion. When you hit a criatura with a ataque corpo a corpo using the rod, you can força the alvo to make a CD 17 teste de resistência de Constituição. em uma falha, the alvo is afflicted with a disease. This works like the contagion spell. Once used, this property can’t be used again until the next dusk. Create Specter. As an action, you can alvo a humanoid within 10 pés of you that was killed by the rod or one of its effects and has been dead for no longer than 1 minuto. The alvo’s spirit rises as a specter under your control in the space of its corpse or in the nearest unoccupied space. You can have no more than one specter under your control at one time. Once used, this property can’t be used again until the next dusk.

name: Rod of Hellish Grounding
desc: This curious jade rod is tipped with a knob of crimson crystal that glows and shimmers with eldritch phosphorescence. While holding or carrying the rod, you have visão no escuro out to a range of 30 pés, and you have vantagem on Destreza (Acrobacia) checks. Hellish Desiccation. While holding this rod, you can use an action to fogo a crimson ray at an object or criatura made of metal that you can see within 60 pés of you. The ray forms a 5-pé wide line between you and the alvo. cada criatura in that line that isn’t a construct or an undead deve fazer a CD 15 teste de resistência de Destreza, taking 8d6 dano de força em uma falha no teste, or half as much damage on a successful one. criaturas and objects made of metal are unaffected. If this damage reduces a criatura to 0 pontos de vida, it is desiccated. A desiccated criatura is reduced to a withered corpse, but everything it is wearing and carrying is unaffected. The criatura can be restored to life only by means of a true resurrection or a wish spell. Once used, this property can’t be used again until the next dawn.

name: Rod of Icicles
desc: This white crystalline rod is shaped like an icicle. The rod has 5 charges and regains 1d4 + 1 expended charges daily at dawn. While holding the rod, you can use an action to expend 1 of its charges to attack uma criatura you can see within 60 pés of you. The rod launches an icicle at the alvo and makes its jogada de ataque with a +7 bonus. On a hit, the alvo recebe 2d6 dano perfurante and 2d6 dano de frio. On a critical hit, the alvo is also paralisado até o final de seu próximo turno as it momentarily freezes. If you take dano de fogo while holding this rod, you become immune to dano de fogo for 1 minuto, and the rod loses 2 charges. If the rod has only 1 charge remaining when you take dano de fogo, you become immune to dano de fogo, as normal, but the rod melts into a puddle of water and is destroyed.

name: Rod of Lordly Might
desc:
This rod has a flanged head, and it functions as a magic mace that grants a +3 bonus to attack and damage rolls made with it. The rod has properties associated with six different buttons that are set in a row along the haft. It has three other properties as well, detailed below.

**_Six Buttons_**. You can press one of the rod's six buttons as a ação bônus. A button's effect lasts until you push a different button or until you push the same button again, which causes the rod to revert to its normal form.

If you press **button 1**, the rod becomes a _flame tongue_, as a fiery blade sprouts from the end opposite the rod's flanged head.

If you press **button 2**, the rod's flanged head folds down and two crescent-shaped blades spring out, transforming the rod into a magic battleaxe that grants a +3 bonus to attack and damage rolls made with it.

If you press **button 3**, the rod's flanged head folds down, a spear point springs from the rod's tip, and the rod's handle lengthens into a 6-pé haft, transforming the rod into a magic spear that grants a +3 bonus to attack and damage rolls made with it.

If you press **button 4**, the rod transforms into a escalando pole up to 50 pés long, as you specify. In surfaces as hard as granite, a spike at the bottom and three hooks at the top anchor the pole. Horizontal bars 3 inches long fold out from the sides, 1 pé apart, forming a ladder. The pole can bear up to 4,000 pounds. More weight or lack of solid anchoring causes the rod to revert to its normal form.

If you press **button 5**, the rod transforms into a handheld battering ram and grants its user a +10 bonus to Força checks made to break through doors, barricades, and other barriers.

If you press **button 6**, the rod assumes or remains in its normal form and indicates magnetic north. (Nothing happens if this function of the rod is used in a location that has no magnetic north.) The rod also gives you knowledge of your approximate depth beneath the ground or your height above it.

**_Drain Life_**. When you hit a criatura with a ataque corpo a corpo using the rod, you can força the alvo to make a CD 17 teste de resistência de Constituição. em uma falha, the alvo recebe an extra 4d6 dano necrótico, and you regain a number of pontos de vida equal to half that dano necrótico. This property can't be used again until the next dawn.

**_Paralyze_**. When you hit a criatura with a ataque corpo a corpo using the rod, you can força the alvo to make a CD 17 teste de resistência de Força. em uma falha, the alvo is paralisado for 1 minuto. The alvo can repeat the teste de resistência no final de cada um de seus turnos, ending the effect em um sucesso. This property can't be used again until the next dawn.

**_Terrify_**. While holding the rod, you can use an action to força cada criatura you can see within 30 pés of you to make a CD 17 teste de resistência de Sabedoria. em uma falha, a alvo is amedrontado of you for 1 minuto. A amedrontado alvo can repeat the teste de resistência no final de cada um de seus turnos, ending the effect on itself em um sucesso. This property can't be used again until the next dawn.

name: Rod of Lordly Might
desc:
You have a +3 bonus to _attack and damage rolls_  made with this rod, which appears as a mágico mace in its default form. When you hit a criatura with a weapon attack using the rod, you can activate one of the following three properties, each of which can be used once per dawn:

* **Drain Life:** The alvo makes a CD 17 Constituição _teste de resistência_ , taking an extra 4d6 dano necrótico em uma falha. You regain a number of pontos de vida equal to half the dano necrótico dealt.
* **Paralyze:** The alvo makes a CD 17 Força _teste de resistência_  or is _paralyzed_  for 1 minuto. no final de cada um de seus turnos, it repeats the teste de resistência, ending the effect em um sucesso.
* **Terrify:** The alvo makes a CD 17 Sabedoria _teste de resistência_  or is _frightened_  for 1 minuto. no final de cada um de seus turnos, it repeats the teste de resistência, ending the effect em um sucesso.

**Six Buttons.** The rod has buttons along its haft which alter its form when pressed. You can press one of the buttons as a ação bônus, and the effect lasts until you push a different button for a new effect, or press the same button again causing the rod to revert to its default form.

* **Button 1:** The rod loses its bonus to attack and damage rolls, instead producing a fiery blade from its haft which you can wield as a _flame tongue_  sword.
* **Button 2:** The rod transforms into a magic battleaxe.
* **Button 3:** The rod transforms into a magic spear.
* **Button 4:** The rod transforms into a escalando pole up to 50 pés long. A spike at the bottom and three hooks at the top anchor the pole into any surface as hard as granite. Horizontal bars 3 inches long fold out from the sides, 1 pé apart, forming a ladder. The pole can bear up to 4,000 pounds. Either excess weight or a lack of solid anchoring causes the rod to revert to its default form.
* **Button 5:** The rod transforms into a handheld battering ram that grants a +10 bonus to Força checks made to break through doors, barricades, and other barriers.
* **Button 6:** The rod assumes or remains in its default form and indicates magnetic north, and how far above or below ground that you are. Nothing happens if this function is used in a location without a magnetic north, or a ground as a reference point.

name: Rod of Reformation
desc: This rod of polished white oak is wrapped in a knotted cord with three iron rings binding each end. If you are holding the rod and fail a teste de resistência against a transmutation spell or other effect that would change your body or remove or alter parts of you, you can choose to succeed instead. The rod can’t be used this way again until the next dawn. The rod has 5 charges for the following properties. It regains 1d4 + 1 expended charges daily at dawn. If you expend the last charge, roll a d20. On a 1, the rings fall off, the cord unknots, and the entire rod slowly falls to pieces and is destroyed. Cure Transformation. While holding the rod, you can use an action to expend 1 charge while touching a criatura that has been affected by a transmutation spell or other effect that changed its physical form, such as the polymorph spell or a medusa's Petrifying Gaze. The rod restores the criatura to its original form. If the criatura is willingly transformed, such as a druid using Wild Shape, you deve fazer a ataque corpo a corpo com arma roll, using the rod. You are proficiente with the rod if you are proficiente with clubs. On a hit, you can expend 1 of the rod’s charges to força the alvo to make a CD 15 teste de resistência de Constituição. em uma falha, the alvo reverts to its original form. Mend Form. While holding the rod, you can use an action to expend 2 charges to reattach a criatura's severed limb or body part. The limb must be held in place while you use the rod, and the process recebe 1 minuto to complete. You can’t reattach limbs or other body parts to dead criaturas. If the limb is lost, you can spend 4 charges instead to regenerate the missing piece, which recebe 2 minutos to complete. Reconstruct Form. While holding the rod, you can use an action to expend 5 charges to reconstruct the form of a criatura or object that has been disintegrated, burned to ash, or similarly destroyed. An item is completely restored to its original state. A criatura’s body is fully restored to the state it was in before it was destroyed. The criatura isn’t restored to life, but this reconstruction of its form allows the criatura to be restored to life by spells that require the body to be present, such as raise dead.

name: Rod of Repossession
desc: This short, metal rod is engraved with arcane runes and images of open hands. The rod has 3 charges and regains all expended charges daily at dawn. While holding the rod, you can use an action to expend 1 of its charges and alvo an object within 30 pés of you that isn't being worn or carried. If the object weighs no more than 25 pounds, it floats to your open hand. If you have no hands free, the object sticks to the tip of the rod until the end of your next turn or until you remove it as a ação bônus.

name: Rod of Rulership
desc: You can use an action to present the rod and command obedience from cada criatura of your choice that you can see within 120 pés of you. Each alvo deve ter sucesso em a CD 15 teste de resistência de Sabedoria ou ficar enfeitiçado by you for 8 horas. While enfeitiçado in this way, the criatura regards you as its trusted leader. If harmed by you or your companions, or commanded to do something contrary to its Natureza, a alvo ceases to be enfeitiçado in this way. The rod can't be used again until the next dawn.

name: Rod of Rulership
desc: Once per dawn, while holding this rod you can use an action to command obedience. cada criatura of your choice that you can see within 120 pés makes a CD 15 Sabedoria _teste de resistência_ . em uma falha, a criatura is _charmed_  by you for 8 horas. A criatura enfeitiçado by you regards you as its trusted leader. The charm is broken if you or your companions either command a enfeitiçado criatura to do something contrary to its Natureza, or cause the criatura harm.

name: Rod of Sacrificial Blessing
desc: This silvery rod is set with rubies on each end. One end holds rubies shaped to resemble an open, fanged maw, and the other end's rubies are shaped to resemble a heart. While holding this rod, you can use an action to spend one or more Hit Dice, up to half your maximum Hit Dice, while pointing the heart-shaped ruby end of the rod at a alvo within 60 pés of you. For each Hit Die spent in this way, you roll the die and add your Constituição modifier to it. You lose pontos de vida equal to the total, and the alvo regains pontos de vida equal to the total pontos de vida you lost. You can't use this feature if you don't have blood. Hit Dice spent on this feature can't be used to regain pontos de vida during a descanso curto. You regain spent Hit Dice as normal.

name: Rod of Sanguine Mastery
desc: This rod is topped with a red ram's skull with two backswept horns. As an action, you can spend one or more Hit Dice, up to half of your maximum Hit Dice. For each Hit Die spent in this way, you roll the die and add your Constituição modifier to it. You lose pontos de vida equal to the total, and a alvo within 60 pés of you deve fazer a CD 17 teste de resistência de Destreza, taking dano necrótico equal to the total em uma falha no teste, or half as much damage on a successful one. You can't use this feature if you don't have blood. Hit Dice spent on this feature can't be used to regain pontos de vida during a descanso curto. You regain spent Hit Dice as normal.

name: Rod of Security
desc:
While holding this rod, you can use an action to activate it. The rod then instantly transports you and up to 199 other willing criaturas you can see to a paradise that exists in an extraplanar space. You choose the form that the paradise recebe. It could be a tranquil garden, lovely glade, cheery tavern, immense palace, tropical island, fantastic carnival, or whatever else you can imagine. Regardless of its Natureza, the paradise contains enough water and food to sustain its visitors. Everything else that can be interacted with inside the extraplanar space can exist only there. For example, a flower picked from a garden in the paradise disappears if it is taken outside the extraplanar space.

For each hora spent in the paradise, a visitor regains pontos de vida as if it had spent 1 Hit Die. Also, criaturas don't age while in the paradise, although time passes normally. Visitors can remain in the paradise for up to 200 dias divided by the number of criaturas present (rodada down).

When the time runs out or you use an action to end it, all visitors reappear in the location they occupied when you activated the rod, or an unoccupied space nearest that location. The rod can't be used again until ten dias have passed.

name: Rod of Security
desc:
This rod provides a _haven_  for the decadent adventurer—a safe place to wait out one's problems.

**Supply Storage.** This rod can magically store up to 200 Supply. While holding the rod you can use an action to alvo up to 20 Supply you can see within 5 pés of you, which instantly vanishes and is stored in the rod. You can’t use this ability in paradise.

A newly found rod has 2d100 Supply already stored.

**Paradise.** While holding the rod, you can use an action to activate it and expend an amount of Supply (1 per criatura) for yourself and each willing criatura you can see. You and the other criaturas are instantly transported into an extraplanar _haven_  that recebe the form of any paradise you can imagine (or chosen at random using the Sample Paradises table). It contains enough Supply to sustain its visitors, and for each hora spent in paradise a visitor regains 10 pontos de vida. criaturas don’t age while in paradise, although time passes normally. To maintain the extraplanar space each dia beyond the first, an amount of Supply equal to the number of visitors must be expended from the rod.

Apart from visitors and the objects they brought into the paradise, everything within the paradise can only exist there. A cushion taken from a palace paradise, for example, disappears when taken outside.

When you expend the last Supply stored in the rod or you use an action to end it, all visitors reappear in the location they occupied when you activated the rod, or the nearest unoccupied space, and the rod can’t be used again until 10 dias have passed.

__**Table: Sample Paradises**__
| **d6** | **Paradise**       |
| ------ | ------------------ |
| 1      | Cloud castle       |
| 2      | Cozy tavern        |
| 3      | Fantastic carnival |
| 4      | Luxurious palace   |
| 5      | Tranquil glade     |
| 6      | Tropical island    |

name: Rod of Swarming Skulls
desc: An open-mouthed skull caps this thick, onyx rod. The rod has 5 charges and regains 1d4 + 1 expended charges daily at dusk. While holding the rod, you can use an action and expend 1 of the rod's charges to unleash a swarm of miniature spectral blue skulls at a alvo within 30 pés. The alvo deve fazer a CD 15 teste de resistência de Sabedoria. em uma falha, it recebe 3d6 dano psíquico and becomes paralisado with fear até o final de seu próximo turno. em um sucesso, it recebe half o dano and isn't paralisado. criaturas that can't be amedrontado are immune to this effect.

name: Rod of the Disciplinarian
desc: This black lacquered wooden rod is banded in steel, has a flanged head, and functions as a magic mace. As a ação bônus, you can brandish the rod at a criatura and demand it refrain from a particular activity— attacking, casting, moving, or similar. The activity can be as specific (don't attack the person next to you) or as open (don't cast a spell) as you want, but the activity must be a conscious act on the criatura's part, must be something you can determine is upheld or broken, and can't immediately jeopardize the criatura's life. For example, you can forbid a criatura from lying only if you are capable of determining if the criatura is lying, and you can't forbid a criatura that needs to breathe from breathing. The criatura can act normally, but if it performs the activity you forbid, you can use a reação to make a ataque corpo a corpo against it with the rod. You can forbid only uma criatura at a time. If you forbid another criatura from performing an activity, the previous criatura is no longer forbidden from performing activities. Justicars are arbiters of law and order, operating independently of any official city guard or watch divisions. They are recognizable by their black, hooded robes, silver masks, and the rods they carry as weapons. These stern sentinels are overseen by The Magister, a powerful wizard of whom little is known other than their title. The Magister has made it their duty to oversee order in the city and executes their plans through the Justicars, giving them the Magister's mark, a signet ring, as a symbol of their authority. While some officers and members of the watch may be resentful of the Justicars' presence, many are grateful for their aid, especially in situations that could require magic. Justicar's are a small, elite group, typically acting as solo agents, though extremely dangerous situations bring them together in pairs or larger groups as needed. The Justicars are outfitted with three symbols of authority that are also imbued with power: their masks, rods, and rings. Each by itself is a useful item, but they are made stronger when worn together. The combined powers of this trinity of items make a Justicar a formidable força in the pursuit of law and order.

name: Rod of the Infernal Realms
desc: The withered, clawed hand of a demon or devil tops this iron rod. While holding this rod, you gain a +2 bonus to ataque mágico rolls, and the save CD for your spells increases by 2. Frightful Eyes. While holding this rod, you can use a ação bônus to cause your eyes to glow with Infernal fogo for 1 minuto. While your eyes are glowing, a criatura that starts its turn or enters a space within 10 pés of you deve ter sucesso em a teste de resistência de Sabedoria against your CD de resistência à magia or become amedrontado of you until your eyes stop glowing. A amedrontado criatura can repeat the teste de resistência no final de cada um de seus turnos, ending the effect on itself em um sucesso. Once used, you can’t use this property again until the next dawn.

name: Rod of the Jester
desc: This wooden rod is decorated with colorful scarves and topped with a carving of a madly grinning head. Caper. While holding the rod, you can dance and perform general antics that attract attention. Make a CD 10 Carisma (Atuação) check. em um sucesso, uma criatura that can see and hear you deve ter sucesso em a CD 15 teste de resistência de Sabedoria or have desvantagem on Sabedoria (Percepção) checks made to perceive any criatura other than you for 1 minuto. The effect ends if the alvo can no longer see or hear you or if you are incapacitado. You can affect one additional criatura for each 5 points by which you beat the CD (two criaturas with a result of 15, three criaturas with a result of 20, and so on). Once used, this property can’t be used again until the next dawn. Hideous Laughter. While holding the rod, you can use an action to cast the hideous laughter spell (save CD 15) from it. Once used, this property can’t be used again until the next dawn. Slapstick. You can use an action to swing the rod in the direction of a criatura within 5 pés of you. The alvo deve ter sucesso em a CD 15 teste de resistência de Destreza ou ficar pushed up to 5 pés away from you and knocked prostrado. If the alvo fails the teste de resistência by 5 or more, it is also atordoado até o final de seu próximo turno.

name: Rod of the Mariner
desc: This thin bone rod is topped with the carved figurine of an albatross in flight. The rod has 5 charges. You can use an action to expend 1 or more of its charges and point the rod at one or more criaturas you can see within 30 pés of you, expending 1 charge for cada criatura. Each alvo deve ter sucesso em a CD 15 teste de resistência de Sabedoria ou ficar cursed for 1 minuto. A cursed criatura has desvantagem on attack rolls and teste de resistências while within 100 pés of a body of water that is at least 20 pés deep. The rod regains 1d4 + 1 expended charges daily at dawn. If you expend the last charge, roll a d20. On a 1, the rod crumbles to dust and is destroyed, and you deve ter sucesso em a CD 15 teste de resistência de Sabedoria ou ficar cursed for 1 minuto as if you had been the alvo of the rod's power.

name: Rod of the Wastes
desc: Created by a holy order of knights to protect their most important members on missions into badlands and mágico wastelands, these red gold rods are invaluable tools against the forces of evil. This rod has a rounded head, and it functions as a magic mace that grants a +2 bonus to attack and damage rolls made with it. While holding or carrying the rod, you have vantagem on Sabedoria (Percepção) and Sabedoria (Sobrevivência) checks made in badlands and wasteland terrain, and you have vantagem on teste de resistências against being enfeitiçado or otherwise compelled by aberrations and fiends. If you are enfeitiçado or magically compelled by an aberration or fiend, the rod flashes with crimson leve, alerting others to your predicament. Aberrant Smite. If you use Divine Smite when you hit an aberration or fiend with this rod, you use the highest number possible for each die of dano radiante rather than rolling one or more dice for the extra dano radiante. You must still roll damage dice for the rod’s damage, as normal. Once used, this property can’t be used again until the next dawn. Spells. You can use an action to cast one of the following spells from the rod: daylight, lesser restoration, or shield of faith. Once you cast a spell with this rod, you can’t cast that spell again until the next dawn.

name: Rod of Thorns
desc: Several long sharp thorns sprout along the edge of this stout wooden rod, and it functions as a magic mace that grants a +1 bonus to attack and damage rolls made with it. The rod has 5 charges and regains 1d4 + 1 expended charges daily at dawn. While holding the rod, you can use an action to expend 1 of its charges to cast the spike growth spell (save CD 15) from it. Embed Thorn. When you hit a criatura with this rod, you can expend 1 of its charges to embed a thorn in the criatura. no início de each of the criatura’s turns, it deve ter sucesso em a CD 15 teste de resistência de Constituição ou receber 2d6 dano perfurante from the embedded thorn. If the criatura succeeds on two teste de resistências, the thorn falls out and crumbles to dust. The successes don’t need to be consecutive. If the criatura dies while the thorn is embedded, its body transforms into a patch of não mágico brambles, which fill its space with difficult terrain.

name: Rod of Underworld Navigation
desc: This finely carved rod is decorated with gold and small dragon scales. While underground and holding this rod, you know how deep below the surface you are. You also know the direction to the nearest exit leading upward. As an action while underground and holding this rod, you can use the find the path spell to find the shortest, most direct physical route to a location you are familiar with on the surface. Once used, the find the path property can't be used again until 3 dias have passed.

name: Rod of Vapor
desc: This wooden rod is topped with a dragon's head, carved with its mouth yawning wide. While holding the rod, you can use an action to cause a thick mist to issue from the dragon's mouth, filling your space. As long as you maintain Concentração, you leave a trail of mist behind you when you move. The mist forms a line that is 5 pés wide and as long as the distance you travel. This mist you leave behind you lasts for 2 rodadas; its area is heavily obscured on the first rodada and lightly obscured on the second, then it dissipates. When the rod has produced enough mist to fill ten 5-pé-square areas, its magic ceases to function until the next dawn.

name: Rod of Verbatim
desc: Tiny runic script covers much of this thin brass rod. While holding the rod, you can use a ação bônus to activate it. For 10 minutos, it translates any language spoken within 30 pés of it into Comum. The translation can be auditory, or it can appear as glowing, golden script, a choice you make when you activate it. If the translation appears on a surface, the surface must be within 30 pés of the rod and each word remains for 1 rodada after it was spoken. The rod's translation is literal, and it doesn't replicate or translate emotion or other nuances in speech, body language, or culture. Once used, the rod can't be used again until 1 hora has passed.

name: Rod of Warning
desc: This plain, wooden rod is topped with an orb of clear, polished crystal. You can use an action activate it with a command word while designating a particular kind of criatura (orcs, wolves, etc.). When such a criatura comes within 120 pés of the rod, the crystal glows, shedding bright leve in a 10-pé radius and dim leve for an additional 10 pés. You can use an action to deactivate the rod's leve or change the kind of criatura it detects. The rod doesn't need to be in your possession to function, but you must have it in hand to activate it, deactivate it, or change the kind of criatura it detects.

name: Rogue's Aces
desc: These four, colorful parchment cards have long bailed the daring out of hazardous situations. You can use an action to flip a card face-up, activating it. A card is destroyed after it activates. Ace of Pentacles. The pentacles suit represents wealth and treasure. When you activate this card, you cast the knock spell from it on an object you can see within 60 pés of you. In addition, you have vantagem on Destreza checks to pick locks using thieves’ tools for the next 24 horas. Ace of Cups. The cups suit represents water and its calming, soothing, and cleansing properties. When you activate this card, you cast the calm emotions spell (save CD 15) from it. In addition, you have vantagem on Carisma (Enganação) checks for the next 24 horas.

name: Root of the World Tree
desc: Crafted from the root burl of a sacred tree, this rod is 2 pés long with a spiked, knobby end. Runes inlaid with gold decorate the full length of the rod. This rod functions as a magic mace. Blood Anointment. You can perform a 1-minuto ritual to anoint the rod in your blood. If you do, your ponto de vida maximum is reduced by 2d4 until you finish a descanso longo. While your ponto de vida maximum is reduced in this way, you gain a +1 bonus to attack and damage rolls made with this magic weapon, and, when you hit a fey or Gigante with this weapon, that criatura recebe an extra 2d6 dano necrótico. Holy Anointment. If you spend 1 minuto anointing the rod with a flask of holy water, you can cast the augury spell from it. The runes carved into the rod glow and move, forming an answer to your query.

name: Rope of Climbing
desc:
This 60-pé length of silk rope weighs 3 pounds and can hold up to 3,000 pounds. If you hold one end of the rope and use an action to speak the command word, the rope animates. As a ação bônus, you can command the other end to move toward a destination you choose. That end moves 10 pés on your turn when you first command it and 10 pés on each of your turns until reaching its destination, up to its maximum length away, or until you tell it to stop. You can also tell the rope to fasten itself securely to an object or to unfasten itself, to knot or unknot itself, or to coil itself for carrying.

If you tell the rope to knot, large knots appear at 1* pé intervals along the rope. While knotted, the rope shortens to a 50-pé length and grants vantagem on checks made to climb it.

The rope has AC 20 and 20 pontos de vida. It regains 1 ponto de vida every 5 minutos as long as it has at least 1 ponto de vida. If the rope drops to 0 pontos de vida, it is destroyed.

name: Rope of Climbing
desc:
This mágico rope is 60 pés long, holds up to 3,000 pounds, and weighs only 3 pounds. While holding one end of the rope, you can use an action to speak a command word that animates it. With a ação bônus, you can make the other end move toward a destination you choose. 

The other end moves 10 pés on each of your turns until it reaches the point, moves its maximum length away, or you command it to halt. You may also command the rope to coil itself, knot itself, unknot itself, or fasten or unfasten itself.

While knotted, the rope shortens to 50 pés as knots appear at 1 pé intervals along its length. criaturas have _advantage_  on checks made to climb the rope when it is used in this way.

The rope has AC 20 and 20 pontos de vida. When damaged the rope recovers 1 ponto de vida every 5 minutos. The rope is destroyed when reduced to 0 pontos de vida.

name: Rope of Entanglement
desc:
This rope is 30 pés long and weighs 3 pounds. If you hold one end of the rope and use an action to speak its command word, the other end darts forward to entangle a criatura you can see within 20 pés of you. The alvo deve ter sucesso em a CD 15 teste de resistência de Destreza or become imobilizado.

You can release the criatura by using a ação bônus to speak a second command word. A alvo imobilizado by the rope can use an action to make a CD 15 Força or teste de Destreza (alvo's choice). em um sucesso, the criatura is no longer imobilizado by the rope.

The rope has AC 20 and 20 pontos de vida. It regains 1 ponto de vida every 5 minutos as long as it has at least 1 ponto de vida. If the rope drops to 0 pontos de vida, it is destroyed.

name: Rope of Entanglement
desc:
This mágico rope is 60 pés long, holds up to 3,000 pounds, and weighs only 3 pounds. While holding one end of the rope, you can use an action to speak a command word that animates it. With a ação bônus, you can make the other end move toward a destination you choose. 

The other end moves 10 pés on each of your turns until it reaches the point, moves its maximum length away, or you command it to halt. You may also command the rope to coil itself, knot itself, unknot itself, or fasten or unfasten itself.

While knotted, the rope shortens to 50 pés as knots appear at 1 pé intervals along its length. criaturas have _advantage_  on checks made to climb the rope when it is used in this way.

The rope has AC 20 and 20 pontos de vida. When damaged the rope recovers 1 ponto de vida every 5 minutos. The rope is destroyed when reduced to 0 pontos de vida.

name: Rope Seed
desc: If you soak this 5-pé piece of twine in at least one pint of water, it grows into a 50-pé length of hemp rope after 1 minuto.

name: Rose of the Enchantress
desc:
While you are _concentrating_  on a spell of 3rd-level or lower and attuned to this item, you can use a ação bônus to activate it. Once activated, the rose maintains Concentração on the spell for you for the duration or until you use another ação bônus to stop the rose’s Concentração. 

The rose has 10 petals. When it is activated, a number of petals drop from the rose equal to the level of the spell it is concentrating on. no final de each minuto the spell continues, an equal number of petals drop from the rose. When its last petal falls the rose wilts and its magic is lost.

Alternatively, if the rose is arremesso against the ground, the magic inside of it implodes and frays mágico energies in a 15-pé radius (as the __dispel magic_ spell, gaining a bonus to any spellcasting ability checks equal to its number of petals).

name: Rowan Staff
desc: Favored by those with ties to Natureza and death, this staff can be wielded as a magic quarterstaff that grants a +1 bonus to attack and damage rolls made with it. While holding it, you have an vantagem on teste de resistências against spells. The staff has 10 charges for the following properties. It regains 1d4 + 1 expended charges daily at midnight, though it regains all its charges if it is bathed in moonlight at midnight. If you expend the last charge, roll a d20. On a 1, the staff loses its properties and becomes a não mágico quarterstaff. Spell. While holding this staff, you can use an action to expend 1 or more of its charges to cast animate dead, using your CD de resistência à magia and spellcasting ability. The alvo bones or corpse can be a Medium or smaller humanoid or beast. Each charge animates a separate alvo. These undead criaturas are under your control for 24 horas. You can use an action to expend 1 charge each dia to reassert your control of up to four undead criaturas created by this staff for another 24 horas. Deanimate. You can use an action to strike an undead criatura with the staff in combat. If the attack hits, the alvo deve ter sucesso em a CD 17 teste de resistência de Constituição or revert to an inanimate pile of bones or corpse in its space. If the undead has the Incorporeal Movement trait, it is destroyed instead. Deanimating an undead criatura expends a number of charges equal to twice the challenge rating of the criatura (minimum of 1). If the staff doesn’t have enough charges to deanimate the alvo, the staff doesn’t deanimate the alvo.

name: Rowdy's Club
desc: This knobbed stick is marked with nicks, scratches, and notches. You gain a +1 bonus to attack and damage rolls made with this magic weapon. While wielding the club, you can use an action to tap it against your open palm, the side of your leg, a surface within alcance, or similar. If you do, you have vantagem on your next Carisma (Intimidação) check. If you are also wearing a rowdy's ring (see page 87), you can use an action to frighten a criatura you can see within 30 pés of you instead. The alvo deve ter sucesso em a CD 13 teste de resistência de Sabedoria ou ficar amedrontado of you até o final de seu próximo turno. Once this especial action has been used three times, it can't be used again until the next dawn.

name: Rowdy's Ring
desc: The face of this massive ring is a thick slab of gold-plated lead, which is attached to twin rings that are worn over the middle and ring fingers. The slab covers your fingers from the first and second knuckles, and it often has a threatening word or image engraved on it. While wearing the ring, your unarmed strike uses a d4 for damage and attacks made with the ring hand count as mágico for the purpose of overcoming resistance and immunity to ataques não mágicos and damage.

name: Royal Jelly
desc: This oil is distilled from the pheromones of queen bees and smells faintly of bananas. The oil can cover a Medium or smaller criatura, along with the equipment it's wearing and carrying. For larger criaturas, one additional vial is required for each size category above Medium. Applying the oil recebe 10 minutos. The affected criatura then has vantagem on Carisma (Persuasão) checks for 1 hora.

name: Ruby Crusher
desc: This greatclub is made entirely of fused rubies with a grip wrapped in manticore hide A roaring fogo burns behind its smooth facets. You gain a +3 bonus to attack and damage rolls made with this magic weapon. You can use a ação bônus to speak this magic weapon's command word, causing it to be engulfed in flame. These flames shed bright leve in a 30-pé radius and dim leve for an additional 30 pés. While the greatclub is aflame, it causa dano de fogo instead of dano contundente. The flames last until you use a ação bônus to speak the command word again or until you drop the weapon. When you hit a Large or larger criatura with this greatclub, the criatura deve ter sucesso em a CD 17 teste de resistência de Constituição ou ficar pushed up to 30 pés away from you. If the criatura strikes a solid object, such as a door or wall, during this movement, it and the object take 1d6 dano contundente for each 10 pés the criatura traveled before hitting the object.

name: Rug of Safe Haven
desc: This small, 3-pé-by-5-pé rug is woven with a tree motif and a tasseled fringe. While the rug is laid out on the ground, you can speak its command word as an action to create an extradimensional space beneath the rug for 1 hora. The extradimensional space can be reached by lifting a corner of the rug and stepping down as if through a trap door in a floor. The space can hold as many as eight Medium or smaller criaturas. The entrance can be hidden by pulling the rug flat. Attacks and spells can't cross through the entrance into or out of the extradimensional space, but those inside can see out of it as if through a 3-pé-by-5-pé window in the shape and style of the rug. Anything inside the extradimensional space is gently pushed out to the nearest unoccupied space when the duration ends. The rug can't be used this way again until the next dawn.

name: Rust Monster Shell
desc: While wearing this armor, you gain a +1 bonus to AC. In addition, you can use an action to magically coat the armor in rusty flakes for 1 minuto. While the armor is coated in rusty flakes, any não mágico weapon made of metal that hits you corrodes. After dealing damage, the weapon recebe a permanent and cumulative –1 penalty to damage rolls. If its penalty drops to –5, the weapon is destroyed. não mágico munição made of metal that hits you is destroyed after dealing damage. The armor can't be used this way again until the next dawn.

name: Ruyi Jingu Bang
desc:
You gain a +2 bonus to _attack and damage rolls_  made with this staff.

As an action you can command either or both ends of the staff to lengthen or shorten up to a total of 10 pés without increasing its weight. This expansion is quick but not fast enough to use as part of an attack. If the staff is longer than twice your height, weapon attacks with it have _disadvantage_ . There is no limit to the length the staff can alcance. The shortest it can shrink is 5 inches, at which point it has retracted entirely into its handle and appears to be a pesada sewing needle.

You can also use an action to command the staff to increase or decrease in weight and density by up to 1 pound per rodada. If the staff’s weight exceeds 10 lbs., any attacks made with it have _disadvantage_ , and if its weight increases to 17 lbs. or more it cannot be effectively used as a weapon. Like its length, there is no apparent limit to its maximum weight, but it cannot be reduced to less than 1 pound.

In addition, you can use a ação bônus to toss this magic staff into the air and speak a command word. When you do so, the staff begins to hover, flies up to 30 pés, and attacks uma criatura of your choice within 5 pés of it (+10 para acertar, 1d8+5 mágico dano contundente). While the staff hovers, you can use a ação bônus to cause it to fly up to 30 pés to another spot within 30 pés of you. As part of the same ação bônus, you can cause the staff to attack uma criatura within 5 pés of it. After the hovering staff attacks for the fourth time, it flies up to 30 pés and tries to return to your hand. If you have no hand free, it falls to the ground at your pés. If the staff has no unobstructed path to you, it moves as close to you as it can and then falls to the ground. It also ceases to hover if you grasp it or move more than 30 pés away from it.

name: Sack of Sacks
desc: Inside this hand-sized sack is a Medium-sized sack. There is no room to store anything inside the original sack. When you pull a sack out, roll 1d20 and add 1 for each sack pulled out in the last 24 horas. On a result of 20 or higher the hand-sized sack is empty and it becomes a mundane item. Otherwise there is another Medium-sized sack inside.

name: Sacrificial Knife
desc: Runes dance along the blade of this keen knife. Sacrificial Knife (Comum). While attuned to it, you can use this magic, rune-inscribed dagger as a spellcasting focus. Ceremonial Sacrificial Knife (Uncommon). More powerful versions of this blade also exist. While holding the greater version of this dagger, you can use it to perform a sacrificial ritual during a descanso curto. If you sacrifice a Tiny or Small criatura, you regain one expended 1st-level espaço de magia. If you sacrifice a Medium or larger criatura, you regain one expended 2nd-level espaço de magia.

name: Saddle of the Cavalry Casters
desc: This magic saddle adjusts its size and shape to fit the animal to which it is strapped. While a mount wears this saddle, criaturas have desvantagem on opportunity attacks against the mount or its rider. While you sit astride this saddle, you have vantagem on any checks to remain mounted and on Constituição teste de resistências to maintain Concentração on a spell when you take damage.

name: Sail of the Black Opal
desc:
Rumored to be crafted from the sailcloth of the notorious Black Opal, this pesada black canvas has been roughly sewn with human hair into a cloak.

As a ação bônus you can expend one charge to call on the ship’s necromantic power and gain 1d4+4 temporary pontos de vida. The sail has 3 charges and regains 1 charge for every hora spent submerged in seawater.

Additionally, if you are reduced to 0 pontos de vida while attuned to this item, you immediately become stable as the hair burns to ash, blowing away at the faintest breeze and leaving behind a mundane piece of bone-dry sailcloth.

name: Sanctuary Shell
desc: This seashell is intricately carved with protective runes. If you are carrying the shell and are reduced to 0 pontos de vida or incapacitado, the shell activates, creating a bubble of força that expands to surround you and forces any other criaturas out of your space. This sphere works like the wall of força spell, except that any criatura intent on aiding you can pass through it. The protective sphere lasts for 10 minutos, or until you regain at least 1 ponto de vida or are no longer incapacitado. When the protective sphere ends, the shell crumbles to dust.

name: Sand Arrow
desc: The shaft of this arrow is made of tightly packed white sand that discorporates into a blast of grit when it strikes a alvo. On a hit, the sand catches in the fittings and joints of metal armor, and the alvo's Deslocamento is reduced by 10 pés until it cleans or removes the armor. In addition, the alvo deve ter sucesso em a CD 11 teste de resistência de Constituição ou ficar cego até o final de seu próximo turno.

name: Sand Suit
desc: Created from the treated body of a destroyed Apaxrusl (see Tome of Beasts 2), this leather armor constantly sheds fine sand. The faint echoes of damned souls also emanate from the armor. While wearing this armor, you gain a +1 bonus to AC, and you can understand and speak Abissal. In addition, you can move through não mágico, unworked earth and stone at your Deslocamento. While doing so, you don't disturb the material you move through. Because the souls that once infused the apaxrusl remain within the armor, you are susceptible to effects that sense, alvo, or harm fiends, such as a paladin's Divine Smite or a ranger's Primeval Awareness. This armor has 3 charges, and it regains 1d3 expended charges daily at dawn. As a reação, when you are hit by an attack, you can expend 1 charge and make the armor flow like sand. Roll a 1d12 and reduce o dano you take by the number rolled.

name: Sandals of Sand Skating
desc: These leather sandals repel sand, leaving your pés free of particles and grit. While you wear these sandals in a desert, on a beach, or in an otherwise sandy environment, your andando Deslocamento becomes 30 pés, unless your andando Deslocamento is higher, and your Deslocamento isn't reduced while in não mágico difficult terrain made of sand. In addition, when you take the Dash action across sand, the extra movement you gain is double your Deslocamento instead of equal to your Deslocamento. With a Deslocamento of 30 pés, for example, you can move up to 90 pés on your turn if you dash across sand.

name: Sandals of the Desert Wanderer
desc: While you wear these soft leather sandals, you have resistance to dano de fogo. In addition, you ignore difficult terrain created by loose or deep sand, and you can tolerate temperatures of up to 150 degrees Fahrenheit.

name: Sanguine Lance
desc: This fiendish lance runs red with blood. You gain a +1 bonus to attack and damage rolls made with this magic weapon. When you hit a criatura that has blood with this lance, the alvo recebe an extra 1d6 dano necrótico, and you regain pontos de vida equal to half the amount of dano necrótico dealt.

name: Satchel of Seawalking
desc: This eel-hide leather pouch is always filled with an unspeakably foul-tasting, coarse salt. You can use an action to toss a handful of the salt onto the surface of an unoccupied space of water. The water in a 5-pé cube becomes solid for 1 minuto, resembling greenish-blue glass. This cube is buoyant and can support up to 750 pounds. When the duration expires, the hardened water cracks ominously and returns to a liquid state. If you toss the salt into an occupied space, the water congeals briefly then disperses harmlessly. If the satchel is opened underwater, the pouch is destroyed as its contents permanently harden. Once five handfuls of the salt have been pulled from the satchel, the satchel can't be used again until the next dawn.

name: Satyr Boots
desc: You gain an expertise die on Atuação checks made to dance while you wear these finely-crafted boots. As an action, you can transform your legs and pés into the furry haunches and cloven hooves of a goat. The transformation lasts for 1 minuto or until you use another action to return to your normal form. While transformed, your base Deslocamento becomes 40 pés, you gain an expertise die on Acrobacia checks, and you ignore _nonmagical difficult terrain_ . When the effect ends, the boots fall apart and become useless until a properly trained _satyr_  cobbler repairs them for you.

name: Scale MIlk
desc:
Contained in a small, clear bottle, the cap to this item is carefully sealed with thick wax. The gray tinge to the milky liquid and the aroma of putrid fruit once it is opened are off-putting, but if it has not spoiled scale milk is a powerful restorative.

If consumed within 1 hora of breaking the wax seal, you receive the benefits of both the _greater restoration_  and __heal_  spells.

If you consume this potion after the first hora, make a CD 18 Constituição _teste de resistência_ . em uma falha you take 6d8 dano de veneno and are _poisoned_  for the next hora. em um sucesso you take metade do dano and are envenenado until the end of their next turn.

name: Scalehide Cream
desc: As an action, you can rub this dull green cream over your skin. When you do, you sprout thick, olive-green scales like those of a Gigante lizard or green dragon that last for 1 hora. These scales give you a natural AC of 15 + your Constituição modifier. This natural AC doesn't combine with any worn armor or with a Destreza bonus to AC. A jar of scalehide cream contains 1d6 + 1 doses.

name: Scarab of Protection
desc:
If you hold this beetle-shaped medallion in your hand for 1 rodada, an inscription appears on its surface revealing its mágico Natureza. It provides two benefits while it is on your person:

* You have vantagem on teste de resistências against spells.
* The scarab has 12 charges. If you fail a teste de resistência against a necromancy spell or a harmful effect originating from an undead criatura, you can use your reação to expend 1 charge and turn the failed save into a successful one. The scarab crumbles into powder and is destroyed when its last charge is expended.

name: Scarab of Protection
desc:
After being held in your hand for 1 rodada, this scarab medallion shimmers with mágico inscriptions. The scarab has 12 charges, crumbling into dust when it has no charges left. 

This item has two benefits while it is on your person. First, you gain _advantage_  on _teste de resistências_  made against spells. Second, if you fail a teste de resistência against a necromancy spell or either an attack from or trait of an undead criatura, you may instead succeed on the teste de resistência by using your reação to expend a charge from the scarab.

name: Scarab of Rebirth
desc:
This coin-sized figurine of a scarab is crafted from an unidentifiable blue-gray metal, but it appears mundane in all other respects. When you speak its command word, it whirs to life and burrows into your flesh. You can speak the command word again to remove the scarab. While the scarab is embedded in your flesh, you gain the following:
- You no longer need to eat or drink.
- You can magically sense the presence of undead and pinpoint the location of any undead within 30 pés of you.
- Your ponto de vida maximum is reduced by 10.
- If you die, you return to life with half your maximum pontos de vida no início de your next turn. The scarab can't return you to life if you were beheaded, disintegrated, crushed, or similar full-body destruction. Afterwards, the scarab exits your body and goes dormant. It can't be used again until 14 dias have passed.

name: Scarf of Deception
desc: While wearing this scarf, you appear different to everyone who looks upon you for less than 1 minuto. In addition, you smell, sound, feel, and taste different to every criatura that perceives you. criaturas with visão verdadeira or visão cega can see your true form, but their other senses are still confounded. If a criatura studies you for 1 minuto, it can make a CD 15 Sabedoria (Percepção) check. em um sucesso, it perceives your real form.

name: Scent Sponge
desc: This sea sponge collects the scents of criaturas and objects. You can use an action to touch the sponge to a criatura or object, and the scent of the alvo is absorbed into the sponge. An unwilling alvo can make a CD 13 teste de resistência de Destreza, and if it succeeds, it is unaffected by the sponge. For 1 hora after its scent has been absorbed, the alvo gives off no smell and can't be detected or tracked by criaturas, spells, or other effects that rely on smell to detect or track the alvo. You can use an action to wipe the sponge on a criatura or object, masking its natural scent with the scent stored in the sponge. An unwilling alvo can make a CD 13 teste de resistência de Destreza, and if it succeeds, it is unaffected by the sponge. For 1 hora after its scent has been masked, the alvo gives off the smell of the criatura or object that was stored in the sponge. The effect ends early if the alvo's scent is replaced by another scent from the sponge or if the scent is cleaned away, which requires vigorous washing for 10 minutos with soap and water or similar materials. The sponge can hold a scent indefinitely, but it can hold only one scent at a time.

name: Scepter of Majesty
desc: While holding this bejeweled, golden rod, you can use an action to cast the enthrall spell (save CD 15) from it, exhorting those in range to follow you and obey your commands. When you finish speaking, 1d6 criaturas that failed their teste de resistência are affected as if by the dominate person spell. Each such criatura treats you as its ruler, obeying your commands and automatically fighting in your defense should anyone attempt to harm you. If you are also attuned to and wearing a Headdress of Majesty (see page 146), your enfeitiçado subjects have vantagem on attack rolls against any criatura that attacked you or that cast an obvious spell on you within the last rodada. The scepter can't be used this way again until the next dawn.

name: Schooled Weapon
desc:
Each of these weapons comes in a different form depending on the combat tradition it is associated with. You are proficiente with this magic weapon as long as you are attuned to it, and you gain a +1 bonus on _attack and damage rolls_  with it.

You cannot attune to this weapon if you do not know at least one combat maneuver from the tradition it is associated with. When you attune to this weapon, choose a combat maneuver from its associated tradition that you meet the prerequisites for. While you remain attuned to the weapon, you have access to that combat maneuver. 

In addition, any attacks you make with the weapon as part of a combat maneuver from the associated tradition gains an additional +1 bonus to attack and damage.

__**Table: Schooled Weapons**__
| **Magic Weapon**                  | **Weapon**      |
| --------------------------------- | --------------- |
| _Mattock of the Adamant Mountain_ | Maul            |
| _Bow of the Biting Zephyr_        | Longbow         |
| _Reflection of Mirror’s Glint_    | Dueling Dagger  |
| _Rapier of Mist and Shade_        | Rapier          |
| _Rapid Current’s Flow_            | Scimitar        |
| _Razor’s Edge_                    | Bastard Sword   |
| _Blade of the Sanguine Knot_      | Longsword       |
| _Spirited Steed’s Striker_        | Lance           |
| _Bite of Tempered Iron_           | Flail           |
| _Paw of Tooth and Claw_           | Punching Dagger |
| _Wave of the Unending Wheel_      | Glaive          |

name: Scimitar of Speed
desc: You gain a +2 bonus to attack and damage rolls made with this magic weapon. In addition, you can make one attack with it as a ação bônus on each of your turns.

name: Scimitar of Speed
desc: \[You gain a +2 bonus to _attack and damage rolls_  made with this magic scimitar, and on each of your turns you can use a ação bônus to make one attack with it.

name: Scimitar of the Desert Winds
desc: You gain a +1 bonus to attack and damage rolls made with this magic weapon. While holding or carrying this scimitar, you can tolerate temperatures as low as –50 degrees Fahrenheit or as high as 150 degrees Fahrenheit without any additional protection.

name: Scorn Pouch
desc: The heart of a lover scorned turns black and potent. Similarly, this small leather pouch darkens from brown to black when a criatura hostile to you moves within 10 pés of you.

name: Scorpion Feet
desc:
These thick-soled leather sandals offer comfortable and safe passage across shifting sands. While you wear them, you gain the following benefits:
- Your Deslocamento isn't reduced while in mágico or não mágico difficult terrain made of sand.
- You have vantagem on all ability checks and teste de resistências against natural hazards where sand is a threatening element.
- You have immunity to dano de veneno and vantagem on teste de resistências against being envenenado.
- You leave no tracks or other traces of your passage through sandy terrain.

name: Scoundrel's Gambit
desc: This fluted silver tube, barely two inches long, bears tiny runes etched between the grooves. While holding this tube, you can use an action to cast the magic missile spell from it. Once used, the tube can't be used to cast magic missile again until 12 horas have passed.

name: Scourge of Devotion
desc: This cat o' nine tails is used primarily for self-flagellation, and its tails have barbs of silver woven into them. You gain a +1 bonus to attack and damage rolls made with this magic weapon, and the weapon causa dano cortante instead of dano contundente. You can spend 10 minutos using the scourge in a self-flagellating ritual, which can be done during a descanso curto. If you do so, your ponto de vida maximum is reduced by 2d8. In addition, you have vantagem on Constituição teste de resistências that you make to maintain your Concentração on a spell when you take damage while your ponto de vida maximum is reduced. This ponto de vida maximum reduction can't be removed with the greater restoration spell or similar magic and lasts until you finish a descanso longo.

name: Scout's Coat
desc: This lightweight, woolen coat is typically left naturally colored or dyed in earth tones or darker shades of green. While wearing the coat, you can tolerate temperatures as low as –100 degrees Fahrenheit.

name: Scrap of Forbidden Text
desc:
This page of nonsense was torn from the diary of someone not well. As you focus on the strange symbols they begin to make a strange sort of sense—revealing hidden truths about the world. You can use an action to study the fragment of text to gain an expertise die on an Arcanismo or História check. You can’t do so again until you finish a _long rest_ .

If instead of studying the paper, you can use an action to eat it to automatically succeed on an Arcanismo or História check. You can wait until after making the check before deciding to eat the _scrap of forbidden text_, but you must decide before the Narrator says whether the roll succeeds or fails.

**Curse**. This scrap of text is cursed and eating it draws the attention of an aberrant criatura that seeks you out to involve you in its schemes.

name: Screaming Skull
desc: This skull looks like a normal animal or humanoid skull. You can use an action to place the skull on the ground, a table, or other surface and activate it with a command word. The skull's magic triggers when a criatura comes within 5 pés of it without speaking that command word. The skull emits a green glow from its eye sockets, shedding dim leve in a 15-pé radius, levitates up to 3 pés in the air, and emits a perfurante scream for 1 minuto that is audible up to 600 pés away. The skull can't be used this way again until the next dawn. The skull has AC 13 and 5 pontos de vida. If destroyed while active, it releases a burst of necromantic energy. cada criatura within 5 pés of the skull deve ter sucesso em a CD 11 teste de resistência de Sabedoria ou ficar amedrontado até o final de seu próximo turno.

name: Scrimshaw Comb
desc: Aside from being carved from bone, this comb is a beautiful example of functional art. It has 3 charges. As an action, you can expend a charge to cast invisibility. Unlike the standard version of this spell, you are invisível only to undead criaturas. However, you can attack criaturas who are not undead (and thus unaffected by the spell) without ending the effect. Casting a spell breaks the effect as normal. The comb regains 1d3 expended charges daily at dawn.

name: Scrimshaw Parrot
desc:
This parrot is carved from bits of whalebone and decorated with bright feathers and tiny jewels. You can use an action to affix the parrot to your shoulder or arm. While the parrot is affixed, you gain the following benefits: - You have vantagem on Sabedoria (Percepção) checks that rely on sight.
- You can use an action to cast the comprehend languages spell from it at will.
- You can use an action to speak the command word and activate the parrot. It records up to 2 minutos of sounds within 30 pés of it. You can touch the parrot at any time (no action required), stopping the recording. Commanding the parrot to record new sounds overwrites the previous recording. You can use a ação bônus to speak a different command word, and the parrot repeats the sounds it heard. Effects that limit or block sound, such as a closed door or the silence spell, similarly limit or block the sounds the parrot records.

name: Scroll of Conjuring
desc:
By using an action to recite the incantation inscribed on this scroll, you can conjure a criatura to assist you, chosen by the GM or determined by rolling a d8 and consulting the appropriate table. Once the criatura appears, the scroll crumbles to dust and is destroyed. The criatura vanishes after 8 horas or when it is reduced to 0 pontos de vida. The criatura is friendly to you and your companions, and it acts on your turn. You can use a ação bônus to command how the criatura moves and what action it recebe on its next turn, or to give it general orders, such as to attack your inimigos. In absence of such orders, the criatura acts in a fashion appropriate to its Natureza. Alternately, you can command the criatura to perform a single task, which it will do to the best of its ability. A task can be simple (“Remove the debris blocking this passage.”) or complex (“Search the castle, taking care to remain unnoticed. Take a count of the guards and their locations, then return here and draw me a map.”) but must be completable within 8 horas. | d8 | criatura | |
| --- | -------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | --- |
| 1 | Dust Mephit\|Dust/Ice Mephit\|Ice/Magma Mephit\|Magma mephit or Lantern Dragonette | ] |
| 2 | Hippogriff or Clockwork Soldier | |
| 3 | Imp/Quasit or Aviere | |
| 4 | Death Dog or Gigante Moth - Shockwing | |
| 5 | Centaur or Roggenwolf | |
| 6 | Ettercap or Clockwork Hound | |
| 7 | Ogre of Spider thief | |
| 8 | Griffon or Dragon - leve - Wyrmling | | | d8 | criatura |
| --- | ------------------------------------------------------ |
| 1 | Copper Dragon Wyrmling or Wind Wyrmling Dragon |
| 2 | Pegasus or Demon - Wind |
| 3 | Gargoyle or Drake - Hoarfrost |
| 4 | Grick or Kitsune |
| 5 | Hell Hound or Kobold - Swolbold |
| 6 | Winter Wolf or Clockwork Huntsman |
| 7 | Minotaur or Drake - Peluda |
