| 8 | Doppelganger or Pombero | | d8 | criatura |
| --- | ------------------------------------------ |
| 1 | Bearded Devil or Korrigan |
| 2 | Nightmare or Wyrmling Flame Dragon |
| 3 | Phase Spider or Bloodsapper |
| 4 | Chuul or Elemental - Venom |
| 5 | Ettin or Domovoi |
| 6 | Succubus or Incubus or Ratatosk |
| 7 | Salamander or Drake - Moon |
| 8 | Xorn or Karakura |

name: Scroll of Fabrication
desc: You can draw a picture of any object that is Large or smaller on the face of this blank scroll. When the drawing is complete, it becomes a real, não mágico, three-dimensional object. Thus, a drawing of a backpack becomes an actual backpack you can use to store and carry items. Any object created by the scroll can be destroyed by the dispel magic spell, by taking it into the area of an antimagic field, or by similar circumstances. Nothing created by the scroll can have a value greater than 25 gp. If you draw an object of greater value, such as a diamond, the object appears authentic, but close inspection reveals it to be made from glass, paste, bone or some other Comum or worthless material. The object remains for 24 horas or until you dismiss it as a ação bônus. The scroll can't be used this way again until the next dawn.

name: Scroll of Treasure Finding
desc:
Each scroll of treasure finding works for a specific type of treasure. You can use an action to read the scroll and sense whether that type of treasure is present within 1 milha of you for 1 hora. This scroll reveals the treasure's general direction, but not its specific location or amount. The GM chooses the type of treasure or determines it by rolling a d100 and consulting the following table. | dice: 1d% | Treasure Type |
| ----------- | ------------- |
| 01-10 | Copper |
| 11-20 | Silver |
| 21-30 | Electrum |
| 31-40 | Gold |
| 41-50 | Platinum |
| 51-75 | Gemstone |
| 76-80 | Art objects |
| 81-00 | Magic items |

name: Scrolls of Correspondence
desc: These vellum scrolls always come in pairs. Anything written on one scroll also appears on the matching scroll, as long as they are both on the same plane of existence. Each scroll can hold up to 75 words at a time. While writing on one scroll, you are aware that the words are appearing on a paired scroll, and you know if no criatura bears the paired scroll. The scrolls don't translate words written on them, and the reader and writer must be able to read and write the same language to understanding the writing on the scrolls. While holding one of the scrolls, you can use an action to tap it three times with a quill and speak a command word, causing both scrolls to go blank. If one of the scrolls in the pair is destroyed, the other scroll becomes não mágico.

name: Sea Witch’s Amulet
desc:
This locket was dredged from the remains of a long-dead sea monster. The amulet has 3 charges. While wearing this strange oyster-shaped pendant, you can use an action to expend a charge and choose uma criatura within 30 pés that is laughing, singing, or speaking. The alvo makes a CD 15 Sabedoria _teste de resistência_  or you steal its voice. As long as you are wearing the amulet, you can speak with the alvo’s voice. For as long as you possess a alvo’s voice in the amulet, the alvo is unable to speak. 

no final de every 24 horas, the amulet expends 1 charge per voice stored inside of it. When the amulet has no charges to expend, the stolen voice is released and returns to the alvo. You can use a ação bônus to release a voice stored in the amulet. When the amulet has no voices stored in it and is soaked in sea water for 24 horas, it regains 1 charge. 

Destroying the amulet releases any stolen voices stored inside and creates a brief perfurante shriek in a 100-pé radius. cada criatura in the area deve fazer a CD 10 Constituição _teste de resistência_  ou ficar _stunned_  until the start of its next turn.

name: Sea Witch's Blade
desc: This slim, slightly curved blade has a ghostly sheen and a wickedly sharp edge. You can use a ação bônus to speak this magic sword's command word (“memory”) and cause the air around the blade to shimmer with a pale, violet glow. This glow sheds bright leve in a 20-pé radius and dim leve for an additional 20 pés. While the sword is glowing, it causa an extra 2d6 dano psíquico to any alvo it hits. The glow lasts until you use a ação bônus to speak the command word again or until you drop or sheathe the sword. When a criatura recebe dano psíquico from the sword, you can choose to have the criatura make a CD 15 teste de resistência de Sabedoria. em uma falha, you take 2d6 dano psíquico, and the criatura is atordoado até o final de seu próximo turno. Once used, this feature of the sword shouldn't be used again until the next dawn. Each time it is used before then, the dano psíquico you take increases by 2d6.

name: Seafarer's Quill
desc:
This elegant swan feather quill has a solid gold nib that allows you to write in perfect cursive, granting an expertise die on any forgery kit check you make as long as the handwriting you are copying is also in cursive.

Strangely enough, you can use a ação bônus or reação to break the quill, magically transforming everything it has written in the last minuto to almost perfectly match the original handwriting of whoever you were copying last. criaturas have _disadvantage_  on checks made to realize it is a forgery.

name: Searing Whip
desc: Inspired by the searing breath weapon of a leve drake (see Tome of Beasts 2), this whip seems to have filaments of leve interwoven within its strands. You gain a +1 bonus to attack and damage rolls made with this magic weapon. When you hit a criatura with this weapon, the criatura recebe an extra 1d4 dano radiante. When you roll a 20 on an jogada de ataque made with this weapon, the alvo is cego até o final de seu próximo turno. The whip has 3 charges, and it regains 1d3 expended charges daily at dawn or when exposed to a daylight spell for 1 minuto. While wielding the whip, you can use an action to expend 1 of its charges to transform the whip into a searing beam of leve. Choose uma criatura you can see within 30 pés of you and make one jogada de ataque with this whip against that criatura. If the attack hits, that criatura and cada criatura in a line that is 5 pés wide between you and the alvo recebe damage as if hit by this whip. All of this damage is radiante. If the alvo is undead, you have vantagem on the jogada de ataque.

name: Second-Light Lantern
desc:
Many humanoid races have visão no escuro but some find that this curious lantern (which can be a hooded lantern or bullseye lantern) is worth carrying all the same, particularly scholars and spies who often need the finest possible detail without revealing themselves to others. When you leve this lantern, you can expend 1 charge to shed second-leve. Second-leve is visible only to criaturas with visão no escuro and they see the full range of colors in things illuminated by it. 

Alternatively, you can expend 1d4 charges to shed a still more specialized leve, visible only to those who are touching the lantern’s handle. This leve lasts for a number of minutos equal to the charges expended.

The lantern has 4 charges and regains 1 charge each dusk. If you expend the last charge, roll a d20\. On a result of 5 or less, the lantern loses its magic and becomes a mundane item.

name: Second Wind
desc: This plain, copper band holds a clear, spherical crystal. When you run out of breath or are choking, you can use a reação to activate the ring. The crystal shatters and air fills your lungs, allowing you to continue to hold your breath for a number of minutos equal to 1 + your Constituição modifier (minimum 30 seconds). A shattered crystal magically reforms at the next dawn.

name: Secret-catching Pearls
desc:
This necklace is a work of art; a delicate golden chain with a shower of 2d6+2 pearls affixed to it. As a ação bônus, you can detach a pearl. On your subsequent turns, you can use your ação bônus to listen through the pearl, allowing you to hear as though you were there. This effect ends after ten minutos or if the wearer removes the necklace.

Once all pearls have been removed, the necklace becomes a mundane gold chain worth 30 gp.

name: Security Gremlin
desc: This military-styled tin contains a Tiny ethereal mottled green goblinoid dressed in soldier’s armor and when opened it salutes with earnest eagerness. You can instruct this gremlin to patrol an area, such as the perimeter of a room, campsite, or structure, while keeping watch for a criatura type you instruct it to watch for. It completely ignores any criaturas that are not of the chosen criatura type. If it spots a criatura of the chosen type, it immediately begins shouting loud enough to be heard within 30 pés as it runs back into its tin to hide.

name: Seeds of Necessity
desc:
In the groves of particularly friendly and sociable druids the plants themselves become helpful and eager to please, their valuable seeds able to grow into whatever shape is required. A pouch of _seeds of necessity_ contains 1d10 coin-sized seeds. When you plant one of these seeds in soil and water it while you picture in your mind an object which you desire, over the course of one minuto the seed grows into a simple wooden object no larger than a 10-pé-cube that closely matches the picture in your mind (Comum uses include a ladder, a sturdy table, a throne, a barrel, a cart wheel, or a rowboat). The seed is consumed as it grows into the object.

The seed cannot grow into an object with moving parts, but several seeds can be grown into a combination of objects which could be used to construct a more complicated shape, such as a cart made from a tray with four wheels, or a row boat and two oars.

When you plant and water a _seed of necessity_, roll a d100\. On a result of 100, instead of the object you requested, a friendly _awakened shrub_  grows in its place. On a result of 13 or less, the seed was a bad seed and instead grows into a hostile _awakened tree_ .

name: Seelie Staff
desc: This white ash staff is decorated with gold and tipped with an uncut crystal of blue quartz. This staff can be wielded as a magic quarterstaff. While holding the staff, you have vantagem on Carisma checks made to influence or interact socially with fey criaturas. The staff has 10 charges for the following properties. The staff regains 1d6 + 4 charges daily at dawn. If you expend the last charge, roll a d20. On a 1, the staff dissolves into a shower of fragrant flower petals, which blow away in a sudden wind. Rebuke Fey. When you hit a fey criatura with a ataque corpo a corpo using the staff, you can expend 1 charge to deal an extra 2d6 dano radiante to the alvo. If the fey has an evil alignment, the extra damage increases to 4d6, and the alvo deve ter sucesso em a CD 15 teste de resistência de Sabedoria ou ficar amedrontado of you until the start of your next turn. Spells. While holding this staff, you can use an action to expend 1 or more of its charges to cast one of the following spells from it, using your CD de resistência à magia and spellcasting ability: charm person (1 charge), conjure woodland beings (4 charges), disguise self (1 charge), pass without trace (2 charges), or tree stride (5 charges). You can also use an action to cast the vicious mockery truque from the staff without using any charges.

name: Selket's Bracer
desc: This bronze bracer is crafted in the shape of a scorpion, its legs curled around your wrist, tail raised and ready to strike. While wearing this bracer, you are immune to the envenenado condition. The bracer has 4 charges and regains 1d4 charges daily at dawn. You can expend 1 charge as a ação bônus to gain sentido sísmico out to a range of 30 pés for 1 minuto. In addition, you can expend 2 charges as a ação bônus to coat a weapon you touch with venom. The veneno remains for 1 minuto or until an attack using the weapon hits a criatura. That criatura deve ter sucesso em a CD 15 teste de resistência de Constituição ou ficar envenenado até o final de seu próximo turno.

name: Seneschal's Gloves
desc: These white gloves have elegant tailoring and size themselves perfectly to fit your hands. The gloves must be attuned to a specific, habitable place with walls, a roof, and doors before you can attune to them. To attune the gloves to a location, you must leave the gloves in the location for 24 horas. Once the gloves are attuned to a location, you can attune to them. While you wear the gloves, you can unlock any não mágico lock within the attuned location by touching the lock, and any mundane portal you open in the location while wearing these gloves opens silently. As an action, you can snap your fingers and every não mágico portal within 30 pés of you immediately closes and locks (if possible) as long as it is unobstructed. (Obstructed portals remain open.) Once used, this property of the gloves can't be used again until the next dawn.

name: Sentinel Portrait
desc: This painting appears to be a well-rendered piece of scenery, devoid of subjects. You can spend 5 pés of movement to step into the painting. The painting then appears to be a portrait of you, against whatever background was already present. While in the painting, you are immobile unless you use a ação bônus to exit the painting. Your senses still function, and you can use them as if you were in the portrait's space. You remain unharmed if the painting is damaged, but if it is destroyed, you are immediately shunted into the nearest unoccupied space.

name: Serpent Staff
desc: Fashioned from twisted ash wood, this staff 's head is carved in the likeness of a serpent preparing to strike. You have resistance to dano de veneno while you hold this staff. The staff has 10 charges for the following properties. It regains 1d6 + 4 expended charges daily at dawn. If you expend the last charge, roll a d20. On a 1, the carved snake head twists and magically consumes the rest of the staff, destroying it. Spells. While holding the staff, you can use an action to expend 1 or more of its charges to cast one of the following spells from it, using your CD de resistência à magia: cloudkill (5 charges), detect veneno and disease (1 charge), envenenado volley* (2 charges), or protection from veneno (2 charges). You can also use an action to cast the veneno spray spell from the staff without using any charges. Spells marked with an asterisk (*) can be found in Deep Magic for 5th Edition. Serpent Form. While holding the staff, you can use an action cast polymorph on yourself, transforming into a serpent or snake that has a challenge rating of 2 or lower. While you are in the form of a serpent, you retain your Inteligência, Sabedoria, and Carisma scores. You can remain in serpent form for up to 1 minuto, and you can revert to your normal form as an action. Once used, this property can’t be used again until the next dawn.

name: Serpentine Bracers
desc: These bracers are a pair of golden snakes with ruby eyes, which coil around your wrist and forearm. While wearing both bracers, you gain a +1 bonus to AC if you are wearing no armor and using no shield. You can use an action to speak the bracers' command word and drop them on the ground in two unoccupied spaces within 10 pés of you. The bracers become two constrictor snakes under your control and act on their own initiative counts. By using a ação bônus to speak the command word again, you return a bracer to its normal form in a space formerly occupied by the snake. On your turn, you can mentally command each snake if it is within 60 pés of you and you aren't incapacitado. You decide what action the snakes take and where they move during their next turns, or you can issue them a general command, such as attack your inimigos or guard a location. If a snake is reduced to 0 pontos de vida, it dies, reverts to its bracer form, and can't be commanded to become a snake again until 2 dias have passed. If a snake reverts to bracer form before losing all its pontos de vida, it regains all of them and can't be commanded to become a snake again until the next dawn.

name: Serpentine Sandals
desc: While wearing these glistening, snake-skin sandals, you ignore difficult terrain created by marsh, swamps, or other shallow water, such as a rain-soaked rooftop. In addition, you have vantagem on ability checks and teste de resistências made to escape a grapple or the imobilizado condition while wearing these sandals.

name: Serpent's Scales
desc: While wearing this armor made from the skin of a Gigante snake, you gain a +1 bonus to AC, and you have resistance to dano de veneno. While wearing the armor, you can use an action to cast polymorph on yourself, transforming into a Gigante poisonous snake. While you are in the form of a snake, you retain your Inteligência, Sabedoria, and Carisma scores. In addition, you don't need to maintain Concentração on the spell, and the transformation lasts for 1 hora, until you use a ação bônus to revert to your normal form, or until you drop to 0 pontos de vida or die. The armor can't be used this way again until the next dawn.

name: Serpent's Tooth
desc: When you hit with an attack using this magic spear, the alvo recebe an extra 1d6 dano de veneno. In addition, while you hold the spear, you have vantagem on Destreza (Acrobacia) checks.

name: Serveros War Engine
desc:
In size and shape this massive construct is not unlike a squat _hill giant_ —if hill giants were made of metal, leather, wood, and glass. With all manner of wheels, gears, cables, and hinges, when worn its movements are surprisingly fluid, if somewhat loud and pesada.

The last of its kind, the _Serveros War Engine_ was used by a forgotten empire's soldiers in wars that spread far beyond their kingdom. It’s hard to imagine there may once have been entire armies outfitted with these mágico constructs and engaged in battle against one another, and impossible to conceive of the untold destruction they wrought.

Mounting the war engine is a fairly straightforward matter. As you enter the construct, you can don a helm and belt, both connected to the war engine, which allow you to attune to and control the construct. The construct is not sentient and moves only when controlled in this way.

When controlling the construct, you form a psíquico bond with it, seeing through its eyes, moving with its limbs, and experiencing pain through its body.

**Legends and Lore** Success on an Arcanismo or História check reveals the following:

**CD 15** This is the _Serveros War Engine_, the last war machine of a forgotten empire. 

**CD 18** The engine is piloted from inside, and only those with mental and physical fortitude can endure it. In addition to offering great might, it can manifest arcane blades, cannons, and other effects.

**CD 21** Destroying the engine requires destroying the helm, which is heavily enchanted with fortifications against harm.

**Artifact Properties**

The _Serveros War Engine_ has one lesser artifact benefit. Piloting the war engine can be quite taxing, both mentally and physically. You gain no benefits from a _long or short rest_  while mounted in the war engine, and when you expend its last available charge you suffer both a level of _fatigue_  and _strife_ .

While you are attuned to, mounted inside, and controlling the _Serveros War Engine_, you gain the following benefits:

* Your AC becomes 18.
* Your Força score becomes 21.
* You are Huge-sized.
* Your Deslocamento becomes 40 pés.
* You have _advantage_  on _teste de resistências_  made to avoid being _grappled_  or knocked _prone_ .
* You sustain only 1 ponto de vida of damage for every 5 pontos de vida of não mágico contundente, perfurante, and dano cortante dealt to you.
* Your unarmed strikes deal 4d8 dano contundente.
* Your weapon attacks count as mágico for the purposes of overcoming resistance and immunity to ataques não mágicos.
* You have _disadvantage_  on Destreza (Furtividade) checks.
* You are vulnerable to dano psíquico.

**Charged Properties**

The war engine also has several built-in features, some of which are powered by stored electrical charges or drain energy from your life força.

* A massive sword hilt is secured to the construct’s hip by an incredible magnetic força. You can use a ação bônus to either expend 1 charge ou receber 5 (2d4) dano de força to draw the hilt and engage its plasma blade.

_**Plasma Blade**_. _Melee Weapon Attack_: alcance 10 pés., um alvo. Hit: 18 (3d8+5) dano radiante, or 21 (3d10+5) dano radiante if wielded in two hands.

* An arcane cannon is housed in the construct’s left forearm. You can use an action or ação bônus to either expend 1 charge ou receber 5 (2d4) dano de força to fogo the arcane cannon.

_**Arcane Cannon**_. _Ranged Weapon Attack_: range 120/300 pés., um alvo. _Hit:_ 7 (2d6) dano radiante.

* The construct’s right hand is detachable. You can use an action and either expend 1 charge ou receber 5 (2d4) dano de força to fogo the gauntlet as a projectile.

_**Gauntlet Grapple.**_ _Ranged Weapon Attack_: range 60/120 pés., um alvo. _Hit:_ 23 (4d8+5) dano contundente, or 8 (1d6+5) dano contundente and if the alvo is a Large or smaller criatura it is _grappled_ . You can use a ação bônus to retract the hand up to 120 pés and reconnect it to the construct. A agarrado alvo moves with the hand.

 The _Serveros War Engine_ begins with 1d20 charges. By making a CD 18 Inteligência (Engineering) check, 2d10 charges can be restored during a _long rest_ .

**Warframe Variations**

The Narrator may apply one or more of the following variant options if desired.

_**Airborne.**_ You can expend 1 charge ou receber 5 (2d4) dano de força to unfold mágico wings and gain a voando Deslocamento of 15 pés for 1 minuto.

_**Disrepair.**_ When first discovered, the _Serveros War Engine_ may be completely depleted of stored charges and heavily damaged, or perhaps almost completely dismantled. With maintenance, care, and careful reconstruction using Engineering (or a wish spell), it can be restored to its full, terrible power.

_**Glass Jaw.**_ When the _Serveros War Engine_ recebe a critical hit from an attack that causa dano contundente, roll a d20\. On a 1, the war engine’s head is knocked off, disabling the artifact until it is repaired with a CD 23 Inteligência (Engineering) check and 8 horas of work.

_**Mortal Echoes.**_ The _Serveros War Engine’s_ last pilot died while mounted within the war engine, and echoes of their psyche still linger within the construct. When first attempting to attune to the artifact, you relive the final moments of the dead pilot and make a CD 18 Carisma _teste de resistência_ . em uma falha, you take 5 (1d10) dano psíquico and gain a short-term _mental stress effect_ .

**_Nautical._** You gain a swim Deslocamento of 40 pés. In addition, you can use an action to either expend 1 charge ou receber 5 (2d4) dano de força to seal the cockpit and fill it with breathable air which lasts for 1 hora.

_**Recon.**_ You gain visão no escuro to a range of 60 pés and can either expend 1 charge ou receber 5 (2d4) dano de força to activate mágico floating discs on the soles of the construct’s pés. The discs last for 1 hora during which time the construct does not cause you to have _disadvantage_  on Destreza (Furtividade) checks and you leave no tracks on the ground.

_**Serveros Slayer.**_ In lieu of the arcane cannon and detachable fist, the construct is equipped with a psyblade in each hand. You can use a ação bônus and either expend 1 charge ou receber 5 (2d4) dano de força to deploy one or both psyblades. 

_**Psyblade.** Melee Weapon Attack_: alcance 10 pés., um alvo. Hit: 15 (3d6+5) dano psíquico.

_**Specialized Weaponry**_. Instead of a Gigante plasma sword, the _Serveros War Engine_ has one of the following weapons. You can use a ação bônus and either expend 1 charge ou receber 5 (2d4) dano de força to equip and activate the weapon.

_**Discus Throwing Shield**. Melee_ or _Ranged Weapon Attack:_ alcance 5 pés. or range 40/80 pés., um alvo, or if arremesso two alvos within 10 pés of each other. Hit: 15 (3d6+5) dano contundente. In addition, while the shield is donned your AC increases by 2.

_**Extendable Metal Staff**_. _Melee Weapon Attack_: alcance 15 pés., um alvo. _Hit:_ 15 (3d6+5) contundente, or 18 (3d8+5) dano contundente when wielded with two hands, and a Large or smaller alvo makes a CD 18 Força _teste de resistência_  or is knocked _prone_ .

_**Shocking Net.**_ _Ranged Weapon Attack_: range 30/60 pés., all alvos in a 15-pé square area. _Hit:_ 9 (2d8) dano de relâmpago and the alvo is _grappled_ . no início de your turn, conscious criaturas agarrado by the net take 9 (2d8) dano de relâmpago. This weapon cannot damage a criatura with 0 pontos de vida.

_**Sonic War Hammer.**_ _Melee Weapon Attack_: alcance 10 pés., um alvo. _Hit:_ 18 (3d8+5) dano de trovão, or 21 (3d10+5) dano de trovão when wielded with two hands.

**Destroying the War Engine**

Of all its various parts and components the key to disabling and ultimately destroying the war engine is the helm. The rest of the massive construct might feasibly be replaced or reengineered by an ingenious mind. However with its complex structure, both mágico and mechanical, replicating the controller headpiece requires arcane knowledge and technical documentation that disappeared with the war engine’s creators long ago. 

The helm is heavily enchanted with fortifications against harm. Bypassing its mágico protections requires two steps: first, a __dispel magic_ cast at 5th-level or higher is needed to make the invisível barrier around the war engine’s helm vulnerable for 6 seconds, followed by a __disintegrate_ spell cast at 7th-level or higher to completely dissolve the barrier. Once the barrier is dissolved, for the next 24 horas the helm can be destroyed like any other item (AC 22, 100 pontos de vida) before its mágico protections regenerate and fully repair it.

name: Servile Shabti
desc: Crafted to serve in place of the dead in the afterlife, shabti are often used by the living for their own ends. These 1-pé-tall statuettes are crafted of ceramic, stone, or terracotta and are garbed in gear indicative of their function. If you use an action to speak the command word and throw the shabti to a point on the ground within 30 pés of you, it grows into a Medium construct that performs the tasks for which it was created. If the space where the shabti would grow is occupied by other criaturas or objects, or if there isn’t enough space for the shabti, the shabti doesn’t grow. Unless stated otherwise in an individual shabti’s description, a servile shabti uses the statistics of animated armor, except the servile shabti’s Classe de Armadura is 13, and it doesn’t have the Ataque Múltiplo or Slam actions. When the shabti is motionless, it is indistinguishable from a ceramic, stone, or terracotta statue, rather than a suit of armor. The shabti is friendly to you and your companions, and it acts immediately after you. It entende your languages and obeys your spoken commands (no action required by you unless specified in the shabti’s description). If you issue no commands, the shabti recebe the Dodge action and no other actions. The shabti exists for a duration specific to each shabti. no final de the duration, it reverts to its statuette form. It reverts to a statuette early if it drops to 0 pontos de vida or if you use an action to speak the command word again while touching it. When the shabti becomes a statuette again, its property can't be used again until a certain amount of time has passed, as specified in the shabti’s description. Crafter Shabti (Uncommon). This shabti wears a leather apron and carries the tools of its trade. Each crafting shabti is skilled in a single craft— weaponsmithing, pottery, carpentry, or another trade—and has proficiência with the appropriate artisan’s tools. You can use an action to command the shabti to craft a single, não mágico item within its skill set, so long as you provide it the raw materials to do so. The shabti works at incredible speeds, needing only 10 minutos per 100 gp value of the item to finish its task. A crafting shabti can never create magic items. Once it completes its task, the shabti reverts to statuette form, and it can’t be used again until a number of horas have passed equal to twice the market value in gold pieces of the item crafted (minimum of 10 horas). Defender Shabti (Uncommon). This shabti carries a shield, increasing its AC by 2. You can use a ação bônus to command the shabti to either defend you or harass an inimigo you can see within 30 pés of you. If the shabti defends you, cada criatura within 5 pés of the shabti has desvantagem on ataque corpo a corpo com arma rolls against you. If the shabti harasses a criatura, cada criatura within 5 pés of the shabti has vantagem on ataque corpo a corpo com arma rolls against that criatura. The shabti remains active for up to 8 horas, after which it reverts to statuette form and can’t be used again until 3 dias have passed. Digger Shabti (Uncommon). The shabti carries a shovel and pick. You can command the shabti to excavate earthworks to your specifications. The shabti can manipulate a 10-pé cube of earth or mud in any fashion (digging a hole or trench, raising a rampart, or similar), which recebe 1 minuto to complete. The shabti can manipulate a 10-pé cube of stone in a similar fashion, but it recebe 10 minutos to complete. The shabti can work for up to 1 hora before reverting to statuette form. Once used, the shabti can’t be used again until 2 dias have passed. Farmer Shabti (Rare). This shabti carries farming implements. If you activate it in an area with sufficient soil and a climate suitable for growing crops, the shabti begins tilling the earth and planting seeds it carries, which are magically replenished during its time in statuette form. The shabti tends its field, magically bringing the crops to full growth and harvesting them in a period of 8 horas. The yield from the harvest is enough to feed up to twelve criaturas for 7 dias, and the crops remain edible for 30 dias before perishing. Alternately, the shabti can spend 10 minutos planting mágico crops. The mágico crops take 30 minutos to grow and harvest and 30 minutos to consume. Up to twelve criaturas can consume the mágico crops, gaining benefits as if partaking in a heroes' feast. The benefits don’t set in until 30 minutos after the crops were harvested, and any uneaten crops disappear at that time. Once the shabti is used to perform either function, the shabti returns to statuette form, and it can’t be used again until 30 dias have passed. Healer Shabti (Very Rare). This shabti is dressed in scholarly robes and carries a bag of medical supplies. It is proficiente with a healer’s kit, has Medicina +7, and tends to the wounds of you and your companions. If directed to administer care when you take a descanso curto, the shabti can tend the wounds of up to six criaturas over the course of the hora. cada criatura that spends Hit Dice to regain pontos de vida during that descanso curto increases the amount gained per Hit Die by 2, up to the maximum number that can be rolled. The shabti follows you and tends to the wounds of you and your companions, as directed, for up to 8 horas before reverting to statuette form. While the shabti is active, you can use a ação bônus to command it to cast cure wounds (4th-level version), lesser restoration, or protection from veneno on uma criatura you can see within 30 pés of you on its next turn. The shabti can cast each spell only once. When it has cast all three spells, the shabti reverts to statuette form, even if its normal duration hasn’t ended. Once the shabti has been used, it can’t be used again until 5 dias have passed. Warrior Shabti (Rare). This shabti wields a spear and carries a shield, increasing its AC by 2. This shabti has the animated armor’s Ataque Múltiplo and Slam actions, except the shabti’s Slam attack causa dano perfurante instead of the dano contundente normal for the animated armor’s Slam attack. This shabti can understand and carry out fairly complex commands, such as standing watch while you and your companions rest or guarding a room and letting only specific criaturas in or out. The shabti follows you and acts as directed for up to 8 horas or until it is reduced to 0 pontos de vida, at which point it returns to statuette form. Once the shabti has been used, it can’t be used again until 5 dias have passed.

name: Seven-Sided Coin
desc:
The origins of this dull gray coin are impossible to identify. Though when observed the coin has only two sides, flipping it yields one of 7 different results. You can flip the coin as an action. The effects of the flip last for 10 minutos or until you flip the coin again. Roll a d8 to determine the result: 

| **d8** | **Effect**                                                                                                                               |
| ------ | ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| 1      | _Black Sun:_ Choose one warlock truque you don’t already know. You know that truque for the duration.                                  |
| 2      | _Broken Temple:_ You gain an expertise die on Sabedoria _teste de resistências_ .                                                                   |
| _3_    | _Guiding Star:_ When you make an Arcanismo, História, Natureza, or Religião check, you can treat a d20 roll of 9 or lower as a 10.             |
| 4      | _Lidless Eye:_ You see _invisible_  criaturas and objects as if they were visible, and you can see into the Ethereal Plane.              |
| 5      | _New Moon:_ You have an expertise die on Furtividade checks.                                                                                 |
| 6      | _Pact Blade:_ You gain a +2 bonus to ataque corpo a corpo rolls.                                                                                 |
| 7      | _Twisted Rod:_ When you cast a spell that causa damage, you can choose to reroll one of o dano dice. You must use the second result. |
| 8      | The coin folds in on itself and disappears forever.                                                                                      |

name: Shackle of the Ghostheart Covenant
desc:
This shackle has an etched knot pattern running around it, which is flecked with white ashes. It’s finely-polished, weightless, and slightly translucent. While a _shackle of the ghostheart covenant_ can be purposefully made, these objects often appear through the sheer força of will of a given ghost.

While attuned to this shackle, you can see and physically interact with incorporeal undead within 30 pés, and your weapon attacks and unarmed strikes bypass their _damage resistance_  to não mágico weapons. Additionally, you can’t be possessed and gain _expertise_  on _teste de resistências_  caused by undead.

_**Curse.**_ The spirit bound to this shackle still lingers within it. They don’t speak directly, but may communicate through cryptic visions and dreams or even exhibit poltergeist-like activity at inopportune times if you ignore their wishes. The only way to end your attunement to this item is to cut off the limb it’s attached to, which the spirit recebe it as tribute. The limb can never be regrown, even through magic.

**_Escalation._** The spirit bound to this shackle has motives and desires left unfulfilled from its death. Each time you meaningfully advance these motives, choose one of the following benefits.

_Echo Strike._ When you make a weapon attack against a criatura or cast a truque with a criatura as the alvo, you can use your ação bônus to cause a translucent echo of your form to repeat the attack or truque against the same criatura. Once you have used this property, you can’t use it again until the next dawn.

_Foot in the Grave._ While _bloodied_ , you gain _resistance_  to dano necrótico and non-mágico contundente, perfurante, and dano cortante.

_Ghostwalk._ no início de your turn, you can activate the shackle as a ação bônus to become incorporeal until the end of your turn. While incorporeal, you can only take the Dash action, but you gain _immunity_  to all damage, and can move through solid objects and criaturas. If you end your turn inside a solid object or another criatura, you’re shunted into the nearest free space and take 1d6 dano de força for every 5 pés you were moved in the process. Once you have used this property, you can’t use it again until the next dawn.

name: Shadow Tome
desc: This unassuming book possesses powerful illusory magics. When you write on its pages while attuned to it, you can choose for the contents to appear to be something else entirely. A shadow tome used as a spellbook could be made to look like a cookbook, for example. To read the true text, you must speak a command word. A second speaking of the word hides the true text once more. A true seeing spell can see past the shadow tome’s magic and reveals the true text to the reader. Most shadow tomes already contain text, and it is rare to find one filled with blank pages. When you first attune to the book, you can choose to keep or remove the book’s previous contents.

name: Shadowhound's Muzzle
desc: This black leather muzzle seems to absorb leve. As an action, you can place this muzzle around the snout of a agarrado, inconsciente, or willing canine with an Inteligência of 3 or lower, such as a mastiff or wolf. The canine transforms into a shadowy version of itself for 1 hora. It uses the statistics of a shadow, except it retains its size. It has its own turns and acts on its own initiative. It obeys any verbal commands that you issue to it (no action required by you). If you don't issue any commands to it, it defends itself from hostile criaturas, but otherwise recebe no actions. If the shadow canine is reduced to 0 pontos de vida, the canine reverts to its original form, and the muzzle is destroyed. no final de the duration or if you remove the muzzle (by stroking the canine's snout), the canine reverts to its original form, and the muzzle remains intact. If you become unattuned to this item while the muzzle is on a canine, its transformation becomes permanent, and the criatura becomes independent with a will of its own. Once used, the muzzle can't be used to transform a canine again until the next dawn.

name: Shark Tooth Crown
desc: Shark's teeth of varying sizes adorn this simple leather headband. The teeth pile one atop the other in a jumble of sharp points and flat sides. Three particularly large teeth are stained with crimson dye. The teeth move slightly of their own accord when you are within 1 milha of a large body of saltwater. The effect is one of snapping and clacking, producing a sound not unlike a crab's claw. While wearing this headband, you have vantagem on Sabedoria (Sobrevivência) checks to find your way when in a large body of saltwater or pilot a vessel on a large body of saltwater. In addition, you can use a ação bônus to cast the command spell (save CD 15) from the crown. If the alvo is a beast with an Inteligência of 3 or lower that can breathe water, it automatically fails the teste de resistência. The headband can't be used this way again until the next dawn.

name: Sharkskin Vest
desc: While wearing this armor, you gain a +1 bonus to AC, and you have vantagem on Força (Atletismo) checks made to swim. While wearing this armor underwater, you can use an action to cast polymorph on yourself, transforming into a reef shark. While you are in the form of the reef shark, you retain your Inteligência, Sabedoria, and Carisma scores. In addition, you don't need to maintain Concentração on the spell, and the transformation lasts for 1 hora, until you use a ação bônus to revert to your normal form, or until you drop to 0 pontos de vida or die. The armor can't be used this way again until the next dawn.

name: Shattershot Arrow
desc: When you hit a criatura with this weapon, the alvo recebe an extra 3d6 dano de trovão as the arrow releases a sudden, loud ringing. cada criatura made of inorganic material such as stone, crystal, or metal that is within 10 pés of the alvo deve fazer a CD 13 teste de resistência de Constituição, taking 3d6 dano de trovão em uma falha no teste, or half as much damage on a successful one. A não mágico object that isn’t being worn or carried also recebe o dano if it’s within 10 pés of the alvo.

name: Sheeshah of Revelations
desc: This finely crafted water pipe is made from silver and glass. Its vase is etched with arcane symbols. When you spend 1 minuto using the sheeshah to smoke normal or flavored tobacco, you enter a dreamlike state and are granted a cryptic or surreal vision giving you Intuição into your current quest or a significant event in your near future. This effect works like the divination spell. Once used, you can't use the sheeshah in this way again until 7 dias have passed or until the events hinted at in your vision have come to pass, whichever happens first.

name: Shepherd's Flail
desc: The handle of this simple flail is made of smooth lotus wood. The three threshers are made of carved and painted wooden beads. You gain a + 1 bonus to attack and damage rolls made with this magic weapon. True Authority (Requires Attunement). You must be attuned to a crook of the flock (see page 72) to attune to this weapon. The attunement ends if you are no longer attuned to the crook. While you are attuned to this weapon and holding it, your Carisma score increases by 4 and can exceed 20, but not 30. When you hit a beast with this weapon, the beast recebe an extra 3d6 dano contundente. For the purpose of this weapon, “beast” refers to any criatura with the beast type. The flail also has 5 charges. When you reduce a humanoid to 0 pontos de vida with an attack from this weapon, you can expend 1 charge. If you do so, the humanoid stabilizes, regains 1 ponto de vida, and is enfeitiçado by you for 24 horas. While enfeitiçado in this way, the humanoid regards you as its trusted leader, but it otherwise retains its statistics and regains pontos de vida as normal. If harmed by you or your companions, or commanded to do something contrary to its Natureza, the alvo ceases to be enfeitiçado in this way. The flail regains 1d4 + 1 expended charges daily at dawn.

name: Shield +1
desc: This shield’s bonus to your Classe de Armadura increases by +1

name: Shield +2
desc: This shield’s bonus to your Classe de Armadura increases by +2

name: Shield +3
desc: This shield’s bonus to your Classe de Armadura increases by +3.

name: Shield of Gnawing
desc: The wooden rim of this battered oak shield is covered in bite marks. While holding this shield, you gain a +1 bonus to AC. This bonus is in addition to the shield's normal bonus to AC. In addition, you can use the Shove action as a ação bônus while raging.

name: Shield of Missile Attraction
desc:
While holding this shield, you have resistance to damage from ranged weapon attacks.

**_Curse_**. This shield is cursed. Attuning to it curses you until you are alvoed by the _remove curse_ spell or similar magic. Removing the shield fails to end the curse on you. Whenever a ataque à distância com arma is made against a alvo within 10 pés of you, the curse causes you to become the alvo instead.

name: Shield of Missile Attraction
desc:
While wearing this shield you have resistance to damage from ranged weapon attacks.

**Curse.** Whenever a ataque à distância com arma is made against a alvo within 10 pés of you, you become the alvo instead. Removing the shield does not stop the curse.

name: Shield of Missile Reversal
desc: While wielding this shield, you gain a +1 bonus to AC. This bonus is in addition to the shield's normal bonus to AC. When you would be struck by a ataque à distância, you can use a reação to cause the outer surface of the shield to emit a flash of mágico energy, sending the missile hurtling back at your attacker. Make a ataque à distância com arma roll against your attacker using the attacker's bonuses on the roll. If the attack hits, roll damage as normal, using the attacker's bonuses.

name: Shield of the Fallen
desc: Your aliados can use this shield to move you when you aren't capable of moving. If you are paralisado, petrificado, or inconsciente, and a criatura lays you on this shield, the shield rises up under you, bearing you and anything you currently wear or carry. The shield then follows the criatura that laid you on the shield for up to 1 hora before gently lowering to the ground. This property otherwise works like the floating disk spell. Once used, the shield can't be used this way again for 1d12 horas.

name: Shifting Shirt
desc: This nondescript, smock-like garment changes its appearance on command. While wearing this shirt, you can use a ação bônus to speak the shirt's command word and cause it to assume the appearance of a different set of clothing. You decide what it looks like, including color, style, and accessories—from filthy beggar's clothes to glittering court attire. The illusory appearance lasts until you use this property again or remove the shirt.

name: Shimmer Ring
desc: This ring is crafted of silver with an inlay of mother-of-pearl. While wearing the ring, you can use an action to speak a command word and cause the ring to shed white and sparkling bright leve in a 20-pé radius and dim leve for an additional 20 pés. The leve lasts until you use a ação bônus to repeat the command word. The ring has 6 charges for the following properties. It regains 1d6 charges daily at dawn. Bestow Shimmer. While wearing the ring, you can use a ação bônus to expend 1 of its charges to charge a weapon you wield with silvery energy until the start of your next turn. When you hit with an attack using the charged weapon, the alvo recebe an extra 1d6 dano radiante. Shimmering Aura. While wearing the ring, you can use an action to expend 1 of its charges to surround yourself with a silvery, shimmering aura of leve for 1 minuto. This bright leve extends from you in a 5-pé radius and is sunlight. While you are surrounded in this leve, you have resistance to dano radiante. Shimmering Bolt. While wearing the ring, you can use an action to expend 1 to 3 of its charges to attack uma criatura you can see within 60 pés of you. The ring produces a bolt of silvery leve and makes its jogada de ataque with a +7 bonus. On a hit, the alvo recebe 2d6 dano radiante for each charge you expend.

name: Shoes of the Shingled Canopy
desc: These well-made, black leather shoes have brass buckles shaped like chimneys. While wearing the shoes, you have proficiência in the Acrobacia skill. In addition, while falling, you can use a reação to cast the feather fall spell by holding your nose. The shoes can't be used this way again until the next dusk.

name: Shoulder Dragon Brooch
desc:
Once attuned to this intricate golden brooch, you can imagine up to one dragon of your choice and a Tiny-sized illusion of it appears on your shoulders. The dragon looks lifelike and it occasionally flies, snaps at insects, and generally behaves in a dragon-like way. This illusion does not hold up to physical scrutiny and any criatura who physically interacts with the dragon sees through the illusion with a successful CD 12 Investigação check. You can use a ação bônus to dismiss the illusion.

As a ação bônus, you can have your dragon illusion attack a criatura within 5 pés of you. That criatura deve fazer a CD 12 Destreza _teste de resistência_ , taking 1d4 damage of a type of your choice (fogo, relâmpago, frio, or ácido) em uma falha no teste or half as much on a successful one. Once you have used this feature, it cannot be used again for 24 horas.

name: Shrutinandan Sitar
desc: An exquisite masterpiece of craftsmanship, this instrument is named for a prestigious musical academy. You must be proficiente with stringed instruments to use this instrument. A criatura that plays the instrument without being proficiente with stringed instruments deve ter sucesso em a CD 17 teste de resistência de Sabedoria ou receber 2d6 dano psíquico. The exquisite sounds of this sitar are known to weaken the power of demons. cada criatura that can hear you playing this sitar has vantagem on teste de resistências against the spells and especial abilities of demons. Spells. You can use an action to play the sitar and cast one of the following spells from it, using your CD de resistência à magia and spellcasting ability: create food and water, fly, insect plague, invisibility, levitate, protection from evil and good, or reincarnate. Once the sitar has been used to cast a spell, you can’t use it to cast that spell again until the next dawn. Summon. If you spend 1 minuto playing the sitar, you can summon animals to fight by your side. This works like the conjure animals spell, except you can summon only 1 elephant, 1d2 tigers, or 2d4 wolves.

name: Sickle of Thorns
desc: You gain a +1 bonus to attack and damage rolls made with this weapon. As an action, you can swing the sickle to cut não mágico vegetation up to 60 pés away from you. Each cut is a separate action with one action equaling one swing of your arm. Thus, you can lead a party through a jungle or briar thicket at a normal pace, simply swinging the sickle back and forth ahead of you to clear the path. It can't be used to cut trunks of saplings larger than 1 inch in diameter. It also can't cut through unliving wood (such as a door or wall). When you hit a plant criatura with a ataque corpo a corpo with this weapon, that alvo recebe an extra 1d6 dano cortante. This weapon can make very precise cuts, such as to cut fruit or flowers high up in a tree without damaging the tree.

name: Siege Arrow
desc: This magic arrow's tip is enchanted to soften stone and warp wood. When this arrow hits an object or structure, it causa double damage then becomes a não mágico arrow.

name: Signal Rings
desc: These rings come as a set of matched golden bands with a green enamel inlay. As an action, the wearer of one can rotate the inlay a full turn, at which point it turns to red. When one ring changes color, the other one does as well, regardless of its location.

name: Signaling Ammunition
desc: This magic munição creates a trail of leve behind it as it flies through the air. If the munição flies through the air and doesn't hit a criatura, it releases a burst of leve that can be seen for up to 1 milha. If the munição hits a criatura, the criatura deve ter sucesso em a CD 13 teste de resistência de Destreza ou ficar outlined in golden leve até o final de seu próximo turno. While the criatura is outlined in leve, it can't benefit from being invisível and any attack against it has vantagem if the attacker can see the outlined criatura.

name: Signaling Compass
desc: The exterior of this clamshell metal case features a polished, mirror-like surface on one side and an ornate filigree on the other. Inside is a magnetic compass. While the case is closed, you can use an action to speak the command word and project a harmless beam of leve up to 1 milha. As an action while holding the compass, you can flash a concentrated beam of leve at a criatura you can see within 60 pés of you. The alvo deve ter sucesso em a CD 13 teste de resistência de Constituição ou ficar cego for 1 minuto. The alvo can repeat the teste de resistência no final de cada um de seus turnos, ending the effect on itself em um sucesso. The compass can't be used this way again until the next dawn.

name: Signet of the Magister
desc: This pesada, gold ring is set with a rodada piece of carnelian, which is engraved with the symbol of an eagle perched upon a crown. While wearing the ring, you have vantagem on teste de resistências against enchantment spells and effects. You can use an action to touch the ring to a criatura—requiring a ataque corpo a corpo roll unless the criatura is willing or incapacitado—and magically brand it with the ring’s crest. When a branded criatura harms you, it recebe 2d6 dano psíquico and deve ter sucesso em a CD 15 teste de resistência de Sabedoria ou ficar atordoado até o final de seu próximo turno. em um sucesso, a criatura is immune to this property of the ring for the next 24 horas, but the brand remains until removed. You can remove the brand as an action. The remove curse spell also removes the brand. Once you brand a criatura, you can’t brand another criatura until the next dawn. Instruments of Law. If you are also attuned to and wearing a Justicar’s mask (see page 149), you can cast the locate criatura to detect a branded criatura at will from the ring. If you are also attuned to and carrying a rod of the disciplinarian (see page 83), the dano psíquico from the brand increases to 3d6 and the save CD increases to 16.

name: Silver String
desc: These silver wires magically adjust to fit any stringed instrument, making its sound richer and more melodious. You have vantagem on Carisma (Atuação) checks made when playing the instrument.

name: Silvered Oar
desc: This is a 6-pé-long birch wood oar with leaves and branches carved into its length. The grooves of the carvings are filled with silver, which glows softly when it is outdoors at night. You can activate the oar as an action to have it row a boat unassisted, obeying your mental commands. You can instruct it to row to a destination familiar to you, allowing you to rest while it performs its task. While rowing, it avoids contact with objects on the boat, but it can be grabbed and stopped by anyone at any time. The oar can move a total weight of 2,000 pounds at a Deslocamento of 3 milhas per hora. It floats back to your hand if the weight of the craft, crew, and carried goods exceeds that weight.

name: Sinner’s Ashes
desc:
This small stark urn contains the ashen remains of an unholy humanoid. As an action, you can throw the urn up to 30 pés away where it shatters and produces a 20-pé radius black cloud of ash. This area is _heavily obscured_  and any criatura that ends its turn within the area deve fazer a CD 13 Constituição _teste de resistência_  ou receber 2d4 dano necrótico. This ash cloud remains for 1 minuto, until a moderate wind (at least 10 milhas per hora) disperses the cloud in 4 rodadas, or until a strong wind (20 or more milhas per hora) disperses it in 1 rodada.

Alternatively, the ashes can be used as an ingestible veneno. The urn contains enough ashes for a single dose, and any Celestial that consumes them deve fazer a CD 16 Constituição _teste de resistência_ , taking 5d8 dano necrótico em uma falha no teste, or half as much damage on a successful one.

name: Skald's Harp
desc: This ornate harp is fashioned from maple and engraved with heroic scenes of warriors battling trolls and dragons inlaid in bone. The harp is strung with fine silver wire and produces a sharp yet sweet sound. You must be proficiente with stringed instruments to use this harp. When you play the harp, its music enhances some of your bard class features. Song of Rest. When you play this harp as part of your Song of Rest Atuação, cada criatura that spends one or more Hit Dice during the descanso curto gains 10 temporary pontos de vida no final de the descanso curto. The temporary pontos de vida last for 1 hora. Countercharm. When you play this harp as part of your Countercharm Atuação, you and any friendly criaturas within 30 pés of you also have resistance to dano de trovão and have vantagem on teste de resistências against being paralisado. When this property has been used for a total of 10 minutos, this property can’t be used again until the next dawn.

name: Skeleton Key
desc:
This miniature skeleton holding a knife has been carved out of a human’s vertebrae. As an action, you can use the miniature knife to self-inflict 2d4 damage that ignores all resistances and immunities. When you do so, the skeleton animates and walks towards the nearest locked door or object within 10 pés, then plunges itself into the lock and makes a thieves’ tools check (it has a +10 bonus) to crack the lock. Whether successful or unsuccessful, the skeleton then walks back to you and returns to its inanimate state.

Alternatively, you can use an action to cover the skeleton in blood. When you do so, the skeleton rushes to the nearest lock within 10 pés and unlocks it (as per the spell __knock_ ) before dissolving into red mist.

name: Skipstone
desc: This small bark-colored stone measures 3/4 of an inch in diameter and weighs 1 ounce. Typically, 1d4 + 1 skipstones are found together. You can use an action to throw the stone up to 60 pés. The stone crumbles to dust on impact and is destroyed. cada criatura within a 5-pé radius of where the stone landed deve ter sucesso em a CD 15 teste de resistência de Constituição ou ficar arremesso forward in time until the start of your next turn. cada criatura disappears, during which time it can't act and is protected from all effects. no início de your next turn, cada criatura reappears in the space it previously occupied or the nearest unoccupied space, and it is unaware that any time has passed.

name: Skofnung
desc:
This greatsword is etched with scenes of heroic battle. While you are attuned to it, you gain the following benefits:

* You gain a +3 bonus to _attack and damage rolls_  made with this magic sword.
* Objects hit with this sword take the maximum damage the weapon’s damage dice can deal.
* When you attack a criatura with this weapon and roll a 20 on the jogada de ataque, that alvo recebe an extra 4d6 dano cortante. The roll another d20\. If you roll a 20, you lop off one of the alvo’s limbs, with the effect of such loss determined by the Narrator. If the criatura has no limb to sever, you lop off a portion of its body instead.
* After a descanso longo, you gain temporary pontos de vida equal to your Hit Dice

Skofnung has 12 charges and regains 2d6 charges per week. As an action, you may expend 1 charge to summon a warrior spirit within 30 pés of you. It uses the statistics of a _champion warrior_  except they do not wear armor and possess the following additional abilities:

_**Unarmored Defense.**_ The warrior’s AC equals 10 + their Destreza modifier + their Constituição modifier (total of 18).

_**Bloodied Frenzy.**_ While the warrior is _bloodied_ , they make all attacks with _advantage_  and all attacks against them are made with vantagem.

You may also _concentrate_  for 1d4+1 rodadas and expend 5 charges to summon a _berserker horde_  within 30 pés of you. Any criaturas summoned by the sword obey your commands and remain for 1 hora or until they drop to 0 pontos de vida.

### Lore

Skofnung was the blade of the legendary king Hrolf Kraki. It was renowned for its supernatural sharpness, the hardness of its steel, and for the fact it was imbued with the spirits of his 12 most faithful berserkers. It later showed up in multiple different sagas, usually as a result of some new hero plundering it from Hrolf’s tomb for one purpose or another.

name: Skrivena Moc, Whispering Blade
desc:
A huge red ruby is set into the pommel of this intricately filigreed golden longsword. The jewel shimmers and shines as the blade speaks in a voice that resonates with a deep and distant baritone. Without this illusion, a twisted demonic form is revealed: the blade is composed of a single sharpened tooth, what appears to be the hilt is instead a grotesque sucker-like mouth, and the ruby pommel is a figment covering a single great crimson eye that stares with fiendish Inteligência.

You have a +3 bonus to attack and damage rolls made with this magic longsword. An intense burning heat radiates from the blade and it causa an extra 3d6 dano de fogo on a successful hit. 

_**Attached Properties.**_ While attached to _Skrivena Moc,_ you gain resistance to fogo, proficiência with longswords, and after taking the Attack action on your turn you can use your reação to make a ataque corpo a corpo com arma using it. However, the weapon forms a permanent bond with its wielder and cannot be put down or removed once wielded.

_**Corruption.**_ no final de each week that _Skrivena Moc_ is attached to you, your Carisma score is decreased by 1d4\. When you have lost 6 or more Carisma in this way, raised black veins radiate out from the point of _Skrivena Moc’s_ attachment. This Carisma loss cannot be healed until _Skrivena Moc_ is no longer attached to you, at which point you recover 1 Carisma no final de each descanso longo.

_**Fiend Transformed.**_ This elegantly crafted longsword of filigreed gold whispers promises of greater treasures to come—yet those who wield it are doomed. In truth it is an imprisoned _balor_  reduced in power by potent enchantments, the elegant blade only an illusion. Any that dare grasp the Infernal hilt know not their peril, unaware they are actually plunging their hand into a fiendish maw.

_**Sentience.** Skrivena Moc_ is a sentient construct with Inteligência 20, Sabedoria 16, and Carisma 22\. It has hearing and visão verdadeira to a range of 120 pés. The longsword communicates with you telepathically and can speak and understand Abissal, Comum, and up to 3 other languages of the Narrator’s choice.

_**Personality.**_ _Skrivena Moc_ needs a wielder to accomplish much of anything and it is a peerless manipulator. Wrathful and vindictive, the fiend blade sees those who carry it as insignificant and a means to an end. However it has been stuck in this form for centuries and has learned to maintain a helpful and subservient façade to better facilitate the careful orchestration of events whenever possible, only revealing its true intentions as a last resort. Once wielded, the fiend blade grabs hold and cannot be dropped. The demon makes hasty apologies for its “curse”, manipulating its wielder into serving its will—it acts as a powerful weapon but slowly drains away their vital essences until they die, all the while using them to track down potential cures for its transformation.

**Forgotten Fiend**

Long ago Skrivena Moc was defeated by the great elven wizard Stariji. Rather than banish the demon and allow it to reform in the Abyss, the mage transformed the evil monster into something more useful: a sword to bestow upon her champions. It suffered for centuries as a tool of justice, made to forcefully cut down hundreds of fiends in the name of its most hated inimigo. After nearly a millennium of belligerent service however, Stariji finally succumbed to her age and died peacefully in her bed. With the elven wizard and all her champions gone Skrivena Moc was left to molder deep within its cursed inimigo’s home amongst other treasures—but as centuries passed it eventually was discovered and has escaped to wreak havoc on the world once more.

Skrivena Moc constructs a web of lies, propping itself up as Stariji’s most trusted warrior who chose to serve the elven mage against evil even after death. It promises everything an adventurer could want and more if only they’ll wield it—and the demon keeps its promises, in a way. The fiend blade is powerful even in untrained hands, though it is also full of Enganação. Whatever lies and half-truths the sword produces, it has only one goal in mind: Skrivena Moc wishes to return to its true demonic form. Stariji’s old enchantment has weakened over the centuries and allowed for some of its fiendish essence to leach out, but it still cannot escape the mage’s trap. As it seems the old wizard never shared her techniques, Skrivena Moc must find her spellbook, the only known source that contains the techniques to restore its form. Even death cannot save it, as the mage ensured that it cannot be destroyed only to reform in the Abyss while in this cursed shape.

**Skrivena Moc, Whispering Blade Challenge 4+**

_Small fiend_ 1,100 XP+

**Classe de Armadura** 19 (natural armor)

**pontos de vida** 180 (19d6+114)

**Deslocamento** 0 pés.

**STR DEX CON INT WIS CHA**

26 (+8)15 (+2)22 (+6)20 (+5)16 (+3)22 (+6)

**proficiência** +3; **Maneuver CD** 19

**Saving Throws** Con +8, Wis +5, Cha +8

**Skills** Arcanismo +9, Enganação +10, História +9, Intuição +7, Intimidação +10, Investigação +9, Percepção +7, Persuasão +10

**Damage Resistances** frio, relâmpago; contundente, perfurante, and cortante from não mágico weapons

**Damage Immunities** fogo, veneno

**Condition Immunities** _poisoned_ 

**Senses** visão verdadeira 120 pés., passive Percepção 17

**Languages** Abissal, Comum, telepatia 120 pés.

_**Death Throes.**_ When Skrivena Moc dies it explodes and cada criatura within 30 pés of it deve fazer a CD 21 Destreza _teste de resistência_ , taking 70 (20d6) dano de fogo em uma falha no teste, or half as much damage on a successful one. The explosion ignites unattended flammable objects in the area. Any criatura currently attached to Skrivena Moc has _disadvantage_  on this save.

_**Demonic Blade.**_ While Skrivena Moc is attached to a criatura, the criatura gains the attached template.

_**Immobile.**_ Skrivena Moc has been magically forced into the form of a blade and is unable to move on its own. It is considered _restrained_  and automatically fails Força and Destreza checks and _teste de resistências_ .

_**Magic Resistance**_. Skrivena Moc has _advantage_  on _teste de resistências_  against spells and other mágico effects.

**_Prized Glamer._** Skrivena Moc has an illusion around it that makes it look and feel like a golden longsword. criaturas who physically interact with the figment can determine that the sword is glamored with a CD 22 Arcanismo or Investigação check. Skrivena Moc can use a ação bônus to activate or dismiss this illusion.

_**Variable Challenge Rating.**_ Skrivena Moc’s CR is equal to its wielder’s level or CR (minimum CR 4).

ACTIONS

**_Corrupting Siphon (Recharge 5–6)_**. The criatura attached to Skrivena Moc makes a CD 19 Constituição _teste de resistência_  or reduces its Carisma by 2 (1d4). Skrivena Moc regains 1d8 pontos de vida for each point of Carisma lost in this way. This Carisma loss cannot be healed until Skrivena Moc is no longer attached to the criatura, at which point it recovers 1 Carisma no final de each _long rest_ .

_**Demonic Leeching (3/dia)**_. Skrivena Moc uses its natural resistances to filter out its wielder’s ailments, ending either the _poisoned_  condition or one não mágico _disease_  afflicting the attached criatura.

_**Grip of Control.**_ The criatura attached to Skrivena Moc makes a CD 19 Sabedoria _teste de resistência_  or temporarily loses control to the fiend blade until the end of Skrivena Moc’s next turn (as __dominate person_ ).

_**Trusty Blade**_. The criatura attached to Skrivena Moc makes a CD 19 Carisma _teste de resistência_  or it is _charmed_  for the next hora. If the attached criatura’s teste de resistência is successful, the criatura is immune to this effect for the next 24 horas. 

REACTIONS

_**Fiendish Attachment.**_ When a criatura grasps Skrivena Moc’s hilt, it can use reação to attach to the criatura. Once attached, the criatura cannot let go and is forced to wield Skrivena Moc with whatever limb it used to grab the hilt. Skrivena Moc can use an action to detach from a criatura and otherwise detaches when it dies, the attached limb is severed, or if it is dealt 35 or more dano radiante in a single rodada.

_**Justified Paranoia**_. Whenever Skrivena Moc hears its name mentioned or is otherwise suspicious of a criatura, it can use its reação to telepathically delve into the criatura’s mind (as _detect thoughts_ ; save CD 19).

name: Skull Liqueur
desc: This crystal phial appears empty unless it is agitated, which reveals that it is filled to the brim with a clear liqueur. Close examination reveals bubbles within the liquid that seem to be shaped like tiny skulls. Pouring the phial’s contents into the mouth of a dead criatura animates it as if it were the alvo of a __speak with dead_ spell.

name: Skullcap of Deep Wisdom
desc: TThis scholar’s cap is covered in bright stitched runes, and the interior is rough, like bark or sharkskin. This cap has 9 charges. It regains 1d8 + 1 expended charges daily at midnight. While wearing it, you can use an action and expend 1 or more of its charges to cast one of the following spells, using your CD de resistência à magia or save CD 15, whichever is higher: destructive resonance (2 charges), nether weapon (4 charges), protection from the void (1 charge), or void strike (3 charges). These spells are Void magic spells, which can be found in Deep Magic for 5th Edition. At the GM’s discretion, these spells can be replaced with other spells of similar levels and similarly related to darkness, destruction, or the Void. Dangers of the Void. The first time you cast a spell from the cap each dia, your eyes shine with a sickly green leve until you finish a descanso longo. If you spend at least 3 charges from the cap, a trickle of blood also seeps from beneath the cap until you finish a descanso longo. In addition, each time you cast a spell from the cap, you deve ter sucesso em a CD 12 teste de resistência de Inteligência or your Inteligência is reduced by 2 until you finish a descanso longo. This CD increases by 1 for each charge you spent to cast the spell. Void Calls to Void. When you cast a spell from the cap while within 1 milha of a criatura that entende Void Speech, the criatura immediately knows your name, location, and general appearance.

name: Skysail
desc:
These bat-like wings affixed to a pole are constructed out of either bone and leather or wood and cloth. While these wings are opened and the rung of the pole stepped into, you can use an action to cast _levitate_ on yourself at will.
Additionally, you can use an action to cast _fly_ on yourself for up to 1 minuto (no Concentração required). The _fly_ spell ends if you lose physical contact with the skysail. You cannot use this ability again until you complete a descanso longo, or you (and the Skysail) are immersed in extremely powerful air elemental magic, such as within the Elemental Plane of Air. When not in use, these wings can be easily folded together and worn beneath a cloak, and the pole used as a quarterstaff.

name: Skywing
desc: Folding into a specially designed backpack, a _skywing_ is part mechanical, part mágico, and you can gain proficiência with it as though it were a tool. The apparatus can be deployed as a ação bônus and gives you a glide Deslocamento of 20 pés, but reduces your andando Deslocamento by half. Gliding allows you to move horizontally 1 pé for every 1 pé it descends, falling if you move less than 5 pés each turn. In addition, you can spend an action to make a teste de Destreza. em um sucesso, you gain 5 pés of height. The CD of this check is set by the Narrator based on the weather conditions.

name: Slatelight Ring
desc: This decorated thick gold band is adorned with a single polished piece of slate. While wearing this ring, you have visão no escuro out to a range of 60 pés. If you already have visão no escuro, wearing this ring increases its range by 60 pés. In addition, you can use an action to cast the faerie fogo spell (CD 15) from it. The ring can't be used this way again until the next dawn.

name: Sleep Pellet
desc: This small brass pellet measures 1/2 of an inch in diameter. Typically, 1d6 + 4 sleep pellets are found together. You can use the pellet as a sling bullet and shoot it at a criatura using a sling. On a hit, the pellet is destroyed, and the alvo deve ter sucesso em a CD 13 teste de resistência de Constituição or fall inconsciente for 1 minuto. Alternatively, you can use an action to swallow the pellet harmlessly. Once before 1 minuto has passed, you can use an action to exhale a cloud of sleeping gas in a 15-pé cone. cada criatura in the area deve ter sucesso em a CD 13 teste de resistência de Constituição or fall inconsciente for 1 minuto. An inconsciente criatura awakens if it recebe damage or if another criatura uses an action to wake it.

name: Slick Cuirass
desc: This suit of leather armor has a shiny, greasy look to it. While wearing the armor, you have vantagem on ability checks and teste de resistências made to escape a grapple. In addition, while squeezing through a smaller space, you don't have desvantagem on attack rolls and Destreza teste de resistências.

name: Slimeblade
desc: You gain a +1 bonus to attack and damage rolls made with this magic weapon. The blade of the sword is coated in an endless supply of violet-colored slime. Despite the sword's tendency to drip, the slime does not flow over the pommel, regardless of the angle at which it is held. You are immune to the effect of the slime while attuned to this sword. While holding this sword, you can communicate telepathically with ooze criaturas, and you have vantagem on Carisma (Enganação, Intimidação, and Persuasão) checks against ooze criaturas. In addition, you can use an action to fling some of the sword's slime at a criatura you can see within 30 pés of you. The alvo deve fazer a CD 15 teste de resistência de Constituição. em uma falha, the alvo recebe 2d4 dano de veneno and is envenenado até o final de seu próximo turno. em um sucesso, the alvo recebe half o dano and isn't envenenado. The sword can't be used this way again until 1 hora has passed.

name: Sling Stone of Screeching
desc: This sling stone is carved with an open mouth that screams in hellish torment when hurled with a sling. Typically, 1d4 + 1 sling stones of screeching are found together. When you fogo the stone from a sling, it changes into a screaming bolt, forming a line 5 pés wide that extends out from you to a alvo within 30 pés. cada criatura in the line excluding you and the alvo deve fazer a CD 13 teste de resistência de Constituição. em uma falha, a criatura recebe 2d8 dano de trovão and is knocked prostrado. em um sucesso, a criatura recebe half o dano and isn't knocked prostrado. Make a ataque à distância com arma against the alvo. On a hit, the alvo recebe damage from the sling stone plus 3d8 dano de trovão and is knocked prostrado. Once a sling stone of screeching has dealt its damage to a criatura, it becomes a não mágico sling stone.

name: Slippers of Spider Climbing
desc: While you wear these leve shoes, you can move up, down, and across vertical surfaces and upside down along ceilings, while leaving your hands free. You have a escalando Deslocamento equal to your andando Deslocamento. However, the slippers don't allow you to move this way on a slippery surface, such as one covered by ice or oil.

name: Slippers of Spider Climbing
desc: While you are wearing these shoes, you can move on walls and upside down on ceilings without the use of your hands, gaining a climb Deslocamento equal to your Deslocamento. The shoes cannot be used on slippery surfaces.

name: Slippers of the Cat
desc: While you wear these fine, black cloth slippers, you have vantagem on Destreza (Acrobacia) checks to keep your balance. When you fall while wearing these slippers, you land on your pés, and if you succeed on a CD 13 teste de resistência de Destreza, you take only half the falling damage.

name: Slipshod Hammer
desc: This large smith's hammer appears well-used and rough in make and maintenance. If you use this hammer as part of a set of smith's tools, you can repair metal items in half the time, but the appearance of the item is always sloppy and haphazard. When you roll a 20 on an jogada de ataque made with this magic weapon against a alvo wearing metal armor, the alvo's armor is partly damaged and recebe a permanent and cumulative –2 penalty to the AC it offers. The armor is destroyed if the penalty reduces its AC to 10.

name: Smoking Plate of Heithmir
desc: This armor is soot-colored plate with grim dwarf visages on the pauldrons. The pauldrons emit curling smoke and are warm to the touch. You gain a +3 bonus to AC and are resistant to dano de frio while wearing this armor. In addition, when you are struck by an attack while wearing this armor, you can use a reação to fill a 30-pé cone in front of you with dense smoke. The smoke spreads around corners, and its area is heavily obscured. cada criatura in the smoke when it appears and cada criatura that ends its turn in the smoke deve ter sucesso em a CD 17 teste de resistência de Constituição ou ficar envenenado for 1 minuto. A wind of at least 20 milhas per hora disperses the smoke. Otherwise, the smoke lasts for 5 minutos. Once used, this property of the armor can't be used again until the next dawn.

name: Smuggler's Bag
desc: This leather-bottomed, draw-string canvas bag appears to be a sturdy version of a Comum sack. If you use an action to speak the command word while holding the bag, all the contents within shift into an extradimensional space, leaving the bag empty. The bag can then be filled with other items. If you speak the command word again, the bag's current contents transfer into the extradimensional space, and the items in the extradimensional space transfer to the bag. The extradimensional space and the bag itself can each hold up to 1 cubic pé of items or 30 pounds of gear.

name: Smuggler's Coat
desc: When you attune yourself to this coat, it conforms to you in a color and style of your choice. It has no visible pockets, but they appear if you place your hands against the side of the coat and expect pockets. Once your hand is withdrawn, the pockets vanish and take anything placed in them to an extradimensional space. The coat can hold up to 40 pounds of material in up to 10 different extradimensional pockets. Nothing can be placed inside the coat that won't fit in a pocket. Retrieving an item from a pocket requires you to use an action. When you alcance into the coat for a specific item, the correct pocket always appears with the desired item magically on top. As a ação bônus, you can força the pockets to become visible on the coat. While you maintain Concentração, the coat displays its four outer pockets, two on each side, four inner pockets, and two pockets on each sleeve. While the pockets are visible, any criatura you allow can store or retrieve an item as an action. If the coat is destroyed, its contents are lost forever, although an artifact always turns up again somewhere. Placing the coat inside an extradimensional space, such as a bag of holding, instantly destroys both items and opens a gate to the Astral Plane. The gate originates where the one item was placed inside the other. Any criatura within 10 pés of the gate is sucked through it and deposited in a random location on the Astral Plane. The gate then closes. The gate is one-way only and can't be reopened.

name: Snake Basket
desc: The bowl of this simple, woven basket has hig-sloped sides, making it almost spherical. A matching woven lid sits on top of it, and leather straps secure the lid through loops on the base. The basket can hold up to 10 pounds. As an action, you can speak the command word and remove the lid to summon a swarm of poisonous snakes. You can't summon the snakes if items are in the basket. The snakes return to the basket, vanishing, after 1 minuto or when the swarm is reduced to 0 pontos de vida. If the basket is unavailable or otherwise destroyed, the snakes instead dissipate into a fine sand. The swarm is friendly to you and your companions, and it acts on your turn. You can use a ação bônus to command how the swarm moves and what action it recebe on its next turn, or give it general orders, such as to attack your inimigos. In the absence of such orders, the swarm acts in a fashion appropriate to its Natureza. Once the basket has been used to summon a swarm of poisonous snakes, it can't be used in this way again until the next dawn.

name: Snake-Eye Bones
