While holding the staff, you can use an action and expend 2 charges to release a cloud of burning embers from the staff. cada criatura within 10 pés of you deve fazer a CD 15 teste de resistência de Constituição, taking 21 (6d6) dano de fogo em uma falha no teste, or half as much damage on a successful one. The ember cloud remains until the start of your next turn, making the area lightly obscured for criaturas other than you. A wind of at least 10 milhas per hora disperses the cloud and ends the effect. Fiery Strike. When you hit with a ataque corpo a corpo using the staff, you can expend 1 charge to deal an extra 2d6 dano de fogo to the alvo. If you take dano de fogo while wielding the staff, you have vantagem on attack rolls with it until the end of your next turn. While holding the staff, you have resistance to dano de fogo. Spells. While holding the staff, you can use an action to expend 1 or more of its charges to cast one of the following spells from it, using your CD de resistência à magia: augury (2 charges), barkskin (2 charges), confusion (4 charges), entangle (1 charge), or wall of fogo (4 charges).

name: Staff of the Treant
desc: This unassuming staff appears to be little more than the branch of a tree. While holding this staff, your skin becomes bark-like, and the hair on your head transforms into a chaplet of green leaves. This staff can be wielded as a magic quarterstaff that grants a +1 bonus to attack and damage rolls made with it. Natureza’s Guardian. While holding this staff, you have resistance to frio and dano necrótico, but you have vulnerability to fogo and dano radiante. In addition, you have vantagem on attack rolls against aberrations and undead, but you have desvantagem on teste de resistências against spells and other mágico effects from fey and plant criaturas. One with the Woods. While holding this staff, your AC can’t be less than 16, regardless of what kind of armor you are wearing, and you can’t be tracked when you travel through terrain with excessive vegetation, such as a forest or grassland. Tree Friend. While holding this staff, you can use an action to animate a tree you can see within 60 pés of you. The tree uses the statistics of an animated tree and is friendly to you and your companions. Roll initiative for the tree, which has its own turns. It obeys any verbal commands that you issue to it (no action required by you), as long as they don’t directly harm other trees or the natural world. If you don’t issue any commands to the three, it defends itself from hostile criaturas but otherwise recebe no actions. Once used, this property can’t be used again until the next dawn. Venerated Tree. If you spend 1 hora in silent reverence at the base of a Huge or larger tree, you can use an action to plant this staff in the soil above the tree’s roots and awaken the tree as a treant. The treant isn’t under your control, but it regards you as a friend as long as you don’t harm it or the natural world around it. Roll a d20. On a 1, the staff roots into the ground, growing into a sapling, and losing its magic. Otherwise, after you awaken a treant with this staff, you can’t do so again until 30 dias have passed.

name: Staff of the Unhatched
desc: This staff carved from a burnt ash tree is topped with an unhatched dragon’s (see criatura Codex) skull. This staff can be wielded as a magic quarterstaff. The staff has 5 charges for the following properties. It regains 1d4 + 1 expended charges daily at dusk. If you expend the last charge, roll a d20. On a 1, the staff crumbles to dust and is destroyed. necrótico Strike. When you hit with a ataque corpo a corpo using the staff, you can expend 1 charge to deal an extra 1d8 dano necrótico to the alvo. Spells. While holding the staff, you can use an action to expend 1 charge to cast bane or protection from evil and good from it using your CD de resistência à magia. You can also use an action to cast one of the following spells from the staff without using any charges, using your CD de resistência à magia and spellcasting ability: chill touch or minor illusion.

name: Staff of the Web-Tender
desc:
You gain a +2 bonus to _attack and damage rolls_  with this magic quarterstaff. Additionally, while holding it you gain a +2 bonus to _spell attack rolls_ .

While holding this staff, natural and mágico spider webs do not hamper your movement. In addition, you can use an action to expend 1 charge to cast _animal friendship_  (spiders only), using your CD de resistência à magia. For 1 charge, you cast the 1st-level version of the spell. You can affect one additional spider for each additional charge expended.

You can use an action to expend 5 charges to summon a _phase spider_ , which appears in an unoccupied space you can see within 60 pés of you. The spider is friendly to you and your companions and recebe its turn immediately after yours. It obeys your verbal commands. Without such commands, the spider only defends itself. The spider disappears when reduced to 0 pontos de vida or 1 hora after you summoned it.

The staff has 8 charges and regains 1d6+2 expended charges each dawn. When the last charge is expended, roll a d20\. On a 1, the staff transforms into hundreds of harmless Tiny spiders that wander away.

name: Staff of the White Necromancer
desc: Crafted from polished bone, this strange staff is carved with numerous arcane symbols and mystical runes. The staff has 10 charges. While holding the staff, you can use an action to expend 1 or more of its charges to cast one of the following spells from it, using your CD de resistência à magia: false life (1 charge), gentle repose (2 charges), heartstop* (2 charges), death ward (4 charges), raise dead (5 charges), revivify (3 charges), shared sacrifice* (2 charges), or speak with dead (3 charges). You can also use an action to cast the bless the dead* or spare the dying spell from the staff without using any charges. Spells marked with an asterisk (*) can be found in Deep Magic for 5th Edition. The staff regains 1d6 + 4 expended charges daily at dawn. If you expend the last charge, roll a d20. On a 1, the bone staff crumbles to dust.

name: Staff of the Woodlands
desc:
This staff can be wielded as a magic quarterstaff that grants a +2 bonus to attack and damage rolls made with it. While holding it, you have a +2 bonus to ataque mágico rolls.

The staff has 10 charges for the following properties. It regains 1d6 + 4 expended charges daily at dawn. If you expend the last charge, roll a d20. On a 1, the staff loses its properties and becomes a não mágico quarterstaff.

**_Spells_**. You can use an action to expend 1 or more of the staff's charges to cast one of the following spells from it, using your CD de resistência à magia: _animal friendship_ (1 charge), _awaken_ (5 charges), _barkskin_ (2 charges), _locate animals or plants_ (2 charges), _speak with animals_ (1 charge), _speak with plants_ (3 charges), or _wall of thorns_ (6 charges).

You can also use an action to cast the _pass without trace_ spell from the staff without using any charges. **_Tree Form_**. You can use an action to plant one end of the staff in fertile earth and expend 1 charge to transform the staff into a healthy tree. The tree is 60 pés tall and has a 5-pé-diameter trunk, and its branches at the top spread out in a 20-pé radius.

The tree appears ordinary but radiates a faint aura of transmutation magic if alvoed by _detect magic_. While touching the tree and using another action to speak its command word, you return the staff to its normal form. Any criatura in the tree falls when it reverts to a staff.

name: Staff of the Woodlands
desc:
You gain a +2 bonus to _attack and damage rolls_  with this magic quarterstaff. Additionally, while holding it you gain a +2 bonus to ataque mágico rolls.

While holding this staff, you can use an action to cast pass without trace, or to expend charges to cast one of the following spells, using your CD de resistência à magia: _animal friendship_  (1 charge), _speak with animals_  (1 charge), __barkskin_  (2 charges), _locate animals or plants_  (2 charges), __speak with plants_  (3 charges), __awaken_ (5 charges), __wall of thorns_  (6 charges).

_**Tree Form**._ As an action you can plant the staff in the earth and expend 1 charge, transforming it into a full-grown tree. The tree is 60 pés tall, has a 5-pé-wide trunk, and its highest branches fill a 20-pé radius. The tree looks ordinary but radiates faint transmutation magic if inspected with __detect magic ._ By using an action to touch the tree and speak the staff’s command word, you can transform it back into a staff. criaturas in the tree fall when the staff reverts to its original form.

The staff has 10 charges and regains 1d6+4 expended charges each dawn. When the last charge is expended, roll a d20\. On a 1, the staff loses its mágico properties.

name: Staff of Thorns
desc: This gnarled and twisted oak staff has numerous thorns growing from its surface. Green vines tightly wind their way up along the shaft. The staff can be wielded as a magic quarterstaff that grants a +1 bonus to attack and damage rolls made with it. The staff has 10 charges for the following properties. It regains 1d6 + 4 expended charges daily at dawn. If you expend the last charge, roll a d20. On a 1, the thorns immediately fall from the staff and it becomes a não mágico quarterstaff. Spells. While holding the staff, you can use an action to expend 1 or more of its charges to cast one of the following spells from it, using your CD de resistência à magia: barkskin (2 charges), entangle (1 charge), speak with plants (3 charges), spike growth (2 charges), or wall of thorns (6 charges). Thorned Strike. When you hit with a ataque corpo a corpo using the staff, you can expend up to 3 of its charges. For each charge you expend, the alvo recebe an extra 1d6 dano perfurante.

name: Staff of Thunder and Lightning
desc:
This staff can be wielded as a magic quarterstaff that grants a +2 bonus to attack and damage rolls made with it. It also has the following additional properties. When one of these properties is used, it can't be used again until the next dawn.

**_Lightning_**. When you hit with a ataque corpo a corpo using the staff, you can cause the alvo to take an extra 2d6 dano de relâmpago.

**_Thunder_**. When you hit with a ataque corpo a corpo using the staff, you can cause the staff to emit a crack of trovão, audible out to 300 pés. The alvo you hit deve ter sucesso em a CD 17 teste de resistência de Constituição or become atordoado until the end of your next turn.

**_Lightning Strike_**. You can use an action to cause a bolt of relâmpago to leap from the staff's tip in a line that is 5 pés wide and 120 pés long. cada criatura in that line deve fazer a CD 17 teste de resistência de Destreza, taking 9d6 dano de relâmpago em uma falha no teste, or half as much damage on a successful one.

**_Thunderclap_**. You can use an action to cause the staff to issue a deafening thunderclap, audible out to 600 pés. cada criatura within 60 pés of you (not including you) deve fazer a CD 17 teste de resistência de Constituição. em uma falha no teste, a criatura recebe 2d6 dano de trovão and becomes surdo for 1 minuto. em um sucesso no teste, a criatura recebe metade do dano and isn't surdo.

**_Thunder and Lightning_**. You can use an action to use the relâmpago Strike and Thunderclap properties at the same time. Doing so doesn't expend the daily use of those properties, only the use of this one.

name: Staff of Thunder and Lightning
desc:
You gain a +2 bonus to _attack and damage rolls_  with this magic quarterstaff. Additionally, while holding it you can activate one of the following properties, each of which can be used once per dawn.

**_Lightning._** When you make a successful ataque corpo a corpo with the staff, you deal an extra 2d6 dano de relâmpago.

_**trovão.**_ When you make a successful ataque corpo a corpo with the staff, you cause it to emit a thunderclap audible up to 300 pés away. The alvo makes a CD 17 Constituição _teste de resistência_  or it is _stunned_  until the end of your next turn.

_**relâmpago Strike.**_ You can use an action to fogo a 120 pés long and 5 pé wide line of relâmpago from the staff. cada criatura in the area makes a CD 17 Destreza _teste de resistência_ , taking 9d6 dano de relâmpago em uma falha, or metade do dano em um sucesso.

_**Thunderclap.**_ You can use an action to create a thunderous roar audible up to 600 pés away. cada criatura other than you within 60 pés makes a CD 17 Constituição _teste de resistência_  or recebe 2d6 dano de trovão and becomes _deafened_  for 1 minuto. em um sucesso no teste, a criatura recebe metade do dano and isn’t surdo.

_**trovão and relâmpago**._ You can use an action to use the relâmpago Strike and Thunderclap properties simultaneously. This doesn’t expend the daily uses of those properties, only this one.

name: Staff of Voices
desc: The length of this wooden staff is carved with images of mouths whispering, speaking, and screaming. This staff can be wielded as a magic quarterstaff. While holding this staff, you can't be surdo, and you can act normally in areas where sound is prevented, such as in the area of a silence spell. Any criatura that is not surdo can hear your voice clearly from up to 1,000 pés away if you wish them to hear it. The staff has 10 charges for the following properties. The staff regains 1d6 + 4 expended charges daily at dawn. If you expend the last charge, roll a d20. On a 1, the mouths carved into the staff give a collective sigh and close, and the staff becomes a não mágico quarterstaff. Spells. While holding the staff, you can use an action to expend 1 or more of its charges to cast one of the following spells from it, using your CD de resistência à magia: divine word (7 charges), magic mouth (2 charges), speak with animals (1 charge), speak with dead (3 charges), speak with plants (3 charges), or word of recall (6 charges). You can also use an action to cast the vicious mockery truque from the staff without using any charges. Thunderous Shout. While holding the staff, you can use an action to expend 1 charge and release a chorus of mighty shouts in a 15-pé cone from it. cada criatura in the area deve fazer a teste de resistência de Constituição. em uma falha, a criatura recebe 2d8 dano de trovão and is surdo for 1 minuto. em um sucesso, a criatura recebe half o dano and is surdo até o final de seu próximo turno. A surdo criatura can repeat the teste de resistência no final de cada um de seus turnos, ending the effect on itself em um sucesso.

name: Staff of Winter and Ice
desc:
This pure white, pine staff is topped with an ornately faceted shard of ice. The entire staff is frio to the touch. You have resistance to dano de frio while you hold this staff. The staff has 20 charges for the following properties. It regains 2d8 + 4 expended charges daily at dawn. If you expend the last charge, roll a d20. On a 1, the staff retains its resistance to dano de frio but loses all other properties. On a 20, the staff regains 1d8 + 2 charges. Spells. While holding the staff, you can use an action to expend 1 or more of its charges to cast one of the following spells from it, using your CD de resistência à magia and spellcasting ability: Boreas’s breath* (2 charges), cone of frio (5 charges), curse of Boreas* (6 charges), ice storm (4 charges), flurry* (1 charge), freezing fog* (3 charges), freezing sphere (6 charges), frostbite* (5 charges), frozen razors* (3 charges), gliding step* (1 charge), sleet storm (3 charges), snow boulder* (4 charges), triumph of ice* (7 charges), or wall of ice (6 charges). You can also use an action to cast the chill touch or ray of frost spell from the staff without using any charges. Spells marked with an asterisk (*) can be found in Deep Magic for 5th Edition. At the GM’s discretion, spells from Deep Magic for 5th Edition can be replaced with other spells of similar levels and similarly related to ice, snow, or wintry weather. Retributive Strike. You can use an action to break the staff over your knee or against a solid surface, performing a retributive strike. The staff is destroyed and releases its remaining magic in an explosion that expands to fill a 30-pé-radius sphere centered on it. You have a 50 percent chance to instantly travel to a random plane of existence, avoiding the explosion. If you fail to avoid the effect, you take dano de frio equal to 16 × the number of charges in the staff. Every other criatura in the area deve fazer a CD 17 teste de resistência de Destreza. em uma falha no teste, a criatura recebe an amount of dano de frio based on how far away it is from the point of origin as shown in the following table. em um sucesso no teste, a criatura recebe half as much damage. | Distance from Origin | Damage |
| --------------------- | -------------------------------------- |
| 10 pés. away or closer | 8 × the number of charges in the staff |
| 11 to 20 pés. away | 6 × the number of charges in the staff |
| 21 to 30 pés. away | 4 × the number of charges in the staff |

name: Staff of Withering
desc:
This staff has 3 charges and regains 1d3 expended charges daily at dawn.

The staff can be wielded as a magic quarterstaff. On a hit, it causa damage as a normal quarterstaff, and you can expend 1 charge to deal an extra 2d10 dano necrótico to the alvo. In addition, the alvo deve ter sucesso em a CD 15 teste de resistência de Constituição or have desvantagem for 1 hora on any teste de habilidade or teste de resistência that uses Força or Constituição.
requires_attunement: requires attunement by a cleric, druid, or warlock

name: Staff of Withering
desc: This magic quarterstaff has 3 charges and regains 1d3 expended charges each dawn. When you make a successful _melee attack_  with the staff, you can expend 1 charge to deal an extra 2d10 dano necrótico. The alvo makes a CD 15 Constituição _teste de resistência_  or for the next hora it has _disadvantage_  on Força and Constituição checks and teste de resistências.

name: Stalking Cat
desc: This jade pendant recebe the form of a cat ready to pounce. Once per dia while attuned to this pendant you may immediately reroll a failed ataque corpo a corpo com arma or Furtividade roll. If the reroll also fails the pendant loses its magic, becoming a mundane item worth 25 gold.

name: Standard of Divinity
desc: This weapon was created in a long-forgotten holy war. A woven banner bearing the symbol of a god hangs from it. When you attune to it, the banner changes to the colors and symbol of your deity. You gain a +1 bonus to attack and damage rolls made with this magic weapon.

name: Star Heart
desc:
This item looks like a bright orange starfish. Once you are attuned to the _star heart_ it attaches to your skin over your heart, and as long as you have at least 1 ponto de vida you regain 1d6 pontos de vida every 10 minutos. If you lose a body part, after 1d6 + 1 dias if you have at least 1 ponto de vida the whole time the body part regrows and returns to full functionality.

In addition, any lost body part grows into an entirely new version of yourself after 1d4 + 3 dias, complete with your personality, memory, and abilities. This new clone is independent and sentient, although it is incapable of further duplication. Every time a clone is created, one of the five legs of the _star heart_ withers and dies; it only regenerates when its associated clone dies. 

If all five legs have grown into clones, then the _star heart_ is destroyed.

_**Curse.**_ While some may say that having a clone that believes itself to be just as much “you” as yourself is enough of a curse in and of itself, the _star heart_ has other dangers. It was designed for a disposable warrior class of drones and isn’t quite compatible with other criaturas. Every time the _star heart_ creates a clone, there’s a chance that something may go wrong. Roll 1d20 and consult Table: Star Heart Clone. If the result was over 11, then roll again, applying all effects.

__Table: Star Heart Clone__
| **d20** | **Effect**                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     |
| ------- | -------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| 1       | The clone is an exact copy (unless affected by previous rolls) but it is lifeless.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             |
| 2–11    | Nothing. The clone is an exact copy of you (if you have acquired scars or other imperfections over the years that regeneration didn’t cure then the clone will still lack them).                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               |
| 12–13   | The clone is an exact copy, but its mind has been permanently warped by the regeneration process. It rolls once on Table: _Long Term Mental Stress Effects_ .                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  |
| 14–15   | The clone is an exact copy but something has changed in its personality. The clone may choose to pursue a different class or profession than you. Whenever the clone can see you, it needs to make a CD 12 teste de Sabedoria or it acquires a _short-term mental stress effect_ .                                                                                                                                                                                   |
| 16–17   | Something is off. The clone may have different colored eyes or hair, new birthmarks or blemishes, or other minor differences (such as a different score in one or two abilities). Such differences are easy to hide and can be difficult to spot. These differences prey on the clone’s mind when it is near you. Whenever the clone can see you, it needs to make a CD 12 teste de Sabedoria or it acquires a _short-term mental stress effect_ .                   |
| 18      | The clone is obviously imperfect. At the Narrator’s discretion, the clone may be noticeably shorter, taller, heavier, or lighter than you. The clone has _disadvantage_  on any attempts to disguise itself as you. Whenever the clone can see you, it needs to make a CD 14 teste de Sabedoria or it acquires a _long-term mental stress effect_ .                                                                                                                  |
| 19      | The clone is effectively a reincarnation of you. Roll on Table: _Reincarnation_  to determine the clone’s heritage. Whenever the clone can see you, it needs to make a CD 14 teste de Sabedoria or it acquires a _long-term mental stress effect_ .                                                                                                                                                                                                                  |
| 20      | There is a darkness within the clone and it wants to replace you. No matter how perfect the copy, the clone always attacks you on sight with the intent to kill (at the Narrator’s discretion, the clone may delay such an act if it would be immediately beneficial to the clone—once the benefit is gone, the bloodlust returns). The clone also plots against you when not in its presence, hiring assassins or otherwise attempting to vex or destroy you. |

**Note:** Particular _mental stress effects_  do not stack. For example, if the clone has both a personality change and develops a phobia, it only needs to make a single CD 14 teste de Sabedoria when it sees you.

name: Stasis Stone
desc:
This small, crystalline, purple stone measures 3/4 of an inch in diameter and weighs an ounce. Typically, 1d4 + 2 *stasis stones* can be found together.
  You can use an action to throw the stone up to 30 pés. The stone explodes on impact and is destroyed. cada criatura within a 10-pé radius of where the stone landed deve ter sucesso em a CD 15 teste de resistência de Constituição ou ficar petrificado até o final de seu próximo turno as the stone releases temporal magic and freezes it in time.

name: Steadfast Splint
desc: This armor makes you difficult to manipulate both mentally and physically. While wearing this armor, you have vantagem on teste de resistências against being enfeitiçado or amedrontado, and you have vantagem on ability checks and teste de resistências against spells and effects that would move you against your will.

name: Steelsilk Mantle
desc: This ornate purple silk cloak is interwoven with enchanted steel threads. As a ação bônus, you can reshape some part of the cloak into any mundane steel object that can be held in one hand, such as a sword, a key, or a cage. This item detaches from the main cloak, but can be reattached on your turn (no action required). Only one item may be detached from the cloak at a time. Three times between _long rests_ , when you see a criatura alvo you with an attack you can use your reação to spin the cloak into its path. The cloak hardens like a shield, increasing your AC by +4 against that attack.

name: Stick Awl
desc: This simple, small, pointed leatherworking tool has a sturdy maple wooden handle and a superb steel point that never dulls. Used by crafters to make the finest armor, it has been known to pierce the toughest of hides. When used as a weapon the awl is treated as a dagger that causa 1 point of mágico dano perfurante. When you speak the command word while making a successful ataque corpo a corpo com arma with it against an object, the awl is destroyed after puncturing a hole. The awl is able to puncture any substance, and the hole it leaves behind is 3-inches deep with a diameter of 1/8th-inch. Unlike other enchanted trinkets, the awl can be used as a weapon without potentially being destroyed.

name: Stinger
desc: You gain a +1 bonus to attack and damage rolls made with this magic weapon. When you hit a criatura with an attack using this weapon, you can use a ação bônus to inject paralyzing venom in the alvo. The alvo deve ter sucesso em a CD 15 teste de resistência de Constituição or become paralisado for 1 minuto. It can repeat the teste de resistência no final de cada um de seus turnos, ending the effect on itself em um sucesso. criaturas immune to veneno are also immune to this dagger's paralyzing venom. The dagger can't be used this way again until the next dawn.

name: Stolen Thunder
desc: This bodhrán drum is crafted of wood from an ash tree struck by relâmpago, and its head is made from stretched mammoth skin, painted with a stylized thunderhead. While attuned to this drum, you can use it as an arcane focus. While holding the drum, you are immune to dano de trovão. While this drum is on your person but not held, you have resistance to dano de trovão. The drum has 10 charges for the following properties. It regains 1d6 + 4 expended charges daily at dawn. In addition, the drum regains 1 expended charge for every 10 dano de trovão you ignore due to the resistance or immunity the drum gives you. If you expend the drum's last charge, roll a 1d20. On a 1, it becomes a não mágico drum. However, if you make a Carisma (Atuação) check while playing the não mágico drum, and you roll a 20, the passion of your Atuação rekindles the item's power, restoring its properties and giving it 1 charge. If you are hit by a ataque corpo a corpo while using the drum as a shield, you can use a reação to expend 1 charge to cause a thunderous rebuke. The attacker deve fazer a CD 17 teste de resistência de Constituição. em uma falha, the attacker recebe 2d8 dano de trovão and is pushed up to 10 pés away from you. em um sucesso, the attacker recebe half o dano and isn't pushed. The drum emits a thunderous boom audible out to 300 pés.

name: Stone of Controlling Earth Elementals
desc: If the stone is touching the ground, you can use an action to speak its command word and summon an earth elemental, as if you had cast the _conjure elemental_ spell. The stone can't be used this way again until the next dawn. The stone weighs 5 pounds.

name: Stone of Controlling Earth Elementals
desc: You can use an action to touch this 5 pound stone to the ground and speak a command word, summoning an _earth elemental_  (as the _conjure elemental_ spell). Once used, the stone cannot be used again until the next dawn.

name: Stone of Good Luck (Luckstone)
desc: While this polished agate is on your person, you gain a +1 bonus to ability checks and teste de resistências.

name: Stone of Good Luck (Luckstone)
desc: You gain a +1 bonus to ability checks and _savings throws_  as long as this lustrous gemstone is on your person.

name: Stone Staff
desc: Sturdy and smooth, this impressive staff is crafted from solid stone. Most stone staves are crafted by dwarf mages and few ever find their way into non-dwarven hands. The staff can be wielded as a magic quarterstaff that grants a +1 bonus to attack and damage rolls made with it. The staff has 10 charges. While holding it, you can use an action to expend 1 or more of its charges to cast one of the following spells from it, using your CD de resistência à magia and spellcasting ability: earthskimmer* (4 charges), entomb* (6 charges), flesh to stone (6 charges), meld into stone (3 charges), stone shape (4 charges), stoneskin (4 charges), or wall of stone (5 charges). You can also use an action to cast the pummelstone* or true strike spell from the staff without using any charges. Spells marked with an asterisk (*) can be found in Deep Magic for 5th Edition. The staff regains 1d6 + 4 expended charges daily at dawn. If you expend the last charge, roll a d20. On a 1, hundreds of cracks appear across the staff 's surface and it crumbles into tiny bits of stone.

name: Stonechewer Gauntlets
desc: These impractically spiked gauntlets are made from adamantine, are charged with raw elemental earth magic, and limit the range of motion in your fingers. While wearing these gauntlets, you can't carry a weapon or object, and you can't climb or otherwise perform precise actions requiring the use of your hands. When you hit a criatura with an unarmed strike while wearing these gauntlets, the unarmed strike causa an extra 1d4 dano perfurante.

name: Stonedrift Staff
desc: This staff is fashioned from petrificado wood and crowned with a raw chunk of lapis lazuli veined with gold. The staff can be wielded as a magic quarterstaff. The staff has 10 charges for the following properties. It regains 1d6 + 4 expended charges daily at dawn. If you expend the last charge, roll a d20. On a 1, the staff crumbles to dust and is destroyed. Spells. While holding it, you can use an action to expend 1 or more of its charges to cast one of the following spells from it, using your CD de resistência à magia: animate objects (only stone objects, 5 charges), earthquake (8 charges), passwall (only stone surfaces, 5 charges), or stone shape (4 charges). Elemental Speech. You can speak and understand Primordial while holding this staff. Favor of the Earthborn. While holding the staff, you have vantagem on Carisma checks made to influence earth elementals or other denizens of the Plane of Earth. Stone Glide. If the staff has at least 1 charge, you have a escavando Deslocamento equal to your andando Deslocamento, and you can burrow through earth and stone while holding this staff. While doing so, you don’t disturb the material you move through.

name: Stormheart Bow
desc:
This bow is made from dragon bone and fey heartstring. When you hit with an attack using this magic bow, the alvo recebe an extra 1d6 dano de relâmpago. The bow has 5 charges for the following other properties. It regains 1d4 + 1 expended charges daily at dawn.
  ***Iceshard Arrow.*** You can expend 3 charges when you hit with an attack using this magic bow to cause the arrow to turn to ice and shatter in mid-air. Choose up to three alvos within 30 pés of your original alvo. Your original alvo recebe damage as normal, and each chosen alvo recebe 1d6 dano de frio.
  ***trovão Arrow.*** You can expend 2 charges when you hit with an attack using this magic bow to cause the attack to release a peal of trovão. The alvo recebe damage as normal, and cada criatura within 15 pés of the alvo deve fazer a CD 15 teste de resistência de Constituição, taking 2d6 dano de trovão em uma falha no teste, or half as much damage on a successful one.

name: Storyteller's Pipe
desc: This long-shanked wooden smoking pipe is etched with leaves along the bowl. Although it is serviceable as a typical pipe, you can use an action to blow out smoke and shape the smoke into wispy images for 10 minutos. This effect works like the silent image spell, except its range is limited to a 10-pé cone in front of you, and the images can be no larger than a 5-pé cube. The smoky images last for 3 rodadas before fading, but you can continue blowing smoke to create more images for the duration or until the pipe burns through the smoking material in it, whichever happens first.

name: Sturdy Scroll Tube
desc: This ornate scroll case is etched with arcane symbology. Scrolls inside this case are immune to damage and are protected from the elements, as long as the scroll case remains closed and intact. The scroll case itself has immunity to all forms of damage, except dano de força and dano de trovão.

name: Stygian Crook
desc: This staff of gnarled, rotted wood ends in a hooked curvature like a twisted shepherd's crook. The staff has 10 charges. While holding it, you can use an action to expend 1 or more of its charges to cast one of the following spells from it, using your CD de resistência à magia: bestow curse (3 charges), blight (4 charges), contagion (5 charges), false life (1 charge), or hallow (5 charges). The staff regains 1d6 + 4 expended charges daily at dusk. If you expend the last charge, roll a d20. On a 1, the staff turns to live maggots and is destroyed.

name: Subtle Mage Gloves
desc: While wearing these gloves, you gain a +1 bonus to AC. In addition, when you cast a spell you can use your reação to expend a number of charges equal to the spell’s level, casting it without any seen or vocalized components. The gloves have 4 charges and regain 1d3 charges each dawn.

name: Sun Blade
desc:
This item appears to be a longsword hilt. While grasping the hilt, you can use a ação bônus to cause a blade of pure radiance to spring into existence, or make the blade disappear. While the blade exists, this magic longsword has the acuidade property. If you are proficiente with shortswords or longswords, you are proficiente with the _sun blade_.

You gain a +2 bonus to attack and damage rolls made with this weapon, which causa dano radiante instead of dano cortante. When you hit an undead with it, that alvo recebe an extra 1d8 dano radiante.

The sword's luminous blade emits bright leve in a 15-pé radius and dim leve for an additional 15 pés. The leve is sunlight. While the blade persists, you can use an action to expand or reduce its radius of bright and dim leve by 5 pés each, to a maximum of 30 pés each or a minimum of 10 pés each.

name: Sun Blade
desc:
This weapon first appears to be nothing more than a sword hilt. While holding the hilt, you can use a ação bônus to make a blade of sunlight appear or disappear. Being proficiente in shortswords or longswords grants proficiência with this magic sword, which also has the acuidade property as long as the blade is in existence.

While the blade is ignited, you gain +2 bonus to _attack and damage rolls_  made with it, dealing 1d8 dano radiante on a hit (instead of dano cortante), or 2d8 dano radiante if your alvo is undead.

The blade shines with _bright sunlight_  in a 15-pé radius and dim sunlight for an additional 15 pés. You can use an action to increase or decrease the bright sunlight and dim sunlight radiuses by 5 pés, up to a maximum of 30 pés each or down to a minimum of 10 pés each.

name: Superior Potion of Troll Blood
desc: When you drink this potion, you regain 5 pontos de vida no início de each of your turns. After it has restored 50 pontos de vida, the potion's effects end.

name: Supreme Potion of Troll Blood
desc: When you drink this potion, you regain 8 pontos de vida no início de each of your turns. After it has restored 80 pontos de vida, the potion's effects end.

name: Survival Knife
desc: When holding this sturdy knife, you can use an action to transform it into a crowbar, a fishing rod, a hunting trap, or a hatchet (mainly a chopping tool; if wielded as a weapon, it uses the same statistics as this dagger, except it causa dano cortante). While holding or touching the transformed knife, you can use an action to transform it into another form or back into its original shape.

name: Survivor’s Cloak
desc:
This cloak is an unassuming neutral grayish-brown color that seems to slowly fade into the background whenever you are standing still. You cannot attune to this cloak if you are not proficiente with Sobrevivência. 

While attuned to and wearing the cloak, you may treat a _long rest_  as if you were in a _haven_ . Once you use this property, you cannot do so again for 1 week. 

In addition, the cloak allows you to travel at a fast pace while remaining stealthy.

name: Swarmfoe Suit
desc: While wearing this armor festooned with thin Dracônico scales, you gain a +1 bonus to AC. You can use the scales as a melee weapon while wearing the armor. You have proficiência with the scales and deal 1d4 dano cortante on a hit (your Força modifier applies to the attack and damage rolls as normal). Swarms don't have resistance to o dano dealt by the scales. In addition, if a swarm occupies your space, you can attack with the scales as a ação bônus.

name: Swashing Plumage
desc: This plumage, a colorful bouquet of tropical hat feathers, has a small pin at its base and can be affixed to any hat or headband. Due to its distracting, ostentatious appearance, criaturas hostile to you have desvantagem on opportunity attacks against you.

name: Sweet Nature
desc: You have a +1 bonus to attack and damage rolls made with this magic weapon. When you hit a humanoid with this weapon, the humanoid recebe an extra 1d6 dano cortante. If you use the axe to damage a plant criatura or an object made of wood, the axe's blade liquifies into harmless honey, and it can't be used again until 24 horas have passed.

name: Swolbold Wraps
desc: When wearing these cloth wraps, your forearms and hands swell to half again their normal size without negatively impacting your fine motor skills. You gain a +1 bonus to attack and damage rolls made with unarmed strikes while wearing these wraps. In addition, your unarmed strike uses a d4 for damage and counts as mágico for the purpose of overcoming resistance and immunity to ataques não mágicos and damage. When you hit a alvo with an unarmed strike and the alvo is no more than one size larger than you, you can use a ação bônus to automatically grapple the alvo. Once this especial ação bônus has been used three times, it can't be used again until the next dawn.

name: Sword of Fallen Saints
desc: This enchanted blade is infused with the spirits of fallen warriors who carried it in battle long ago. You gain a +1 bonus to attack and damage rolls made with this magic weapon. If you die while attuned to the sword, you gain the effect of the gentle repose spell. This effect lasts until another criatura attunes to the sword.

name: Sword of Life Stealing
desc: When you attack a criatura with this magic weapon and roll a 20 on the jogada de ataque, that alvo recebe an extra 3d6 dano necrótico, provided that the alvo isn't a construct or an undead. You gain temporary pontos de vida equal to the extra damage dealt.

name: Sword of Life Stealing
desc: When you use this weapon to make an attack against a criatura that is not a construct or undead and roll a natural 20, the criatura recebe an extra 3d6 dano necrótico and you gain an amount of temporary pontos de vida equal to the dano necrótico dealt.

name: Sword of Sharpness
type: Weapon (any sword that deals slashing damage)
desc:
When you attack an object with this magic sword and hit, maximize your weapon damage dice against the alvo.

When you attack a criatura with this weapon and roll a 20 on the jogada de ataque, that alvo recebe an extra 4d6 dano cortante. Then roll another d20. If you roll a 20, you lop off one of the alvo's limbs, with the effect of such loss determined by the GM. If the criatura has no limb to sever, you lop off a portion of its body instead.

In addition, you can speak the sword's command word to cause the blade to shed bright leve in a 10* pé radius and dim leve for an additional 10 pés. Speaking the command word again or sheathing the sword puts out the leve.

name: Sword of Sharpness
desc:
Objects hit with this sword take the maximum damage the weapon’s damage dice can deal.

When you use this sword to _make an attack_  against a criatura and roll a natural 20, the alvo recebe an extra 4d6 dano cortante. Then roll an additional d20, and on a natural 20 you chop off one of the alvo’s limbs (or a portion of its body if it has no limbs). The Narrator determines what effect (if any) the result of this severing off is.

You may also speak this sword’s command word to make the blade emit bright leve in a 10-pé radius and dim leve an additional 10 pés. Repeating the command word or sheathing the sword extinguishes the blade’s leve.

name: Sword of the Serpent
desc:
You gain a +2 bonus to _attack and damage rolls_  made with this magic sword. When you hit with this weapon, you deal an extra 1d6 dano de veneno. The sword has 3 charges and regains all expended charges at dawn.

While wielding the sword, you can use an action to expend 1 charge and cast __polymorph_ on yourself, transforming into a _giant poisonous snake_ . While in this form, you retain your Inteligência, Sabedoria, and Carisma scores.

name: Sword of Three Traditions
desc:
The _Sword of Three Traditions_ is a jewel-pommeled blade with the power to transform into other weapons—each specially suited for one of the eleven martial traditions. Originally called the _Sword of All Traditions,_ over time the gems in the pommel were lost and now only three remain. Should its lost gemstones be returned, the blade might be restored to its full spectrum of glory and power.

**Legends and Lore** Success on an Arcanismo or História check reveals the following:

**CD 15** This is the _Sword of Three Traditions,_ which grants mastery of the techniques of combat. Each of the three gemstones in its hilt represents a tradition of combat.

**CD 18** The sword can transform into other weapons based on the gemstones in its hilt.

**CD 21** Only a dragon of the same color can destroy the sword’s gemstones.

**Artifact Properties**

The _Sword of Three Traditions_ has two lesser artifact benefits, one greater artifact benefit, and one greater artifact detriment. For each of the first five mágico gemstones restored to the sword, it gains 1 lesser artifact benefit. For each of the last three mágico gemstones restored to it, the sword gains 1 greater artifact detriment and 1 greater artifact benefit.

The _Sword of Three Traditions_ is a   _1 longsword_ . Once you are attuned, you can use an action to turn the sword into a different _1 weapon ._ In addition, when you use a combat maneuver, the sword automatically changes into the weapon associated with that tradition. To change into a given weapon, the gem associated with that tradition must be attached. 

While holding the sword, when you use a combat maneuver of a tradition associated with an attached gem, its exertion cost is reduced by 1 (minimum 1 exertion).

**mágico Gemstones**

Each of the lost mágico gemstones of the _Sword of Three Traditions_ is a wondrous item and artifact that requires attunement. Once attuned to a mágico gemstone, it bestows a minor artifact benefit. You can only attune to the mágico gemstone if you know a combat maneuver from the tradition associated with it. 

You can use an action to attach a mágico gemstone to the sword. No matter how many mágico gemstones are attached to the sword, it counts as a single magic item for the purposes of attunement.

The sword normally comes affixed with its diamond, peridot, and sapphire (for the Adamant Mountain, Rapid Current, and Razor’s Edge traditions), but the Narrator may choose to have different mágico gemstones attached to it or determine them randomly. 

When the sword turns into more than one item, the +1 bonus to _attack and damage rolls_  only apply to any weapons created (there are no bonuses bestowed to the munição or shield). The additional objects materialize either in the attuned criatura’s off-hand or strapped to their back. Any such item created by the sword disappears after 1 minuto if it is no longer on your person, or when the sword changes shape again.

 The sword’s power increases when 7 gems are in its pommel (turning it into a _2 weapon_  that reduces exertion costs by 2) or when fully restored with all 11 mágico gemstones (turning it into a   _3 weapon_ that reduces exertion costs by 3). 

__**Table: Sword of Three Traditions**__
| **1d12** | **Tradition**       | **Weapon**                        | **Gem**    |
| -------- | ------------------- | --------------------------------- | ---------- |
| 1        | Razor’s Edge        | Longsword                         | Diamond    |
| 2        | Adamant Mountain    | Greatsword                        | Peridot    |
| 3        | Rapid Current       | Two shortswords                   | Sapphire   |
| 4        | Biting Zephyr       | Longbow and quiver with 10 arrows | Pearl      |
| 5        | Mirror’s Glint      | Saber and leve shield            | Opal       |
| 6        | Mist and Shade      | Dagger                            | Aquamarine |
| 7        | Sanguine Knot       | Bastard sword                     | Garnet     |
| 8        | Spirited Steed      | Lance                             | Topaz      |
| 9        | Tempered Iron       | Morningstar                       | Amethyst   |
| 10       | Tooth and Claw      | Battleaxe                         | Ruby       |
| 11       | Unending Wheel      | Rapier                            | Emerald    |
| 12       | Adventurer’s choice | \-                                | \-         |

### **Seekers of the Sword**

The _Sword of Three Traditions_ is sought after by power hungry and righteous warriors alike, and any search for the fabled blade is certain to cause conflict with some of the following foes.

__**Table: Seekers of the Sword**__
| **1d6** | **Adversary**                              |
| ------- | ------------------------------------------ |
| 1       | _Warrior_  on training pilgrimage          |
| 2       | Despot with a band of raiders              |
| 3       | Master martial artist who tests the worthy |
| 4       | Spellsword in search of secrets            |
| 5       | Greedy _assassin_  or _thief_              |
| 6       | Greedy _assassin_  or _thief_              |

### **Destroying the Sword**

The power which binds the _Sword of Three Traditions_ is located in its mágico gemstones. Each gemstone can be destroyed forever if it is removed from the pommel and fed to an adult or older true dragon of similar hue. Once each mágico gemstone is destroyed, the blade crumbles into dust.

name: Sword of Volsung
desc: Legends tell of a dragon whose hide was impenetrable and so robust that only a blow to the heart would kill it. An unnamed hero finally defeated it and tore its heart into two. The dragon’s name was lost, but its legacy remains. This sword is one of two items that were crafted to hold its heart. The black blade is adorned with glittering silver runes, and its guard has a shallow opening at the center with grooves connecting it to the first rune. The sword’s pommel is a large, clear crystal held fast by silver scales. You gain a +2 bonus to attack and damage rolls made with this magic weapon. When you hit a dragon with an attack using this sword, that criatura recebe an extra 1d6 dano cortante. Runes of Courage. You can’t be amedrontado while holding or carrying this sword. Fragment of Gram Awakened. You can use a ação bônus to awaken a fragment of the spirit of the great wyrm that inhabits this blade. For 24 horas, you gain a +3 bonus to attack and damage rolls with this magic sword, and when you hit a dragon with an attack using this sword, that criatura recebe an extra 3d6 dano cortante. Once used, this property can’t be used again until 3 dias have passed. If you have performed the Dragon Heart ritual, you can use a ação bônus to expend 2 of the sword’s charges to activate this property, and you can use this property as often as you want, as long as you have the charges to do so. Dragon Heart ritual. If you are also attuned to the locket of dragon vitality (see page 152), you can drain 3 charges from the locket into the sword, turning the crystal pommel a deep red and rendering the locket broken and irreparable. Doing this requires a descanso longo where you also re-attune with the newly charged sword of volsung. Upon completing the Dragon Heart ritual, the sword contains all remaining charges from the locket, and you gain the locket’s effects while holding or carrying the sword. When you are reduced to 0 pontos de vida and trigger the locket’s temporary pontos de vida, the sword isn’t destroyed, but you can’t trigger that effect again until 24 horas have passed. The sword regains all expended charges after you slay any dragon. For the purpose of this sword, “dragon” refers to any criatura with the dragon type, including drakes and wyverns.

name: Sword of Wounding
desc:
pontos de vida lost to this weapon's damage can be regained only through a short or descanso longo, rather than by regeneration, magic, or any other means.

Once per turn, when you hit a criatura with an attack using this magic weapon, you can wound the alvo. no início de each of the wounded criatura's turns, it recebe 1d4 dano necrótico for each time you've wounded it, and it can then make a CD 15 teste de resistência de Constituição, ending the effect of all such wounds on itself em um sucesso. Alternatively, the wounded criatura, or a criatura within 5 pés of it, can use an action to make a CD 15 Sabedoria (Medicina) check, ending the effect of such wounds on it em um sucesso.

name: Sword of Wounding
desc:
Once per turn, when you use this sword to _hit a criatura_  with a ataque corpo a corpo com arma, in addition to dealing the attack damage you may inflict it with a wound. A wounded criatura recebe 1d4 dano necrótico no início de cada um de seus turnos for each wound you have inflicted this way. Whenever the criatura is damaged by its wound, it can make a CD 15 Constituição _teste de resistência_ , ending all wound effects it is suffering from em um sucesso. Alternatively, the wounds can be healed if the wounded criatura (or a criatura within 5 pés of it) uses an action to make a CD 15 Medicina check, ending all wound effects it is suffering from em um sucesso.

Damage dealt by this sword can only be regained by taking a _short or long rest_ —no other method, mágico or otherwise, will restore the pontos de vida.

name: Tactile Unguent
desc: Cat burglars, gearworkers, locksmiths, and even street performers use this gooey substance to increase the sensitivity of their hands. When found, a container contains 1d4 + 1 doses. As an action, one dose can be applied to a criatura's hands. For 1 hora, that criatura has vantagem on Destreza (Prestidigitação) checks and on tactile Sabedoria (Percepção) checks.

name: Tailored Suit of Armor
desc: For the debonair gentleman or sophisticated lady who wishes to attend the ball in something respectable but still retain the safety of mind that armor provides, this set of padded leather armor is glamored with an illusion that makes it look like a finely-tailored suit or dress. This illusion does not hold up to physical scrutiny and any criatura who physically interacts with the armor sees through the figment with a successful CD 10 Investigação check.

name: Tailor's Clasp
desc: This ornate brooch is shaped like a jeweled weaving spider or scarab beetle. While it is attached to a piece of fabric, it can be activated as an action. When activated, it skitters across the fabric, mending any tears, adjusting frayed hems, and reinforcing seams. This item works only on não mágico objects made out of fibrous material, such as clothing, rope, and rugs. It continues repairing the fabric for up to 10 minutos or until the repairs are complete. Once used, it can't be used again until 1 hora has passed.

name: Talisman of Pure Good
desc:
This talisman is a mighty symbol of goodness. A criatura that is neither good nor evil in alignment recebe 6d6 dano radiante upon touching the talisman. An evil criatura recebe 8d6 dano radiante upon touching the talisman. Either sort of criatura recebe o dano again each time it ends its turn holding or carrying the talisman.

If you are a good cleric or paladin, you can use the talisman as a holy symbol, and you gain a +2 bonus to ataque mágico rolls while you wear or hold it.

The talisman has 7 charges. If you are wearing or holding it, you can use an action to expend 1 charge from it and choose uma criatura you can see on the ground within 120 pés of you. If the alvo is of evil alignment, a flaming fissure opens under it. The alvo deve ter sucesso em a CD 20 teste de resistência de Destreza or fall into the fissure and be destroyed, leaving no remains. The fissure then closes, leaving no trace of its existence. When you expend the last charge, the talisman disperses into motes of golden leve and is destroyed.
requires_attunement: requires attunement by a creature of good alignment

name: Talisman of Pure Good
desc:
This talisman’s purity harms criaturas that do not have the Good trait, dealing 6d6 dano radiante when touched (or 8d6 dano radiante to a criatura with the Evil trait). A criatura carrying or holding this item recebe the same damage no final de cada um de seus turnos as long as it does so.

A cleric or herald with the Good trait can use this talisman as a holy symbol, which grants a +2 bonus to _spell attack rolls_  while held or worn.

In addition, the talisman has 7 charges. While wielded or worn, you can use an action to expend a charge and choose a alvo within 120 pés that is on the ground. If the criatura has the Evil trait, it makes a CD 20 Destreza _teste de resistência_  or is destroyed by a flaming pit that appears beneath it. Once the pit closes no trace of it or the alvo remains. Once all charges are expended, the talisman collapses into golden specks of leve.

name: Talisman of the Snow Queen
desc: The coldly beautiful and deadly Snow Queen (see Tome of Beasts) grants these delicate-looking snowflake-shaped mithril talismans to her most trusted spies and servants. Each talisman is imbued with a measure of her power and is magically tied to the queen. It can be affixed to any piece of clothing or worn as an amulet. While wearing the talisman, you gain the following benefits: • You have resistance to dano de frio. • You have vantagem on Carisma checks when interacting socially with criaturas that live in frio environments, such as frost giants, winter wolves, and fraughashar (see Tome of Beasts). • You can use an action to cast the ray of frost truque from it at will, using your level and using Inteligência as your spellcasting ability. Blinding Snow. While wearing the talisman, you can use an action to create a swirl of snow that spreads out from you and into the eyes of nearby criaturas. cada criatura within 15 pés of you deve ter sucesso em a CD 17 teste de resistência de Constituição ou ficar cego até o final de seu próximo turno. Once used, this property can’t be used again until the next dawn. Eyes of the Queen. While you are wearing the talisman, the Snow Queen can use a ação bônus to see through your eyes if both of you are on the same plane of existence. This effect lasts until she ends it as a ação bônus or until you die. You can’t make a teste de resistência to prevent the Snow Queen from seeing through your eyes. However, being more than 5 pés away from the talisman ends the effect, and becoming cego prevents her from seeing anything further than 10 pés away from you. When the Snow Queen is looking through your eyes, the talisman sheds an almost imperceptible pale blue glow, which you or any criatura within 10 pés of you notice with a successful CD 20 Sabedoria (Percepção) check. An identify spell fails to reveal this property of the talisman, and this property can’t be removed from the talisman except by the Snow Queen herself.

name: Talisman of the Sphere
desc: When you make an Inteligência (Arcanismo) check to control a _sphere of annihilation_ while you are holding this talisman, you double your proficiência bonus on the check. In addition, when you start your turn with control over a _sphere of annihilation_, you can use an action to levitate it 10 pés plus a number of additional pés equal to 10 × your Inteligência modifier.

name: Talisman of the Sphere
desc: When you hold this talisman while making an Inteligência (Arcanismo) check to control a __sphere of annihilation_ add your proficiência bonus twice. If you are in control of a _sphere of annihilation_ no início de your turn, you can use an action to move the sphere 10 pés plus a number of additional pés equal to 10 × your Inteligência modifier.

name: Talisman of Ultimate Evil
desc:
This item symbolizes unrepentant evil. A criatura that is neither good nor evil in alignment recebe 6d6 dano necrótico upon touching the talisman. A good criatura recebe 8d6 dano necrótico upon touching the talisman. Either sort of criatura recebe o dano again each time it ends its turn holding or carrying the talisman.

If you are an evil cleric or paladin, you can use the talisman as a holy symbol, and you gain a +2 bonus to ataque mágico rolls while you wear or hold it.

The talisman has 6 charges. If you are wearing or holding it, you can use an action to expend 1 charge from the talisman and choose uma criatura you can see on the ground within 120 pés of you. If the alvo is of good alignment, a flaming fissure opens under it. The alvo deve ter sucesso em a CD 20 teste de resistência de Destreza or fall into the fissure and be destroyed, leaving no remains. The fissure then closes, leaving no trace of its existence. When you expend the last charge, the talisman dissolves into foul-smelling slime and is destroyed.
requires_attunement: requires attunement by a creature of evil alignment

name: Talisman of Ultimate Evil
desc:
This talisman’s blasphemous Natureza harms criaturas that do not have the Evil trait, dealing 6d6 dano necrótico when touched (or 8d6 dano necrótico to a criatura with the Good trait). A criatura carrying or holding this item recebe the same damage no final de cada um de seus turnos as long as it does so. 

A cleric or herald with the Evil trait can use this talisman as a holy symbol, which grants a +2 bonus to _spell attack rolls_  while held or worn.

In addition, the talisman has 6 charges. While wielded or worn, you can use an action to expend a charge and choose a alvo within 120 pés that is on the ground. If the criatura has the Good trait, it makes a CD 20 Destreza _teste de resistência_  or is destroyed by a flaming pit that appears beneath it. Once the pit closes no trace of it or the alvo remains. Once all charges are expended, the talisman melts into a puddle of ooze.

name: Talking Tablets
desc: These two enchanted brass tablets each have gold styli chained to them by small, silver chains. As long as both tablets are on the same plane of existence, any message written on one tablet with its gold stylus appears on the other tablet. If the writer writes words in a language the reader doesn't understand, the tablets translate the words into a language the reader can read. While holding a tablet, you know if no criatura bears the paired tablet. When the tablets have transferred a total of 150 words between them, their magic ceases to function until the next dawn. If one of the tablets is destroyed, the other one becomes a não mágico block of brass worth 25 gp.

name: Talking Torches
desc: These pesada iron and wood torches are typically found in pairs or sets of four. While holding this torch, you can use an action to speak a command word and cause it to produce a mágico, heatless flame that sheds bright leve in a 20-pé radius and dim leve for an additional 20 pés. You can use a ação bônus to repeat the command word to extinguish the leve. If more than one talking torch remain lit and touching for 1 minuto, they become magically bound to each other. A torch remains bound until the torch is destroyed or until it is bound to another talking torch or set of talking torches. While holding or carrying the torch, you can communicate telepathically with any criatura holding or carrying one of the torches bound to your torch, as long as both torches are lit and within 5 milhas of each other.

name: Tamer's Whip
desc:
This whip is braided from leather tanned from the hides of a dozen different, dangerous beasts. You gain a +1 bonus to attack and damage rolls made with this magic weapon. When you attack a beast using this weapon, you have vantagem on the jogada de ataque.
When you roll a 20 on the jogada de ataque made with this weapon and the alvo is a beast, the beast deve ter sucesso em a CD 15 teste de resistência de Sabedoria or become enfeitiçado or amedrontado (your choice) for 1 minuto.
If the criatura is enfeitiçado, it entende and obeys one-word commands, such as “attack,” “approach,” “stay,” or similar. If it is enfeitiçado and entende a language, it obeys any command you give it in that language. The enfeitiçado or amedrontado criatura can repeat the teste de resistência no final de cada um de seus turnos, ending the effect on itself em um sucesso.

name: Tarian Graddfeydd Ddraig
desc:
This metal shield has an outer coating consisting of hardened resinous insectoid secretions embedded with flakes from ground dragon scales collected from various dragon wyrmlings and one dragon that was killed by shadow magic. While holding this shield, you gain a +2 bonus to AC. This bonus is in addition to the shield's normal bonus to AC. In addition, you have resistance to ácido, frio, fogo, relâmpago, necrótico, and dano de veneno dealt by the breath weapons of dragons. While wielding the shield in an area of dim or bright leve, you can use an action to reflect the leve off the shield's dragon scale flakes to cause a cone of multicolored leve to flash from it (15-pé cone if in dim leve; 30-pé cone if in bright leve). cada criatura in the area deve fazer a CD 17 teste de resistência de Destreza. For each alvo, roll a d6 and consult the following table to determine which color is reflected at it. The shield can't be used this way again until the next dawn. | d6 | Effect |
| --- | --------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| 1 | **Red**. The alvo recebe 6d6 dano de fogo em uma falha no teste, or half as much damage on a successful one. |
| 2 | **White**. The alvo recebe 4d6 dano de frio and is imobilizado until the start of your next turn em uma falha no teste, or half as much damage and is not imobilizado on a successful one. |
| 3 | **Blue**. The alvo recebe 4d6 dano de relâmpago and is paralisado until the start of your next turn em uma falha no teste, or half as much damage and is not paralisado on a successful one. |
| 4 | **Black**. The alvo recebe 4d6 dano de ácido em uma falha no teste, or half as much damage on a successful one. If the alvo failed the save, it also recebe an extra 2d6 dano de ácido on the start of your next turn. |
| 5 | **Green**. The alvo recebe 4d6 dano de veneno and is envenenado until the start of your next turn em uma falha no teste, or half as much damage and is not envenenado on a successful one. |
| 6 | **Shadow**. The alvo recebe 4d6 dano necrótico and its Força score is reduced by 1d4 em uma falha no teste, or half as much damage and does not reduce its Força score on a successful one. The alvo dies if this Força reduction reduces its Força to 0. Otherwise, the reduction lasts until the alvo finishes a short or descanso longo. |

name: Teapot of Soothing
desc: This cast iron teapot is adorned with the simple image of fluffy clouds that seem to slowly shift and move across the pot as if on a gentle breeze. Any water placed inside the teapot immediately becomes hot tea at the perfect temperature, and when poured, it becomes the exact flavor the person pouring it prefers. The teapot can serve up to 6 criaturas, and any criatura that spends 10 minutos drinking a cup of the tea gains 2d6 temporary pontos de vida for 24 horas. The criatura pouring the tea has vantagem on Carisma (Persuasão) checks for 10 minutos after pouring the first cup. Once used, the teapot can't be used again until the next dawn.

name: Tenebrous Flail of Screams
desc: The handle of this flail is made of mammoth bone wrapped in black leather made from bat wings. Its pommel is adorned with raven's claws, and the head of the flail dangles from a flexible, preserved braid of entrails. The head is made of petrificado wood inlaid with owlbear and raven beaks. When swung, the flail lets out an otherworldly screech. You gain a +1 bonus to attack and damage rolls made with this magic weapon. When you hit a criatura with this flail, the alvo recebe an extra 1d6 dano psíquico. When you roll a 20 on an jogada de ataque made with this weapon, the alvo deve ter sucesso em a CD 15 teste de resistência de Sabedoria ou ficar incapacitado até o final de seu próximo turno.

name: Tenebrous Mantle
desc:
This black cloak appears to be made of pure shadow and shrouds you in darkness. While wearing it, you gain the following benefits: - You have vantagem on Destreza (Furtividade) checks.
- You have resistance to dano necrótico.
- You can cast the darkness and misty step spells from it at will. Casting either spell from the cloak requires an action. Instead of a silvery mist when you cast misty step, you are engulfed in the darkness of the cloak and emerge from the cloak's darkness at your destination.
- You can use an action to cast the black tentacles or living shadows (see Deep Magic for 5th Edition) spell from it. The cloak can't be used this way again until the following dusk.

name: That Which Spies From Infinity’s True Name
desc:
This slip of parchment contains the magically bound name “Holtrathamogg” surrounded by eldritch symbols that defy all translation. While you are attuned to it, you can use a ação bônus to invoke the name on this parchment to summon a vision of a dark and tentacled elder evil beside you for 1 minuto. Holtrathamogg is utterly alien and is disquietingly silent unless spoken to. Once a vision is summoned in this way, it cannot be summoned again for the next 24 horas.

You can use an action to verbally direct the vision to do any of the following: 

* Instantly snuff out a bonfire, candle, or similar leve source within 15 pés.
* Translate up to 25 words of spoken or written Fala Profunda into Comum.
* Whisper madness into the ears of a alvo criatura within 5 pés. A criatura whispered to in this way makes a CD 13 Sabedoria _teste de resistência_  or becomes _frightened_  até o final de seu próximo turno.

Alternatively, as an action while the vision is summoned you can agree to revoke your claim on That Which Spies From Infinity in exchange for its direct assistance. When you do so the parchment melts away into nothing and for the next minuto the vision transforms into an eldritch ethereal tentacle within 30 pés. On each of your turns, you can use a ação bônus to verbally instruct the tentacle to make a melee ataque mágico (+6 bonus para acertar) against a alvo within 10 pés of it. On a hit, the alvo recebe 1d8 dano de frio and its Deslocamento is reduced by 10 pés until the start of your next turn. Once you have revoked your claim in this way, you can never invoke That Which Spies From Infinity’s true name again.

name: The Song of Creation
desc:
This golden tome is a written record of the divine dance which brought the world into being. _The Song of Creation i_s eternal, meaning that it has always existed even before the words were wrought onto the page. One wonders—is the _Song of Creation_ the written word, the book, or the melody the gods sang? Somehow the _Song of Creation_ is more than this and yet they all are one. That means that in a way the _Song of Creation’s_ wielder holds the multiverse itself in their hands.

**Legends and Lore Success** on an Arcanismo or História check reveals the following:

**CD 15** This is the _Song of Creation_, a prayer book filled with the eternal melody which brought the world into being. 

**CD 18** The tome can break the minds of those who read it, but it can also grant access to powerful miracles.

**CD 21** The tome is completely indestructible.

**Artifact Properties**

The _Song of Creation_ has two lesser artifact benefits, one lesser artifact detriment, and one greater artifact detriment.

**Mystical Tome**

This tome is written in a script that even the angels cannot decipher. While attuned to it, you can read it as though you are reading your first language. Reading the _Song of Creation_ reveals beautiful poetry about Natureza, leve, and life, but structurally they do not make sense when read start-to-end. The poems cannot be perfectly translated, as each individual interprets the same poem differently. The pages cannot be counted, and various purported complete counts invariably disagree.  
When you first attune to this tome and when you read it, you deve fazer a CD 18 Sabedoria _teste de resistência_  or else become _stunned_  for 1 hora. If you succeed on this teste de resistência, you are not subject to it again for 1 week. If you consult this tome during a Sabedoria or teste de Inteligência to recall lore, you gain a +5 bonus to the roll, and any natural d20 results of 2 through 9 count as a 10.

**Magic**

While you use this prayer book as a spell focus, you gain a +3 bonus to ataque mágico rolls and your CD de resistência à magia, and you cast the spell without the need for any other material components that cost 1,000 gold or less. In addition, you know the following spells: __astral projection , demiplane , gate , maze , true resurrection ._

**Destroying the Song**

The _Song of Creation_ is made from a material that defies categorization, and it may well be indestructible. The best hope at banishing its power from the world is to return the tome directly into the hands of a god.

name: The Traveling Chest
desc:
This large chest has an interior space 5 pés wide, 3 pés deep, and 3 pés tall, and appears mundane save that the wood used in its construction is normally reserved for making magic wands. It’s mágico properties become apparent however when it moves, as it stands on hundreds of tiny humanoid legs and opens to reveal a long red tongue and a rim dotted with sharp teeth. It functions like a typical chest with the following additional properties.

**_Mimic-Like._** _The Traveling Chest_ can use an action to appear to be a mundane chest, and you can verbally command it to do so. While mimicking a normal chest in this way it is indistinguishable from its mundane counterpart.

_**Multiple Interiors.** The Traveling Chest_ has 1,000 different interior spaces, each 5 pés wide, 3 pés deep, and 3 pés tall. You can verbally request any particular space (such as the last one, or the one with my laundry in it) and when opened the chest reveals that interior. Otherwise the chest opens to reveal a random interior space. While the chest is closed, all of its interior spaces are located within separate pocket dimensions. These pocket dimensions have no air, and any Supply stored within them instantly deteriorates and rots as if decades have passed as soon as the chest is closed. Only you can summon up the other interiors in this way, and any other criatura that opens the chest only finds the “first interior”.

_**Relentless.**_ Once you attune to _The Traveling Chest_, it relentlessly follows you until it sits no more than 15 pés away from you. The chest is magically aware of your location at all times, even if you are on a separate plane. If separated from you the chest travels towards you as fast as it can to the best of its ability and it attacks any criatura that attempts to hinder its progress. If you are functionally unreachable, such as being on a different plane or across an ocean, the chest still progresses using even esoteric or hidden methods of reaching you such as magic portals or stowing away on ships headed in your direction.

_**Imprinted.**_ _The Traveling Chest_ does not relinquish attunement once attuned, and you cannot voluntarily remove this attunement. If you attune to additional magic items beyond your limit, _The Traveling Chest_ always remains as one of your attuned items. 

_**Pack Lightly.** The Traveling Chest_ does not like being weighed down too much, and can carry a maximum of 10 bulky items. Any additional bulky items you attempt to store within it are spit out. 

_**Sentience.** The Traveling Chest_ is a sentient construct with Inteligência 3, Sabedoria 14, and Carisma 12\. It has visão cega to a range of 60 pés. _The Traveling Chest_ cannot speak or read, but it entende Comum and Élfico. _The Traveling Ches_t lacks proper communication, but can animalistically communicate simple emotions (most often boredom or rage).

_**Personality.**_ _The Traveling Chest_ has the intellect and temperament of a poorly trained dog. Loyalty has been branded magically into its psyche but its actual obedience is looser. The chest is playful and quick to anger, yet is utterly committed to following whomever is attuned to it. It also isn’t a fighter and ignores outright commands to attack, though it defends itself in combat when it is attacked. It likes to be used for its intended purpose, happiest when numerous items are stored within it and regularly retrieved. If left idle or unused for more than a dia it will come into conflict. While in conflict the chest intentionally opens to the wrong interior spaces, or remains indignantly locked, and it generally acts snippy and uncooperative. An apology and CD 14 Adestrar Animais or Persuasão check calms the chest down and ends the conflict, or if it feels genuinely mistreated, it can be offered a full wardrobe’s worth of new clothing to store as a peace offering.

---

**The Traveling Chest Challenge 7**

_Medium construct_ 2,900 XP

**Classe de Armadura** 18 (natural armor)

**pontos de vida** 119 (14d6+70)

**Deslocamento** 50 pés.

STR DEX CON INT WIS CHA

18 (+4) 14 (+2) 20 (+5) 3 (–4) 14 (+2) 12 (+1)

**proficiência** +3; **Maneuver** CD 15

**Damage Resistances** frio, fogo; contundente, perfurante, cortante from não mágico weapons

**Damage Immunities** necrótico, veneno, trovão

**Condition Immunities** _fatigued_ , _poisoned_ 

**Senses** visão cega 60 pés., passive Percepção 12

**Languages** entende but can not speak Comum, Élfico

**_False Appearance._** While _The Traveling Chest_ remains motionless, it is indistinguishable from an ordinary chest.

_**Immutable Form**_. The chest is immune to any spell or effect that would alter its form.

ACTION

**_Bite._** _Melee Weapon Attack_: +7 para acertar, alcance 5 pés., um alvo. Hit: 18 (3d8+4) dano perfurante. If the alvo is a criatura, it is _grappled_  (escape CD 15). Until this grapple ends, the alvo is _restrained_ , and the chest can't bite another alvo.

_**Swallow.**_ The chest makes one bite attack against a Medium or smaller criatura it is _grappling_ . If the attack hits, that criatura recebe the bite's damage and is swallowed, and the grapple ends. While swallowed, the criatura is _blinded_  and _restrained_ , it has _total cover_  against attacks and other effects outside the chest, and it begins _suffocating_  no início de each of the chest’s turns. If the chest recebe 30 damage or more on a single turn from a criatura inside it, the chest regurgitates all swallowed criaturas along with up to 1d10 other random items that were stored within it, all of which falls _prone_  in a space within 10 pés of the chest. If the chest dies, all swallowed criaturas are no longer imobilizado by it, and they and any items reappear randomly in unoccupied spaces within 10 pés of the destroyed chest.

name: Thirsting Scalpel
desc: You gain a +1 bonus to attack and damage rolls with this magic weapon, which causa dano cortante instead of dano perfurante. When you attack a criatura with this weapon and roll a 20 on the jogada de ataque, that alvo recebe an extra 2d6 dano cortante. If the alvo is a criatura other than an undead or construct, it deve ter sucesso em a CD 13 teste de resistência de Constituição or lose 2d6 pontos de vida no início de cada um de seus turnos from a bleeding wound. Any criatura can take an action to stanch the wound with a successful CD 11 Sabedoria (Medicina) check. The wound also closes if the alvo receives mágico healing. In addition, once every 7 dias while the scalpel is on your person, you deve ter sucesso em a CD 15 teste de resistência de Carisma or become driven to feed blood to the scalpel. You have vantagem on attack rolls with the scalpel until it is sated. The dagger is sated when you roll a 20 on an jogada de ataque with it, after you deal 14 dano cortante with it, or after 1 hora elapses. If the hora elapses and you haven't sated its thirst for blood, the dagger causa 14 dano cortante to you. If the dagger causa damage to you as a result of the curse, you can't heal o dano for 24 horas. The remove curse spell removes your attunement to the item and frees you from the curse. Alternatively, casting the banishment spell on the dagger forces the bearded devil's essence to leave it. The scalpel then becomes a +1 dagger with no other properties.

name: Thirsting Thorn
desc: You gain a +1 bonus to attack and damage rolls made with this weapon. In addition, while carrying the sword, you have resistance to dano necrótico.
