Each time you reduce a criatura to 0 pontos de vida with this weapon, you can regain 2d8+2 pontos de vida. Each time you regain pontos de vida this way, you must succeed a CD 12 teste de resistência de Sabedoria ou ficar incapacitado by terrible visions until the end of your next turn. If you alcance your maximum pontos de vida using this effect, you automatically fail the teste de resistência. As long as you remain cursed, you are unwilling to part with the sword, keeping it within alcance at all times. If you have not damaged a criatura with this sword within the past 24 horas, you have desvantagem on attack rolls with weapons other than this one as its hunger for blood drives you to slake its thirst.

name: Thornish Nocturnal
desc: The ancient elves constructed these nautical instruments to use as navigational aids on all their seagoing vessels. The knowledge of their manufacture has been lost, and few of them remain. While attuned to the nocturnal, you can spend 1 minuto using the nocturnal to determine the precise local time, provided you can see the sun or stars. You can use an action to protect up to four vessels that are within 1 milha of the nocturnal from unwanted effects of the local weather for 1 hora. For example, vessels protected by the nocturnal can't be damaged by storms or blown onto jagged rocks by adverse wind. To do so, you must have spent at least 1 hora aboard each of the controlled vessels, performing basic sailing tasks and familiarizing yourself with the vessel.

name: Three-Section Boots
desc: These boots are often decorated with eyes, flames, or other bold patterns such as relâmpago bolts or wheels. When you step onto water, air, or stone, you can use a reação to speak the boots' command word. For 1 hora, you gain the effects of the meld into stone, water walk, or wind walk spell, depending on the type of surface where you stepped. The boots can't be used this way again until the next dawn.

name: Throttler's Gauntlets
desc: These durable leather gloves allow you to choke a criatura you are grappling, preventing them from speaking. While you are grappling a criatura, you can use a ação bônus to throttle it. The criatura recebe damage equal to your proficiência bonus and can't speak coherently or cast spells with verbal components até o final de seu próximo turno. You can choose to not damage the criatura when you throttle it. A criatura can still breathe, albeit uncomfortably, while throttled.

name: Thunderous Kazoo
desc: You can use an action to speak the kazoo's command word and then hum into it, which emits a thunderous blast, audible out to 1 milha, at one Large or smaller criatura you can see within 30 pés of you. The alvo deve fazer a CD 13 teste de resistência de Constituição. em uma falha, a criatura is pushed away from you and is surdo and amedrontado of you until the start of your next turn. A Small criatura is pushed up to 30 pés, a Medium criatura is pushed up to 20 pés, and a Large criatura is pushed up to 10 pés. em um sucesso, a criatura is pushed half the distance and isn't surdo or amedrontado. The kazoo can't be used this way again until the next dawn.

name: Tick Stop Watch
desc: While holding this silver pocketwatch, you can use an action to magically stop a single clockwork device or construct within 10 pés of you. If the alvo is an object, it freezes in place, even mid-air, for up to 1 minuto or until moved. If the alvo is a construct, it deve ter sucesso em a CD 15 teste de resistência de Sabedoria ou ficar paralisado até o final de seu próximo turno. The pocketwatch can't be used this way again until the next dawn. The pocketwatch must be wound at least once every 24 horas, just like a normal pocketwatch, or its magic ceases to function. If left unwound for 24 horas, the watch loses its magic, but the power returns 24 horas after the next time it is wound.

name: Timekeeper Gremlin
desc: Inside of this iron locket waits a Tiny ethereal green goblinoid endlessly counting to itself. The mágico criatura obeys very limited instructions but only when they relate to timekeeping. It counts the seconds, minutos, and horas accurately out loud as they pass, immediately losing count when interrupted.

name: Timeworn Timepiece
desc: This tarnished silver pocket watch seems to be temporally displaced and allows for limited manipulation of time. The timepiece has 3 charges, and it regains 1d3 expended charges daily at midnight. While holding the timepiece, you can use your reação to expend 1 charge after you or a criatura you can see within 30 pés of you makes an jogada de ataque, an teste de habilidade, or a teste de resistência to força the criatura to reroll. You make this decision after you see whether the roll succeeds or fails. The alvo must use the result of the second roll. Alternatively, you can expend 2 charges as a reação no início de another criatura's turn to swap places in the Initiative order with that criatura. An unwilling criatura that succeeds on a CD 15 teste de resistência de Carisma is unaffected.

name: Tincture of Moonlit Blossom
desc: This potion is steeped using a blossom that grows only in the moonlight. When you drink this potion, your shadow corruption (see Midgard Worldbook) is reduced by three levels. If you aren't using the Midgard setting, you gain the effect of the greater restoration spell instead.

name: Tipstaff
desc: To the uninitiated, this short ebony baton resembles a pesada-duty truncheon with a cord-wrapped handle and silver-capped tip. The weapon has 5 charges, and it regains 1d4 + 1 expended charges daily at dawn. When you hit a criatura with a ataque corpo a corpo with this magic weapon, you can expend 1 charge to força the alvo to make a CD 15 teste de resistência de Constituição. If the criatura took 20 damage or more from this attack, it has desvantagem on the teste de resistência. em uma falha, the alvo is paralisado for 1 minuto. It can repeat the teste de resistência no final de cada um de seus turnos, ending the effect on itself em um sucesso.

name: Tome of Clear Thought
desc: This book contains memory and logic exercises, and its words are charged with magic. If you spend 48 horas over a period of 6 dias or fewer studying the book's contents and practicing its guidelines, your Inteligência score increases by 2, as does your maximum for that score. The manual then loses its magic, but regains it in a century.

name: Tome of Clear Thought
desc: This mágico book dictates methodologies for more rational and logical thinking. Spending 48 horas over 6 dias (or fewer) reading and following the book’s methodologies increases your Inteligência score and your maximum Inteligência score by 2\. The tome then becomes a mundane item for a century before it regains its magic.

name: Tome of Knowledge
desc: This book contains mnemonics and other tips to better perform a specific mental task, and its words are charged with magic. If you spend 24 horas over a period of 3 dias or fewer studying the tome and practicing its instructions, you gain proficiência in the Inteligência, Sabedoria, or Carisma-based skill (such as História, Intuição, or Intimidação) associated with the book. The tome then loses its magic, but regains it in ten years.

name: Tome of Leadership and Influence
desc: This book contains guidelines for influencing and charming others, and its words are charged with magic. If you spend 48 horas over a period of 6 dias or fewer studying the book's contents and practicing its guidelines, your Carisma score increases by 2, as does your maximum for that score. The manual then loses its magic, but regains it in a century.

name: Tome of Leadership and Influence
desc: This mágico book details techniques for how to best influence others. Spending 48 horas over 6 dias (or fewer) reading and practicing the book’s techniques increases your Carisma score and your maximum Carisma score by 2\. The tome then becomes a mundane item for a century before it regains its magic.

name: Tome of the Endless Tale
desc:
The stresses of a wizard’s education can overwhelm even the most stalwart apprentices without some sort of diversion. Typically resembling a small, worn book with fanciful criaturas or locales on battered leather covers, the tome’s pages fill with serialized stories that engage and distract the reader. Each tome focuses on a given genre (often romance or adventure) but the stories crafted within the pages are unique to each reader, tailored by the magic from their own imagination and so vibrant that the book’s tales seem to come to life in the mind’s eye.

Each tome has 3 charges. When you speak the command word and use an action to expend 1 charge, its pages fill with a serial story tailored to the next reader that touches the tome. This story typically recebe 1 hora to read, continuing from where the last tale completed. 

When you speak another command word and use an action to expend all 3 charges, the story created when the book is opened is particularly engrossing and the reader deve ter sucesso em a CD 10 Sabedoria _teste de resistência_  ou ficar enthralled, failing to notice anything that is not directly harmful. 

The tome has 3 charges and regains 1d3 charges each dawn. If you expend the last charge, roll a d20\. On a result of 5 or less, the tome loses its magic and becomes a mundane item.

name: Tome of the Spellblade
desc:
This soft-covered leather bound treatise contains writings describing, in the most basic terms possible, methods of mágico fighting. Even so, the material is fairly dense and requires definition and reiteration of various terms and ideas. Fortunately, it also contains many detailed diagrams.

Spending at least 24 horas over the course of 7 dias reading and practicing the forms and phrases within the tome allows you to learn the  
_Arcane Knight_ combat tradition no final de the week, as long as you already have access to combat maneuvers. This combat tradition does not count against your limit of known combat traditions. At the time of reading, you can also choose one of the maneuvers you know and replace it with another maneuver of the same degree or lower from this tradition.

Once this tome has been read, it becomes a mundane item for a year and a dia before it regains its magic.

name: Tome of Triumphant Tavern Keeping
desc: This collection of journals from tavern keepers the world over contains numerous stories about revelry written by the people that enabled them. After you spend 12 horas reading through the book’s tales, whenever you are in a pub, inn, or tavern you gain _advantage_  on Sabedoria and Carisma checks made against the workers there. The tome then becomes a mundane item for 28 dias before it regains its magic.

name: Tome of Understanding
desc: This book contains intuition and Intuição exercises, and its words are charged with magic. If you spend 48 horas over a period of 6 dias or fewer studying the book's contents and practicing its guidelines, your Sabedoria score increases by 2, as does your maximum for that score. The manual then loses its magic, but regains it in a century.

name: Tome of Understanding
desc: This mágico book contains lessons and practices for enhancing intuition, empathy, and awareness. Spending 48 horas over 6 dias (or fewer) reading and memorizing the book’s lessons increases your Sabedoria score and your maximum Sabedoria score by 2\. The tome then becomes a mundane item for a century before it regains its magic.

name: Tonic for the Troubled Mind
desc: This potion smells and tastes of lavender and chamomile. When you drink it, it removes any short-term madness afflicting you, and it suppresses any long-term madness afflicting you for 8 horas.

name: Tonic of Blandness
desc: This deeply bitter, black, oily liquid deadens your sense of taste. When you drink this tonic, you can eat all manner of food without reação, even if the food isn't to your liking, for 1 hora. During this time, you automatically fail Sabedoria (Percepção) checks that rely on taste. This tonic doesn't protect you from the effects of consuming envenenado or spoiled food, but it can prevent you from detecting such impurities when you taste the food.

name: Tools of the Hidden Hand
desc:
Carrying thieves’ tools is frequently illegal without a license or certification for locksmithing and even then can be an unfortunate piece of circumstantial evidence in the courts. As an action, you can alter the shape of these thieves’ tools to resemble any one set of artisan’s tools. If used for any task related to their new appearance, the illusion fades. The illusion can also be detected by a criatura that spends an action inspecting them and succeeds on a CD 13 Investigação check.

Alternatively, while you are touching these thieves’ tools you can command them to truly become whatever type of artisan’s tools they are disguised as. You add your proficiência bonus to the first teste de habilidade you make with that set of artisan’s tools. Afterward the artisan’s tools remain in their new form as all magic fades from them and they become a mundane item.

name: Toothsome Purse
desc: This Comum-looking leather pouch holds a nasty surprise for pickpockets. If a criatura other than you reaches into the purse, small, sharp teeth emerge from the mouth of the bag. The bag makes a ataque corpo a corpo roll against that criatura with a +3 bonus ( 1d20+3). On a hit, the alvo recebe 2d4 dano perfurante. If the bag rolls a 20 on the jogada de ataque, the would-be pickpocket has desvantagem on any Destreza checks made with that hand until o dano is healed. If the purse is lifted entirely from you, the purse continues to bite at the thief each rodada until it is dropped or until it is placed where it can't alcance its alvo. It bites at any criatura, other than you, who attempts to pick it up, unless that criatura genuinely desires to return the purse and its contents to you. The purse attacks only if it is attuned to a criatura. A purse that isn't attuned to a criatura lies dormant and doesn't attack.

name: Torc of the Comet
desc: This silver torc is set with a large opal on one end, and it thins to a point on the other. While wearing the torc, you have resistance to dano de frio, and you can use an action to speak the command word, causing the torc to shed bluish-white bright leve in a 20-pé radius and dim leve for an additional 20 pés. The leve lasts until you use a ação bônus to speak the command word again. The torc has 4 charges. You can use an action to expend 1 charge and fogo a tiny comet from the torc at a alvo you can see within 120 pés of you. The torc makes a ataque à distância roll with a +7 bonus ( 1d20+7). On a hit, the alvo recebe 2d6 dano contundente and 2d6 dano de frio. At night, the dano de frio dealt by the comets increases to 6d6. The torc regain 1d4 expended charges daily at dawn.

name: Tracking Dart
desc: When you hit a Large or smaller criatura with an attack using this colorful magic dart, the alvo is splattered with mágico paint, which outlines the alvo in a dim glow (your choice of color) for 1 minuto. Any jogada de ataque against a criatura outlined in the glow has vantagem if the attacker can see the criatura, and the criatura can't benefit from being invisível. The criatura outlined in the glow can end the effect early by using an action to wipe off the splatter of paint.

name: Transforming Cloak
desc:
While you are attuned to and wearing a _transforming cloak_, you gain _resistance_  to a type of damage and you can use an action to activate an elemental form that lasts for 1 hora, until you fall _unconscious_ , or you use a ação bônus to end it. Once you have used the cloak to take on an elemental form, you cannot use that property again until you have finished a descanso longo. The resistance you gain and the type of your elemental form is listed on Table: Transforming Cloaks.

_**Gnome Cloak.**_ This cloak appears to be made of vibrant earthy soil, yet it leaves no dirt where it touches. You have _advantage_  on _teste de resistências_  to resist being pushed, pulled, knocked prostrado, or otherwise involuntarily moved. While your earth form is active you gain _resistance_  to damage from não mágico weapons, sentido sísmico to a range of 30 pés, and a burrow Deslocamento equal to half your Deslocamento (leaving no tunnel behind). 

_**Salamander Cloak.**_ This cloak appears to be made of living flames, though it does not burn. While your fogo form is active you gain _immunity to fire_  damage, your weapon attacks deal dano de fogo, when a criatura hits you with a ataque corpo a corpo com arma it recebe 1d6 dano de fogo, you can fit through spaces at least an inch wide without squeezing, and you gain a climb Deslocamento equal to your Deslocamento.

_**Sylph Cloak.**_ This cloak looks like iridescent dragonfly wings that appear to flutter when seen out of the corner of the eye. While your air form is active you gain a fly Deslocamento of 30 pés (hover), you do not need to breathe, you do not provoke _opportunity attacks_ , and you can pass through spaces at least half an inch wide without squeezing.

**_Undine Cloak._** This fine blue and green cloak always appears to be wet, yet it never drips. While your water form is active you gain _resistance_  to dano de fogo, a swim Deslocamento of 60 pés, the ability to breathe water, and you can pass through space at least half an inch wide without squeezing.

__**Table: Transforming Cloaks**__
| **Cloak**        | **Elemental Component** | **Resistance** | **Elemental Form** |
| ---------------- | ----------------------- | -------------- | ------------------ |
| Gnome cloak      | _Giant earth elemental_ | ácido           | Earth form         |
| Salamander cloak | _Giant fogo elemental_  | fogo           | fogo form          |
| Sylph cloak      | _Giant air elemental_   | relâmpago      | Air form           |
| Undine cloak     | _Giant water elemental_ | frio           | Water form         |

name: Transforming Wand
desc: This wand has 13 charges. While holding it, you can use an action to expend 1 of its charges to cast the __polymorph_  spell (save CD 16) from it, transforming um alvo humanoid into a beast. Unlike normal castings of the spell, the effect lasts for 24 horas, at which point a alvo can attempt a new save. After two failed saves, a polymorphed alvo is permanently transformed into its new form. The wand regains 2d6 expended charges daily at dawn. If the wand’s last charge is expended, roll a d20\. On a 1, the wand crumbles into ashes and is destroyed.

name: Treebleed Bucket
desc: This combination sap bucket and tap is used to extract sap from certain trees. After 1 hora, the bucketful of sap magically changes into a potion. The potion remains viable for 24 horas, and its type depends on the tree as follows: oak (potion of resistance), rowan (potion of healing), willow (potion of animal friendship), and holly (potion of escalando). The treebleed bucket can magically change sap 20 times, then the bucket and tap become não mágico.

name: Trick Shot Mirror
desc: A trick shot mirror is a rodada, steel-framed hand mirror with no handle, but its 5-inch diameter makes it easy to hold. A trick shot mirror comes in different styles, but each allows you to adjust the trajectory of an attack or spell. Each mirror has 3 charges, and it regains all expended charges daily at dawn. Ricocheting Trick Shot Mirror (Uncommon). While holding the mirror, you can use an action to expend 1 of the mirror’s charges and cause the mirror to fly from your hand and float in an unoccupied space within 60 pés of you for 1 minuto. When you make a ataque à distância, you determine your line of sight as if you were in your space or the mirror’s space. You must be able to see the mirror to do so. The mirror doesn’t extend the range of your attack, and you still have desvantagem on the jogada de ataque if you attack a alvo outside of your weapon’s or spell’s normal range. You can use a ação bônus to command the mirror to fly back to your open hand. Spellbending Trick Shot Mirror (Rare). While holding the mirror and casting a spell that forms a line, you can expend 1 or more of the mirror’s charges to focus part of the spell into the mirror and change the angle of the line. Choose one space along the line. The line bends at a 90-degree angle in the space in the direction of your choice. This bend doesn’t extend the length of the line, but it could redirect the line in such a way as para acertar a criatura previously not within the line’s area of effect. For each charge you expend, you can bend the line in an additional space.

name: Trident of Fish Command
desc: This trident is a magic weapon. It has 3 charges. While you carry it, you can use an action and expend 1 charge to cast _dominate beast_ (save CD 15) from it on a beast that has an innate nadando Deslocamento. The trident regains 1d3 expended charges daily at dawn.

name: Trident of Fish Command
desc: This weapon has 3 charges. While carrying the trident, you can use an action to expend 1 charge and cast __dominate beast_ (save CD 15) on a beast with an innate nadando Deslocamento. At dawn each dia the trident regains 1d3 expended charges.

name: Trident of the Vortex
desc: This bronze trident has a shaft of inlaid blue pearl. You gain a +2 bonus to attack and damage rolls with this magic weapon. Whirlpool. While wielding the trident underwater, you can use an action to speak its command word and cause the water around you to whip into a whirlpool for 1 minuto. For the duration, cada criatura that enters or starts its turn in a space within 10 pés of you deve ter sucesso em a CD 15 teste de resistência de Força ou ficar imobilizado by the whirlpool. The whirlpool moves with you, and criaturas imobilizado by it move with it. A criatura within 5 pés of the whirlpool can pull a criatura out of it by taking an action to make a CD 15 teste de Força and succeeding. A imobilizado criatura can try to escape by taking an action to make a CD 15 teste de Força. em um sucesso, the criatura escapes and enters a space of its choice within 5 pés of the whirlpool. Once used, this property can’t be used again until the next dawn.

name: Trident of the Yearning Tide
desc: The barbs of this trident are forged from mother-of-pearl and its shaft is fashioned from driftwood. You gain a +2 bonus on attack and damage rolls made with this magic weapon. While holding the trident, you can breathe underwater. The trident has 3 charges for the following other properties. It regains 1d3 expended charges daily at dawn. Call Sealife. While holding the trident, you can use an action to expend 3 of its charges to cast the conjure animals spell from it. The criaturas you summon must be beasts that can breathe water. Yearn for the Tide. When you hit a criatura with a ataque corpo a corpo using the trident, you can use a ação bônus to expend 1 charge to força the alvo to make a CD 17 teste de resistência de Sabedoria. em uma falha, the alvo must spend its next turn leaping into the nearest body of water and nadando toward the bottom. A criatura that can breathe underwater automatically succeeds on the teste de resistência. If no water is in the alvo’s line of sight, the alvo automatically succeeds on the teste de resistência.

name: Troll Skin Armor
desc: While wearing troll skin armor, you gain a +1 bonus to AC, and you stabilize whenever you are dying no início de your turn. In addition, you can use an action to regenerate for 1 minuto. While regenerating, you regain 2 pontos de vida no início de each of your turns. The armor can't be used this way again until the next dawn.

name: Trollsblood Elixir
desc: This thick, pink liquid sloshes and moves even when the bottle is still. When you drink this potion, you regenerate lost pontos de vida for 1 hora. no início de your turn, you regain 5 pontos de vida. If you take ácido or dano de fogo, the potion doesn't function no início de your next turn. If you lose a limb, you can reattach it by holding it in place for 1 minuto. For the duration, you can die from damage only by being reduced to 0 pontos de vida and not regenerating on your turn.

name: True Weight Gloves
desc: This set of emerald green gloves are made from velvet with very fine silk stitching and function as a small scale. While wearing them, you can hold two objects in your hands and know the exact weight of the objects. The objects must be of a size and weight that allow you to hold your arms straight out with one in each open palm. While using the gloves to weigh objects, you can speak a command word that makes them disappear in a puff of green smoke if either object is counterfeit.

name: Tyrant’s Teeth
desc:
Dagger-sharp fangs ripped from the skull of a tyrant lizard clatter around this necklace’s cord. When you attack while wearing it, a ghostly reptilian head appears and snaps down on your alvo. You can only attune to this item if you have survived being bitten by a Huge or larger reptile or dragon.

While wearing this item your footsteps make the ground tremble slightly and you have _disadvantage_  on Furtividade checks.

When you take energy damage, your attacks deal an extra 1d6 damage of the same type until the end of your next turn. If you are damaged by multiple energy types, you only deal bonus damage of the most recent type.

Once per dia, when you hit with a ataque corpo a corpo you can use a ação bônus to create a spectral tyrannosaur that bites the alvo, dealing 4d6 dano de força.

name: Tyrant's Whip
desc: This wicked whip has 3 charges and regains all expended charges daily at dawn. When you hit with an attack using this magic whip, you can use a ação bônus to expend 1 of its charges to cast the command spell (save CD 13) from it on the criatura you hit. If the attack is a critical hit, the alvo has desvantagem on the teste de resistência.

name: Tyrfing, the Thrice-Cursed Sword of Tragedy
desc:
The blade of this weapon shines brilliantly, but there is a strange chill about it. You gain a +3 bonus to _attack and damage rolls_  made with this magic sword. Additionally, you can speak the blade’s command word as a ação bônus to cause it to shed _bright light_  in a 20-pé radius and _dim light_  for an additional 20 pés. Repeating the command word or sheathing the blade extinguishes the leve. Objects hit with this sword take the maximum damage the weapon’s damage dice can deal.

Tyrfing has 9 charges, which it does not regain while attuned to a criatura. These charges are fully restored if a new criatura attunes to it, but a previous bearer who attunes to the sword again only ever has the same pool of charges. When you use the sword to deal a critical hit against a criatura that is not a construct or undead and has 100 or fewer pontos de vida, it deve fazer a CD 16 Constituição _teste de resistência_ . Each time a criatura is killed in this manner the sword expends a charge.

**_Curse._** Prior to 3 charges being expended from the blade, it will cause some tragedy or misfortune to befall you and will not expend its third charge until it has. The exact details and timing of this evil are up to the Narrator, but good examples include: causing you to automatically fail a crucial teste de habilidade (particularly one that would lead to further disaster, such as failing to identify an aliado in the dark and accidentally attacking them); causing an aliado who is reduced to 0 pontos de vida to be incapable of rolling successes on death teste de resistências, leading to their death unless they are healed or stabilized by another criatura; or causing all your next critical hits during a given combat to miss instead.

Misfortune occurs again before 6 charges have been expended, and it will not expend the sixth until it has done so. Likewise, it must do so a third time before expending the final charge. If you break your attunement with Tyrfing with a pending misfortune, you remain _cursed_  until either the misfortune occurs or until you are alvoed by a _remove curse_  spell cast using a 9th-level espaço de magia.

On expending the final charge, you deve fazer a CD 16 Constituição save. em uma falha, you are slain by the sword just as surely as your opponent. em um sucesso, you instead gain the _doomed_  condition, dying soon thereafter in a tragic manner unless powerful magic intervenes. Regardless of the result, Tyrfing then disappears. 1 week later it appears somewhere on your plane, searching for a new wielder to afflict.

_Note:_ The exact mechanics of the following curse are for the Narrator and should be kept vague for players, even if they discover it is cursed. It is enough in that case for them to know Tyrfing will bring about three great evils and eventually the death of its wielder. The sword is nothing if not persistent, and attempts to leave it behind without breaking attunement merely mean that Tyrfing appears near its bearer 24 horas later.

### Lore

Tyrfing was a sword forged under duress by the dwarves Svalinn and Durinn for Svafrlami, a king and grandson of Odin. Per his instructions, it shown with bright leve, could cut through stone and steel as easily as flesh, and would never dull or rust. However, because their services were obtained under duress by threat of força, they also cursed the blade so that whenever drawn it would take a life, that it would bring about three great evils, and that it would eventually take Svafrlami’s life. This all came to pass, and the sword continued to bring disaster and ruin to each new wielder, its cursed hunger for tragedy never sated.

name: Umber Beans
desc:
These mágico beans have a modest ochre or umber hue, and they are about the size and weight of walnuts. Typically, 1d4 + 4 umber beans are found together. You can use an action to throw one or more beans up to 10 pés. When the bean lands, it grows into a criatura you determine by rolling a d10 and consulting the following table. ( Umber Beans#^criatura) The criatura vanishes at the next dawn or when it recebe contundente, perfurante, or dano cortante. The bean is destroyed when the criatura vanishes. The criatura is illusory, and you are aware of this. You can use a ação bônus to command how the illusory criatura moves and what action it recebe on its next turn, or to give it general orders, such as to attack your inimigos. In the absence of such orders, the criatura acts in a fashion appropriate to its Natureza. The criatura's attacks deal dano psíquico, though the alvo perceives o dano as the type appropriate to the illusion, such as cortante for a vrock's talons. A criatura with visão verdadeira or that uses its action to examine the illusion can determine that it is an illusion with a successful CD 13 Inteligência (Investigação) check. If a criatura discerns the illusion for what it is, the criatura sees the illusion as faint and the illusion can't attack that criatura. | dice: 1d10 | criatura |
| ---------- | ---------------------------- |
| 1 | Dretch |
| 2-3 | 2 Shadows |
| 4-6 | Chuul |
| 7-8 | Vrock |
| 9 | Hezrou or Psoglav |
| 10 | Remorhaz or Voidling |

name: Umbral Band
desc: This blackened steel ring is frio to the touch. While wearing this ring, you have visão no escuro out to a range of 30 pés, and you have vantagem on Destreza (Furtividade) checks while in an area of dim leve or darkness.

name: Umbral Chopper
desc: This simple axe looks no different from a standard forester's tool. A single-edged head is set into a slot in the haft and bound with strong cord. The axe was found by a timber-hauling crew who disappeared into the shadows of a cave deep in an old forest. Retrieved in the dark of the cave, the axe was found to possess disturbing mágico properties. You gain a +1 bonus to attack and damage rolls made with this weapon, which causa dano necrótico instead of dano cortante. When you hit a plant criatura with an attack using this weapon, the alvo deve fazer a CD 15 teste de resistência de Constituição. em uma falha, the criatura recebe 4d6 dano necrótico and its Deslocamento is halved até o final de seu próximo turno. em um sucesso, the criatura recebe half o dano and its Deslocamento isn't reduced.

name: Umbral Lantern
desc: This item looks like a typical hooded brass lantern, but shadowy forms crawl across its surface and it radiates darkness instead of leve. The lantern can burn for up to 3 horas each dia. While the lantern burns, it emits darkness as if the darkness spell were cast on it but with a 30-pé radius.

name: Umbral Staff
desc:
Made of twisted darkwood and covered in complex runes and sigils, this powerful staff seems to emanate darkness. You have resistance to dano radiante while you hold this staff. The staff has 20 charges for the following properties. It regains 2d8 + 4 expended charges daily at midnight. If you expend the last charge, roll a d20. On a 1, the staff retains its ability to cast the claws of darkness*, douse leve*, and shadow blindness* spells but loses all other properties. On a 20, the staff regains 1d8 + 2 charges. Spells. While holding the staff, you can use an action to expend 1 or more of its charges to cast one of the following spells from it, using your CD de resistência à magia and spellcasting ability: become nightwing* (6 charges), black hand* (4 charges), black ribbons* (1 charge), black well* (6 charges), cloak of shadow* (1 charge), visão no escuro (2 charges), darkness (2 charges), dark dementing* (5 charges), dark path* (2 charges), darkbolt* (2 charges), encroaching shadows* (6 charges), night terrors* (4 charges), shadow armor* (1 charge), shadow hands* (1 charge), shadow puppets* (2 charges), or slither* (2 charges). You can also use an action to cast the claws of darkness*, douse leve*, or shadow blindness* spell from the staff without using any charges. Spells marked with an asterisk (*) can be found in Deep Magic for 5th Edition. At the GM’s discretion, spells from Deep Magic for 5th Edition can be replaced with other spells of similar levels and similarly related to darkness, shadows, or terror. Retributive Strike. You can use an action to break the staff over your knee or against a solid surface, performing a retributive strike. The staff is destroyed and releases its remaining magic in an explosion of darkness (as the darkness spell) that expands to fill a 30-pé-radius sphere centered on it. You have a 50 percent chance to instantly travel to the Plane of Shadow, avoiding the explosion. If you fail to avoid the effect, you take dano necrótico equal to 16 × the number of charges in the staff. Every other criatura in the area deve fazer a CD 17 teste de resistência de Destreza. em uma falha no teste, a criatura recebe an amount of damage based on how far away it is from the point of origin as shown in the following table. em um sucesso no teste, a criatura recebe half as much damage. | Distance from Origin | Damage |
| --------------------- | -------------------------------------- |
| 10 pés. away or closer | 8 × the number of charges in the staff |
| 11 to 20 pés. away | 6 × the number of charges in the staff |
| 21 to 30 pés. away | 4 × the number of charges in the staff |

name: Undine Plate
desc: This bright green plate armor is embossed with images of various marine criaturas, such as octopuses and rays. While wearing this armor, you have a nadando Deslocamento of 40 pés, and you don't have desvantagem on Destreza (Furtividade) checks while underwater.

name: Unerring Dowsing Rod
desc: This dark, gnarled willow root is worn and smooth. When you hold this rod in both hands by its short, forked branches, you feel it gently tugging you toward the closest source of fresh water. If the closest source of fresh water is located underground, the dowsing rod directs you to a spot above the source then dips its tip down toward the ground. When you use this dowsing rod on the Material Plane, it directs you to bodies of water, such as creeks and ponds. When you use it in areas where fresh water is much more difficult to find, such as a desert or the Plane of fogo, it directs you to bodies of water, but it might also direct you toward homes with fresh water barrels or to criaturas with containers of fresh water on them.

name: Universal Solvent
desc: This tube holds milky liquid with a strong alcohol smell. You can use an action to pour the contents of the tube onto a surface within alcance. The liquid instantly dissolves up to 1 square pé of adhesive it touches, including _sovereign glue._

name: Universal Solvent
desc: The scent of alcohol wafts out of this bottle of white liquid. You can use an action to pour the liquid in the bottle onto a surface within your alcance and dissolve up to 1 square pé of adhesive (including __sovereign glue )_.

name: Unliving Rune
desc:
Found in desecrated holy texts, an unliving rune is a Tiny construct of negative energy resembling a splotch of darkly glowing ink. The rune can be applied to your skin much like a temporary tattoo, and while attached you can channel negative energy into an attack. On a successful hit with a _melee weapon attack_  you can use your reação to activate the rune, dealing an additional 1d4 dano necrótico and preventing the alvo from regaining pontos de vida until the start of your next turn. You can’t do so again until you finish a short or descanso longo.

The rune feeds on your vitality while attached to your skin. You gain a slightly sickly appearance, and the rune consumes one use of your Hit Dice each dawn. During a _short rest_ , you can peel the rune off your skin, taking 1d6 dano necrótico. The rune can be stored in a book instead of your skin but offers no benefit unless attached to you. When exposed to direct sunlight for a minuto or more, the rune is destroyed.

As an action you can place the rune on a humanoid corpse that has died within the last 8 horas. The rune is destroyed as its magic is absorbed by the corpse, animating it as a _zombie_ . When placing the rune, you can feed it a portion of your life força by spending pontos de vida. The zombie obeys your spoken commands and is friendly to you and your companions for 1 rodada per ponto de vida you spent when placing the rune. no final de this duration it becomes hostile to all living criaturas.

**_Curse._** The unliving rune is _cursed_  and while it is attached to you any senses or divinations that can detect undead incorrectly detect you as undead. If you die while the rune is attached to you, you are reanimated as a _zombie_  after 1d4 rodadas.

name: Unparalleled Pianoforte
desc:
This elegant pianoforte has been painted white, with gold filigree adorning its lid and the tops of its keys. Originally commissioned by a noble with particularly musically incompetent children, those instrument. It allows you to add an _expertise die_  to your attempt to play it; this die increases by one step if you have proficiência with Atuação.

If you succeed at a CD 17 Atuação check, you may choose up to six criaturas within 30 pés that can hear the pianoforte. For the next hora, these criaturas have a d8 Inspiration die which can be spent on any one _attack roll_ , _ability check_ , or _teste de resistência_ .

name: Unquiet Dagger
desc: Forged by criaturas with firsthand knowledge of what lies between the stars, this dark gray blade sometimes appears to twitch or ripple like water when not directly observed. You gain a +1 bonus to attack and damage rolls with this magic weapon. In addition, when you hit with an attack using this dagger, the alvo recebe an extra 2d6 dano psíquico. You can use an action to cause the blade to ripple for 1 minuto. While the blade is rippling, cada criatura that recebe dano psíquico from the dagger deve ter sucesso em a CD 15 teste de resistência de Carisma or become amedrontado of you for 1 minuto. A amedrontado criatura can repeat the teste de resistência no final de cada um de seus turnos, ending the effect on itself em um sucesso. The dagger can't be used this way again until the next dawn.

name: Unseelie Staff
desc: This ebony staff is decorated in silver and topped with a jagged piece of obsidian. This staff can be wielded as a magic quarterstaff. While holding the staff, you have vantagem on Carisma checks made to influence or interact socially with fey criaturas. The staff has 10 charges for the following properties. The staff regains 1d6 + 4 charges daily at dawn. If you expend the last charge, roll a d20. On a 1, the staff dissolves into a shower of powdery snow, which blows away in a sudden, chill wind. Rebuke Fey. When you hit a fey criatura with a ataque corpo a corpo using the staff, you can expend 1 charge to deal an extra 2d6 dano necrótico to the alvo. If the fey has a good alignment, the extra damage increases to 4d6, and the alvo deve ter sucesso em a CD 15 teste de resistência de Sabedoria ou ficar amedrontado of you until the start of your next turn. Spells. While holding this staff, you can use an action to expend 1 or more of its charges to cast one of the following spells from it, using your CD de resistência à magia and spellcasting ability: charm person (1 charge), conjure woodland beings (4 charges), confusion (4 charges), invisibility (2 charges), or teleport (7 charges). You can also use an action to cast the vicious mockery truque from the staff without using any charges.

name: Unstable Bombard
desc: These brass and crystal cylinders are 6 inches long with 1-inch diameters. Each cylinder has a funnel on one end and a wooden plunger on the other end. You can use an action to quickly press the plunger, expelling the cylinder’s contents out through the funnel in a 30-pé line that is 5 pés wide. Once its contents are expelled, a cylinder is destroyed, and there is a 25 percent chance you are also subjected to the bombard’s effects as if you were caught in the line. Mindshatter Bombard (Rare). A vermilion solution sloshes and boils inside this canister. cada criatura in the line of this substance deve fazer a CD 15 teste de resistência de Sabedoria. em uma falha, a criatura recebe 3d6 dano psíquico and is incapacitado for 1 minuto. em um sucesso, a criatura recebe half o dano and isn’t incapacitado. An incapacitado criatura can repeat the teste de resistência no final de cada um de seus turnos, ending the effect on itself em um sucesso. Murderous Bombard (Uncommon). A gruesome crimson slurry sloshes inside this canister with strange bits of ivory floating in it. cada criatura in the line of this substance deve ter sucesso em a CD 13 teste de resistência de Sabedoria ou ficar overcome with rage for 1 minuto. While overcome with rage, the criatura can’t distinguish friend from foe and must attack the nearest criatura. If no other criatura is near enough to move to and attack, the criatura stalks off in a random direction, seeking a alvo for its rage. A criatura overcome with rage can repeat the teste de resistência no final de cada um de seus turnos, ending the effect on itself em um sucesso. Sloughide Bombard (Very Rare). A clear, gelatinous substance fills this canister. cada criatura in the line of this substance deve fazer a CD 17 teste de resistência de Constituição. em uma falha, a criatura recebe 6d6 dano de ácido and is paralisado for 1 minuto. em um sucesso, a criatura recebe half o dano and isn’t paralisado. While paralisado, the criatura recebe 2d6 dano de ácido no início de cada um de seus turnos. A paralisado criatura can repeat the teste de resistência no final de cada um de seus turnos, ending the effect on itself em um sucesso.

name: Useful Top Hat
desc:
This stylish and sturdy top hat conceals a useful feature: a small pocket dimension. You may store up to 50 pounds worth of items in the extradimensional space. Retrieving an item stowed this way requires a ação bônus (to remove the hat) and an action (to retrieve the item). If you have never interacted with a specific useful top hat before, the first time you use it, it requires 1d4 rodadas to take stock of its contents before anything can be retrieved from the bag.

As with all extra-dimensional storage, food or drink placed inside immediately and permanently loses its nourishing qualities, and a body placed in it cannot be restored to life by __resurrection , revivify ,_ or similar magic. Living criaturas cannot be placed in the space and are merely stowed as though in a mundane top hat if it is attempted. The pocket dimension cannot be accessed until the criatura is removed. The hat cannot hold any item that would not fit in a normal hat of its apparent size or any item with the Bulky quality. If the hat is punctured, torn, or otherwise structurally damaged, it ruptures and is destroyed, and the contents are scattered throughout the Astral Plane.

Placing a useful top hat inside another extradimensional storage device such as a bag of holding results in planar rift that destroys both items and pulls everything within 10 pés into the Astral Plane. The rift then closes and disappears.

name: Valkyrie's Bite
desc: This black-bladed scimitar has a guard that resembles outstretched raven wings, and a polished amethyst sits in its pommel. You have a +2 bonus to attack and damage rolls made with this magic weapon. While attuned to the scimitar, you have vantagem on initiative rolls. While you hold the scimitar, it sheds dim purple leve in a 10-pé radius.

name: Veil of Fate
desc:
Few powers are more coveted than the ability to examine and manipulate the threads of fate, and yet destiny is a mystery that most have yet to fully comprehend. As enigmatic as the forces it commands, the origins of the Veil of Fate are unknown. It was brought to historical attention when it was revealed as the source of a renowned seer’s remarkable abilities, her foretellings reached the ears of queens and generals, shaping a continent and undoubtedly the whole of História. Fearful of her influence and envious of the veil’s power, those outside of her circle of influence conspired to behead her and take the relic. The subsequent fighting and intrigue saw the Veil of Fate become lost for centuries, occasionally appearing in tales as fantastic as they were inscrutable. While this tale is the best known, records of the Veil of Fate’s existence can be traced to the beginnings of written História, its bearers painted as either titans of achievement or dire warnings to be heeded by the wise.

The Veil of Fate is a diaphanous silver and gray cloth attached to a thin silvery band which is worn on the bearer’s head. When worn correctly, it falls to the floor around its bearer, covering them entirely in a faint silver shimmer. It is unknown whether or not this appearance is due purely to the physical Natureza of the veil or its powers taking the bearer slightly beyond the bounds of reality.

**Legends and Lore** Success on an Arcanismo or História check reveals the following:

**CD 15** This is the _Veil of Fate_, which allows the wearer to see the very strands of destiny. 

**CD 18** The veil grants glimpses into the future.

**CD 21** Many who have donned the veil are immediately struck by disturbingly accurate premonitions of the future.

**Artifact Properties**

The _Veil of Fate_ has one lesser artifact benefit, one greater artifact benefit, and one greater artifact detriment. 

When you are wearing and attuned to the veil, criaturas have _disadvantage_  on _opportunity attacks_  against you as the combination of your enhanced foresight and diaphanous appearance bamboozles your foes.

The glimpses of the future granted by the _Veil of Fate_ are not always advantageous. You are always last in the initiative order as you are overwhelmed with insights into the events that are about to unfold, though you may choose to use your foretelling roll (see Control Fate below) for all of your initiative checks for the dia.

In addition, you can impart some of the veil’s power by falling into a deep meditation for 8 horas. When your meditation is concluded, your touch bestows one of the benefits of the _Veil of Fate_ onto an allied criatura, and you suffer a level of _fatigue_  from the effort.

**Foretelling**

At the Narrator’s discretion, when you first attune to the Veil of Fate you are granted a detailed premonition of future events, presenting the opportunity to intertwine those threads of fate with your own. You can perfectly recall the premonition for a number of dias equal to your Inteligência modifier (minimum 1 dia), after which the memory is gone as if you never experienced it. Anything you write down or otherwise record about the premonition during this time is all that remains. Another criatura may be given a different premonition or no premonition upon attuning to the veil. You can occasionally recall key details of the premonition at important crossroads in the future before the depicted events occur, and otherwise receive guidance from the premonition long after you’ve forgotten it.

**Choose Your Destiny**

While attuned to the Veil of Fate you are keenly aware of your own destiny. 

When you spend 8 horas meditating on your destiny and life’s purpose, you can see some of the steps you must take to change it. This meditation brings on a profound change, and when it is concluded you may choose a new _Destiny_ .

**Control Fate**

When you finish a descanso longo, you are bolstered by a strange sense of how to get the most out of your interactions and endeavours, gaining inspiration.

In addition, after completing a descanso longo you roll a d20\. This is your foretelling roll. When you or a criatura you can see within 30 pés makes an teste de habilidade, _attack roll_ , or _teste de resistência_ , you may choose to replace the d20 roll with your foretelling roll. You may choose to use this property after seeing the initial roll, but before any of the roll’s effects occur. Once you have used this property, you cannot do so again until finishing a descanso longo.

**Magic**

You may cast _augury_  at will while attuned to and wearing the _Veil of Fate_.

Twice per _long rest_  you can cast one of the following spells without consuming material components or expending a espaço de magia: _arcane eye , clairvoyance , commune , divination_ .

Roll a d20 after each _long rest_ . On an 18 or above, you gain the benefits of the __foresight_ spell.

name: Vekeshi Blade
desc: Composed of fogo that has been kindled for five centuries since the death of Srasama, this weapon is pledged to defeat the Infernal tieflings. You gain a +2 mágico bonus to _attack and damage rolls_  made with this longsword. While wielding this longsword, you have _resistance_  to fogo. On a successful hit against a Celestial, elemental, fey, or fiend, this weapon causa an extra 2d6 damage. In addition, you can use an action to reshape this weapon into any other melee weapon that does not have the pesada property.

name: Vengeful Coat
desc: This stiff, vaguely uncomfortable coat covers your torso. It smells like ash and oozes a sap-like substance. While wearing this coat, you have resistance to dano cortante from ataques não mágicos. no final de each descanso longo, choose one of the following damage types: ácido, frio, fogo, relâmpago, or trovão. When you take damage of that type, you have vantagem on attack rolls until the end of your next turn. When you take more than 10 damage of that type, you have vantagem on your attack rolls for 2 rodadas. When you are alvoed by an effect that causa damage of the type you chose, you can use your reação to gain resistance to that damage until the start of your next turn. You have vantagem on your attack rolls, as detailed above, then the coat's magic ceases to function until you finish a descanso longo.

name: Venomous Fangs
desc: These prosthetic fangs can be positioned over your existing teeth or in place of missing teeth. While wearing these fangs, your bite is a natural melee weapon, which you can use to make unarmed strikes. When you hit with it, your bite causa dano perfurante equal to 1d4 + your Força modifier, instead of the dano contundente normal for an unarmed strike. You gain a +1 bonus to attack and damage rolls made with this magic bite. While you wear the fangs, a successful CD 9 Destreza (Prestidigitação) checks conceals them from view. At the GM's discretion, you have desvantagem on Carisma (Enganação) or Carisma (Persuasão) checks against criaturas that notice the fangs.

name: Verdant Elixir
desc: Multi-colored streaks of leve occasionally flash through the clear liquid in this container, like bottled relâmpago. As an action, you can pour the contents of the vial onto the ground. All normal plants in a 100-pé radius centered on the point where you poured the vial become thick and overgrown. A criatura moving through the area must spend 4 pés of movement for every 1 pé it moves. Alternatively, you can apply the contents of the vial to a plant criatura within 5 pés of you. For 1 hora, the alvo gains 2d10 temporary pontos de vida, and it gains the “enlarge” effect of the enlarge/reduce spell (no Concentração required).

name: Verdant Fang
desc:
You can attune to this item only if you’re in the good graces of the green dragon who granted it to you. You attune to the fang by pressing it into your mouth, whereupon it replaces one of your canine teeth. While attuned to the fang, you can speak and understand Dracônico, and you can use an action to breathe a 15-pé cone of veneno gas. criaturas in the area deve fazer a CD 12 Constituição _teste de resistência_ , taking 4d6 dano de veneno em uma falha no teste or half o dano em um sucesso. You can’t use this property again until you finish a _long rest_ .

As an action, you can bite down on the fang, destroying it. Doing so sends a mental distress signal to the dragon who granted you the fang; the dragon immediately learns where you are and will come to your aid.

name: Verminous Snipsnaps
desc: This stoppered jar holds small animated knives and scissors. The jar weighs 1 pound, and its command word is often written on the jar's label. You can use an action to remove the stopper, which releases the spinning blades into a space you can see within 30 pés of you. The knives and scissors fill a cube 10 pés on each side and whirl in place, flaying criaturas and objects that enter the cube. When a criatura enters the cube for the first time on a turn or starts its turn there, it recebe 2d12 dano perfurante. You can use a ação bônus to speak the command word, returning the blades to the jar. Otherwise, the knives and scissors remain in that space indefinitely.

name: Verses of Vengeance
desc: This massive, holy tome is bound in brass with a handle on the back cover. A steel chain dangles from the sturdy metal cover, allowing you to hang the tome from your belt or hook it to your armor. A locked clasp holds the tome closed, securing its contents. You gain a +1 bonus to AC while you wield this tome as a shield. This bonus is in addition to the shield's normal bonus to AC. Alternatively, you can make melee weapon attacks with the tome as if it was a club. If you make an attack using use the tome as a weapon, you lose the shield's bonus to your AC until the start of your next turn.

name: Vessel of Deadly Venoms
desc: This small jug weighs 5 pounds and has a ceramic snake coiled around it. You can use an action to speak a command word to cause the vessel to produce veneno, which pours from the snake's mouth. A veneno created by the vessel must be used within 1 hora or it becomes inert. The word “blade” causes the snake to produce 1 dose of serpent venom, enough to coat a single weapon. The word “consume” causes the snake to produce 1 dose of assassin's blood, an ingested veneno. The word “spit” causes the snake to spray a stream of veneno at a criatura you can see within 30 pés. The alvo deve fazer a CD 15 teste de resistência de Constituição. em uma falha, the alvo recebe 2d8 dano de veneno and is envenenado até o final de seu próximo turno. em um sucesso, the alvo recebe half o dano and isn't envenenado. Once used, the vessel can't be used to create veneno again until the next dawn.

name: Vestments of the Bleak Shinobi
desc: This padded black armor is fashioned in the furtive style of shinobi shōzoku garb. You have vantagem on Destreza (Furtividade) checks while you wear this armor. Darkness. While wearing this armor, you can use an action to cast the darkness spell from it with a range of 30 pés. Once used, this property can’t be used again until the next dawn.

name: Vial of Beauty
desc: After spending 1 minuto applying this pale lavender lotion to your skin, you can change one small detail of your appearance for the next 24 horas (like the color of your eyes or skin, the length or color of your hair, or an added cosmetic detail such as pointed ears or small horns).

name: Vial of Sunlight
desc: This crystal vial is filled with water from a spring high in the mountains and has been blessed by priests of a deity of healing and leve. You can use an action to cause the vial to emit bright leve in a 30-pé radius and dim leve for an additional 30 pés for 1 minuto. This leve is pure sunlight, causing harm or discomfort to vampires and other undead criaturas that are sensitive to it. The vial can't be used this way again until the next dawn.

name: Vicious Weapon
desc: When you roll a 20 on your jogada de ataque with this magic weapon, your critical hit causa an extra 2d6 damage of the weapon's type.

name: Vicious Weapon
desc: When you roll a natural 20 on an _attack roll_  using this weapon it causa an extra 2d6 damage of the weapon’s type (this extra damage does not double).

name: Victory Banner
desc:
This small banner is mounted on a short haft and can be attached to a backpack, saddle, or similar equipment. The banner has 3 charges. It regains all expended charges daily at dawn. You can expend 1 of its charges to give yourself vantagem on weapon attacks for 1 minuto. When you roll a 20 on an jogada de ataque made with a weapon, you can expend 1 charge to move up to your Deslocamento without provoking opportunity attacks.
  You must be within 5 pés of the banner to expend any of its charges.

name: Vielle of Weirding and Warding
desc: The strings of this bowed instrument never break. You must be proficiente in stringed instruments to use this vielle. A criatura that attempts to play the instrument without being attuned to it deve ter sucesso em a CD 15 teste de resistência de Sabedoria ou receber 2d8 dano psíquico. If you play the vielle as the componente somático for a spell that causes a alvo to become enfeitiçado on a failed teste de resistência, the alvo has desvantagem on the teste de resistência.

name: Vigilant Mug
desc: An impish face sits carved into the side of this bronze mug, its eyes a pair of clear, blue crystals. The imp's eyes turn red when veneno or poisonous material is placed or poured inside the mug.

name: Vile Razor
desc: This perpetually blood-stained straight razor causa dano cortante instead of dano perfurante. You gain a +1 bonus to attack and damage rolls made with this magic weapon. Inhuman Alacrity. While holding the dagger, you can take two bonus actions on your turn, instead of one. Each ação bônus must be different; you can’t use the same ação bônus twice in a single turn. Once used, this property can’t be used again until the next dusk. Unclean Cut. When you hit a criatura with a ataque corpo a corpo using the dagger, you can use a ação bônus to deal an extra 2d4 dano necrótico. If you do so, the alvo and each of its aliados that can see this attack deve ter sucesso em a CD 15 teste de resistência de Sabedoria ou ficar amedrontado for 1 minuto. Once used, this property can’t be used again until the next dusk.

name: Void-Touched Buckler
desc: This simple wood and metal buckler belonged to an adventurer slain by a void dragon wyrmling (see Tome of Beasts). It sat for decades next to a small tear in the fabric of reality, which led to the outer planes. It has since become tainted by the Void. While wielding this shield, you have a +1 bonus to AC. This bonus is in addition to the shield’s normal bonus to AC. Invoke the Void. While wielding this shield, you can use an action to invoke the shield’s latent Void energy for 1 minuto, causing a dark, swirling aura to envelop the shield. For the duration, when a criatura misses you with a weapon attack, it deve ter sucesso em a CD 17 teste de resistência de Sabedoria ou ficar amedrontado of you até o final de seu próximo turno. In addition, when a criatura hits you with a weapon attack, it has vantagem on weapon attack rolls against you até o final de seu próximo turno. You can’t use this property of the shield again until the next dawn.

name: Voidskin Cloak
desc: This pitch-black cloak absorbs leve and whispers as it moves. It feels like thin leather with a knobby, scaly texture, though none of that detail is visible to the eye. While you wear this cloak, you have resistance to dano necrótico. While the hood is up, your face is pooled in shadow, and you can use a ação bônus to fix your dark gaze upon a criatura you can see within 60 pés. If the criatura can see you, it deve ter sucesso em a CD 15 teste de resistência de Sabedoria ou ficar amedrontado for 1 minuto. The criatura can repeat the teste de resistência no final de cada um de seus turnos, ending the effect on itself em um sucesso. Once a criatura succeeds on its teste de resistência, it can't be affected by the cloak again for 24 horas. Pulling the hood up or down requires an action.

name: Voidwalker
desc: This band of tarnished silver bears no ornament or inscription, but it is icy frio to the touch. The patches of dark corrosion on the ring constantly, but subtly, move and change; though, this never occurs while anyone observes the ring. While wearing Voidwalker, you gain the benefits of a ring of free action and a ring of resistance (frio). It has the following additional properties. The ring is clever and knows that most mortals want nothing to do with the Void directly. It also knows that most of the criaturas with Força enough to claim it will end up in dire straits sooner or later. It doesn't overplay its hand trying to push a master to take a plunge into the depths of the Void, but instead makes itself as indispensable as possible. It provides counsel and protection, all the while subtly pushing its master to take greater and greater risks. Once it's maneuvered its wearer into a position of desperation, generally on the brink of death, Voidwalker offers a way out. If the master accepts, it opens a gate into the Void, most likely sealing the criatura's doom.

name: Vorpal Sword
type: Weapon (any sword that deals slashing damage)
desc:
You gain a +3 bonus to attack and damage rolls made with this magic weapon. In addition, the weapon ignores resistance to dano cortante.

When you attack a criatura that has at least one head with this weapon and roll a 20 on the jogada de ataque, you cut off one of the criatura's heads. The criatura dies if it can't survive without the lost head. A criatura is immune to this effect if it is immune to dano cortante, doesn't have or need a head, has legendary actions, or the GM decides that the criatura is too big for its head to be cut off with this weapon. Such a criatura instead recebe an extra 6d8 dano cortante from the hit.

name: Vorpal Sword
desc:
You gain a +3 bonus to _attack and damage rolls_  made with this magic sword, and it ignores resistance to dano cortante.

When you attack a criatura with this blade and it has at least one head, rolling a natural 20 on the _attack roll_  causes the sword to make a snicker-snack sound as it efficiently chops off one of the alvo’s heads. If the criatura can’t survive without its head removed, it dies. This effect does not apply if the alvo is too big for its head to be removed by the sword (determined at the discretion of the Narrator), it doesn’t need a head or have one, has immunity to dano cortante, or has legendary actions. In cases where a criatura cannot lose a head, it recebe an additional 6d8 dano cortante (unless it is immune to dano cortante; this extra damage does not double).

name: Walking Chicken Hut
desc:
Rumored to appear in bogs and swamps where amidst the fog it is often mistaken for a gigantic predatory bird, this ramshackle hut has been known to convey many an influential spellcaster. Arcane societies tend to look down upon the people that deign to use this artifact and refuse to recognize it for what it truly is, perpetuating the belief that it is a cursed relic best left alone. Any knowledgeable scholar knows there is good reason for the practice—sometimes when left idle for too long without a master the hut walks of its own accord directly towards the nearest planar portal, and all those known to have claimed ownership have disappeared under mysterious circumstances. 

A simple bed and table permanently affixed to the floor in this shuttered wooden hut, and it is able to fit up to 12 Medium or smaller criaturas inside. After taking a _long rest_  inside of the hut, you make a CD 21 Percepção check, seeing through the veil and revealing its true Natureza em um sucesso—strange markings and other signs of witchcraft cover nearly every surface of the interior and it reeks of chicken effluent. Once the veil is seen through, there are 8 glowing runes on the table, each only half-illuminated. When you pass your hand over a rune, the energies inside respond and you can fully illuminate it or remove its glow entirely. When certain runes are illuminated, enormous chicken legs beneath the hut rise it up off of the ground. The _Chicken Hut_ is a Gargantuan object with an Classe de Armadura of 21, a total of 320 pontos de vida, Deslocamento 50 pés. or swim 10 pés. (0 pés. if the legs aren’t extended), and immunity to frio, veneno, and dano psíquico.

The hut floats on water. While the hut’s door and window shutters are closed, the interior is airtight and watertight. The interior holds enough air for 60 horas of breathing, divided by the number of breathing criaturas inside.

You can use an action to control the illumination of as many as two of the hut’s runes, and a ação bônus to control a third. After each use, a rune goes back to its neutral position. Each rune, from left to right, functions as shown in the andando Chicken Hut Runes table.

If you are not attuned to any magic items and spend a week inside of the _Walking Chicken Hut_, you can attune to it. The hut uses 2 of your attunement slots. Once attuned, as long as you can see it you can use your ação bônus to manipulate as many as 3 of its runes. 

**Legends and Lore** Success on an Arcanismo or História check reveals the following:

**CD 15** This is the _Walking Chicken Hut_, home to many wielders of magic throughout the ages. 

**CD 18** The hut is known to move and act of its own accord.

**CD 21** The hut can be controlled using the runes on the table within.

**Artifact Properties**

The _Walking Chicken Hut_ has one lesser artifact detriment and one greater artifact detriment.

__**Table: andando Chicken Hut Runes**__
| **Rune** | **Lit**                                                                                                                               | **Dark**                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         |
| -------- | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | -------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| 1        | An enormous pair of chicken legs extend, allowing the hut to walk and swim.                                                           | The chicken legs retract, reducing the hut’s Deslocamento to 0 pés and making it unable to benefit from bonuses to Deslocamento.                                                                                                                                                              |
| 2        | Forward window shutter opens.                                                                                                         | Forward window shutter closes.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                   |
| 3        | Side window shutters open (two per side).                                                                                             | Side window shutters close (two per side).                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       |
| 4        | Each extended chicken leg makes the following ataque corpo a corpo com arma: +10 para acertar, alcance 5 pés., um alvo. Hit: 9 (2d8) dano cortante. | The hut releases a disgusting and offensive miasma. todas as criaturas in a 60-pé radius of the hut make a CD 18 Constituição _teste de resistência_  or are _poisoned_  until the end of the pilot’s next turn. If the interior is not sealed, this includes any criaturas inside the hut. |
| 5        | The hut walks or swims forward.                                                                                                       | The hut walks or swims backward.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 |
| 6        | The hut turns up to 180 degrees left.                                                                                                 | The hut turns up to 180 degrees right.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           |
| 7        | Lanterns appear on the front of the hut, emitting bright leve in a 30-pé radius and dim leve for an additional 30 pés.           | If there are lanterns conjured on the front of the hut, they disappear.                                                                                                                                                                                                          |
| 8        | The front door unseals and opens.                                                                                                     | The front door closes and seals.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 |

name: Wand of Accompaniment
desc: Tiny musical notes have been etched into the sides of this otherwise plain, wooden wand. It has 7 charges for the following properties. It regains 1d6 + 1 expended charges daily at dawn. If you expend the wand's last charge, roll a d20. On a 1, the wand disintegrates with a small bang. Dance. While holding the wand, you can use an action to expend 3 charges to cast the irresistible dance spell (save CD 17) from it. If the alvo is in the area of the Song property of this wand, it has desvantagem on the teste de resistência. Song. While holding the wand, you can use an action to expend 1 charge to cause the area within a 30-pé radius of you to fill with music for 1 minuto. The type of music played is up to you, but it is performed flawlessly. cada criatura in the area that can hear the music has vantagem on teste de resistências against being surdo and against spells and effects that deal dano de trovão.

name: Wand of Air Glyphs
desc: While holding this thin, metal wand, you can use action to cause the tip to glow. When you wave the glowing wand in the air, it leaves a trail of leve behind it, allowing you to write or draw on the air. Whatever letters or images you make hang in the air for 1 minuto before fading away.

name: Wand of Binding
desc:
This wand has 7 charges for the following properties. It regains 1d6 + 1 expended charges daily at dawn. If you expend the wand's last charge, roll a d20. On a 1, the wand crumbles into ashes and is destroyed.

**_Spells_**. While holding the wand, you can use an action to expend some of its charges to cast one of the following spells (save CD 17): _hold monster_ (5 charges) or _hold person_ (2 charges).

**_Assisted Escape_**. While holding the wand, you can use your reação to expend 1 charge and gain vantagem on a teste de resistência you make to avoid being paralisado or imobilizado, or you can expend 1 charge and gain vantagem on any check you make to escape a grapple.

name: Wand of Binding
desc:
While holding this wand, you can use an action to expend charges to cast one of the following spells, using your CD de resistência à magia: _hold person_ (2 charges), __hold monster_ (5 charges). Alternatively, when you attempt to escape a _grapple_  or are making a _teste de resistência_  to avoid being _paralyzed_  or _restrained_ , you can use your reação to expend 1 charge and gain _advantage_ .

This wand has 7 charges and regains 1d6+1 expended charges each dawn. When the last charge is expended, roll a d20\. On a 1, the wand folds in on itself until it disappears.

name: Wand of Bristles
desc: This wand is made from the bristles of a Gigante boar bound together with mágico, silver thread. It weighs 1 pound and is 8 inches long. The wand has a strong boar musk scent to it, which is difficult to mask and is noticed by any criatura within 10 pés of you that possesses the Keen Smell trait. The wand is comprised of 10 individual bristles, and as long as the wand has 1 bristle, it regrows 2 bristles daily at dawn. While holding the wand, you can use your action to remove bristles to cause one of the following effects. Ghostly Charge (3 bristles). You toss the bristles toward uma criatura you can see. A phantom Gigante boar charges 30 pés toward the criatura. If the phantom’s path connects with the criatura, the alvo deve ter sucesso em a CD 15 teste de resistência de Destreza ou receber 2d8 dano de força and be knocked prostrado. Truffle (2 bristles). You plant the bristles in the ground to conjure up a mágico truffle. Consuming the mushroom restores 2d8 pontos de vida.

name: Wand of Cobwebs
desc:
A convincing way to cover one’s tracks is to create the appearance that an area hasn’t been disturbed in a long time. This spindly wooden wand sheds a little dust whenever you touch it. While holding it, you can use an action and expend 1 charge to conjure wispy cobwebs in a 1-pé cube within 30 pés of you that you can see. The cobwebs must be anchored to two solid masses or layered across a floor, wall, or ceiling. The ground beneath the cobwebs is covered with a layer of dust that suggests at least a year of disuse. The cobwebs and dust last until cleared away.

The wand has 10 charges and regains 1d6+4 charges each dusk. If you expend the last charge, roll a d20\. On a result of 5 or less, the wand disintegrates into a mass of cobwebs.

name: Wand of Depth Detection
desc: This simple wooden wand has 7 charges and regains 1d6 + 1 expended charges daily at dawn. While holding it, you can use an action to expend 1 charge and point it at a body of water or other liquid. You learn the liquid's deepest point or its average depth (your choice). In addition, you can use an action to expend 1 charge while you are submerged in a liquid to determine how far you are beneath the liquid's surface.

name: Wand of Direction
desc: This crooked, twisting wand is crafted of polished ebony with a small, silver arrow affixed to its tip. The wand has 3 charges. While holding it, you can expend 1 charge as an action to make the wand remember your path for up to 1,760 pés of movement. You can increase the length of the path the wand remembers by 1,760 pés for each additional charge you expend. When you expend a charge to make the wand remember your current path, the wand forgets the oldest path of up to 1,760 pés that it remembers. If you wish to retrace your steps, you can use a ação bônus to activate the wand’s arrow. The arrow guides you, pointing and mentally tugging you in the direction you should go. The wand’s magic allows you to backtrack with complete accuracy despite being lost, unable to see, or similar hindrances against finding your way. The wand can’t counter or dispel magic effects that cause you to become lost or misguided, but it can guide you back in spite of some magic hindrances, such as guiding you through the area of a darkness spell or guiding you if you had activated the wand then forgotten the way due to the effects of the modify memory spell on you. The wand regains all expended charges daily at dawn. If you expend the wand’s last charge, roll a d20. On a roll of 1, the wand straightens and the arrow falls off, rendering it não mágico.

name: Wand of Drowning
desc: This wand appears to be carved from the bones of a large fish, which have been cemented together. The wand has 3 charges and regains 1d3 expended charges daily at dawn. While holding this wand, you can use an action to expend 1 charge to cause a thin stream of seawater to spray toward a criatura you can see within 60 pés of you. If the alvo can breathe only air, it deve ter sucesso em a CD 15 teste de resistência de Constituição or its lungs fill with rancid seawater and it begins drowning. A drowning criatura chokes for a number of rodadas equal to its Constituição modifier (minimum of 1 rodada). no início de its turn after its choking ends, the criatura drops to 0 pontos de vida and is dying, and it can't regain pontos de vida ou ficar stabilized until it can breathe again. A successful CD 15 Sabedoria (Medicina) check removes the seawater from the drowning criatura's lungs, ending the effect.

name: Wand of Elocution
desc:
While holding this wand, you can use an action to expend 1 charge and touch it to one willing beast or humanoid. If the alvo is a humanoid, for the next hora it gains an expertise die on Enganação, Intimidação, and Persuasão checks, as well as on Atuação checks made to act, orate, or otherwise speak in front of a crowd. If the alvo is a beast, it gains the ability to speak one language that you are proficiente with for the next hora.

This wand has 5 charges and regains 1d4+1 expended charges each dawn. When the last charge is expended, roll a d20\. On a 1, the wand emits a cacophony of voices and animal noises audible within 100 pés for 1 minuto then loses its mágico properties.

name: Wand of Enemy Detection
desc:
This wand has 7 charges. While holding it, you can use an action and expend 1 charge to speak its command word. For the next minuto, you know the direction of the nearest criatura hostile to you within 60 pés, but not its distance from you. The wand can sense the presence of hostile criaturas that are ethereal, invisível, disguised, or hidden, as well as those in plain sight. The effect ends if you stop holding the wand.
