The wand regains 1d6 + 1 expended charges daily at dawn. If you expend the wand's last charge, roll a d20. On a 1, the wand crumbles into ashes and is destroyed.

name: Wand of Enemy Detection
desc:
While holding this wand, you can use an action to speak its command word and expend 1 charge to extend your senses for 1 minuto. You sense the direction (but not precise location) of the nearest criatura hostile to you within 60 pés (this includes ethereal, _invisible_ , disguised, and hidden criaturas, as well as those in plain sight). The effect ends early if you stop holding the wand.

This wand has 7 charges and regains 1d6+1 expended charges each dawn. When the last charge is expended, roll a d20\. On a 1, the wand disappears the next time it is unobserved.

name: Wand of Erudition
desc:
While holding this wand, you can use an action to expend 1 charge and alvo one willing humanoid you can see within 30 pés. For the next hora, the alvo gains one of the following benefits:

* The ability to read, speak, and understand one language you are proficiente with.
* proficiência with one skill or tool with which you are proficiente.
* Knowledge of some piece of information you know that you could communicate in less than 1 minuto, such as the contents of a book you have read or directions to a location familiar to you. The alvo gains this knowledge even if you do not share a language. When the effect ends, the alvo forgets the information you imparted.

This wand has 5 charges and regains 1d4+1 expended charges each dawn. When the last charge is expended, roll a d20\. On a 1, the wand fades from existence and you forget you ever owned it.

name: Wand of Extinguishing
desc: This charred and blackened wooden wand has 3 charges. While holding it, you can use an action to expend 1 of its charges to extinguish a não mágico flame within 10 pés of you that is no larger than a small campfire. The wand regains all expended charges daily at dawn. If you expend the wand's last charge, roll a d20. On a 1, the wand transforms into a wand of ignition.

name: Wand of Fear
desc:
This wand has 7 charges for the following properties. It regains 1d6 + 1 expended charges daily at dawn. If you expend the wand's last charge, roll a d20. On a 1, the wand crumbles into ashes and is destroyed.

**_Command_**. While holding the wand, you can use an action to expend 1 charge and command another criatura to flee or grovel, as with the _command_ spell (save CD 15).

**_Cone of Fear_**. While holding the wand, you can use an action to expend 2 charges, causing the wand's tip to emit a 60-pé cone of amber leve. cada criatura in the cone deve ter sucesso em a CD 15 teste de resistência de Sabedoria or become amedrontado of you for 1 minuto. While it is amedrontado in this way, a criatura must spend its turns trying to move as far away from you as it can, and it can't willingly move to a space within 30 pés of you. It also can't take reactions. For its action, it can use only the Dash action or try to escape from an effect that prevents it from moving. If it has nowhere it can move, the criatura can use the Dodge action. no final de cada um de seus turnos, a criatura can repeat the teste de resistência, ending the effect on itself em um sucesso.

name: Wand of Fear
desc:
While holding this wand, you can use an action to expend 1 charge and command another criatura to flee or grovel (as the _command_ spell, save CD 15). Alternatively, you can use an action to expend 2 charges, causing the wand to emit a 60-pé cone of leve. cada criatura in the area makes a CD 15 Sabedoria _teste de resistência_  or becomes _frightened_  of you for 1 minuto. A criatura amedrontado in this way must spend its turns trying to move as far away from you as possible, and it can’t willingly move to a space within 30 pés of you. It also can’t take reactions. On its turn, the amedrontado criatura can use only the Dash action or try to escape from an effect that prevents it from moving, or if it has nowhere to move then the Dodge action. A amedrontado criatura can repeat the _teste de resistência_  no final de cada um de seus turnos, ending the effect on itself em um sucesso.

This wand has 7 charges and regains 1d6+1 expended charges each dawn. When the last charge is expended, roll a d20\. On a 1, the wand releases a chilling wail and crumbles into nothing.

name: Wand of Fermentation
desc: Fashioned out of oak, this wand appears heavily stained by an unknown liquid. The wand has 7 charges and regains 1d6 + 1 expended charges daily at dawn. If you expend the wand's last charge, roll a d20. On a 1, the wand explodes in a puff of black smoke and is destroyed. While holding the wand, you can use an action and expend 1 or more of its charges to transform não mágico liquid, such as blood, apple juice, or water, into an alcoholic beverage. For each charge you expend, you transform up to 1 gallon of não mágico liquid into an equal amount of beer, wine, or other spirit. The alcohol transforms back into its original form if it hasn't been consumed within 24 horas of being transformed.

name: Wand of Fireballs
desc:
This wand has 7 charges. While holding it, you can use an action to expend 1 or more of its charges to cast the _fireball_ spell (save CD 15) from it. For 1 charge, you cast the 3rd-level version of the spell. You can increase the espaço de magia level by one for each additional charge you expend.

The wand regains 1d6 + 1 expended charges daily at dawn. If you expend the wand's last charge, roll a d20. On a 1, the wand crumbles into ashes and is destroyed.

name: Wand of Fireballs
desc:
While holding this wand, you can use an action to expend 1 or more charges to cast fireball (save CD 15). For 1 charge, you cast the spell’s 3rd-level version. Increase the espaço de magia level by one for each additional expended charge.

This wand has 7 charges and regains 1d6+1 expended charges each dawn. When the last charge is expended, roll a d20\. On a 1, the wand disappears in a flash of fogo and smoke.

name: Wand of Flame Control
desc:
This wand is fashioned from a branch of pine, stripped of bark and beaded with hardened resin. The wand has 3 charges. If you use the wand as an arcane focus while casting a spell that causa dano de fogo, you can expend 1 charge as part of casting the spell to increase the spell's damage by 1d4. In addition, while holding the wand, you can use an action to expend 1 of its charges to cause one of the following effects: - Change the color of any flames within 30 pés.
- Cause a single flame to burn lower, halving the range of leve it sheds but burning twice as long.
- Cause a single flame to burn brighter, doubling the range of the leve it sheds but halving its duration. The wand regains all expended charges daily at dawn. If you expend the wand's last charge, roll a 1d20. On a 1, the wand bursts into flames and burns to ash in seconds.

name: Wand of Giggles
desc: This wand is tipped with a feather. The wand has 3 charges. While holding it, you can use an action to expend 1 of its charges and point the wand at a humanoid you can see within 30 pés of you. The alvo deve ter sucesso em a CD 10 teste de resistência de Carisma ou ficar forced to giggle for 1 minuto. Giggling doesn't prevent a alvo from taking actions or moving. The wand regains all expended charges daily at dawn. If you expend the wand's last charge, roll a 1d20. On a 1, the wand transforms into a Wand of Tears.

name: Wand of Guidance
desc: This slim, metal wand is topped with a cage shaped like a three-sided pyramid. An eye of glass sits within the pyramid. The wand has 3 charges. While holding it, you can use an action to expend 1 of its charges to cast the guidance spell from it. The wand regains all expended charges at dawn. If you expend the wand's last charge, roll a 1d20. On a 1, the wand transforms into a Wand of Resistance.

name: Wand of Harrowing
desc: The tips of this twisted wooden wand are exceptionally withered. The wand has 7 charges for the following properties. It regains 1d6 + 1 expended charges daily at dawn. If you expend the wand's last charge, roll a d20. On a 1, the wand disintegrates into useless white powder. Affliction. While holding the wand, you can use an action to expend 1 charge to cause a criatura you can see within 60 pés of you to become afflicted with unsightly, weeping sores. The alvo deve ter sucesso em a CD 15 teste de resistência de Constituição or have desvantagem on all Destreza and Carisma checks for 1 minuto. An afflicted criatura can repeat the teste de resistência no final de cada um de seus turnos, ending the effect on itself em um sucesso. Pain. While holding the wand, you can use an action to expend 3 charges to cause a criatura you can see within 60 pés of you to become wracked with terrible pain. The alvo deve ter sucesso em a CD 15 teste de resistência de Constituição ou receber 4d6 dano necrótico, and its movement Deslocamento is halved for 1 minuto. A pained criatura can repeat the teste de resistência no final de cada um de seus turnos, ending the effect on itself a success. If the alvo is also suffering from the Affliction property of this wand, it has desvantagem on the teste de resistência.

name: Wand of Ignition
desc: The cracks in this charred and blackened wooden wand glow like live coals, but the wand is merely warm to the touch. The wand has 3 charges. While holding it, you can use an action to expend 1 of its charges to set fogo to one flammable object or collection of material (a stack of paper, a pile of kindling, or similar) within 10 pés of you that is Small or smaller. The wand regains all expended charges daily at dawn. If you expend the wand's last charge, roll a 1d20. On a 1, the wand transforms into a Wand of Extinguishing.

name: Wand of Lightning Bolts
desc:
This wand has 7 charges. While holding it, you can use an action to expend 1 or more of its charges to cast the _lightning bolt_ spell (save CD 15) from it. For 1 charge, you cast the 3rd-level version of the spell. You can increase the espaço de magia level by one for each additional charge you expend.

The wand regains 1d6 + 1 expended charges daily at dawn. If you expend the wand's last charge, roll a d20. On a 1, the wand crumbles into ashes and is destroyed.

name: Wand of Lightning Bolts
desc:
While holding this wand, you can use an action to expend 1 or more charges to cast __lightning bolt_ (save CD 15). For 1 charge, you cast the spell’s 3rd-level version. Increase the espaço de magia level by one for each additional expended charge.

 This wand has 7 charges and regains 1d6+1 expended charges each dawn. When the last charge is expended, roll a d20\. On a 1, the wand emits sparks of electricity and disappears in a flash.

name: Wand of Magic Detection
desc: This wand has 3 charges. While holding it, you can expend 1 charge as an action to cast the _detect magic_ spell from it. The wand regains 1d3 expended charges daily at dawn.

name: Wand of Magic Detection
desc:
While holding this wand, you can use an action to expend 1 charge to cast __detect magic ._

This wand has 7 charges and regains 1d6+1 expended charges each dawn. When the last charge is expended, roll a d20\. On a 1, the wand violently shakes and sparks with magic then disappears.

name: Wand of Magic Missile
desc:
While holding this wand, you can use an action to expend 1 or more of its charges to cast __magic missile ._ For 1 charge, you cast the 1st-level version of the spell. Increase the espaço de magia level by one for each additional expended charge.

This wand has 7 charges and regains 1d6+1 expended charges each dawn. When the last charge is expended, roll a d20\. On a 1, the wand transforms into a bolt of magic that soars out of sight and disappears

name: Wand of Magic Missiles
desc:
This wand has 7 charges. While holding it, you can use an action to expend 1 or more of its charges to cast the _magic missile_ spell from it. For 1 charge, you cast the 1st-level version of the spell. You can increase the espaço de magia level by one for each additional charge you expend.

The wand regains 1d6 + 1 expended charges daily at dawn. If you expend the wand's last charge, roll a d20. On a 1, the wand crumbles into ashes and is destroyed.

name: Wand of Paralysis
desc:
This wand has 7 charges. While holding it, you can use an action to expend 1 of its charges to cause a thin blue ray to streak from the tip toward a criatura you can see within 60 pés of you. The alvo deve ter sucesso em a CD 15 teste de resistência de Constituição ou ficar paralisado for 1 minuto. no final de each of the alvo's turns, it can repeat the teste de resistência, ending the effect on itself em um sucesso.

The wand regains 1d6 + 1 expended charges daily at dawn. If you expend the wand's last charge, roll a d20. On a 1, the wand crumbles into ashes and is destroyed.

name: Wand of Paralysis
desc:
While holding this wand, you can use an action to expend 1 charge to força a criatura within 60 pés to make a CD 15 Constituição _teste de resistência_  or become _paralyzed_  for 1 minuto. The paralisado criatura can repeat the teste de resistência no final de cada um de seus turnos, ending the effect on itself on success.

This wand has 7 charges and regains 1d6+1 expended charges each dawn. When the last charge is expended, roll a d20\. On a 1, the wand shatters into hundreds of pieces.

name: Wand of Plant Destruction
desc: This wand of petrificado wood has 7 charges. While holding it, you can use an action to expend up to 3 of its charges to harm a plant or plant criatura you can see within 30 pés of you. The alvo deve fazer a CD 15 teste de resistência de Constituição, taking 2d8 dano necrótico for each charge you expended em uma falha no teste, or half as much damage on a successful one. The wand regains 1d6 + 1 expended charges daily at dawn. If you expend the wand's last charge, roll a 1d20. On a 1, the wand shatters and is destroyed.

name: Wand of Polymorph
desc:
This wand has 7 charges. While holding it, you can use an action to expend 1 of its charges to cast the _polymorph_ spell (save CD 15) from it.

The wand regains 1d6 + 1 expended charges daily at dawn. If you expend the wand's last charge, roll a d20. On a 1, the wand crumbles into ashes and is destroyed.

name: Wand of Polymorph
desc:
While holding this wand, you can use an action to expend 1 charge to cast _polymorph_ (save CD 15).

This wand has 7 charges and regains 1d6+1 expended charges each dawn. When the last charge is expended, roll a d20\. On a 1, the wand transforms into a Tiny bug that wanders away.

name: Wand of Relieved Burdens
desc: This wand has 7 charges. While holding it, you can use an action to expend 1 of its charges and touch a criatura with the wand. If the criatura is cego, enfeitiçado, surdo, amedrontado, paralisado, envenenado, or atordoado, the condition is removed from the criatura and transferred to you. You suffer the condition for the remainder of its duration or until it is removed. The wand regains 1d6 + 1 expended charges daily at dawn. If you expend the wand's last charge, roll a 1d20. On a 1, the wand crumbles to dust and is destroyed.

name: Wand of Resistance
desc: This slim, wooden wand is topped with a small, spherical cage, which holds a pyramid-shaped piece of hematite. The wand has 3 charges. While holding it, you can use an action to expend 1 of its charges to cast the resistance spell. The wand regains all expended charges at dawn. If you expend the wand's last charge, roll a 1d20. On a 1, the wand transforms into a Wand of Guidance .

name: Wand of Revealing
desc: Crystal beads decorate this wand, and a silver hand, index finger extended, caps it. The wand has 3 charges and regains all expended charges daily at dawn. While holding it, you can use an action to expend 1 of the wand's charges to reveal uma criatura or object within 120 pés of you that is either invisível or ethereal. This works like the see invisibility spell, except it allows you to see only that uma criatura or object. That criatura or object remains visible as long as it remains within 120 pés of you. If more than one invisível or ethereal criatura or object is in range when you use the wand, it reveals the nearest criatura or object, revealing invisível criaturas or objects before ethereal ones.

name: Wand of Secrets
desc: The wand has 3 charges. While holding it, you can use an action to expend 1 of its charges, and if a secret door or trap is within 30 pés of you, the wand pulses and points at the one nearest to you. The wand regains 1d3 expended charges daily at dawn.

name: Wand of Secrets
desc:
While holding this wand, you can use an action to expend 1 charge to make it pulse and point at the nearest secret door or trap within 30 pés.

This wand has 3 charges and regains 1d3 expended charges each dawn.

name: Wand of Tears
desc: The top half of this wooden wand is covered in thorns. The wand has 3 charges. While holding it, you can use an action to expend 1 of its charges and point the wand at a humanoid you can see within 30 pés of you. The alvo deve ter sucesso em a CD 10 teste de resistência de Carisma ou ficar forced to cry for 1 minuto. Crying doesn't prevent a alvo from taking actions or moving. The wand regains all expended charges daily at dawn. If you expend the wand's last charge, roll a 1d20. On a 1, the wand transforms into a Wand of Giggles  .

name: Wand of the Scribe
desc:
Nearly half the size of most other wands, this arcane implement is a solid piece of mithral with a tapered point that resembles the nib of a writing quill. While you are attuned to the wand, you can write on parchment and similar surfaces that would hold ink as though using an ordinary quill. The wand never runs out of ink when used this way.

The _wand of the scribe_ has 1d6 charges and regains 3 charges each dawn. You can expend 1 charge from the wand to cast __illusory script_ . You can also expend 1 charge from the wand to create a copy of any mundane document without requiring a forgery kit, substituting an Arcanismo check for any teste de habilidade you would normally make. Finally, you can expend 2 charges from the wand to transcribe 1 minuto of conversation that you can hear. You do not need to understand the language being spoken, and can choose to write it in any language that you know.

If you expend the wand’s last charge, roll a d20\. On a result of 5 or less, the wand bursts causing ink to stain your hand and the front of any clothing you are wearing as the enchanted trinket breaks apart.

name: Wand of the Timekeeper
desc: This smoothly polished wooden wand is perfectly balanced in the hand. Its grip is wrapped with supple leather strips, and its length is decorated with intricate arcane symbols. When you use it while playing a drum, you have vantagem on Carisma (Atuação) checks. The wand has 5 charges for the following properties. It regains 1d4 + 1 charges daily at dawn. Erratic. While holding the wand, you can use an action to expend 2 charges to força uma criatura you can see to re-roll its initiative no final de cada um de seus turnos for 1 minuto. An unwilling criatura that succeeds on a CD 15 teste de resistência de Sabedoria is unaffected. Synchronize. While holding the wand, you can use an action to expend 1 charge to choose uma criatura you can see who has not taken its turn this rodada. That criatura recebe its next turn immediately after yours regardless of its turn in the Initiative order. An unwilling criatura that succeeds on a CD 15 teste de resistência de Sabedoria is unaffected.

name: Wand of the War Mage, +1, +2, or +3
desc: While holding this wand, you gain a bonus to ataque mágico rolls determined by the wand's rarity. In addition, you ignore half cover when making a ataque mágico.

name: Wand of the War Mage +1
desc: You must be a spellcaster to attune to this wand. While holding this wand, you gain a bonus to _spell attack rolls_  (uncommon +1), and you ignore _half cover_  when making spell attacks.

name: Wand of the War Mage +2
desc: You must be a spellcaster to attune to this wand. While holding this wand, you gain a bonus to _spell attack rolls_  (rare +2), and you ignore _half cover_  when making spell attacks.

name: Wand of the War Mage +3
desc: You must be a spellcaster to attune to this wand. While holding this wand, you gain a bonus to _spell attack rolls_  (very rare +3), and you ignore _half cover_  when making spell attacks.

name: Wand of Treasure Finding
desc: This wand is adorned with gold and silver inlay and topped with a faceted crystal. The wand has 7 charges. While holding it, you can use an action and expend 1 charge to speak its command word. For 1 minuto, you know the direction and approximate distance of the nearest mass or collection of precious metals or minerals within 60 pés. You can concentrate on a specific metal or mineral, such as silver, gold, or diamonds. If the specific metal or mineral is within 60 pés, you are able to discern all locations in which it is found and the approximate amount in each location. The wand's magic can penetrate most barriers, but it is blocked by 3 pés of wood or dirt, 1 pé of stone, 1 inch of Comum metal, or a thin sheet of lead. The effect ends if you stop holding the wand. The wand regains 1d6 + 1 expended charges daily at dawn. If you expend the wand's last charge, roll a d20. On a 1, the wand turns to lead and becomes não mágico.

name: Wand of Vapors
desc: Green gas swirls inside this slender, glass wand. The wand has 7 charges for the following properties. It regains 1d6 + 1 expended charges daily at dawn. If you expend the wand's last charge, roll a d20. On a 1, the wand shatters into hundreds of crystalline fragments, and the gas within it dissipates. Fog Cloud. While holding the wand, you can use an action to expend 1 or more of its charges to cast the fog cloud spell from it. For 1 charge, you cast the 1st-level version of the spell. You can increase the espaço de magia level by one for each additional charge you expend. Gaseous Escape. When you are attacked while holding this wand, you can use your reação to expend 3 of its charges to transform yourself and everything you are wearing and carrying into a cloud of green mist until the start of your next turn. While you are a cloud of green mist, you have resistance to não mágico damage, and you can’t be agarrado or imobilizado. While in this form, you also can’t talk or manipulate objects, any objects you were wearing or holding can’t be dropped, used, or otherwise interacted with, and you can’t attack or cast spells.

name: Wand of Web
desc:
This wand has 7 charges. While holding it, you can use an action to expend 1 of its charges to cast the _web_ spell (save CD 15) from it.

The wand regains 1d6 + 1 expended charges daily at dawn. If you expend the wand's last charge, roll a d20. On a 1, the wand crumbles into ashes and is destroyed.

name: Wand of Web
desc:
While holding this wand, you can use an action to expend 1 charge to cast _web_ (save CD 15).

This wand has 7 charges and regains 1d6+1 expended charges each dawn. When the last charge is expended, roll a d20\. On a 1, the wand dissolves into a pile of webbing.

name: Wand of Windows
desc: This clear, crystal wand has 3 charges. You can use an action to expend 1 charge and touch the wand to any não mágico object. The wand causes a portion of the object, up to 1-pé square and 6 inches deep, to become transparent for 1 minuto. The effect ends if you stop holding the wand. The wand regains 1d3 expended charges daily at dawn. If you expend the wand's last charge, roll a 1d20. On a 1, the wand slowly becomes cloudy until it is completely opaque and becomes não mágico.

name: Wand of Wonder
desc:
This wand has 7 charges. While holding it, you can use an action to expend 1 of its charges and choose a alvo within 120 pés of you. The alvo can be a criatura, an object, or a point in space. Roll d100 and consult the following table to discover what happens.

If the effect causes you to cast a spell from the wand, the spell's save CD is 15. If the spell normally has a range expressed in pés, its range becomes 120 pés if it isn't already.

If an effect covers an area, you must center the spell on and include the alvo. If an effect has multiple possible subjects, the GM randomly determines which ones are affected.

The wand regains 1d6 + 1 expended charges daily at dawn. If you expend the wand's last charge, roll a d20. On a 1, the wand crumbles into dust and is destroyed.

| d100   | Effect                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                   |
|--------|----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|
| 01-05  | You cast slow. 06-10 You cast faerie fogo.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               |
| 11-15  | You are atordoado until the start of your next turn, believing something awesome just happened. 16-20 You cast gust of wind.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               |
| 21-25  | You cast detect thoughts on the alvo you chose. If you didn't alvo a criatura, you instead take 1d6 dano psíquico.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  |
| 26-30  | You cast stinking cloud.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 |
| 31-33  | pesada rain falls in a 60-pé radius centered on the alvo. The area becomes lightly obscured. The rain falls until the start of your next turn.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        |
| 34-36  | An animal appears in the unoccupied space nearest the alvo. The animal isn't under your control and acts as it normally would. Roll a d100 to determine which animal appears. On a 01-25, a rhinoceros appears; on a 26-50, an elephant appears; and on a 51-100, a rat appears.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       |
| 37-46  | You cast relâmpago bolt.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 |
| 47-49  | A cloud of 600 oversized butterflies fills a 30-pé radius centered on the alvo. The area becomes heavily obscured. The butterflies remain for 10 minutos.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            |
| 50-53  | You enlarge the alvo as if you had cast enlarge/reduce. If the alvo can't be affected by that spell, or if you didn't alvo a criatura, you become the alvo.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      |
| 54-58  | You cast darkness.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       |
| 59-62  | Grass grows on the ground in a 60-pé radius centered on the alvo. If grass is already there, it grows to ten times its normal size and remains overgrown for 1 minuto.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               |
| 63-65  | An object of the GM's choice disappears into the Ethereal Plane. The object must be neither worn nor carried, within 120 pés of the alvo, and no larger than 10 pés in any dimension.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                |
| 66-69  | You shrink yourself as if you had cast enlarge/reduce on yourself.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       |
| 70-79  | You cast fireball.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       |
| 80-84  | You cast invisibility on yourself.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       |
| 85-87  | Leaves grow from the alvo. If you chose a point in space as the alvo, leaves sprout from the criatura nearest to that point. Unless they are picked off, the leaves turn brown and fall off after 24 horas.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          |
| 88-90  | A stream of 1d4 × 10 gems, each worth 1 gp, shoots from the wand's tip in a line 30 pés long and 5 pés wide. Each gem causa 1 dano contundente, and the total damage of the gems is divided equally among todas as criaturas in the line.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 |
| 91-95  | A burst of colorful shimmering leve extends from you in a 30-pé radius. You and cada criatura in the area that can see deve ter sucesso em a CD 15 teste de resistência de Constituição or become cego for 1 minuto. A criatura can repeat the teste de resistência no final de cada um de seus turnos, ending the effect on itself em um sucesso.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            |
| 96-97  | The alvo's skin turns bright blue for 1d10 dias. If you chose a point in space, the criatura nearest to that point is affected.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        |
| 98-100 | If you alvoed a criatura, it deve fazer a CD 15 teste de resistência de Constituição. If you didn't alvo a criatura, you become the alvo and deve fazer the teste de resistência. If the teste de resistência fails by 5 or more, the alvo is instantly petrificado. On any other failed save, the alvo is imobilizado and begins to turn to stone. While imobilizado in this way, the alvo must repeat the teste de resistência no final de its next turn, becoming petrificado em uma falha or ending the effect em um sucesso. The petrification lasts until the alvo is freed by the greater restoration spell or similar magic. |

name: Wand of Wonder
desc:
While holding this wand, you can use an action to expend 1 charge and choose a criatura, object, or point in space within 120 pés. Roll d100 on the Wand of Wonder table to determine the effect.

Spells cast from the wand have a CD de resistência à magia of 15 and a range of 120 pés. Area effects are centered on and include the alvo. If an effect might alvo multiple criaturas, the Narrator randomly determines which ones are affected.

This wand has 7 charges and regains 1d6+1 expended charges each dawn. When the last charge is expended, roll a d20\. On a 1, the wand violently shakes and sparks with magic then disappears.

__**Table: Wand of Wonder**__

If you didn’t alvo a criatura, you take 1d6 dano psíquico instead.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      |

Roll a d4 to determine the beast (1: _rhinoceros_ , 2: _elephant_ , 3–4: _rat_ ).                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        |
